# Mam iyangarete eitekerene okasulo lo Soroti

IPA- Erai nu ileic apupun ebe engolopasi ikaasilan kar Anabet napolon nako Soroti distrikt kanu aibokso nu okassulo. Ido kotoma awadikaeta etakani bala ikanisian lu ateker adiope kukete ebele.

Akoto ber eong angit kes lu izukete ebele: inyo bo apolou na abootin?

Alomakisi kesi agirit itunga i sesuno kede abootin, do kinyo ageun abukin itunga spelek lu mam eseunitere

kesi. Nesiodo atemar ebe amamun edemokrase ko Soroti district naerai mam itunga eseununod kede e abootin kwa ebalar ekisil.

Kotoma agogong na abooti arai kilanyi ljo, kocam ailanylo konye mere awolobobot kwa egeubotor ikanisian kwa kangul.

Kosodi mam ilosete okasulo koomomoete nu eitekerene lo etakit Iteso ka Ikumama. Ekoto yesi aomoom nu ikaamunitos

apolo na itemwan kalu itbeokitos yesi kokasulo kede Soroti kere aimoriarit.

Arai iyatakitos yesi angolopa kokasulo mam yesi ipote aekar ingaren kede apolo.

Kosodi ejaasi itunga lu apolok ko Soroti lu atomasi kesi da aicuk ebele toma politiks luko Soroti. Ekot epone itunga kwa kalu kojatakinatar itunga luko Soroti kede politiks kec.

Joseph Opolot - Kasese

IPA-Eyatama adumun apak alamia acedun adis nuekudete etau ka kanu abakaku na ajaun odistrikt lo Soroti.

Kotoma. Etop Omaruk Liune 25. Omodokokingol (July) 1-98. "Emua Ebamu lu: etiakitos itunga." esialamikit eong aimuar ke, konye ekoto ber ipolok luko Teso kere, aimorikikin kosodete amoun ne etoruni atlakaku ngin.

Elipit eong Col William

Omaria kwape apolon aicolong loka MPs luko Teso, aimorikikin kede MPs ngul kere, mere Iteso bon, konye Ikumama da, kosodete amoun ne ejai ationis, kaitemokin da. Amuno nako Teso kere ejai nejaasi kesi MPs. Dodo ber bobo arai erai kesi lumam imorikikin biai bodo epedoriata itunga lukokau da aimorikikin?

Okwe, Joseph Ekemu lo Kaberamaido ka. Otobo ka

ice Ikumama da, kotamata ber yesi nulipedorete kere kimorikikisi Teso. Ebalasi kere ipolok icle lu eroko ejarete ebe, kinaiki kolo isio aiboi ko Teso, komam itiakak, kimanyanakin da.

Aso arai do kedaunos ipolok lu Teso, ido konyet yesi ainyekikin idweigurete Teso, idodio mwakace yesi erono noi.

Sam Ekadu
Opuoet - Gweri

# Ileic!!!! 'Ikabakan' cut amaria etogo!

IPA- Emasi nu ileic aipup ebe amariate 'ikabakan' uko Kumi, apolokiton LC 5 Ngi Umar Okodel ka RDC Akumbe Mukhwana etogo operot ko Kumi.

Nasodit, epe etogo lo aek stosomai Okodel. Ationis kin, abu ngesi kojaiak ekale ka (kwape bala etalar ke ka) amunamunai etogo, eda kwana eroniar etogo ko.

Naiyarat, etaci apugan RDC 500,000/- kanu apage etogo ngol etap. Ipu itogoi lu etarete ko Kumi, luda edolit RDC alpagis, ita amaria etogo lo edistrikt.

Aomit kitemokinai angolopa kangul kwanata: Kilutub ekaasulo edistrikt aiemun aipiyai aitemonokina etogo lo aju Okodel, tetere bobo ngesi epedori alomar togo ngol.

Ekot akwenyar Okodel da sidareto go ejok, mere stukit iduwe ka angor ore, dodo kwi amunaar etogo lo apugan. Ekot ngesi ainyitunun ekale ke isboi ko Kumi, kosalite lo epol oreke lo Arutur.

Kilutub ekaasulo arlatac RDC apeesan kanu ngesi apero togo lo apugan. Ejo ebe abu ngesi kogearite aitemonokin etogo ngol.

Ekot do ngesi kiyatak atacenen apiyai (rent) ne ejai edistrikt.

Mere RDC bon. DISO da epen togo kaloetam Kumi. Ekot ngol da kotacanak etam Kumi apeesan.

Ekot ekaasulo lo Kumi kiketakin. Siri kikunakata aitoiomun aomisio nu, naarai kiponere do abokar oni abolar.

J.J.Ekwam - Kumi Town

# Emudiari ewaragi lo

IPA- Amasio na ewaragi kalo enyarital 'omoti' nes kwana ayangau ationis noi. Itunga luipu kwana kesi adaun aiyat akipi kadeklis nako Kapir kanu ewaragi kalo.

Araasi 21.6.98 abu ewaragi lo kotula apolon Abwanga Anderia lo Atapar Kapir kosodi Olupot Peter nesi da bobo eyasital akipi kanu aimat omoti. Ecle bobo Asaku Michael eyasital ngol da akipi.

Akoto bodo eong akwenyakin ateker, aimat iboro kwa kalu erono noi, ibirort ateker. Kaomomata Itunga nuedolit aswam, kosacata adilonokin amat. Ebuni ewaragi lo amudiar itunga lu ipu.

Gilbert Engimu

# SOROTI MUNICIPAL COUNCIL URBAN TENDER BOARD

Tenders are invited from competent firms/organisations or persons for the supply or provision of the following goods and services to Soroti Municipal Council for the financial year 1998/99.

(A) Supply of Goods and Services:

1. Supply of stationery
2. Printing General

(B) Tender for revenue sources:

1. Bus/Taxi Park
2. Soroti Main Market
3. Loading and off loading
4. Markets in Eastern Division jointly i.e (Kigandani and Second hand clothers markets)
5. Markets in Northern Division jointly i.e (Madera/Campswahili markets)
6. Markets in Western Division jointly i.e (Pamba, Senior Quarters and Nakatunya Markets)
7. Native Liquor Brewing Permits i.e (Western Division, Northern Division and Eastern Division, to be applied separately).

(3) Each source/service should be tendered separately.
4. Tenders must be submitted with the photocopies of the following:
(a) Certificate of registration/incorporation
(b) Income tax clearance certificate for 1998
(c) Valid trading licence for 1998.
(d) Receipt for payment of non-refundable fees,
(e) Names of Bankers and Account number
(f) Physical location and postal address of the business
(g) Any other useful reference
(h) Graduated tax tickets for 1998
(i) Tender bids for revenue sources must include VAT.
5. Applications in plain sealed envelopes clearly marked "Tender for—" should be addressed to the Secretary Soroti Municipal Council Tender Board, P.O Box 109, Soroti and deposited in the Tender Box at the council offices not later than 12.000 p.m on 23/7/98. Tenderers can come and witness the opening of tender bids on the same day at 2.000 p.m in the council chambers.

NOTE: (1) Payment of a non-refundable fee of:
(a) Sha. 30,000/= for category A
(b) Sha 20,000/= for category B
(2) Detailed tender documents for category A of a non-refundable fee to the cashier.

The fee is not a bound two, must the highest, lowest or any tender.

MUNICIPAL COUNCIL TENDERBOARD

KETOP Nuöwonggaat, Oueodokoklogoll (Jutie) 2 - 8, 1998

## KOKAN KORAP KORA

Kobala aberu ebe "Papake iJunia" kobala ekile da ebe "Totoka"

## Siri ilimit atai ekiror lo Ejak

Na Ewadikase Etop
NE agesmata Okelo kede
Kalaadi asriantun, komam
ngin diope kakeni ajeni ekiror
koyemcin, ajai kesi 'anyara'
bon kwape "apena yata" arai
"roepat jeta" kojai adodu
da.

Ketuboros apuarasia adis
kosudere kesi ejoranar
kokorotia, amamni apagalu
kesi anyara kede ikiroritake,
le da kobala ebe Kalaadi
konyarai ya da ngesi Okela.
Ne 'adoyoto akiro' acis otas
Okelo kanuka Kalaadi
kosudere akiro egapengun
aduare otas ka Kalaadi da,
abu kisi apagalikin lu anyara
bonik kede ikirorita kesi kala.
Akiro nu adottos otawan kala
kasi nu amota ber amina
lojibet.

Kotoma aminanara kesi
apota Okelo ka Kalaadi
kojalala anyara kede ikirorita
kala kidulokinos luka
baitisintu. Konya ngul da kito
aikad kosudere do kwi arnsa
lokec bon lu ajenete ikulepek.
Ipupunitotor aciepak yeni
arama na akoogo ebakai ebe
"Egoliam loka", arai
"Amaked naka". Ezbo epona
kangul konye komam lucie
itunga tai ejenete ebe iworok
kwi kwangin.

Kedulokinos Okelo kede
Kalaadi kosudere adumun
idawet, apota bobo kijula
'ikirorita' kesi lu eworotor.
Kagrunet ewarai aberu
okilenda ebe "Papake ibuly".
kosodi ekilokit da anyara
aburu ebe "Totoke ibuly".
Eroko ber kemakina
imukeru ekiror nen.

Kemakin ikuku ekiror
kijulakinsa bo kwi arasai loka
'Totoke i Junior ka Papake i
Junior' (arai kere emakiti)
ikuku ekiror kapapake nen).
Kebu epejonin inguit idio
katu korekei kolimite ekiror
ke ebe, kwape net singirun

## Epo nelo itikokinet ekolera

Tetere aiku ekolera, adeka na ailep na ededeng kakere, iburai aidar aila ejok noi. Imori
na aidar icoloonin kolaete; ailosenen akanin akaulo na aitosom ecolooni ka airapit inyani

ABWANGUN adeka na
andekakalidoloonu ipuko
Uganda ka atwaspin adw
ibako EastAfficakosabitini
aika lu atuborok idin aur
itunga lu ipu. Konye erai
akibiera adeka na kipedori
nra adikokin arai kitup tmi
Kisile lu aidar aila.

Ikyobo ekolera?
Ekolera nes adeka na
imoro ro na eyangauni
akipor. Etnakini ekolera
itunganan ailep akipi ka
ailen ro. Egear ngesi
katipet tai.

Edauni do ekolera akipi
takwawan kitunganan
katipet korisai atunganan
egugong, kotwan da,
aibapak atakulotta itaman
luni arai wongon bon, arai
nam yemadekan edumunit
emukuan na atant katipet.
Ikyobo eyauni ekolera?
Iikur lu ejaani akulk
itunganan kayen adeka
ekolera, kes ayaunete
ekolera ikumunetado izle
itunga da adeka na arai
kemakita akipi nu
ejaasi adurut lo (kotoma
cibar ka aiskari).

Ekora da ekolera arai
kitingtingata itunga ebar

Kilat akania ka azalmat
Yekusiu na kitwanan
wokasi
Puroko kitinga iuyamat
arai anyara

KORAP INYAMAT KOS

ETOP Natmuggaari, Omudokokingul (July) 9-15, 1998

# AKIRO NU ANGOR

Kobala aberu ebe “Papake i.Junia” kobala ekile da ebe “Totoke Bebi”

## Siri ilimit atai ekiror lo Ejakait?

Na Ewadikan Etop

NE agrunata Okelo kede Kalaadi airiamun, komam ngin diope kakesi ajeni ekiror keyenicie, ajai kesi ‘anyaru hon kwapo “apese yata” arai “esepet jeta” kojai adodio da.

Ketaborso apaarasia adin kosodete kesi ajenanar kokorora, amamsi apagala kesi anyara kede ikiroria koc. Je da kobala ebe Kalaadi konyarai ya da ngesi Okelo.

Ne ‘adoyoto akiro’ acis otau Okelo kasuka Kalaadi kosodete akiro ngupengun adnere otau ka Kalaadi da, ahu kiti apagalikisi hi anyara bonik kede ikiroria koc kalu. Akiro na adsotos otawon kala kesi nu amina her amina iojibat.

Kotoma aminanara koc apotu Okelo ka Kalaadi kojalata anyara kede ikiroria kalu kidialokinos luka baitsumu. Konye ngul da kito aikad kosodete do kwi aman lukso hon lu ajenete ikidepek (pupunitenter aciepak yesi arama na akongo ebakai ebe “Egoilam luka”, arai “kneked baka”. Eebo eponekangul konye komam lucin itunga tai ejenete ebe iworon kwi kwangin.

Kedulokinos Okelo kede Kalaadi kosodete adamun iduwe, apoto bobo kijula ‘ikiroria’ koc lu eworoter. Kegesneri eworoi aberu okilenike ebe “Papake Body” kasudit ekitiokit da anyara aberu ebe “Totoke iJinity”. Eroko ber kemakina omikera ekiror nen.

Kemaikin ikoku ekiror kijulakinos bo kwi araun luka “Totoke i Junior ka Papake i Junior” (arai kesi omukitai ikoku ekiror kapapake nen). Kebu epejonon ingisit aiku korken kolimite ekiror ke ebe, kwape nat aingitun.

Angor na Atatur, Kumi na itunakete ber iduwe koc pas. Toma ekiroria iduwe kangul edamante bo kesi da lukec lu enyaratar kakonye iduwe koc

aberu ne ejai okilenike Okelo, epeoni ngesibib acis yen ijaiko ijo ngesi kwape isurian lo iteapolisi okale. Konye kikenyikmy ijo ekirer cat esabi bala idedengit ijo epony ecir loman ijaikit ngesi angasibib. Ingai nat ejani aciepak ekiul Imusa da ejai tema “Siri ilimit atai ekiror loka ‘ejakait’.”

Man bobo erai atamar ebe adio anyara itsan yen apolon kede ekiror ke erai eonwame saarai ejai epony lopo eposkinata itunga da ebe mutan kiworor kopone kala ene je omamo adio atisins ejai. Nesi idumuna ijo kiremar kwape nat ebe “mamsi Opiu” man lo iworotai aciepak enyamrairkin itia num ke apwasaan tai ebe “Opiu”.

Konye ejai apagala epony eman kdo kowai lo iduwe da arai kitapaaros do lu apolok anyara esate koc kopone kalo mam iduwe ejenunata

ikiroria auriak koc ebe.

Kitoma ijo ebe awolio ikoku kon kosodete aduman kanenicie ide kingisi ngesi ikiroria auriak ke kitemari hon ebe “Papake i Junia” arai “Totoke iJinity”. Epatana kere agipun ijo aurian ikoku kangin ipu ber itunga lu iworin kwangin kakalukec? Mam eong awonol kwangin.

Kosodi apagalis acis nesi na bodo anyara ngul luman eurites arai lu mam ejonasi iurian koc konye kopolioritos. Anyara bodo kesi bui?

Nes do awomitor eong ebe ekot ber ikoku kotereikisote alimokin ikiroria auriak ke idu ekin ber ngesi kopupuni da teni iwororo ber aurian ke kokorora kangul ko nesi ecamunia ikoku ebe teni ikiroria ke ngul idu mam erai adiakaret alemun kes. Emonas iduwe akorian alimun ikiroria auriak koc akorian naarai ededengusikino kes.

## Ationis kipimaeta lu agwelanar kocaalo

Na Christine K Ima

KOEEMINA ecir lo angor kocaalo pas, abu Amusugul kingita angor etiai lo ikorion lo ejanatse kesi, akaulo na asakun komisiri, kanu ebe amoikin esokoni Ingwelaret kwape cabo apoto angor komonyunitutor ebe akoriste kesi iboro konye komamei negwelaret.

Abu Amusugul kosal eumokit bala do karai aibukaret engisitai ngesi, ketomakisi angor aitem etiai ikorion kowai lo akorokoron, abaafun (akalayan), atampekon (igamai-ikopon), aderikai ka iboro icir ngul idilar aipima iboro kocaalo.

“What are those units of measurements?” (apolisuke ebe inyoika bodo ipimasia ngul?), engisit Amusugul. Kwape aberu na esiomit, kirimite da akwapin, apito Amusugul ipimasia lu etupitai kotoma akwapin kere, kwape na ikiliri, ilitai, ilatirin (youndi) ka icir da. Ipimasia da lu kesi itwasamau kotoma agwelanar ido ngin yen ekoro agwelan arai agwela ibore, kwape ikorion, itijimari ngun kotoma iritai lo ejaatatar ana lo ipuda ngesi. Arai do Amusugul atigi apupun nu ngama na.

Etamites itunga nu epodorete kere aipikor atamit kokalia koc kopone kalo akoru ka agwelanar da. Icis ibaajarakitos iriongeta lukupikoma apiyar aiuwama na, kopu amuno atacar ekaulo. Konye ca umony non na ebe emainace esokoni?

Kidul ijo ocaalo epona lo elosio agwelanar, kacut na ikorion nesi itagelikina tai. Ipimasia kesi kesi ca lupo esaumokitos Amusugul akorokoron ka abaafun. Ipimasia lu kesi erai lu emucunono amocunun tai kotoma amukebeni arai oboro icir lu iuwanatul kenu aswam kana egitara, mew aipima iboro lugwelare.

Ajaasi kolo apakio nu araar eipimas lo alos kede ajon, “adudumak” kobuni “asapisapi” Arai “adudumak” amukebu neekia lo esikere iraan. Auspsapi nesi arai amopira (elianti) na eika loka iraan DDT lo anyarirai asapisapi. Ajaasi akalayan nazina ka adebei nu akinyet etabasa.

Kewolioni iken ngul kede aingadeta kasi kijulakinos ipimasia da. Nes bo aponiata nu akorokoron- amukeben na akinyeta na edia, abaafun, ajangin ka ikopoi egidegela. Mam ipimasia lu itemete cat iboro jok an kotoma okiloi konye agwelanarak kocaalo kangina ingalante akorisk ebe ejai ngin diope koitemeta koc alangiru na epona kotoma okiloi.

Kepota ikera kwi otaunin kogwelarete ikorion, luagwelete kocaalo, komisaanin ikidepek, kodipete ameda napotit akaulo aimod lukokao.

Kanu do adumun esokouni lo ejok adotit akorisk kokao aijal epony ipimasia koc kangul. Kosodi ekot arai erai akoru kana agwelan ikorion kipu teni iboro lu makana kopatana agwelan, nati ediope lo epol etiai nesi teni atubon atatubet agiriar ikorion kodite egarama kaneka. Mere einer nu ebe amumus esokouni korai akalayan adis bon nu ejantar ituan kanu agwelan.

## Mere amodit angor kede e World Cup

ikilok, mam do bobo iboete kere da Esawa adotere hon anyina je ebe elosi omopira ido konye abongun etiai kobala ebe ajai aite emopira. Mai moi kwape kwangin.

Itami ijo da aberu aingit ebe “okwe okwaiki bo emopira kas at? Ido bo ituni kwara da?” Ilimokinio ijo ebe emamei ibore ipeni ijo.

Mokoko but kwi lu ejaasi otaun etamiten ber mot mot. Akiro nu ejaasi cat ocaalo cat nu elwakiatar itelefesisom. Erai do ikilok toni itelispai aibwot aibwot admi otaun. Ideodo itunga aangitanar angor ebe “aibo ejai ejakait?”

“but nepe kolejo abisio ngul otaun ebe kwana eyaus ewald kap, ngesi ber elosit ngesi da ajenun ake akiro,” ebongokini do aberu. but ekesa je

kolo esabakisi mucaala.

Arai ebwout lo owadon otaun ebe kanu aite e World cup, ekoto but ijo adiope pueran about otaun abwalar ngesi. Konye ebala ngesi ebe “inyabo iwomunt ijo? Ijo ebe “eong etako e World Cup?” Man ekoto atubokite angor acoa.

Kosodi konye eja bobo icir lu aromoidu. Anakini kolo kwi akeja airim sek ido konye arnikit ebe ilosi isio aite emopira. Idumuni ijo irimoritai oraria ebe emootai elefesisom.

Nepe nan edilokinere airim,

akware nat inyakuni, kia alomakini do aisab da ebe “itodianario emopira taputsu da. Aus ijo yen mam ijeni akiro na emopira erai bodo iwomun kwape kwangin.

Ibala ijo ebe ikilok bon epaliokoto? Iba! angor da, akiro ngupengun. Ejaasi angor nu ariini aidolokino aite etalesisom. Asuruan emopira odauna mam ya da enyouni.

Icasit ya da aima omopira komam ber ewomounoi da eba inyobo nat enyamio ebong. Erai aikanikan ya aikanikan.

Aus biun aciepak ecamun alosit aipoqra, ecakakino inyamat akim acakakin abongu bo ya, dec Omopira.

Awoniki nan edia sek, eroko ya ilekorit akou omopira. Ido konye

apuru ngesi isiriengun. Adolore ojokomi ebe aisisto nan inyamat sek. Eebo, itente be ber nesi emopira itoni adaun. Kedel nat mawa lo ainyam ocan bodo ijai ijo.

Kosodi konye bo mi idwe da apokorit epali. Icakakinin ijo ikoku kolosi ya ape omopira ide nat ijo amn aitelemate kede ikoku ibiorkini, konyou, kosakasak, tai! Idejo ikoku kopayen. Ekot na icasit aite emopira aupa kede ikokoku.

Aus, ateker, arai da ejijim emopira konye ekoto adaun ber akon aswamsimes cat konye itekorot asenar emopira.

Kosodi bo yesi da lu idirete ne alwana erai boot airim kanu emopira, ekoto cabo konesmete emopira aheit.

Kkonye mere bobo aipwak akiro acie ido konye aredeikin ebe ilositos omopira.

ETOP Nainonpout, Onodokokingol (July) 9 - 15, 1998

# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

## KYURIANUT

### Emuogo loelilim

Na Jonathan Angora

EMUOGO ecie lo mam edwar ido kopedorete aidor sinyam ka aibotbo ejon nesi ebeit aitodolikin aiboisio nuko Pallisa ka Teuo ne kwana idilar lo ebe ensigetta lo edwar komina aiyar itunga.

Apolokiton eriongo lo engisi nu akoru (WARO) Prof. Joseph Mukichi olimani nu pac ko Pallisa.

### Ebura ibaajai

Na Martin Alko

AKERIT ka angopongiopotoi nesi kwana edilo kotem Kapir, Ngora kanu eyongdotor itunga, arusario ojneta kanu apiyai nu ebaajaton kesi koPonetty Alloviation Project (PAP) nu iboru kwana kaburaco.

## Eyarit

Na William Otaala

ESIRRALET loka Saeorika ko Tororo, Jobe Busolo ngesi arocuto ipolisin kanu ebe ngesi ainson yswaman lokoriengit lo akim na skipyai (UEB) Morey Wanaja kede emuodu eiyar cut arassi 18/6/98.

### Anangutu ipejok

Na Charles Orengon

ESAPAT Robert Okirira ngesi abu kinapangy eupakal Ben Takei kanu ebe angertier ekoroi lo arikokitai kesi kapeje ko Bugondo Kasilo arassi 19/6/98.

## Kumi engadan kanu eropit

Na William Otaala

EKALAANI lokotem Mukajie, Tororo Piso Osirara, Kwan, lo ebe mam stacitai eropit ke lo ilapoi 15 nges abu konyanyarikin adlunga engadan loka e diorikit lo Tororo, Mathew Alianga koyapesi loka a CAO ne etoknere aurianet arassi 15/6/98.

Abala Okware ebe iburai ngesi e distrikt eropit agisao March 1997 kede apesan acie nu ebeit aitac ngesi kwape ipolitere etem Mobi, Kilema isoliminet koropit loka Scale 1/7 ebe amuno ngesi adumun bala 1.5mi.

Abala Okware elimonokini

## TORORO

Etap ebe ebu ngesi konyanyarikin ne engista ngesi Alianga apiai ke kobula Alianga ebe ti Okware aidor ber ngesi kodan aurianet.

Eyatskit da Okware ebe abu ngesi kidar adaon nuwan iwongon, komotar do ngesi eyapesi lo korasakini agumugum Alianga igumur kinagauni akok kede akong.

Lu aja aurianet kes emoriarito ACAO Bunyole Ejkt Charles Okello, egirigiran loka ayuara ka lo apiyai kodistrikt ijaka, Okongo Okiror Obooma ka Richard Ways.

## Ageun aikis iguudoi ko Solot

Na Jole Opolot

E.DIVISION lo Kide na etaun Soroti, nes kwana ages aismonokin irotin, la edoli aejau kes kere amairon aerei kede apiai nu adolote 3mi.

Atupton Town Clerk lo eyait e Division lo, Lazarus Ebolu kede apolon sicolong.

## IYALAMA

Ekool ka Beda Ongudu ka ekalu Amuriat kesi nialamikitas CAO Soroti, Town Clerk Soroti, Manager UEB, CARE Kami, SOCADIDO kede itunga kera lu apotia kingarakisi kesi kapak na atwamaata kesi itatait kes Martha Alaso.

LCIII ke Robert Esaru, kes alimokinete Etap akiro ngun koyapesis kes arassi 30/6/98. Abakasi kesi ebe erai kwana alosikinet kes na adetsun iboru lu ipu no li amunaros ko division kes kimoriaritos agillon ka esokouni loapolon.

Iriotin da kwana lu nutasi kesi aikis, kes imoriaritos Obwangor, Oumo, Uburu ka Ocom kede apiyai nu eswamaunete kesi ikulepek.

Eyatskitos kesi ebe epote konye kesi aitemonikin alaro na epi kiding oigol (Public garden) tetere ebe ecauni etaan koodi amwekemwek.

## Ebonit ActionAid alakun luican

Na Michael Ongwara

ERIONGET lukojokotau, Action-Aidness ebei aitagour aitolot iprojektan lu apolo ko Pallisa distrikt adaon ikaru 15, kanu apucun aijar naka tunga lu ican.

Apolokiton etiimu loka Action-Aidin epejokit Pallisa, Ejkt. Walasimhi ngesi alimori nu istamance kede ikasilan ka eswamak apugan.

## PALLISA

ko Pallisa arassi 24/6/98 aistemun alosikinet kes. Abala ngesi ebe Pallisa nesi eburo araun edistrikt lo kanyekkate adumun agangat nakatitai (grants) kanu apolo kes: Lucre idistriktan lu igangitai ber kwapekwana kesi: Apac, Katakwi, Bundibugyo, Masindi ka Mubende.

## Aseun ayaitok luka UCOBAC

Na Michael Ongwara

ATENU naka UCOBAC ko Pallisa distrikt nada igangit igurupun lu epeleatos angor nesi arassi 17/6/98 abu koneo nyaitok kes luteriak.

Etooiso asno na kotaun loko Pallisa neda ediauna imechun lu igurupun lu edeparete 50 korai da e Programme Manager loko UCOBAC ko Kampala, Joseph Wanguolo ka District Focal Point Officer Pallisa, Jacob Richards Opolot kesi apolokiton.

Kokaru lo atubor nesi aponatar apolokitok ka UCOBAC, Kampala kowotorata ayaitok ka UCOBAC katenu nako Pallisa kano ebe itolitolio na apiai nu edolete 29mi-nu ejaikit akwap nako Finland kesi aikoopainikin igurupun lu angor.

Ajkt. Edith Kitaka nada erai atupton orahan ko LC 5 Pallisa, amrehi nako Katak i Church.

## KOLIMONO NU AGWELANAK KON, ROGORI, ETOP, EDITI, ETIAI LO ALIMONORETA 2013-2015 KELOMELA YTUNGA LU-IPU NENADEPAR

## AOKU

## Aromyutu eyengunak kaswam kanu epension, adukutu atukoto

Na Spendlove Edyama

YTUNGA luapuni kiyengutu kaswam kes kotoma apugan agoun kokaru 1992 toni 1997 ko Kumi distrikt kesi adukutu atukot naka imechun ber 31 konyariete Kumi Pensioner Society.

Etoronara da eyengunak lu eyapesi ka CAO, LC 5 ka erionget loka apiai kanu ebe araparapa angurian kes apiyai nu eyengunak. Abala atupton atudon eicolong lu atukot kana, korai kolo eswaman lokoriengit lo apiai ko Kumi distrikt, Jesue Okiror ebe eyapesi loka apiai nesi apolo angepiko eyengunak naarai ebe adumintenei eyapesi ngol akiro nuikamunitos atacio naka epension koyapesi loka Public Service kalo angican aswamisio apugan (IGG), konye ebe atapit araparap ebe eniko ber apiyai kedoluna.

Abu eyapesi ka IGG imodukinta ke eriongete loka Public Service kigirakisi CAO ebalua loda ewalia 24/12/97 kanu amunako atacar eyengunak kanu ido kiyatanakitate oponin kwape abeitor.

Konye toni loie ebe na imodio ibure edumana eyengunak cut. Iburan lu apiyai nuilamete 35mi Mam Etop abu kodum Cui.

ETOP Naiveagenti, Omodokokingul (July) 9 - 15, 1998

# ETOLOMU KYERE eBAJET

ko Madera nesi pas abu kitolut
Akomis lo zewerete kamu akelesian
ngukda no cyantai ko Madera. Apa
ngel ekelenia ipikon iyakta iyarei
gumun agakite ekonisi lo neda apeta
munga 40 kujaikimetre

koorekinai abuluwan (certificater)

kure aitosom ewoe ediope kotoma
kippamiet km.

Na Ivan Engeru ko Kalaki

ETEMI Bululu, Kalaki nesi etolomu
ebajet lo ekaru 1998/99 lo tungan
44.592.000. Ekalaasi lo upyui
kotem kalo (Sub-accountant),
Faustine Okello-ngeni pas alimokine
Esayna koyapesi ke arassi 24/6/98.

Kebajet kalo, abala Okello ebe
ebet aitwasam apiai 3.796 m/-
aitetumus adeketa nu eswamak
kotem ka ryspeto da. Nu angabio
kes etukakitai 2m/- nu ebeitin
ayakakin adeketasi adiope adekin
nalem sek kigangite erionget loka
SDDP

## Emunoi atukun 58m/- kosolo, atosom 65m/-

bian na 36.639.700/- atomi nei.

Abu da kilip ijaka hapugante
koteda ka LCs kere simurikikiti
kama atukun apiai nu kitopoloni
etem Kyere.

Toma osolosinsi bue nes
ewominer ebe apote 18.031.500/-
atukun koecidete alasisin atukokin
2.023.000, koeedi indosmite kes
Automunete 11.140.000/-.

Iperan bi idoma kes edwartiai ebe
apote alomun kotoma owaitin icia
lu egelagela.

Apolon eicelong LC3, Ejiit, Abeit

kinyinginyeg ason epugak tu delu
ka LCs simurikikin aawam
kagraging kanu aitopol etem kac.

## Okefie Ekalaasi lo apiai

Kowai lo asitsia, abala Okello ebe
isomeran. Napianga P/S ka Ipenri
P/S kes ebeit aigang naarai ebe
smamente adeketa cut. Eliokaktai

epelu lu 1.5m/-, kousili ebe bace
isomerni kotem etukakitai 1.15m/
- Aitemonakin irotite ka idaracan
nesi egitikinla 374.000/-.

Icia kobore kes, aporea lo ikaasilan,
kanu aibomikin okausulo nesi erai
1.350.000/- bineiban bi okomiti
lo apolon edumunete 48.000/-
kosodi apolon eicelong 70.000/-
kangol elap. Eja ngun da, eswamak
loko etem kesi kwana emunyeis
iropito kac ebe mam cut etacau agnai
June 1997 aitedel kwape kwana
ijaka kesi do mani kado ekakuraka
kwa lem sek kaiwam kac.

le icaoloi ikanyangin kesi
lamurat ebuloni. Imortalitita
abukai Omulnya, Apusnon,
ekuran ka Agule nesi cut
kadona da ebulone munga
antuner emwaga ka muutimi.
Ako etumus ejak.

Kotem Magoto abuisio nu
aporesu ka Opera kesi
munarti ebulone. Eyatakit e
ISO ebe otem lo Apujan
amakit ationis na.

## Ecor lo etem Orungo ijaka, LCs

APOLON etem Orungo Ejiit, Kefemnet Ariko ngesi arassi 27/6/
98 kairiaman ke kede juta eluitelai, Kausilan loka LCs abekicat
kesi aimorikikina ka munga kanu aitapatan aswan na aitopol
etem iwakikat William Okello.

Abu ngesi ebe ibarakisot ijaka ka LCs inomyikokin manga
alomat adok lo naka isometrin kwape nai Ocasia 6.5 ka adek is na
Omurungatany. Abala Ariko ebe ibarakisot manga aituk armor
kagraging. Alimokinit da ngesi munga aniyekin aijep ikito ka
akuru osama taitui.

dati ke yen ebe Akwi
sehara yen ikara iami
darahet kinga kware
koodete inapooko luromete
kare olgo kalo Kailo nese

# EBAJET

## Etolomiki Kumi aida atwak toma obajet, eyataki iropito eyengunak

Na Chris Osekeny Jame

EBAJET lo Kami distrikt lo okaru 1998/99 ngesi abu ekamulo lo edistrikt kitutub eruasi 30/6/98 kosodete acamukin 5,600,188,000/- akaulo na egirigiran lo apiai LC 5, Ejkt. Abaadi Aeko kede engadan Francis Lowoth Okori asismakin aurianet natukokioKumi LakiikoHall. Asismio ebajet lo kakonyen itunga akwap akwap lu atukokina kojui CAO Rose Ochon, AKDC Lt. Robert Nambafu ka icie itunga, simoriariteijaka lukitemwanka LC 3s.

Abu apolon eicolong LC 5
Najiri, imar Okodelkisinyikok
ekamulo atukakin luitijiete
aricho na eseny apiai kobajet.
Apotu akiro kere
kosamanaros ebe egitokitai
eseny da apiai adis, kosodi
idwe lu epote aowamanen
ejok ko diotrictda kotiakakinai

apiyai (bariaries) kangoli ikara. Aponi da kocamunsi aiyatakin eswamak lukolo ejismakinetrapugan kosodete aiyengun apiyai (jwenton) kec, akwatitkeret (100%). Acie nu aponi kitojokasrai kes aidoyo (anukio) na eswamak na aponi kotiakakinai apiai. Konye etacounit lo epolokit apiyai ko distrikt (CFO). Lowoth Okori ebe, ejoni apugan eswaman, akeberu kede idwe ke iwongon bon.

## Atiokusin:

Ationin na etololikini atukio na apiai kokaru lo atubor nesi aicana akolongainilitolakoru nape egnon ekaru, ekaulo kokwamunso bobu idowon (el-nono) amunear iraan. Kiringakipopi ngun, kocilunos bobu Iloko kede ikokolak luimsudun, kopote ikur icie lu amunarete iraan. Mam do itemwan apotu kopedosi atukokin inolosinei kanejiasa itunga, kidim aru 70 kangol

100 bon apotu kodumunos kotoma 4.5bn/-lu etololitai. Abala Abaadi iyatakin ebe mam lu ejokotau (dinoro) da icie apotu kitodolikisi ainumuneta kec kwape nat DFID/CARE nabu kylem 5,985,000/- bots kotoma 128,236,000/-, kosodi Lioto AdNorway abmun 3,795,000/- bon kotoma 70,000,000/-. Erionget lo akipi lungiankit UNICEF nes abu kolem 6,949,000/- aibois na 15,775,000/-lumumunit. Aponikitumi noi lukojokotau lugangitaiingadismakwapkem aimoriarite Sexually Transmitted Infections Project (STIP) kede District Health Service Programme (DHS). Icie lueturitai kanu aitodolonokin aswam kec kes emoriaritos Irish Aid, Dunida ka Red Barnet. Esialamikitai da apugan na apolon kano aitodolikin ainumuneta ke, kilemaolap lu iuniet 1998.

Okodel

Kokaru loatubor 1997/98, etutukitai/lo distriktatukokin kosolosinei 816,898,000/-konye 271,781,000/- (33%) bon apotu kodumunos. Luojokotau aboit aleman 812,452,000/-konye 373,450,000/- (46%) bon apotu kodumunos kosodi apugan na apolon aleman 3,391,043,000/- (83%) aibois na 4,097,983,000/-.

Etiakakitai eriongeta ikany 2,047,166,000/- eriongeta ikany asusia kaboliaso einakitai (nukopunamare) 373,964,000/-, ayuarite inyamat (food security) einakitai 350,730,000/-.

- aduketa 323,000,000/-
angabiu 398,904,000/-, irotin luocadoi 165,000,000/-, akipi kede aila 161,648,000/-.

Emunoi itemwan luko Kumi kere 15 aswam kagogong aitebmutungai uolounmitetere etukokinete 286,664,000/-kosodiedistrikt da amoun acoa nadununet 236,382,000/-, kosodi apugan na apolon da elipitsiaijukun 4,595,425,000/- kotoma apak alopet; kosodete lukojokotau da aitodolikin 481,717,000/- kere 15,600,188,000/- kojaas luideunos kwape emono (surplus) 5,528,000/-ti akiro

## KOKORAK AOKOT KANU AYUUN AIJAR

* Etwakete itunga lu ipu ko Uganda kanu aikidokus na aokot, na eyauni eimidi, apotu, akangasia ka adekasinei acie
* Ekiidokoto kwana aokot kadekisia, naarai epuata itunga, kacut duwe lu edekanakinos eimidi ido kipudasi aiyasio aokot. Eyataki do na eipud to aokot, kore da yen ayangau aikidokus na aokot kadekisia kaibosio acie nu ingadaiere aokot.
* Erai epalu wok kere awanyun ebe ejaasi aokot nu edolitos toma adekisia ka angadisia nu aokot, kanu aingarakina itunga lu ipudasi aokot. Iburai itunga lu ipudasi aokot adumun kes katipet, arai mam, etwakete kesi.
* Epedori araut ijo, ipajanakon arai bo iminat kon, ipuda aokot. Ipedori ipi ayuun aijar ke kopone kats akorakin aokot kon kadakia adio kere, arai bonat akorakin etumu edo lo inmort aimat aokot.
* Nginitungananikere yen erai apolou ke kiding ikaru 17 ka 65. epedori akorakin aokot. Emamei atonis kere na eyangauni amatar aokot toma aijar nakitunganan.

Kakorakisi oni kere aokot kanu ayuun aijar.

Erai na aisiraret kama ejai atukot naka Uganda Blood Transfusion Services, korionget lo Angaleu

Ipedor ijo akorar aokot kon kaiboiso nula;

Kampala
Nakasero Blood Bank

Arua
Sub-Centre/Arua Hospital

Mba
Mbale Regional
Blood Bank

Mbarara
Mbarara Regional Blood Bank
University Teaching Hospital
Mbarara Hospital

Gulu
Gulu Regional Blood Bank
Gulu Hospital

Kitovu
Sub-centre
Kitovu Hospital

## IJO IKOTO IKOKU YEN ENGWALIT?

Koyuwa ikoku kon kanejai polio.

Erai amorosoit na apedorosio ka etunganane, ijo amamus ayuar ikoku kon kotoma adeka na polio ka adekasinei acie na imukiasi. Kanu inyo engwalia ikoku naarai mam aurian epodokirat?

Adau apugan aitutub apaarasia 1-2 Otikoit (August) ka 12-13 Ocoto (Septemba 1998) kwape nu itonere ekato loka polio ko Uganda kere.

Kotoma apaarasia kanu, nu itegelikina KANGIN ikoku, kwap na ikaru ikany eponio aiton ekato kanu ayuara ko polio. Arai kedaunitai aiton kes ekato, ebuni do na aiyatakin ayuara kec. Mam aitonio acie naka polio eyauni ationis adio kere.

Ebuni do na aingarakin cut aikisario naka polio ko Uganda. Akwapin nu ipu ko Afrika kimoriaritos Kenya,

Tanzania, Burundi, Congo, Zambia ka acie da, aitolot akirot na aiton ekato loka polio.

Ejaatatar ekia lo kede aitonosis aarei nu ewin itonakinio akituk ikoku, irwan atipet kolapio (9) (August) ka Ocoto (Septemba). Eyuara cut epon itonere ekia lo, ido edaunit erionget lo angaleu, UNEA ka World Health Organisation aitogogongor aitoni. Koyanga iduwe kon kere lu ejaasi kwap na ikaru nen dio ne eyapiei ne itonere ekia lo kotoma apaiau non kere ekato lo.

Kimorikikin oni kipedori "apetor polio ko Uganda"

Kanu ajenun nu ipu, kodolok eswaman lo angat iyapiatar ijo, arai Programme Manager UNEP. P.O Box 8, Entebbe- Uganda


# Ejie ka Lakwena ko Teso toni aipikorio ke

Na Jack Okero

ADAUNOS kwana ikaru ayapiso itomon ageun ne chingitingin Alice Lakwena ajorenso nu apugan. Mam da yen itomit kodoco apaarao no ahonio aberu na kolomaris obarakis loko Soroti. Konye hon examunitos itunga lu ajaasi otaun loko Soroti apaaramginebekeraiapaaran naiwongonet, kosawan ikany kangeset kelap loikanyet kaongon kokaru1987.

Apolon Opolet Victor lo akeritaiboi Soroti kojakwana Kyere, nges abala ebe, abu* ebalua ka Lakwena kodolok loapolokit ajore naka NRA ko Flying School, ebe adoluni ngesi (Lakwena) kosawan ikany kustupuruc. Mam da iterikalei syonete iponesio luetwasamai Lakwena ajior. "Aporte isapi ajiok jika Lakwena koderito erot loko Soroti-Moroto, ido kibapete akanin, kownete ikmoinei lu ndini kolacitos isaatin ido kotarioko awate akinyet Ketama iterikalo adukin kes imaudun, mam apotu igaanak inook wape alonokitere. Kayapuutu ajiok lu, ludacpunoi, nejai iserikalsi apugan, opotu kodumutu akurias kitoni acakanar da imaudun." Ebala Opolet.

Eyatakit Opolet ebe, akaulo na itunga ka Lakwena agos aitwasam amoru kes "nuda opotu koyarata isirikalei," apotu iserikalei da kognatu aiyangar.

"Akaulo na aruo nililingun, abala Leo Oonyo loko Ngora, kiboyei ko Soroti, abu lo apolokiret ajore naka NRA kotuko kes toni Flying School uitugogong ebe abu ajore na apugan kodany ajiok ka Lakwena.

Eyatakit Oonyu ebe, ajaasi toni atesin nu epu eperete, konye enyalinyala kede kanu isirikalei da, naarai anapitos gaan lu ajore kossob kwi kes atarioko konapitos ipalei hon.

Abu ejie lo kijangak aomisio na itunga luda elipitos isap lu okutoi acaman aup ka Lakwena aitere edodor adolore kampala.

Ediope kalu awenitai apakio ngan ko Soroti prison, Charles Minuel ngesi abala ebe, apotu kesi kodakata atesin nu enyalinyala adaun apaarasin pen. Aposi kidakinai atesin ngan aipany nualalak.

Akaul na eje kalo loda asubit

Akaulo na ajoresinei nu abenyak asurokin apugan, abu do apugan da kogea aitutaoner itunga, kaimoriarii angor da kotoma akiro nuka mchaka-mchaka.

bala abu orirte owai ka Lakwena, abu Lakwena kobongokau adau nelaperinga kebonguno.

Kelap lo itomonet araasi 17/10/87, ngesi ahonio bobo Lakwena kojautor ocaalo lo Okweny, kotem Asaret ko Soroti adaun esabiti. Aupas ngesika iberoke kere aimoriarit eyapesi, akituk, inyamut, ajiok ka ecorak.

Araas 23/10/97 ngesi ahonio aberu na kidukuro ocaalo lo Ojingai-koitela Kelim Kyere. Abu da kimake itunga lu adekanineinuegelegela, kie lu abe ngesi imuke kes emoriariton abuton Kedi-Lewi, Emorat Cyprian kacie da, oringa kenyomo aibe Ngora kitoni Kabwangasi neda ahonio ejie lokaronon kodyo kocaalo lo Kaiti-Kabwangasi.

Erai Kaiti ecaalolo elokunstos isama lu epolok ido ipu akipi. Aringa Lakwena kodola Kaiti, abu apugan kijukari to isirikalei (NRA) lumam onaabu ke ejena, kanu ti aipiricaar ajoresineika Lakwena. Ediope kotoma ajiok apugan - Lt. Okurut lo Onagoro Kyere-Serere agesi abala ebe, arai Echo Battalion lo apolokit Major Adam ngesi atapit Lakwena, naarai ejerii iponesio lu ejior Lakwena.

Edolitus ajiok ka Lakwena

Kaiti adumun ebe kebu apugan kitonyou itunga kere kocaalo kangol. "Araas 4/11/87, naye iwalari akwap, kogrunete ajoresinei asuc iboomuncaalolo Kaiti," abala Ecaru foda arai arucokiton political ke Military Wing ka Lakwena.

Eyatakit Ecaru ebe "Abert, acudi teis aberu na. Amamei isio amuno abongun, kipup ka aanyam da kwa atepiata arasaasin. Konye ejai Lokasultan. Kipuu isio scie

kabonguto.

Toma ejie lo nes kipunia katwaki arata isap lu epu luko Teso. nu aumokin, ekamete ajiok ka Lakwena da isirikalei kapugan, koyaonete akonye kosi! Mam acamukitai kesi eyario.

Kewanyu do Lakwena ebe asisior eje noi, akaulo na apaaraoia aures, abu kilip ne ejai Edeke, kitoni ekuma arapiar isirikalei kaapugan kere! abu kolimok isio atupakin nges.

Kipuu kadumutu atesin

akwap akwap kane kitoritisio, konyemam NRA ebu kosurok isio! Epomengol kikuyaiso

# THE REPUBLIC OF UGANDA

IN THE HIGH COURT OF UGANDA AT KAMPALA ADMINISTRATION CAUSE NO 499 OF 1998 In the matter of the case of the Late Eulu Ochen Charles of Teso AND In the matter of an application for letter of Administration by Elwana Stephen of P.O Box 4037 Kampala NOTICE OF APPLICATION TO WHOM IF MAY CONCERN:

TAKE NOTICE that an application for letters of Administration to the Estate of the Late Eulu Ochen Charles has been lodged in his court by Elwana Stephen, brother of the deceased.

TAKE NOTICE FURTHER that this court will proceed to grant the same if no caveat is lodged with this court within fourteen (4) days unless cause be shown to the contrary.

Dated at Kampala this 23rd day of June 1998 By Elly Taryamukena. Brawa &amp; Bird by: M/S Owiny- Dello &amp; Co.Advocates. Phd 7 Luwum Street P.O Box 9011 Kampala

# THE REPUBLIC OF UGANDA

Kabwangasi—

Ihore yen abu kitomokok ajiok ka Lakwena, nes etunget, ka epasane lo abusit kakej. Mam da apotu kodumutu itunga lu enodiasak inetekes instin, abala Ecaru.

Kotoma aibong, opota do isap ka Lakwena konyilunyilunes kogurupun. Apota da itunga lu kidumunenei isio korot kosuronoki isio. Ajas do isio aibil ekisil kaoodete aiyar ngul kede imuudun lo kitingit isio," abul Alex Epeco.

Abu do Lakwena kopali aiyengun aiboisit na ebalai Ariet, koitela Kelim kotem Kyere. Au kodau bala esabiti kangina. Orwa kijokuni bobo apugan amotokan 11 nuka isirikalei lu amoot nges.

Isirikalei lu Teso kes opotu kicorata itunga aigir alimor ebe ajai Lakwena Ariet, naarsi ebe apasik kes ejie. Icse abalas ebe, ebuni ejie lo ti aiyar itunga luipu."

"Teni, mam kes apotu koduosi arasasin. Konye kipuu kanyamata iboro kitunga epoda. Abu Lakwena da kesi aitor apugan, toni kolomum bobo Lakwena apupor ko Teso."

# THE REPUBLIC OF UGANDA

In the Chief Magistrate's Court of Soroti holden at Soroti Administration of Estates (small estates) Probate and Administration Rule, 1972 Administration Cause No. 44/97

# LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION

Mr. Thadoue Oposon Chief Magistrate of Soroti court hereby make known that on the 29th day of July 1997 letters of Administration without a will annexed of the property and credits of the late Okodi Otim Stansilas of Ongimo-Korei district are hereby granted to Mrs Seraphina Otim.

She having under taken to administer the same and to take full and true inventory of the property and credits to this court within six months from the date of grant or within such time as the court may from time to time appoint and also to render to the courts true account of the said property and credits within one year from the same date or within such time as court may from time to time appoint.

Dated at Soroti this 29th day of July 1997

Chief Magistrate

# AISISIA

## Asioman nes eyuari alupok Iteso—ekimat

Na Jonathan Maraka

EKIMAT ekanisa, Rev. Benjamin Okiria loko Church of Uganda, Soroti ngesi ekwanya Iteso asosat ayangat idwe asioman osomerokwape erot ediupe lo epedoriata erwakasir ayuar alupok kex.

Ahala Okiria ehe ivariwarit ekisil loiteteloka alupok akiro kokuju naarai ngin ituan ijaikinio ahalua aiwanyia obank ajauo eloon "kolonete bodo alupok akanis nuka e

Land Commission, mam bobo esalakinete akanis nuka
Etseriki Land Board

Enera Okiria kailipsoinet nu aitunere ediupe kokarnolas lu agesurete ekarnulo lo Kumi distrikt, Daniel Emaasit, koreke lo Apppang, Kolie, Bukedua araasi 20.6.98. Arwani Emaasit 20.6.84. Eluritin enerak ngesi kwapestaan lo apodo asioman na idwe.

Lesudit araun apolon eicolong lo ekansulo losudit lo Kumi distrikt, Apolon

Samsiri Aisu ka aneojong bene Emulo na arai akaacila kokansulo losuditko Kamikes da ajaskina ailipsoinet nu.

Ahala Okiria ehe kwape icanatur Iteso eraan do erwace icle aiwony aijauman ilosmio obank kosodete aicanicanar isiriginngul arsasia ka arnanyia anger kipikeri aitac, kolonete bodo alupok akanis nu e land commission.

Anguriani Okiria kanu asioman na kwane oremere idwe agram ko PI toni P7

Loatwan Daniel
Emaasit lo apodo noi
naka aiissom idwe

komam ahongokisutukot kede nu ilatakitere idwe 110 kanu esisianakinas ediupe.

Etorosit ngesi nu egoistutur auriak loko Teso aitac isingin aiogarakinia asioman kosomeroi kex kobalas ehe ehala e president mam bobo auriak aitac isingin. Ahala ekimat ehe adol apak Iteso da apukor aki ageun atukoookio isirigin atacia asissanakmak, konycarainam erensis 'Sowok' idwe ben P7 korsasi ihangiok lu ipikerialomar S1.

# Ejaiki apugan Tor itaabon luka 173m

Na William Otaala

APUGAN koprojekt ke loka SUPER 4 nes ejiaki Torosoi itaabon/asiomankere luedolit etiai kex la egwelitere 173,561,296/=. Ebest akorar itaabon lu osomeroi kere 217 lukodistrikt.

Nu kes abwapolokisstintnuka aisisiako distrikt, Dair Ogrilan kopesik Etop koyapesi ke araasi 18/6/98.

Ahala Ogrilan ehe adau edistrikt atiakatiak itabon lu mama ejaani isomeroi nedo ilipitore apolok isomeroi aijuk alipan kex naka itaabon ketupitete aipawes naka esiisiak ke.

Ehaka West Budama ne ejani esisiak 46,358 osomeroi 90nes akorak in 66,650,750/=, ahala Ogrilan.

Ehaku Bunyole ne ejasoi esisiak 34,767 osomeroi 70 kes agitakin itaabon lu edolit etiai kex 49,985,906/=.

Kosodi ehaka Tororo ne ejasoi esisiak loko puraimare

kere 30,496/osomeroi 47 kes agitakin itaabon 43,845,520/=.

Etaun lo Tororo esisiak 9,097/osomeroi kes abwapolok isomeroi lukantisi 13,029,126/=.

Inapitaan keerome na apaaraaia 18,638,400 erionget loka aiis ejaani apolok isomeroi.

Dijemarisasirastim 1,555,634/=, View PS I stafom loka 2,267,296/=, Hataky a P S1000 esisiak 1617 pes agi etiai loka 2,324,825/=.

Kosodi Menkel P esisiak 1224 kobala kes edumnation 13,029,126/=.

Orioti ne ejasoi esisiak 16,029,126/=.

Dewapakit Kudaegel Tororo ne ejasoi esisiak 16,029,126/=.

# Ageun aiduk TECHE, ekotoi aganga

Na S.K Arso

TETERE adumakin idwe wok asioman nako kuju, kodit arai komamei apagal, etamitos ikapolok loko Teso (Katakwi, Soroti ka Kumi distriets) ka Pallisa adukun esomero lukapolon iseponio anyara Teso College of Higher Education (TECHE)turnuosi ehe ehani aijaamakin ikesisiak idigurinka ahalaanaciekwape certificates ka diplomas nutgelegela.

Ehuni esomero lo ajakin Soroti, eidury ka Teso College Aloet. Aduatu ikapolok adumun alupo ngan. Aduun aigitan, aibok ka aicak amoru toma apetetait (foundation) na etago losudit lo egeio aitweam kanuka aitutuoro idwe wok.

Kwape kolo adukinto Iteso Teso College Aloet, emutoi ehe apote bobo Iteso ka risikerin acie aimorikikin insudete adukun TECHE, nebuni aiogarakin ka aitopol steker wok ka idwe wok, ka idumakin aisisia nakokuja reiaasi itungakere loko Uganda.

Eumitai ehe adukio naka logo lo egeio aitwasamebuni jiangaikie isirigin ayapiarete 100m/=.

Korakitai isirigin lu alomun

kane wok.

Lokojokotau da idaritos aanyan ibore yen kipedori oni aswam eringa kesi kyauna agangat kex. Idwe wok ka inacan wok lu ejasoi okekwan arai akwapo nukokinga, okapakina kesi da aigang oni, arai kigeo oni aitodikin kesi erot.

Arai ketakunen apiyai lo epedorete aiduk etogo lo egei, ti asioman ko TECHE keges okaru ngol 1999. Na nes apak oni aitodik in itunga kere loko Uganda ehe epedorete teni Iteso da aimor aomisio konodete aiswamaunibore yen itopoloi akwap.

Lo epolokit atukot naka ikapolok luetamitos adukun TECHE nges Rt. Rev. Bishop Gerssom Duker loko Soroti, loejena noi kotoma aitopol steker wok.

Lo etapit ngesi erai ekapolon Cuthbert Joseph Obwangor, ekapolon lo asa steker ageun Uganda adumun aipugakin bonkokaru 1962. Toni napena, eroko ipecitoi kowai loka aiissom idwe wok.

Nu alinikinit eong kotoma alimoret kana, nes aitejenikin steker iboro lu etamitos ikapolok wok aswam kanuka aitopolka adumakin idwe wok esomero lo ehuni aigang kes.

Apeteteit na aduketait naka TECHE na ageun ber aibok ka abukokin ekokoto kwap. Aputo na

# Korocutu imwalimun lu edilonokinete amat

Robert Okillo

GLOPsaiolongloka LC III kotem Otulunga Rev. Michael eila Opara, ngesi ecoraki LCs iakotam ke airoc esianakainakla edilonokinete aimat ajonio kojalakinitos esianakiaidwe jokae kosomeros.

Korakini Ehala LCs ngan apaaraa Naehalasaaraasi 22/6/= katutabet kana Orangoda, koitela Agonga kaurianet kana karasaitur ogeit ka apolon etem Otulunga, Silver Malinga benda itunga lakoitela kalo kana asekun aleisto nu ikikinte loko ojokotau agilan koitela kangol.

Aila Ehala elimakini LC sebe, arai kedumut kemwalimu lo

emasi ajoe kosawan kalua aisisia, ehe ibusakinit LCs arocun ngul kosodete aitua skotupiteteikisila kee (Techaer's Code of conduct).

Ahala Ehulu, ehe nepe ekwamakinitoturimwalimu nemasit nesi einakit adoketait na asioman ejai kwap kosomeroloko misaloi.

Ebe mam imikitai emwalimu aimat ajon, konye ehe komasi kosawan kalua atibong arai engetaki epelu ke osomerol.

Ahala ngesi ehe, arai isyikokisi esisianakinak aswam alayekinaitopoloritemasit, ehe ehunia doketait na isomeron kalu ozaaloi aikenn kuju.

Jonathan Maraka

Kemorikikinos kadukutu esomero wok Kijaik etau leemanomongin ibore kere yen ipedori ijo alemun kwape, akiteng, akinei, akokor, ekulukulu, atudo arai isirigin.

Luipudas aijaku epedorete adwakin Account No. 850 TECHEko Co-operant Soroti.

Kiitu ehe, "Ingarak ngul fuingarakinos"

# Angatata ikokolak Oimak

Na Peter Opita

IKOKOLAK iuni lu atingitos emuadu kex araasi 21/6/98 kware apotu kongsutu ikesisianakinuldu Oimai P/S. Katine, Soroti kosodete angatar ibore ke kewo.

Ediopet komwalimun lu aponikongsaaaiEjkt. Joseph OwoengesiabukolintokEtop ehe apotu ber ikokolak lu kogsutu angaun Celestine

Eyapu Okellokosok kingiolon ngmi ikotopol, kwape ibore na anyamanear kewo. Ketema Eyapu ebe ngesi ailosom isirigi apotukiumatangesh ikon kere ka egaail.

Apotu do korke ore apolon esomerok. Kedi lo apotu kere 150,000/=, ibore le egaail.

## AOMISIO KUS

### Kiitutoe ailot emiebe

IDUWE lu ipu eraasanakinete ainyam emiebe eroko kilotara konye etubon apai adite kodelorete ehe eridtete akoikea. Amamus ailot emiebe nee eyangauni arieko ngin naarai liikete iduwe ikor lu adoka kocoikitoe ailot emiebe kede akanin da.

Andrew Odanga, P.B., Soroti Farente P.S.
Epejoki Ilukor Kapir
Na Ben Epeduno, Kapir P/S
APAK na ahumkar Bishop Geresom Ilukor Kapir aku idokok iduwe kokanisa lo Kapir P/S araasi 11/6/98.

Abu Brahop kiner ebe ekot iduwe awiom kagagong ka arimarit eaiidanakinat kei.

### Eumi apese kanu agar

Na Cyprian Opus, Katakwi P/S
APESE Stella Akiror yen ainakit totoke aidar edia (agariait) lo alokitai kuju togo ngesi aku etoori kiduan thungad akaulo na akopor agar. Kebongu totoke Akiror koaodi aingit edia aponi kelimakin ebe ekoyo etoori kodedengar aile atoke kokala ebe akoraki opaike agar!

### Okwe auriak kominanaros

Okwe auriak kosi kieisiautu yesi da aminanara, aimorilikina ka aitimonor tetere isio da ikue idwe ituqakini kanu adukun Uganda makajokan.

Asio Agnes P.G. Blus, Pioneer P/S
Ekot aitala acoloonin

Okwe ika itunga etaleta oni da icoloonin tetere oni da itidinian adekasinei acia nu eyarete oni, kwape nat esilim, a cholera. Ngin nee aicoretait ka mamakua ikatunga.

Ayumo Grace P.G. Blus

### Apuuton PS prefects

IDUWE lu Apuuton P/S oigo Katakwi, kesi apotukitoloooto aseo kec kanu aseun aiyaitok kec (prefects) araasi 24/6/98 akaulonaaisupaasiakkaaiang emiebe cai elopat lu akonon adaun esabiets eikope.

Apolon esomero kalo Ejkt. George William Epelngesarsi epzjononlo angosibibkotoma aseo kanu.

Aponikosusai Aisha Akiira, P.7kwapeapolokinitonapesur kosomero (Head girl) kede abootin.139nedaelanyiangesi abolubolok ke Nakiru Grace, P.7 nabu kodum abootin 186 ka Ikiring Joyce, P.7 abootin 129.

Esapat Nelson Arnikin P.7 ngesi abu iteleka kwape Headboy kede abootin 526. Abu ngesi kilany Pius Onyait P.7 lo abu kodum asenta 111

kosodi Joseph Amodul aigol kede abootin 26.

Apolon esomero, George William Epelngesi abu kicor iduwearimanta yaitok kec luda apotu kesi ikidepek kosusutu.

## Agiroto auriak e Video ko Mukongoro odukai

#### Na Charles Orengen

ANGEROTOsuriak luko Mukongorio, Kumi esinemat video) lo itodiarantefimricie koidukai luko Mukongoroobe naarsi itapaari iduwe kec emokorane ka amunaar asisman kec.

Auriak, ipolok he womisi okoka LCa kotoma aurianet na eboikino Mukongoro Township P/S araasi 19/6/98 kesi apotu kolennate ekisil lo singee esinema lo.

Apolonizitele Mukongoro Otiriba Kokasnges alimokini aurianet ebe etilorit e video ngol iduwe asisman naarai esalanakinete oidukai kotoma oazwa lo asisman.

Apolon Etoko Calvin nges acela ebe apol emwangit kanejassi lo etodiararakesinemangol. Ebe mam LCseinak itookesi abaluan nu na wamkec ko Mukongoro. Kosodi Stanley Okiaass angostani ebe etukurorit nesi esinema ngol ajo naarai epol ecelet kotoma.

Akirot acie na engertiere esinema nes ebe itodiarare kokiding oigeine epodoriatay aserukangasi akonodiebe ededeng ikidepek e video ido etapit ecelet kede eteok arai kedungio akim.

14 ETOP Naiwongsuet, (Jauodokokingo) (Jului) 9-15, 1998

APAARAN NA AIPUES NA ITUNGA

# Eiyas lo itunga: amingeta ka irotin luitijiet atiokisio

Na Stopken Eisangot

EK ARU lo Soroti nna sjaikiston asubao nuka Apaaran na iittanitere akite itu ikamuntonaspora na itunga. Ejaikiston asubao nu (World Population Day) Namukaga narhanti, maasi 11.7.98 Nareni apak na etiakunit United Nations kanu akwagin nu akwap kene aineror epona lo iyatarat itunga kokwap kere. Kataaukalo akire Naepol nasi ebe "Eiyas lo itunga, atiokisio ka arerengesio nukitijiet atiokisio nu".

Kotoma abeit eiyasi lo itunga kanuke bon mam erai ationis kilema epona lo iyatar ngesi erai atipet atipet arai bo mot mot. Arai iyata atipet akepolou ebe ipu idwe adepar itunga luaptok luepedorete akoru inyamat. Akepolou da ebe akot iuomeroi, adekisia ka aswamisimi da kiyatasi katipet katipet tetere kere sopasi ka eiyasi lo itunga.

Aitupunet, idumuni ijo ebe akwagin nu Africa, (Uganda; Soroti) Asia, Latin America, iyatasi iken itunganoi (1.5-3%) itia luko North America ka Europe (0-1.5)% Akepolou ebe akwapitonu Africa kwanat Uganda erai ho Soroti akotori iuomeroi, adekisia ka inyamat da kiyatasi ailanyit eiyasi lo itunga. Asa kijeni oni kere ebe luko ekadenenai ekia itunga kadaksia itiekolo. Idumuni ijo, ebe iuomeroi ka itandan da lu adekis iloleba, mam bobo iriamanura ka itunga. Erai do luedekak ka lu itedekete kesi aperokwap asa iohalaan naarai epuakata itunga.

Aitupunet (kenny apoto na iaona kitiakwap asa itodunit United States ka Denmark itunga lo iyatasi asa ka Uganda la iyatasi asa).

Kotoma akirat na apaaraokana 'Eiyasi lo itunga, atiokisio ka arerengesio nu itijiet atiokisio nu.' idumuni ijo ebe teni ejassi atiokisio nu eyasnit eiyasi lo itunga Soroti ka Uganda kere.

## Aisisia:

Kokau sek eroko enaba itunga kedokara kuju noi eriamara iuomeroi luajaasi ka iduwe da lu ajassi apakio ngun. Lolo, kwanat Soroti, erai bola itunga 400,000,ejassi ka iduwe 110,000 luebeit ajasi nuomeroi 214 luka puraimare luko Soroti. Kapaarasi akangun arai iduwe 45 ngin tukot. Lolo ipupe ebe nemicie erassi 150! Inyobo do eyasnitmu? Nanyokada ebeit oni aswami?

Koto sek ajenasi iuomeroi luko sinia ka luka haya ido apedori itunganana imarkere. Lolo ipu noi, konye eroko ekaditos iduwe. Koto da sek ketubikoku ko haya iuabujekitani ami alini Makerere. Lolo mam epatana naarai epuakata iduwe. Asu ekoto kotubite kokoju noi alomaria ngina. Na kesi nu kikoto kere aitehor kaudete aingitakin ebe dodo do bisi?

## Amukian ka angaleu:

Sek, ebalasi hijau, apol okia kadaksia itakwana. Imurwok da apataka adepar kwana, iitadan da adolerete adekak, ajassi abolosin da nyangamaria anisin titai. Lolo mam bobo adekisia nu ko Soroti 27 epedorete aigang itunga ngul luedeparete 400,000. Idumuni do ijo ebe aboisit na emuron aanyan itunga arai 20 kangin paarit, erai do ekokoro kodolidola bi itunga lu edeparete 100.

Kanu idumuni ijo mam bobo emuron da epedori adasnapak ka yen kadakasi kanu anguiam adeka alopet, erai do ebe angoliar angoliar kodoi emuron ekalamu kanu aisukuny ekokoro cabe. Iker da mam bobo epederete aiboun kadakis. Nukere elomuniton naarai eyatakiton itunga, mam bobo ikote kwa kolo. Ikwaikini bodo oni ai.

## Aswamisinei

Kolo sek bobo epu aswamisinei noi, arai ijo da kidau asionan puraimare korasari aswami. Arai apugan ka icsuman lo etatai, ka asie aiboiso da sidaranat esisiak badimunak kouomeroi kwanat Makerere ka icie da. Konye naarai anyanyaron itunga kacut ebe iduwe da itutuonoro aswami nyapspin bon enamete bobo aswamisinei nu edolete kere. Erai do alomunak aituwa apuwa korotin ebe aimo aswami nada enamei. Idumuni ijo ebe ayau do na eitekerene naarai erai ngin itunganan kewanyu ne ejai aswami amoyar her yen ateker arai ikoku amutan mam bobo ebalai ebe aitub (merit) aingito. Nukere elomuniton naarai eyakata ngun la esionitos aso apoloor aujo nasokunet.

## Alupo:

Kolo anyana akwaptoi, mam yenapedoriakoru alupokkere, ngon ekale ajassi ka amitorin nuadepareta 10, konye kwape iyatatar napkore lolo idumuni ijo ebe adol do no eraar egol esapatamisiri adinpe arai aerei bon. Kitam aibwot da ekoto nen da isorigin. Ayau do na atiakatukao na amitorin bala 'plots' lukotaan neda mam bobo ituan epedoria akoru alalau arai aojau.

Kotoma abeit ayau na atwanare da kaiboisio aciekwa nat. Ngora ko Kumi distrikt neda ipuikitotor atubok lu adieketa imusagon lu alupok. Na kere erai naarai iyatasi itunga komam alupok iyatas. Dodo bodo biai? Inyobo ebeit aswami kanu kere? Inyobo arerengesio ejassi akonye?

## Aicor ka aisisianakin ateker

Naasodit naepol ngesi aimo iwaitin luepedorete aitakin itunga idiopediopen ajenun ebe iboro lu eyasunte abur mam ikumernete, erai ibore yen etiono aidar arai adumun arai ipusitukesiparte. Kwana lolo ijassi ijokidwe ikanyape coinia erai yesi auriak aiseny aiseny dokimo ijonedumunetiasirigou lu itosiomet kes bala ikotokin abwangar da naarai mam etakani cot.

Ejai bo nen ebe Edeke ngesi ekori, konye apaarasi nu epedori ekale aitutub etiai lo idwe lu eomitos kesi ebe epederete aidar, aibois na ailwek aori idwe lu mam ijo epedori aimuke, aitanap, aitanyamepok ka aitosiomcut.

## Eipugae lo ajokan

Acie arereng na etakani nesi aitemonikineta nuka eipugae lo etenil lo ekot aidar itungaka apoloo na akwap. Kwape kena asionan na titai (UPE) atam ber akutan iduwe luipu lu da abeit aisal iciskiete arai ipenur luedekak iduwe kotaunin araibo nat adukonokin eroko edisiak kosabakitetete ebe emamete isirigin karsomero. Ecie eiswamae lo apugan nes decentralisation - itunga ikulepek aipugat aiboisio kes. Ayau na da itunga atereikin ettei ka atiokisio kes ikulepek neda acounata itunga kosodete aingitakin ebe ekwaikisi bodo ai? Aitaki da itunga ajenun akorokorisirigin idis lo edumunusioskanu aitijo atiokisio nu elukunitos kesi.

## Atukono numam erassi nu apugan

Kiwanyu ebe iboro luipu luitoritos apugan akadata itunga noi. Kijeni cot ebe arai komamete atukono nukojokotau (NGOu) ka ikanisan ti erono noi adepar. Idekisia luegeunitos agwelanarakya atakininidoda kesi ejai amun naarai kemamete ti itunga lu ipu ketwaka nabuarat atukon boho adekisianu apugan epedoritos aijan itunga kere.

Ipu nei iboro lu ti ati aiwadika konye edit aikonye akorot na epol on, ebe eiyasi lo itunga erai bui yen kipikaoni ido da manebu aibong kwap nepesap iibore epol nesi agen itungna ajenun ebe ekot itung koriakasi ka abar na ejaikot kon arai na epedori ijoratima arai mam eyauni icai aitosiom, aimuke, aitenye aitanap ka aitopol ateker, la oni kere kaomoomatu akilomuro kare. 2000 mdeepa aitosom iboro lu akwami, eko kotaurun ka ikupun na akanin nu itunga ikotep (modernisation, urbanisation ka privatisation) adepar kise. Angotakini elipit itunga elimoro ikororia kes; kokwa kane abunere asuban nu, ejaikitonotaunlo Soroti et 11.7.98 kana aijan ainanakineta kes te telekaret eki esi ko "Pepsies Quiz" na etolumunnai jk kotoma Etop.

1. Amuge Nauma
2. Mukongoro H/S 1st prize
3. Okiria James of Boi or Soroti-2nd Prize
4. Omuut John of Touni/100 Library Box 258 Touni Prize
5. Erai Ewadikan lo epide akiro nuka aipues na iwo ko Soroti Dusrik

## AITUENARET

Gerald Apedel toko Tachir Kumi, nges tijienakk toko Modesta Akorot, kote Christine Frances toko Jacinta Amulan Akor abunore ore Oguama 25/7/98 adolo. Epaik ejaasi kidan Edeke.

# Atiak adoteu ipapero lukotau

Na I imar Opalakiro

ARAASI ijaka Orara kede k'Omuk etsisianakinak kardiocutura noi kaowam kec, iido koria; Orara ekapolokiton suumaro, kimapakitoto Omuk. Atipiri kes duc angohuman ikinyom egin apaarit kejotaki akolong, ido do komorantara tem. Konye, kejai kes aupanara na edulokina da, osubti bala angojoksoit Omuk. Orara, aisiolenen nakowai ke Imiela. Apotiu ipapero ke k'Orara kojanok isiairwamantarana ajai kolingk'Omuk kede k'Imiela, kosodete atamakivaikwenyar Orara. Konye abu Orara kimurowa nu kwape esabet kode kaitolitol aupanara kec.

Edifa duc Omuk, kedol atibong, aijonokin ehe ekeri bet ngesi oreko aomere ibore yenimuowokitnges, kinyakisi Orara emata. Mam Orara ajznikinti alosikinetakaupasia a. Kwabo Omuk alosmetsi aisiol Imiela, kinyekin ajon ibulasi kamot. Edifa duc nges agwelenen ajon nuipu noi, utere Orara numonor aiowak ikinyom kijangijangiakojoke ejak, ikojok ekeori.

Kakore nen da, apotiu ipajani kipapero k'Orara kinyikokin aikwayamar ngesi, ido do komoriton noi na rawamut nakowai ke Imiela. Abueyemut te kisianakiroa enatsabet, ido da aponi koramakinai akougu da.

Aponu akiro nu kitirosi Orara, ctau noi. Abu do ngesi kokotokina itogogong cut ietai teni araasi nu absit.

Adiope atibong, akaulic na Omuk asolaari ne ejai ya, (ore) kwape fem duc; abu Orara kijau egaali, kosodi aketite oreke ne teni abunio ngesi kodumuuna ike itunga iyeyai, konsidiosidi akim kotogo. Abu do ngesi kejenihe ebe arai teni Omuk ajai toma togo. Abu do look kolimori kokinga, kosodi allip nakowaike angaara ekek, kigalikite egaali, tetere igogeleni Omuk araikutamak aiposiar. Apotiu fuwok awate kotowakuto kotogoi, kosodete aisingop enungaran Omuk kokwap raika eitaada, reika kengaara ekek. Abu teni Imiela kotitingik angaari ekek, kianyuni lokowake igetanar, kingejingoja emeret bon, kosodi ukea je aibokin kidunyasi ka ekek lo engepakina.

Kwape na duc, abu Imiela kilip lokowaike arai epuda ailong, kosmite ehe, amera, komanenu ajeni, tetere aiisii epadai eke lo elitingiko kwap keitada. Konye abu Orara koger, ehe mam nyei apuda ailong naam, napetos nges ajon noi. Inyanut da mam ngesi akotu. Kiloliitme akiroakowan atamit adumun apak nakitsiet Omuk, konye iotida.

Kanen do, abu Orara kodum acio raika ajiakar Imiela oreke k'Omuk, anyaraun Omuk kanoka aitatamakinomukawamkec,

nu abula ngesi ehe apolok noi. Abu bobo kismyikok Imiela, ebe araikodumu Omuk emarim kore, ibus nez koupunos kabera k'Omuk, Ibilai, tetere ngesi itetemonokini Ikilai nukitodetikino Omuk. Kwape ajznikintor Imiela aduakaret ke, abu kodetor katipet, kosmite ehe, motoko cabe nut kodum opudara ke apak na esiia. Apotiu do Imiela koupunos kodek Ikilai, kwape eyakiaritere nez, konye kopol

aiyalongong kotau ke, kwape aratatar kesi da nu aupanara noi.

Kadolo kesi ore, abu Orara kijau Ikilai ingo, kosodi atishoikin ngesi eidunya keitada. Abu bobo Orara kocap acoaaio, aipakar Imiela ainyakar egaali ore lo sek amatar ngesi, idourai kodumu Omuk kangina, koupunos katipet. Komamapegakin, abu Imielakooenepik inegaali, ape

Kenyou Imiela, abu do lokowaike, kibelokin aisiol

Ikilai kostadakalope angopitor Omuk kokwap ke. Erika kesi kengetakina aelu' kec, kohonguru bodo Imiela da, si, kolomari bodo Ikilai da ehe aingop kwap keitada, tetere mam Imiela ejenuni naeywmaanori' Kuepakanen, kiluikais Ikilai, ehe ajai etsang kwape nakeitada, ido komarani akowan, bok tai. Eori Kousfauni bodo Omuk, etwanit akowan tai. Kotoma apak kara, mam yen kakesi ajenroukiowamak mayansie. Abu do Orara kitapalau akiro kere, kisodi allip kesi, kere

aibuikinkamsamemnna absit atwam. Ajai bodo fuwok angolumakin bala itunga lu ajaasi otuja. Kongit Orara nepasia ke Omuk nu aomil ngesi, mam abukobongok, aoi kotwarakinos bodo kesi akowara ngin. Kovala akwap, aponi kodumunai etogo ke k'Omuk enili lio do.

Abu Omuk, kolamikin akowara ngajengin, abungor obukec, kobala ehe, epuda ngesi kijulanai ne elwana. Mam nu abu kliwamak nakowaike, kwape anyamitotor nges akiro

# Apolou awaragasia nu Iteso

Na Atia I, 13/ribbu

IRAASI awaragasia akiro nuitemonokinete itunga lukacna kanu aisisianakin idwe ka itunga harpolok da aisae akiro muryainete atiokisio tema aijar kec.

Akiro ngun kes oceboikitorit betso aisisianakin idwe kec kakes da ikulepek akiro kotoma awaragasia.

Ace awaragasia na isisianak inere idwe kaitunga da harpolok ekote nete, Itunganan (etelepat) yen ekelanyana, arai kepeloor emanyi aberu kede ekingoki ingokwo. Ajokin nakaekingok dokona ore ngesi eirem arai keanyu lukasurup tetere aikwenyar lukore ehe "ejai ationin naelomurui". Acie ajokitnges amejaan tiang yen emorantre ngesi kode eketunga luejaao ore ngol.

Mam Iteso enyamete ingokwo, idioimudiubore yen anyam ekingok, arai da akipi madauskingok aijakijak, mam bobo itunganan yen icaki emat.

Bwakkeo Besoekingok tema adeketait nakokwap, tape kminuubor kec ebalai ebu, "eat ibolur eing bala arai

ekomkingok".

Icie Iteso inerasi lucie kec iuemamete kede inyamararat itunga luingokwo (iuemamete inyamat kodulu).

Isisianakini awaragat egin itelepai akukuranar akoro inyamat tetere adumuna itareni iumainete angor, naarai mamekingok emanyore.

Ebala acie awaragat ehe: "Apese naipu akonye ibongokinere ekale epura" Aipani naka akonye kotoma Oteso erai, adoteu erai aitedepurite aelo. Mam Iteso ekotos apese na erai "acookonye," na ekwenyi kobale esi-ice-ice, naarai etapii atwaniar aur kano adekasino na aelo. Arai keanyatu itunga apese ipu akonye dokonyete itunga

ekale ngol.

Inerananasi bobo Iteso kotoma awaragat ehe, "arai kikamaki apolonikoku isulot (akokor) apolou ke ehe adao ngesi amanyakin ikoku yen aberu." Awaragat ngin isisianak inere idwe fetelepai aimimminamat, arai aipilanut iboro, mere ailekilekanot.

Ebala acie awaragat ehe "ip yen ican kokwere akwap." Kolo sek, arai keorista etunganan kakebetu, iduwe lu pesar kalu sap, ido arai kepolokoto iduwe ngol kere, ibaren lu emanyunete apesor kes emanyanak inere itelepai da angor. Konye itelepai iuemamete ainacan kec ejarikinete ngul toma akoru tetere adumuna angor.

Esisianakinete Iteso acie awaragat na ebala ehe: "siri iduwe ibobonete ariri kirokie ehe: toma apak naipinere akim, owaikitungamankayen ibobonemei ariri kerro nesi elosi apuru na akim.

Isisianakini awaragat ngin iduwe kaice itunga da harpolok atookinyarit acin korot. Erai ngin asisianakin itunga nidar aijari mere aibubon ariri kerot.

# Eponitos ‘imeyai’ 54 Soroti

Na Jumon Ekwux

ABWOKINTOK itauron 54 luko Uganda kes lolo naiwongonot, 9/7/98 ejokituro airiamunkan napolanna ekaru kere ko Soroti Municipality naivau Etop.

Airiamun na, (Urban Authorities Association of Uganda annual General meeting) nen ejakin Soroti Flying Academy idoangetakin mo 10/7/98.

Kapak na adolokitor Etop Town Clerk ka Mayor mam abo kodum amunoi ebo itunga lu adepante 300 kes epots ejakos airiamun na ne epoxete aitemiton etiokisio nu ejaanakinos etauhin kaimeviarito nu alup abala eswaman edope luko Soroti Municipal Council to ebit Etop airiamimon ekote ke

Kotapitate nu apeyo kangin, apuuru aiemunokino naka irutin koigo Soroti ka ainatio

na eiagi otogoi.

Kobalua ka etown clerk lo Soroti Mackay Odele lo apaarasia 6/7/98 ne ejassi iriongeta ka isomerol lu egelegola ko Soroti kotakakininto RDC, apolon eicolong LC 5, LC 39 nigo Soroti, CAO, DISO ka apolok icolongo loka idivisjons lukoigo Sorotikere lo abu Etop kodum, epots daabwokinetok lu aipejokie, Serere Agricultural &amp; Animal Research Institute Kyoga Cotton Company ka Uganda Colleges/Commerce Soroti.

Asia aboisiemu emuennaputo ipejok airiamimon kes, Soroti Millers, Madera Boys P/S, Madera Girls P/S, St. Marys Girls S&amp;A Madera School for the Blind. Edolokinetta kesi bobo Madera Technical Institute, abalobaluwa, Madera Home for the Disabled, Teso College Abiet ka airiamiman enokouni lottotat luko Soroti

# Eretaki Amuge Isebei

Na Jack Okere

CAO naka Soroti diatrik, Ajkt Agiripina Amuge-Akid ngesi aretaki Isebei lu apotu aidukur alup nako Soroti diatrik, onem Kyere, Isebako Serere, komam eyapesi ke epesi. Abu CAO koresetik Isebei la arassi 1/7/98 kotomaa ibeisiima idukuritokesi k’Abukot.

Amuge na aupasi ka atupiton DISO, Ejkt Robert Walakira, ngesi akoto Isebei aitacaan, karu inyo mam kes ebiotutor nenisisi kilema apajan nako Serere. Abu da kingisote arai erai na apaaran nasodir Ikaramuja akoko akituk kes ido karu inyo kes ben akaruse Serere.

Abu da kiyatake akote ajenun arai ajatatar Isebei lu nepepe ka abaluwan nu abeit no erot, ka ejaatene ke akituk kes.

CAO ngesi abala ehe “Esubri bala ejassi yen aiemunokineta nu aiyeyen naarsi karu inyo yes abongan Serere kwan naarsi ma alupok. Akoto da CAO ajenun aitemunokineta nu ejassi kes otan kes. Abu do Amuge kicerek Isebei aomera abaluan nu obukot ido amuruno eyapesi ke. Abu da kicorak itunga lu iboyete Abukot luda ebalas ebe alup kes ngon, aigirun aitutukot na enamakit kes aibol ido kilidunite apak anyoin edaunete kesi.

Epuda bobo CAO Isebei lu armorikikin kalace karu aiduk akwap, ayangaar idwe osomero, aibok acolonin aibosid na iboyotorkes ka aidorakipi na emusate kesi kanaaina: adek asinoi.

Abala da ebe kwape aponiatar kes, mam bobo ngesi akoto apapun ebe apote icin kobo.

La ajassi kes emoriariton, Ejkt. Victor Apore lo erai araman ka asinianakin aniker ko Kasilo ka Serere kajal eyapesi lo RDC; abwokitok itemwan KateYako LC 5, Ejkt Stansilo Orucu.

# Onapito ka Etonu

Erai Emunyu etuan lo ikaru 45 ido eorkitai nges onem Orungo, obuku Amuria okaru 1953. Edamunit Emunyu ediguri kotomaaipima alupok (B.Sc.(Hon.)Eng.(Surveying and Photogrammetry) ko University of Nairobi kokaru 1976

Iwadikat Jonathan Maraka ebe, alibuneta numunon kesi etogogongotoe ebuod (dna lokat Crusader Francis Onapito Ekomotori da aibwo kanu aburukin Maj. Gen. Jeje Odongo kwape MP lo Amuria. Mam Onapito eboe abu kopedo aterean arai alemunit ngesi etau aibwo arai mum kapak na enomakitor Etop ngesi etomu. Konye abukolim Sorobe “kwape adaunulolem arai MP alimur ebe ajalak ingesi icolongotong da kwape eurat jo kanuramam eong aumite be eja ibore epedori aitikokin eong

Engineer Emunyu

aibwo kedolo apak."

Abala Onapito ebe adaunit ngesi oner kede apolok ka atumunak (lu Amuria) ido ‘kere’ esimariton asinisisiti na ngesi aibwo.

Kosodi apapula naka Njubu Times na alumuni Namukaga natubor neu abala ebe igangitos itunga loka emuvamentko Teta ka icorda, kwape nat Jeje Odongo ka David Palkol aibwok Onapito.

Esisianakinan Makerere School of Bussinets Studies, Nakama, Joshua Okebe (Inya (teten) itogogong) ne ewadikan kami

Opolot, ebe ekapakina ngesi aibwo arann apolon eicolong LC5 Soroti kanu eburokin loatwan (Henry Odetta, Abac)

eyapesi lu Etop Nabalansa nahoan. Apota na onomi, Jonathan Maraka

# Ekeun Ngora HS, ejesun Alo

Any. App. 1

aduge hon. Amamei yen ebiroro

Kokaru 1998 esisiak iwongon kes edumunitos principuls iwongon, kosodi esisiak 26 kes adumunitos principuls iuni, 19 kes edumunitos principuls iarei 13, kes edumunitos principuls iarei 43, kes edumunitos principul ndope hon. Emamei yen ibiroro cat. Esisiak 70 kes eboikina aingito.

Ko Ngora H.S esisiak iuni kes adumunitos principals iwongon. Esisiak 25 kes adumunitos principals iuni kosodi 18 adumunitos iarei. Esisiak iarei kes apotu kibiroros cat.

Konye kokaru 19988 ko Ngora H.S esisiak iwongon kes apotu kodumutu principals iwongon, esisiak

32 kes apotu kodumutu principals iuni ido esisiak 25 adumusprincipalsiarsi. Eisisiak 118 kes eboikina aingito.

Esisiak hi iswamatos ejok Teso College kotoma “licences” kes imorariton, Julius Odailet (ABB) aponitan 17, Edia A (BAD)(15) Okalany M (CBC)(14) Oroka D (BCC)(14), kosodi Imo R (CBC) (14) Malinga G (BCC)(14).

Icie kesi Ebiju Moses (CCB) (13) Opeeng G (CEDB)(13) ka Ecuru P (CDC)(12).

Kotoma uabjecte luka Arts esisiak lu iswamatos ejok kes. Asana Mosara (BDA)(15) Edite S (CBC)(15), Otoka P (CBB)(15) Nukor Geresom EBB(13).

Ko Ngora H/S esisiak lu iswamatos ejok kes imoriariton. Otoka Joshua (CCDD) (15), Elabot (BCC)(14), Aber Solume (CCC) (14), Eloka Emmanuel

(BCC) (14), Apio Jane Frances (DCB) (13, Asio Caroline (DCC) (13).

Icie kesi Asio Angella (CCC) (13), Okurat Isus (DCB) (13) ka Elunga Mas (CBD) (13). Ko Ngora Griti School aponar aoni kes apotu kodumutu principals iuni kes Tabira Akol (DEE)(R), Martha Baluket (CED) (10) ka Akori Rathi (DEC)(10).

Apesur aarei, Florence Amongini 11) ka Hellen Twans (9) kes apotu kodumutu principals iarei, kosodi apesur awongon kes apotukodumutu e principal ediopet. Kes, Rosa Akello (5), Mary Goretti Alupo (7), Grace Apio (5) ka Suzan Ikdangi 4). Esisiak 16 eboikina aingito.

Kosodi ko Soroti S.S da nes etubitutor esisiak ejok mot ekarulo adepar okaru loatubor. Esisiak 14 kes apotukodumutu

principalsiuni, 11 kes kodumutu principals konsodi bobo 11 kes kodumutu eprinciasi na okaru lo.

Okaru je (1997) ko ikany kangon kes adumusprincipalsiuni kosodi ko adumunitos principul ndope esisiak ikanykesei adumunitous principul boto.

Esisiak hi iswamatos ko Soroti S.S ko Amu nasi, William Ateyik (14), Ariko James (BB) Etsuibeth Amitat (CCD) Jane Nahwire (CCD) Kousmerokale Soroti A Secondary School ko angicumitos ayatok nasi kesi emorariton Oral na Charles Economist Geography 5 ke sone Pamparus Ohwao

# Etakadiki eropit ikaasolan

Any. App. 1

ekassilo (sitting allowance) nesi ebeit apolon eicolong aduman 13,000/- kosodi atupitonke ka erubun 12,000/- kanginaibioikot.

Luce ikansolan kesi abu ekomiti lo apiaikitatubaijakin allowances nata- isirigin lu apero (night allowance) 10,000/-, apiai nu aiboinikin airabet 10,000/-kosodi lu erot (safari day allowance) 10,000/- kala alosit (transport) lu elomunete kotoma alwanus naka aiboisid ekasola.

Apotu ikansolan, lu eegaresikit Gabriel Odwo-Onege (Kapsjan), Julius Oren (Obalanga) ko Olaki Inangolei John (Katakwi) kitepegeturius lo isirigin kalu enyami apolon eicolong LC 5 ka iministan ke.

Kansola Onege Gabriel (Kapsjan) ngesi abala ebe adolit aitidisiareropit apolon eicolong ka iministanke kede 150,000/-kosodete aiyatakin ettai lo apaarasia kanu airiamunor

ekassilo kere kotoma okaru. Kansola Julius Oren (Obalanga) nesi abu kigong aumisioit ngin kobala ebe eroko editirik ticana noi mam epedoriaticiropitongul. Abu ngesi da kokoto ekassilo airiamununkangulilapiosarei irwan atipet kwape itutukitor ekisil tetere ikansilan edumunete apiai nu ilosikino kanu airam itunga.

Konye kansila Olaki Inangole John ngesi akoto kansilastacai isirigin iho kansolesi da “ajaria”.

Apolon eicolong LC 5 Stephen Ilemukorit, eotrededit aigang eropit ke ngesi abukolimok kansilas ebe akoto kesi aite eropit ngol ka aswam na ebeit ngesi (Ilemukorit) aswam mere aite be elosi ailipilipitoi acupa na ebiya? ingisit Ilemukorit.

Lo erai CAO Nicholas Ocakara ngesi abu kolimok kansilas ebe etolomuni ekomiti lo apiai aomisisot na

airup apolon eicolong ngol otopitete alanga aswam ke ka itunga ko nesi acok kwape apolotuk lo editirik Tibei aite eicolong acok eswamato luko ditirik aimoram na aso edolit ngesi sinyanat lo ikiarakakere" abale lo igangit eropit aite eicolong Akaulo na arai adaun apaarasia sam ekassulo ocam aitutukot ka allowance skwape apolokemititi apiai.

ETIAI: SHS. 400

# Mam Jeje ejalakit eicolong l'Amuria

Eminista lo Aisisia, Prof Apollo Nsibambi (kiding) etubi ausi kana apukor eyapesi loitetet ioka District Planning Unit, Soroti. Abwoikit ngesi President Maseseni kwape epejomen loangesibib kasaban na 'Apaaran na aipues na itunga' ko Soroti, Namukaga na atubor. Apuso na inomit Jonathan Maraka.

# Omaria, Ilukor, Mukula igurete Soroti, ebala ekansola lo Kabermaido

Omaria

Na Bonnis Skara

E MINISTA Ioka State kanu Akironukotoma, Col William Omaria, Bishop Gerecon Bukor lo lo Soroti ka MP lokotaan lu Soroti, Mike Mukula kesi icie kalu abu ekansola lo Kaberamaido kofimo kaitabet na edistrikt kwapeebn la ecukete atiakako na kwana ejai kiding na Itere ka Bumama.

Ekanola lukotem Kaberamaido, Joseph Emusu ngesi elepani ngan kaurianet na ikansilanluka LC 4 kal, C5

Sorotimula sjakinol, ekiko Hall araasi 10/7/98. Eminista loka Local Government Jaberi Bidandi Ssali ngesi anyaraanti aurianet ngin.

Abu Emusu kimua nco Omaria koingaren na Bidandi kobala ebe abu kodiakaritt nei auyara Ikumama "ikor" lu aponio adotonor k'ohaale. Jibe abu Omaria kikenyanite ngan ilipakino ates kalo ara apolon eicolong L1.5 Soroti, John Henry Odetta, ko St Peters Cathedral konsol dabebu atracakinaliman ngan kapak na edaere teatwan

k'Akoboi, Anyalai, Serere.

Abala Emusu ebe apotu akitoma abu Omariakilehileb kitukurwo kesi amaranat kode itunga lo asromete kesi luda kwana ebe emuaritmi kesi. "Ipadiunik kwana isio aowam cut kokau" abala Emusu koduo etogo akwena.

Abu Bidandi kelimok ikansilan ebe amamui apolu na abusu ajaun Soroti arai itejokaritos ekansolanaowam, kotiakak. Abu ngesi kilip kojaan amaran kiding na

# Na Jonathan Maraka

MP lo Amuria, Maj. Gen. Jeje Odongo ngesi mamber ejalakit eicolong ko kaitabet napolon karaida eutasi kwana itunga lo ekotos abarokin ngesi alimonor.

Ekaluani loapolonitoka airabet napolon, Aeneas Tandekwire ngesi abukolonok Etsykonimu Naiarrit nabiun, ebe mamber ngesi odumutol awadikart kama ejai Jeje na ebala ebe ejalakit toni ngesi eicolong lo Amuriak' airabet.

Kingit Etop arai erongo Jeje elosenenei aibonokin airabet abu Tandekwire kohongek ebe "Karaidaosabittile atubor ajai ngesi ne, mam zong ajani

# Abilunos iderepan lu ataksin

Na Job Opalat

ERENGJAK ataksin ka abaasin kesi abongokisi atukor amotokan akaulo na ailung aowam koc adaun apaarasia aarei.

"Bongokber isio, konyeerai kanu elap kalo bon," abala egirigiran lo erengjak ko Soroti, Ejkt. Yeka.

Alangete kesi aiteker amotokan agear araasi 13.7.98 toni 14.7.98 akaulo na etutubikinio kesi apugan ekisil lo abalas kesi ebe ationo noi.

Aalotok akwap akwap kesi apotu kobukisi kanu eipone lo alosit adaun apaarasia ngun aurei.

Toai App.16

The headteacher, staff and students invite parents, OBs, well wishers and members of the general public to this year's Open Day on Saturday 25th July, 1998 at the school starting 9.00a.m.

Parents of S.4 and S.6 candidates are especially invited for candidates meeting which will take place on the same day.
