# Apenyakisi Isolota aipit ikur abaria

NaNannielkara

AKORIOK luko Soroti kesi
apenyakisi aipit ekurari lo
wensweni nido (silk worm)
kanu amaria esokoonin koipud
ta nido kala k'akwapin nuko
lapan, Chmaka Brazil.

Kwapola wanaber, amissirin nu
edepaerte 20 kesi edauntui
oitemonokin kano aipit ekurut
ta loda adantu akoriok kotoma
atukot keo Soroti Silk Farmers
Association (SSFA) aissisaun
ebe apol adumun kotoma ka.

Ediope kalu epiriikiton aipit
ekurat lo Erioru W. Etoika
ngesi abu kolimok aurianet na
akoriok na eboikina Araqui
Agricultural College (AAC)
Soroti eba angicunitos ipiriotini
luko Kawanda Agricultural
Institute eba esamunaraokurui
ngul kede nkwam lo Ayakoika
Kole nakol Uganda. Alemunos
do epital ikar lu k'atukot keo
akorinkin ikito (mulbery trees)
lu ipiset iker ngun eroko etap
Agosto kegeara.

Epiriitilo Aripai Agricultural
College Eeroi Ebregtingesi abu
kiinyokok kaitekaarit angor
aipit ekurat ngul 'naharaingin
itungananepedori aipit ngesi,
abula ngesi. Itigogongorit da
ngesidte ajokaka ikwanin luko
Lira, Soroti, Kitgum, Arua ka
Katakwi kano aipit ekurat ngul.

# Very Rev Erwau

na apiriitit acir Ema Abidin
kocam nuke.

Ekapanakin do kopekwana
atukot aiupej ipiriotin luka
Uganda Silk Development
Centre (USDC) ka Soroti
District Development
Programme (SDDP) kamu
airerror eipono lo epedori atar
atukono nu aigang kesi.

Kuja ngun da, atukot suka
SSFA isisi asno Very Reverend
Erwau araun apolon esiolong
ta atukot kosodi Olen M.P.
arauin atapiton ke.

Apotrikusumad trera Etoika
araun eigirigran kosodi Ema
Abidin aseanio kwape
ingadan apiyai. Imerban lu
apon kosesnai kesi imorariton
Dr. Integration Obla, Emot
Ebregi, Amon Edakar Okiriu,
William Epecu ka Grace
Agwaru.

# Inyobo apolo?

Rumore (Akiroe-Esameikoi)

AOKOTO eong aitam aitacann kade do atatam kede asiomak inyob kede na Etop, akirot na idila ani aitotom ido komam ididokinit ajenon akepolou, apei akirot ngin ehe 'apolo'.

Akirot ngin apolo, erui akirot na iami inu kote ido idila nei apol lu ipudasi sisimgarenikin apekot ara. Politiicians kotoma akongwua, aitenomanen kotoma apak na aisup asesta ara 'eony kama wok. Idila oni ibai aipup 'politicians' ehakasi ehe aliwui eong kama apolo, eponrikikime ainapara, ka acie da. Kanya lelo akoto ber eong oni enenno adiopet ngin ebeapolo 'apolo'.

Itodunitos alakara kotoma njautenekon ara ibonat lukusi kotoma okale, atutubet kusi ara ibonat kotoma akwap kusi. Epedorete asiomak 'Etop' acamanar ka eong ehe, etanganan lo ejassi kede apolo okale ke, epatanikit alemun esolo, epatanikit sitana ike idwe ejok, aitanap kesi ejok kede ayangaur kesi osimeno kotoma apatana; edite ecelet oreke naarai epatanikit adumun ihorok lu akoto eke kale kotoma atipet, idila duc arimarite ngeis ido apatana duc itunga atupite ruke. Aso onot eong ehe oni kere ipuda apolo.

Aso singiset na epol nado kwane akoto eong oni

Apolo kotoma tajen ka ngesi adumun aijulakinet na ejok soekon, arai bonat okale kon, arai bonat atutubet kon; arai bonat akwap kon- aijulakinet na ejok ngesi bo inyo? (pedori ijo sungi- aijulakinet na ejok, aneka, kwape aanyunet- ngesi jo aimi, arai adumun inyamat kain okale kon, ngesi ijo idumun anapito na ejok, ngesi ijo aitopolerin aswam arai asamai ijo syapesi, arai bonat asadumun ikoku arai imukeru asamaka a cie da la (pedori ijo amat.

Aijulakinet najokan ayangauri do- aiyalama, ainapera, epedori ayangauri arimanat, ka ailapera, ainamus ainamus ka ibore icin kere lu

singitakin bonik, ngesi nata ehe, ikwaikini bo oni ai tapi idumuni apolo?

Ehala ainerasit kangul- ipolok luesoibe ehe 'isalak ijo ajie, apere isawan kere, isalakini (eni ijo icana) ekoto bodo ijo kojai ibore yen iswamainepetai ngesiatemar ai? Akukuranat- siri ibokik aipanyia ado naacok kousdi atemar ehe adaun nalolo, arai bonat aciluni ekstala edu isunyakini atemar ehe apas insingin, arai bonat ijo lu ijo syapesi adoliar uyapesi kon, isunyakini aiworor erai, ido ikoni nen ongolengolui esawa noi kano alepor "njoire" arai omatet. Ihorok ngul kere itodunitos

akalanyamat ido mam erai lu eyangaanete apolo.

Nainiyokka bodo nu tapikono nu ipedoria oni adumun akukuranat tapi do idumuni apolo?

- Etidisiasi ematet- Narut 'esuramol' kwa 'adaunatar itungacin'amakinejapeekitor ngul-ikwamak-ijoejugraksam, kotomaapak naediredauni ijo agugong odisiar aswam.
- Etidisiasi eilato-ejok eilate- konye ikwamak ijo eilato lo mam itemok-tai, kwape nat alusite ehaa agwogwo omamete apesan, arai bonat osokomomamai ibore yen ibo ijoegwdet, epatanaijyudakun ehaja, isinakini do ehaja lo ijo ongoponjyoporo.
- Etidisiasi einer lucie arai bo

nat angulupa emamei adumunet angulupa, arai bonat alurakite einer onacekonami inacikonabosot na aomsum na aimo akito mamwogo.

- Asiscata apalikite ibaren-nacut ekimei, ibates atitai amunamunainyamatwok arai bonat lu idunyeta, eyangauri na angulupa arai iceleta.

Aso, angetakini, akoto do eong atemar ehe eispoleni arimanat, akukuranat, aiiwamanananaianorikikine. Ekoto do oni asiac itunga ngun lu emumu naarai itaparete aomnau wok.

Alemur iceleceleta kotoma okorean, ajulakini komen wok ejaasi kwape kolo abwakitinor ipolok.

Alemasi eisinye, akote ainyam nepolo ido odite aswam.

Adumutu akukuranat konye mam ingingekini aswam noi adann akoni agongonga ehe tenre ibari atipet.

Mam icanicani akon apak, ainer kede etunganan lo firi lo mam epapano aiceerta.

Nakawasia, korimaarite do luspolok kon, papakon ka totokon, korimaarite apugan ido kopopji nainerasi kesi.

Iswama oni ngun, idumuni do oni 'apolo'.

Erai ewadikan ediopet kangat kolo abwoitos kwape ekanola LC5 Katakwikana Asamuk electoral area, konye mam arereng abu kikam.

Abu akamera na Etop kikam ejakait lo ejotoi ko Independence Garden tuparuc cat. Etuan kwa kalo lo edikokini ajo aibois na aswam mam epedori aitopol akwap cat.

# KOKORAK AOKOT KANU AYUUN AIJAR

Tswakete itunga tu ipu ko Uganda kanu aikidokus na aokot, na eyauni eemdi, apolu, akangasia ka adekasinei acie. Eikidokoto kwana aokot kadekisia, naarai epuata itunga, kacut iduwe lu edekanakinos eemdi ido kipudasi aiyasio aokot. Eyataki do na eipud lo aokot, ibore da yen ayangau aikidokus na aokot kadekisia kaiboiso acie nu ingadaere aokot.

Erai epelu wok kere awanyun ebe ejaasi aokot nu edoklos toma adekisia ka aingadisia nu aokot, kanu aingarakina itunga tu ipudasi aokot. Iburai itunga tu ipudasi aokot adumun kes katipet, arai mam, etwaikete kesi.

Epedor araul ip, ipajanakon arai bo immat kon, ipuda aokot, Ipedori ip ayuun aijar ke kopone kalo akorakin aokot kon kadoko ado kere, arai bonat akorakin etimu edio lo irimorit annat aokot.

Ngeitunganankere yen erai apolouke kiding ikaru 17 ka 65, epedor akorakin aokot. Emamei ationis kere na eyangauri amatar aokot toma aijar nakitunganan.

Kakorakisi oni kere aokot kanu ayuun aijar.

Erai ewa asiararet kama ejai atukot naka Uganda Blood Transfusion Services, korionget lo Angaleu.

Epedor ijo akorar aokot kon kaiboiso nutk.

12 ETOP Naiwongsoot, Omnidokokoupon

ESISIANAKINAK lu Aoyarenrelli luko esomeres 52 lukubuku Soroti kesi adamuto aituturo ko wago ayatok akiro nu awoere kosomero kac. Etuturo isinkosomero lo Arapai P/S Auswa, Johnson Malinga kaapolon esomero lo akatkai P/s David Ekuma kesi angarenikitos aituorio kangin.

Emaniman isomeroi, John Robert Itelait agesi etijenari na trimoriti isomeron lukotem kalo araasi 7/7/98.

Makerere University nesi ebuniageunaikorofiguri lo aboliasio koingaren, abala ekalani loko kansulo lo aboliasio ko Uganda kere (National Council of Sports), Abbey Lataya koriponta lo ajai The Monitor araasi 14.7.98.

# Aoliosi apiyainuka UPE Emootai HM Abiribira PS

Na Henry Epole

APYY AInuka UPE agriankolap Agusio 1997 nu ebeitra esomero lo Abirabira P/S, eitela Okapel, etem Kaberamaido kee ejai akuriam ebe etolitoi kotoma akasota naka esomeronajei ebanik lo Soroti. Mam ber ejiriuma etisi lo apiyai nu aolisis.

Ejai da akuriam ebe aolissi isirigin da lo abeitre atacia iropito luka esisianakinak luko isomero kale.

Kauriametnatipetruka i komitintluka SMC ka PTA luko esomero kale, araasi 16/7/98 aponi kolimoruside mam apolokiton esomero, James Omera Ebis, atakasuk esomerongeeitme apukotorataamo na tareit. Aolisi ngesi kede asitampu na esomero ka eitabo lo ebank.

Elipititido auriak apolokiton aisisia ko Soroti distrikt aijukakin kee apolon esomero ecae ka aikamun Ebis tetere ebonguni aitacann na etonito apiyai nu esomero nu aolissi kobank.

Abalasi da auriak ebe apupunitos kesi ebe elato Ebis kotao lo Sorotikede kobuko; Amuria. Adonluda auriak ayanga rangurian kee ne ejansi LCs kolosikitos aikamun Ebis kanu amyakon ngesi abongonokin aingiseta nu ikamunitos aodor na apiyai kangun.

Akansila nu atumunak ko LC 5 Soroti, Rachel Frances Adyango (Fanta) (teten) ka Jane Labwangor na iswamai Soroti Hotel kesi acie kotoma esisiak lu alomunete kede Diploma in Hotel &amp; Institutional Catering kopucit lo ajaikina Uganda College of Commerce, Tororo araasi 25/7/98. Aputo na inomit. Jonathan Maraka.

# Elopata auriak HM lo Ocelakur PS

Na Ivan Engoru

APOLOKITON aisisia ko Soroti distrikt, Michael Etoyu ngesi ecoraki auriak lu Ocelakur PS, etem Bululu, Kalaki aiswamanar ka apolon esomerokec.

Enera Etoyu kotupite angarian naka auriak ko memorandum ko, araasi 13.7.98 kauriaari na atyarauni.

ekomiti lo eyait esomero (SMC) ka lo atakot na auriak ka esisianakinak (PTA) kanu aitnus apolon esomero kee; Otim Onyang kakonyeit nuka DEO ebe kanu aitolitoi apolo na esomerokec. Aupuna Etoyu ka apolon eicofong loka ekomiti lo eyait nuka aisisia kodutrik Soroti, Horace Biat Ocarit.

Komemorandum lo abu apolon eicolong SMC, kosiomak DEO ko oupake, engurianete auriak ebe; etapit

, duc apolon esomero alosenen bukee; kojalakini esomero kwangin ido ebe enyaku adoketait na aisisi kosomero kan.

Abalas auriak ebe atapil da boho apolon esomero aibunga ideeke; komamekisilicamuro ido ebe emamai aimorikikina kiding apolon esomero kede auriak.

Abu Otim Onyang kimua ngun kere kwape esabet bor ido ebe eitekerene ayangauni ngun kere kwape eraar ngesi Etesot.

Abu do ngesi kilip aijulio akonyen ka DEO, konye abu Etoyu kogir ailipu ke kobala ebe mam etoritere adoketa nu ebeit. Abu Etoyu kitacau ebe ikaputi teukumeteauria erai ekomiti loka PTA nes ebeit angie eipone lo itwasamaere ido SMC engici ikapun loka asionannatitai (UPE).

Abu DEO kicorak ekomiti loka SMC mam aidok akanin acekki na mam etiai lo isirigin iwadikatantoma.

KOTOMA aijulakinetu nukorionget loka Aisisia nes adaunere aisiyengan Jeoash Olupot lolem arai apolokiton. Ngora HS kosoidete aburokin kede Ejkt. James Akabwailo ejalanie ko Kigeet College, Butobere

## IJO IKOT

Koyuwa ikoku kon kanejai polio.

Erai amorosoit na apedorosio ka et amamus ayuar ikoku kon kotoma ade adekasinei acie na imukiasi. Kanu inyo naarai mam aurian epodoknit?

Adau apugan aitutub apaarasia 1-2 C ka 12-13 Ocoto (Septemba 1998) kwi ekato loka polio ko Uganda kere.

Kotoma apaarasia kanu, nu itegelikina kwap na ikanu ikany eponio aiton ekato polio. Arai kedaunitai aiton kes ekato ayatakin ayuara kec. Mam aitonio aeyauni ationis adio kere.

Ebuni do na aingarakin cut aikisario Uganda. Akwapin nu ipu ko Afrika kimo

# Etorona Ejalu eigur lo Soroti

Na Nathao Etonga

LOKOLO abwoikin ebuko Soroti ko NEC Ejkt. Ateker Ejalu ngesi etepeg na olon jumbore Bishop Gersom Ilukan loko Soroti kwape edioput kangan eyaunitou atiakariaka kiding Iteso ka Ikuntama loko distrikt kalo Soroti.

Emite Ejalu ko Pamba kobala ebe erui politisanukesi icokete atiakamaka na ejai distrikt.

Abala Ejalu ebe erai Ilukor ediope itunga kalu kopotu kiwamata koopong sanyon ebe adaan elong ilong ko Teso kesindi sanyon ebe antirikikinto Itesoka Ikuntama.

Ekanola loko Kaberamaide Ejkt Joseph Emune ngesi abala pae ebe Col. William Omaria, Bishop Gersom Ilukor ka MP loko Soroti Mike Mukula kesi icokete atiakaka ko kiding na Itesoka Ikuntama Ewadikatai

Abwoikiniton erionget loko UNDP ko Uganda

Prof. Thomas Babatunde (kediang) ka urucan aswamiste nada Private Sector Development Programme ko Uganda

Prof. Ephraim Kamunta epupokiton einer k'Col. William Omaria. Ayais na inomit Emmanuel Akelen

# Ecoraki Omaria ikanisan da alomar akiro nu agwelanar

Na Emmanuel Akelem

EMINISTA lo egangiton eminista lo akironuketroma Col. William Omaria ngesi alimo ebe ekot itunga kere torii ikanisan dakakwapwok ainakin aitolot agwelanar ka adio aiman kere na ikulepek kano ajakun kohakor.

Enera ngesi araasi 26/7/98 egolakini aarianet nakapauraisa aajni, na etem itemere na ainyadopolo naka emane loitunga ikulepek bonik, komametai apuganko Uganda kano adiji ecanit.

Erionget loka Private Sector Development Programme (PSDP) lo igangat UNDP kede apiai kiswamanara kede apugan nesi etoloni arianum na, nada anyariritere agwelanarak, etatak, engarenok lu apugan kede idunin akortok ka epitak ka eswamak loka iyapesis luepukonorit PSDP kodistrikt. Arai alosikin etke anisisanakin itunga naka PSDP ka epela ke nepepe itungakere airut ibakor kotunga.

Abwoikiniton UNDP ko Uganda Prof. Thomas Babatunde ngesi tek apakori aarianet na.

Abala Omaria ee mam adolit itunga aibwemanak in alomanaroprojektitai komam ber irereoritos arai apedori eprojekt le ageario ascatun ka apolo.

"Kisisiau ber epulaani ejok ido ekot ijo amina aawam kon na imania ijo kwape iminar ijo apetara ikono ijo aimary," abala ngesi.

Eyatakit ebe: "Arai ikanisan, ibura yesi da alomar agwelanar ka etatai. Mam yesi ipedorete aingarenikit itunga lu ican lu eororete akoikes. Epone ani eyusunia eong Edeke koworori akoik?"

Sek koitolose lo aarianetkana, abu urucan (cordinator) loka PSDP, Prof. Ephraim Kamunta kiken yiken yiteebe aanyalaara do ecanitnoi kakwap ido korai ainingosit akon.

Abala Kamunta ebe apupunit ngesi koredio ebakai ebe alimokite president loka World Bank aarianet naka ipisikopin

lugeresan ko Lambeth Conference (ko Bulaya) ebe alonete do ibakor aipikor itunga cut.

"Mam akoto oni aite le kaario kope kalo (loanji ican)," abala Kamunta. Eyatakit ngesi ebe ko Uganda, komma agolekaru ebe adumuni ngin itunganan apiai naka dollars 250 (nepeto 250,000/-). Abala Kamunta ebe ek idioko ikapun ngul noi ide ejesuna noi kotan kalo igerunitere itunga lu ejaani obakor ka lu ejaani ejok.

Ko Uganda kere ne itemitere enaaba lo itunga kwape imilionin 20, ebe imilionin ikanyaongon kesi ajaani oican cut, kwap naka etiai kalo ijerunitere lu ican jokan, lu mam epedoritos anodolikin eipud kec lo ainyam, ainap aperu ka amukian.

Ngul, kes abala Kamunta ebe mam epedorete amanun nepelem edollar ediopet da nepetai (1,100/-) kotoma apaaran adiope. Abala ngesi ebe arai einer kec lo adoli kaling 40% ka 50% ko Uganda.

"Adokasi kolo akwapin nu

Omaria

ipu kanen sek. Ijari do oni aijan nikolo adautu kwi kokaru 200 ko kau. Mam aja ngin ejokokan, edwar, epol amumu ido euriana naarai epol atwanare kano ariebo," abala Kamunta.

Abala ngesi ebe ejai PSDP ka lu ajaani aurianet kere epela lo alemar ecanit kotunga loko Uganda ido ebe epedoros ngun cut. Elipit ngesi ateker aigang PSDP koponesio kere tetere aisipedor itunga ikulepek, komam aitoliotolo kotoma apugan aitolot aswamiste kec kilajaara.

# Esumu Mukula aingic atwanare na eswaman nako Soroti SS

Na Johason Amecku ka Willsmith Okeflo

ABWOIKITON Soroti Municipal Council kotoma airabet na apolon, Capt. George Mike Mukula, nges alimo ebe ekapak inangesi atupakin akiro na atwanare nako. Ajkt. Florence Olupot kitani anisisan ibore aari ngesi.

Alimani Makala ngin kokansia loka St. Peter's Cathedral, Soroti ne elipakinore ates ke Florence Olupot, na tem erai alapikan apolokiton

apiyai (harsur) kosomeroloko Soroti S.S.

Atwanikini Florence Olupot adekis napolon nako Soroti araasi 24/7/98, eutai aijeng ngesi kano aridakin auries ke. Dr. Ignatius Stewart Aminu ngesi ajengi ngesi.

Abala Mukula elimekini ebworok etke inapakina ngesi atupakin akiro ngun jokan loni ngesi ajenun ibore yen eyouni atwanan tunga.

Apolon esomero loko Soroti S.S. Patrick Aitan ngesi anonyi natwan Florence kobala ebe

atwania esomero aeswaman na lem amunoono noi ido koinak inaaswam ke ejok noi.

Edaran apiyai ko Soroti S.S. Patrick Ouke ngesi abala ebe atwania ngesi akan ke nakoteten.

Angurianete ebworok lu ipu kanu atwanare ka Florence na mam acai.

Apotii kolimorai ebe alosit nakatwan adekis kano aridakin aures ke, kwape lem angicusptistor imurok ebe erajakina aures ke.

Ebe abu Dr. Aminu kojeng

ngesi kotoma agola na isidoere angor (marternity) konye mam ngesi abu kikwaru.

Eumitai ebe akwamakita ngesi ekia lo isillionorere adekak. Apotiei Florence ilapio iwongon.

Angurianete da ebworok naarai mam adekis abu kitolom eripoota lo etodanit ibore yen aari nakatwan.

Mam da idio eswaman kere yen apolon yen kadekis ajai anukio na ates.

Enyekiki nakatwan ikoku idiope.

# Ebeit aitegear atu Iteso ko Conferen Centre, Kampala

Na Ewadikan Etop

ATUKOT naka Kireka Iteso Development Association (KIDA) nes ebeit aitegear ko International Conference Centre Nemukaaga 1 Agusito 1998.

Col. William Omaria L. Arapai ngesi ebeit araut epejonon lo angosibib, abala apolon eicolong lo KIDA Ejkt. John Emilly Otekatelimekini Edita lo Etop Kenneth Oluka kosimu apaaran Naiyareit.

"Egeun epucit lo aipudun atukotna nawan 8 lukapaaran, ido kimuna ebe ejaunos MPs kere lu Tesokede lu eraini Iteso kere luko Pallisa ka Tororo Distrikts," abala Otekat.

Eyatakit ngesi ebe erai alosikinet naka KIDA aimorikikin Iteso luko Kireka kede aiboisio acie nuko Kampala aitiji atiokisi ok wape nat adekasisen kede atwakisia. "Ilosikit isio aimorikikin kede aiduk ateker. Eraun do atokot.

Oteka

na eporoto la la imorikikin, lo epe epedori aitodat ena ne ejaasi ayaisit," ngesi.

Ayaitok KIDA Beatrice Odongo Apolon eicolong, Okurut- apiya, le Osupelem- eigngee Ocom ngesi awtame Imerban kesi Itelo Fransis Opara, na Pedun Isiagi, la Oneko Ekanaba.

# Aar Mpangati apese ko Ngoron

Na Alupo M

EBAASI Mpaganti lo edilenen ko Serere abar la kabongun da enaaba ke 830 VAJ ngesi abu korot Apolor Norah na Okorom 7 ididiek abulun amieritaka ka atwanare da kanepekamen.

Erai Apolot Norah akoke ka Opolot Stanius le oink etem Ngora. Uukamunit akangas osawa ediopet kto Bukedea kicaki egaali 'Hero'. Elomunit do Norah apolon kojingai kalu ore k'Oltiiraarianum kede abar. Iyemuto kesi abulasi ebe abu erengian kokutak ay ekuot bula ayapikit apese cut. Abu Ederepa loman kojen ekekiror kotam aitajar apese na konye kule ebaasi noi mam abu kopedo abwoun karipet. Aba konang Norah kitoni abulun iboro lu aktok kto abaasi kolot awai na erot kodoi do ates da awai na.

Esimnit Norah P.T. konye abu kodum aktok kote ngesi ikoki idiopet ipese. Ketam Etop ayenun ekim k'Police mam abu kopatanar.

# Aipinui Iteso Co

Na Ronnie Ikara

ENGARENOK loko Soroti kingaren ikite apolon eicolong LC 5, Juventine Ebamu, kesi apotu kogolokisi esomero lo Teso College Aloet, Soroti adaan esabuti ediopet agerun 2/8/98 akkulo na apuniatar esisiak asuror abwang abwang ireria esisianakinak kec, aipe akokoreinu efaamu ka aikatar iemtoritmu ekirididi, inyanyan ka ikabepin kakuware na 1.8.98, lumitos da esisiak akinei nu esisianakinak.

Apotu ipolisin lu Amukaru lu idunyas ka esomero karurakaros aisinagikin eautene kosodete aijorimaar eosiak 19 polio naka Soroti akware ngipongin. Apotu juba ipolisin komakasi eisiak 42 otuja apaaran Naraibidi naarai aomitai ebe nami tema obenyit ngol.

Aposikosi kere ko lucanakinai k'athong na 3/8/98 ido abu eboud lo eyait esomero kibokin aurianet bian kanu atomitem nu ebeit siswamaikin

Toni App. 12

Epois lo apotu esisiak kotiaikisi kwap kore Ejkt. Osomun ngol koingaren etogoke lo ebwangabwangatai alabirai. Aputona inomit Milton Opacho.

# Amudia akaale ireria

Na Emmanuel Akelem ka Nico Akwang

AIAK naka itunga kaiboisio nu iriritos ecor Kyoga ko Soroti Sorok itesi elosi epugal ar kwana noi kwape abumi akaile nada aimiarotorakipi kocor kalo ailikonor idoketa, amusirinka ireria. Epi da siyalongong ebe emina atwanare abwangan kano ebeli ka adekasnei nu ikopas kotoma akipi, kwape ekolera kwa atanai motor acoloonin ka itogoi da.

CAO naka Soroti distrikt, Agiripina Amuge Akolngesi Nakiyareit abu kelimok Etop kosimu ebe ajai tem apagalu na odistrikt ido kasi atition atwam kec. Abala ngesi ebe apupi ngesi da koyemuto ebe eriking ekido (sudd) eti ocilet loka Nile ko Apac neda emikit

akipi aleleanar laai ko Abala Amuge ayanginda apedoria etenge Abala ngesi ebe korip Bululukobuku Kalakita ka ireria lu ipu kodistrik Matm. Amuge, nada atiteten atiokiso nu em iburo lu amunaunon ko Abala ngesi ebe ejis akoru kodistrikt aitolot

# IYEMUTO

## Elipakin Amuge arereng 'naronon'

Na Nico Akwang

LO apolokinit eicolong loka apolok isomerisiangan ibuhilo (Chairman of headteachers association) Oligo (hmuedness, araasi 25/7/98 ailipakin amujong Agiripina Ako! Amuge arereng na mam iyemuto.

Kotoma ailip na abu ngesi kitobe apolokini airiamun, nes abu Oligo kalimokinio itongalere ailar kwap, kognoni elope arasak in ailipkinhasebe. Papa lo asuban, kilra ber ijo ailip na ibulinin kon la lolo etukokina ne, kusereng kesi kere kotoma orotis ko, kwa kwana elosioto kesi abongonor oretis koc.

"Konye okwe papa lo asuban Edeke, kesi, kingaingait isio ijo ebe siri ber ijo kijula amujong na Ako! Amuge, anyean ko Soroti kwape kipupio ebe eswama aingito kano adumun adoketait acie. Aijuliske ebumiaruon atwaniar kamakosi. Okwe, papa loasubankiraber lolo ijo ailipa kesi napena, keromida, kopsip ber ijo nes kwapekwangan, kwape kilipitor isio ijo kokitor lo etelepar kon Yetu Christo lokapolon kosi. Kogatunete itunga kere ebe "Amen", ido kirdibusi itunga kere akwena.

Amuge da alopat na iridit akwena teni tetei, kaumokinite ebe inyobo elipia Oligo nes arereng na mam ibusakit.

Kacodakin ewadikan Etop aingit Oligo inyobo elipia ngesi koipone kangol, ebala ebe arsi ketab Amugraingit okosoedete bebo aijular ebe abuni do Soroti cut atwaniar, nes ainakin i ngesi ilipi lok asuban kwangin naarsi ebe epu ikristayon lu abei loasuban acamun ailipanakoc.

## Ebeit SDDP aigangakin isomeroi

Na Ewadikan Etop

ERIONGETIAN, Soroti District Dev't Programme (SDDP), nes ebeit aigang isomeroi lupe eyatakina enaaba koc ko Soroti, Principal Education Officer Soroti, Michael Etoyu neset ipmikini Etop ngun araasi 15/7/98.

Ebuni SDDP alomun esimit, absatie, abasi kedi mumaite. Emanimani Etoyu isomeroi la ajenua arsi adauto kesi aajenun iburo lu alienokitaikesi atukun.

Immlariton iburo lu, ngin isomeroi, amatapalmona icwe, 20,000, aloriri 20 nu aungo, 20 nu amoru kedi amoru mu'icik da aloriri 20. AuparaDEOkede Ejek H.B.Ocat lo erai apolon eicolong Soroti District Education Committee. Kolbaka Kalaki, immlariton isomeroi lu, Oyalon P/S, Abola P/S, kobako Kaberamalato, immlariton isomeroi lu, Opui P/S, Kanyalam P/S kede Kaburapoli Itigngangaio ngesi ebe, ngear aswam kosponekoezakonitoresomero ngol iburo lu ekotoi.

## Mam angor nu emisiikit epelu kec, ebala MP Ego

Na Peterson Alilio

ABWOKINITON ebaku Kalaki kairabet nak' apolon, Ejek Charles Engwan Egon, ngesi stijena ebe engarianee ayatokanger nako Kalaki titai namam, kojonete nu ebeitken aswam ka atupit.

Enerasi MP Ego na Etop Peterson koreke Adiye Kalaki me.

Abala Ego n ebe mam angor apeta kopedini acamunar ke, ngesikwape eumunituttekesi asiyekikin apuaran na angor. Etolomunti pac'Etop'iyemuto

lu angorianata angor noko Kalaki ebe agir Egoa aitodolikin aisumunet ke na asiyekikin apuaran na.

Eyatakit ngesi ebe mam ber angor duko kausulo loka ebaka iboikinio aitetem nu ebei aswam komona apuaran koc naka angor neda esiekkitai ingaren. Enumununis kuti jo apuaran na angor kakwap kere 8.3.1998, konyetuni lido, mam Kalaki inumununis.

Abala ngesi abu kalonokite etolonetem loka AnyaraEjek Nico Akwang, aitemokin

Eminista loka State kanu akiro nukotoma, Col William Omaria ijaikini aberu adiopet na atukot naka angor nako Kicinjaji, Soroti abaluan nu angetakiniata ameeban nu atukot ke ekoosi lo akoru lo etolosi atukot naka Soroti District Farmers' Association (Koany kwap ne). Aputo na inomit Jonathan Maraka

## Esilairai e Tender Board loko Pallisa

Na Michael Oogwara

IMEMBAN loka Pallisa distrikt 'Tender Board' lu pac asetuni ekamulo loka LC 5 kesi eraasi 31/7/98 aponi kisilairai. Atubon Grade I lo Pallisa, Peter Paul Okeflo, ngesi etolosi asuban na kotaun loko Pallisa. Abu Okeflo kolenok imteban lu araul lo emunookoko kolelelakinitosaswam koc na aitopol edititrikti.

Apolon eicolong LC 5 Pallisa, Dr. Laban Kirya Nnini, ngesi da akaul na assiliar imteban lu, abu korasak est orak inkei caisas akiro na reamusana kede ebe mam airyogok inadiak anaretanu ipaup kes laaba ekominionikrogwace angici aitolitolio na apiai ko Pallisa ka Tororo, kitopikabesi aidotor cut.

"Kolemasi cut etnono lo amidon, kiingicu isio awenikin yes kere imugug," abala Kirya.

Enera da ngesi ebe iswamosio kwa kalu kesi ebe ejesutu adoketait na apolo ko distrikt naarai nupio tenderers lu ejarere kede ecamusana

(corruption).

Eyatakit da Kirya ebe elouete kesi (kede eke kansulu) aidotokit akonye aite epune lu holosiorot imteban lu epelu kec.

Egolokini asuban nu nesi abunio atupiton RDC Pallisa, Michael Iwalatum, kicoria imteban awenit itawon kopelu naarsi ebe ejaas Aesu lu ipidijodounetekesi kede ikapun do konya agese asene' ekwani' edititrikti.

Abu da ngesi kicarak imteban lu amisiikti Aicola (guide lines) loka tender board.

Apolon eicolong loka ebood kalo, Proffesor Philip Wafufya, nges abu kisum aitodolikin aswam nu abei kaitodoun aijulakinet kane ejai ebood kemojong.

Abu da ngesi kilip ikansilan, RDC ka CAO aigangit ngesi kopelu ke.

Luce imteban lu apuoni kisilairai kesi Kidima John, Martha Okitor, Peter Okurut, Dick Oompi, Fred Padere kede Samuel Munghono.

KITELEKA 10,000!— Agran mabitti agol, ebani Etop akor akui itikan yen in adikai ekolowa lo epok kakere, lo enyarao 'EBALUWA LO ESABIITI KAGO: 10,000!— Aya cego ijo da koorai ebaluwa lo iwomisiono, kolaki, kosarte Aiewa lo mam emorionero, teatawan lu idokokitai akan boa itidomunio.

## Ecor Omaria akori

Na Jonathan Maraka

EMINISTA loka State kana akiro nukotoma Col. William Omaria ngesi ecor akoruk loko Teso aijulakin ageun aitolot akoru na epol ameda ido korai na egwelenarere isakankanu ayasiaabur. Elipit da Omaria akoruk ailakilak akoru nakolo na etolomununere ikorion kanu airyam bun.

Enera eminista araasi 31/7/98 kasuban nu etolomunere akoruk 2,275 ha, eswamuton ekoosi lo akoru lo apaarasia 11 kojena kwape Yellow Farm Management Course. Aijakian asuban nu alaro napolon na abolianio kotaun lo Soroti.

Abu Omaria kitijena ebe konabutin iyarei la aponitos koingaren abuni acusma na idanyasi ka Moru Opiyai kotaun Soroti ageun aipac ka airie ekirididi ido abuni atosum 2 1bn/-kangol karu agwelia ekirididi kane ejaasi akoruk.

"Konye do isirigin ngul alusit ngul alusit Lira, Iganga, Busia ka aiboisio acie, mere ne (Teso) naara ni ekiriddikam," ebala Abu ngesi kilip akukurikindo akoruk.

Abu Omaria kitijena ebe kenaibutin iyarei la aponitos koingaren abuni acusma na idanyasi ka Moru Opiyai kotaun Soroti ageun aipac ka airie ekirididi ido abuni atosum 2 1bn/-kangol karu agwelia ekirididi kane ejaasi akoruk.

## alos ayala

Na Martha APLIO

INRIKAALI loka apogan Democretis Republica of Congo (DRC) kesi abeliano akori aiteri apogan naka President Kabila, konye ebala Kabilache eksi ngesi atwasama jore atiji eberyak ngun luzjami Kide.

Abu da Kabila kimik itunga abeiti kwarc kore lo apolon, Kimilache akacitosa adwonor emuudu.

"Aswam kosi erai aidar itunga ido kilosi isio atosum ajore. Ajori sung ebe itemokinos akro," abala eminista lo Ikulla, Mwenze Kungolo, akaulo na airiamun naka iministan.

Engarakintok Kabila kesi aftekasi ebe arai Testi Banyamalenge ka isirikide loko Kide ingarakina ka Kwanda kesi elongilongete Itainin loko Kide, Goma, Bukavu, ka Kindu.

Ayatok ayuara kari kangin

# Eriamunos Iteso 200 Kampala

## Adomasi ajiok luka ADF otaun lo Kasese

**Na Sin Upolin**

ARENYAK luka Afflord (fromwater: Eroot) ADF) lu paten atiip apugan ko Too aide Uganda, ko Nadianyet ni atutur, apotte konarokini etaan falo Kasese kuware konolru aiyar itunga 16 lu amurariito mirikalat (yare) luka UPDF ka ipolisini terei.

Lo epolokinti akiro na atutumoo mirikaolei, Lt Col. Lyangembe eges abala ebe abenyak lu adulete 100 kes apotte kotamata abilar oolaro lu ibiyonomoto mirikale lo apotok, konye ebe apuni kurakere.

"Arasti lu abenyak lu agituna kagarepe kei lokwanasarakonorekomoru luka Rwenzori katsete apotelo lo kwanas esimwana UPDF, kangina" abala Nyangembe.

Abala ngini ebe araiiegurupu

ngol lo akoto aitapane UPDF aeroan komoru teko Rwenzori

Apota abenyak lu konorokini etaan foko Kasese kitusominete irutisi isasi ide kinekstos ediro lo iboyoto lu apotok.

Apotokiniton na aingie ke politi Katene, Moses Otwili nger abu kojen ipolisini lu aaritsi kwapu Nu, 31146 Wazwa ke 25934 Namourte, Isirikashi luka UPDF lu aponi kourai kes aponi kojenai kwape Sgt. Kauma ka Pte. Okaka.

Apota abenyak lu kirwelkiri amotokan 25 ka ibisijin tareti, Kagkenera ka Monolight.

Itunga luka Kasese kes abukani ebe akapitou abenyak lu imuedeen, ido kodakiton ajerekanin akary na abinyet kana airweia itogui ka amotokan.

# Akomasi ajiok luka ADF otaun lo Kasese

**Na Sin Upolin**

ARENYAK luka Afflord (fromwater: Eroot) ADF) lu paten atiip apugan ko Too aide Uganda, ko Nadianyet ni atutur, apotte konarokini etaan falo Kasese kuware konolru aiyar itunga 16 lu amurariito mirikalat (yare) luka UPDF ka ipolisini terei.

Lo epolokinti akiro na atutumoo mirikaolei, Lt Col. Lyangembe eges abala ebe abenyak lu adulete 100 kes apotte kotamata abilar oolaro lu ibiyonomoto mirikale lo apotok, konye ebe apuni kurakere.

"Arasti lu abenyak lu agituna kagarepe kei lokwanasarakonorekomoru luka Rwenzori katsete apotelo lo kwanas esimwana UPDF, kangina" abala Nyangembe.

Abala ngini ebe araiiegurupu

ngol lo akoto aitapane UPDF aeroan komoru teko Rwenzori

Apota abenyak lu konorokini etaan foko Kasese kitusominete irutisi isasi ide kinekstos ediro lo iboyoto lu apotok.

Apotokiniton na aingie ke politi Katene, Moses Otwili nger abu kojen ipolisini lu aaritsi kwapu Nu, 31146 Wazwa ke 25934 Namourte, Isirikashi luka UPDF lu aponi kourai kes aponi kojenai kwape Sgt. Kauma ka Pte. Okaka.

Apota abenyak lu kirwelkiri amotokan 25 ka ibisijin tareti, Kagkenera ka Monolight.

Itunga luka Kasese kes abukani ebe akapitou abenyak lu imuedeen, ido kodakiton ajerekanin akary na abinyet kana airweia itogui ka amotokan.

Apoton eicolong luka ekomiti luka aisisia kokansulo luka LCS Soroti, Horace Byatt Ocaet ilotari akanin kailoero adiopet ke Mukono distrikt ne epejokitos
ngesi kede apotokitok iriongeta lu apugan ko Soroti distrikt.

# Ekot ajore ademar Kabila apugan

## Akomaisi Akello

ISIRKAALI luka apugan (tamantate: Republic of Congo) ERC) kesi abelarus akote atirur apugan naka President Kabila, kimye phala Kabila ebe etuongos adwasam ajore atiji abenyak ugan Sanjaani Kide.

Abe da Kabila kimek itunga alout kware kore lo apolon, Koshasha akashima adwennu amudo.

"Aswankosi erai aidar itunga ide kibisi isin aihmom ajore. Ayeri sung ebe itemokinos akro," abalemintata lo ikisila, Mwente Kangoilo, akaulo na airamun naka iministan.

Osgankisitok Kabila kesi abakasi ebe arai Tusti Banyamulenge ka mirikalot luka Kide ingarakina ka Ewanda kesi elongilongete itumis luka Kide, Goma, Indana, ka Kmila.

Ayaitok ayuara kari kangin

kesi atemasi ebe eminista lo akironukokinga, Bizana Karafu ka eminista lookamunimakiro luka e president, Desgratos Bogera ido korai Tustuis kesi akerata kinga naka DRC.

Koyemuzo lu alumunitos koredio kalo Goma enyaritai 'Voice of the People' lu apugi ko Rwanda nesi abalatai mirkalei luko 10th Battalion ebe

autasi kesi aitiji Kabila

"Isso isirikaalte luka ajore naka DRC kesi kinutabalemar President Laurent Desire Kabila koicolong," abala Sylvain Mbucy lo erai ekamanda lo ebatulion kalo.

Kosodi ekamanda ecie, Bilonga Kabanda ngesi abu kilip itunga luko Congo ko Voice of the People lo epii Bukavu acamun aitiji Kabila kanu eipugar lo arenun komoriaritajaanak inaswansiso ne ejassi ipajan ke bon ka eiswamae lo aidadat iboro.

Apugan nesi emik itunga alout kware ko Kinshasha agron isawan itonomarei lu itong tuni itomonaarei lu aiwalar Erai Kinshashaetaun loejassi itunga irullonin ikany.

Atupiton eminista lo akiro nukotoma, Vanitin Munene ngesi abu kolimni koredio ebe elonio aimikit itunga alotok Kinshasha kuware adaan.

"Ejaikin epotolo kitoni ne ejaunor ayuara," abala Munene.

Eredisi leapolon ko DRC nesi abu kilip itunga luko Congo ka apotokitok ayuara aswani nepepe aerengiar abenyak lu ka egangitok kesi kosodi aikwenyar itunga aisal oreria kitani ne ejaikinor ayuara.

Apugan naka Rwanda na ileleba aneker naka Tusto nesi engarakon Kabila ajion apugan kolap loka May okaru 1997.

Apotu kimurikikinos kede airkerna Tutti Banyamulenge akaulo na etijenara lokawan Mobutu Sese Seko ebe elosi airengiar kesi ko Congo (Zaire apakio ngun).

Eminista loka Rwanda lo akiro nuka kinga ka aiswamanara nepepe ka nuce akwapin, Anatase Gasana ngesi abala ebe elomanat ebenjit ngol kotoma naka Congo ido emanete mirkalei luko Rwanda

ko Congo akaulo na erutaria Kabila kesi abongor Rwanda kosabiiti kalo atubor.

"Apotu isin kadautu aingarakisikabila kajiok loka Banyamulenge lu emorikikina ka ngesi ido arai ejassi adis kere nukec da ngun" abala Gasana.

Mwente ngesi abala ebe amamei ibore yenetacaunit ebe eguri apugan naka Rwanda. "Men ber isis idumunit aanyunet eb ejaasi luko Rwandadatoma konyei womiti isisebe ejakisakesida," abala Mweze.

Lu etete kotaunin luko Rwanda luka Cyangugu kede Goma kesi abalasi eisawe lo idegin ka eredio loko Goma

Ngan lu ajaani Kinshasha kesi abakasi ebe esenyunitim kesi atesin eidunyi ka ere lo isirikaalei lu Tshatshi ne ajaikina ejie lo apol noi.

# Epojokisi ayaitok Soroti Mukono

## Akomaisi Akello

NA Moses Okalebo

APOLOKITOKiriongetalu apugan ko Soroti distrikt kes araasi 23/7/98 apotu kipejokisi Mukono distrikt kana asiace somisio kede ipaupa keclakangina.

Ejena roi Mukono distrikt kotoma oiswamae loka decentrilisation.

Atupiton CAO, Raphael Okoropot, loda engarenikit etiima lo ngesi abala ebe ajokuna agojo na noi naarai abu kijalk eswamak anisiau nu ipu kaiboisio acie.

Erionget loka Redd Barna,

Soroti nepepe ka edistrikt kesi alemunitos apiyai nu etolosereapejona.

Apotu da kesi kipejokisi akortok ka prejokti te akipi. Kowai lo aisissa apotu kesi kipejokisi esomero lo Kisowera P/S lopac epejokit President Bill Clinton lo

America da, neda aponiata apoloniocolong lo ekominitilo anisiako LC 5 Soroti, Horace Byatt Ocaet ka apolokiton erionget lo aisissa, Michael Etoyu Oumo, kisisiaunata akiro nuka aisissa nu ipu nu ejokuka.

# President Kabila lo ekot

# ajore ademar apugan

America da, neda aponiata apoloniocolong lo ekominitilo anisiako LC 5 Soroti, Horace Byatt Ocaet ka apolokiton erionget lo aisissa, Michael Etoyu Oumo, kisisiaunata akiro nuka aisissa nu ipu nu ejokuka.

4 ETOP Naïwongonet, Olikvik (kapsu) 6.12.1998

# ETOP

PLOT 37 ASCHOOL ROAD
P.O. BOX 819, TEL: 61857, SOROTI

## Kotacata esisiak iboro lu amunasi kesi ko TCA

AGOLOKISI engarenok luko Soroti distrikt esomero lo Teso College, Abet, aduan esabiit ediopetakaukana aponiata esisiak komumusyotor abwangabwang ireria esisianakinak kec ka aipe akokorei nu olaamu lo esomero.

Apoto da esisiak kikatata amisirin nu ekirididi, einyanya, ikabejin kede aium akinei nu esomero.

Esisiak luko S.3 ka S.4 kes ebakai ebe engarenikitos elepa ngol.

Abakasi ikesa kwi ebe angurianete kesi mama ejai ekomiiti lo eyait iponesio ka uiticaneta lo ebe aroikit esisiak noi.

Angurianete bobo kesi ebe naarai erono ejautene lo aeolooninkoc kosodi bobo ebe atapitaipoonokin kesi emarouge lo ipirit. Acelasi da ebe edolit kesi anyamenen akiring kede emuceeri irwan aarei kangol esabiiti itia irwan atipet, kwa ejaar.

Akiro nu emaritosesisiak ngul kas etapit ayuunun amama kosomeroi icie da lukadoketait kangin. Ediakaritos esisiak lu noi, izwamatos da iboro icie lu mam epatauar aitim kes cut.

Idiopet koboro kangul nes aibunga akinei kede esisiak luko S.1 ka S.2 lu mam eswamaikitos kes adio aronis da! Anyoin aronis na eswamaikitos kes akinei ngun tipi kes elomakinete aium akinei?

Apoto bobo esisiak ngul kosipokisi erodiblock orot lo Soroti- Katakwi kosodete aitapakin emotoka enaaba UV 1291 kosodete aibunga ederepa ka etnan ecie lo aupatotor kitoni ademar ederepa akokor ke da. Anyoin aronis na eswamaikit ederepa ngol esisiak luko Teso College?

Nu kere itodunitos ebe egitara akiro nu alosikitos esisiak lu. Mam arai angurian especepe da!

Arai akirot elepa bon.

Arai korai akirot inyamat ka aroikino, kanu inyo mam esisiak luko S.5 ka S.6 da alomaritotor akiro ngun? Naarai emorete kesikere inyamat lukediop eipone! Kosodi arai da erai S3 ka S4 bon icikakitos atiokisio na, mam adolit kesi amunur abwangabwang iboro kede aium itunga koipone kangol.

Ekotesisiak ajenun ebe mam amumu itemonokini atiokisio kwa kanu. Erai ti ainerun edolit.

Arereng na ejok nes ipolisin luk! Amukaro arurukun esomero ainyakun eyuera. Itodunit do na ebe ekot ngol esomero lo epol komoikinai e police post lo idunyatatar, tetere idarete ayuwara na esomerokotomaapakiokere; mere ne elomunia elepa kwa kalo bon.

Mam da edolit aisunyakin alacakin esisiak, kacut ngul lo epolok adepar ikaru 18, lu iswamatos nu elepa, kwape nat aibunga itunga lu itoritos orot ka aium akinei nu emamei aronis.

Arai kebongataesisiak ngul osomero ekot ayaitok esomero atubokin esisiak luko S.3 ka S.4 bon aigel iboro lu amunamunatakesi. Emameia jokin aitatac esisiak luko S.1, S.2, S.5 ka S.6 lu amameete kakiro kangun iboro lu amunamunata lu elepa.

## OPALAKIRO

# Arai Opeede ekajio kanuka aipuc ko TCA

## Apedori adolokin Museveni edio sawa ko

Na Jonathan Maraka

IKATUNGA edilo du atwanare. Moi moi atwana mutan linko ipupok isawanare kayen kopupuni bobo ebe "mutan da erikakin, bere de ideyo lolo, nace da idarnai do esawa bon." Eb!

Namabii, arsasi 2/8/98, aroko eong edarit akosaukute akuilo na sipup na atwakisia nukotauo lo Soroti nu adeparitos akarykape etuputapasi kinomani lo apolon ka esima ureka aisirangun bobo eong ebe akoto ngesi eong alosit Kumi aiwadika akiro nuka aiduyo kaloutwan Leonard Opeede.

Mam ber eong apupomi ebe atwanit Opeede naarai apoto atwakisia nuko Soroti ketslesi eong cut.

Karaida arai Opeede agwelanaran lo ajena noi ko Teso, nukaumokin, ageuro eong aanyun ngesi kadap February 1996 ido ngipongin da na zwasa eong aanyun ngesi ejari.

Apakegin api ngesida atisma lo itunga lu enyamitos President Museveni learmore ibukui luko Teso kanu asisianakinitunga aniji diakor (okaleedekuarat 'angaskipi').

Abo eong kapinik ebe kwape etuan lo alimoro ebe akoto aibwo kasen na arsun MP lukobaku Kumi aida Opeede daaikamun arereng napakede Museveni kanu aitodiar utunga.

Konye kapak na edaere Opeede koreke lo ejai orony Olongia, eiduny ka etuan lo Kumi, nes do ajenuria eong kodocoebeman apacike toma otismu lo enyamit Museveni arai aikamun arereng bon aitodiarot utunga.

Abu atupiton BDC Kumi, Lt. Robert Nambafu, kitijenik ebworok ilukamanika ilukumbe ebe arai Opeede etuan loda apedori alomar oes k'epuresident ka ainetakjn kede ngesi edo esawa kere lo ekotor ngesi naanai ebe arai etuan lo abu apugan komusukinsui.

"Amakina ngesi kanu akwap wok. Ngesi ediopet kotunga

Lokatwan Leonard Opeede: Agwelanaran lo ajena noi.

kalo apoto koanyutuaicasaka apugan na NRM," abala Nambafu ko aru ebworon lokangusibib, loda abwoikit apugan.

Abala Nambafu ebe ainakitai Opeede arereng na adolokin President Museveni esawa edio kere naarai ebe ainakina aijaanakinakwap kanu atiakun itunga luko Teso kocan lu apasui.

"Kano jai isio kotoma apugan kitwakia isio etuan. Mam aticepak yes lu ipu ipoote ajoku lem ke kama kosi kalo engarenikit apugan. Abu lokatwankocedanakineneinio akiro nu aomisio nu

Eisimit ngesi Kumi Boys P/ S agran okaru 1955 toni 1962 eroko kelimara Holy Angels College, Madera, Soroti aisism Junior agran okaru 1963-1964. Abu ngesi kotoma Bishop Kitching College, Ngoraaitutuerkwape esisianakinan agran okaru 1965 toni 1968 ne alomunia ngesi kwape esisianakinan loka Grade II.

Akaulo na alomun ko BKC abu Opeede kisisianak Atuitui P/S Ongbito agran 1969 toni 1971 eroko kijulara asisianakin Magoro P/S Usuk kokaru 1972. Kokaru 1973 abu kisisianak BKC Dem P/

## Arai lem ngesi ebikakit Olungia da amaapu

enyakakinete aipuc na kwana epu Kumi," abala Nambafu.

Apolon eicelong LC 5 Kumi, Hajji Umar Okodel, ngesi eturit Opeede kwape etuan lo ekila atau aitoput edistrikt neda akotot alomar uirabri napolon abwoikin Kumi. Abala Okodel kotoma aitone ke na eukakit ngesi apolokiton LC 3 Kumi atuan, Francis Okia, aitodolikin ebworok, ebe arai Opeede epirinit lo ajenipolitika noi loda atapit ngesi (Okodel) adolonokin kanu adumun sicoritta kotoma aisto na LC 5 napac aduan.

Aurio Opeede okaru 1947 k'Olungia kosodete aibalis ko Kumi Catholic Mission okaru ngopengul kotoko erai imukeru. Papakengesi apolon Simon Ekwaru lo eroko ejari. Kosodi tutoke ngesi natwan Melda Ajonga.

S, Ngora kede Kumi P/S kosodi agalakin aswam naka asisianakin okaru 1974 kanu alomar agwelanar.

Agwelanari ngesi esimit, esigala, iguen luka Nytil, ajon nu acupai, akinyet na amotokan ka na inoka.

Abwoikiton ateker na Ikomolo- Ilungia na elomunitor Opeode, apolon kirisma Emuk, ngesi abala ebe emoturitos da aswamasinei kaloutwan aipit ka atubuluti iburen, akoru, aipopounun ipitesio luka Iteso kwape nat ajoni ka akisigui kede politiks neda abu korauner ekansila kokansulo lo distrikt.

Abala Emuk ebe arai Opeede etuan lo akukurana, aminaaila, acube ido kinerana. Akoponokin anyunyura arai kitakadikin konye kikuari atipet. Ejaanakini Opeede

okanykape, ageun na
ajokorene abenyak. Apakio
lem kangun, atioko akiro
kangul aari kere.
Karakda ejaasi idee ngul lu
aurin kotoma apakio
kangun, acamunit cutinong
ebe mam kes ejaasi kede
epud lo akote ajenun akiro
kangun.

nukamunitos ejie lo etoiosi
angarenon lo akwap wok

cut nges abu korasak
acamakin akiro

IPA-Apolon itunga luk
Soroti adalac einer, kwape
nat J.B.Okitang (Etop Julai
2), kobalua ke lo abala ebe

Engulu, aida Odetta ti

# Emusu, kitacaikinai sio epone lo igurioto Omaria, Ilukor Soroti

IPA-Kotoma Etop lo
apaarasia 16/7/98 abu
ekansila
tokotem
Kaberemaido, Joseph
Emusu kobalu ebe igurete
Omaru, Mukula ka Bishop
Ilukor Soroti.

Ilipit isio angor nuko Teete
Women's Task Force
nukotaun lo Soroti Emusu
aitacaikin isio, epone lo
igurito kesi Soroti.

Emusu, erai bo mam ijo
ijeni ebe aomisio nu inerasi
itunga ngul luni eraasi nu
ilopoloeitakwap? Einer kec
duc erai lo eitena, komam
erai esiomit.

Arai mam ijo ijen kobu ne
ejaasi angor nuka Teete
Task Force kisisianakin
einer eitena.

Konye ikoto ber isio
atijenikinijo kane ebe itunga
ngul iuni kesi engarenok
lukabet. Kitodikinete erot
lo abeit komam angopikit.
Kanuka ajokis naka itunga
kere kilimuni ber
aswamusineikecadis kane.
AswamusineiOmaru nuta
aiduk ecusma lo ecuare
emwebe kanu itunga luko
Soroti, ainaki itunga
aswamusinei, ayau ayuara
kidingIkaramojake de Iteso,
euta agwela Soroti Meat
Parkers ka SAIMMCO
tepeje ka icle Iteso, ayau
efaamu Temele kosodi abu
kocam abongunikanu aimor
ican kade oni.
Aswamusinei nuka Ilukor
kesi nuta; abu koyau aipuc

Teso kere, abu isup
lukojokotau, ingang Teso
koporeteso kalu egidegeta,
kosodi euta kwana aiduk
eyumibasite Teso.

Kosodi nuka Mukula kesi
nuta; etemonoki irotin
lukotaun lo Soroti ayau
agwelanarak luka akwapin
lukwana edukete icuumam
luka epaaba neda
edumunatar iduwe wok lu
ipu aswamusinei, agwel
eoter (Soroti Hotel) lo kwana
ainaki itunga aswamusinei.
Apaarasia nu ekolera abu
koinaki tunga akipinukatitai
ido erai etunganan lo itunga;
elosete itunga airiamun ka
ngesi edio sawa kere
komam akuriana.

# Edolit do kitutuboi esolo lo ewaragi

IPA-Duc ne asiomeriana
eong Etop kangin lomunet.
Idila ener akiro nu
ikamunitos emeret kama
eja Iteso lupe ipu noi. Ebeit,
emeret lo kwana idila no ko
Teso kaitokwarit ngesi lo
ewaragi. Kangin kabiti
alomunemie atioksoi nu
kwana etolomu ewaragi.
Etop lo (Omaruk 20-26) abu
ejakait kwapi Aruo, kimaru
iponesiolu tidisiareteemeret
lo ewaragi. Abeit erassi
ngun aicoreta nu ejokak.
Konye awomite ka, edolit ti
apugan nako okau ageun
atubuti esolo lo ewaragi, ido
da erai lo okuju noi. Ebeit
ewaragi kaitokwarit lo
elomunere ko Kakira, arai
Lira opol esolo kec noi,
komamalyalongong, naarai
elomiti esolongol acamanan
kede ekisi lo agwelanar, lo
ecamakit esolo lo kuju
aitutubio boro inyaman, arai
bonat lumatan, lu epedorete,
anyagaun, ariebasinei
angaleu naka itunganan.

Angura Lazarus
Jinja

# ANGALEU

## Einer eitena eyuwari atumunak

Na Fidel Omonyokot

IPU atiokisin nu kwana atereikina kede atumunak lo apasrasia karo. Konya atioepat atiokisisnu erucokina kede karlo, ka atumun, kes nu epolok noi nu icanete atumunak lo akwana.

Ipu adekasinei nu iioritos tema aelo, kacat konye na aromonkakere, namam imukia, AIDS, arai eseny.

Etapii da kwana atumunak alotremontor, asu "aicunar" aelo enska edisiak, ibore da yen ulita alitokomukin kesi atiokisin nu eposik, kacat apotiumon, arai apotioikin apesur ensko edisiak.

Kanu aitam aicor atumunak (kitunga lupo apolok da), abu atukot na enyaritai STRAIGHT TALK FOUNDATION kupelee alitokomuiton aicoreta nu ikamunitos atiokisis ngun, kotoma apapula na iwadikatai 4 Amusugun, kojena kwape STRAIGHTTALK.

Kanu adolokin atumunak ngul lu mam ejenete aisiom Amusugun jokan, abu atukot ngin kogea ajulanak in aicoreta ngun toma angajepa acie nuko Uganda, aimor iarit Aiteso da.

Koleje arasoi 25/7/98 nes abunio atukot ngin kriegera apapula ngin na enyaritai EINER EITENA ko Kumi district. Apotu atukot ngin kimorikikinos kede iriongeta luka CARE ka Red Berout.

Atumunak luko Kumi District Health Project, idyaete korotin lukotaun lo Kumi kanu aitubankin, etegarere apapula naka EINER EITENA, arasoi 25/7/98. Aputo na inomst Jonathan Hara

kere lu iowanarte ko Kumi district.

Kotoma asuban ngun, nuda ajaikina ipejok lu epu, kimoriaritos MP lo ebwokit atumunak luko Kids nako Uganda kotoma Airabet na apolon, esapat G. Ekanya, ka apolon eicolong LC 5 Kumi, Haji/Umar Okodelkede ekale ko, aponi kicorai atumunak kede ikouisinei, aboliasio ka osresinei lu agelegela.

Aramak lu usomero lo imudukiok, Madera, kes

agorete aisimwanin etaun kede atenuto ke, kirimokitos etsunkotoma umotukaniyarei. Atupitos idowe lu isomeroi lu egelegela ka atukono da acie nu angor kanu atumunak kesi.

Ajaasi iriongeta lu agelegela lu aponitos aitodisanar iboro ke, kwape nat amepiiran nu aelo (condoms) iitabon lu Aiteso, icie lu icorete nu aelo.

Aponi kitodianarai aboliasio nu ecorete atumunak atiokisis nu alintganakin aelo, nu alinganakin adukono, nu

auriak slaiiaieor idoweke, ka acie da.

Ajaasi da ikouisinei lu agelegela lu ecorete atumunak ka auriak kakirosinei nu aelo, eseny ka atunun.

Aramak Johnson Otinga (Bukulau Jazz Band), Atuude ka Lazaro Okwakol kes esialaete itunga, kosodete isomero luka Ngora Girls, Ngora High School, Ngora Boys, Oseera P/S Adeso P/S ka icie da, aisisianakini atukot kotomaokoisineika aboliasio

nu agelegela.

Aponi kicorai kacat auriak ebe idowewekehena, kilata, keulakotena, ideponokinite, aitoromete anamotoka.

Abakai ebe, idowe, einer eitena, ita awook ketwakita.

Aponi da kicorai na, einer eitena mona idowe adolyo, konya iponesuo lu kowna nu itoromete aiso

# Ekone lo itikokinet ekolera

Tetere aiku ekolera, adeka na ailep na ededeng kakere, iburai aidar aila ejok noi. Imorite na aidar icoloonin kolaete, ailosenen akanin akaulo na aitosom ecolooni ka airapit inyama

ABWANGUN adeka na ekolera kaiboiso nu ipu ko Uganda ka akwapin acie nuko East Africa kosaibitin idis lu atuboma ido aar itunga lu ipu. Konye erai ekolera adeka na kipedori oni adikokin arai edup oni ikisia lu aidar aila.

## Inyobo ekolera?

Ekolera nes adeka na etiono noi na eyangauni alepor. Einakin ekolera itunganan ailep akipi ka ailek noi. Egear ngesi kalipet tai.

Edauni do ekolera akipi kakuwan kitunganan kalipet, kodisiari tunganan agogong, kotwani da, aciepak akaulo na isawan uni arai, wongon bon, arai mam yen adekan edumunit amukian na abeit kalipet.

## Inyobo eyauni ekolera?

Ikur lu ejaasi akoik itunganan kayen edeka ekolera kes eyaunete ekolera ikamunete do icle itunga da adeka na arai kemataba akipi da adeka na arai kemataba akipi nu ejaasi ekurut lo (kotoma obar ka alekan).

Ekora da ekolera arai kitungtingata itunga ebar

ka alekan nu ituan kayen edeka ekolera, do konye bobo aitingting inyamat, akipi arai asepulian ka asaanin komam ilositos akanin.

Ne etapit adumanakin ekolera nes agaria nu ajonok, arai nu mam ipoltai ejok, ka inyamat icle lu angololin, araito ka idisasio lu ejokitos, ka inyamat icle lu adoo ekolera toma nape

ipoyo.

Aimat akipi nu adaun ekolera adore toma, nes ecle epone lo ekorar adeka na.

Anyouni atiaketait kalepor na duc.

Ekora ekolera atipet ido esurwonokin itunga lu ipu kaimoriarit. Kipedori oni aisibwoun aisiarakin na ekolera koponesio kaluta:

Arai elepi ituan akipi duc

ducido kolekida, korurukaan nges adekis kalipet.

- Kipurak ekia lo eyari ikur obar ka alekan kayen kadekan, ka oboro kere lu itosoma ngesi. Kowany da ebe itunga kere itosomaete acolooni ido idarete kes kolaete.
- Kinyalak ekia lo eari ikur toma akipi nu ilosere icoloonin.
- Iburai itunga ailot akanin

kec kede esabuuni akaulo na aitosom ecolooni.

- Kidor akipi kere nu matan kanuiloset asaanin, nu ipoet inyamat.
- Kisukunya icuc konyamat ka icoloonin.

## Iwanyuneta

Ekwangakwangat ebar, balia akipi nu ipoltere emuzaseri. Ibarieyen adekan inwanipu. Eleki da ngesi noi ido ekwanguuni ngesi,

kobenear akwa atipet. Isuburkit ne eyenganeda

Nu edoit aswa

Kiddisia adun na kopone kato atiana adekan akipi ka mu ice lu ipu (mere e) Adaun na akip au kitunganan nes li eyareneneitunga kato aciepak kotoma apana, izuto arai aongor tor, a mam isunyakita imuk korurukaara yen eten adekis katipet.

Arai ketwana itungin iburai ebworok stu nuta:

(1) Ainuk ates katipat la aidaritor lu eIwaka
(2) Mam atuko no te ejai ates.
(3) Mam ailot ka alitsin ates
(4) Kidor anyamanya na kalbworo
(5) Kimikata itunga edarele etemonokinete atwana, aipotre ana inyamat.
(6) Koany ebe itonekotian akanin ejok noi ien esabunyu eroko ketina inyamat.

# AKIRU NU ANGORI

## Aseun Aporu, Asekenye apolokin ekaasulo loka Girl Guides lo Kumi

Na Job Opolot

MP naberu Kumi dísríkš Christian Aporu, ka siyakía na angor kotoma okamolo lu apolon lo angor Joyce Asekenye Mafabi, kesi aporu koseunui komam sitepeg kwape apolokisolok ekaasulo loka Girl guides, ka ekomidi lo eyát noka Girl guides lo Kumi dísríkš katuputupa.

Aseo na, nsu aporu kitolmi kapak na etutuoiere ansinakinak nungor ko Si Mary's PTC Bukedea araasi

## Ebaajikin nuka Mothers' Union akituk

Na Gilbert Engimu

ANGOR nuka Mothers Union nakotem Kapir, Ngora kes ebaajikietonget loka Christian Aida akituk akany, alimu eswaman orionget lo kwape Field Co-ordinator, Ejkt. James Ongelo araasi 24/7/98 ne erimoritor ngesi amukian iharen lu.

Abala Ongelo eba ibaajikitai nu assto iheren lu ido kesi aitae akaulo na ikaru iyarei. Konye ebe esalakini agangat na irimi kotem kalopelo kamu angor da acie adumun. Abala bobo ngesi ebe ekitokinos kesi atacsoarnedanakainorgim 10 kangol 100 kujenaka apiyai nu ibaajaritai.

Itemwan iwongon luko Ngora kere: Mukura Kapir, Kobain ka Ngora ebe adumutsakituk 20, koraingol etem akany. Epote ebe bobo kesi aibaajanikisi imelakes lu imongin ka kalu akanin abala Ongelo.

Konodi kakiro acie kotem Kapir, apolonetem Kapir, Michael Opolot nges elip

3, 8, 98, ido korai GISO lo Bukedea, Mohamed Oluka ngesi apolokinit.

Apisni da koseunui Christian Ibore Okurai atupit Aporu, Akwi. Oknak angingnan ka Hellen Akello Okumu kwape aengadan apiyai.

Lucie kesi Margaret Avelor, Lucy Osmo, Rose Ocom, Florence Malinga, Albina Oplo, HajjatRukia Anyagoka Irene Oluka.

Icie kesi Ikwny Omaewa, Imelda Aeko, Pelua Omongolo, Betty Ogwang, Julius Okinre, Charles Okubal ka Marion Okubal.

Kokomidi lo apolon loka Girl guides, nes apori koseunere Betty Akello kwape angingnan Hellen Akello, Dan Oluput, Alice Amalon, Angela Akabwai ke Lucy Osmo.

Ecamunete iyapeion ngun ahu Aporu ka Asekenye kisumatu aowam kagegong aanyun ebe ekum adoketait naka Girl guiding ko Kumi.

Christine Aporu

angor kotem ka spainakin dua zarianeta nu itolosio kintutubri tetere ebe mam kesi da igalioritai awai. Enera ngesi nu kotoma airiamun na ajai onomero lo Kolum PS, Kapir araasi 21/7/98 kami asekon ekomiti lo eyat nu aisisia kisumero (School Management Committee)

Abalanges iemukini auriak ebe edol raisingare nuaikao isia, kitosomante aerrenga nakariisia na titai ko poratmare (UPE). Ekwenyarit ngesi itunga aisac airirimate isipanin lu iharen, naarai epedoriu bobo amear.

Aesisianakinak nuko Kumi emorunete aomisio kanu aseun engarenok nuka ekaasulo loka Girl Guides lo Kumi ko Bukedea PTC. Aputo na inomit Keonoth Oluka

## Aijaanakin najokan: kobala ijoda 'karibu'

Na Christine B. Ina

EPATANA tu aliment akin kwa tai Aijaanakin itunga ejok. Konye kisenet epone ki itolosio tu itunga aowamnumi kto ka agwilanar kakwap kana, aitolokaart kobuok kane, iboonokur do ber aru itunga icie mam epapunitoter na aijaanakin itunga ejok.

Amamus naka eijaanakine lo ajokan, arai ejai ngol lo aromin, nes idiops ibore eyarit aitolosio ka aitopolo naka agwilanar wok. Akoto eong aiteboikte nu ne cut ejaasi angor kwape etamitore aimo iwaitin lu egologola, lukkunef kesi da. Agwilanar nesi ediopet koponesio kangol.

Etirvelun nu aowanssio kon kere, arai igwelanav ijo esode, ewaragi, iidaka yen didi arai aswam na edio epone kere na ebutor ijo aijaanakin lucie itunga. Kanu oryo, arai igwelanav ijo ajon, ebutor amatam ber akwa aduot epok komam ikopakitai esiolong kitamuro ber ijo agwilanaran ajon einer keda aidunyet ken kopauiti ke?

Kikepak bonat ngesi esiolong da kanu inyo ijaikina ngesi aitongung bobo aidarit akorokoro ke kicicinasi ijo kede okile scie lo etubitoi korot?

Kilersu ber ngun da aciepak nat ebuni amatam mam ijo abu kopudok alimun da ebe "eyalama aanyun" arai "karibu" arai bonat ayogan da. Du nepe edolum je konodi afewolwo erokot elopet kitamma apungure konemari ijo ebe "Jeyaboi?" arai "Biaibo?" Ipupi bodo ber ijo yen kipaario epone ngol biai? Nepeta airissio na ido idila nisi atakneumus.

Arai arai lo abunon agwela epejonon arai lo mam idila kaiboisit kon emina aigir do bobo abongun nekon cut. Kebungo etuan kwa kangol omatet kon arai epone adio agwelanaret kon kere mam elelakini abongun cut. Kaneka, esubi do bala idedengit ijo agwelanaran kolosikite bala airanget ngesi. Mam do agwelanar kon ebuni eiyata kwabo ti nesi iyata arai iyata ameda na elomuni arai ipu agwelak ibore yen igwelari ijo.

Nesi nat aprok emuconu, ekirididi, acok arai emuogo emorasi icie aitwellitor inyamat kto otunga tai, kacat elotok komotokan. Mere akakatoi aremit iboro kus bala ijosikitea adopedop akonye kalu ebeid agwela iboro kus. Epone ngol emona aitakadikite itunga icie kogirete agwela iboro kus.

Kituntins cabo ejaatime lo aila kus da. Arai irai ijo ituan yen inapit erono tai, kinyadakah bobo da ne itobisio ijo agwelanar kon iruta do ijo agwelak iboro kon.

Kipedorio aitutuonor yeni koponesio icie la aitolot agwelanar kus kwape nat singad ikapun, adap iitabon lu aowam ka eitulime lo igarapun konye ca asai enam yeni itupitu iboro lu esubio bala edisiak kwa kalu iminasi atwanar tai.

Siri ipetuntins nu iponesio kus. Ekot iponesio da kojokuka kakonye itunga kalu ijaanakini ijo. Epote aciepak icie agwelak da, eroko iponesio kto, agwaanite ijo konye kowen eiau kotam kijaanak ngul da ketau lo ejok.

## Okwe kisisiaunete yesi da iponesio lu ayogan kore

IPU itunga noi lu isaaitos aanyun ebe enapete kesi ejok, enyanete ejok, ido ejototekesiejok. Ngunkete iowamankopone kaliraiman ikapun arai boot alosit onomero. Konye ikidioko itunga lu epodokitos aanyun ebe ejaasi kesi iponesio lu isialamikitos lucie itunga.

Ipanoi isomeroi lu isisiaere koissisiu na egelegela, konyemam eong aanyunitor ber esomero lo epeletkisitai apukor kanu aisisianakin iponesio. Iponesio, ore nesi isisiaere.

Esisianakinak da isisianakinete ikulepek isabujektan ksc lu ebeit kesi aisisianakin, kwape nat

Amusugan, Aimar, inayonokonye nu iponesioebakasikwi "ikec iuriak da ikamuntos ngun". Aus arai kijaijalakinon iuriak aisisianakin idwe kce iponesio, idumuni ijo ebe eraun nu ibric noi.

Mam kere nu iponesio ikamuntos iduwe bon konye toni lapri apolok da. Kwape nat iponesio ngul lu ayogan itunga, idumuni ijo icie itunga mam cut iyogaste lucie. Ido ijo aciepak etacuusiorian ebe "eol. Ooi ibian kicefel?" Ito! korai iponesio emamnete.

Ejaasi bo icie, iyogaste kwi arai irai ijo ipejonon bon. Konye arai iboyeete ipu nepepe, mam bobo kwi iyogaste ijo. Konodi konye ayogarengin na atupuruc, mam

konye ngin ejensu bala erai ibore yen ibonakinit aowam cut, idumuni ijo itunganan edilokisi akwenyan idcailekor akru bala akino na ekeei omuogo.

Konodi bo arai ejai ne obisi itungananmam ber itunganan epodokini alimokin arai aikwenyare ber lukore da ebe "aso do ber yesi, alosi ber eong dane ikonine. Abonguni nat eong da aciepak isawan imwanine" tai. Erai itunganan

aswenyikin erot ajer! Mam do yeni lu isalitos ore ijenete ebe aiboclos ngesi ido inyobo elosi ngesi aowam ngina konodi iworibo ebonganso ngesi? Idodo eba icie itungananaingi ebe "aibo ejai matao?" dobodo lukot atemar bo ai? Asabun? Aaa!

Kosodete bo lu epaikinete ore da, arai mam yi ejesi atemar ebe "aso dober" aciepak mam bo ngul da ejenete atemar ebe "kodol ejok" Ne enyourio

itunganan erai lucie aimutat aimsitat. Mam ijo ijenisibeerai iponesi olu ajokak aimala erot naarai ipu akirosimi eminasi adumikin itunga kotoma orotin?

Noi ne nat ebongunio itunganan da, mam bobo etemario ebe "yoga ber abongun", arai ebe "yoganrai kon" ijo adolan ore kokwenyete itunga aikweny ban. Emamoi yenebabi "karibu da" itema ijo ebe "okwe! Itunga lu ore alo, emamei ayogan da?" Etemarete kwi ebe "aa! aicebokit do ayogan balaera ine oomo?" Ebakaido ebe imo bon icebokitos amalan.

Arai boot ibonguni ijo kane ifosit kede emugugat

igugunassi. Aibuisit na lukonbon asuriamar ijo, idanyanyaste kwi kohalasa kocopakitos akonye iutasi ijukedeemugugut. Ito! Arai iyaunit inyamat da bala ekoto etau acakar da.

Aso nesi abalar eong ebe kesisiata iponesio lu esaere ejisebmelokokaila. Iponesio ngul itodunete ebe irai ijo itunganan yen ejok aiboyu, irai ijo yen ipoloanti kokale kalo angosibib. Itunga da ijaklentetipangusibib. Arai mam ijo iswananmai kwangin, ikang, kogeu ijo da. Naarai itonga lu epone kangol eraasi lu ebakot eba lu itimatimauna, mam yea insul admyoda. Asul damam kolo kisisianakitai ijo ba, ijukakinijoda.

4 ETOP Naïvongmest, Otiktok (August) 6 - 12, 1998

# IYEMUTO

# Amudia akaale ireria ko Teso

Aay, App. 1

akotor agangat.

"Mam eong apodori amunosin tai. Kidarentok itolom epitotit lo akoro iboro egal naarai eota ugesi aswam ngon kwape kwana," ahafo CAO.

Kedoloki Etop eyapesi lo eyaitere nu akoru kodisriki kobima osimu nakiyareit ahu koihim ebe amamei Charles Aben lo epolokit nu akoru.

Lo ahu kobungok esimu kobukato ebe arai atupiton ke Aben ugesi abala ebe arokokesi etokete isuslai ngul ide kidaritete lu aiboiso acle kintoriarton ebe Kaberamaido da.

"Inyo mam yesi idarennotor toso moi (Nakismiet) atukuto isirakirokere?" engioldribubo ugesi Etop. Eyatakit da ebe "mam do ber epatana kwapekwanamamei DAO da lo epolokit nu akoru)".

Konye ebalua lo awanyunit Etop lodaegirak itaiapolokiton ekonistilo etiokisisu engeus kodistriki, kiwaddazete 20/7/98, kolomuntle kortonget lo eyait no icorie ka agaria nesi esetemit ationis kwape na aroma tesi.

Apolokiton nu agaria ko Soroti Ejkt. W W Okettsingesi iwadikat ebalua ngol. Abala Oketta ebe konama apejo ke odoketa loko K yoga ko Soroti elusrikt, angica ugesi ebe aatasi akipi ailikonor idokena ideadliliaajar.

"Ipu idokena noi alumonosi ide erumiasi akipi. Adel do adoketait na ekonotor itunga

ko idunyasi kede ecor agangat. Ipu togoi atianannokano akipi. Irotin icle lu eliniste odokena etikoros ido adokere aiboiso ngon nesi apagalar, kopedori akangas da atakanun," abala Oketta.

Eyatakit ebalua ngol ebe." Amosrin nu ipu, nu emuogo, acok, innomwaka iram icle keti anyamasi akipi. Koundi da ajaun itunga aboor adwot nemicle."

Apodon eicolong LC3 ko Bubalu, Ejkt. Emunyungeni pat. Kounkit CAO kotem Anyara

ebe edoket hangabw ire kotem ke arokit ationis na noi. Ebe etikoritos akipi amisirin neda dokwana kanisita itunga agaria kotoma koc! Etotoliki da ebe akalele na nu alosit ka aitemonokinona irotin. Abala Amuge kosimu ebe agolokino kwapekwana erot lo anyouni ko Bubalu toni Kaberamaido. Koundi Emunyo ugesi abala ebe etotoliki da ationis na aitemonokino na edaraca lokorot lo enaokit etem Orungo ka Anyara kwape apota akipi kokwamunotor ikokomante

kowat loko Langokede ikitoda elelorte.

Eyatakit Oketta kobala ke loda ebe arai "lo adwonyar" ekonisti ebe akoto edistriki akapukot kanu amudioro na edelo karui nako Kyoga. Aiboiso ngon kesi ebe itumwan loko Katera, Pingjire, Kadungulo, Bugondo, Atiira, Kamuda, Kalaki, Bulula, Kaberamaido, Kobulubulu ka Ochero.

Abala Amuge ebe kwapekwana ber amainei ibore akeraritor edistriki nejaasi

Ekirididi lo apotu estriak ikatusik'amusiri na atupiton apolau esomero lo Teso College, Ejkt. Akobi Odany. Aputo na inomit Milton Opucha

aiboisin nu adoki ationis. Ebe arai ber lem itunga ikutapek kaiboiso koc eganganana. "Konye ejai do eipud eai aigangakinitunga. Ejai ationis, cut alopet," abala Amuge

- Hon. Capt. Mike Mukula

Florence Asemo Olupot

School, Staff and students. All Religious leaders

Mr. Obuin J. J. Ministry of Works, Soroti and many others who were supportive during that difficult time of grief and sorrow.

Florence, we miss you. Emotionally we remain drained but thank the good Lord for our splendid days together and may our Lord be praised for the life you richly shared with everyone around you.

Dearly missed by your husband George and daughter Brenda, Daddy, Mummy, Sisters, Brothers, Friends and in-laws.

FLORENCE MAY YOUR SOUL REST IN ETERNAL PEACE

# VACANCIES

Soroti District Development Programme, a Programme funded by the Netherlands Government and the Peace Economic development of the district through various activities ranging from Agriculture, Food, Reach etc is seeking to extend competent persons to fill the following course posts on summer basis of work:

- Applicants should submit in their hand written applications with copies of academic testimonials made by the District Service Commission, P.O. Box 911, MIROTL, not later than 18th/8/1998. Please refer to the first contact addresses and telephone numbers.

1. POST CIVIC ENGINEER [One vacancy]
SALARY 3,375,316] + 3,454,721(+/-P.A.)
AGE LIMIT: Between 30 - 45 years
PREFERENCE: Preference will be given to female applicants.

MINIMUM QUALIFICATION:

Applicants must possess a Bachelor of Science degrees in Civil Engineering and Building or Higher Technical Engineering and Building with at least 3 years practical experience in a reputable Organisation and be represented by the Engineers' Reputation Act, computer literacy will be an advantage.

DUTIES:

Responsible for all building work, inspection of building plans, supervision of building under committee and in the district shall also undertake the inspection and supervision of work on roads being opened and in a way by the Programme and the districts.

SALARY [1,000,000/-P.A]

Report to the Co-ordinator of the Programme, credit supervision, recovery and protection of advice to the Government.

DUTIES:

Be in charge of all District Drivers, maintenance of staff and maintenance of Council Programme vehicles in this shop.

# Enyoin ekurut etobos adekis F

Esemanuel Maraka Okoto

Ateker ijai eong aumokitakiro nu abu ewadikan Job Opolot kikenyikeny kotoma kanu ikamunitos adekis na apolon Ngora Freda Carr.

Eebo ijakinitainu ibusakinit awam tetere iswam eteni kotoma adekis. Konye ationikiteong, aticepak ka icie da, ajenun ebe aiboelomunitor ationis na einakinit Freda Carr ebakai ebe "Ebosit".

Kowalika eyangaunit eripota lo angiseta nu ipu ido na epolok tetere eong engisit ebe eripoti lo erai lo abeit? Arai esabi eripoti lo inyo amakini edita lokapolon itolomuni nesi? Mam ibusakinitayangar akron na kwape na edit.

Ajeni ebe alosikinet adiope na epol naka Etop ngesi atopol Teso kotoma aitolumunun takiro nu ingarakinet ateker ejenun nu ejaasi tetere eseunetenu ibusakinitaswam. Atemar ebe "enonok ebood lo ayatok. Ngora Freda Carr Hospital", ebe itolutoluno eyaitene" kace nuda nu iwadikatai, kere eraatin nua mam ibusak nu da mam epatana acamun ebe ejauna.

Arai ejauana, aibo edukit ekurut ngol lo ebakai ebe etobos Freda Carr?

Ayaitok ebood kere eraasi itunga isepolok ido da lu eyaiten anwanisio nu eypolok jokan. Eraasi da iisogui lu eitariins (experienced) kotomaakironu ipu ido ejaasi nepepekajenna epol. Lakesi ejorin lu ateker ido da akongo na Iteso. Inyo bodo einakini eripota ebaite ebe enonok ebood?

Ikwakini ai ebood lo ejai Papa Bishop Ilukor, Prof. Omaswa, Hon. Osire, Dr. Oonyu Etabon, Hajji Okodel, Boga Commissioner Akabwai kaluce da erai lo enonok?

Inyo bu lemi iswamai ebood lo itunga! Ajenunee "mam ayaitok adekis Ngora eraasi epugak lu esarte lu mam ibwaikinitos itawon kanu aingarakin adekis, ebe ekalanyaka, ido itoliniute apiyai?"

Ivyobo esipedo Dr. Amuusa Inambisoka Florence Abeja, itunga iartibon, aikeun ationis na ejai Freda Carr? Arai mam kesi aawam ngun, luangai ti Iteso abeit aikeun akirongun? Biai, ngin naaudit

ngun alimor io ko Freda Carr

Inyobo bo mam atioki kwape nat kangue epup kotoma adekisis pa aitekkareit nu eyangak ekanisa loka Kanolik? Aa ekono etau ajenun naarai ne epatana oni atwaniar adekisa epol kwape nat kana.

Ebala eripota lo inyadakokadekisnoi, idti aticepak egulokin kisisiaunitnok epolokita ka angales kodistrik!

Dr. Oonyu Etabonnnepe Hajji Okodel anyoika ibusakinitkesi aswam ko akiro kana? Anyoka ibusakinitengarenok (ped leaders, civic leaders, elders) aswam kotoma na ikamunitas atekist (institutions) tetere epul aijanok in ateker ejok. Ebe "emameeteengar adekis ipomoa lu eki. Inyobo einakini adek ingarenikit ekanisa obalang ka aica naka ebakai ebe abos engarenok lu ekanisa. Engisit eong am kapupi apesen na epa arai eong Ekrista emarakina tuma ok

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otikok (August) 6-12, 1998


# Neem: Ekitoi lo imukei adekasinei 40.

akwi nu mom aigangaikin
ngerai. Eminakitos akinci
ainyam akwi ke, ido da
ingarakinotokanu asyaraikur
ta akodeykei.

Aliuneta nu ocok ke
dipudrua asyar imadang lo
ejassi ubaren. Kopekwana
kakwap nako Germany
tissumasi icoka ke mom
usumsetakala lokiokumu isiro,
jjekel, ka icoc Ko Kenya,
tussumasi mo kamu sipuro
isiro. Edoparit agigong ke na
dakolekpurisomi isiro, naami
ejai ekta lo isiro toma akwi
kucok ka apoka-ka.

Arai inapir ijo igore toma
asabikoi, dokanaki akwi ke.
mom kidang na igore tetere
mam jajkel enyanette ikan
igore. Icum imutowa kiguruk
akwi k'mom toma. Mam cut
esperanedoloknete imutowa
ngol.

Akito ke arassi ipwoteta lo
ejokuka noi, la itakwangete
ikela kon kia-kia. Igangakimetaitikokkadek na
emaekeke na itobesi ikela.

Igangakimeta akwi ke airut
ikok kotoma oraanara ipeipat
ijo kesi kwap kew komisiri.
Akito ke enolete akim jokan
kosudi arai epol ekitui,
tiolomuni abaoi na ejokuka
noi.

Ngun kesi ber aswamisinet
ka neow ado nu apodori song
atipmun konye eroko acie
ejassi.

Kamakangun, esinyikoukjeot
eong airayo na neom. ido da
arai ikoto ajenun acie nu
ikamumhta neom. erai erpune
lo dumunet iketok, kodolok
Forest Department kodistrict
kon Loko Soroti. istorict,
ejassi kopekwana icok ke
nyapraika. Arai ipude, kokeru
katipet.

# Enyoin ekurut etobos adekis Freda Carr

## Emmanuel Maraka Okoto

Atekor ajio eong aumokit akiro
na ibu ewadikan Job Opolot
kkenyikeny kotoma kanu
kamunam adekis na apolon
Ngora Freda Carr.

Tebo jakinitainu ibusakinit
aswan tetere aswam eteni
kotoma adekis. Konye
atonkitong, aticepak ka icie
da ajmunebe abioelemunitor
atonimantnakotif Freda Carr
abalai ebe "Diosit".

Kowaka eyangaunit eripota
lo angusta nu ipu ido nu
epolok tetere eong engisit ebe
, erpoti lo erai lo abeit? Arai
malo erpoti lo inyo asnakini
edita lokapolon itolomuni
noi? Mam ibusakinitayangar
akiro na kwape na edit.

Ajmi ebe aloukinet adiope
wurpitukakitap ngesi aitupol
Tme kotoma alinlumunun
akro na ingarakinet ateker
peman na ejassi tetere
mumtenu ibusakinitaswum.
Amma ebe "immok ebood lo
epolok Ngora Freda Carr
Hospital", ebe itolatuluno
enotene" kase euda nu
wadkapi, kere erasai akiro
na nam ibusak nu da mam
tunara acamun ebe ejasina.

Arai ejasina, abo-edukit ekurut
ngol lo ehakai ebe etobos
Freda Carr?

Ayaitok ebood kere erasoi
itunga luepolok ido da la
eyaiton aswamisin nu epolok
jokan. Erasoi da inogai la
eitaritos (experienced)
kotoma akiro nu ipu ido ejassi
nepepe kaijemna epol. Lukesi
ipirin la ateker ido da akongu
na Itesio. Inyo bodo einakini
eripota ebala ebe enonok
ebood?

Ikwakini si ebood lo ejai
Papa Bishop Baker, Prof.
Omaswa, Hon. Osire, Dr.
Onnya Etabon, Haji Okodel,
Papa Commissioner Akabwai
kaluce da erai lo enonok?

Inyo bo lom iswarnai ebood
lo itunga l'Kajenunebe "mam
ayaitok adekis Ngora erasoi
epugak la ecarte la mam
ibwakinitas tawon kanu
aingarakin adekis, ebe
ekalanyaka, ido indinolete
apiyai"?

Inyobo esipodo Dr.
Amuna Ixamitauika Florence
Abeja, itunga iaresban, aikeun
akintona ejai Freda Carr? Ans
mam kesi aswam ngun,
luangai ti Itesio abeit aikeun
akirongan? Bisi, ngin nasodit

ngun alimorio ko Freda Carr?
Inyobo bo mam asokinio
kwape nat kangun epupone
kotoma adekisia acie
aitelekarit nu eyangaarit
ekunisa loka Katolik? Ankar
ekoto etau ajenun naacui mam
eputana oni atwansar adekis
na epol kwape nat kana.

Ebala eripota lo ebe
"inyadakakadekimni, ideoboi
ti aticepak egolokin arai
kitisiaarutonlu epolokitmaila
ka angalea kodistrikt." Onbo
Dr. Onnya Etabon nepepe ka
Haji Okodel anyoika bo nu
ibusakinitkesi aswan kotoma
akiro kanu? Anyoika bo nu
ibusakinitengarenok (political
leaders, civic leaders and
elders) aiwam kotoma akiro
na ikamunitus atukoou
institutono (tetere epedorete
ajisana) in ateker ejok?

Ebe "emamorte engarenok lu
adekis ipunesio la eacarte"? Inyobo einakini adekis na
ingarenikit ekunisa lo erai
abalang ka acia naka akwap
ebakai ebe abos kojasui
engarenok lu ekunisa toma?

Engisit eong aingiset nu
kapapi apetum na epol naarai
arai eong Ekitilayot lo
emarakina toma okunisa bo

ebwokinit asca naka Edeke
Papa kotoma Yesa Kristo.

Kotoma apak na mam
elwana abu Etop
kinilumunite eripetala mabit
bala ebe amunaara
engarenikinio kotoma
Tirudo, atukotna ejai Ngora.
Enyoio bo ekurut ngol lo
ekmo aitobos Ngora? Bisi
etingitekurut ngol edobongo
Korm?

Ejakait Job Opolot arai
inerai ijo nu abeit, aticepak
iraun do ijo enashi lo Edeke
lolbwo aitijenikin ateker nu
eroko nu ibusakinit
atemokin tetere ateker
epoloi.

Neu do elipitor eong ebood
loka Freda Carr Hospital
angicakin elopet kojokan
kotoma akiro kanu naarai
wadikai ai ebe "Iraasi yeu
abalang naka akwap, konye
arai kepianiar, abalang,
aamokimokinyo?"

Erai Emmanuel Maraka
Okoto ekapwakunan
erionget lu enyaritai
C.R.E.A.T. Kami, ka
Associate Management
Consultant ACLAIM Africa
Ltd.

# Elimunio bet.

## Na Charles Opolot

ASEUNO par naka iminitan
bobo icie loko Kampala,
ageskenye abu kopulu Teo
cut kanubo inyo apalia
Kampala (Maseven) Itese
epone ngol?

Kita bobo ijo ebe anubo inyo
idotorere etela wok Nathan
Ebony (Health) apparatus nu
ejolujutere Permanent
Secretaries, dodo uitasal

Opolot bon (Gender)?

Kwabo inyo asalakinia ekomision lo Teo (Presidential
Commission) emam beetekede lo eburukinetetakek ekeila.
ktemar la Akallo bon assimilonara ibo kosi bon akukuraka
anwanejok. Ipo akiro akwap kana konye ebalasi dur Itese ebe
inye akiro opero.

I asijembopom leiowama apugun nako Kampala (Maseven)
ebalani ebe ipu akiro na einakit lo apolon mam iyalamakede
Iteso, agen da ngapengun ijwalautere kesi.

- Acie kakiro kana kesi imoriarito mata:
- Adidanut
- Akolokolonut arai bo nat ekunsee
- Aagianut konye kere kicanasi
- Akuriau
- Ewulaboloi kode aricit nu abekoi

Lis idanyasikeite kalo apolon kesi ebalasi che pas Maseveni
aipupakiro nu ibaren. Ebe toni bo wori ibdakina yesisbaren
ta apuorkangatai.

Epone Itese ageni alibo, akolokolonut, kode ekunsee mam
iwok itunga ekotosi aanyun lace kakesi da ejaasi ejok ebe
ekotoi kaputosi kere. Epone airuja kana ekot oni acakar
katipet.

Akirot na atemar ebe anyamonere nong orekon idda kotongo
wok. Ebalasakere ebe mam myamete koreru konye koyapitso
ican. Ide bobo da kilipilipaka.

Kejangaot da ibore epol kone ja oni ngesi akuriau. Ipa Iteso
lie (caninyapris) te apolok. Konye mam ijo idumuni Etesot
eridakini yen icie Itesot da nen.

Ekotosi kosi kohokate ebe kesi la ejonete aswan, kesi la
elaste akasin (clean record). Hopobete itunga kidareutu
Maseveni, elimunio ber, arai mam oni kikwenyunikitwaki
ani kere.

Arai da toma obuibali ebala ebe ingarakini Ejakait Edeke
ngin yen ekeri kilipi.

# Charles Opolot

## THE REPUBLIC OF USIAINEA: THE ADMINISTRATION OF ESTATE (ISMALE ESTATES) PROBATE AND ADMINISTRATION RULES

AND

## NOTICE OF APPLICATION TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN

TANE NOTICE thean application for letters of administration of the estate of the Late Okato Sam has been lodged with this court by Opolot Silver Wilson (son) to the deceased.
