# Ko ekot aburokin Odetta

## a Job Opolet

LT. Richard Eremu 35 istianaran loko utumado, ngasi alimo eul ke abolobolo kamu kanyon esionog LC 1.

nun ngasi nu koyapesi eop araasi 21/8/98. Abala ebo ebe akuto Soroti ngaran kwa kangesi lo ka amurikken itunga kere olotumak ekeukotoma utitoma bituka likumama.

bito lo kolepi abu kibitor

ma ano nu araus ekanila lo Kaberemaido ko LC V, ngasi nangtok o phdibandifagh, St. Michael Technical Institute. anusodangesi ebe kede ekampuni lo entakole Manternind ko korya kwape engadant apiyai koi.

ala ngisi eba ketupinen ngun kere, ebe adolit kwana apak kente ngusi abudikin itunga loko Soroti nu akusiant ke ama politika. Eyatakinit ngasi eba akuto ngasi bituun, atukko Soroti toma orot ke ejae kanoa tipagae lok edemokrase ebe elumunita ngun kotoma abwoetait ke na emuvument.

# Edite ekaropit, ebala Ilemukorit

## Na Peter Okoel

APOKON asiotong LC 5 ko Katakwi, Stephen Ilemukorit, ngasi atoma ebe erapit ke loka 650.000/- kangol alap, ebe nana ekanulo ke pac nei mam arailo apoloni endiaite abam esiiridikin edistrikt loko Katakwi lo atuksien pac, kicana da. Kapak na etutubero ebujel 10 6/98 eba agero akiro nu kitakadikisi ikaasilan iwi kwape melomonitor Etep kapapula

# USUK

na Julia 9-15, 98:

Ilemukorit loda enerasi ka Eop koyapesi ke araasi 23/7/98, ngasi abala ebe mam arai ngasi elopet abu kitutub apiya na ebet arepra ngasi kangolilap, konye ebe arae ekonosti lo apiyai kokaasulo:

Araasi 24/6/98, abala Ilemukorit ebe abu ekanulo lo edistrikt kibiokin aitutub ebujet lo ekaru 1998/99 ko Katakwi, kosodi acarnot

aitutubina adaamit ekonosti lo apiyai arintiemon kami eropet ke, asupiton ka ka egirigirak kany lo ekaasulo.

Kapuaran na asiorina Katakwi ebujet ebe abu CAO Katakwi, Nicholas Ouakara kolimok. Kami liemu eropit Ilemukorit kobala ebe edolit Ilemukorit koropat iritan kule a CAO. Ute abala CAO ebe enuno apolon esiolong LC 5 katumamot eropit lo edit adepar lo a CAO, korai ngasi epolokit edistrikt.

# Aretokinos 'emeya' ka ekansila kanu esokoni

## Na Peterson Alilio

# KALAKI

APOKOKINITON idukai loko kalaki, Robert Emado ka ekonosti ke kesi pac alungata aswam koi na ayatte ka astala idukai ka esokioni akaulona kesi aretokinka ekanula loko Kalaki Pacifici Epan, lo tek epagisat aija emwotna kano kanu atrakatiaka apulootin.

Kocelit koi, abala Epan ebe mam ngasi ageni Emado kwape lo epolokite esokoni, naa to ebe mam apugae nakotem apoti ngasi ide isolono la esokioni mam abisete ekanin kac.

Eni ekonisti Emada lo aonareto itunga ikulepek kano angorakina ayakina ben koidukai kosubito bala la emorimon ide esumataan kede ijaka lukotem ka LCy da.

Akommentkonsili lo jyikton hidukon iswamna la agwelanareti kosekoni ka aiduk itogui da. Konye do abu aretokin kolom kitutub Emada adukokin itogui la enyamere eidany kede acokonti. Kegirokinilo Emaduka Epan alimokin ngasi ebe mam igeni apugan ke kokinil abu Emada ai hang aswami kede ekonist ke loni ebe ne edumana ebalawa bubo "kokapa".

# Aperun iwongon korot

## Na Jack Okera

ALOTOK iwongon lu. anyounete komatet leknoikoni lo Kalim Kyere, Serere kes apotia itungaiy arni lu adekten emuadoe doape kodemasi egadi, isirigin, ka astalaiaar amuka arasni 22/7/98 kware. Iuap Opolet Samson (Jiego Jossah, Geon Paulka Elongo) akuboken apotu kolimokisi apolon stem Kyere ebe apotu ikapilak kikamuta kes kosoidet adoor emuado araussin iwongon. Akaulo iperikinete kesi kwap aanganyingany isuon koc ka ademar kes amok.

## Ekote nen kauriamet

# Erutar Ekenyatonon kanu akwen

Na Okalehchan

ETUNGANANIN Kanya fuma Ongui lo (hentiko Kampongkoli, Soroti ngesi apetro LC) konabekisi umaririsa aero bon abongor bukor naarai ebe ahu konil akolukola.

Adukot naku LC 8 na apoloko Qkt. Amand Amori eiciding neri amani 8/8/1998 ahu kotobak Aetna namara 30,000 - ka amoryono ngetiko Kampongkoli. Aperio do ekulekule krawarai. Kngisi hamasiba koteme ebe. "Hapona ulica muni," eka muni inguiton nong.

"Do her akeman ikiliak ka hon ekotendulekofon" Dabo makan, onakanon itonga lo atukru akwena "nganana".

Anyanyurasi itonga ne eje. Juma nisi naarur ebe einaamai koto bobo ngan.

Aoboryet ke fuma nabe Abwajikina Ariang ngesi abala ebe abo ngesi kopup imun 8 akulukulu eaninyi siri koleni do ngesi epodowikin ebe. "Aibu kola abri toroko imurt kuyen."

Kepapa ebe fuma ngesi imerankin, ahu kongan ekeh mot keremani akulukula korga Abala Ariang ebe adanna do akolukula agogong cui ido kodetot quil neipee ikan, neda abo konalakina eperi. Eyatakit Aryang ebe kongan ngeri ekeh abo koduri fuma elacit epule kotsekiritu sinyinyir to april noi. Ebe elelebo do ajido akweny april konoi amarna ke keni.

Eyatakit Ariang ebe abe do ngesi fwerok LC edopje lo Cell B6, Akabwai fohn konodete kesi aikamar fuma. Aperio do konyaraonai fe ber idararanoi kwape. Apolon eiciding LC1 lo Cell B, Ejk t. Ozon Charles. Ekaulo aporo karminaroi emaragje kaki koya.

Amairata 2 ekile kotaun lo Soroti

Na Onajo Folta

MARGARE Tka Getriodesis isianakin kesi kopotukojuto amaria okiliokit loopulek itopelo. Ioperi ko Soroti Ejk t. ICO. Eswamasnon na 25/7/98 ko Soroti eiduny ka eyapesi lo NURP nawari itomon kadupo la atibong.

Abala Margaret normanyitai efenokini ewadikan Etop, lo abu kodiek kesi ebe isipaperit iticha lowaike nesi do amak ini ngesi asumkini ngesi kunot iriamaroni eupasi ka lowaike.

Atamit epeget ebe rnam ngesi isipaperit itica. Konye abu llica kikenyakin aberu ke OO ebe elwana ne kolo esipaperik inotor.

"Egnora kolo akroi kiro 1976 tisztni isio Tororo," abala ya iyatakini.

Eisun ideyi akaale ko Dheka, Bungabakrik Kibwakita takdokoroke kakao. Amaelia akaale itonga 300 kadepan.

# Aperio ameran obur

Na Sam Ekada

ESAPAT Charles Osuna loko Gweri. ngesi abu kowalak aperio obur lo atida akaulo na aimat apon nu adakai kinyalak ikrawaragi. Amasi ngesi Nakanyat 24/7/98 kobu lo enyartasi "Elgonia Bar" katutubet na Opacet Gweri.

Apolon Emmanuel Opelot ngesi abala ebe abu ngesi kodum. Osuna ingatorisi kobur taputru; tek 'ido konakete roru kitoni akonye da. Abu Osuna kocam ebe abu ngesi koper obur lo konye ebe amanrerte skipi. Eyatakit ngesi ebe rnam akekuan etemii cut naarai apotu isiru hupu noi konakata ngesi akware kia.

"Idelelei do ebe ikidioko eong aokot, naarai ebala do eong etas est rut," abala Osuna.

# Aparong na BOG

Naakali, amra Bobuji loko Soroti ngesi epolokit, kimu kangon epolorit is adamanan agangai kokarmu.

Ninyarot, esami imerban lu ipu. Artiklarom luda eswamala udaun ikaru lu ipu komam elacisi.

Wiskisatini eruani imerban icin loka BOG lu isetiarin epok nisi ide lo epotura nisi ide da kopoderino amosim apetura kea asgangilor edekis.

Wiskiswongonet, ajansi BOG kede ekirol (commission) lo ingarenikit kea.

# Akaianyanat k BOG

toka BOG mam ecsi epok kano
asor imerban nu ebeit aowam.

edekis kami ejai ekanusa, ihera da
yin itonokit adekis apolo epok,

ton apodornisio na nyait adekis

imerban lu ipu lu iboyete ke

# THE REPUBLIC OF UGANDA

# THE ELECTORAL COMMISSION

Plot 53/56 Jinja Road
PO Box 22678 Kampala

# VACANCIES

The Electoral Commission invites applications from suitably qualified Ugandans for the following posts which exist in all the 45 districts. Applications, accompanied by copies of certificates and testimonials should be submitted to:

THE SECRETARY

ELECTORAL COMMISSION

P.O. BOX 22678

KAMPALA

not later than 22nd August, 1998

1. POST: DISTRICT REGISTRAR (45) posts

Salary: Attractive

Age limit: 25 - 45 years

Requirements for appointment:

A Bachelors degree from a recognised University, preferably in Statistics, Demography, Social Sciences or related fields with working experience of at least 2 years in the relevant field. Computer knowledge will be an added advantage.

Duties and responsibilities.

A Registrar will be responsible for:

(a) Compiling, maintaining and updating on a continuous basis the voter's register and roll in the district.

(b) Ensuring the exhibition of the voters' roll to the public.

(c) Assisting the District Returning Officer in handling submissions by the tribunals.

(d) Ensuring distribution of voters' cards to registered voters.

(e) Ensuring proper custody and accountability of all unused and reusable election materials and equipment in liaison with the Returning Officer.

(f) Processing nomination returns and election results in liaison with Returning Officers.

(g) Training and supervision of subordinate staff.

2. POST: COPY TYPIST (45 posts)

Salary: Attractive

Age limit: 25 - 35 years

Requirements for appointment:

Candidates should possess 'O' level with

i) four (4) credit pass subjects including English language.

ii) typewriting Stage II (40 w p m) obtained from UNEB or any other recognised institutions; and

iii) Computer literacy.

Duties/Responsibilities

(a) To carry out typing duties.

(b) Receive and keep custody of all office correspondences.

(c) Despatch and file out copies of out group mail.

(d) Operate communication equipment in the Registrar's office.

(e) General administration of the Registrar's office.

(f) Perform any other duties as assigned.

3. POST: DRIVER (45)

Salary: Attractive

Age limit: 25 - 35 years

Requirements for appointment:

"O" level qualification. Must have a valid direct permit with 3 years accident free and continued service.

Duties and responsibilities

(a) Drive and ensure the safety of the Commission vehicle in the district.

(b) Perform any other duties assigned.

ANDREW MUWONGE,
SECRETARY,
ELECTORAL COMMISSION.

ETOP Naïwongonet, Otikwik (August) 13 - 19, 1996

# Éripota loko Freda Carr

## A GOGONG K'EBOOD: • Bishop epolokit, epedorit ti adumunun agangat kokanisa.
• Eraasi imeeban lu ipu ikristayon luda eswamata adaun ikaru lu ipu komam
efacio, • Isisiatos lmeeban icie luka BOG noi ,ejenara noi ido da kopedoritos
aitosom ajenarakec aigangitoradekis. • Ejaasi BOG kede ekisillo ingarenikitkes.

sirtamunaneta nuka BOG,
kasukangun mam da kia
epodoritna atapakin atisobdikisi
nu malaki BOG.

(46) Emametu BOG keda
epolokitnya na imabitas nasi
atapii. Itelasi epela ke,
kandangatoham da nasi epodorit
apwakan ipamitas ke bapoham
adekisi joik.

(46) Mam BOG ujirumit eipone
lu eswamata ihanganan araan
emembeluka BOG, kanada eipone
lu isiyengunere imabitan ka adus
epok na etubokitas keti.

(46) Mam BOG dujirumit ikisila
ke toisan, lapi da mam kualaseti
imeeban ke epiliku. Abu angisani
epodorit na ipamita BOG kede
keugong ke, ka akabanyamat da.

## Agogog na BOG

Piswalt, erasi Bishop lukechenta
eposi epolokit, kami kangani
epodorit u adumunan agangat
kokanisa.

(46) Kami, eraasi meeban lu ipu
ikristayon luda eswamata adaun
ikan lu ipu komam etasisi.

Nukonun erasasi imabitan icie
luka BOG lu isisiatos joik noi
atau u jantany noi ido da kopedoritos
aitasom ajenara kesi aigangitor
adekisi.

Nukinongonet, ejaasi BOG kede
ekisil (condominas) lu ingarenikit

## Akalerysout k' BOG

Nakadir ekisil (condominas)
luka BOG mam erasi ejok kami
kater imabitan nu ebut aswami
(46) Mam da ekisil ngul etudansi
dakin kater cjae ekatina, ibere da
epa comikit adekiti apolis cjaik.

(46) Emakit ekisil ekatina (COU)
luka apodorotite nu erat adekiti
katery komam bubu ekanisa
dumunakini adekiti apotisan.

(46) Emmek BOG mami mam
imeeban lu ipu lu ibuyetu ke
kampala ejaanakinos
airiamununan nuka BOG nu ipu.
(46) Mam imabitan lu ipu cjaanakinos

## Eiloman lu apiyoi

Eilabanipasti iduumumunegonet
luka boG diummaneta apiyoi ke
Freda Carr. Emamet da eipone lu
etasi lu dokukum ejuasemasi
ke apiyoi. Endate eswamak icie
apiyoi kami ejaasi adekuk ide
kosiltet arsutim na iisub.

## Eulaw ibere

Emamet adekiti keda
aswadikarta nu indusentna etsai
lu ibere ka cjantatar nasi ido mam
da lu epolokiton adekis ejenete
ibere la cjantatar adekiti.

Mam da ibwasnakitai ijemetena
sosyedum ka adekis idu ejenena

## Eilom nub

Eiloman lu ipu lu ibuyet
kami, eraasi meeban lu
ipu le kami, eraasi meeban
lu ipu le kami, eraasi
meeban lu ipu le kami, eraasi
meeban lu ipu le kami, eraasi
meeban lu ipu le kami, eraasi
meeban lu ipu le kami, eraasi

Eiloman lu apiyoi
kami, eraasi meeban lu
ipu le kami, eraasi
meeban lu ipu
epodorit na
indusentna etsai BOG
tomaak inisukakangin
paras na
adekis konya komam bubu
ekanisa adumanakini adekis speesan. Mam
imeeban lu ipu lu ibuyetu ke kampala ejaanakinos airiamununeta nu ipu. Mam
imeeban lu ipu ejaanakinos airiamununete. Emametu BOG kede apeleikinetna nu
dutubitai nasi atupil. Mam BOG ujirumit eipone lo eseunere ilunganan araun ememba
luka BOG, ka lo isiyengunere lu adautu apak na etubokitai keti. Emamet
ikisila ka kotenam. Adepa BOG ikeruka 2. Emamet imabitan luka BOG icie toma
akito nok lingin paras nu adekis. Emametu BOG kede eswamae lo aingitunun
ayatisti adekita emko kikutubo akiro nu ikamunitos aswam na adekis

# ABOLIASIO

## KATAKWI DISTRICT LOCAL COUNCIL TENDER BOARD
TENDER NOTICE 1998/99 FINANCIAL YEAR

Tenderes are hereby invited from competent firms, individuals and companies for supply of Goods and Services to Katakwi District Local Council for the Financial Year. 1998/99.

### A. PRINTED MATERIAL
1. Graduated Tax Tickets for 1998/99
2. Various Revenue Documents
3. Expenditure Documents
4. Identity Cards
5. Headed Paper

### B. OTHER SUPPLIES
1. Stationery
2. Office Equipment
3. Drug Storage Equipment
4. Office furniture
5. School Desks
6. Building Materials
7. Uniforms for Medical Staff

### (i) NURSING OFFICERS
- White cotton dresses
- Yellow belts
- Black ordinary shoes

### (ii) CLINICAL OFFICERS
- Long sleeved white cotton gowns
- Ordinary black shoes

### (iii) ENROLLED NURSES
- Pink cotton dresses with white collars
- Pink belts
- Ordinary black shoes

### (iv) ENROLLED MOWNES
- Pink cotton dresses with white collars
- white belts
- Ordinary black shoes

### (v) ASSISTANT HEALTH VISITORS
Stripped cotton dresses
- brown belts
- Orindary black shoes

### (vi) LABARATORY ATTENDANTS
- White cotton gowns
- Orindary black shoes

### (vii) NURSING AIDS: MALE
- Short sleeved white gowns

### FEMALE
- Blue cotton dresses with white collars
- Blue belts
- Ordinary black shoes

### 8. Protective wear for Medical Staff
- gumboots
- Heavy duty gloves
- Water proof aprons

### 9. Uniforms for Local Administration, Prisons and Police

### (i) PRISONS
- Light cream material of 65% cotton and 20% wool
- Brown shoes for officers
- brown boots for other ranks

### (ii) MINUTES
- Light yellow cotton wear
- blankets

### 2. Tenders must be submitted with the following:
- Physical location and Postal address.
- Certificate of Registration (where applicable)
- Tax Clearance Certificate
- VAT Registration Certificate (original and where applicable)

### 3. Tender Bids should be in Uganda shillings and should include VAT (where applicable).

### 4. All Tenders should be submitted in plain sealed envelopes clearly marked ("TENDER FOR —") and addressed to:

### SECRETARY KATAKWI DISTRICT LOCAL GOVERNMENT TENDER BOARD
P.O. BOX 1
KATAKWI

To reach him not later than 12:00 noon of 21/8/98 and opening will be done on the same day at 2.000 p.m. in the Council Chambers infront of bidders that wish to attend.

# Ejaun awoere naka Akogo Zone Pallisa Naemukaaga 15/8/99

## Odudui P/S ka Madera Girls' ebwoikine Soroti District. Namirembe Boarding P/S Kabwangasi ebwoikinete Pallisa district.

Na Jack Okaro
(9)OMEROK (yare) Odudui ka Madera Girls kes edetunoo kano alouti Pallisa abwoikin Soroti district kotomaolaagano to ejoere naka isomeroi luka Primary.
Avekunio isomeron lu araasi 8/8/98 ko (Community Centre Soroti neda ajaan isomeroi ikanyarei eboloboloete asekunio.
Bukui le ejukunitus isomeron kes kes araasi Kalaki-Kamidakan P/S), Soroti-Odudui P/S.), Municipality-(Madera Girls)Serere-(Serere P/S), Kasilo-(Kidetok P/S, Soroti-(Mora Apesur P/S), Kalaki (Kalaki P/S) Mam Kaberamaido abe kijokunte ayook ke.
Abu Odudui P/S kodom amakesin 667, kotupakini Madera Girls ka amakesin 651, Kamidakan amakesin 597, Mora Apesur 586 Serere 537 kotupeti Kidetok ka Kalaki.
Le apolokit anub amakesin, Ejkt Noel Aisungesi abala ebe mam adoketati na ajoere ejok

## Amorokinos imwalimun 2, komaete iduwe kec

Na Michael Ongwara
ESISMAKONAK (yare) kesi eraasi 7/8/98 apotu amorokinos akonye idwe kes kotoma olagano lo apeton amunyeler na etebekitini meama etimsi lo ebwoikini Pallisa to wn council (PTC) kobuka Pallisa:
Patro Ogwang loko Pallisa township P/S nesi abu kocop aisiec angajep na asosol kamusugun kede ospake loko Kagoli P/S, Ejkt. Charles Ocilameri akaulo na akutan eperigi asjakin apetok loko Pallisa Township P/S ipeno kosiave nako Pallisa S S.
Amoromono Ogwang nupake ebe ele, mam esismit toni adoketa n okuju Kokoponokini Ocilameri da aidot Ogwang ekwam ebe mam enapi ejok, emerana.
Kmyek do idwe komaata esisiakkec, kiworetedo esisiak loko Pallisa township emwalimu kec Ogwang ebe "emong Ocilungole" naaraia bu kogcar ailok egumu, kodoi atasmun nu amusugan bon. Eringa Ocilameri erai atumunan.
Apolokiton akirimu aboliasio ko PTC William Patrick Okidan ka akutan eperigi Jackson Otimong kesi apetu isinapikisi imwalimun lu eyapie ti upwokan awate.
Konye abu ekamangololoko Pallisa township P/S Simon Bukenya kicimsi epene lo.

## Amorokinos imwalimun 2, komaete iduwe kec

Na Alutael Ongwara
ESISMAKONAK (yare) kesi eraasi 7/8/98 apotu amorokinos akonye idwe kes kotoma olagano lo apeton amunyeler na etebekitini meama etimsi lo ebwoikini Pallisa to wn council (PTC) kobuka Pallisa:
Patro Ogwang loko Pallisa township P/S nesi abu kocop aisiec angajep na asosol kamusugun kede ospake loko Kagoli P/S, Ejkt. Charles Ocilameri akaulo na akutan eperigi asjakin apetok loko Pallisa Township P/S ipeno kosiave nako Pallisa S S.
Amoromono Ogwang nupake ebe ele, mam esismit toni adoketa n okuju Kokoponokini Ocilameri da aidot Ogwang ekwam ebe mam enapi ejok, emerana.
Kmyek do idwe komaata esisiakkec, kiworetedo esisiak loko Pallisa township emwalimu kec Ogwang ebe "emong Ocilungole" naaraia bu kogcar ailok egumu, kodoi atasmun nu amusugan bon. Eringa Ocilameri erai atumunan.
Apolokiton akirimu aboliasio ko PTC William Patrick Okidan ka akutan eperigi Jackson Otimong kesi apetu isinapikisi imwalimun lu eyapie ti upwokan awate.
Konye abu ekamangololoko Pallisa township P/S Simon Bukenya kicimsi epene lo.

## Kata Christine epir ke

Na Aliu Ebitu Garvas
ETIIMU lo amunyelt lo idwe lo Ochero P/S kesi apotu konomataidwe lu Kagaa P/S igoobol 2-8 kede esomeroloko Doya P/S igoolon 3:0.
Ezwamanon nu araasi 4/8/98 ka 5/8/98 kalaro na Ochero P/S Epejonon lo angodlubi kaboliasio kanu egosiara Epi. Engidu John lo erai apolon escolong loka SMC lo esomerolako.
Aboliai lasagenge

## Elipi Soroti aigan akeran Richard Omy

Na Fidel Omonyokol
ATUKOT na eyait nu akerit ko Uganda- Uganda Amateur Athletic Federation (UAAF), nes elip apugan nako Soroti district amokinesaput Richard Omyat apesan naka dollars 1,275, kmu anipedoor ngesi alosit abwoikin Uganda, kakerit, kakwapnako Senegal. Ebert aboliasio ngun ajakin kiding 19 ka 22 Agosto, 1998.
Ebalua lo iwadikakit na erai General Secretary na atukot ngun, Aku Beatrice Ayikoro ne ejai CAO nako Soroti nes ilipi edititik igangak Omyait kede $ 1,095 kanu atikit na ndege, $ 40 kanu e Visa, $40. kanu esolo lo alaro na idege ika $ 100 kanu ngesi da ajaria

kaboliasio kase la luta: Omara Samur, Julius, Egeku Jonepe, ekaman epode ka Jimmy.
Ebeit idwe lesdinitate etem lo Ochero enge 98 kanu airisemaskat toni luepote kotoma Alua, Kobalaiko Kaberamaido Kaberamaido Temeke aseun etima le ebwoikin Kaberamaido.

## Elipi Soroti aigan akeran Richard Omy

Na Fidel Omonyokol

ATUKOT na eyait nu akerit ko Uganda- Uganda Amateur Athletic Federation (UAAF), nes elip apugan nako Soroti district amokinesaput Richard Omyat apesan naka dollars 1,275, kmu anipedoor ngesi alosit abwoikin Uganda, kakerit, kakwapnako Senegal. Ebert aboliasio ngun ajakin kiding 19 ka 22 Agosto, 1998.
Ebalua lo iwadikakit na erai General Secretary na atukot ngun, Aku Beatrice Ayikoro ne ejai CAO nako Soroti nes ilipi edititik igangak Omyait kede $ 1,095 kanu atikit na ndege, $ 40 kanu e Visa, $40. kanu esolo lo alaro na idege ika $ 100 kanu ngesi da ajaria

(pocket money)
Ebalu Ayikoro kobana
ebe emameete ataku
UAAF kede
kanukangan, ilipi aboroti distrikt kede
Omyati, aigang ngesi.

## Kata Christine epir ke

ebao keda na abu kitiitol eiyengane nes abu koyar Arami
"Ajassi da ngesi kede adekan naka ENT- (Ear, nose and throat) Akit, ekame ka eponoto," eyatakit lsale.
Omaeke kanatwan, Samuel Omoding ngesi abu kitijetik ebworok ebe," atapit Christine autara kede ariebo ke bon. Acie apaearais mam apederi alosit aawam. Akepolou mam atacio, amameete bodo torigin, apie do isio aingarakin"
Loidaranokwape Egaligalan purograms luko Radio Uganda, Ejkt. Charles Byekwano ngesi abu kitur. Christine kwape arawaman "na eyapana noi, kojokoka iponesio ido koinakina aawam ke jokan."
"Kibuni isio aitunit ngesi noi kanukapurogramuluka iduwe ko Radio Uganda," abala ngesi.
Abu do Byekwano kilip ebe, "kipuda isio aibwaikin ekale ke kacut iduwe toma akanin nuka Lopederi kere."
Elkalitromokinan lo apolon kokanisa loka imulokolen lo lem ilipi Christine ko Kampala, Ekimal Jobe Otaala ngesi abu kicarakebworok agongakin mama ejai Lokandian ikaru kere.
"Kiituniton kere ebe mam (oni) kipedori ajaakin Edeke acamusana kana akanse toma akuju," scori ngusi.
Icie ebworok lo ajassi ates kesi Prof. Francis Omawa, Prof. Timothy Wanguta kana owaike, Apolon George Oguli, Ejkt. Ame O C Prisons Soroti ka Apolon Siltvanus

Isiagi.
Esomit ke Demonstrans Swaria / Soroti, Gu North Road Mbalo.
Konodi Girls S Secundari Nabumali.
Eringa S awam Raisinankin High School esomeroloko 1979-1980 Iswamato lu eurisk eswama. 1980s abu loka apugn. Pablo Ado ni kwan Managers (UMI) Kaka Kokaru ekomi to ko Day Nainebi, ko to euriano Plaladelga 1995. Abu alosit awat apotek kede 1995. abu alosoi kwan UCOBA apaearais Uganda.
Ekarui k'Christine Okara ng ki yank ekalakuni nawan lo enera Lokaniba kajiamani

ETOP Naiwangonet, Otiknik (August) 13-19, 1998

ATWAKISIA

# Amina Aciro Edeke ka iketunga

Engula ebe akwangikis nadekan, ido elelebu aksik. Iyatak naingestaokot Iyasitai da akipi.

Akaulo na apaurasia 10 kolaikareta toisok. Araasi 20.7.98 kopukorete bubo amojong naarai ryasi ejautene ke amunar ido aleki noi. Abala Engula ebe abu apedot ngin kiyata, abu etuo agogong kodisiar kobengibodo na adekan da agogong knag.

Akaulo na apukorio irwaan naiyareakadekokt De Engula mam ejautene amojong abu kotamak naarai ayapat ariebo akuwan sek. Abu kilek kopoloor karada atamitaa atikide. Uwaritai do ngesi adekit k De Engula 28.7.98. Eyatakn adomen amukian kore toni Naikanyet 7.8.98 na elipia akooky, Patrick Amuriat. Dr Opolot aipalar ngesi adekit nai Ongisio.

Kotoma apak kana eleleba amojong akok, mam apedori aibinkin adit agogong, ekidoksuokot Konye na ben aheitaawans ten apukorngen, abala Dr Opolot.

Epokou Dr Opolot kede

Eng. Patrick kede inacan ke ibworosi totokee, Elizabeth Aciro Amuriat (kediany) korekee lo ejai Kogili Kanyumu. Aputo na inomit Kenneth Oliska.

etima lo imurwok ngesi, apotu kodamutu ebe abu ne "eriamakitere amueten kolacar kosodi do agasia na (amoretka) aitor nen aleliar aksik".

"Arai aowam na ationo noi. Maanti isio nawam iaroi kada atutubet," abala Dr Opolot kiyatakita ebe apote kesi kodamutu apedori acie kanueten.

"Akindo na isio adonyokin karapakin kongetakin ajar ke," etururuti Opolot.

"Enetun imurwok Engula ka Opolot kanyanyareehe niaria asubit bala enerontino icie etunga kesi ebe mam

eswamatos ejok tape amojong etwani. Abu Dr Engula kiser kede Amusingan ebe tetere nu etatami ngesi ecaete.

" Ajar, ejai atwanare. Imurok da mam epodorete keere," abala Opolot. "Ngol muron ekot ituan kojar" eyatakit ngesi.

Abu Opolot kicorak ebworak ebe ne dies etakanuna Hernia, ekot arurukara adekisi naarai emojirikin amueten kosodi aibos, ationo aitemokin.

Konye ACAO lokobuku Bukedea Vitiato Ouwan Ekinanges abu kicorak imurok ebe adefil dies kesi kitijetokin

adekak eijeone lo ariebo tetere mam emocanakinio akiro acie arai ketwana adekan.

Papa kocan Apolon Amuriat ngesi abu kisinapik imurok lo itaon kobala ebe mam cut ngesi itoroni kesi. Kanake, ngesi ngesi ebe apotu imurok la kotamata na apedorete kere aitujar altera ke, konye arai istemokinet kalo asuban.

"Inyubu apolou na alimokinia eong natwan ebe 'mam bubo eong abungori ailip okasina ngol?" abala ngesi.

Abu ktur Dr engulu kwape remoron lo ainaknia aswam ke, bola arai remoron lokokale ke.

Karatida ajar atiognokinet ngin, apotu eoworok kiyatakisi atur natwan

Apolon atukor koc Amuriat na Iranak Bulejem Arising Saklo ngesi abu kitur Aciro kwape touroka asai ateker kes. Rev Okwi Esakan loko Church of Uganda kokoter k Bidrop Ilukor ka Aristejom ngesi abala ebe "mam ngesi asot skor kobaule." Mam akiro 20 alomunete aktiek ke komam elimurit akiro noko Edeke," situnot ngesi.

Emeya loko Soroti, George Egunyu ngesi abu kitip atwanare na "ayator aimorikikina okale kou na edaperit na lem ejai". Abwokinkon Si Jude, atukot nalem ejai natwan kokanina lokatolig ka abwokiniton angor nutulikin kesi apotu kibwimoto ebe atwakiasi kesi amaeba nainakina, nakukarana, kwaniniton.

Konye aisiraret na aiturur na inerti ajokis lem amojong kana kakere nesi akiyo atwarista ikedowe ngesi. Kusum nong Eng Patrick Obol Amuriat ka imaran ke etokosi kongurere asaduku kaiotokee, komonyete, abu song kajenu kotonae ebe arsi atwaniar na epol noi tona okale lo. Mam aputo ngae epatana aiputar kadam ka. Amunor aijar na mam Edaan.

# Arai Christine epir koreke

ebadeka na abu kitulitol eiyengare nes abu koyar Arimi.

"Ajasai da ngesi kede adekan naka ENT- (Ear, nose and throat) Akit, ekume ka eporoto," eyatakit lode.

Onaceke kanatwan, Samuel Omodiny, ngesi abu kitijunk eoworok ebe, alapit Christine aurara kede arteho ke bon. Acie apaurasia mam apedori alusit aswam. Akepolou mam atacin, amamutot bodo norgin, ajai do isio asugarakni.

Lisidatano kwape Egaligalan purograms loko Radio Uganda, Eji. Charles Byekwaso ngesi abu kitur Christine kwape asswaman "na eyapaara noi, kisainaka iponesio ido koinakina aswam ke jokan."

"Kibuni isio aitunit ngesi noi kanukapurograms luka iduwe ko Radio Uganda," abala ngesi.

Abu do Byekwaso kilip ebe, "kipuda isio aibwaikin ekale ke kacut iduwe toma akasim naka Loepedori kere."

Ekalimumikinan lo apolon kokanina loka imulokoton lo lem ilipi Christine ko Kampala, Ek imat John Otaala ngesi abu kicorakebworok agongaker mama ejai Lokasuban ikara kere.

"Kotumiso kere ebe mam (om) kipedori aijakin Edeke ecamusana katus atomar tona akas," esuri ngesi.

Icie ebworok lu ajiasi ates kesi Prof. Francis Omawa, Prof. Timothy Wangusa katu owaike, Apolon George Nguli, Ejiit. Anu O C Prisum Soroti ka Apolon Sdiwanori

Isiagi

Esiomit kolo Arimi Ngora Demonstration School, Swaria Primary School-Soroti, Gulu Public School, North Road Primary School-Mbala.

Kosodi osinia Wanyange Girls School, Mbala Secondary School ka Nabumali High School.

Eringa ber ngesi kelomara aswam Radio Uganda 1982, isisianakitur Christine Rock High School Tororo kede esomero ocie ko Kenya 1979-1981.

Iswamator Christine ikuosin lu euriaka apaurasia nu aswama Kokiding naka 1980s abu kodum edipoloma loka apugan ko Institute of Public Administration (IPA) ne kwana erai Uganda Management Institute (UMI) Kampala.

Kokaru 1992 abu kosiom ekossi lo aweanar iyemuto ko Daystar University, Nairobi, kosodi ajakitnokossi lo euriana ko University of Philadelphia USA, kokaru 1995. Abei bobo Christine kiosit assiman ekossi o atopol akwap kede aweanar iyemuto ko Waabington DC ulap ngol, Septemba.

Iswamatotor ngesi kede UCOBAC ka UNICEF apaurasia nu ajear ngesi Radio Uganda.

Ekaru lo epol. kaijar k'Christino kakere nes 1990. Okaru ngol nes abu ngesi kiyura Yese kwape skalakanan ke obu Toni nawam lu awasia ajae ke, ebe enera kwayen. Kilipi Lokasuban kidar ajar ke kajamam na mam edaan.

# APPRECIATION

The family of the Late Mzee Eriasafu Opolot wishes to extend their heartfelt thanks and gratitude to all those persons, institutions or organisations that helped in one way or another, when they lost their beloved father Mzee Eriasafu Opolot. Special thanks go to the following:

Medical staff Mulago Hospital and especially Dr. Matagalu, Soroti Church of Uganda, Burial Committee Soroti town, Soroti S.S, New Secretarial Academy Soroti, Family of Major Gen. J.J Odongo, Kokas Ogwang and family, Mzee Amuriat John-Soroti, Mzee Obore Cooper-Soroti, Mzee Esamij-Soroti, Mzee Mackay Okello-Soroti, Mzee Joseph Ikinyom-Bukedea, Mrs. Florence Oumo-Kumi, Rev. Michael Esakan-Soroti, Rev. Ben Okiria-Soroti, H.M Patrick Attan, Mr. Elasu Michael, Mr. Ekolu A. Sister Atai and any body else who assisted in one way or another. May God bless you all.

Late Eriasafu Opolot Born in 1923 Died on 30/7/98

10 EYOS Natlilingades, Omaha (August) 13-14, 1996

# Mam edemario
## Iloke imuudun

Na Oriokot Aurike

EMINISTA Ioka Suso kano akinroukonona, Col. William Omaria? Arapai, agesi alimoki Iloke ebe mam apugan ber ekapakina adermar kesi imuudun naarai edukitos idunyeta kec Iuko Kenya, Iturukana ka Pokot, imuudun ido epote adermar kesi akituk arai kijaar imuudun kec.

Enera Omaria nu egoloki aurianemaka aigou na etulosio kiding Iloke ka Ireso araasi 9.8.98 kotem Magoro Aurianet na apaarasia aurei nesi abu kognando ajakin osomere loko St Francis S. Aounet, Oditel-Kapelebyong. Apolon eicolong LC 5, Katakwi distrikt, Stephen Ilemukerit agesi anyaraunit aurianet na ido ajaasi apolok icolongo LC 5, Kotido ka Moroto distrikt.

RDCs Iuko Katakwi Soroti, Kotido ka Moroto, MPs Iuko distriktan kalu, ipolisin Isapolok Iuko distriktan kalu, ayaitok Isapolok Isajore kari kana ko Kido ka eminista loka akiro nuko Karumoja, Ejkt. Peter Lekeris.

Omaria lo abala ebe emra ngesi ka aiyalama na epolisol, Igesi abu kolimok itunga ko Magoro ebe ajaasi itunga Iartobnete akiro na abekoi ko Karumoja ebe euta ngesi asduk ajore na ebuni aniji ka adermar Iloke imuudun.

"Emamei Omaria ekomuudu. Imuudun Iuojiasi eraasi lu apugan, kosodi ASTUs Iurjassi ne mam epodreste ainum Morotosanai ikidoko ido bobo da mam imuudun ngul edukitos kesi eraasi Iakec," abala Omaria.

# Ebunit atukot nako Kampala aigang Serere

Na Junk Okere

ABWOOLITONebuko Serere kaindot kano apolon, Mas Onnda ka atukot naka Kireka Iteso Development Association (KIDA) kesi ipudas airiamun nepepe ko itunga lukobuko Serere Naikanyet 14/8/98 toporuc.

Inerakounen Naiyarestodnan ngesi abalat apolon eicolong KIDA, Emilly Otekat, ebe akotosi nesi Ireso la iboyete ko Kampala ido Isupu keraasi lu kobuku Serere, aonue ka fueste atiokusio nu apolo na ebuku kec.

Epupete kesi ebe emko iroron, ejastene lo isomero ido ebe ejaasi araraktan na 10 ingarakis itunga konye emamriakinyet.

Abala Otekat ebe, airiamun na nes ebuni asuriamikin itungalo edeparete 300 sonor aomisio kaduketa nu ebuku Serere.

Ipudai da engarenok loka LC2 kitoni LC5 lukobuku Serere, ikisisianakinak osomeroi loka paraimar kainua, engarenok loka ikumistin lu emuvument ka apolok 15 lu iwomisisiko kangeletem kobuku kalo kede ijaka lu itemwani kaitela.

Eyatakti Otekat ebe, euta KIDA akiro nu aitupolaiboisio kere nuko Teso.

Etskete kesi abolai kano aisipedor alosikineta kec aiswamaun.

Erui Otekat euriat loka eibuku Serere, mem Kyere, oitela Kefen katutubet na Agule.

# Esumu eminista ayuun Tororo

## Any. App. I

(omderev) akogonor apesan kec koburi loko local government.

Angenet naka elap February 98 abu adeket (High Court) kocamak ekampuniloka Andalaiape atubor 53m/- na ibaraete kesi edistrikt kicamuntas idemar apesan nu ebeiton edistrikt koroko edoluno edistrikt.

Euumunit Suali ebe ebuni agesi aipet ineresinei ka Sondaula mntuko kejaan agangat.

Abu eminista kicorak edistrikt aigirakin ekomiti loka arabet napolon lo ikamuntos akon nuka apuganasia nakodistriktan tetere epeuno epone lo igangere edistrikt kotoma apesan nu etukanunei apugan nakokiding ko Malaba.

Elipit edistrikt ti apugan nakokiding kijukanaki kes 35% kano etukie ko Malaba. Ejai Malaba Tororo distrikt.

Keja ngun da abu Suali kikwenya atukot ebe elosi kwana ekiul aikony ikesai lu adau apugan

asisiaun ebe elikete iek apesan nuka apugan ko Tororo. Abala ngesi ebe ajaasi kwana akiro kere akaron naka ang etak loko polilo.

Okaru 1996 kiding September ka December nesi ejukunitor apugan ang oak aitobiolio na apesan ko Tororo, eksidet lo engarenkit kestice Kiwanuka.

Abu a minista kitacau atiaketan na epolu loka RDC kama ejai: loka apolon eicolong LC5. Abala Bidandi ebe adiakaritos idistriktan lu akotosi eyepesi loka RDC kolemarai kodistriktan Mam abu kefim idistriktan lu epudasi kwam.

Akuto eminista ikaasilan apodo noi eseak kes ka aijen eipud kec.

Abala Bidandi ebe ebu ikamulan aitup apone ke, ebe mam ngesi eat ejai eimsel apesan nu apugan nes da ebeye ngesi noi erai eminista edepar ipusp ke.

# Etaanyu akaale Soroti ibakor

## Any. App. I

Kotem Pingire, kocaalo lo Agule abala apolon eicolong LC 1, Fatsun Ocan, ebe amudarit akalele ere loka Silver Orinyol odo abwot aibos oitela kosodi ireria 11 kes adudunye akalele ailikor.

Abala Ocan ebe amisirin 26 nu emungo, acok ka akuma kes amudiarit akalele kocaalo ke.

Kocaalo lo Karimujong abala apolon eitele, John Hentry Ogwang, ebe erumiar itonakgo ere kere loka Ejkt. Nyongesa Barasa loda adas ailwot kanen. Eyatakti Ogwang ebe adudunye da akalele esomero lo Obutet PS kode ere k Ejkt. Omaw ido amudiarit iraan kamisirin 16.

"Alismis na ejai kwana nes do na inyamat lu amudiasi akipi. Etoko akipi iyalan ido kicamunit ebe konabistin idis luksingaren konyomunitus itunga lu ipu koreriskec," abala

Ogwang elimokosi Esip Naiutiet, osabitti lo atubor.

Kocaalo lo Amuria amamei ere lo abamariton akipi, konye adudunyitos akipi ireria icie ido komudiaritos iraan k'amusirin nu adeparitos 40.

Kocaalo lo Samhwa nes amudiaritor akalele etogo ke Joseph Waigulo Eradio ido kidruna imitai bala 20 alomar ure ke Ismairi Kitalo.

Abala apolon eicolong LC 1, Stephen Okiring, ebe ikalia 13 kes amudia akalele iraan kamusirin kec. Eyatakti ngesi ebe mam inyamat idis lu ediekutu itunga kakalele itodolote kes elap Okitabo.

Kotem Bulufu, eitele Kibimo nes inomitor akalele iraan kamusirin 25 kosodi ailikor amusirin 50, nu etemonokitai kanu akorikin iraan icie.

Koreria loka Emmanuel Epea lokocaalo lo Nampianga kode Ramathan Esaku, Vincent Ewesbu ka Eriya Emmanuel.

Emochu kere lokocaalo lo Oboketa, eitele Kibimo, agrunitos alaroik aicawa ido kidruna do imitai bala 20 hon kanu akalele alomar oreria kec.

Koitele Iuka Ocelakur ka Obur nes amudiaritor akalele iraan kamusirin 42 ka ailikor 41 nu etemonokitai kanu akorikin irian icie. Kocaalo lo Olifimo, eitele Ocelakur nes abwosia Augustine Oyuru koreke akaulo na akalele ailikor etogo ke.

Kosodi iyatakti Peterson Alilo ebe MP lo Kalaki, Charles Engwau Egou, dupiton RDC Soroti, William Enyimu ka arotak iyemutokes araasi 26/7/98 aupara aimaniman aiboisiona enomii akalele kotem Bulufu.

Adastu da akipi nu aihwang edaraca lo Omabor lo etiakit etem Bulufu kode Kaberamasido ido kwana ekerete akipi aibong ko Too aibe Kide.

# Eman Mukula ikiliok

## Na Martha Akello

MP loko Soroti Municipality Capt. Mike Mukula ngesi atemaebe elosi ngesi aibosore ekiul aitipo ikiliok lu itiyere angor kokalia.

Enera Mukula nu eraasi 8/8/98 ko Pabbe Gardens, Soroti ne ebegeara ngesi eitabo lo Ateso lo itodiarit Anumu na kotoma ekalia loko Uganda.

"Ekot ikiliok ajenun ebe inwamat Lokasubun aberu kede akot na amurana ke tetere kesi eupasi konye mere na akeju kanu aicakit angor," abala Mukula.

Atukot na atubok nungor nu apolok, National Association of Women Judges (NAWJ) nes iwadikat eitabo lo.

Atubon na adeket kana apolon, Leticia Kikonyogo, ngesi abu kotema ebe erai lo eirabo lo elookinti aisisianakin itunga nu ikamuntos ejastene kec

kokaliakonye mere aigur ikalia kwape etukatar icie.

Abu Kikinyogo kiyatakit ebe elosikit NAWJ angarakisi angor son ikiliok da lu itinyutne angor scan.

Abu kilip itunga loko Soroti aingarakin kano aanyun ebe edaun amumu koreria loko Uganda.

Amujong Freda Adyamo ngesi abu kisialamik NAWJ koto asukonyun aswamusine kec mama ejaasi itunga loko Soroti kosodi ailip angor niko Soroti alemun etau alosit kesi da toma ocaaloi aisisianakin angor nu ikamuntos amumuna kotorna ekalia.

Atubok nu ajaikina asubun nu kesi emor iaritos Ajkt Ann Magezi Ogaimo, Stella Maoss Arach Amoko, Heniceta Semandaka Flavia Munazbu.

Apotu atubok kisumutu itunga ebe ebnete kesi aijul eitabo ngol toma Akumama da.

# Asiata iwenan kadekis

## Na Job Opolot

IWENAN iwongon lu lem iperikisai adekis na Atutur kokanyape la ekamunitakanu ebe lem angat ka ayat itungako Kumi distrikt kolap Juni kes asiata kadekis, etijena egirir girario ayuarako LCV Kumi, Abaadi Aeko.

Abala Aeko elimokosi Esip araasi 11 8.98 ebe asiete iwenan lu kangeset na esabitti lo atubor. Iperikinitai lem kesi adekis ngin koutasi adumunumukian kano arenewa nu apotukodumutukapak na ekamunere. Apolon kagolak ngul kikamunai araasi 4.7.98 kosodete aibunga ipusp kec uerei kitoni aarar. Lu atwak kesi Michael Opolot ka Sam Ogwang.

Kedoliki Etop lo epolokinit polu Kumi, Samsun Onyai, kanu adumun acaunet kotoma akiro kano abu kogir alimun adis kere.

"Emamete ber nu apodret eong alimun kwape kwana" abala ngesi.

Isap lu asiata kotoma adekis kesi; Ibrahim Okello lokoitele Kamaca, Patty Aisu Ikeditloko Okeitoka David Ojalong lokorony Kogili

CAD lo Kalaki, Kigali, Ocekara, Iwelwelkini eko, UPBE 40 Pali, Kigali, Col. Kakame, Kigali, koarianet na Kigali, Iloke ke Iteso, Kapilohlong, itesa, Kiding ngesi apod, Katakwi, Stephen Ilemukerit, Apolon na inumis.

# Amwani ekampen lo Amur

## Any. App. I

Ben Etoma, atupoa, kesomaru lo Oring, Sobol, Ejkt Y Ebe, loko Lira, Gasber, kigali, emwalomu lo irama, itutanorere mwaba Soroti, Michael Ovram.

Alibaretta nu iyoma, kes ebalasi ebe isi eganginek k Emame, edistin koseratai man tetere Orungo "eepi, aerreng ke, eberaanum, Odongo nuriat lo Oringo.

Konyekotomaairaman Murungaturo abu Iyik, kitepeg aamosiot ngin kobuluebe mam kitepe, lejc komam nepepla o, arai euriat lo Orungo, ka naarat arai ngesi atwa, yuik kakere.

"Kamakangun, kosotik etunganan lo ejok loka konye mere naara ebe euriat lo Orungo, arabala loko Wera," abala Otekat.

Kakiro acie, apolon Iku ngini alimo ebe mam Oma, cot itukuriani nges, nee ejenere itunga lu Amur aiyeyen kes, na mem Oma, ejimi, iwadikat Martha Aiko Soroti.

Abongokini Etoma nu eko, Etop lo Omodokokitgol20, 1998 ebe "Ekuputo Otekat Amuria."

# Ekot Ka'maido agitar edistrikt

APOLON
EICOLONG: Emanyu

Na Peterson Allilo

ATUKOT na ipolok ("Elders Forest" jokaroilan, atumunak, imurban lu ikamistin tu emurumert, ka anger, kere luko Kaberamaido "Sab distrikt keti etolomotu equal kez naka ajuikina hon kwape Kaberamaido distrikt.

Etolomonete kesi equal lu kasrianet kez na ajaikina Kaberamaido Community Centwaraasi 14/8/98 Apolon Charles Emanyu nges erai

apolon eicolong loka atukot na ipolok bangul.

Abalasi ipolok ebe abesikinet kez, mam arac kana atukar, korye ebe kana amakin luce da apak naka aduman epelu loka aswan kidang naka heto ka ikomama.

Eyatakit aarianet ebe adidingar edistrikt loko Soroti ido ekoto apugas kocamak kesi da lokez e distrikt kana aitaniyany aswansoinet. Abalasi kesi ebe alomunt

# Aseu Serere Otekat

Na James Ekwea

ITUNGA lo obukui luko Serere ka Kasilo nepepe ka MPakee, jiakal febron Omas Omadaka Augustine Okiror kez ebe enerata ebe loburwok apolon eicolong lo atokot k'Ibrou nako Kamyula, Koreka Itron Development Association (KIDA), Ejki John Emilly Otekat, lo atwan Henry John Ederla kwape apolon eicolong loka LC 5 ko Soroti distrikt.

Ibrou keyapesi lo Etop Naba'ana 17/8/98 sbalo Otekat ebe. "Eong nges ber enjokani berraka ber Kasilo

Emanyu Otekat

abarekin laanwan Oderla". Eyatakit Otekat anijensae ebe adiudu ijaaka Olupet Akenaka atubon John Ochopa Arutu haarmilai ebe akoteni adwoz aisiniyikokin ngesi adwoz

kadmin kez.

Apotu Juarta lu adeparete 500 nepepe ka abwoikiniton ibukui luko Serere ka Kasil o kiriamunen ka imurban loka. KIDA LCs ka ikamolan loka. LC51 kouni LC 5 ka apolok (elders) 15 kango etare kobaku Sererearaus 14/8/98 kousdete acarnisor ebe kibwo Otekat.

Abala Otekat ebe abu ngesi kipejok KDC DISO ka edarint eicolong loka LC 5 Soroti undex, Valerian Bagama, Lt. Kibrai Ambalo ka Valentine Ebama na Ebulana ng ipungin anijenskin kasa ma ebesikinitor ngesi adwok Soroti ido ebe atukara kiri kana abesikinita

# Ejulujul Wandera isaseredootin 8

Na James Ekwea ka Mike Odeke

BISHEP Enamen D. Wandera lo Aanyamaret naka Itulik ko Soroti ngiti ejulujul isaseredootin ikanykauni, ejuka isni dongorayatak in acurman kirodi auran ismi lu pas etolomonio ko Babolita ka Kiderak abarokin lu ejuli.

E Fear Generallo aanyamaret kana, Fr. John Christos Wabo ire nges asismakini akwap akwap lu ajaikina asuban na mitenurum leitono Agelu ka Stephen Ietso bwdongat kwape isseredootin ko Kiderak na Emakaaga natubor

Isseredootin Aseu Dp Wandera Fr. Pius Richard Okiria lo lem roo esann nap k'aprosae aisism araun isaseredootin ka atkarasi (Promoter of Vacations), apolokin (rector) St. Peter's State Seminary Madera.

# ainerun kede Iten

NA Peternas Aitlin

ATOLEIT na ipolok luku Kiberamaido "Sub-district" kesi kwana akapakina aimerikkin atekerin nuka ikamamaka Iten.

Katoma nariatet na ajakina Kiberamaido community centre etano 74/8/98 abalasi apolok ehe ekapakina kesi kansi aimerikkin, ayvara, altupakin, aljamamka atinpol alwagi ka aineranara ka atekerinkere.

Esamutookesi ehe cjaani kesi aintenisi na Imanik-kineto itawan ka acjen na kulu emaitaniten kesi t kano susamakinal wapens Uganda. Apoto dahebnapolok kitosi apolok nakolo ajakiding Iten ka Ikumama kobakasi ehe erongo Imanagan kebano alwagi wok, kijena kulo kede ekitor edinpe "Ikumama."

Karaida man ainer lo Ikamama kede Itenivitamara, kanye ehe aawam isio kesi ehe iriamamani. Aliskatiaka na angajep ehe Lokaisiban nges epos.

Anyoun kolo sek, abakasi apolok ehe amamei edio edingei cui kotoma atekerin na aarsi kotoma apogankitoni ainesiniso kesi da.

Ejano Ikumama kede einer kesi 3o ebal, "wat bame owos" lo ehe eema k itenoi.

# Mameedolitanyarittunga lu Kalaki, Kiberamaido Ikumama, ebal Omeda

# Na Emenkel Imanihani ka Jardi Oherra

LO ekwakil ebalo Semer kotoma akalisi napolon Eje: Indenai O'Mao Omeda ngesi etalamarworniki lo ipodat tunga luka ebalo Semer alamar angajep na anyarit itanga lo ekakul la Kiberamaido, Kalaki ka Soroti ebe ikamama.

Ekalamari Omeda ewero lo etan: 14/8/98 kotoma adoketo no ebalo Semer. Anyamantai engarmak lo adoketo 300 kansi ainer ipomote lo iiamerikkinet ngul lo engelkina ko ipomote kalakel ebalo keti.

"Uraasi itanga lo Kiberamaido macao wok ebe Mam do li eong apodatit ajar li eong atakin itanga" ebal Omeda.

Katu ikamama aawamanakiling lu apotokotomo adoketat na LC 7-kangul lo epoto kiterami, agas abalai Omeda ehe, ebanakant itanga lo ainar aamisu kano ngul na abaka Semer.

"Ketat eong, ebo onaraka Okalabo ejak eong na aorot ngmi ebe li k itetafeki ara ketaton: Kitanikwana aorot nangito apodat keraudafok kena abokengsi" ebal Omeda.

Abu do kilip ngul lo ingarmikito emuvament aibap na igiranttai kotoma okisila kati. "Mam do ejak LC: abalitol awaan ka lo ingarmikitos emuvament kesi da epono ngopengol" iyatakit Omeda aitarasan.

Abu do kilip LCs akokakit awaan keti mere alegere epogak isin.

Kotoma aisian aamisio, nges apamere koramunere ebe ebanakinit alemin abolai ajakin kato ebal oerere ingarakireti aikeut awamisini atin kwape nat aslak isomeren luka sinia. Abu Omeda isamun aikeun aamisinit nejan ipasip ke neda ewomitere ebe ejaan aiken apestan (landraising) siap lo iyatrit okara ngo (1999). "Egnaniber Kaido 15/10/Murai a'amatati Kaido taparuz kenaid Semer kolong" ebal Omeda.

Apoto itanga kongereto aamisinit ido kokoteni keti do apuatan keti ben.

Le apolok itatakot na Kieska Itenai Omeda pimote Aimsitation agen ebo ilip banta aimerikkin kenaidat agnan aslak ebal keti. Abu kolamik het ebal Kaido 200,000/- kano esomero luka Pingite ka Kadangula. "Akete eong ber agear abukokinga ide ketye abunore aporikin Semer" abala Oofcat.

# Ekotosi Ikumama

# ainerun kede Iten

NA Peternas Aitlin

ATOLEIT na ipolok luku Kiberamaido "Sub-district" kesi kwana akapakina aimerikkin atekerin nuka ikamamaka Iten.

Katoma nariatet na ajakina Kiberamaido community centre etano 74/8/98 abalasi apolok ehe ekapakina kesi kansi aimerikkin, ayvara, altupakin, aljamamka atinpol alwagi ka aineranara ka atekerinkere.

Esamutookesi ehe cjaani kesi aintenisi na Imanik-kineto itawan ka acjen na kulu emaitaniten kesi t kano susamakinal wapens Uganda. Apoto dahebnapolok kitosi apolok nakolo ajakiding Iten ka Ikumama kobakasi ehe erongo Imanagan kebano alwagi wok, kijena kulo kede ekitor edinpe "Ikumama."

Karaida man ainer lo Ikamama kede Itenivitamara, kanye ehe aawam isio kesi ehe iriamamani. Aliskatiaka na angajep ebe Lokaisiban nges epos.

Anyoun kolo sek, abakasi apolok ehe amamei edio edingei cui kotoma atekerin na aarsi kotoma apogankitoni ainesiniso kesi da.

Ejano Ikumama kede einer kesi 3o ebal, "wat bame owos" lo ehe eema k itenoi.

# Kotoma

Iten Oo Abwinitration ebe ma-juka ka eowamak kise koki-mitti luka Tena Oo Apysommer Boendam Ikamama ka Iten da.

Apakin ngun ebe ara lo Uganda ejakain la-ripoo Kiberamaido, Oodoksa Soroti, Kokandaka Nde apota Itenis kognata enai. Amso Lismutaro kokotini kwape kwana enyame ko, Longauge Aimsitation ko kwana iwadikat itenokis, idu ebe atuket ni tpi erongo imoriklet Semer kode Iten.

Mme Charles Emamong ebal oe aewamane na Itenai Ckiteroi Oden ni jyok cat i do ebe elya ngi yiam akarakin aamisongo mama ejansi apolok te Kiberamaido Elders Pena ebe tearee enyame in Ith, Kumam Utsam. Abu do politkin kuerokok siemame Soroti distriktka Ugandale.

# Egang Soroti nu aipit awa

# Na Enonanael Akelom

ATOPITON CAO ko Soroti distrikt, Raphael Aperu Okongo ngesi alma ebe ebuni apugan na odistrikt atgang nai na aben aipit awa karetta kwape edinpe epono lo epatanat atiy on kotonga. Kenedi ebe epono ngopengol abamie euse lo apya kansi odistrikt aikeun.

Eneta Okonopot arani 7/8/98 ko Soroti Hotel ne apolokite altutauro naka ipirtoitin egelegela lu ebeit abwangar adani inivianakin akiro nu aipit awa.

Aru Soroti district Devolupment Promotion Centre ento minuit no altutauro kana. Abala Okonopot ebe akinete keti ko Soroti district Devolupment Programme adumakin itanga lo abamate aipit awa ibanjui altulusito ngun.

# Ekamasi abenyak itaunin lu a

# Na Martha Akello

LOCK hikei lingo i benzerate, akumateri kemy lu okoten kamiyan apugan nako akumateri dapulok seUringo. OPC kanyipena ikamani luka ikam khatayi, Ayaka Anwara ko pimi Kide nako Nyakoi alwagi kana kangaset na aamisi kany atuber.

Angin ko Kitubnoba nesi aamisiet siimoni na, kanya kanya kucikoro Uganda ka ORC kesi ngonat ebe kawangaset ka Naikanyet tauma mungon ikamaritai kotomo ebi Isirikalei luka Kanda koyakin kotuun lo Aru ka kawara kesi da aorot jk kueska abenyak.

Oorkkewabahoi ebe isirikalei rdi lo ateker na Tabii luken alami ajore naka President

Lauram Kahila ide kewetiam tem kesi apuna isirikalei k'Katide lo akoma koama Nalaman.

Apuatan nangakini apota abenyak kotomani taum luka. Benta kenedete sida tunga lo ateker na lu ajani nasta kesi obarak into apulans idenykede estawa lo idago lo Banta.

Ena Bama ere kaspidan luka arinaka ibari ide kera ibabnore lo apulun luka Brigade 225 luka ajore na apugan.

Itaunin lu ayaritai kesi eibnibemna ebe arani luka 53 Batiallon katutubena Ara, Anwara, Gombe Riuna, Kamara Jenga, Mahangi, Ongbokere ka Benta.

Anakon nakayakutan na ejansi Ara kesi siimuritna koredio ebe ipa itanga luka.

# Edudunyit amoding

# aurumiar Karamoja

Na Michael Orilajo

ABWOKITON apolon atodong LC5 Morandiariki, SarnOkol Pule ngisi ekwetsya. Itarumijehe ikanyiamoding ide ebe etuliteluano ikwamio saarai etubere itunga ikito nei kana ayaria kenedi kama ikokuto ibaren inya nei.

Eneta Akol kaartanet naka ayatok stem Nadanget kode etano la Merete.

Abu Akol kilip ayatink terewan lu amorikikin kode eyatens luka National Action Programme (NAP) luka eronget luka akora angican

Iberti lu isingarenin kami utikokin atasin na.

Elipit Akol engarensk luka Karamoja atra ikito ka aidar alapa-kede akipi kesi ejokkama albdulara bilanartemadupak. Lu atokokina airiamumna na kesi abalasi ebe akimni kesi airiamun napolon na ebsu ajakita Okitoba. 1998 aningarenican amamusaljen ensimo lo arsinan, akama, amamus ka ayuana, adani inya kewat kalo acak no kaumuma lo akena lu erama kwape atiokisin na ekotosi sitemokinin.

# Ettepeg Tiberondia Ssemogerere

Na Martha Akello

APOLOKITON apote loka UPC ko Busheryi District, Dr. Adonia Tiberondwa ngesi etepg no ewadikatni apapula naka The Monitor, Julai 22, 1998 neabalar apolokiten epan luka OP, Dr. Paul Kawanga Ssemogerere, ebe euta President Muaveeni kruzanakina diakanarakunaka ipaganasianika UPC ka Amin.

Kobalawa lo pac ewadikat ngesi abala Tiberondwa ebe arai da ipaperosi UPC ka DP team ibare itikokini ngmi abeokin Ssemogerere ebe man DP, ka NRM epumsi ido Muaveeni ka Obote da man epuma naarai emamei adn tanyoret ko Uganda kere na itadanti ebe abu UPC koloma patni luka politika arai bo nat abukin itangakere aibap UPC kwape iswana NRM ka Muaveeni.

"Kotoma okisil ngin tanganan ko Uganda erai mneba kamsivument, kitoni Ssemogereda, kuna erinani yan ebukitor Ssemogerere araan enneba ko UPC. Karaida ipaaraakna engarakitor UPC

Katida

Uganda ka Rwanda la-kamata komanapinapane. Apolokisimik Congo kesi-norokisi ukama na funga luka Rwanda ka Uganda la ejansi ORC? Akamero-maka atutubena naka atikerin Uganda ka ORC nesi atenya

# Kotingai auriak

KOTOMA Etop lo Otikoik 6-12 App. 16, kipou ewadikatos ebe kotoma odwe 38,000 lu ewadikauna kanu asioiman natitai UPE ko Kumi distrikt kokaru 1997, ajalakisi 13,000 aisisia.

Kuraida mam Emasiman isomeroi lo kumi Ejki.

Peter Auruka abu kitijena alibuzeta nu arowwa kana kere, idelelete cut. Ibore idiopc abala Auruku nes amamus na iboro icie kalu italakanareteidwe.

Acie katiokisio kanu kesi etengei, amamus na atukono, aswamisio nuko oreria, apotinkinio na idwe kalu pesur, alwanis na isomeroi, kacie da.

Idelelei da cut ebe nuipu kotoma atiokusio kanu, eraasinu epedorete auriak aingongar.

Akirot adiope na itipipilit nes na auriak iele agirit aiduk atukono kede itogoi lu esistanakinak.

Esomera lo emamete adukota nu atukono epatana iduwe ainyekikin aisisia kacut apaarasia nu edou. Mam iduwe epedorete aikany apalal. Karaida mam aticepak edou etepi esawa lo aisisia, epalal acepak kwap na ekitoi kalo isisiere.

Ekot auriak aiketakin aiduk isomeroi kanu ajokis na iduwe wok. Isialamikit isio LC's luko Gweri lu etupurutu epotolo lo aiduk isomeroi kangina (Etop Otikoik 13-19, 1998 App. 12).

Igangit da aonisioit ke Apolon Eicolong LC 5 Kami, Hajji Umar Okodebe ekot LC s ajenun iboro lu ainakinete iduwe ejalakinete aisisia. Ido arai emamei ibore yen elangir ejaiki iduwe ailakilak aisisia ekot itepesenai auriak kec.

Koricata da aitac isolosinei, aimoriarit lo aisisia kanu aitopal isomeroi.

Karaidaxiaissinin, eminasiiwok itunga araut lu egogongakwes. Dimikitoerukereetuan, arai ikamar akokorei arai akinei, arai boot eweni, mam ecamuni aiswamaun nu ikisilikitai.

Mam iteete luko Gweri, akaulo na epotolo lo ekamereakokoreika akinei apurun, kogeunete konye auriak arima ayangaanariboro lu akotoi kana adukin isomeroi.

Aso arai bodo erai ipigoi arai ebotet itacamuni itunga aingarakin adukio na isomeroi, itwasamai bodo agupengun.

Ekot oni aitodolikinn u ebeit oni kotoma aisisia kana titai tetere do apugan da ijaikin owaike.

Kojenete kereka ebe ne ikidiokorotor iduwe osomeroi, aegonemijesaru apugan da apiyainu jukunenei odistriktan wok kanu aisisia.

# OPALAKIRO

# Ekisil lo alapotu

EKISIL LO ALUPOK, 1998

EKISIL lo itwasamani, ajau:ke aidar alupok, ajiufakiu ka aitipogongakisil lo etwasamar, ajau:ke eidare lo alupok, kede akinisiesi acie nu ikamunitor alupok.

Aparran na acamuna president: 277/1998.

Aparran na agosra aswami: 2/7/1998

Etutub airabet napalon kwanate

Atutubet naaodit - na egeete.

1. Enyaran ekisil kwape Land Act, 1998

2. Kinomazkisille, kilemaarsi eijain eijnd ecie tomu, akirot "aluwared" apoloake apoloresne si kotoma akorario naka albosit na itingitat bet araina ipagusaritaik tokonitete da aiwadik iengestaka inipitete ekisil loka Registration of Titles Act "Unalumated" erai na ijalakisi eigan.

"Assessisation" apolouke atukotasamori aliosim alupok ketsipite na ielukoisio kotupitete itutubet 16 yen ka ekisil lo "Authorised undertaker" apolouke itunganan arai erionget lo ecamakitaiarai yen ecamakitos ikisila aitodolik in na ekotisi.

"Board" apolouke District Land Board na ielukoisio kotupitete atutubet 16 yen ekisil lo "Country of the United States of the United States of America".

"Freewheeling" apolouke atungin alupok, kiderite ikisila loka einono lu mam elitorokotoma oiswamae kec kana ejansi itunga loka ejeone lo ejani kaapanara kwap.

intemitere kotoma itutubet 4 yen ekisil lo.

"Former controlling authority" apolouke Uganda Land Commission arat erionget edo lu ettingitai aswami, asoko kitegeara atiosoma akonsitission, "former designated authority" apolouke a city council e mami ipid council, a Town Council, arat a Town Board to ettingitai apodoresio kotberi idlo kece "Former Public Land" apolouke alupok nu ark epogata kotoma okisil loka Public Lands Act 1989 asoko kibwakita Land Reform Decree, 1973.

"Freehold Land tenure" apolouke aitingit alupok nu iwadikatai oregesita aejasi kidalite aitogonguswokokisila kwa itetemitere kotoma itutubet 4 yen ekisil lo. "Gazetted" apolouke elatorita kotoma apopolouke alimanoreta k'apugan (gazette) ido korai emitenta elimorir, lo ikamunitor ngan.

"Land Tribunal" apolouke Land Tribunal lo ielukoisio kotupitete itutubet 75,81 arat kZkokisille. "Leaseduddland tenure" apolouke aitingit alupok adaun apok na itutubetai egeon apaaran na ebakai kigasa da nu ecamunitaki iding naka iipet alupok ajanga ititingaaru alupok aipagis kwa itijenaeritere acie koc kotoma itutubet 4 yen ekisil lo, kimorikitos ngan aipagis na mam detiba.

"Mails land tenure" apolouke aiting alupok aejasa nu iwadikatai oregesita, nu de akorakano kolo kotupitete aittutuket (Uganda - Agreement) sukaekaru 1980 kideritere aitipogonguswokwa itetemitere nukec kotoma itutubet 4 yen ekisil lo.

"Mediator" ngan ejai apolouke na itebeikitai toma itutubet 90 yen ekisil lo.

"Minister" apolouke emitenta lo ikamunito nu alupok. Public works apolouke adokio naka iroton loka agsali, tgaudoi, uileta lo akipi arai alarok nu idegei, asiponokino naka ipirin arai abokio naka apulejen kanu esimu arai aken na ekipyen ka asipokino naka augangetakec, apulejenkanu apasponna akipi ka agasia na elelearete akipi, abokio naka apulejen nu epokoro kanu alele na akipi, asmo ibokan kokwap, aibok ibokan, amatan akinyet kokwapkaneejai, abokio naka ataparin, abokio naka aibonso nu engicere nuka akipi kanu ikwamun da, abokio naka ataparin nu eleleanakinete akipi agasia na itemonokino kanu aswami nineiacie, ataugin nu idarere akipi nuipu kokwap ka aiduk ikan lu tukere akipi ngun, ka aswamisine acie, adukio naka itogoi ka aduketa nuka aswamusinei, ka aiduk aibosso kwa nat Conservative, isomeron ka adeknia, kere koraia ka elimori tapugankanu aitodolikn itutubet 74 yen ekisil lo, nepepe ka aswamusineiacie nu eupanara kangon.

"Recorder" apolouke itunganan yen enesmo aswami kwape Recorder kotupitete itutubet 69 yen ekisil lo. "Register Book" apolouke ekitabo lo idari yen erai Registrar kwape icorakitor Registration of Titles Act "Registered Owner" apolouke ilopet alupok nu iwadikatai oregesitakotupitete nuka Registration of Titles Act.

"Registrarate interest" apolouke eipud lo itolomiu oregesita kotupitete apolouke aitiotubet 4 yen ekisil lo "Adhered andregister" apolouke itunganan arai erionget lo ecamakitere aitodomanan ikwamun.

(4) Eitinge loka katotobit, edumonitapedoresin, kotoma akonsitission, kaapanara ka iwadikatai le - (k)otoma aitingit awigan ainkatukotongotobit.

(5) Ecamakitos idlo, abot alupok kami na nu isisamani kotoma kuan yen iboyu.

(6) Icipedorote, aibok kotupitete apodoresin einonoka ikisila lakona kanu itunga ngun kalupok kotoma apwakamara eipogala kgan eke kermamak kaya, kageunet ka apasin esangakini.

(d) Kotapite, konye tomok kanu apesan nu etonika konye kopedorete arai iboro lu iswaman, arai lo komam eipud aitac.

(e) Kotomake epedorou lu alupok ka yen ipepi atiosoma apodoresio ka atiosomaroroi ken ibucuk motor toma oregesita aipagis.

5. (i) Idio itunganan ekitog erionget kitunga lu itiopa alupok koipone loka eisok kotoma alupok nu emati ilopet epederete aikena ahaluwa kanu aning atap ngan koipone loka eisik kotupitete nu ejaas okisila.

(2) Ebani ahaluwa naka alupok araat nu icorakita ka fboard ngos ekorakiti.

(3) Ahaluwa na aibe itipa koipone loka einono iipi kitosomaree afosma ni icorakita idoe inak atosomari lo oitela lo ejaan alupok ni iipidaitomakoupan ka apan da nu icorakitai aitac.

6. (i) Keduma ekomiti atap na ekitore ahaluwa kan ating alupok koipone loka einono ebani do

(a) aitem, aitiogong lu aibwaik in aanyanata ibore e inakinete alupok ngun ilipa apolunaka aiijajarak anaripak alupok nu idunyatar nu ejein eraan nuka ajokis arabore la einakinate adonis mama ko arai ne ejaas ngun idunyata.

(c) aitutub naku wami kotupite ido kitosomari ikisila loka einono arai kopome aingiseta arai akim acie nikanumana alupok ngun ilipa arai nu idunyatar, aimorike ajenun arai ecamuni atipu nuka itunganan idiopet arai ka atiosoma da alupok, iin arai kerai kwangin aituang le ai kotupitete anyoika.

# Adepar akoko na idwe kalu

IPA- Idwe lu imaete kotauin (street children) kes adukonoe adomony itunga kacut aklos kaibosio naku ko Kampala. Mam bobo erai akoko na ibweltei, konye apelokku aidem itunga iboro kec kepali. Aminutsu noi airwet isawan kakainin, aupun kede irikoi lu enapete angor komorosing.

Ibore itakadikit nes do ne pala aitegia ipolisin da. Erai apolsit aite ituan edemario ibore.

Mam eong aomit ebe eraasi ngut kera street children. Akub do bala abukunos idwe da lukocaaloi Kampala naarai iyatas ngin paaran. Erai adurur ikiltok lu edolit ailuk amusenu koreria anyarai do kes da street kids. Ekwaikko bodo ai?

Aomit edolit apugan amokin itunga lu nedolit atukokin, Komami erai eiera konye li nedolit aisisianakinia kes aswamaisi nu epikuka nu epedonata kesi ajaria ejok.

Etesot lo Edelorit ko Kampala

# AINERASIT

# Etop kobusi!

Egeune ationo, kopiana bala elbworo amojong.

Apak edit kongzuni Onan (lo itany on) nuatopiketa. Kitijumi konye do Omunyokoi k'akiro Okwerede ke.

Kitubusikinete Enwaku ka Wani (lu itanya on) tuaswalele aputosia.

Kotomakinete Maraka ka Ikara atolomun lyemuto lu amwaka ido koraas abeit.

Kitebeinkinete akalanin Ariao ka Akiteng myukutan.

Kosodi Opak arionor kesi Kibusuro do cut Etop.

Ebuni do Otuka kwape Edita loitetet orwa do apapula kojamar.

Ara mam isiomi, kitingite enyuta bala amatan asigala.

Kisom, kogai atakanar bala Itai World cup

Iyemuto, awaragasia, abolasio ka aomisio sul. Erai ten Etop apapula na Iteso oba.

Etop, ecai ingaren kon bala ekiror kon, aicent Etop.

Mam iyalongongoi, ija isio kipu kau kon.

Na Apedel John Adams

# Egaluwa Lo

# Otai, kobongu o

IPA- Kotoma apapula nu iyemuto. Monitor na Etop, aibukasom kakuruna apol noi kanu ebalar Ejki. Pakao Otai ebe ejai ngasi aibukuron apne ke nai UPK kanu aitiji apugan na NRM bobo, iito ebe abuber ngasi isibwou eje ke.

Ingai mam awanyunit UPK ipikono kanu amamun kede aiosikineda nu ekac eje.

Okwe Otai, isubit ipi bala mam irai ituan yen eja Teso

otau. Mam aticepak ipi ipe abokision na etor Teso agen ne iosio ipi Bulaya oka 1980. Kimami ipi agas e kon ngol ti akosi akituk eejasi.

Kosom ber eipone awanyunitor kolin ko Gok ka Kigumi can kede eipod lo ejaatatar itunga. Kaesea ka Kabarok. Kage iteso, kowanyutu ican agas 1987 toni 1991. Kimonyia isio ijo ka anyamia akim itung

# Mam Iteso abang angatariata iloke

IPA- Abogokit eong ebalua lo ewadikat Ejkt. Okojo Bosco toma Etop lo Omodokokingol 16/7/98. Kobalua kalo amorit ngesi Iteso kwape lo apol abangaanut naarai mam apotu kitosomata abar kec ejok.

Akoto ber eong angitun arai erai Okojo Etesot ace bo ateker acie. Dobo apaarasia nu angasere akituk ko Teso, aibo eboyo ngesi, Teso ariaito nencie?

Okojo, emamei Iteso adiakaret kotoma angatario na akituk kwa iwornitor ijo. Eraasi Iteso epitak ka akorok ido etiono aijulakin aonono kec. Aibodo li

epedonata Iteso agen akituk nu etta nen ke, kogai bobo elongitona. Kosodi imurokit cabo ebe abu bobo apugan adolosio (quarantime) akituk da.

Apotu Iteso komunika akituk kwape e ba naarai amamei ber e aiaarasia ngon. Acc elomunu ni aijulanakineta ka akwap amamei ep apedonata Iteso am abar kec katipet adding apak.

Ican lu apotu kotak iteso epido ka itesa etodok kato etakununate kakw

Abu Amin kiruta Itu

ETOP Naiwongpost, Otiknik (August) 20-26, 1990

# Ilapio kotoma Ateso

- Orera: July
- Omuk: August
- Othik: September
- Otibar: October
- Obedelei: November
- Oeuban: December
- Opso: October

# Adepar akoko na idwe kalu

IPA: Idwe lu imante kotaurin (sweet children) kes akokinos allomony itunga karut aktok kaiboiso nuipu kofungala. Mam bobo erai akoko na ibwaita, konye apetekle alomi itunga iboro kati kebali. Aminutu noi airnet nawari luakanin, laipion kede iriko lu enapete angor komorosing.

Bose itakadikit nes do ne bala ategis ipolikin da. Erai apoteit alle ituan edemario bore.

Mam eong aomit ebe arsasi ngut kere street children. Asub do bala abukunos idwe da lukocaaloi Kampala naarai iyatas ngin gaaran. Erai siturur ikilick tu edolit aduk amusenu koreria anyaria do kes atreet kids. Ehwakisii bodo ai?

Aomit edolit apugan amoklin itunga lu nedolit atukokin. Komam ti erai ejera konye ti nedolit ariksianakinia kes arawamisio nu ejokuka nu apedonata kasi ajaria ejok.

Etesot lo Edelorit ko Kampala

# AINERASIT

## Etop kobusii!

Egeune attimo, kopiana bala abworo amojong. Apak edit konglouni Ocan do Ilany oni nuetopikete. Kitlijomi konye do Omunyokon k'akiro Okeanede ke.

Kibibuskinete Emwaku ka kami do Ilanye oni biawwakte aputosia.

Kotomakinete Maraka ka ikera aitalomun iyemuto lu emwaka ido koraas abeit.

Kitebainikinete akalerini kiriac ka Akiteng injukutan.

Kobotii Obak arionor kesi Kibuturk do cut Etop.

Ebuni do Otuka kwape Edra torbeter orwa do apapula kojiamar.

Arai nam isiomit, kitingita imyota bala amaran esigala.

Kisom, kogoi atakanar baki itei 'World cup'

Etop, ecai ingaren kon bala ekiror kon, aicerit Etop.

Mam iyalongongoi, ija isio kibi tau kon.

Na Apedai John Adams

# EBALUWA LO ESABIITI: ETELEKA 10,000/=

## Otai, kobongu ore koseun alomar airabet

IPA: Kotoma apapula nu iyemuto, Monitor ka Etop, abu kasiom kaiturun na apol noi kanu ebalar Ejid. Peter Otai ebe ejai ngesi altutunnor ajore ka na UPA kanu aitiji apugan na NRM bobo. Ido ebe abu bar ngesi kdberou eje ke.

Ingai mam ewanyunit UPA ipikorio kanu amamus kede alosikineta nu ekec eje.

Okew Otai, isubit ijo bala mam ina ituan yenaja Teso otau. Mam aticepak ijo ijeni atlokisio nu etor Teso agear ne ilosio ijo Bulaya cikaru 1985. Kimam ijo agear eje kon ngot 5 ekosii akituk da ejaasi.

Kosiom ber eipone lo ewanyunifotor Icolin ko Gulu ka Kitgum icari kede eipone lo ejaatatar itunga ko Kasese ka Kabarole. Apotu Iteso kowanyutu ican noi agear 1987 toni 1991 ido kimonyia isio ijo kanu anyamia akim itunga kaboogi ko Mukura. Itunga da lu kopotu isap kon 'kitobokata acok' kimonyere ijo. Itsakor da luejaasi Teso da kimonyere ijo lo igeeri eje ko Teso.

Eabo, ejai ecamusana Uganda, konye kija kede irongete lu etamilos aitiji anyamanaro na isiingin kotoma apugan. Ecamusana da ngot lo ibala ijo, apol konye kapugan kus cut ne idumunia ijo ebe itulikin ka tgeresan mam aboyete kajiamam. Ajore sus da akokoi, aari ka albunga itunga tai komam yen apedori atupakin ailoos da.

Peter, lo apolon kon da Ejid. Milton Obole acou kanu mam ekotor ajkun "aijamam" kede amuudu naarai ejem nu etikkanunete. Na bon epol ngesi ijo da abongun ore ka osuap kon tu: Ateker Ejaku, Col Omaria, Max Omeda. Koseun ijo da airabet do ngina inerar ijo da nu ikoto ijo ti apugan kiawame.

Kegiroto itunga aseun ijo arai erongo enyunyunasi iting bodo emeleku. Arai caat ijenikit ijo arokisio nu awamakit ijo itunga lukio Uganda, konye isio iteso ti aso kingiriki altim ijo.

Kobuki isio ikosi itogol, mam bobo kikoto airyekini ineria kosi alosit ailipilipitoi otaurin komasi ijo ajaar ko Bulaya.

Otaget David O. Kampala

# Ijaanakini Soroti MC imo bon 'tenders'

IPA: Amonyi eong ne ejasai kansilias luko Soroti Municipal Council kanu e tender board.

Mam itunga lu jaikitos isio adukok (construction) luko Soroti arereng na jaakin aawam.

Okew Mayor ka Town Clerk, inyobo eyauni ngun kobood kalo. Kiitunai isio da kwape ewaaima.

Ikoto do isio adukok luko Soroti kogiroi abolobolo na Tender board naarai esubr do bala ekotoi imo bon, konye mere etesot.

Okiriei John

# Mam Iteso abangaaka ne angatariata iloke ibaren kec

IPA: Abogokit eong ebalua lo awadikat Ejid. Okogo Bosco toma Etop lo Omodokokingol 16/7/98. Kobalua kalo amorit ngesi Iteso kwape lu apol abangaanut naarai mam apotu kitosomsta abar kec ejok.

Akoto ber eong aingtun arai erai Okojo Etesot arai bo ateker acie. Dobo apaarasia ko angasere akituk ko Teso, aibo eboyo ngesi, Teso arai bo nenicie?

Okojo, emamei Iteso adiakaret kotoma angatario na akituk kwa iwomitor ijo. Eraasi Iteso epitak ka akonok ido etiono aijulakin einono kec. Aibodo ti

apedorata Iteso ageelar akituk nu etia nen kalipet kojai bobo etonglong da? Kosodi imurokit cabo Okojo ebe abu bobo apugan kimik aitolosio (quarantine) na akituk da.

Apotu Iteso komunokinos akituk kwape e bank kec naarai amamei ber engasit apaarasia ngun. Aso kwape e l o m u n i n i a t a ejiilanakineta kotoma akwap amamei epone lo apedonata Iteso angadakin abar kec kalipet naarai adding apak.

Ican lu apotu kotakankisii Iteso eputos ka icie da lu etakanunete kaiwaip kere. Abu Amin kinita Ilugai kere ko Uganda abongor bukko. Bisi ijedon ijo simor Ilugai ebe ebangaika kanu abunere agwetanor ko Uganda?

Mam Iteso ajenete ebe edumunete ikaramoja imuudun lu aponaita engasit Iteso, ido Ilugai da mam ajenete ebe abuni Amin araun epugan lo Uganda.

Aso nu kere ekot oni ayangaar kwape akangas naarai amamei yen ajem ebe epote ngun atakanunun. Nu ti edolit Okojo aawam nes aicor Iteso acoite koingaren arai egeutu bobo likaramoja aingat akituk wok.

Omuge Robert Mobile Police Patrol Unit

# Kenyekisi airiunit eirumane

IPA: Etipl eong nuatoto kere nu ejaasi toma Soroti District aicat kagogong noi aitopol ka aiduk da ewok district. Kecata kotobwosta aitosiomo na idwe wok kere komam ajalit ikoku igese.

Nuatoto erai lo apelu wok. Ketopoloutu apesur kessianakinete ala ka asiac seio tetere mam edumunete apotu na mam ekotoi, ekurut ka da acakar arerengusio nu atosit akonye kasiom kec.

Kesisianakisi idwe akoru, etatai, kede aawamisio nu skan nu eyaungete aino kogurupun lu itopoloete ewok akwap kowadin kere tetere engarenok wok epatana aigangit oni.

Apusen kenyekisi alsaljalaanut Kamorikkinos ka nuce angor kanu adukun akwap, kenyekisi bobo airiunit akiro nu eirumane.

Hawa Ngere Akanaila Eastern Div. Soroti Town.
