Icie kotoma Okumama lu kolejet epugatos Soroti distrikts Anyoan kokediany Christopher Eyuru, Robert Engulu, Faustin Anguria. Ebala MP Omeda ebe mam ekiroo Ikumama erai amorosit.

nuage/itgela/karbamaddola Kalaki. Insuriaritosobosisimu aboitor eong. Okapel alaje Kabermasibme euriktadijkt. Engulu Robert. Abu etigogongik Iseera cat akinyarana aimuar awomisin ngon nu mam edukete ateker.

Abu alimok kex esteen ngon nu oougero naana apuanusa nu okau na apuananor etengsi abu kat opatasikite lu Kaberamasde kala Kalaki atubunun Serere arai. Kasilo aimari inyamat. Kosudi lu ko Serere ka Kasilo dana apaaner etengesowakku apu atubonor awas lu Kaberamasdo awonte inyamat. Abu alimok Iseera ebe obingeta itidingingeta akwap. Isurumotos akiro nu besoka Ikuamam ileis. Aputu itanga okotos ajenun ebe aibo ber eibunototor akiro ngon nu eriakak na Ikuamamaka Ilesis. Abu alimok kex ebe politics na arokok ayangaamites ngon. Agentes akiro na apuanusa nuka campaigns lu LC 5 chaeperson Eyatakitabu etasaki kex ebe eong Omeda lu apotu ikumama edarata apuanusa na elongilong mam cat abun alomar abanganat kwa nat kwangin na atiakit itunga. Akiro nu emamai yen epedon aetamokin ilema oni ikulepek Ileso ka Ikumama.

Eyaasi ngul lu inriante adam itangakalmole ebe MP's luko. Teio kex ekotos ayangaan etiake ngol lcie ka kesi adobito adeketat na amor MP's ebe ibangook. Ido na aumokin icai kakesi aputu kugwotou alosit Parliament kousdem alborar, apotu bobu konyakitousangwokanu LC 5 da iborana. Acamunit eong ebe amoromor MP's da apotu bobusaborekanen da. Edarata cani edolu aase arai etubeto epune itanga kangul.

Aputu Iseera isorunas lu luckobis ayangaan atiakit Ikumama ka Ileso. Epone atiakaitaka kwa nat kangin ijukinit Ikarjanoja edanyan obukte. Alasjit ko Karamoja ebuka erai ateker kwapa nat Bokota, Tepes, kaicin Kotoma airiamun kangin apuni inenutamuri akiro nu ikamunito fundraisingkano atukun ebolai nu edukere secondary school lu Atiira, Kyere, Kateta ka aiyatakin atukono Serere S.S kanuri/itigher. Aputu lu kolejet agwisins kaisi alomar airabet, kosudi LC 5 ka LC II kousdem alborar. Kucamutua inwamanar kangul luapotu kutubono. Abalas kex ebe enate nga ini eyaunete apol obuku Serere.

Aputu Iseera ilipata Elders luko Serere ingarende inapolan Okollo Fabiano ka Opolot James enterakin ka ipolok ipaupa kex lu Kaberamasde ka Kalaki. Elipitos kesi ipolok lu iswamante nu kami adumon sipoc.

Akiro nu ikamunitisaburok in ekolong lu LC V chaeperson elipitos Iseera ebe njaun apuanor ka acamanar ebanakinkesi akejekalo atwan Odetta John ka Otokat John Emilio. Elipitos kesi ipolok enterakinka ipolok luko Soroti, Mania ipality, Kaberamaida, ka Kalaki, kowai kala Kasilo adau acamanar ajaun.

Noitodanto kex isap lu akotes aibwa ko Kasilo ainyekin kana acamakin Ejkt. Otokat John Emilio ljakangul enyekisi aomisio nu aibwa kex apolon Eswau C.k. Arutu-Ochipa ka Olupot Akata, Ecamuto luko Serere ebe akiro nu aseo eyangaunitso eigurone Teus.

## Eipone lo ekoria M7 emugaati

Na Charler/Opolot

ATEKER adolu bobu yesi ajang ikus ikilo. Ebe emuibe. Konye mam eong aomit arai jianganete yeis arano na ekonit. Akirot na emuibe ikwaikinomiso?

Ajai nong Katakwi oposaposai apolon kaueo, Ejkt. Arie Kamoja, akiro nape cut apipil konye ho korai nu abeit. Eong da bobu sek alimoktor yeis acie akiro kanu.

Ipu ican kobuwok. Asu erai do iwokotunga aanyun olio ibore yen ekonit bon kobimakinete itawon teletel bala lem ibun araibonat aturukon na eneritos ibore yen ebonit.

Abula Katsuja ebe ibore emunaarit oni fieso ngeisi akalanyanut. Ebe mam oni ikoto aowan kagogongdado konye aidarit iboro luakwangin bon. Ebe oni kobuwok emunete itunga lakibwapit(modelo). Ebe oni kagogongitadilonokin aimat

## Elimuno ber

ajon bon. Ebe dado arai ber onida aibok acok nu ipu mam ti oni da kijoku.

Ipu akiro tai dodo canat acie kakesi mam erai aibakaretwok. Konye ejassi iboro icin lo erai aibakaretwok.

Kwapenat akirot na amemotos. Echo erai abeit ebe akwapisnet kere ejus itanga aineket iboro lukaritai konye bodo kojar apolou.

Ikwaikinete itanga

ecamanese auron etanganan airabet arai ajakanat naarai ebe abu koinak yeis itutubet kikile yete kimuanyo, arai ho nabunya idio tai, arai bonat ebe naarai erai lobukus.

Ekutoni ajenunehe yulujulasi apakor(changingimes). Ekot budo oni da napukede akwap linyon bo ber cut ibore kikoto oni kwape ateker na fieso nu aanyu ican adaun ikaru etin nen.

Ikwaikini oni aii kinyakani ibaker kau wok. Naarai oni kobuwok kiinaki oni ibaker aangaren dodo oni aibwapini kesi ekaulo bala ingokwo.

Eket oni aijulakin awomoum wok. Yesi lu Amaria keseuto itanganan yen ijenete yeis da ebe misu, ejasisi kede aomisio nu erubok. Ejaasi kede aijen na eful, emina sipuc. ide korai ojalam tau korasda bobo niwam, kopukoro akonye, kokapakusu sipup mukabere da, papa ndwe, opapero, esusut loamos, eminat sdwe, emaruaterangor inaritos apolok ido epupi akwap kere.

Konye mere ebe lu opakiro, arai ebe erai eunat lobukus, apolouke ebe lolo yeis da eben. Arai bonat ebe enaikita nimsint aturub apolouke ebe apedori ajion emugaati loakwap komersa kalo Kampala.

Ejudakin akwap. Ekot yeis aunat itanganan yen apogong enupane (lobbying). Akwap kere itanga lu egogong enupane kesi duc ekonyunete einer lo epol. Naarai nu edolunia aiker emugaati komersa luapolon edamuni yuokao da ipu egangitok ke (lobby enaw).

Kousdi bobo ekot yeis ajemun ebe emugaatilo akwanaukor su katario. Yesi kere ijenete ebe mam lokapolon Museveni epakapakus emugaati komam bet ngesikjerei ijo. La idunyasi kalo apolon kesi ebalasi ebe akirot na esomero (old boys) nesi isingarenitoi noi ekorro emugaati loakwap. Arai mam ijo kolo ilonit Oae-es-Salaam ingai kijemmi ijo? Arai mam kolo ijo ijot kede kala ejaasi omresa ingai kijemmi ijo?

Asu ekot oni ajemun ebe akoroi na emugaati komesa kalo apolon mam ijo ijukari abaluwa (application) erai bon ebe lu egongasi kalo apolon kesi elimunete ebe bala itanganan matan ejokana niwam ke kacakakisi ngeis da adio ararasi kiliko.

Amaria alimokini ca eong yeis. Adolu apak kus. Abala ibai eong ebe ironi akwap na. Keseuta epir lokningaren (ministerial material). Mam iloseta asu lusdebereka opaki ta umuju! It eperekon luopakin.

Arai mam ijonate, ebala lu apolon ebe ngesi elope esei iketunga lu elusate omresa lo apolon arai imunikla ngesi ebe ejai itanganan ngin ibore ejok kanduc.

Dubaboyesi atemar ebe mam eong alimokityesi. Adau rong alimon do yeis nukus ngon.

112 FTOP Naiwongeneri, Otubari (September) 3-6, 1998

AISISIA

## SECTION B

The sentences below are in the wrong order. Write them out in correct order to make a composition about making juice out of changes.

1. Wash the oranges and place them in another clean container.

2. Serve out the seeds from the concentrated juice.

3. When squeezing oranges, these are few steps to take.

4. Oranges are a source of vitamins C whether squeezed or sucked.

5. Clean your hands and make sure your nails are short.

6. Cut each orange horizontally and squeeze in the container you had cleaned.

52. Read the information below and answer the questions after it. Answers must be given in full sentences.

**Job:** Would you do me a favour, Ben?

**Ben:** It depends on what it is.

**Job:** Could you loan me Shs. 5000/= until tomorrow?

**Ben:** I suppose so if you can pay it on Tuesday.

**Job:** Of course, there is something else, too, Ben. Lend me your bicycle tonight.

**Ben:** Well, I guess not, I have to study anyway.

**Job:** I have one last favour to ask you, I'd appreciate it if I could borrow your blue suit tonight.

**Ben:** What is the matter with yours?

**Job:** It is in the dry cleaner's place.

**Ben:** I'm taking Grace to the movie tonight and I want to look smart.

**Job:** Grace? But she is my girl. I'm taking her for a dance tonight.

**Ben:** I stand better chance, man. There is nothing I lack.

**Job:** Money does, money talks. The poor will always bend low.

(a) How many favours did Job ask for?

(b) How many people are taking part in the conversation?

(c) How can you guess from the conversation that Job and Ben are of the same size?

(d) On what day was Job borrowing money?

(e) Will Ben lend Job his bicycle?

(f) What is Job's last request?

(g) Why is Job borrowing all these things from Ben?

(h) What is Job's financial status?

(i) How can you tell whether or not Ben comes from a well-to-do family?

(j) Write a word or a group of words similar to the one given below as they used in the conversation.

(i) favour

(ii) appreciate

53. Study the graph below and answer the questions that follow, in full sentence:

(a) What does the graph above show?

(b) For which year is the graph?

**Namukasa's progressive assessment for the year 1992**

for P.6

Months in a year

(c) What is shown on the horizontal axis?

(d) Which end of month did Namukasa score the highest marks?

(e) When did she score the least marks?

(f) Why didn't she do tests at the end of the months of April, August and December?

(g) Which term did she show steady improvement?

(h) Which term did she get the lowest average mark?

(i) How often were the tests done in this class?

(j) Which subject is represented on the graph?

54. Read the passage below and answer the questions after it, in full sentences:

Mr. Tom Kitu, a driver employed by the Police Inspector of Arms, escaped unhurt last night when the truck he was driving was ambushed by a group of trouble makers, on the Kakiti-Arina road.

Mr. Kitu had been in Kakiti to attend the wedding of his nephew and was returning alone to Arina in his truck. He was ambushed approximately 10 miles from Kakiti. He said that there were about 20 young men, but that only five were armed with guns.

The armed men aimed their guns at the truck and shouted at Mr. Kitu to stop, which he did immediately. He jumped out of the truck, shouted to them not to fire and asked them what they wanted.

The gunmen ordered him to walk towards them, but he refused and asked them to come to him instead. When they had surrounded him, they asked him who he was, where he was going.

Kitu told them that he was just a driver with the Ministry of Education and that he was on his way to Arina to pick up some teachers for a seminar in Kakiti.

The men asked if he worked for the notorious police inspector, their arch-enemy, Mr. Sam Okwa.

They told him that Okwa had prevented them from taking control of that area and had arrested several of their friends. He answered that he had heard of the famous police inspector, but had never seen him.

Mr. Kitu said that while some of the men were interrogating him, others removed his suitcase from the truck, his money from his pockets and his shoes and watch.

On folding nothing of interest in the truck or on Mr. Kitu, then unexpectedly returned his suitcase, shoes and watch and ordered him to turn around and drive back to Kakiti.

(a) Where does Mr. Kitu work?

(b) What happened to him on his way back to Arina?

(c) What had he gone to do there in Kakiti?

(d) How many armed men were they?

(e) How many lies did Mr. Kitu tell. Name them.

(f) Why did he tell those lies?

(g) What property of his was grabbed and taken?

(h) Who is Mr. Okwa?

(i) Why do gun men dislike him (Okwa)?

(j) Give a word or a group of words similar in meaning to the ones given below as they are used in the passage.

(i) ambush

(ii) interrogate

(iii) interrogate

55. Write a composition of between 100-150 words about: Your first visit to a town or city near your home and what you had gone to do there.

Aseo na Amuria kotoma aputosia
Jonathan M. inomitay

# Alosikineta

Na Jonathan Muraka

ABWAAN lo eboloboloi araun MP lo Amuria, Ben Etonu ngesi Narmukaga na atubar au kitalak etogo ke lokocaala kano aseak agwelar anyamia arai keseatu ngesi kouodi ngesi aolior kanekes.

"Kaolo eong, ejai akabaati na kelo aduki eong, koloto kinakuta konyamiata," abala Etonu kiridete itunga akwena.

Etona ngesi kaurianet na ageuniata kesi abwaak twongon ausip aseak koitela lo Akeriau, etem Orungo.

Ajaikista aarianet osomero lo Akeriau P/S ido ACAO lo Kapelebyong, hiailt Imamet ngesi apolokit nei kedekakin ACAO lo Amuria, David Nyanga.

Luce abwaak kes Edita loka The Crusader, Francis Onapito Ekomoloit; Engineer John Kokas Okello Emunyu ka atupiton apolokiton osomero lo Orungo High School, Yuventino Joseph Opio.

Ekomoloit lo ageari einer ngesi abala ebe abwoit ngesi naarai akoto atacakin Amuria norigin kes lukolo etisomiata ngesi.

"Iborecat yen engerit kobuku Amuria nes ican. Ejaasi itunga kedecan naarai ensamete kede norigin. Alosikinet ka obe nes ebe ekot Amuria ibore arai iraasit yen ejai enokooni, yen epedorete kesi agwelar adamunia norigin kideunitos icie ainyam," abala Ekomoloit kipelipeli eitabo (manie festo) ke lo ejassi ainapela nu akiro nu itemokit ngesi kano ebuku Amuria arai keseun ngesi.

Abala Ekomoloitebe erot ecie lo ebeitor Amuria aitijo ican ngesi adumakin etumunak awamusinei aibois na elmoimonetor Kakira ne ebe itaanyunitotor Iluga kes ican.

Abala ngesi ebe akoto Amuria MP lo epedori aisupun luce MPs ebunere aituk apiyai adakin Amuria ka luejokotau kano aiduk isomeroi ko iboro icie.

Kowai lo aisisio abalasi Ekomoloit ka Etonu ebe epote kesi aanyun ebe ejaunos norigin okantulo lo edistrkit kano aitosiomi aidwe lu ican lu ecube ido kotubete noi kosomeroi.

Abala Ekomoloit ebe iboro lu amonaritos aisisia kosomeroi

kes amamus na itogoi lu esisianakinak ka idwe amamun ainyam kosomeroikwa kolo.

Esumunit ngesi aanyun ebe ejaunos imurok ka ikee adekisia. Abu Etonu da kisumun aanyun ebe ejaunos adekisia kangol eitela lo Amuria ido ejaunos ansasin ka ikee adekisia ngun.

Abu Ekomoloit kikwenya aseak acoite aise kotupitos abeanakin na itemwan naarai ebe arai arawan na ajaicaa aheit ebuku Amuria kere ido epuda etaise lo epederi.

Emunyu loiareit einer ngesi abu kirodod aimarimar aanyuneta nuka engarenon lo ajokan ka aiwamisio nu ebe abu ngesi kopedo kanuka Orungo.

"Abwoit eong kano aijalakin, aikeun kaaninyikok in Amuria. Abwoit eong naaria ekot oni adamun engarenok lo aheit. Kidam oni engarenon lo aheit nes konye eposiata iborongul kere lu inerai, igusdoi, adekisia, isomeroi ka icie da," abala Emunyu.

Opio 50, lo abala ebe ngesi bnodit ayaun edigari aawam Amuria ngesi esumunit aimorikikin itunga lu Amuria, ayaun ayaaraka aimorikikita, aitijeecanit ka aikeun asiaman.

Abala Etonu ebe akiro nu anyamete ngesi etau noi tapi ekoto alomar airabet kes nuka ekisil le alupok lo etutubo puc. "Mam eong akoto yesi atemar ebe "inyo ber ekotor Etonu duc kosnunete ngesi?" abala Etonu konakete itunga akwena.

"Akirokes kaanyanete eong. Elosi kwana Amuria ijesun. Kidau oni ikaru iuni, entamei ibore yen kidemunit. Do nu ariebete eong kes nuta," abala Etonu kulemuni eitabo lo ejai Ekinil lo alupok aitodik in itunga.

"Ebak ai hobo oni aslom esolo lo alupok. Akiro ngun kes akotor eong alosit airabet. Nape adauni eong ainyakikin ebaibulir lo isiyapoerealomak airabeti abuto eong aingit ebe koleje (kairabet na CA) apoto oni katemasi ebe koraunos alupok nu itunga lkwakin hobo ai egeun oaaite len itunga esolo lo alupok. Konye arai koleje kajai eong opaliament—" abala Etonu kokwenasi itunga.

# Ekot Etonu apese

Any. app.1

Akaulo na einer ke abu Etonu kitikwen itunga kelomaki akerit tuni aibokin oicolong ke, konobite hala auta aitodikin kes ebe aroko ngesi agogong.

Kedol apak na aingiseta abu apolun ediope lo abala ebe esisianakirkolo Emunyukingit ebe "Esisianakit kolo eong Emunyu. Akoto ber eong aingit Emunyu, atiar idumunit caat ijo da atagalausi adui?"

Abu Emunyu kobongok ebe ajaikolongesi da aberu, konye ebe apotu kesi kotiakakinos 'katu atiokisisiacie' ide e'lipit ngesi aseak aidartun acie. ACAO lo eyait Kapelebyong, hiaiah Imamet ngesi apolokit aarianet okaulo na ACAO lo Amuria, David Nyanga, adekakin.

Engisio Emunyu akiro nu aberu akaulo na abwaak luce lo ebolobolote ka ngesi aitijeninar angor kes.

Abu Ekomoloit kitodia nake aberu, Margaret Aanyu, kaurianet kouodi Etonu da alimor ebe ajai nake da ure. Mano Opio lo ikaru 50 lu apolou abu kolimo arai ajai ngesi aberu.

Abu Ekomoloit kisumun ailakilak awamisio nuce nu ajaatatar ngesi arai keseun ngesi alomar airabet. Kilema nu apolokit apapula naka The Crusader erai da Ekomoloit esisianakinan Makerere University.

KUJU: PAPA ONAPITO KOBIA A L A K U N A KWAP; Aramak akwogo ka egangitok inyamitos Francis Onapito Ekomoloit (loiareit kokediany) akaulo na ewadikaunor ngesi kwape abwaan araasi 25/8/98 ku Katakwi. Na owaike Onapito Margaret ngin kokediany cut.

TETEN: EJOSO; Egangitok edakunete Engineer John Kokas Okello Emunyu kinga akaulo na ewadikaunor kwape abwaan ko community centre, Katakwi, araasi 25/8/98.

EONG KAKES: Ben Etonu (kediany) iboyete nepepe ka egangitok ke iarei lu alimorete ngesi kwape lo akoto aibwo kapak na ewadikaere abwaak ko community centre, Katakwi, araasi 25/8/98.

EKINGOK DA: Yuventino J. Opio inera kaurianet na ageuniata abwaak aseak kosomero lo Akeriau P/S, etem Orungo, ekingok kakeje ke, Naemukaga na atuber.

ETOP Naneungonet, Otibor (September) 3-9, 1998
EYALA

# Elunyar Inagai akou ko saloon

## Ini Inangi

inangi aikokokini
sisane apiyai ko Malaba,
mabo abingo Sumti kwa
sisane aumisani ke, konye
kirom erat soni Jinja
sisane ibety Akwi, akoke
maseke
inangi yango ejen ne eboyo
ko konye apagoni akiro ebe
sisane aacuanularmikali,
kya abo ebe eyolit ekiror
yani bella.
akoke inangai ko Jinja abu
kya ayalama na apol nos
akoke narai aerei ebe adau
akore eko abo mam bobo
agodot adwapk kadamun
kwepe mam Inangai
yandot abo ibere agoun
kabo do ber koloma noteri
kana amatar ezai ka
kane ber idobore.
anyoa kanen abu kolor
yogoni igwelun' nikapo,
in inepa lo agelagela
sani da boje etiai lope
kana akinyeta nu itedio
aoka aboro da icir lope cut
kare akore kwepe kangor
kare.
abo igwelet, abu kolor O
kay pool kwape
makitere amaapo,
aponi bo tensi amator
kira, Kakira, Dugombe,
kira. Abu do nawok
kore eko anodoka kuda
koni Kakra.
antanaar bo kwana alout,
in ijeni ne ilosi da
abudan aiyamar ijo toni
kora, Akiro napenu, Inangai
kun ben apotu

ibodabudan komarisna ngesi. "Aiba itesi ijo, mamarwende Madam if you are going to and we went," abalsi ibodabudan emariaste anapar ngesi.

Apotu do ibodabudan kinyamasi Inangai cut toni Karongo, etogo enaaba 37A, nodateni aponete kudamunere Shilla. Abu Shilla kiyalamikin noi sanyon Inangai ido abu kijua ngesi ejok cut kwape ndautotor apak na apol mam sanyona.

Adaun ber apaarasia aoni kere ajai nawok airac esner. Apol Shillasingringrin angat akiro maipu nukocaato koundi Inangai da singningit Shila noko Kakira.

Kotoma do oineresinei kalu nesi abatus Inangai kodaanakinia Shilla atisiknisi kekere, agnus ko Sumti, koloni Katakwi, koker ber Kumikoloni do Malaba neda abu koanyunia ican loepu noi, ibere daeinakinidringesiadoli Kakira amont adio aswam lemunikotakanis nesi eponte lo angarakini.

Adiope bong apotu nawok kitojokaasi alout iritat adsosot adope na ejena noi ko Kakira kwape 'Porota' Eraina adsosot na ipu iboro lo itulakamaree ajar. Epol amat, sinyare, ajang awate, aos esinema (yadoi) aijulatini (salooni) kede angor ka ikilok da kanu kangul kaepol akore na aele da.

Keduli Porota abu Inangai kipudak inatemokinitim neda aponiaar kouparotor adsosot na ebe Unises Saloon ne ejai

aberu na ebe Nyenzi (Ariono kede Ateus).

Kekimpaikini Unises adamun balakematari Nyenzi ekebere

Kas-kas' (Kasese-Kasese) neda abu kisanyakinia ailedakin Inangai akinyet (chomicat) akou Apotu do Inangai kisibosikinai oicolong nite kipesunete do aeama na esebit adere kopai antwanis tomakanu asina itim.

Akau loa ipak edit akau loa agwetakinere, abu Inangai

kepup akou epipil eponte ecir, kunye abu ber kotam atitingikin kaomite ebe aticepak epona loka acuuma kangor ngopengol.

Mut mut bebo abu nawok kolonok Shilla ebe apoloor areibo nei konye abu Nyenzi atipetkotema "Kiritingerber mut; asal adikikan adis bon kolomarete". Abu do Inangai kotam angirikin bebo adaun idakikan nati konye abu do areibo kogir cut.

Keanya do Shilla ka Nyenzi da alopet epono lo ajaar Inangai, engiinikini ikel kodannikin aikany apipil, apotu kolenasi abore.

Noican, kelemur abore ido ne agoisina Nyenzi ebe aisitor nlaketkwanakonyulaunin itim kerekakine konalakinido akou esubit bala ewarata arai bo nat na ikisita se shusioi toakwana. Nepa resikini Inangai alabira adumun akou esubit bala

atarukot, koanyuni Shilla da inacike ilunyara akou. Apotu do kigalatu asam Nyenzi. Apotu kongedasi abore da ngin acakar kinga kosodi akinyeta, alaketa ka iboro da icir apotu loka Shilla kaucata kinga.

Keanyutu itunga lurdunyasi ka albisi stingin nu ajansi apotu kokera aidiek neda do aduminia Nyenzi arereng abocokin akerit.

# Eponel o emaiata Iteso ikiroria

## Aika Ubrebu

MU Lokasuban aswam yap, abu kititingik
ganan lmodit apedor ka
maepol jokan, amaanakini
ukangin iborsyen keba
ki kwamaa, loepolok ka
disuk da, aimoriarite
ta, tiang, ka iraan tetere
tere.

ejo da lu agnete aiboi
maakwap, amuete ikiroria
keria kez korapiten iboro
e eza aijulanak inetamaka
una loka akwap (aiporo
tane) Amyutete, 'Okiru
ni ka Ojacor' araasi
arak tungakalu aurunikai
na ak na apolor edosi Okiru
kitongda araasi lu itunga
poni keuraun kapak
notor akwap.

ate bebo kes icie ikiroria
ipus icir ikiroria loka
kape, Onyan (anya),
ti (akopton), Okitui
ni, Oklu (nepaisi anya
akke).

tanak neta bebo kes icie
ria kotupion iyesesinei
ibaren kec kwape
ingin ama loka ibaratit,
imo ka Amaga - ejese
Haraut, Eskenti - ejese
tiang, nursariaat etoko
kol-kori - ejese loka
kit.

ikiroria amayo kotoma
akienta ka anyanyura
inanga lakamker kangin.
tariei aberu idwe
min atwakonsu, amayu

idwe aberu kangin Olupot - apolou ke ebe mam acepak ebuni aijar, konye ebuni aisunyar alout alupo. Kanencie emaikiniu Okurut naarai ebe elosi alapu kopuarete ikur ainyam.

Okirur da apolou ke ebe ekirur-ekirur ben, konyeebuni alocite. Epeduno/Apeduno ngesi ikoku yen ituruneretoma apedot(operia) yen epedokitui ariri ekek kanuka aiyamiyamitor 'Akiu' istere itimi aijar naka ikoka tetere ejari. Emaikinin ikoku Udeke arai edekanakiri korai yen emamei umuno kotoma aijar ke.

Itagui lukolo sek ageuno aidak ipolon agoun kokwap umikapi. Kopunu kangol aberu naetwakaka idwe arai keuru bebo ikoku eketario ipolon takokwap ketogo kosodete amoruno ikoku ngin. Ikoku ngin da apotsis amaikinekirur

ke Opolotarai Apolutkanuka somamaitor 'Akiu' istere itajari ikoku

Ekirur Apusun emaikinin ikoku apaarasia nuejaar etenget, nu epeunanatar itunga irarasia loka inyamat kodulai ainyam arai kededingar etenget.

Emaikinin ikoku Okello ari etupit ibangin (imwatuk)

Amarria ekirur lo emaikiniu ikoku yen kokale kalo elomann kotoma ationis arai kotoma ocan konye kokasi kosodi adumun ajakis ne apoloor ejok kaibar da.

Atia erai ekirur lo ajeker okale loejaasika aburnia epol. Man ekirur Atia abia ko Tete, konye ejai Karamoja ka Lira alborais nuiboya abar.

Toni lolo ejai Atia ediopet bon kaipol Teso kere ido ngesi ngopengolloemaeneneticie itunga ebe 'Ekukuleru' arai Atia, 'Orbbu'.

Emaikinin ikoku Omuria kaiborsit na ebwnsere kosodi emurta abmun kotona kosodi ailiatomi awai.

Kwape elosintor itunga iyesete aer kotoma atekerin kez, kanyakunari Akujda luke, ekotosi itunga da sinyakanakini kiro ta kitunga kalo kolo kopotu ketwakata, aburumokin kopone kalo amaanak in idwe lu neterititre erikot loka ikiroria mam engedakin.

# Elip K'maido Museveni edistri

## Na Henry Epolo

EMGES! President Yoweri Museveni, he ipogasi naka NRMaidopoloor Kaberamaido sub-district adoketait naka editarikkuur ebe tenere atutubet ngin apedori apotu kopenesis kere.

Etutuborakiratkul, akoko Hall to Kaberamaido ne atokokina ipatok lukubuku foka Kaberamaidoka Kaikki arvani 14/8/98.

Ejkt. Stephen Oyibo, atupiton apoltin etollong loka atukot naka iputok loko Kaberamaido ngin apolokiteetollong apuaran ngin.

Abakasi ipolok ebe karsida ikidloko Kaberamido itunga ka akeriante da, edolit apugan koyanga nei da kwape idistriktan loko Katangala ka Nunganto.

Ipolok lu ipu abakasi ebe apol angepamiktoka Soroti District Administration, ihere da yen ebe etonion apolo ko sub-district.

Abu Idi Amin kitarau ebuku to Kaberamaidoa sub-distrikt kokaru 1975.

Akira azie nu aponi kinerai emoriariton angales, aisnia, akore, akipika acolonin, irotin, adukete nu-ignignuna, ican ka arupian adiu nu ijukanakini apugan e sub-distrikt.

Ibukui iseri edukunitnee sub-distrikt lo Kaberamaido. Ebuku Kaikki lo ejaasi itemwan loka Anyara, Otaboi, Kaikki ka Bululu kede ebuku. Kaberamaido loejaasi itemwan loka Ocherei, Kabulubulu, Alwa ka Kaberamaido. Icie itemwan ejaasi utela ikany kadepar kede itunga lu ipu.

Anyariton ipolok President Museveni aipejokin Kaberamaido kanu arupokin emore naka itunga. Elipitaida abwinkitok ibukui kaitabet abud apupokin nu eominin itunga.

Alah eyalama kanu arusi
Agwelanaran lokotaun lo Soroti, Musa Rajab idarit arusi ke, Tina Zura, aipudunio kinga kapak na aweniata kesi egeta Naesabiti na atubor kore
Ejkt. Abdalla Skaban lo ejai Elangot Road, Kichinjanji, kotaun lo Soroti
Apuita nu pnomat Jonathan Maruka

# Ekotosi abenyak lu kolo adukun atukot

## Na Richard Akellem

APOLONetolong LC 5 Kami Haje Umar Okodel agecinjena ebe ebeit kesi lu kolo ajassi ajore naka UPA kosodete etomun airiamun adukun atukot kee na kalu ekiarak okame kinabiri kalo ebunit.

Erijenari Okodel nu kane rerumunoter ngesi kede LC5 kede ijaka kore loko ebuku Bukedea ko Lukioko Hall Bukedea eransi 1/9/98.

Abala Okodel ebe ebeit ngesi airiamun kede iketunga lada ebe onoriariton Omas Omeda, Omaru William, Aeko Abaadi.

# Clinton

## Any. App.1

kolef. United States of America kungtut na elap loka Julai kanu aiyatakit ationer atiemunokotene kanu adukun esomeroto. Abukotionik Eisp allumun Lubangakening kanu, aitacuan adoketait na adoloto atiemunokineta.

Okaeju kede isie da kore lu ejassi Kampala.

Abala Okodel ebe ebeit kesi adukun atukot kee koopu kosodete nilip agangat, kane ejai President Museveni kanu aingarakina ekiyarak akanin aitegranar aewamusene nu itolometeiurigin.

Eyarakot Okodel ebengesiber kepana idararsi kwape arucokinion.

Abu Okodel isor itunga loko Bukedea airaz aitup abekoi na niarakitai Bukedea, ebe kacai ko Kachumbala eikora kede Mbale ebe aitegran bobu ejie ebenyit. Abala Okodel ebe apotu kolo kesi kede itunga loko Teso kore kiningosi ejautene lo ejie ido ebe ibangiok bun kesi lu eomismotte nu ejie kwana.

"Edolit kwanu oni aomum nu aitupol aok akwap hon, mam eong apodo araiera itunganan lo DP, UPC arai inyo, konye araiebunti aitupol Kumi ejaari eong, ngesi kede akanjokene," abala Okodel.

# Engicio PCT kanuka 37m

## Any. App.1

Beowen Akabway le ijwanai kwana Uganda Revenue Authority, Grace Akello ka Charles Egoa lu kwanareaan MPs ka James Eceret lo kwape kwana idarario apoloko PCT.

Mam ber epresident eburukit ngul lu enyakikni PCT.

Apiainukaiaram itungakesi ebe ebukui ebe etwasamasi kitoritere nejaasi arucokitok naka PCT (Liaton Officers) kodistriktan loko Kumi ka Soroti. Konye ebuluwa lo ewadikao arassi 27/10/1997 kane ajai G W Oguli ka Isiah Omoyo (Lokatwan Iwana) Liaton Officers loko Soroti ka Kumi kotoma atupiton kesi apotula ipegataehe mam kesi ajenete nu apiai kangan.

"Airam itunga kanu akiro nu ayuara nesi abu konangak okaru 1995. Mam isio kijokuniisudipaadoi ikapun kanuka airam itunga. Mam

akanin (signatures) nu adekitai ebuluwan lo ailipa apiai kwape DLOs (Liaton Officers) loko distriktan loko Soroti ka Kumi arassi nukosi. Apiai da ngun ebukui mam ijakamitauyipiesin kesi," asiama ebuluwa lo ejukakitai angicak edwasamae lo apiai koyapesi e president.

Aiwadikaeta nu aitwasam apiasi vouchers ins kesi ebukusi ebe lu atacakitai kesi kesi 1 Okadapacka. Ewa du kdekton itunga lu ejarsi akanin kesi aiwadikaet na atacio kana nakesabiti 2/9/97. Konye abakasi DLOs ebe mam itunga lu arassi eewamakker. Mam da itacauntui iburo atacere apiai nu Nakesabiti.

Eyarakiton alibuneta akiro kanu ebe mam bobo ecarte nu awaitor naka acouma na ijoket akiro. kawadikaeta (fas machine) na odoli etiai ke 950,000/-ka aitwasamae naka 640,000/- kanu ebe ainomia aputosia nu akituk nu ejaanakino itunga. Mam ecai arai aponi tusi kinomireta aputosiaabeit kede ibure akotor

PCT aputosia nu akituk.

Aiwaikarta nu aponi kodumunitate kesi nodunitos ebe etuan lo ebe Charles Orengen ngesi aponi koinakiter ekonirakt lo ainomanar akruk naka PCT (59 kotaa loka 318,000/-kolap Januari 1997. Mam aputana ajenu abeti arai aponi tusi kotacitite Orengen ka ibore etodunitoter aiwadikaeta ebe arui 640,000/- etwasamatai kanu akirot kana.

Kageunet naka PCT aponi kodumunitete agangat naka US $ 105m kakwap nako Switzerland katu agwelia akituk-ko Tanzania aitwegel Iteso. Konye kotoma akituk 2879 nu atacitai eyau 1807 bon apotu kodoluta kokaru 1993. Nu edesina 1072 nu adolottuukus US $ 322,206/- kesi mam apedoreusindolum eroko ketubo apak na aigangio kana.

Kotoma kangon adolumion, akituk US kesi apinsi bobo kilapaarai kedaamu lo Arupio Agricultural College kosodi

do apugan kitapak agwelaru-nakakita itunga.

Eripota lokum president loka 2000 abala ebe ebu ainyakakin hingakke cut kotoma ansidok alookinetake abola Dr. Aongat kwap etolitolirawan.

"Mam nu aitwa ibaren elosins abukotior agnoto atiokisto apusin kangon kamamun amamas naka lokitwasama ton ni arimum. Ewamakker nat Dr. Aongat le kami awamisir 1000 kilolotoloto akimi emamere ibure toki siwamata," abole

Ayaiton PCT kwap Eceretapoi amam kano abungako akituk kamimitou nu kotoma alibuneta aru ebu apugan akiro arik eyaitoneleemamam

2.ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibay (September) 10-16, 1998

# IYEMUTO

# Abilun iwenan ko Tororo

## Na William Obudu

ITUNGA ikanykaongon lu starakitai otujakotem Kwapa, Tororo kano mam alamiintor euolo lokaskaru kale kex apoto stunga bu man cjomasi kobilutu kousdete ayangaur na mam cjoma.

Iwamanna nu akware na 22.08.98 ido arsi isirikaalei lukogwangeno, Dominic Owor, nipape ka Emmanuel

Opiokes edarete aihusi na apak ngin.

Apolon etem Kwapa, Ejkt Sinambo Oketcho, ngen abala ebe aponi itunga ikanykaongon lu owenirai kotem ke kobilaru kalingkware. Abala da ebe emamintar ngee kede ikinoria kalu awenirai naarai ebe arsi aswam kec isirkaknai wadik ikiroriu iwenan mere nake.

Acamunit Oketcho hon ebe apotui wenan kojolakiniisantin kec kotem. Ide ebe araasi iwenan lu kere lu elologaantai ko Malaba iwali akwar Mam da ajenasi ireria kec kwape edamunitere kes ilatosi kware ko Malaba.

Keja ngun da eyatakit Oketcho ebe etamakit apugan angican nukabeitkakini kano. Kewanyonoi Etop kede

ACAObik'ohuku Tororo, Ejkt Jailor Ogema, nesi abalar ngesi ebe kwape ejatotor itunga otem Kwapa lu iminomito apopongo ibeo nu iwamauna.

Kosudi Opio nges abakar angopongopot mam ber atakaminit Otem.

Owor nges abala ebe ajai nges otogoi kec kule Ogwangeno na aanyunia ngesi amotoka na epokoro kas ka itunga lu

akapito apopongo.

Eyatakit ebe abu amotoka na kobwou kalaro k'etem kousdete lu asomun kwap kousdete aihil amabusu ka arensokin iwenan amotokana.

Abala da Owor ebe mam nu apodori ngesi aswam kere naarai ebe idarete kesi etem kede akanin. Bon ebe abu koaparou ka CPE Bowaui Obosa aanyun epira engaara.

Ejkt Y. Opio iwonyari aseuno apaaran Naiareit (25.8.98) ko Katakwi. Kesi iarei bon aupasi komameete egangitok da. Aputo na Charles Opoiot

# Ebeit akutor ataparin nuko Kumi distrikt

## Na Richard Akellem

A ZAPAKEN nu igaare akipi nu emauste ibaren nuko Kumi kesi ebe istetisisi kere okaru lopelo, etijena lo epolokit ainteuto koprojekt loka Water for Production, Ejkt Luka William.

Inerasi kede Etop koyapenike ko Kumi eraasi 28-8-98 abu Luka kotemaebe, emunosi kesi aliosom apiyainu edeparete 90 million kanu aiteitenaidanun 5 lukodistriktulo Kumi. Eyatakit Luka ebe agoutu kopana kesi aitetenn edaamu loko Malera neda ebe ejatar itunga 65 eutaci aiwal, areny kede aibok.

Abala Luka ebe ebitet ber kesi arursk adama nako Malera naarai ebe etiono emase lo ibaren kangina noi, ekaulo ebeit do kesi aitiguar adamun nako Ngora, Mukura kede Mukongoro.

Eyatakit bebo Luka ebe erai Water forproduction eprojekt lo euto ainteunun ataparan nu kolo abokitai kede bobo aibok acie kingarak in erionget loka akoru kede ibaren.

Eyatar eprojekt lo eyapesi lo apolon Entebbe kosodi eyapesi edope bon in didi ko Uganda kere kojai Kumi ido kmorimorite Kule nako Uganda.

Abala Luka ebe, edaunos ataparin nuko Kumi aitetenn ebe, kogitarete kany e kesi abokin nu iteriak Mimoto.

Jau erai engineer ko projekt ngesi Francis Otai kosodi aracokiniton (co-ordinator) James Olanya kere lu abu Etop kodam elonion Kampala.

# Ecor Okoropot iriongeta

## Na Ronnie Ikara

APOLOKINITOK iriongeta lu egelngela ko Soroti distrikt kesi elipi aigatutun aboskinienta kec (Work plans) ntere epodorete aitopol edistrikt kotenas.

Atapolon CAO lo Soroti Raphael Okoropot ngesi etolomuni alitpangin egelokini aurianet na ayaitok ipolrok ko distrikt eraas 31/8/98 ko Lukilko Hall Soroti. Abala Okoropot ebe ebusakinit apotokinitok iriongetala egelngelasiereork wap catne icaututun aioingetakoriongetakee tetere kotoma apak na itolomunutarkesi abostokineta kec kotironoriton kesi atiokusoo kec kere.

# Apeg DPC nu ecamusani

## Na Richard Akellem

APOKOKINITON polisin loko Kumi distrikt (DPC) Samuem Onyai ngesi apegaki ebaluwa lo abakatar LCs loko Bukedea ebe apolnor ecamusana ko polis nako Bukedea.

Inerasi kede Etop koyapesi ke ko Kumi eraasi 1.09.98, abu Onyai isda atakakitaeebaluwa ngon kidokokite e kansila lok Otem Bukedea Meslam Oceger-Opus akan kotema ebe araasi ngun akimmi didi ilobete politisium ido amamete adis abettok kotoma.

Kanu akinui aarei nu abala atutubet ebaluwa ebe amuritai DPC abu Onyai kotema ebe mam ngesi ewanyunitor adis akinui yupiairetoyapesinke.

Abu kisam hon ebe adumunit ngesi ebaluwa lo esiirikit ngesi akiro nako Bukedea konye ebe arokotne kesi engierte akiro ngon. "Isomai isio katupitos abettok bon," abala Onyai.

Kotoma abalawa kale igerakitos LCs lako Bukedea Haji Uttar Okode teraasi 30/7/98 kotakanakitete RDC, erattur LC 5 Kami, Egingiran lo aysara, DISO, DPC kere loko Kami kede LC III Bukedea kidokokite ekaula Meslam Oceger-Opus akan, acupunitai ipolisin iwongon kimoriaritos apolokinton Police Bukedea A.I.P Andrew Namonyo, P.C. Okwalinga, PC Masindi kede D/C Wanyera.

Abu ber Hajii Okodel kolimokite Etop koyapesi ke eraasi 28.08.98 ebu ajokuna eponi lo adissianaritorebaluwa ngon itunga kodoo ido ebelasi ngesi aanyun nukce. Acupunit ebaluwa lo akiro akanykape nu ebe etodontios kisiomas lo arionon kede ecamusan lo ilapara noi. Kimoriaritos: 8. Ebe ne abu ekaula Ejkt Meslam Oceger

kitodik inapolokiniton Police Bukedea Andrew Namonyo nap iwongon lu autasi amom epiki leukadinikine engadaara koigo Bukedea kosodete ipolisin arocun isap ngun konye ebe aponi kolacakimio akaulo n'kitac 50,000/- kanginiliope.

E. Ebe emusago enaaba SD 09/06/07/98 na opoisikowenere ediope etuganan lo mam ebaluwa itipnarit, adsun aparasiaakanykauni ko Police Bukedea. Konye ebe kobala ekuil mam aiweni idis itungan ke polis adaus nawan 48." Kotoma omusago angongangon aponi lu awenirai kitatacai akinet 2 nu da abala airinario apolokiniton Police Kami," abala ebaluwa 3. Ebe akangursa abu emotoka imabu 648 UBN Omni Gokkonangiaecakan egali lo mam ebaluwa itipnarit emusago enaba SD 08/09/07/98, ebe

kosodete aiwen lo nam komare amukan po kousdete bebo sin lopounangitak neringe ebaluwa itipnarit ena alacakininike.

A. Ibe ne apumata ipolokit Okiwalinga kede bahut mam itipnarit kobaluwa, kolima 110,000/-Kadella lo ebe ejukariat alinganyingany (atatid ere lo ebe aintakakitae ketaikina kede emu akokotere imangin.

B. Ebe ejai einkom ipolisin loko Bukedea koyietete Imugou na ebaluwa (Erai A.I.P. Namonyo Emegin).

A. Ebe oyate ipolisin Bukedea itungakann kocupute ebaluwa in ebe ne abusio P.C. Okwale kede D/C Wanyunitor krapat lo ebe Abokit

# Esiekikin aurianet naka ICU toni 13.98

## Na Ewadikan Etop

EGIREGIRAN lokapolon loka atokot naka Itese Cultural Union, Ejkt Vance Omome, nges etijena ebe ejulakin apaaran na iriamunotor imoeban loka ICU kanuka aitutub Apaaran naka Emono.

Omome lo abunguni ko Kampala ne ayangaarit ngesi idwe lukonomero ke elaagano lo awore ko National Theatre nges abala ebe elipata MPu

ksiekikinai apaaran nginkitoto Namabii 13.9.98 aibois na 12.9.98. Alakara Omome noi naaraiabu enomero ke kiteleka kotoma awore.

Abala ngesi ebe apota kiriamunso ka Hon O'Max Onoda lo ebwoikit ebaku terere kairabet nakapolon lo abu kolimok nges ebe enyaraaritai MPu aurianetacie ko Mbarara erasoi 12.9.98. kanukangun elipitos kesi

kisiekikinaaurianet naka ICU papairan adiopet tete kesi da ejai kinos toma.

Elipti ICU MPu lu eraasi Iteso, ikakuletsu lako Makerere ka apolokitok idistrikitan lu erasii betasapakin aurianet nginkanu auran apaaran na enyarao Apaaran na Emono na eponereaitolosenen ilaaganin loka emonok ka ajusore kangol ekanu

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibar (Septem'ser) 10-16, 1998
IYEMUTO

# Arukoto iboomun itaunin ko Congo

## President Laurent Kabila loko DR Congo

koboro kalu estiai ainuvan nesi eipone lo temaret ajoresinesi nuko rwanda ka Uganda nu ebakai ebe esurokitos DRC.

Uganda nesi abu kocam ebe ejansi isirikalo ke toma DRC.

Kinshasha nesi ebala ebe emamete nu ineruna arai mam Rwanda ka Uganda demarete akne joresinesi ko DRC konye kocamakite ajoresinesi. Zimbabwe, Angolaka Namibia kanu naarai inganakinitos kesi adiji abenyak.

Abenyak da kesi ekeotosi ajoresinesi nu engarakinitos Kabila anyoun ko DRC ngesi konye epalarata kesi eje.

"Bapanakina nisi ido tworeit isio ebe epoite engarenok lu apupukin nisi konye mam isio ipalari eje eringa ineruna ido

keringa ajoresinei nuko Angola, Namibia ka Zimbabwe enynanako DRC" abala Arthur Zabali Ngoma mera neperai adolore alaro na idegei nako Victoria falls. Konyeketubupak, mam ibe abenyak lu eriekitos ne eneratar apulekinitek akwapin nuka Africa lu eriamuna.

Apetu abenyak lu luengarenik dBizima Kabara lolelo arai aupasia ke ka Kabilakurai dakolo eminista loka akrito kanu kokinga kasalata agola kaonaka ewoteri to enyaritai Elephant Hills Hotel.

Eministalo akiro nuko konga ko Rwanda anaste gasana ngesi amamoi uriamankiding kangun kalu eriamuna kede abenyak konye alosate kesi aitemdem asriaman acie na epote abenyak lu ajokin.

E diplomat lo ajokina airiamun na ngesi abala ebe eneraiotos kesi asubun spete na ebani awanyanar nui kamunitos aysura ko DRC uloewomitis ebe ebusi spete nginajokite kede isirikalo loko South Africa, Nigeria, Tunisia ka senegal.

Lunda Bululungeso sek abala ebe erai edege lo Zimbabwe esakit eboomun Kaitenui ka Lubuto apak na esabiti.

# Etepeg Emunyu Etonu kanu alup

## Na Jonathan Maraka

ABWAAN araun MP Amoris, John Emunyu ngesi alimo ebe emamei ibore yen eronokokisil lo alupok lepac etutubi kapugan, kwa ebolar E jkt. Ibm Etonu lo eboloboloote kangani.

"Etiaktat alupok kokisil Nuwok (nuko Tese) eransi nu ateker. Ejai okisil ebe apugan mam ocemak dasadem animan alupok. Ti ber kepuk or eitabo aitodan ne ebala ebe kodemai alupok." abala Emunyu kmokasilo Apal-Aheru, ebola Komolo, etem Wera, ne esupista kesi aseak, Namakaga.

ACAO: lo Kapclebsong, Isaiah Imamet ngesi apulekit aurianet.

Abu Etonu koitmok aseak ebe

mam akiro nu alupok etemima naarai ebe ebeit aitac esolo lo alupok.

"Ejansi le ebalasi ebe okisil ngol (lo aitac esolo lo alupok) erai to Buganda. Ti bo koleje iwadikatai ebe Buganda Land Act." abala Etonu

Abwaan Francis Onapito Ekomoloit ngesi abala ebe akiro nu ngesi ajaot kede awamusinesi aarei etodunit ebe akokurana ngesi.

"Dodo lo emamei ber aawam da apoluuksek alaro nisa, mam iseunete," abala Ekomoloit lo isisianakini Makerere University korsida Edita loka apapula na The Crusader.

Abwaan Yuventino Joseph Opio, lo ekot aseak aijen ebe ejastatar ngesi da ka ediguri, ngesi abala ebe akimit nae cunot

Etonu: Mam akiro na alupok etemitos

etaske minnes na ebe udinatidor Amoris ikaru 10 mam ebwokitai.

"Karaida ajiami la abwokiton, konye mam atakaneite, ebitoros akiro nu ipu. Ngol karu emamei yen einakinto akiro," abala Opio.

# Anger Etonu 'atubio'

## Na Jonathan Maraka

ABWAAN araun MP Amoris, Ben Etonu lo ikaru 59 lo apolou ngesi agir nu ebe abalaree be eraingesisenong lomojong lo edolit ayangar aitub 'Olupara'.

"Emong lo eroko ekorieil Koleje bebo napa ijakarete yesi Etonu (toma airabet na) CA, kemojongi bo wori?" abala Etonu kanurianet na esupista kesi abwaak kmokooni lo Apal-Aheru,

eitela Komolo, etem Wera, Namakaga na atubor.

Alimunit abwaan Francis Onapito Ekomoloit lo ikaru 36 ebe arraingesi (Ekomoloit) etobalo apedori airiemeleku itta emong lomojong lo aupiton arsmwa komam bebo apedori aawam ido adolit ayangar 'Olupara'.

"Ekot asean emong lo eruo, lo esipo. Nes bo nong lo." abala Ekomoloit komam alimunit ekiror lo abwaan edio.

Ekomoloit: Etoba lo epedorit airi emeleku.

## Ekot engarenok acoit nu inerasi

ATUPITON RDC lo Kumi Lt Robert Nambafu ngesi ekwenyaa luelimilimitai ebe eutasi bobo aiwadika isap ko Kumi Distrikt alomar aitutuorio aitiji apugan naka President Toweri Museveni.

Enera Nambafu nu kosomero lo Osopotoit PS araasi 3.09.98 na etitingia ojokotau ADRA esomero lo adaun aiduk mama ejaasi auriak ka engarenok luko Kumi.

Abu atupiton apolon eicolong LC 5, Ajkt Margaret Ilaborot kokadakite noi kobala ebe edumunitos kesi akiro ebe adaun aitolom isap lukotem Kachumbala ka ayangaar da aitutuoro abongun aitiji apugan naka emuvement.

Kingit Etop apolon eicolong LC 5 Kumi, Haji Umar Okodel akiro nu, abu kotema ebe mam nu ejeni ngesi nu ikamunitos akiro nu cut.

Kingisi bonat DISO loko Kumi, Edward Bugusha, abu kopegak kosodi atemar ebe mam ngesi ejeni ne edumonitor Ilaborot akiro nu naarai kaijen ke, ejai ayuara Kumi noi ido emamei aiwadika isap na elosi akonye katutubet adio kere ko Kumi.

Ikatunga, ekot engarenok acoite nu inerasi aitelekarit akiro nuikamunitos ayuara.

Ekot duc engarenok arai bo idio ituan aingic akiro nu elimuni kodoco. Arai mam ipedori adalacun akiro nu epedorete aitodoikin atekker kere toma oupa lomam edungei.

Emina apugan ayangar abe na kwape abeit kosodi aijukun isirikaalei abunere aitolitol itunga lu emamei adiakaret ko Kachumbala. Kere kijeni ebe duc aiboiso nu ijukanario isirikaalei aswam etapit aitaanyunit itunga atiokisio nu elangir nu egelegela.

Iteete kwana yesi ebe ipu apaarasia nu apolok nu inumunumio ko Soroti kanu ayuara kana ejai kwana.

Mam ikoto ayuara na erai abunere koleje kwape kwana bobo adaun.

# OPALAKIRO

# Adak na amamu apuponoro nes emunaarit Iteso

Apolokiton PCT, James Eceret, irerei acuuma naka BUWOSA, Bukedea. Akuroki engarenok loko aseun imeeban lu ilelebete aiboiso nu ajalakisi Grace Akello, Charles Egou kicie da

Na Nelson M. Ocheger

KOTOMA osabistin idis lu atuboron, apotu Iteso lu ipu komonyutu noi kewanyutu ebe mam Teso obu kodam arereng na adumun emisista ekaulo na President Museveni aseun itunga 16 araun iministan.

Aporu itunga lu ipu kitejenaasi akiro nu aomitosi kesi ebe kesi einakinnete Museveni engeri asekuni idis itunganan ngen ko Teso araun emisista. Mam eong akoto atupakin nu ipu. Konye akoto eong abongokin nu abu ngerigiran lo ikamunito nu ayuara kede apiai kotoma okamulo loikanyet kotoma Kumi distrikt, Ejkt Abaadi Aeko, kijena, vuda ajaasi apapula, The Monitor na etolomunitaiaraasi 7.08.1998.

Kotoma aiwadikaet kangin etijenaarid jkt Abailebe mam Museveni obu, kotoma apak kangin konsunite itunganan yen ko Teso ebe naarai apotu Iteso lu ipu konsunitos Ejkt Paul Kawanga Suomogerere

kotoma aseo na epresident na ajakasa okaru lo 1996. Karada erai na adiopet kotoma akiro nu einakit Museveni epaborit Teso, mam erai na egogong. Anyoka aomitor eong kwangin?

Nasodit, ekisit lu epol ko Uganda kere (e constitution) ngesi ebala ebe ebeit apugan na kokidong (central government) atiakanakin idistikitan apiai kede agangat adiskere kotupite, kejaasi acie da, enaaba lo itunga konye mere aise ikuru kobule.

Naiyareit, aomit ebe kwape epuakatar itunga lu etepegitos Museveni kotoma aseo kangin, adolit bodo Ejkt Museveni aswam kagogong kanaka ainapun itunga ngol. Idiopet koboro lu ti ebeit ngesi aswam nges aseun Iteso lu iyatakinaaraat iministan tetere igangakinetengesi aisup Iteso alomar omuvument.

Aso, inyobo do einakit Iteso mam edumunitoseiner lo epol agogong kotoma apugan kana? Emonikina eong ebe mam oni icamunit apuponor bonik. Arai cut mam oni kipedori acamuriar, mam oni epatana adumun agogung kede operuto lo kipedori oni minnom kanaka amariautum ester lo iui kare ejai apugan nakokidong. Ipu ainyunotami akoto eong aimor kode kayes kanaka atkagogong ebe mam Iteso epedorito acamanar kanaka aitupol matubet kec.

lu akotosi kesi koseunai araun iministan. Kotoma apak kangin, abu eong kesisiau ebe mam abwoikinitok wok apotu kocamanaros. Abu kidelelu ebe bala kesi kere akotosi kesekunai ajautu o cabinet. Nesainakini Teso, karaiduerai adiopet kotoma atutubetu nu ejaasi kede itunga kalu ipu, edumuni iministan ierei bon (Cst William Omarskede Col. Jeje Odongo).

Naiyareit, ekaulo na alonsarata Ajkt Grace Akello na arai apolokiton Presidential Commission for Teso (PCT) kede Ejkt Charles Egou lo arai egerigiran kotoma orionget kangol opaliament, abu eyapesi e president kilip imeeban luka Parliament lu ko Teso aijukar ikirioria lu itunga lu aomitos kesi ebe apedorete aiyatakin alosikeneta nuka PCT. Abu eong kesisiau ebe ketamata abwoikinitok wok aizerun, mam kopotu kocamanaros cut. Keja acie da, na egesi obu koinak eyapesi e President apolun PCT kede almuwar Iteso.

Kedol aseruno na itunga aswam oriongeta lu lagogongora ekonstitusiyoo kwape nat commissionno, abu komunitutcut. Apotiyieotop kijibabotomebe ajami imeeban luko Teso lu aubotook apolon lu akotos, kwape aanyumet, atomar (Kiric) lo Ajkt Ruth Alm onala asaareit. Presidesu Museveni araen ameebu na Uganda Land Commission, erionges lo ikamunitu mi alapok nuko Ugnada kere.

Abu kededelu ebe ajai engarenok icie, lu mam elomunitos ko Teso, aiketakin sigang asnano nu Ajkt Abu. Nu kere, kede acie kesi

aanyuneta nu sigang mam oni kipedori asa kanuka aitupol Teso wanyuna ipi ebe kote Itesu lo ejaniugerekkig apugan kempima jyokok lekenimutuk, mam enangitos na iriongeta kwape ja ikamunito nu apolok itunga (Uganda Land Rights Commission) nlo ikamunitomu koda (Service Commission, ikamunito nu abu (Land Commission), kede nu anisisi (Educational Commission), kenyama (Electoral Commission) eyait nu angales (Service Commission), Resident Decommissioner, President Secretaries, ka ice da Iyatakini, ido keusin egitarakane ejani naa naka kane, mam oni cat ko atosum apodernut naa aupa kede ipekik ni at ipedori oni aturian (executive power). Inwanyona ipie be karatba Iteso lu adakanoi apotimebe ketaidakayin anacan arai bo nat abe idumuni ipi kengana jit Teso eduk kipukkalimite epederianakasabi iuip iu vei ebanu kere apak karaiila nipot eyaposi ko.

Karuka ngon, eka lu agerun onnemunok ko wok. Konye abu ean kipedori aswam nge seniorityono ajik keso atunga lu mam etani kede kesi eotokfon an idumunitoser si masuni ejautene loko Teso. Na mes oni ageun acamanin apuponor.

ETOP Naiwongoset, Otibar (September) 10-16, 1998

# Kenyekikisi alait, igangata lu eseny

IPA - Egeart adekana eseny kwape abekoi korau n adek.
Kwana araun ajokit na ijaanakini etunganan kotoma akurian ka anengunit.
Konye do kagiroto ipapero wok, nebarai, edekaki eseny? Mam. Kamorata ka kesi ainingost, narai ejai eseny tomo wok kere ido ekot, aiswamanar koipone lo aimor aomisio, aganganakin ka alalakaint lu aduutu adumun.

Ekot oni ketodikisi kes amina ka airtunit ebe mam eseny erai adiakaret arai aiticanet, konye ibore yen epol nes oni ajenun irotin lu ikopar adeka na.

Erai eseny adeka na adau alomun atukot wok, ido oni kwape imeeban, ekot aitig nes nepepe, konye mere aigir arai bonat aila ekamutu nes.

Odongo Tom, Ngero.

# Arai na
# arereng
# na idwe

IPA - Abu apugan kobala ebe idwe iwongon kangol ekale lu esiomete puramare asiom komam auriak aitac isingin lu esomero. Akiro ngun aponi kolemarsi? Arai ejaasi koialakisi idwe ikamutu arereng ngin.

Akoto eong ajenun nu abeit naarai apujo kwana eong ebe kotaun ebakai ikoku aitac ngin tamu, Inyo ber iinakit oni kwangin?

Acamunit eong ebe emamel itunganan yen mam ekoto arereng kakwap kana. Aso erai ngin arereng na idwe, mere oni lu apolok.

Ejaasi idwe icie lu emamete kede auriak erai kwana ngin akoc arereng. Konye mam yesi icamakitos, inyobo ber erono? Eilpit kitacautu tetere do isio iteman amunio koki kanen.

Okoboi John

# AKRONIUM

## Akoraki Amongin nuka MU egaali

Na Mwahinu Akabway

MP suheru kanuka Kumi dornikt, Christina Amongin, Anora ngeoi pac skoraki, atokot naka Mothers Union kokamushke Ngarat Church of Uganda egaali hotetel kasa, allapatana aswamisinei makotokot ke Ngera.

Apakina Amongin airme ailip na esabiti nepepe kede

Amongin: akora egaali

Aerotayim baks Si, Philips Ngora, Apolokitos Mothers Union ko, Ngora, Egiladresi Okokanges epaetegaalkkokine, loka atokot ke, lokarete do amechan kere.

Abu Amongin&amp;Giyamechan kere makatokoktan asgarapkin ngeoi koisianakim idaw, kacut apesar akiro nuka Girl Guiding Abu MP ikwanya mokatotokereko Tesuaricka

ajenun jokan apedorosio nuka idawa ka sigang altojokaeda asismanna idwe lopesur "Ekot noni maatoto kikaman aroreng naka asisman natitai na eyaunit apugan," abala ngeoi.

Ailipasimi kesi engarenikit Rev. Kokas Edait, akalitemutektan arai Rev. Oketakokasookinako Ngeru lida abu kibatis idwe 26.

## Aimony akaasila

Na William Okefio

AKAASILA suheru na ehnoskit etem Orange, Amuria ko LC3 ko Katakwi dornikt, Florensa Akonyo ngei alimu eho ejai kwana ngeoi etamit singainga lu eyaiten asissia naka itunga kalu apolok kodistrikt adarmakot etem Orange da atukot nakaissisia kangas.

Abala Akonyo ehe epada ngeoi Orange da ajenun nuka asissia naka itungakulu apolok tetere uinpedor itungalumam ejamantini asismanka aiwadik da ajenun asismanka aiwadika katasika epolok kesi.

## Esisianakin eswamak apugan nuka ekiliokone ka eingorane

Na Ronnie Ikara ka Moses Okalebo

EPOL amamun aipin akinrou ikamantins angor ka ekiliokone (gondro) kocaalai adepar kenaurin, ibore da yen itaguikit apolio kotoma atutubena noipu.

Arantan itunga koyapesi ka RDC Soroti, William Enyima ngeoi alimum ingan egolokini aurianet na apaarusia auni ko. Eneku Village Madera Soroti araasi 25.8.98. Abwokine ngeoi RDC lo Soroti Valenian Bagama kwape epejonon lokangosibib.

Ayantok iriongeta lu apugan ko Soroti doterickirisi ajaduna

aurianet ngin neda aponere kisisianakinara kesi nu ikamunitin sitigagung nu arucakit nu ekiliokone ka singor.

Etnonget loka Gender and Community Development, erionget loka UNICEF ka apugan nako Soroti dornikt kesi etemonokinete aurianet ngin.

Abala Enyimu ehe aloukit apugan nako Soroti astiji amamun aipin kotunga koc kaitelokaarit angor lu edicalonitai lapi mam cut ejenete apedorosio koc.

Abu da ngeoi kimuarita inomasiu icir lu enyakter atutubena kasi kosisib da ailip

itunga akokit ayangaanasir idwe koc lapesar asisman.

Abu da ngeoi kilip itunga sigang asisman na idwe twongorittai EPE (nada) shala ehe ajok alosikinet ke kitubokok akisar amamun aipin kotunga.

Angston CAO ko Soroti Raphael Okoropotngesi abala ebeajaingesi alosikinetmakos aitegrar ekamulo lo idwe ko Soroti tetere ehe epederete idwe amisiikinapedorosio koc esokiraikikik.

Eiraban loka LC 3 Soroti Raymond Ekadu ngeoi edonpet kotoma ipejok kalo koputu kitubakno apaaran ngei.

## Ekor Ilaborot Akidia

Na Richard Akellem

ATUPEFUN apolorexicolong LC3 Kumi, Margaret Ilaborot ngeoi ecor angor nuko Ibakedeasuae, amwangjikede aicehokit esiomit engarenok koc nangor.

Enera Ilaborot kaurianet na ajaikina ebuka Brakedea kaling apolokitok LC 3 Kumi kingarenikte Hajji Umar Oketel kede L.Ca ka ijaka

bakebukaibakedeakerearassi 1.09.98.

Abala Ilaborot ehe edilu kwana angor aicaaris aingarenok nu apotu kesi akulepek kosentu Eyanakit Ilaboron ehe egoi aswam kesi atamit ajiun apedorosio na angor kere konye ehe ne elomakinatubohonucie angor amwangit nu apolok koc, ehe itotolikin.

"Esabit bala itunganan atamit adokar kaju ekitoi adengun aristo do bebo icir aibwosit akeju kokwap, kecakun, aso kimusanganos kotaukaeretelsobikere," abala ngeoi.

Nasyati akiruna angor, idwe kede angaleskoi LC 3 Kumi, Rosa Tino ngeoi abu kicur angor ajaanakiri aurianeta konye ebeonere ajalakit ikiliok

## Ekotenen

### Ekotene ne

### Ekot ne ne

## Keloloun amotoka ocaalo kilepunos amakio eibworo

Na Christine R. Insa

KOTOMA otasnin kede aiboisio nu ariri koc ka sigan nu etetbai troiin lo apolok, mam awanyamio naka emotoka erat ibore yen aumokin kotunga. Konya kotoma ocaaloi lu awai cirk, ne emissat atensar ehe "bala awasia na akwap", erai emotoka ibore yen jiangakini atutubet adepar.

Acumumitnong ehe yeni lu isiometed wapakwanavu itunubata emotoka bala akipi tai napo duc idilasi. Idokananata yeni een arat kosi kami obnisienne aiboisio egeingela ka aitolonio da iboro egeingela.

Einsere koi susikounin, aswamisio, opucito ka aiboisio acie da nu idila itunga alosenen arai ne iboyoto kwape nat otasin. Na kere idilasnwam koraikotomaailelidone itoritosamotokan neni idilasi troiin da lu etarte karatida orsasi ansairon.

Abu kalolearitenenicite-ingutai arai teni awasia naka akwap, kaosili ajonun ehe erai emotoka ibore yen egitakina. Iriri aiboisit na ocor ido karatida ikamio agarita kami, mam erai emotoka ne ibwokirete edia agwittasar. Ejenne lo alosit lo idila nesi ipadin kede aibat kakeje.

Ain ne aloloara emotoka atutubet akote anya nu iswapis itogoi itemari ehe arai lukojokotasi (RadC:was) mutoko adrisite atutubet akkor inyamat. Naarai ecicing amorokan katutubet kana, ngin itunganan kere akoto ajenun ibore lolo alositor emotoka atutubet.

Ajai do idwe, isap, apesar, ikilick ka angor tai agong toni emotoka ba. Ngin itunganan arasun kanepa ajai. Angor nu epaasi apiyeta akerun kede iritei ka ajaanin, arai akalayun ka noipullan- kanokangan lu autasi eilosi ka aipoore. Ajaasi da lu icipete autoi!

Kingdiarere lo amoran, lo ajaasi anya, orwo itungak ilatakinoi idore kano ehe aitolian ere. Adolore ngina kiriamun do erony kere ore lo. Apotu kidelasi anya okere katipei tai ido aibois na aingium tsingin kana aswam koc akapakina do kwi ehe 'anapanio tai' anyoun kocaalo koc "toto otero", amairen bala 10 kadepar do kesi abongun kakeje. Ain do kewanyatu.

Konye kenepokant, ajaasi lu apoi ayalongong noi kedola emotoka atutubet, kacar obere. Abu kidilantite kokao ehe edio idore lo alosi atutubet koc arai aten ayangarit na iuriat yen katutuber yen eswamai remicor arai idio yen eja edeka kadaku napolin kairenicit.

Nesi cickaibirur apak keturiar nuriat lokatutubet kana adiope ebongorekockeda emotoka apugan, koraaki indotoka akakaun kauje kodipidpe atorob eibworo noi ehe 'okwe atwana ikakoka.' Abuokokuda koraiak aporun komotok aemoromoroi amijong ehe shang amonyun eisram. Nu ajaasi kesi no ehe kepoint koyangariter itatari amijong kana idlopet amokran ne ajai okoke le iswamui otasin. Ketukano do amotoka ore kornam lem ngun iswamuanar abu amijong na hon kites amotoka kopone kalo lem apesia atutubet koc: atesin hon!

Katutubet kere emamei ibore icie ejemete itunga ehe ehoi amotokan awomere kobokec arsi ainar kesi kilema caat atra. Mam ikorion idio da, etengei nepetai ngol karn. Nesi da orokiatar troiin ebeete aiboisio kwa kana. Kowomoum etau ajjat naka angor kaiboisio kana. Eswamak lu apugan da ajenete itunga ehe otero asanganakinete amotokan koc. Inyobodo itodunit na? Ibere apolo konye bo? Ekote nen.

## Komorata ikiliok kede angor aswamisinei kokalia

Na Israel Omunyaki

AGEUN anonya eanyunitos angor naipu ican kane epaasi ikiliok koc kakwapin kere tom Teso wok da uepera. Ijakitos ican ngul angor wok isunyitin amijong da adepar ikiliok. Kolo anonya emikiton ikiliok angor ainyam akokorei kohalierte da ehe arai kenyama ejakirete akokorei angor amamun aur Etodunit cut nu ebeobisokola kailanawarisiokangan kede esabet koc naarai kwana enyantor angor akokorei komam ebe atisess otakanskim.

Konye num kwana eroko angor emodisa aremokit aswam na epol. Arai enyoutu ekiliokin keda akoberu aswam nicur nepepe, ekoriste toni iswam idiu lu edidete kesi. Konye kedaan akora, kolomakini aberu do hon aitolot aswamisinei nergeiagela. Aberu ca napo emakmio emeleku adakit ainyakar

ore kolosiekiliokitkomamibore yen etingit cut. Aciepak kolomak do ber bohu aberu arara akito arai amuete edialokwi.

Kedololi ore, kedaan akoru, ejai bohu ekiliokit alimokin aberu ke aijai kin ngesi eicolong. Kibokin je orwa do aswamisinei kokwamanen itolomi je ascomta do bon tosi ne ewaaiaakwap.

Ayangor ber akipi nolonget ejai do ngesi alosite. Kemamun akipi inyek do jaku gore aivekolikinkobaladehe "onuno ijo ehe amarari kolo eong akakituk bukus kano abola." Mam nat naepiedori aberu aswam. Eje boho aberu na aibwok amor nicir. Karasdaejeni aberu asiak egaali mam je eciamakini ngesi aitwasam egaali alosio ocor kobala da ehe "ibunit koko ijo ore lo kede egaali?"

Kebongu aberu na ocor ejai aingisita nuinyamat. Epedori aberu

alimokon okilenike ehe emamei edia konye eja je ahmokin aberu aitwasam ucor naaru ekoto ngesi ainyam.

Kwape emameor edia ore ejai aberu na alosit anisun ikwi. Konye nat boho ebonguni aberu na kede ikwi ejai je arestar kobolada ehe "Ijobana eong lopola anyam ikwi bala ettang?"

Epedori do kwana araan isawan laapaanet lu epurio etengei kiobireretedo bobongun ido alemun iuitiginkanu bil aberu akorikina epege katipei. Eyau aberu edia aciepak kipudakin elepet atubatuk kokoto ainyam- aking napo ica adepar kosabete aberu ka idaw eimajejelete akipi ka acree bon.

Idoroki aberu edia ejai do kwana ngesi agrar accom akuma kanu ainanyakina okilenike inyamat. Edautuinyamatakokoreejai je aingit aberu ehe "anibo alungi ka? Ejai do

aberu airingakin ngesi alungi ke kosalete do ngesi kede idia yen edite kano awerta aceur. Kedantu kesi ainyam aberu ngesi inyukari asaanin togo kiboyei je olope. Karasda awakunakiprouibuntakanimancut. Kedolum do isawan ludumg ejai do ekiliokitakonokinailong. Aberucabo yapoya ebeit adakakin je akipi nulonget kede da ainyakan kaleya.

Na duc ijakini angor wok isanyakinet amijong naarai ekwamakilai kesi aswam na mam iriamamara kede agogongu koc.

Nesi nat nu auri. Arai kedau aberu aubuarikokayipilbobongru adaman siiticaneta nuipukane ejai okilenike. Acepak manyeidakit ikelokukobala da ehe eliasa.

Arai kedekakin ikoku aberu cabo yapoya ebeit eyangar ikoku adakin. Arai esparonkesi kere adekismam je ecamani aingarakin akoberu aidak

ikoku nepecepe da.

Mam ibore yen itet kane ijai oni konye ejai do oni da ikilick aijakit angor wok angosibib tetere kes da iyalamasi kotoma okalua wok.

Aswamisnai nupederi oni eingarakinaangor wok kosnuta: ailet igorn, awomikinaberu akipimapoin arai epolokit ngusi aswam, aidak idwe ka acie da. Epedori ekiliokit da aitunyomokinakim.

Mam cutorai aiwomicomamajokan ijo ekiliokit ajalakit ekiabazoliorit ida indar toroibers ebo naarai itney aritigi akituk bukus aberu. Okwe kelimotu angor amorata einer kede aswamisinei da nu ebeit amoran.

Ilot ijo akwapin kalu akwangak iwanyani ijo ehe emorete kwi aswamisime kokaluknokere. Mam kwi cotetidakhin aswamisio ketoigi. Ejai do oni amorun aswamisinai kokalia wok tetere angor wok da edisiar aswam.

ETOP Nainungonot, Otlibar (September) 10-16, 1998

IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

# KAURIANUT

## Ebajet ka KTC

Na Chru Osekeny

KUMI Town Council neu etutub ebajet loka 174,689,283/-kokaru 1998/99 kotoma asirianet natskokina ekansulo kera korai apolon eicolong LC 3, Francis Okin engareneko araasi 24,98,98. Aponi kisingarenitete nu angalon, asirman nako pursimare, inelin ka adumanakin laskoma aiduk izuman Kumi quiloenin katipet nui.

Ketukokinen isirigin ngai 174,689,283/-kore, emuno KTC aitwasam 174,633,466/-kiolemno 55,717/-bon. Okani loatubor 1997/98 aho Kumi Town Council kitunubita ebajet loka 169,339,750/-konyo 154,466,931/-bon apotu kodumonos.

## Etutuor ikalaanin

Na Cheis Osekeny

OJOKOTAU Irish Aid nes ngang aitutuoronaaswamak oyapnoolu apuganko Kumi diserikt.

Aho CAO nako Kumi, Rose Ochemkokoranakaswamak ngul lumoriaritosikalaanin, edarak iyassin (Office Attendants), ka izie lu adokenta kanu ahalaan ker, maaiimanaraasi 28.8.98. Aponi kitutuoroi nswamak 35 lu ahala ayaiton nu eswamak ko Kumi, Lucy Francis Amulen ebe emurokit epona loidaret iyapenin ker, ka aijaanar ipejok laskoma awanyun likapoloikka.

# Ajalaki CARE aiduk adekis ko Kidongole

Na Richard Akellem

ERIONGET lekojokotau lo euta siteteunun adekisis mudidik ko Kumi District Health Project, CARE nesi ajalaki aiteteun adekis nakotem Kidongole kobuku Bukedda.

Lo erucokit CARE kede adukis na adekis kobuku Bukedda korai atupiton CAO lonyait Bukedda Vitalis Oswan ngesi etijemari nu kaurianet kana ajaskinaubuka Bukedda kiding ayaitok LC 3 ko Kumi kede LCs, ka ijaka kera lukobuku Bukedda araasi 109.98.

Abala Oswan ebe ajalaki

Oswan: ijalijalas

CARE aiteteun adekis nako Kidongole kolosi do Ngero ebe naarai ijalijalas luko

Okodel: engita ijaka

Kidongole airitub asingo, ingami kede amatapalin kano CARE antegear aduko.

"Mam isin ibukini eprojekt lo tomaottanga, iwotokini isin ikulepek otunga lu ikilasi noi ido kokakaraka kwa etodunata luko Ngero," abala Oswan.

Akaulo kangun abu ber apolon eicolong loka LC5 Kumi, Hajji Umar Okodel kilebuel, CA, insinire zide juka kere luko Kidongole koodi singitingitnu skirokanu. Abu apolon eicolong LC III Kindongole, Charles Ekwam kotema ebe eritutos kesi amatapalinsek.

Motimet iretoni Margaret Baborit na ebwoikit Angor nuko Bukedea ka Kidongole

ko LC 5 kobula ngak asamun ebe traan kera ikalanyuk imangala ane egeranete, aidok ane abala ilabunuk.

Lo Ezen Kidongole Kisi Fascal (karen kule) kolimiak. Ecolong ebe itanga kitumun ngin tutulika inaktnu nakaasak.

Abo Okodel kilebuel Ekwam ebe aru ikilasi epedori awamari ngin "Epona ani ikunukini na aramun itunga kami, akku okei adekis! Apolon ebi nicorakin itunga Kidongole alamar ijo abala Okodel.

# Mam etem Mukuju edukuni iyapesin

Na William Otusla

APOLON eicolong LC 3 Mukuju, Toros, Jorem Obbo nges egir adukokin etem etogo lo iyapesin luitetet naanui ebe epolotia loka aiduk. Konye do ebe elosi ngesi aiteteun aduketasi nasek sesi adekis. Alimuni Obbo nu kisyapesika araasi 29.08.98 ne adolokitor Zoqenges asisirun nu apolo naka etem ke.

Abala Obbo ebe karaida esumunitorsek nges adukokin etem etogo ke, supio aisek, ebe apolon denot etasi lo aiduk.

Eyatakit ngesi ebe erui ngin aicanican apesan, adokun etogo acie kojai ber lope ebe epedori nges sitereun.

# TORORO

Obbo: ationor aitodolikin aisarmanet

Iyapesin lukwana ejai etem Mukuju toma kes ebeito erionget loka loka adeketa. Abu apolon etem Mukuju,

Nicholas Orokodi kiticau epona icanar etem ke kobala ebe ejaasi nges atacak esolo 2,715 konye ebe olap luly araasi 714 bon atacito esolo. Koarai do ngun apiyai 8,480,000/-ne erui 26.29%. Eyatakit Orokodi ebe ebeit nges atukokin apesan kere 33,241,000/-.

Acamunit Orokodi da ebe aru ketukka e district enter ke loka 35% mam cut etem ke epedori adukun iyapesin luitetet.

Abala da Orokodi ebe mam apesannu esolo elomete otem ke tenan. Kolap Februari ebe atukunit ngesi 20,000/-bon koodi 69.000/-kolag Maaai. Kakere do ebe 10.7m/-atukun

# Agiri akeritor iboro omotokan k'Ocamute

Na Gilbert Engimu

AGWELANARAK lakonokoni lo Ocamute - Koloin, Kape kes ecorakan agwelanar iboro kec kainapakina konye mere akeritor amotokan. Apolon eicolong LC I Koloin, OkeIlo Anthony nges etolomuni aiccertanna araasi 20.08.98k/Ocamute nerumunatar kesi kanu aisimik agwelarak akeritor ikec iboro omotokan ido ananganario korot.

Esiponokinete kwana agwelanarak acok kec okokoro dodo yen agwelan esekuni nuekoto. Agwelaram ediopet Abau Michael nges

# Ejai kwana ekisil lo Alupok.

# Adol apak ijo alosit adumun atutubet kon

Isipedorit do kwana Ekisil lo Alupok lo etutubi Airabet na Apolon okaru 1998 itunga luko Uganda ajant kede aupok koipene kalo erai, lo etenit, Ijaikit Ekisil asnara na ajant kede alupok mama ejaasi ikulepek kere kede etwasamak da kere. Bicasinit da abwinikin na ejai kiding naka alupok nuka mailo, alupok nu itunganan ilope sobe (freehold) ka alupok nu ititingikitai iee itunganan kotoma acamunara kede ilope alupok ngun (leasehold); ido itacannit ikisila lu ikamunitus jaut kede alupok.

MAOBIT Ejaan kwana alupok nu aramunito toma okisila ide ecanrakit ekisil erismamak alupok abejat kesi ikaru kere kwape ecanrakime luka mailo ka mi edumunamete itunga ikulek, kotoma teutubet 237 (1) (a) nuka ibisila kalo ke Uganda, epedorrit itunga adumun ahilonian na alupok, Edukuma Diterikt Land Bondo karui ahi adik ka alustanakin ahilonian karui alupok kami erismamak airumun. Epedorrit aijalakin alupok nu irumunito araasi nu itunganan ilope kotoma teutubet na 237 (4) (b) na ekisil.

Eorakaki ekod alupok nuka mailo (nu akori ekahaka itunga kwape isat kalo kalo ajekuka kakumun ke), kocamakite da ituan ajant kede alupok ngun ikan kere. Alupok nu ititinginikanin etwasamak da epedorrit ahi adik kotoma ekisil kalo itetet, koricitete aamun ebe epedorrit ikulepek alupok nuka mailo arai ngul lo ejaani kede alupok ker ikulepek alustakin ahilonian karui aittingikan itunga atin asant alupok kes.

Eponin adokun Enteme lo isingin kalo Alupok (Land Fund) kotoma Okisil lo Alupok luitetet karui aingaranakin ikulepek alupok adumun alupok kilwanamarte ibujui lo epatana adumun

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otlibar (September) 10-16, 1998

IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

# Eretu LC3 kanu e rabbies

## Na Ivan Engoru

APOLON eicelong LC III, Bululo-Kalaki, Emmanuel Euryya Egwaya, egusi imama aitagel erono noi itunga lukotem ke lamam kwana apodokitna amakatanngokwe ke kanu aitikokimulokanska iketemla ingokwe kuari manga da (rabbies). Abukogni ebe eponiokesi amcanakaaheber yirikaalei aarar ingwoko itunga lamam imeketa.

Alimokini Euryu Etop nu araasi 17.08.98 koyapesi ke ingo Bululu Abukangni ebe

# KALAKI

ekototunga aboliaracis akiro konyeebe meme naka rabbies. Abu kilip itunga kere lu ipiotita ingwoko kede ihamn aitwasan arerengo na ejuku apagan nako kidng kitoritoa erongat loka akoru, ihamn kede iboro lu scor amukian iharen ke kere toni ingokwe da.

# Etemokin erot loko Odapakoi - Pingire

## Na Israel James Omonyaki

LO, DO lu enyoyen kotoma okisona lo epaari Odapakoikiton Pingireeidakaikobuku kaulu an aduan aitonomokin.

Eretu ken aihuru na noi ko Alepilop osamai mera kwape ilelebatar aipanya. Apugan rakodioriki ko Soroti nei abu kojak aturekita erionakotionani luatadoritokama anti ingarni.

aka apolon eicelong LC III kotem Pingire, Darbo Odongokode ejakari lo erista Pingire, Story John Ogwing, koramata itunga kanu rakokin ka asista ingaroi kede adwaunakin sain ahein ngin.

Manden imotokan kede igaalon daspedorites atirabehat na ara ketep edounsara ilelebatum akip itala scor elope kisipokemene amotokan Ayka iki kwatan.

# Ewelar ioterin

## Na Peter Opita

APOLOKITON eicelong loka Parent's Teacher's Association ko Katine P/S, Soroti, Julisan Eloya ka emerba loka School Management Committee kouonero kalopekalo Richard Ejemu kesi kopeita itunga lamam ber ejemunakivedowelata itogin kesi luegwelanamer enyamat kouskuoro lo Katine araasi 24.08.98. Mam ejemuna alosiki net na asurokinere itogin igakakaik, konya eorotia itunga la alesi aaraasi 21.8.98 kani aoracit aslukouonemokesi atirgida apara kellikkou ioterin kingairenek kala.

Abakasi Ejemu ka Eloya kuariamena ajaikina osonemo araasi 28/8/98 ebe kopotsikesi kodikito tupuruc iak Nakiyariot kanu ebe acicita agwelanar kosi konye ebe kopotu kodumutu itogui kesi ben atakariita.

Eiemu nges da abala ebe ecamundes kesi aanito kanu atiopol akwap.

# AlungLC1epelu

## Na Jonathan Emuskat

APOLON Eicelong LC 1 Kikota - Olio, Serere, James Epilungni alung aawam naka araat apoloneticolongkocaalo ke ebe naarai emanitos ngesi kunga lukatarbet aibunga kanu ebe ngesi arasanara imanaagon ladidik pulits kontareitemokinitukokaa.

LCs lukocaalo kongon kesi Naskanyel 28-08-98 alimokinete Etop na.

Arupirun Ejolu, Egki Charles Okuma ngesi de kwana ebe idarario kwape apolon eicelong LC1 Mam Etop eko kodum Ejolu kacaaloka kana ajenun maipa.

# Eponitos MPs 114 Kasilo kanu aituk apiai nu apolo

## Ntakkei Omeja

MP (mobusu 114 kasamuna) ebe epise kasi onomaro lo Pingiri S. S kotem Pingire, kasilo araasi 31.10.98 kanu atikokouban na etukere apiai na etukere isomaron iyarit. Iakobashikoraasi lokasiro.

MP lo Kasilo, Augustine Okita agwalimortngon araasi 16.08.98 kaurianet nada aeyanankar ngesi apolok kitinga kakil C III ka igakala. Imawan loka Pingire,

Ladangala ka Bugondo. Ajaikina aarianet ngin oreko Okiror tina Kalanak, Pingireeido ayani iharasi lasluka LC III ke LC3 da tina.

Naka Okiror ebe eraan ngon nsubau nada itolerao kanu ataku Pingire S. Ska Kadiungulu S. S. Elip MP itunga amnorkesin kena aisanet ebuka kasi ejok.

Okiror: eponitos 1pmap

# Aretokinos lu idiinin

## Na Jack Okoto

ENGABENOK loka fiulikir kotoma akelrisi nako Kelise, komissori lo Kyote, Serere, Bosiolkit Oluaka Peter Okello kesi aponikonarekisi imadokitna kasumun dasabirdor k'amara ara kebwaimulimonokinkotoma ana naka etolokit Eswamanasutupa isochwaren: apokori Terai Okello.

Arai konyos imodisi imadokotiet kere adwa dimonokin, iburoisi anaramakin eget na oreko. Mam isio ikoto imolokototamotoinot raic "abala Oluu, Teich, arakahot, mam isio ikoto imadokolon, egiar isob Eswani Okello erai etolokit mere emadokotiet. Arai kebwa emadokotiet, eja isue aletoun amara adnobinar ngesi," abala Okello.

KALAKI Rural Development Agency nisi bubo apukor k'Otubes, Kalaki. Apulon eicelong lo atakot kana, Michael Edyelu nges pac koyapesi ke lo ejai oidukai lako Otubes abala ebe elosiko isotokesi apukor ikonoin lo egologelata ikamantina aipii aso; aipit agaria, akoru ebaale ka acie.

AKORION Denis etengungni araasi 22.08.98 absoibe koron swaragi kitoni atwanant cot. Erai Etenga nurat lokotaado Kakoya-Kamuda etem Kalaki.

## Kotacata esolo aitodolikino ebajet

## Na John Obipot

EKALAANI lo apiai loko etem Otuboi, Kalaki, Simon Peter Egatin egotolip alomak esolo lukotem Otuboi atacar esolokni letters itodolokin ebajet lo etem loka 81,373,600/-kana ekara 1998/1999. Entengngini nu elimokin Etop koyapesi kalo etem otuboi araasi 24.08.98.

ATUMUNAN lo ebe Julius J. Omera lo Telamon-Tukum Gwari, ngasi apon kitegelai akinet aanet ka 13,000/-kana akokoun epalisi lokavera, lo aipana na ebe Amulo.

## Edotor apolokiton loka LC1 k'Olio

## Na Edoua Oluka

APOLON eicelong LC I lo Ojaira II, oitela Oburin, Olio Serere, Samoot Dokollo nga pac aponi kiditorai koicolong ka kanu ebe amamut aitolot aswam ejok.

Ediopa kongirigirak loka LC I komam ekoto kolomora ngesi abala ebe aponi idotoro Dokollo kami aitapapalaapini aswam ke kiosite ebe atopoloriteamatakopalitena apolonakatutuber.

Apure de kontunui oracelak kalo alomario John Etabu Dokollo ahurokin kwape apulun eicolong.

## Adumu Kyere imongin 192 ko SDDP

## Na Edoua Oluka

NOROTI Dinerto Development Programme nesi adau akorar imongin 192 kwape ebuija kotem lo Kyere, Serere.

Lo etwegelan SDDP imongin ngul, Charles Agwau loka Amorican cattle traders nges pac erejerukini Etop nu kobula ebe arai eirela Abukot nesi ne awasis kesi akorar imongin. Edworarte de kwana kesi otem Olio.

ASIOMAN IMAKIO

# Etjioto Ikapelio

# amuton

Na Emmanuel Akelem

Ejaani Kapir kede erekod ke bon kakiro egetigela tai. Pac arai anyunya ja kane ejai atupiton CAO koyaite ebuku Ngora, Simon Akilongkiuniau ide agolit item lo koleme lo esolo kodistrikt loko Kumi kere. Kokitlok 2,065 la etubekitai aitac esolo, abala apelonetem Kapir ebo 200 bon atacitos esolo lokokaru kalo! Kokaru lo atubor ebe arai 585 bon bobo atacitos. Kilema ber boho nu esolo.

eyt boho etem Kapir aiting erekod lo olepa, aigir aitac ibonist luka erionget luka. Poverto Allesiation Project (PAP) Ikiyaikukuka PAP ko Solot kesi pac abakasi ebe "etionsetem egoli Kapir'inos." Erai de ebe itunga acabaluta adai kewanyuto la eburak apesenin no iboinin.

Kitupakiro, komam nu itebekina Kapir bon, epol amamusaijen kotunga. Itunga akwap akwap kesi mam ejente aisiom ka aiwadik. Nesi bonat da epolor elepa lo agirite aitac

esolo ka iboinin lo apogan. Konye, tarikedaan ijo amuno kano itunga luko Kapir. Kokiror luka ejasteme lo aijar naka ikoku, na isingarenit atukot naka Uganda Community Based Association for Child/Refiere (UCOBAC), ekamura Ikapefer arereng alakao kotoma ametist na amamun aijen. Aibois nu aitoka ajon abong kere, iriadete kwana amakio acie kede apolok atukono, komam ekapitos ipiin arai acupai, konye ikataman kede

# PBU POST BANK UGANDA AIKWENYARET

KANU iyatar etiai loaidar akauntan nu ikidioko apiyai kotoma kec, elosi Post Bank Uganda agolokin akauntan kere nu adautu ikaru iarei mam iswamaete ido kideuna 2,000/= bon kotoma kec. Engadak ngul lu ikamunitos akiro nu ido kipudasi aiyatakit ajaut kede akauntan kec, kes ilipitai aibwaikin apeesan toma akauntan kec eroko 31 Okitoba 1998 ketuboro, kanu aitodolikin apeesan nu esalitos akauntan kec 10,000/=

Akauntan nu eroko esalete kede 2,000/= bon, akaulo na apaarasia kangun, kesi do ebunio aomit ebet agolokin.

# POST BANK UGANDA

Aingadis na ipaperono, na idunyasi kajo. Post Bank Uganda Limited, P.O. Box 7189, Plot 68-70 William Street, KAMPALA, Tel: 258551,258553, Fax 347107.

Itemwani luko Kapir, Kidongole, Bukedna, Ngoraka. Kobain kesi lu itetemorereber epone aisisia kana nada ebakasi alongwau Functional Adult Literacy (FAL). Erai na aisisiana iganget itunga aiteten atiokiton kec kakironinei nu itebeununa. Kwapenat iponesio lumanet kanu amodiaunun apiai, sijuk akiro (ka adumunun da) opajan ka opapero da kotoma obalaan ka acie da.

Apolon eicolong loka UCOBAC katenu nako Kumi diotrikt, korai arucon nu aisisia kana ngesi Rev. Samuel Ebukallin. Mam Etop abu kopedo airiamun kede nges kanu aileileun nuipu nu ikamunitos eprojektlo.

Etolotok eproject lu ineranakina kede Etop kesi ebakasi ebe eyangai kini eprojektlo asiomankana ikaru iwongon ido itilosio nesi kotoma ngol etela kotemwan kangul itetemorere nesi.

Esisianakinan Martin Ogwang lokoitela Kokong kotem Kapir ngesi abala ebe atukot ke ejaasi esisiak 15 lu aturo nu egelegela. Abala ngesi kaitemite ke ebe kotoma aiboisio kere nu itolosere kwapekwana ber asioman, ngin atukot nesi nepejo arai na esisiak 20 bon. Kanu aitapatan aswam kec, abala Aiko ebe aponi kesi kokoritete igaa.

Anoku do teni ejie alemar amamut aijen. Aesisian Ijenet Magarita. Akol ngesi abala ebe. "abu eong da kaloma aisisiatetere adini ikini akongu apaadei ko Soroti. Ijeni ijo eminasi icie aingalaanar itunga tai." Abu Etop kitem Akol aiwadikakin akiro adis kwap kosodi akimat adesianar kesi kwape "papa-ke, toto-iye" ka isaulai icie da.

Edumuni do ituan idio kotoba naka naka iwongon.

# Aturo nuka a

# Mwaliinu" ngul igununai kaku isisianakina Kapir. Aputo nol adooiso, bamgana itungakana da la ibaluwan da.

"Ikeketet amakteni," abala Opa toda etoronit ikibai "etilorit amata na lu akwesti ngul iwadikanaki" Mwali nu nimyikok isenun. "Ejok noi" aru "O." Nu lem enakton esiomitoskore rais abwe kec otabot ka airereor nu ioweno ejulakinon ko kapi "obwe kinguitos nol kosi." abala Akol ka acie kakesi etaba k, bobo aisial aciko naisokota emakoli ngul ajenutu amakis nakatitaban. Asionkol esinyikoki obwe bakue nu aisisia naka UTA ayaitoka nu aisisia ka.

Kangeset na aosil entunoi do ebe ni alomanak adunot najokan kokalia let lu aitopol da obwe ke. Emamei abumoki ni aitodolikino nukanpa. Karaida mam Estero Opolot abu kelotit orsomero kosed se ekosio: "Asociwotisoi iworivortetogo homin epona spejokiyam. "kwana alopet awai ibaluwa yen etu apaperoke aqepoka ue Naemukaaga konan alimekinisodekkuwena naarai eponden spejok. Arai kinyara ijo. Kapir aikamun arereng aiamok ke. Arai mam jemi atur aciepak kisisiarak. An "Suwa, suwa, swa, swa, swa, swa."

# Kikisarai arai kijulunai Press

# Aa Charles Opolot

KAUTO ber kolo eong kotoma aikser kana abongok in akuwa Eiki ni Illiam Emenyo. "Eisot-ji oipai Soroti, lo ajai o Etop lo 3-9/Sept 1998. "Kamana atot eong Eiki Emenyo. "Kamana nao akiro ngon kere. "Eisot. Emenyo ebe aibo einkonsitor "Iteso". Idobo nugon kisi lo enyeikinete kesi aikint maao bo inyoika arai, lukungan. Akotit bobo ejakait o karamuna itou kaku kalo akot iteso. Akiro ke acie, aikolukot o baba akotongesi akot, eibounum aitatam ka aitebom adwot na Iteso. "Eisot abongok ini aingiseta aismon o kokojo etemum bobo aot, eisiamun awaragarka met o. Katoma aiwadikaitakamu aistisolomun apapsila wok na kite abala eong ebe toma kianpo lokapukon lu enyaritai esolo Hamitec" ngesi ejaasi boni. Ikumama, Ilangini ka Karamoja (kere) ko Uganda, katodikini Iturukana, Suk, Asanai, Inandin koo Kinyat, ka Papeter, Ilonuskon ka Ibarin ko Sudan. Ogarurpu lopolot abala eong i ngesi ejaasi idemon ka Bakon lu Abismia ka aitekerin koe du nu eraasi ipajan wok. Kwana, akotiseong atekorkore

ajenum ebe kolo sek mam Iteso atiakara kokiror ka angajep da ka omono kane ajaasi nace atekerin na ipujanar oni. Araasi atekerin na elimorokokujukem itunga idiope. Ide imore oni ka atekerin kangun imakio (ancestors). Aomit do eong ebe kwamam eong abu keneritor ejok kaiwadikart ka kana adau alomun, ngesi aiworu arai anyara aturio nu ageete anyoun K'Abisinia "Iteso" aibois na anyara kesi imakio luka Iteso. Nen nes mam awaragat na aibwot na Iteso atenitor.

Atiakun na Iteso ka anyarao da kwape Iteso iswamaona katur kana ikanyet ka kana ikanyetkape (Atari Arionga ka kana Asonya). Ekirot ikaramuja da edamuna apakio ngun. Ekirot ikaramuja (aikar "aisal", imojong "Imakio") imakio tu eregitos lu apotu kosalata kau. Ekirot Iteso ebunit akirot "Ates" na erai, uke apolon kotoma atamun kanu Ateso ebe "Ikoku" arai mere kwangin "Itunganan yeni atwan itosomatos aiwadikacta acie apolou na "ikoku" ngesi bodie ebe eraot Teso akwap na idwe kalu

apotu kojotakisi imakio kec kokau. Acie akiro itatamitosi awaragat kotoma akirot "Ates" orai akepolou ebe "itunganan yeni katwan. Ebe apotu imakio lu apotu kikarakisikau kotemasi mama ejaasi ikec idwe ebe, olototo bo yei ingaren iraanos "atesia" arai bo nat "atesin". Ebe opone bobo ngopongok abunio ekirot Iteso.

Arai ekoto idio itunganan aitatam awaragat na abeit na ejilitonotor Iteso lu kaloka kogea ko Karamoja. Ngin nes edoditos akiro na itatamitos inonosinotatekerin kanu ipujanar oni kwape kidie na atiakatiakaon kec. Ngin nesi ajaasi imakio wok amaikitai iworopou. Idumakini ijo akiro na aotobon lu ineritere "Hamitec" papani.

Karamuja nesi apotu imakio "Iworopom" kec Iteso Ikumama, Ikaramoja, Ikokora, Ituposan, Itotuba, Ibarin, Iturukana, Ikapeke, kibokinos. Eraasi Iteso arai eworotai Iteso Iworopoom naarai araasi imakio Iworopom.

Etacautu do akiro nu da Idaaron kolepajenu aibwot na Iteso (imakio

Mam eong ayaunit o na ecaalo naarai ebe eong enerngan. Kola akadakiteng. Ebalot saonau bala abwok. Asoto na ebwokit. Presidential Committee, Tesot/PCT (nusikat) aibwok. Anyamata kwi aibwok.

# Kiyuwa ikoku kon ka

Erai amorosoit na apa amamus ayuar ikoku kon adekasinei acie na imu naarai mam aurian epe. Adau apugan aitutuba ka 12-13 Ocoto (Sept) 10-16, 12-13 Ocoto (Sept) 10-16, 12-13 Ocoto (Sept) Kotoma apaarasia ka kwap na ikaru ikany epe polio. Arai kedaunita aiyatakin ayuarik ayuani ationis adio ka. Ebuni do na aingan Uganda. Akwapin nu

ETOP Naiwango.net, Otibar (September) 10 - 16, 1998
