# Kikisarai arai kijulunai Presidential Commission buwok Teso

# Elimuno ber

Mam sting eyaueti aranman
na ecado naarai ebe amanakit
rong enorogan. Konye naarai
akadakitung. Etudanmgatta
sisisaa bala ebwokit moto.
Asuto na ebwokit rong naka
Presidential Commission for
Teso(PCT)netolabukini-rong
adwok.
Anyamata kwi aboolai. Ais

engisot dude kwana rong. Ilasoro ebe ijo cabo lo imonyi diope.

Eeai kere ka abolai ngun nu ilapustai, ebe ebert uitai. Dabudo konye aitac kobakata ebe ngui bo ajukanna. Eeai emina mam Iteso adumunito, eipungut kotoma okomision kalo.

Bore duc engisot-rong itunga lu epuluk ebe kocauk adepur rong ido bobo da kogongasi kalo apulun Masivens, ngina na ebe kanabo ber inyo mam ekomision lo evpokitere Teso?

Epedori etugaran biai apucuneka ere arai duc iboyei nguni kogugat (island)?
Ebert Edeke, akuj nameri, adsiar apikis ka ekomision. Ekot arai kikisarai arai bunat

klawebotunai Teso ne ejasii ikialiki.

Komo mere laapuluk ajeme let ko Kampala duc do konye adngere korot aimo aboolai bom (dlawans,et)

Kokaru kalo agaurere ekomision ajukuna aomisot naara Teso kere egu amagoro. Konye do arereng nakarimon ngunte lo etolonere akiro nu ekomision nesi iberoro.

Epone akro kana ngesi. Atalatalar erai ebe mam lo apulun Masivens ikota yeaikwakisate, konye ebe aputu kac, konye ebe aputu luker. Ubutur bebe kolingara airiacakin ikolu nepe elelemette.

Epone da laye kogesi mam lo apulun eburuktur lu eyaisisi ekomision ebe naarai epe atukatak kino kama ejasui kic eberi abnokiti bagudon ikineta bu ekotur.

Ani do ikote akiro ne inye mam rong elope citoria epomi. lokulu kipubuna isin inga kejete ebe ijalakin akwap tape da kwana eifite eponte lo.

Ingai kejete ebe ebuni Ilasare amony diopo. Nugenu da ajarisa rong ebe mam ingatunyo itano koreria bab ak inei. Ekot ekomision kijulunai Teso arai mam kikisarai. Arai erai ican da konaikmaielimuno ber.

# IJO IKOTO IKOKU YEN ENGWALIT?

# Koyuwa ikoku kon kanejai polio.

Erai amorosoit na apedorosio ka etunganane, ijo amamus ayuar ikoku kon kotoma adeka na polio ka adekasin erie na imukiasi. Kanu inyo engwalia ikoku naarai mam aunan epodokirit?

Adau apugan aitutub apaarasia 1-2 Otikoit (August) ka 12-13 Ocoto (September 1998) kwape nu itonere ekato loka polio ko Uganda kere.

Kotoma apaarasia kanu, nu itegelikina KANGIN ikoku kwap na ikaru ikany eponto aiton ekato kanu ayuara ko polio. Arai kodauhita aiton kes ekato, ebun do na aiyatakin ayuara kec. Mam aitonio acie naka polio eyaui ationis adei kere.

Ebun do na angarakin cut aikisario naka polio ko Uganda. Akwapin nu ipu ko Afrika kimonaritos Kenya,

Tanzania, Burundi, Congo, Zambia ka acie da, eutasi aitolot akirot na aiton ekato loka polio.

Ejaatatat eka lo kede aitonosisa aarei nu ewiiny nu itonakiroo aktuk ikoku, inwan atipet kolapio Otikok (August) ka Ocoto (September). Eyuara cut epone lo itonere ekiia lo, ido edaunit erionget lo angaleu, UNICEF ka World Health Organisation adogogongor aitonio ke.

Koyanga iduwe kon kere lu ejaas kwap na Kanu ikany nen do ne eyapiei ne itonere ekiia lo kotoma apaarasia nu itonere ekato lo.

Kimonikkin oni kipedori "apetor polio ko Uganda"

Kanu ajenun nu ipu, kodolok eswaman lo angaleu lo iyapiatar ijo, arai Programme Manager UNEPI. P.O.Box 8, Entebbe-Uganda

12 ETOP Naïwangiouti, Chillur (September) 10-14, 1998

# AISISIA

## Ebeit SDDP aikamar aiduk Odapakol PS

Na Israel Omawyaki

ERDONCET luku Sensi Dianto Development Programme ngei ebeit aiduk esomero lo Odapakol PS, Piagim, Kasilo.

Eibenzim auriak anuman mniapallo 36,000.

Apolakitim ekonoti luku isoniakukansulo lokodistrikt, Nemco Byad Ochat ngei eibeni aanyan ebe ekonoti esomerin ngai la erono epaetron km.

Albu jmi Ochat inamanon ka SDDP lada apoto inamata aiduk esomerondispe lkangoi neno la Nemci distrikt. Ebeit SDDP aiduk isomeroi lamam edie elanger layokotan igangit caryokatanapasemoket eronero.

## Iswamao PLE Novemba 3

Na Jonathan Emoukai

AINGITO na (P.L.E) nesi ugnamo aowam eransi 3 November, 1998. Egingiran oka UNEB, Mathwoo Bakerya ngeiangama insuransi 27.8.98. Egeanangitama SST tuperec, orandi Amatugun atapakin thong. Eransi 4.11.1998 nesi do iswamaere angito Aimar upurus, konsoli do abong apolakim ka sayarn.

## Adamutu imudikiok acuman nuiwadikaet

Na Peter Opita

ENOMERO luku imudikiok ko Madera Sensi ngei adamo acuman 13 na iswamaere kosi kans aiwadik (Bradley) aransi 26.8.98.

Apolakitim akim na aikwany kotianger loka Education Assessment and Resource Services (EARS) kodistrikt.

Francis Imalingam ngei alimeri na koyapesin la Eisp aransi 29.08.98. Ahala Imalingambe erianger la aisisia nesi egwahinit acurman na ko Buliaya kans aitisjookaar asisman nattisi.

Ahalangesin bensalita turma adispe na ebeit akopak in ikoko laman Ogila, emaduk yen ko P 1 Katimer Tario P.S.

## Arukere LC3 lo Kidongole

Na Richard Akollam

APOLON eicolong LC3 Kidongole, John Charles Ekwan ngei apoto auriak luku Kanyamatama PS komit eno kosomero eransi 20.8.98.

Ersi Kanyamatama PS esomero lo ingarakit atukot nakoyokotasi (Irish Aid) aiduk neda ayam inner ibero la emoriaritos ajerikanin, akittiren awilibus on ko icie da kosodera auriak, LC3 kede imunagan aidok akania aitatuket na ahala ebe mam ebeit adipar arsi apagisar idis ibero kere yemeya untia aduk lo esomero.

Akaoloma esabiti edispe hon koyaani Ekwan ajerikan ta

majong koreke kans ti asonama na intet kosomero, adamum auriak entini aduk aparan ngin. Keranakisere adukok asurokin ngeis, kobusere icie abotri kobulasi ebe ijo koleje idokit akan anatukot kobosi hoho akot asoro ajerikanin.

Abu do Ekwan kosomakin ngai ke asukar esipidi kotapakitos amatapalin na ebeebere ngeis kokan.

Apoto auriak kogarota amyikokin aiduk kokonosi ber Ekwan anacam na akotor ngeis amwang aitatukot ngin.

Arsi do apolon eicolong LC3, Eikit Okitokeda ka Erem, Pascal Somet aboit singainga adukok abingokin aswam.

## Elipi Pallisa aisisianakin idwe nuka aila kosomeroi

Na Michael Oagwara

ESISIANAKINAK luku panamam ko Pallisa distrikt kesi elipi aitopolorit aisisianakin idwe koc akim na aila kosomeroo ka aibisianma ibisoto kesi da.

Emamimman aila (DMI) kodistrikt, Stephen Namangha nesi enjemari na itokon ekonoi (workshop) lo edispe oabiti ioka eisisianak inak esabtekita loka sayarn aransi 6.8.98 kotaan lo Pallisa.

Etebeikimi da ekonoi la aisisianakina kesi owalim la isopet idwe koc amtokit akim na aila.

## PALLISA DISTRICT SERVICE

Applications are invited from suitably qualified Ugandans for the following vacancies existing in Pallisa Local Government. Interested applicants must complete PSC Form 3 in triplicate and submit to the Secretary Pallisa District Service, P.O. Box 14, to reach him not later than 2/10/1998. The forms can be got from offices of CAOs and Secretaries to District Service Commissions. Only copies of testimonials/certificates should be attached to the application forms.

1. Post: Principal Assistant Secretary/Deputy Chief Administrative Officer (1 post)
Age: 35 - 45 years. Scale: U2 (Ushs 6,641,122 - 6,869,984) = p.a.
Qualifications: B.A (Hons) or B.A (Hons) Social Sciences from a recognised University, plus five years Administrative experience at the level of Senior Assistant Secretary. Post graduate Diploma in Public Administration or Development Administration.
Duties: Deputise the Chief Administrative Officer in the Administration of the District. General Administrative work as may be assigned by CAO.

2. Post: Medical Officer (1 post)
Age: 25 - 45 years. Scale: U5a-3 (Ushs 2,490,809 - 4,645,930) = p.a).
Qualifications: M.B.C.H.B. Degree and should have successfully completed internship.
Duties: Responsible for the Council Clinics practicing both curative and preventive medicine; refer serious cases to Hospital, preside over immunisation sessions, supervise young child and ante-natal clinics and supervise junior staff.

3. Post: District Water Officer (1 post)
Age: 25 - 45 years. Scale: U5a-3 (Ushs 2,490,809 - 4,645,930) = p.a).
Qualifications: None degree in Civil Engineering and relevant experience in water Engineering.
Duties: Establish the availability and distribution of water (water resources) in the district: prepare water supply and sanitation development plans and budget; develop and manage rural water supply system-wells, boreholes, springs.

4. Post: Accountant/Finance Officer (Financial Management) (1 post)
Age: 25 - 45 years. Scale: U5a-3 (Ushs 2,490,809 - 4,645,930) = p.a).
Qualifications: B.Com (Hons) Accounting option; finals of professional qualifications — CPA, ACCA, etc.

5. Post: Principal Personnel Officer/Secretary District Service Commission (1 post)
Age: 30 - 45 years. Scale: U2 (Ushs 6,641,122 - 6,869,984) = p.a.
Qualifications: B.A (Hons) or B.A (Hons) Social Sciences with Personnel Management as one of the papers OR B.Com (Management) option with at least 3 years experience as Senior Personnel Officer. Diploma in Human Resource Management.
Duties: In charge DSC records and correspondences, process submissions from CAO, draw DSC Programme of work together with Chairman, take DSC minutes, others as assigned.

6. Post: Field Extension Staff (Agriculture Officer, Veterinary Officer, Fisheries Officer) (18 posts)
Age: 25 - 45 years. Scale: U5a-3 (Ushs 2,490,809 - 4,645,930) = p.a.
Qualifications: B.Sc (Agriculture) Bachelor of Veterinary Medicine, Honours degree in Botany or Zoology.
Duties: Tendering technical advice to farmers on various agricultural activities and crop husbandry, production, harvest, storage, soil conservation, disease and pest control; carry out specialised agricultural veterinary projects; attending to sick animals, meat inspection, fish marketing, processing lake fisheries and aquaculture, enforcing fishing regulations, etc.

7. Post: District Fisheries Officer (1 post)
Age: 25 - 45 years. Scale: U5a-3 (Ushs 2,490,809 - 4,645,930) = p.a.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibar (September) 10-16, 1998

EYALA

# Erutar Inangai ko Kakira

kore isawanugulmam do beboi
yen apudo aprilikit nuajaasi.
Kwabo kosawan lu
thwainkinere ikenoujnet
keu tiba kami tulumam
kore isai enako ber amsisi
kore isai anigenen.
Eyibiri adekir aponi
kabang bunga eku lo
kabang aben troi ajimi
kabang aben kola
kabang aben troi ajimi
kabang aben kola
kabang aben troi ajimi
kabang aben kola
kabang aben kola
kabang aben kola
kabang aben

kore isawanugulmam do beboi
yen apudo aprilikit nuajaasi.
Kwabo kosawan lu
thwainkinere ikenoujnet lo
iyapete (slow) abu Charlie
kedolenen 'adoketa' na
adepara koipone lo einet,
atingit ka aisukunyunit da
Inangai 'seke cat' koingaren
toni do bala Inangai da amsisisi
'aurmar jawai esamai'.

Koipone kalo kepotu Marion
ka Charlie ajon kipugaata
kodumunete do nomisoit na
acedun adis komam Shilla ejeni.
Kepiakutu ajon abu egurupu
kisiarakin teda do kedoloto
kesi Karonga quartersee aperi
Shilla aponik ijukarai Inangai
aige ore kepaikenete do ber
Charlie ka Shilla amatara; Nile
ejeni sa'rdispe diope, ludabala
kepotu kedepasi nen.

Abu do Charlie koldesek Shilla
ebe abeit lolo alea togoike
(Shilla). Konye atamik Shilla
apegakin naarsi ajei ebo
etionuni epone loaperot
kwape edidingar agola.
Kosodi da kwape epolor
Inangai apedori 'aipup murto
ebuliau' kware. Mam Charlie
apupi ngari. Akot da
adedengar ebe, ejai cabodo
Shilla epone ecie lolo.

Abu do Shilla kononokiar
kouparon do luwok cut toni
ore. Abu Ingangai da na ajei
ore kongaakeoiejukcut, konye
mam apotu kanyamata
taabong. Kwape adaunitor
Shilla acedakin Inangai
nuiswama, aperi do Inangai ka
Pulin kwap korasi do je kede
Shilla utada kujonoron itunga
ejuk cut.

Kedol kware, kililingi akwap
ti, abu Charlie, kedau ajonuit
cut ebe ajotni Shilla ajonu bala
atwanare, kecedori kwap
kodakarsikoku Polinaiperikin

otada nejai tonoke kopukini
ekesaje kwap 'apetui kede
Inangai'.

Kiwala do akwap abu Shilla
koge akwenyun kosodi atiror
ejumu, kodumuni ebe aperete
ngeci kede Ipolin bon.

"Charlie edili, elomarit,
ailwat, ebongarit buan kware
arai bo biai?" ingitanakin do
ber Shilla kotnake bon.

Kinokoki do ngeci akin abu
korasuk amyan Inangai ka
Charlie ilutatarte kokwap

# EKOTE BO AI?

# Eyuunitos Iteso ikweny icie

# Kitia I, Oriibbo

mam ataruket ebekunit
ikemiyoi kosodi edou
adaldalun ti utep igataran
akena ya abebenoka ke awai,
teni toma apak ngipengin
epedori edou acilakokutarida.
Kagenatamam Iteso anyamete
ataruket naarai enyami itiang
ka itunga lu etwakini kinete
amagoro.

Etakuri da erui ekweny lo
ekurajka itunga luipu. Arai
kicebekietukuriarueneekarei
na ere arai kokaya etegir
ocamunitos itunga kere ebe
ebuni aronis (atwanare)
atakanun kore kangol arai
areker ngin arai oidunyeta.

Ecamunitos bebo icie itunga
ebe iswamanara etukuri
nepepe ka itunga lukapilak
naarai ebe ikapilak kes ejaasi
ka apedorosio nu aiyakit
itukurin aisiarakin eipinda
orieria luegelegelakware.

Ebalasi bebo icie itunga ebe
erai etukurieyakuluka 'Akuj'
lo ijukurunu adwaranakin
itunga akiro nuclosete
atakananakin kes. Mam
enyamin etukuri idu arai
kodumun imudio tunganan
yen imirla amyum ekweny
ngol itucudai, sdo kanuka
akurian mama ejassi itunga,
etapit itunga aibiribir
kaisukunyarit etukuri
kolwanukoreria.

Icuka erai ikweny yen ejasi
cuc, kocolibh ikituk ke
Edeparit ikweny luipu
kadukun itoge ke. Edukokini
itogo ke kwap kakiot naka
ekitui teteraikol igaliorit akipi
na edou komam elomarete
togoke.

Ekuriaka itunga luipu icuka
arai ketubor eporitui
koingaren kitunganan
kopudunokin eporoto ke ebe
cok-cok-cok-cok Eminasi
luipu atemar ebe iriamasi
idumuni) akiru nakaronok.
Etapit luipu aibir icuka kwa
kangin. Icie da ebalasi ebe
erai icuka iyakia yere 'Akuj'.

Ekerekeret nes eputus akiru
ke kerebes kudenuka etukuri.
Opiriu erai ekweny lo itemi
apak na awear ikisyon,
apoloake ekesitinikim
itunga aiwe ikisyon. Mam
enyamin.

# Iburao ngin ituan ko Uganda 250,000

Na Emmanuel Akelem
BISHOP German Ilukorngeni
alimu ebe asioner akinet naka
sisapan akwapin nu abarak
kakwap acamun aikisar
apeuenimu ejantatarkeu kede
akwapin nuicanasi koroko
epoluere.

Abala Ilukor ebe ko Uganda
ngin inorganer spasu kede
epetart naka apiyasi naka
akolier la America 200 (nepetai
250,000) = 1 la ebeit atacar
koumta apesun.

Ebon apagoler nei sisupun

# Ebeit TECHE aituk apiyai

Na Emmanuel Akelem
ASUBAN nu etukere apiyai
kamuta Teso Colegast Higher
education (TECHE) kesi
ejasnon Soroti S. S. kotoma
maan loko Soroti Naemukauga
3.10.98, agrar kosawan inorgan
lukatupurur.

Apolon eicolong loka ebood
lo ziyatak TECHE Bishop
Gersson Ilukor ngesi etipenari
nu araasi 6.09.98 ko St. Peters
Cathedraleitukuni idikokin 10
lu ekansia.

"Kepuru katukmo inirigin
kegangakinata nu aisisia naka
idowe. Arai kiger oni ihusi
mnatupapu. Ijaanamushario,"
abala ehshop.

Erei TECHE ekolej isotretet lo
epwakorotui kamu ustolmio
asiliu nakado kketut nako
kapu kamusore ekuole
adapolor kwape eunibaute.

Ebuluwa lo ailipai in ejukak iten
loka TECHE etopj. kidekokite
stupilon apolon eicolong o
ebood akter. Cuthbert J.
Obwangor, nesi abala ebe
epuda TECHE apangat onui
na inirgin ka idio ihore kere
anti itwaunina kami adoketait
nasudit naka adokonio kke.

"Ipudai apiyai aikisunia
nutin, adokio isiman, iyapenin
ga iheres icir lu ipudai nei kamu
aprar aisisa akiro na aisisia,"
abala obwangor.

Edumunit TECHE alapok
aratubet kana erai bala
marion awongon aryoung
nupai lo Soroti identi egusubi
o elasi Morota Abala
obwangor ebe kwapeitwana,
itemitai ebe apiyai nu edotene
itkini=nes ipudakireejushani,
onye adoketait nangol nesi
kotokir 70m= kamu agraara
dokir kaburaco.

akwapin akanyausi nusbarak
kakwap kere eki nar apetamin.
Ihusi atamukisalinisnok inken
arokisio nu apetamin kami,
abala Ilukor lo enera ko St.
Peters Cathedral Soroti anasri
6.9.98. Alimonokini ehshop
itunga nu apetta kotwak iteu ko
Lambeth Conference najakima.
Bulaya kolajun iyarei lu
ataboros nedaritanmere aiini
nu ekanisa ka nu apolo.

Kageunetna elap Julai, eroko
kepororo Bulaya, alimunit
Ilukor ebe ngesikede episkopi

loko Bukedi, Engwalin Okille
kesi ebeit abwokin Uganda
kairiamun naka pisikopit
kanu sisup loko World Bank
ka International Monetary
Fund (IMF) kede akwapin nu
ubarak aikisar apesenin kce.

Apesenin ngun kesi abala
ehshop ebe aroikiten
akwapin nu eroko epoluere
neda eyatatar ican kotunga
kwape ejaar apuganasia kce
acerededit ibic atacanar
apesenin komame do epono
lodumunakinet itunga kce

iheres luipuda aejar najokan.

Eyatakit ehshop ebe aponi
nupaisui akiro 92 ko Lambeth
Conference. Adiope kakesi na
ebe apapokit akwap kere akiro
ka nesis naka ekanisa ka Igeresan
acamun atiakunun ikilini lo
ndukin ka neli kede ikilinkarar
anger da nu eebot kede angor
kwape imakin lu ekanisa.

Kaurianet nako Lambeth,
abala Ilukor, ebe ajaasi
ipisikopir icir lu akotesti
kotiakununai itunga lu eebos ka
adakonukin kesi ikilink bonik.

arainongor bonik kwape imakin
jukanisa. Konye ebe apotu
kesi Bishopun lo adepuerin kan,
kotoma ngul iwongon
kangegota inni alterikaar lu
etolomunak aomisinit ngin.

"Apotu ibisibupun kiketaros
mam aibil adio akiret kotoma
obaiibuli. Lu adepuerin iyarei
kotoma ngul iuni apotu kogisu
nu aijulakin idio ihore kere
Kobaiibuli," abala Ilukor.

Eyatakit do ibisibup ebe
akintio atuisunakini dbw kere,
logerue ka losup da apoliti naka

President Yoweri Musaveni iyogakinos ka President Laurent Kabila loko Congo ko Zimbabwe ne
anyaraarit kes President Robert Magabe ken ainerae koseseni President Sam Najoma loko Namibia lo
ekwang amasirubu ka Kgirigiran lokapolon loka OAC, Salim Ahmed Sallim.

# Ekwenya Egou atumunak

Na Martha Akello

MP loko Kalaki Ejkt Charles
Egou ngesi ekwenya atumunak
loko Soroti atemur kak eokami
asiakataka ko Soroti distrikt
kosedete agrun arie
engarenokkowackalo apeabrit
aswamisin.

"Ekot yesi aingicun ngun lu
eyaunitos atiakataka na toma
odistrikt," abala Egou.

Enera Egou araasi 6.09.98
akauliera ekugami lo ajakina
atumunak lukotaan Soroti kanu
amisun apiyai nuitoloset
aswamusine kce.

Apuni da kanalukinai isirigin
lu adepilon 800,000=.

Abala Egou ebe ekot

atumunak aitwasam
akocagagong ka akiro kanu
edukete ide ekot kesi aisom
kagogong kanu adumun aijar
na eun kaningaren.

Abu Egou kikwenya
atumunak ebe ekot kesi aipup
akiro nu ekamunitos eseny
kosedete da acoite
ecamusana.

Abu Egou koumuki noi
komer ke kana amamistar
apolokinitok edistrikt
karuban kangun kanu
ekamunitos atumunak. "Itima
Emeya, ake polon Emeya
bon ekapanakinaaswam kede
atumunak, konye ekot kere
yesikocotonikibekinesyes
atumunak lu," abala Egou.

Abala Egou elimokini
atumunak ebe eraasi kesi
engarenok nakdormere lukamoi
kwape ewamitotor itunga.

MP natumunak Nusara Tiperu
ngesi abwokit aminina naka
oute Mary Nsangi Kakembo
kwape apejononnukangosibib.
Abu Tiperu kicor atumunak,
kacutaupesur acerededit bonik
aitodoloukineipudkes ka aiuas
eemieliboro la emamete kesi.

MP lo ebwokitatumunak loko
kide Ejkt Geoffrey Ekanyangesi
abukolimok atumunak ebe ekot
kesiaiwadik ike gurepanieme
mam esangete aboliao bon
konye kineketsu apolon da.

Abu Ekanya kilip apolokitoke
distrikt loko Soroti aitolomikin
aswamisin.

# Eteper ebaluwa k' Kony itunga loko Kalaki aisu

ny App.1
owen imugug ke kiasliuolakin
sarit siisi Soroti ataun.

tunga lu idanyasi kede etem
nyara kisi apotu kitijerokisi
sur ebe mam kes eperete
teriaker, kamusiyongit Kony,
peremenete ebe dokwanakesi
nogoro.

Eawamak egudo luda
agisansisi eolukai lu Anyara
e araasi 3.09.98 apotu
abolaros apero okitui akauilo
wutuka atuban oidukai
awan ikany kware.

Awomitos kesi ebe arai do
Kony ngol aceduna kanu
aikam itunga.

Aswamisio ka Kony nu
atubonor itunga ikumes kede
akii, kes ini eyongitotor itunga
kepuputu eyemut ebe ebeit
Kony abunere.

Kosodi ko Kumi nges
ekwenyara atupilon 4OC lo
Kumi, Lt. Robert Namibia
itunga lo elimilimitaiebe estas
hoho aiwadika isap ko Kumi
distrikt talomarektsi aitusoru
aitiji apagan ka Yoweri
Muiyerei.

Enera ARDC ngun
kosonero lo Ouapanit P/S
araasi 3.09.98 netitigaria
ajokotau ADRA esomero
ngol lo adaun aiduk ejok cut
akanin kautiak kede
engarenok loko Kumi distrikt.
Arai ngesi epejonon
isangosibib.

Abala Namibia ebe le ekot
acum o President Kolarua
aibwo okara 2001 ne ejasnior
asno, konye mere aicanican
aokot nuka atumunak tai kojie.

Abu atupilon apolon
eicolong LC 5, Margaret
ilaborot kokadakite noi kobala
ebe adumutu kesi akiro ebe
adaun aitolom isap lukotem
Kochumbalua angar aitutorea
abongun aitiji apogan naka
Umuyomen.

Kingit Esig apolon eicolong
LC5 Kumi Umay Okodel akiro
na abu kotema ebe mam ngesi
epupuntiorakirongun E1000
loko Kumi da Edward Buguda
abukotema ebe isapapai Kumi
crici ide mam ngesi ejoni aibo
edamakit ilaborot akiro ngun.

atumunak aswamusine
kwanat otokonokin esolo ka
enwasa tetere ejenunete
ejasite te kasi origin ko distrikt.

Egergeranio akironako kinga
ko National Youth Council,
Mark Emulu ngesi estrikit
engarenok loko Yesa aigangit
aswamsinisi nu atumunak.

Enera nu ko Soroti Hotel na
Sabiti ikkudo na aboliasio nu
atumunak nuda etemonokitai
kanu adumuna apiyai nu
itolonera awamsisi atumunak.

Emeya loko Soroti, George
Egunya ngesi abu kolimok
atumunak ebe ebunya kamsilo
ke angarakin atumunak arai
ejansi apiyai.

Apolon eicolong le k
atatubet kana Aegop
Orego ngesi alimokit
iyemuto lu.

2 ETOP Nuiwongonet, Otibar (September) 17-23, 1998

# IYEMUTO

Na Ewadikan Etop

ABAATIN 100 naka Ngora H. S. kesi amuda eksetti loko Soroti karu apesen na elikoro esomero aposi esisianakinan Obany lo isisianakini Anusugon kede Geography atukoro na O'Level, alimoki esisianakinanlo Ngora lo mam ekoto ekitor ke kotimora Etop koyapesti ke naikanyet araasi 11.9.1998.

Abala Okodi ebe atakanoete nu naarai abu lem ayaiton esomero lo Ngora High School kede ebood kiteikisi esisianakinan Obany ikanyanene/etengeinaara ebe mam akongyuta etolomenit ekekiror kotoma oregesita lo etacereisisianakinakko Kumi distrikt.

Abala ngesi ebe apotu ayaitok esomero kicikakisi ka aikisar ekitor Obany kosodete ainanakin ngesi atutubet na eropti ke adaus apak na enja aitodol ne pac alosio Obany aosan kesi kede ebood oksoti lo Soroti.

# Eropit: Ekama emwalina abaatin 100 ko Ngora H

Abu eksetti konyara imeban lo ebood irwan auni, konye mam apotu kolototo, kosodi du atubon kede OC Police ka Court Brokers alosit amudar abaatin 100, kede atupuraita luda ariakasi kede eropit esisianakinan 1,3million/- la ebe aponi kitolitolitete, abala ngesi.

Kingisi Bishop Ilukor kwape apolon eicolong lo ebood abu kegir kobala ebe mam ngesi ajeni eipone lo elikorere apiai nu eropit esisianakinan kalo. Apolon esomero ngesi ebe ajeni nu epu mere ngesi.

Apotu akiro nu kijangakisi atutubet nako Ngora kacat otaun lo Ngora eyatakit ngesi.

# Imuudun: EtepeseinIloke

ILOKE juni lu apotu isirikalei loka ASTU ikamata koitela Amootom etem Obalanga kobuka Kapelebyong, akaulo na aisier akim na amwana noi araasi 19/6/98, kesi pac aponi itonsakadeket nako Katakwikana adakit imuudun komamete ka apedor.

Atubon (G,H) loko Katakwi, Ejkt. Amuriat agesi abu kosiomak Angaun Logwal okooke Lokwiridi (18), Longole Paul okooke Angela Lobeiti (18) ka Lodia Angiro okooke Lomeri (22) adlakaret kec.

Mam aponikocamakinaikes aliman adu akiro nu ikamunitin emusago leeaarai amamete adeket na ka apedorosiona aipup emusago lo adoketait kangin.

# Aikopar esas araibo emenit?

Apolon Ben Etonu iyogas ka esapat Onapito Ekomoloit kapaan na aseuno (nomination) ka agent ke k'Onapito lo ebakai Echodu John Wiliam. Aputo na inomit Charles Opola

# ADUM NU EKOTO OLOPE

Pilsner Lager EJATATAR NU IKOTO IJO

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otidbar (Septemba) 17-24, 1998

# IYEMUTO

## Aitodiar anapito na ecai

Ingor itodiarete anapito na ecai na edenyit Donna Kara kotoma esoo lo ajat
New York, Septemba 15. Aputo na inomit Reuters.

## Edou ekeudkan Etop

AJIOK luka Hutu kesi apoto
maurukio etaun lo Goma ko
ida nako Democratic
Republic of Congo korai ere
ko apolon lo ikamaritos
deniyak lukatoker na Tutsi lu
ngarenikitus ebenjit lo
kotere adoror apugan ka
President Laurent Kabila.

I kate nen da akwapin
nakatakot naka Southern

Circon Development Community (SADC) nu iriamuna
ebaetsu kesi itemitemeteno eje loko Congo korai eriakiding
Congo kede abenyak kano ajakin airiamun Egoitocloko Congo
airiamun kede abenyak etena ebe Uganda ka Rwanda kesi
mansknak nesi. Ebe ngul do bon ebeitor airiamun.

Karaner naka aipuc kiding iministan lu ayaara lokakwapon
nako Congo, Zimbabwe, Angola, Namibia lu epuai ediope ka
nako Rwanda ka Uganda na ajarkina Addis - Ababa, Ethiopia
kisi ensi abu kibiror komam acamanar naka apalar ejie

Ungangat lo ack ejai Rwanda ka Burundi, kiding atekerin nuka
Munka Tatu nesi euta bobo alomar toma D.R. Congone iguro
dengokwana.

Ebenjak luko Goma luda asurokitai naebalasa kotabiti kalo
kesi ebalasi ebe arai ajiok luka Hutu Intermahawwe kede luka
Munia kesi akotosi ebe aikamar alarona idegei nako Goma kede
Munani lo erudio. Abakasi abenyak luko Congo ebe abu ejie
Kabadan nawarikany neda arakorere kesi luka Hutu ka Mamai.

Eppunan war kesi ebakasi ebe elonikit do apugan ka Kabila
Munyan eje Kide nako Congo toni Rwanda.

Kara Ebalasa kotabiti kalo ngesi bobo etolonere ineresinei
lo atiarang eje lo Congo ko Grande Baie-Mauritius kiding
Akanapu lit maatukot naka SADC koputokite Nelson Mandela.
Luka eridh Africa. Konye lo engarenikit ekodet lo Congo
Kabandhu Karibungesi abu kilip kanikai abwoik initok Uganda
Kede Rwanda ajakin toma ineresinei ngun ebe nuda apoto

## Asumar UPDF

Na Ewadikan Etop
AJORE naka Uganda
Pequis's Defence forces
(UPDF) nesaremor Kidepo
ka Karenga kockoru Uganda
kede sudan kotupitete
iripontan lu ebakare ebe
elonikit abenyak luka Joseph
Kony alomun Uguad
kiturunitot Kotidodistrict.

Apapola naka Luo, Rapiny
na apaurama 9-15 kolap kalo
nesi abala ebe skomauda luka
ailtunget naka 25, Major
Karim nes abwot awam ke
amagoro na itsing ko Kidepo.

## Museveni

Na Ewadikan Etop
ALIMU President Yoweri
Museveni ebe mam ikapilak
la aduonorokibuomenaiyar
lucie apoto aitakalany apugan
ainyikokit aitopol ripugae
loka demokrase kotupitete
Ikitila.

"Apoto itunga luko Uganda
kiiwamata kagogong ido
anjau aiwadikaon ekisil.
Ngul la ekotoc siya apugan
ko Uganda eyaste nes
kokisila. Konye erut ecie
mam eponio acamakio,"
abala Museveni pac koiner
ke lo asiumi atupiton apolon
sicolonglokamovement, Al
Haji Moses Kigongo.

## Isiramun

Isiramun la tem edingor kano
aingarenikite lucie kwape
luko Kibuli ka luko Old
Kampala kesi ajatala edinget
kec kasudete acamanar
aimurikikin. Apoto
engarenok lu iwaitiin kala
iyaret Shoik Ahmad Mukala
(Kibuli) kimurikikinos kede
Mahamud Ssemakola ailip lo
Old Kampala.

## Esiolit Clinton Lewinsky

## k'omotoka, ebala eripota

Na Richard Akellem
Eripota lo ikolomand epulida
lo angican ngesi Android ebe
esiolit President Bill Clinton
loko United States of America
apese na eswamai eyapesi ke
nabe Monica Lewinsky.

Aba Lewinsky kolimok
angican lo ebe ajaanara ngesi
kede e President kotoma aslo
irwan III Abala Lewinsky ebe
isiolitor ngesi President
Clinton irwan 2. Konye ebe
irwan 8 ajaanara kesi kotoma
aslo na aimalumula
aimulumula.

Eyatakit eripota ebe abala
Lewisky ebe isiolitor ngesi
Clinton kotoma omonoka ke
irimit imetekesi etaun.

Elimunit eripota ngul ebe
adiope paaran abu Clinton
irupak esigala akuwan ke
Lewisky, koniukautum, kusiuli
aibwaikin toma aituk ke
dok cua."

Eripoeti ngul lo etolomuni
angican Kenneth Starr
kinabiiti lo atubor nesi ebala
ebe ajaasi akirji 11 nu edolitor
airahet napolon ko USA
aitepesenia Clinton kanu
alemar koyapesi lo araut
epresident.

Eutas do lukarabet napolon
ko US (Congress) airere
eripota ngul kanu ajanun
kodono arai ejai abwoetuit
nalemaret Clinton.

Koripota ka Starr lo apapulai

445 etodunitat akiro 11 nu
esomat Clinton kopeodorete
aitenom aitepeseniangasi ebe
komam apegakink imortaritos
acie kakesi, ebe einer na esabet
akaulo na adara ebe kissi einer
nu abeit, aitolitol elsomari lo
adyekot ka aimor eyapesi lo
apolon kotoma asomisio ke.

Elsima lo ipuliidan kala
ebwoikits President Clinton
kaimoriarite Charles Ruff loko
White House kesi ebakasi
ebe acamunit Clinton
adiakaret na aisipaper
Lewinsky, kwape nake elopet,
konye ebe mam ngesi
aiwamat adio adiakaret na
elemarere ngesi koyapesi
kwape epresident.

TOMA AIYALAMA
KA ATIONIS DA:
President Clinton kede
na owaike Hilary
apaaran Naebalasa.

Lewinsky

ETOP
PLOT 37 ASCHOOL ROAD
P.O. BOX 819, TEL: 61057, SOROTI

# Kituritete eyapesi loka 'Private Sector'

EYAPESI loka Private Sector ko Soroti ebe nes elosikinit apukor ebank kobuku Serere.

Etijena agwelanaran loko Serere, Lawrence Olupot ebe ekapakina Private Sector alemun 10m²⁰ kanuka ageunia ebank ngol.

Abala Olupot ebe ititingitai ngesi epelu loka aiwadik itunga lu edolete 100 ko Serere lu ekotosi adumun inerio kaingadis kangin. Ekotoi itunga ngul alemun 100,000²⁰ kangin diope tetere kes da etukokinete 10m²⁰ tipi erannos kere 20m²⁰ kerai alosikinet adumun emono lo egeunere aikopaanakin itunga arupian.

Ebe adautu ber itunga 30 alemun arupian kec, apolouke ideuna enaaba lo epol kanu istodolikin nu ipuda eyapesi loka Private Sector.

Etodu na ebe elosikinit teni eyapesi loka Private Sector aijulakin ejautene loko Soroti, mere kotaun bon, konye kituni ocazloi da.

Nasodit apedo ber eyapesi ngol apukor ekoosi lo isisianakinere agwelanarak eipone loitolosere ebisines kotupitete acoasinei nuakwana, nu isipodorete agwelanaran angicun ne ejai arorwa ke ka agogong ke da.

Ipu agwelanarak lu ageutu aisim ekoosi ngol. Kanukangun ebuni aijulakin katipet iponesio loka agwelanarak tetere kes da egeunete aup kakwap.

Mam lem itunga lukocaalo, karaida lupe kotaun ejenete ebe epedorete kesi da apukor ebank. Konye apedo eyapesi loka Private Sector apukor akonye nuka itunga aitelekaarit ko Serere.

Itunga lu ipu eomitos ebe abarak bon ka apugan epedorete apukor ebank. Mam erai kwangin. Kimoirikikinos itunga lu esedeny iriagon kec, epedorete kesi da aiswamaun ibore yepe ius.

Aanyunetnes na ebank loka angor ko Soroti. Apalanitos itunga aingadis ngin kokaru idis lukokau lu apukoro nakatwan Rebecca Nsimbc aingadis ngin koyapesi loka akoru ko Soroti.

Aomitai ebe erai ngin abolia, konye kwana aanyutu itunga kere ebe mam arai abolia.

# OPALAKIRO

Issseredotis loka Katulik edakarete ates naka Fr. Simon Peter Emeru toma ailipakin toma akdiuma.
Immaculate Conception, Soroti. Aputo na inomit Jonathan Maraka

# Atwania Soroti Diocese lokapolon Emeru, papa aisiwen ikalia ipetai

Na Martha Akeflo

KOSABITI kalo atubor araasi 11.09.98 abu ecokon wok bobo ediope Rev. Fr. Simon Peter Emeru, 38, kilanyoni. Erai lem Emeru apolokimbon aicokis nako Ngora neda adauni angesi ekaru ediope bon.

Aurinkolo Emeruko Odwarat, Ngora okaru 1964 olap loka Apali.

Atwani araasi 11.09.98 ido enukakitai omision Madera araasi 13.09.98.

Auriak ke kesi Sidoro Omongin ka Bernadetta Tino, ido korai lo atek er kana irarak. Egeunit Emeru asioman okaru 1970 kiboyete ka papa ke lokapolon Leo Ecugia k'Apopong P/S, kedol atukot naikanyetape (P6) abu kodum

eipud lo alosit oseminare.

Abu do Emeru kolot ageun asioman Nagongera Seminary adaun ikaru iwongon ageun kokaru 1977.

Kemyou ko Nagongera abu kiyataki asiomanka Alokolum Major Seminary neda abu kodauna ikaru nasi kenodi konyet alosit Gaba National Seminary adaun ikaru iwongon.

Itokomunitai Emeru araun esaseredoti araasi 27.08.96 ko Kazbumbala kosodete ayangara awam Toromaneda abu ngesi kodaunia ekaru ediope bon.

Kokaru 1997 aponi kijularai Emeru aidararo Orungo Parish adaun ilapio iuni.

"Abu akirot na koinak itunga luko Toroma aimony akiyo naarai alosete kesi atwaniar esaseredoti ka amina kesi noi," abala Fr. Ejuru lo esilipi kapaanan kana ailipakin ates.

Kedol Emeru Orungo abu kiswama kagogong noi aiwen itunga epeta. Aputu itunga lu epa noi kowenata epeta kalapio iuni lu abu Emeru kodau kangina.

Kemyou ko Orungo aponi kijularai nges Ngora Parish kwapce Parish/Priori In Ngora Parish.

Koiner ke Ejuru lo lem erai aopusia ke Emeru obu kotoma ebe atwakiasi itunga luko

Ngora esaseredoti lo akukurananoi, kagogongokite aiwam ido kiyunite noi akirot na Edeke.

Ikoni nen etwanit Emeru akudona aijanakin adaun ikaru iyare ibon ido aringa arace ugat cut.

Ejukan Gerald Etibot lo abwoikit ebworok ka Ikristayon lukio Ngora ngesi abu kijienik ebworok ebe abu Emeru kimunungikin ebonguni k'Akisim Parish koupasi ka Fr. Joachim Otai. "Abongunete Fr. Emeruka Fr. Oraik'Akisim kiriamakinos ka emong lo alacakina kane awenitere kosodi ailatoun erot.

Aputu do kesi konangata akejukemong kosodete arasar amang ekomio lo abu kocaka kesi erono noi. Keputu itunga aingarakin kesi apotu kodumutu Fr. Emeru ejaasi aokot okume ediopet ka aimulat okume ediopet ido kobala ebe kobukokinai ngesi akipi ido koyangarai adekis. Kwape amamiar eipone alosit abu kotiomik engarakinak ka eipone loyangaret ngesi ka Fr. Otai adekis kodau do Fr Emeru eringa edumuna elose" abala Etibot.

Abwoikiton auriak ka Fr. Emerukoraipapa ke lo apolon, Ejkt Leo Ecugia, ngesi abala ebe ejai lem ngesi amuno ebe erai Emeru eka amin.

Kosodi Ejkt Ngob ka kingarakite Emeru koy asiomanka ngesi abulok ebe ebworok ebe erai len la etunganan lo eyapasi kosiana ido kibwok aijanakin akeneenai ingaren noi adepar anutam akekuan.

Abu kiyatakite ebe di Emeru etuao lo na emunonikini itunga bon ik kere korai da aanyunetnai ajaasi lu ipu.

"Erai atwanare ka Ro. fr. Emeru atwaniar na epel on ne ejaasi itunga loko Nge bon konye Kumi sen etodoliki da nu ebaken er erai ajar amiganti manuade je lo atubor arai Rev. Fr. Emi ediope kangun kala apd kuyautu itunga loko Osok Kapir, aiwen epeta ido akad kangin apupunete ebe awan ngesi," abala MP naka arpa ko Kumi, Christine Among.

Ebaluwa lo abunit kote ek Bishop Gerson Ilukar lae, Chruch of Uganda iik kosiomakita ngesi Rev. Oke ngesi abala ebe arsi ngin atwaniaretna apoloni idebe akumunakad upakir eke kah Emeru.

Abu da kiyatakite alimokit lariak ka adumun atitngikai kana Imuno da ebe edunod Rev. Fr. Emeru aijar na met

# Ebarere awoere

IPA - Apupi eong aiyalama aboliai idio ituan ikosoisinei luko Teso, kacut lu emuduk Lazarus. Okwakol, John Otinga, Atude. Araasi lu edukete atek er wok na Iteso. Konye etasiono noi nabaran nami oni Iteso kijeni eipone lodumunet abolai. Iwomit oni ebe agwelanar iboro ka aelokore, agana ka ajaul kede eduka nesi bon eipone lo dumunet abar.

Imugaana icie kwape nat Paul Kallelo, Sarah Brungi, Lodewin Livingstone Kasdol ebaritos kanu awoere kotoma Amugaana da.

Ongurtakol David Otaget Kampala.

# Kilakara isio ne ajai Opio

IPA - Isio atumunak luka Kasilo kesi iyalama noi nama ejai Ejkt Opio Valentine kanu ngesi akorakin atumunak imopiran uni, ngol lem ediope ka akorakin amopiran aongon nuokinga ka aongon nukotoma nu egali mama ajaasi lu etelekarak elaagono lo aicak igalin.

Eyatakit eong aisialamakin nges noi kanu bobo ngesi adumakin atumunak luka Drama emotoka lo alosioto aparan kangin.

Ajakina alagano lo otem Kadungulu neda amununumere aparan na atumunak kobuku Kasilo araasi 10.7.98.

Apo tu atumunak iraata ikto toma Kadungulu PS ka adekis naitetet na Kadungulu.

Henry Martin Ewau

# Amunaar cabo epost

IPA - Ajaasi eong kede aimony na epolo noi ne ajai erionget lo eposta.

Sek eroko erionget lo edumuna abasain nu itoloset ibaluan ationo ibaluan adolere atipet.

Agaun ne adumuna erionget lo abasain kec edila atek er adumunun ibaluan atipet.

Ajokuna aiswamae lo adaun bala awojau na lapio, kobongon do bobo aasub bala ne amamiatar erionget kede abasain nu.

Aanyumet, abu eong kadum aswam adio na

etijenarit apapula Etop. Kesunyakin aijukar atipan abu nppengin kideuna iyarel loni negoloklu Nukaumokin, kadun ne ejukarit eong, apotilamokin eon ebalua (applica kiyapite.

Aso ngesi eko itunganan yeni kalo posta yeri ejagin kotam ben eroko emunara na

Iboko Lugaza

# Kolemasi eranga kolbwa

IPA - Apupununei eong ileicka akadanakin noi aanyunun icie tunga igalalaete akiring kobworo. Ekwamakitos ice eranga, aisisonor kokiala kede akiring. Ice igalalaete emaroge da.

Mere obworo bon, konye asuban da kacut koreria kalu

ekeriaka, emina aibwokonor ka arokoklu amam acece. Ice iiboro kwape esukali ka asi iyanganarete opuono.

Tolbert F. K

ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibar (September) 17-23, 1998

# Adol apak Iteso, Ikumama ainerun

Acamunit eong ebe adaka na adolai Soroti mam erai na fiat ka Africa. Ekuisulio adaka kana nese politialana akurian erai agirit aijulanakineta kolpugae. Nese duir etapitor tu itelekanaro abatanar okthel atidi epugan na itunga. Mam itunga lu ertokok acamunitos nuka demokrase. Ekot Politiciano acamakit etunganan lo duo

albuwes ka spedor ke. Arai eseutiu itunga etuan kec, ebusakinit lu ibiroroe acamun aijulakinet ngin. Emamei amada lusitororoe adakun keda egangitok kec, aigur epugan na itetet nada eseunitos itunga ikulepek. Mam da edolit aitaraun typeesin luka politiks bala ekabekanut.

Ibore icle yen amuna

politiks wok nese aijang emwabe. Apotu itunga ijangata emwabe erono, emamei kwana epone logearet aijer na itetet. Nu atupakia nese aigur ekonsulo loitetel kobaksai ebe, "ajokuna koleje epugan ke, mam ekonsulo ejanga". Ipu indiritu itopolot Soroti, mere araut apolokiton LC 5 bon. Irotin icle, kes yes

# Abongor akoru Iraan lu eyangalkinete apak na euriana kwape etapitor yes elimonokin staker.

Adolo do apaki iteso keda ikumama ainerun istere Soroti epedor! aupa ka luze distridankotoma apolo. Lo epolu ibiroroe ko LC 5 erai bonat Ditriet Movement chairperson ekot kojensulu ebe akotos itunga aijulakinet.

Paul Olingro
Jinja

# Amunaar cabo eposta?

IPA - Apasu eong kede
amony na epolo: no ne ejai
enonget lo eposta.

Sek eroko enonget lo
edumuna abaasin nu
itoloset ibaluan ationo
ibaluan adolere atipel.

Ageun ne adumuna
enonget lo abaasin kec edila
ateker adumunun ibaluan
atipel.

Ajokuna eiswamae lo
adaun bala awojao na ilapio,
kobongon do bobo aipub
bala ne amamiatar enonget
kede abaasin nu.

Aanyumet, abu eong
kadum aswam adio na

etipnant apapula wok na
Elopi. Kesunyakini eong
aijukar alipan apaaran
ngpengin kideuna isabitin
iyarei toni negolokmere.

Nukaumokin, kadol eong
ne ejukarit eong ebalawa
aponialimokin eong ebe abu
ebalua (application) ka
kiyapite.

Aso ngesi elipitor idio
itunganan yeni kononget
kalo posta yeni ejeni ationis
ngin kotam ber aitacaan
eroko emunara noi.

Ibokit Thomas
Lugazi-Mukono.

# Kolemasi eranga koibworo

IPA - Apupununei eong ileic
ka akadanakin noi
aanyunun icle tunga
igalalaete akiring koibworo.
Ekwamakitos icle eranga,
aisisonor kokiala kede
akiring, icle igalalaete
emaroge da.

Mere oibworo bon, konye
asuban da kacut korena kaki

ekenaka, eminas itunga icle
aibwokonor iponesio lu
arokok lu amana akiring aras
acece. Icie idadanarete
iboro kwape, amunyu,
esukait ka asanin da. Mam
kanganarete iponesio lu
opucino.

Tolbert Patrick Edait
Kapir - Ngora.

# Kojaunos ipoliisin ne edokere

IPA - Elipit eong ekisi lo
alosit korofin kotupai epone
lota: ipolisin luka turatik
ajaut ne edokere amotokan
kanu aanyun ebe ibwoki
emotoka enaba itunga lo
ecamakit ekisi bon. Ekot
kojaasi bobo icle ipolisin
orotin (kwape lem sek) kanu
aanyun ebe mam etekerak
amotokan iyasete icle itunga
kedautu anyoun kana
edokere. Eloket Andrew

# ANGALEU

## Abilata ikokolak adekis ko Bululu

Na Peterson Afilio

IKOKOLAK lu mam ber enaaba kec ejensna kesi akawan apaasana 23.08.98 apotu kebilata adekis nadidi lotem Bululu. Kalaki kosodete angatar ihoro lu adekis.

Apotu ikokolak ngul keruboto ikekia kede imunameninkosodete akokoar ipalisin iwongen, eikaapo eswaman adekis, atsucia nu edupio arwatut, asaduku na ipisot ka ihoro icir lu ididik. Amuron na adekis kana, Jane Echengongeri abalarbe aponi kodumanal ihoro icir lu akokoaritai edapatitai orot lo Bululu, apulejicnaka akipi.

Apotu ipolisin ka ijaka kokerata aimo ihoro lu kosodete aduman kec kere kitema 15,000/-lu ajamitema asaduku na engadanakini isirigin lu adekis.

Apotu da ipolisin kodumata eikaapo lo eleleba icusman la ahlere ikekia.

Ejaasi kwana ihoro ngul kaigaslin kec ikokolak kanpai polis Bululu Polis. Eringa ngiciio emusago lo.

## Abuikin Apalamio aitala esokooni kec

Na Peter Opita

APOLOKITON akiro nu aila kotem Katine, Ejkt William Oryokotngerhebo abokobuk agwelanarak lukmokooni lo Apalamio koitela Ojom, etem Katine, Soroti aital esokoonis rami 4/9/98.

Kapak kangin abu Oryokot kedit esokooni kosodi arzaborikin agwelanarak lukmokooni aitala esokooni ka itogoi kec eringa ber kesi kegzuna aneam imulimbore yen ikamunit agwelanar kec.

Abala Oryokot ebe ipulioko

agwelanarak lu Apalamio noi naharai ebe kageunet na elap kalu abu ebe ngesi kikwenyarte kesi aitala aboinar kec kaputan, konye ebe kebeloki ngesi epur, kopotu kesi dakibelokoi ngesi ipuran kez tapi do ngesi itosomai agogong ke.

Eyatakit Oryokot ebe apaasana nu apurio ekolera, abu butto ngesi koinyikokite agwelanarak aricit nu aila konye be pac na alosio ngesi okomi Soroti adaon isabistur iani, abu kobongo adumun ebe inyadakak esokooni noi.

Emuron lo akonye, Wolfgang Gindorfer (kediany) itodinikini imurok lu atagoro ilabira (lovi) jne ibwaanakinio akonye nu ejai etotile, ko Tororo araasi 5.9.98. Aputo na inomti William Oryokot

## Aseun ekomiiti lo adekis nako Kapi

Na Gilbert Engimu

EKOMITI lo ebuni airere epona biawama adekis nadidi nako Kapir sad-dipensary nes asekun araasi 31.08.98 kaduketa kanuotem Kapir. Na epolokiteicolonglo eyait naka amukian kotem, Alice Salama Opada nesi etolosi

aseo na neda aponikosennere Gilbert Engimu kwape apolon eicolong (Ioka Health Unit Committee).

Icie kes Mozer Enun kwape oogadas kosodi Ebena James kwape egirigiran.

Imeeban kes Atim Solome, Opeduno Itopa, apolokiton LCI, Ojuk Paulus Adongo Helion.

Abu apolon eicolong LCI Eladisi John Kokas kiser luamui kosekunai ainghasno lucite da akiro noiswanaka aimor aominis.

"Almorikikina keda iponesto buijokak kes duc eboics swam ingareo," abala Eladisi.

Apolon etem, Nya Mickael egesi shay angakwaneyangasana tema akong.

Eyatakit ngesi do akong itonga duc asaiana eteena arai kedlaka isa meryemoni.

"Itonga kera lo ngul ibucanarete," abala

# Epone lo itikokinet ekolera

Tetere aiku ekolera, adeka na ailep na ededeng kakere, iburai aidar aila ejok noi. Imorian na aidar icoloonin kolaete, ailosenen akanin akaulo na aitosom ecolooni ka airapit inyamat

ABINANGUN adeka na ekolera ka iboisionu ipu ko Uganda ka akwapin acie nuko East Africa kosaibitin, eika lu atuboros ido aar itunga lu ipu. Konye era- ekolera adeka na kipedoni oni aitikokin arai kitup oni ikisita lu aidar aila

Inyobo ekolera?

Ekolera nes adeka na etiono noi na eyangauni aiegor. Einakini ekolera itunganan ailep akipi ka ailek noi. Egear ngesi katipet tai.

Edauni do ekolera akipi kakuwan kitunganan katipet, kodisiantunganan agogong, kolwani da, aciepak akaulo na isawan iuni arai iwongon bon, arai mamyen adekan edumurti amukian na abet katipet.

Inyobo eyauri ekolera?

Ikur lu ejaasi aikoik itunganan kayen edeka ekolera, kes eyauneton ekolera. Ikamunetledo icie itunga da adeka na arai kemalata akipi da adeka na arai kemalata akipi nu ejaasi ekurut lu (kotoma obar ka alekan).

Ekora da ekolera arai kibngitingata itunga ebar

ka alekan nu ituan kayen edeka ekolera, do konye bobo aitingiting inyamat, akipi arai aseputian ka asaanin komam ilositos akanin.

Ne etapit adumanakin ekolera nes agaria nu ajonok, arai nu mam ipoltai ejok, ka inyamat icie lu angololin, araito ka idisasio lu ejokitos, ka inyamat icie lu adoo ekolera toma nape

ipoyo.

Aimat akipi nu adaun ekolera adore toma, nes ecie epona lo ekorar adeka na

Anyouni atiaketait kalepor na duc.

Ekora ekolera atipet ido esurwonokin itunga lu ipu kaimoriant. Kipedori oni aisibwoun aisiarakin na ekolera koponesio kaluta

Arai elepi ituan akipi duc

duc idokolekida, korurukaan nges adekis katipet.

- Kipurak ekia lo eyari ikur obar ka alekan kayen kadekan, ka oboro kere lu itosomal ngesi. Kowany da ebe itunga kere itosomaete acolooni ido idarete kes kolaete.
- Kinyalak ekia lo eari ikur toma akipi nu ilosere coloonin.
- Iburai itunga ailot akanin

kec kode esabuuni akaulo na aitisom ecolooni.

- Kidor akipi kere nu matan kanulosetasaanin, nu ipot inyamat.
- Kisukunya icuc konyamat ka icoloonin.

Iwanyuneta

Ekaangakwangat ebar, bala akipi nu ipoltere emuceen. Ibane yen adekanirwanipu. Eleki da ngesi noi ido ekwanguuni ngesi,

kobenenar akuwan, atipet, isubunici ng eyengane da

Nu edolit aswan

Kitidisia adaun na ko pope kato altand y adekan akpi ka itab ice lu ipu (mes ajin. Adaun na akipi akip kitunganan nes da eyaremenat itungakat aciepakkotoma apada auni arai aongon bon, mam isunyanda atbik korurukkara yen adeka adekis katipet.

Arai katwana itunga iburai ebworok eba nuta:

(1) Ainuk atea katipet la aidaribo lu efeekla.
(2) Mam atuko noi ka ejai afes.
(3) Mam aikit ka alingit ates
(4) Kibdala anyamanyamala kabwoti
(5) Kimikata itunga edarete etembnokinete ma atwana, aipoore era akip inyamat.
(6) Kiany ebe ibaneen kya akanin ejok noi tena esabunyu eroko sakita inyamat.

ETOP Naiwongsoot. Otibar (September) 17-23, 1998

# AKRO NU ANOOR

Akron nu aanyanaret naka Katulik ko Soroti ibworos Fr. Simon Peter Emery kakelesia nu panaculate Conception Cathedral, Soroti Narsabiti na atubor. Akangas na epikipik nes araakini Fr. Emery Akisim, Kapir, Ngora Naikanret na atubor. Aputo nu imomat Jonathan Maruko

# Ejaun aseo k' BUWOSA 19.9.98

Akubard Akellem
EUKOT nikangor, Bukedra.
Amen Stragler's
operation kobuku
kabda nesa dse it agar ane
gernek lo inmai araasi
9 98 komam atwanur, adas
sapanaepolokit BUWOSA
ku bobo atupiton apolon
along LC 7 Kami, Margaret
apoutaripatur.
earasi kode Ziny keyapesi
arasi 8.09.98 abala Ilaborot
ta egeanio ber aise
gernek lo itemwan luko

Kidongole kode Kachumbala
eraasi 19.09.98, kobatu Malete
kode eraasi 20.09.98.
Kroodi etem Bukedra eraasi
22.09.98, Abala Ilaborot ebe
ngesi ebusi apolokite ane
ngin.

Dydakitngesie ebe engarenok
lukidetla kode lu kegurupun
lukoronyiakesirananineriani
26 09 98 kepolokites lu
asekanio kotem aseo ngin.

Aarunio na apolokiretok
BUWOSA kere konoriaritos
apolon eicolong arai

(Manager), atupiton ke kode
agrogeran nesi ejakin olap
Okitobaokaru lepelukaparan
kana ejakiner aurianet na
ekaru kuna imerhan keere.
(Armed General Meeting),
nada ebe itjemario kedaan
asean engarenok lukokwap,
abala Ilaborot.

Nadikini Ziny abalowa na
etedanti acamanar kes kode
lo erai acoran (yuroo) luka
BUWOSA, Dr. John Peter
Eselfe lo eginantai araasi 6/9
98 kabdokite Esele akan, abs.

Ilaborot kitacau ebe, ebeit lu
opudasi adwa asenino
angarenkin atukot, aiwadik
ber abalowan nu ilipet aswani
nu ebet adolokin Dr. Eselfe
erako 10 9 98 kedola. Ekotoi
kodeite ameeba na ekotoi
adwa adoketat naka S-A.

Ipeleik lu aingad apiyai kode
agwelaturiketo ebe emiokiniu
lu mani eraasi imeeban lu
atukot, konye korai qusion.
"Igolit ber kisi iyapesin kere
toni ne esnanere engarenok
lu iteriak," abala Ilaborot

# Adelosi apesur ebe eridaitos auriak kes

A. Kokao Omeja
ASSMAK naka St. Elisabeth
kab 5.5, Kaletok ko Soroti
epe apetu kiloputa auriak
ekana eja lo erai atupiton
apolokiretan atessa ke Soroti
urik, Nathan Otabo ebe
an auriak kes icie
dunuktas kes ailajauru
apaku nu iyengiatur kesi
an.

Abalasi apesur na
finokirete A/DEO ebe
finokirete auriak kes icle
aik kisi ido ebe apakio aci
nese ugonikin kes toma
urik lede kapulin. Ebe
naro kina apur kesi eupasi
aenmak lucir lasap.

Apeta bobo apesur
apudus ebe auriak icie kesi
e koniak le ayanganar
terur umur kede kakes
apuk ebe kana ayongit ebe
apuk kapulu ipallon kes
aik uatar apesur kes.

Abalasi bobo acie ebe

ijainikino kesi apormentoma
odiro tetere ebe auriak epatana
awanyanar kes kapak na
elomanaratak ingakware.

Abu Otallio kicorak apesur
ka auriak kes akangaskinener
elemekana alemur less kwanat
kangul.

Abala Otallo ebe edolit
auriak kacut lukapapa
anyaraan apesur kec do
singitingit ka einer kakesi
kotoma aiyapepera na
ikamunitos aijar kez.

Abala nges ebe siri apese
kekurianar aingitan papake
agwelakin nges epate kotoma
lo apesur.

Enera Otallio kwape
epejonon lo angosib kapak na
esisianakinereapesurak inotu
asianan, ikonole lu ejiani
kanu ipudai ka nu iponesio lu
eriaro (current counselling di
paidanor), ido anyaraunitai
auriak, imerhan luka PTA ka
BOG lu esomerokalo.

# Akadaki Emorimor
kanu epipai k'angor

Na Martin Aiku
Kokong-Ngora
EMORTMOR, lokorony
Kokong ko Kapir, Ngora,
Epirimori/Opiongesi ecoraks
angor sisac aipipa ikilink
naarai ebe ayar epipai ikilink
luipu Ecoringesi angor nuka
atutubet ke naiunist 9.09.98
ko Kokong.

Abala Opio ebe ekot angor
atsisaan amina, arimar ka
aijaanakin kecekilink, konye
mere aitupokor emwangit,
akalanyanut kosodete alout
aijaajatoi ilita kode ikee lu
itagoro aippukilink. Alimani
ngesi nu naarai ebe apotu

ikilink koyangasi eripunta
neke ebe alomakisi angor acie
admyonokin imakisai apestre
kede akwes nuijam ka
ainyalanakin odiasin.

Eyatakinit bobo ngesi ebe
koleje, kageunet na ekaru
1998, abu abera kainak
akilenke epipai konye abu,
akokkilelebunduadu
awanan naarai arai eku lu
ajai enorit acie. "Anyoni do
ajokis na epipai?" engisist
Opio.

Abala ngesi ebe epipai
"einakin" laasurup
kungapikitos iseria kisi erot
lo lomunet umudiar ere."

# Engitasi angor nu akinei k' SDDP

ANGOR na koleje elipitos agangat naka akinei kane ejai Soroti
DistructDese lepenestProgrammakes engitaritos lopac asruno
abwokin/SDDP kodela Akersaan, etem Orango Amaria, Stephen
Eisale nu agangat kana iwadikaanis William Okello

Ajakait losce Akello nges engisst Eisale ebe "kiui budo akorio
naka akinei? Arai mere kwangin kinyakak sido isisi siiriginkosi
elukamit lu apotu isisi kalemunitos kanika aiwadikaunor."
Abala Eisale ebe ebeit ber kesi apukot ekaunta kobank nesi
konye elemunia/SDDP ikapun lu akinei.

# Ne adumuna ateker ainyam kates apese

Na Christine R. Ina
ARAI ihore sibworo kilosit.
Ekote nen

Konye kotoma aronis, ne epeteteto ates kana twan, mam
asubit sibworo nepecepe da. Akapites itunga abetei, kiretai
netaikupuatiepewai. Edildilitositehpaici arakinei, kinekets
icie ti akokorei, kosakasakatos amakio kepuwai etitio.

Arai ihore amumu ajat, ipajan kanatwan kesi lu eilitos awate
koonyasi ebe kotacai akokee natwusikini okiliokit komam
emanyitai.

Karaiskarai adeka acie nakwaptai aari abera na, koraida lem
totoke nakaurian ngesi ebedeki nges, kore okilenike, apotu
ipajan ke kopony, ededeng noi "kotokistoi enyanga" hala
apolokites aiyar apese kisi.

Nu aumokin, arai totoke kanatwan abu kolepor obukec
aumore ipajan ke ketwana apese. Arai ainyekin ber ates
ipeteteikanon kokeriya obukec, amairon bala 15 anyoun kore
to aronis.

Eponitai do kangina enokete akonye kobala "ajore" na ikilink
sung tai. Mere ebe kana asourian na itawann ebe atwana
akookec arai inas ikey, konye edelelei ebu arai anyamun do na
anyagan abunit? Apota "amuruk" lu kitibwoutu adu akitot na
ekamunit sibworo arai aten.

Abu Otallo ker koraai atwanare apese/abero kana konkamute
korokec ne eurikitai, ingai budo abeit iudem iharen amanyia
nges arai erai ngesi na adolit amanyar?

Kotoma aijen ka naka okisil, na acamunit eong da ebe edite,
ecamukitai ekilinkit kede aberu, bon ebe ediparitos kesi ikaru
18 lu apolou, sibui kodukone - bon ebe camanara kesi. Arai
etacacemaaliarai mam ecamunitelui lo apolonkerabetnaka
C.A itunga kwa kangul aiboi naarai apolokoros ikulepek.

Inyobode engasere itunga kopone kido ketwana aberu
kodukone loitane elemutere iharen arai ikapun, konye kojeni
ekisil edukime kes? Dobudo arai ketwanski ekilinkit 'ore'
abero ikwakin bodo ai? Arai erai einono da ebe etupitai kane,
aumit adol apak acakar epone ke. Kinyekanai asesen angor/
apesur kwape nu nyamet, toni erwakitos da! Okwe

# Ekude: ajoto 2 kokanisa

Na Oriokot Aurike

ANGOR aangon kesi apotu
hapurutuemakode lo asinimo
amaria nawa epai kokanisa
loka Si Stephen Catholic
Church, niga Katakwi
Narsabiti 6.09.98, luaparan
akaule na ailipasinei
angitakin.

Na ecumuni ejie ngesi aberu
na ebe Fatuma Ayago, 21 na
iboyete kode ekearit lo
sibanget naka 61 Bn Katakwi
lo ebe Okwar.

Abu ebe Ayago kopupunite
ebe epoperes okilenike ka
apese acie na Ocorimongin,
na ebe Kainatik Winnie, ide ebe
abu je ijaikinite amulit esawa
ke ainap.

Apak ngin akaule na ajenun
ebe ajat. Amulit okanisa ailip,
abu Ayago kolotuidar Amulit
okek lo ekanisa.

Nape engetakini ailip,

elomuni Amulit kinga,
komzedari Ayago ngesi
komorosing abala ebe
"Koyangas ekuuwa kwape
kwana. Mere ija lem na
itaparot okilenika?" Abu
Ayago koraiak asim Amulit
kede akan ke.

Abu do totoke Ayago na
ebe liatla koloma ojie kwape
abu aupake Amulit, na ebe
Akude Grace, kosomakmor
uidip Ayago epur.

Abu Akude ikamaros ka
lcela cerecer koruosi awate
bala emupira, imakakina
Ayago da ka Amulit anyara
awate netai.

Ipolosin lu ajassi ailipes
kingarenikite lo ebe Orwakin,
kesi apotu kodioka angor na
kosodete ayangar ber
polio.

Katupa Eisp angor na polio,
abu kodum kesi eroko
emoronoros noi.

8 ETOP Naiwongonet, Otlibar (September) 17-23, 1998

# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

## KAURIANUT

### Arocar epoliisit
Na William Otaala

EPOLIISIT leitawamai Tororo D-PC Daniel Otto nges amcasi ipolilisit katu ebe abu qepar akiteng akejo ke akaulo aikamun edaka komusirika loka ekitndab.

Araasi 3.09.98 nesi arocarero Otto kongsi kalu eperete ipolisin. Itipemamian nges katu apepar akejo akiteng ke Eikt zuby Mugsiba agwelanaran loka kausili k'otaun Tororo.

### Alemar 26
Na Gilbert Enginni

IPOLOK 26 kea ppon kineyengunai aitem esolo kotem Kapir, Ngoni araasi 31.08.98. Atapilon CAO lu eyoli ebuku Ngora, Sanon Akiteng ngonetsengunikeni. Ipolok lu efipiton alemaro kesi araasi 70 kubalani icir ebe arsebasi. Lu epu kakesi mam alemiton esolo agsun kokaru 1994.

### Aweni ajion
Na Richard Akellem

ESAPAT Michael Emang ngesi abu adyeket nako Bukedna kotubok awenini adaun elap edinpe karutuhet aruiman oitu: 45,000/- katu rjie kates.

Atubon lo adoketait kana eyarek kopolokite adyeket nako Bukedna, lobo Michael Apodo ngesi asisunakisii Emang etube lo emusagu ke kana twongonet 3.09.98.

Arsi aramakam na ekotini loka, Ndiwubulo kates aiboss naka lo ekatina ntesi etsukusi ezir.

Ewadikan Etop, Nico Akwang (teten) ikopakini asisman Etop, William Emenyu lo Aloet Arapai 10,000 lu abu ngesi kiteleka kanu aswalun ebaluwa kotona Etop, App. 5. Aputo na inomti Emmanuel Akelem

## Etobwoun LC1 kaswam itia .159m/=

### Na Richard Akellem

APOLON escolha LC 1 lo Omolokonyo Kumi William Okurut Ayswa ngesi aposti kistbwounai kaswam ebe kami ebalitul eitsisomae lo apua 159,000/- nu ekaasulo.

Etobwounu Okurut araasi 28.8.98 kadioket naka LC III Kumi nada ajaikina togo lokaurianeta kotem Kumi kopolokite apolon escolha LC III Kumi, Ilonzo Emenyut.

Uboikino ekoori lo katu angican arsi etolitoite ten Okurut apuyu, kunye abu

### KUMI

Okurut kopeg kobala ebe etosomat ngesi apuyu ebe airienyia aswairan nuko Omolokonyo kede Okouba.

Kingisi Okurut azedun adis aiwadikanta na itudunito intosomae lo apuyu katu, mam abu kopedo alemun kobala ebe amanate.

Kingisi ngesi alimer ajenak ke da abu kotema ebe itonga luko Omolokonyo kere kesi ajenak ke.

Abala Emenyut, ebe araasi lu isergin lu atukanario kosoloi O'Pui kobeste asalukit aitepul eitelu kokaru 1998 konye ebe mam eitosomae loka 159,000/- acai.

Etobwoun itilo iteat loka LC I Omolokonyo kibiokit kania airereor epone lo ber sen etosomarm apuyu adumun ebe bala etititolita, nesi do nen epokta Okurut.

Apom kijaarai ngesi acikum nada engin ngesi ocowe ke kaseyareen, kargirak in ebaluwa lo isapalaritere ber ngesi aswam sesko engicto.

## Adelo Edepu kami ajar k' Hajj Okod

### Na Ewadikan Etop

EGIRIGIRAN lo akoru ikite kade jiu'amakko LC II. Edepu ngesi abu ikwenyak LC oka ijak a kaka Bukedna aican apolon escolha LC 5 Kumi, Hajji Omar ya ka ebe naarai adau amopang.

Ekwenyari Edepu LCs lo kairiamun kana diakito aika kage kiding Hajji Okodel kede LCs ka ijaka kete Bukedna.

Abala Edepu ebe ngin ituan kere ebuni ebe dapu kode Hajji bun kwabo ebe aticapak li ica kakso kare kitemokisi atiokitilo nu icir itunga.

Epine ebe animasi yesi okun epolon naarai yesi isengin nges, kunye siri akus amina kek wamak ai isini kire ebe. Okwe kilimiton ber ngesi, amopang epolon, kule kokwenas LCs aimorsarit Okodel elopet.

Ebongokini no enera Edepu, abu Okodel kare mian kete, ajanto aginginak lu eyulioni akiroumei nu tipu epederete aitemokin atiokisin kitunga nu ipu koto ma akotor ngesi akiro kere.

## Ekeu lolo Osukuru ebe

### Na William Otaala

ETEM Osukuru, kebuku Tororo nesi bubo apetu ebuari ke loka 79m/-kanurkaru 1998. 99 lo ikzara kano ejisi lo ekaru lo atubor loka 52m/-.

Nu nes abu apolon escolha LC III Osukuru, Genial Omaari kitiyena kuyapesi ke araasi 1.09.98.

Abala Omaire ebe mam adolu lo eteni Ejei Micheal Ekirapa kepepe ekalani ke Ejei Peter Malaba aiswamak inekaasulo.

### TORORO

Atapet lo edite kami odumana lo apuyu, Abala, Omaari kitiyena kuyapetee ekodian ka atiakanak in edurita kere apuyu nu atukun mu erai airiyak apole kete kau.

Iroitin lu edumun ngesi apesan nu abu akim kikek kete isokun ka kete no aijeng ibuny.

## Ebeit aroikin Ipallisa kanu es

APOLOKITON nu apuyu ko Pallisa distrik, Juton tup Otupots ngon ekwenya itunga lukodistrik, ko abima atinga 30.9.98 kadolei wadikat Michael Ongwara kokaru na abu. Eeje kudum 7.9.98 abuli ebe lu iyapeta azar, istatar, esolo kidekokitete bubo atutubot naka 50% tup egirete cut ebe sudanio ka ayangar adnosa kadyikat.

## Ejai kwana ekisil lo Alupok.

## Adol apak ijo alosit adumun atutubet kon

Isipedorit do kwana Ekisil lo Alupok lo etutubi kirabet na Apolon okaru 1998 itunga luko Uganda ajaut kede aupok koipene kalo ezai, lo etesit. Ijaikit Ekisil ajuaru na ajaut kede alupok mama ejaasi ikulepek kere kede etwasamak da kere. Bicausit da abwinikin na ejai kiding naka alupok nuka mailo. alupok nu itunganan ilupe sobe (freebold) ka alupok nu ititingikitai icir itunganan kotoma acamanara kede ilupe alupok ngun (leasebold); ido itacaunit ikisila lo ikamunitos jaut kede alupok.

ASSODIL Ejaasi kwana alupok nu irionismo toma okoda abu ecanukle ekisil erionismak alupok abesar kesi ikaru kere bicape ecanukline loka mailo ka nu edumunonete itonga ikulek, kotoma butubei 237 (4) (a) naka ikisila kate ko Uganda, epederete itonga adomon abdewan nu alupok. Edokomo Dostila Land Boards kami aiwadik ka aboranakis abdewan kami alaupok kami irionismo airumon. Epedoris ajedukta alupok nu irionismo araun nu itunganan ilupe kotoma butubet na 237 (4) (b) na ekisil.

Entakaki ekisil alupok nuka mailo (no abot) ekabaka itonga kwap- isa (tubo kalo ajekaka kalumien ke). bocanukite da itsun ajaut kede alupok ngun ikar kere. Alupok nu ititinginitono etwasamak da epederes anadik kotoma okod kalo neter, konictere aamun ebe epederes ikulepek alupok mika mailo arai ngul lo ejaasi kede alupok ker ikulepek aborakis abdewan kami anitingikin itonga aitwasam alupok kes.

Eponin adokun Enomo lo isingin kalu Alupok (Land Fund) kotoma Okod lo Alupok listetel kami amgaranakis ikulepek alupok adomun alupok kewasamade ibakat lo epotana adomon.

ETOP Naiwangonet, Otidhar (Septembe) 17-23.1998
IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

# Ebeit Action Aid aijaikin ecaalo loko Ngariam 20m/=

## USUK

"Surigin 'Im kesi eboisi atinsim kanu abok kinaergulo Odont P/S," abula Onyaz. Eyatakit Onyaz ebe eduta 5m/= adokokisu Odont P/S atiskono awongon nu esiomiataidwe. Kayianungun da leebwokire eitelu Odont kokaisulu lokotom Ngariam Eik! (human ka apolon estela Odont, Tom Okure kesi apotu kogregakis uomisinti na abokare ebe kitosomut 5m/= kanu adokio esomero.

Abula Oyunun ebe eausi siirigin lu ebeiter munga alienaria (hukot) ibebudu arai kedukere esomero ebe eipono bo aliigangak nutotortunga? Obu akirot na aiduk esomero koinak itonga seri sumo kitomi ne etutubere ebe kogwafere apiyai ngun akinti. Apolon esiolong LC I Odont Raphael laktat ngasi abulache akuto siirigin ngul kotukaitukai kiding icaoloi ikanyape lu ejasis estela, nede ebeitor ngol ecaalo adumun 2.5m/= kosodi lu ideunosi agwdakinaekomistiakine:

AITOIKIT AKII: Emoya lo Soroti, George Egunyu ka nakawaike kopacit loka Lions Club, Soroti Hotelpac. Aputo na imonit 1 Moraka.

## Ainumunum

Na Sum Ekadu
EBISIKIP traumus Wandera lo awanyanaret na Itulikitoko Soroti, ngesi alimoki ikristayon kere ebe ejaun umumunum epacit lo aiuunu ngit:kanu,2000 ko:Rama, Italy.

Etiyenari Wandera nu kokansua kato Opucet Gweri eraasi 28.8.98. Eyatakit Wandera ebe ebusi epacit lo ajaun kokaru 2,000 bm, ido apak alope, ebusi aiuun nape kilomari oni okaru 2000. Enyarao do epacit ngol e Jubilon.

# Agear aikis akituk ekato

## Agiwokorio

Na Edison Oluka
AJEISIOK loka katsikot naka
ganda National Farmers Association UNFA lu pac
kulumanto kotani lo Soroti
lu kopani kede eipad abusi
kapakiti Kimya kesi ilipitai
kondikpankede liu epulokites
loka UNFA kotemwan
ninge elap Novemba kadolu.
Apolon esiolong SODO 6
kuten Kyare korai emerba loka
KERFA ko Soroti Ejkt Mike
Zona ngesi etejenikin Etup
lu keugesi ke kalo Kyare
Eunai 27.08.98.

# Agear aikis akituk ekato

Na Francis Imalingat
AIKISIO na akituk ekato kanu aitikitik adekanino naka esunoka ka nukoi nesi koleje agear araasi 7.9/98 kobuku Soroti.

Lu epolakit akiro nu ibaren (Animal Husbandry Officer) G. W. Elinkongesi kotoma oltahus ke lo aparasia 27.08.98 nejaso ijaka lu itemwan ka apolok izolongo LC III kobuku Soroti nesi itijenarit nu.

Itejenaarit Ebulu ebe edauni aikisio na ekato kalo elapeduspet ide agear 7.09.98 kotem Gweri. Itemwan lu etupakinete kesi Arapai, Asuret, Kamuda, Tubur, Katine kongetak in do kotem Soroti eraasi 1.10.98 kotoma aibimso ka apuarasia nu edaunitai aitutub.

Eyatakitika u wadikacna mula abu etop kodam ebe ejaun nga mam yet emouni ibaren aikisio aitac nirigin sdu. Mam ebolu etijenarit atiai ikapur kangul.

Icorakitdanesi ijakakal, C II haitemokin naka adokio na aspoi ka asumun da itunga amoun ibaren aikisio napuruc sek.

Kwapereear na akirotna triumuntak wapwok kere, ebe eponio atingakin kangul lu emengeriknese aliesikinet ka aitemonokinetu nu, abula Uloka kethalot.

# Elongi amurak akipi

Na Ibrahima Akaliway
EPOOLIO lo ailongo itunga
umam Iem ilongenenete
Onyaitutne Anurak akipi
mo akukopakin Kami Town
Coatilanani 1.09.98. Aposi
kamutai enilopat ediopet lo
ezeta no i kwape
Omanakowan Opus, loda
tro nam lem idio ituganun
e amunit aidatayakiner
losobte ailong kagogong.

emo kinscanai ngesi ilomi
abwosakin ne ebwosustutier
akipi nu edou. Atipet
logwifumta akipi ajerikanin
nasi ka asabunyu kanu
elonga nges.

Akita." Abula
Omanakowan ekusi
mungoni ilongete. Apolou
akita ke kangun nesi ebe

Ecie lo abu ebuy kikamu
ngesi Ibus Mones ediope kalu
isomaete elegaleja kontrey lo
erot kalo ebeari Ngore lcie
kotunga aklu egiritos ailong
kesi ebe erai aswam keti amar
bon koperete etogoi lumam

aremok agadigakin kosokoni

igassikites kesi apotu

agadigadin ka igaalin koksu.

elongete lu ipwokuna aswam

# Anapar ekooti ekimat okanisa

## Na Jack Okero

ESWAMAN orionget lo amagorun kwape Forest Ranger kotem Kyere, Serere, James Etibungetaiba kodema ekimut lo aicokin nuko Sape Rev. Obenetekontike akudu na ebe nges (Etibu) akou aijangakin. Atakasunette nu araasii 6.09.98 puaran.

Ekimut Obenet loajai euta aitemonokin aisokuny ikristayon, nges aponi kolanokinai ebe anapakit Etibu ekooti ke lo ajai ngaali, kayangar da egali ka itabun ailur.

Aposi italacaraE tibuekootit kaijaun da egasii ka eikapo akaul na aikamunio.

# Agolor eyunan eluk kokanisa

Na Chyu Otekeny
EMULOKOKET lo ebe Odeke
nges aponi kogolorai eluk kede
abero etunganan kokanisa ke
lo edukit ngesi elopet orony
lo Abilaep, eitelu
Korningomeri, otem Kobi
ibukedra.

Abu Ikorat kogolo Odeke
kede akaburuna ebe Apedieso
araasi 30.08.98 kosodi anwegel
nges aponi aerei, akokoreiaam
ka 30,000/= kakonyen naka
ateker, ijakakal, Celuatutubo.

Abakasi LCs luko Kosara nedokokit Odeke ekanisa lo anyaebe ajolor itunga aimoni, angerkec ebe itapaaritaiaisiot kokanisa duc.

Aposi kitutubui atiaikin ekanisa ngol arai bubu kikamun eluk kotomuke.

# Kotoma Aurianut

## Alepor LC1 aiyong lo etem

## Na Ewadikan Etop

APOLON esiolong LC1 Abiligalin. Ogwolo kotem Anyara, Kalaki, Etibu W nges pac abu koi apelei akerit aiyong apolon etem Anyara, Nice O. Akwang lo atubi katutubet kangin ko womite ebe abunit lo etem aikamun nges naarai mam alemunit esolo. Ajai lo etem orotoke alook onomero lo Kaberpita uimani man abokio na ecoloni konomero.

## Arocar agwelanaran kanu abature

## Na Ewadikan Etop

AGWELANARAN loejena nisi kwape Tumbo-Opolotngasi pac koponi iturakina otuja lokopolii Serere kanu ngesi ebe aitolior abature naka emotoka na ayangaritai neke aiyatakis agogong.

## Ebatisai 11 kosamai

## Na Joko Olupot

EKIMAT loka Pomecontal Outreach Mission (P.O.M) lo ejai Kamuda, Soroti, Rev. Ezekiel Obuin nges ebatisa eyutanak 11 kosamai lo Kaminit Kamuda araasi 30.08.98. POM District Overseer Soroti, Pastor John Olupotnes abala ebe apolounaka aibatnao nes atw anere kotoma otunganar lo mojong ka jarius kede Kristo Veto.

## Etoronasi atumunak ecaiman

## Na Martha Akelle

APOLOKITON Teo: Students Development Association ko Makerere University, George Owanyi ngesi pac abu kitorona apolokitotieicolong LC V ko Soroti, loventina Ehamukana ebe epikorongesi alotek agolokina iriamunna ettononokit TEBDA ko Community Centre loka Church of Uganda ko Soroti pac. "Arai ikete engarenok wok nen ko Teo mam do oni ibuni apoloun cat," abula Owanyi.

## Akonyokony aberu ikiliok komatet

## Na Peter Opita

ABERU na ebe Agubo nges abu kitoji ikiliok iyarai komatet akonyokony akamir kanu emeret. Eswamaunos komatet lo Apalamio Opon Katine Soroti 31.08.98 kosawari lu ajotet.

Lokowaike Agubo, Simon Ebidu ka omiceke lo apolon Lowrenon Eweza kesi koponi korwetanarai amunyin kakanin kec kojie lo apurari tai. Aponi kocificilarai esanti it Eweza da.

## Edoki 450 kowenete 2 epeta

## Na Francis Imalinga

IKRISTAYON 450 kesi apotu kodamutu asakramentu loka ispirimasis kosodete ikalia iyarei aiwen epeta kokanisa lo Madera, Soroti. E Vicar General loka Soroti Momiigner Cryptosoma Wabwire ngesi etobisi asuban na kokiree loka Bishop Erasmus Wandera lo ebe adeka kapak kana.

# Esulul ekenep engwalas

## Na Osujo Fells

ITUNGA iyarei kesi apotu ipolisais korocasi ko Public Garden nakotaan lo Soroti ebe kanu aisut itunga ekenep. Ikiliok Isab Adam ka Tom kojena kwape Engwalas kesi aponi kikamunui araasi 4.09.98. Aposi kisutakinai ber engwalas akan ke adiope bon naejai kosodi elala kemaniki eponi lokom.

Koponi do kesi koyangaraine nejasui lu epolokites nu ikisila ko Eastern Division na etaun loko Soroti ne da kopotu isap lo kogegakinesor kokidog kesi kedumun etingites kesi ekenep. Abala Isab ebe arai engwalas nisi abu kotor Kinchingeri alemun ekenep kane ebwaitor, konye abu engwalas da kopegak ebe erai ekenep lu Isab.

Kaponi do Tom engwalas kisutakinai ekenep akan ke adiope na ajatatur koraun bodo ibore elulu naarai amamei eipone lo ti ekoyo arai ewowanara ngesi akun ke.

Abakasi isirikaalei luko Soroti Municipal Council ebe adol ewan awongon kwana eyanganaro akiro itunga kalu esutak ekenep oyapesi kec.

# Elwasikin ekokolan etaget kadyeket ewenio ilapio 20

## Na Richard Akellem

ESAPAT Charlles Okwi, 25, ngesi abukilwatepale kokooti loko Kachumbala akaulo na atubukonere ngesi awenio na ilapio 20 araasi 31.08.98 kanu akoko akonta na etaget kalo ipounono airyam.

Atubon lo adoketait nakiyaret kadyeket nako Kachumbala, Bukedra, Eikt. Richard Olinga ngesi atubokini Okwi awenio kadyeket kananieleba itunga. Kotoma otubu, abu adyeket kongic ebe akokat teni Okwi etaget kopone kalo ajepar kotoma amugogot naka amojong kana ebe lnyamora.

"Akaulo na adyeket na aingsi kosodi ainyabuk ajananuto nu apotu iwaitin iyarei kere kijakisii, kede akaulo nadyeket na aireny ikisila, edeleleu ebe ikokot ijo ekonta ediope lo etaget. Kanukangrun iwenio ijo adaun ilapio 20," abala atubon Olingaesomakind Okwi.

Nepe ijukikini ekalaani lo ekooti, John Nyangor, lo arai etaputa lo Amusugun Olinga toma Ateiso kanu Okwi amisikin, kolacakini Okwi ekalamupale lo da abu kolelia kosimit kalo adyeket, komaraas akowan teletel tai.

10 ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibar (September) 17-23, 1998

# ASIOMAN IMAKIO

# Atutubet na 2 na ekisil lo alub

LANDACT

ATUTUBET II - AITINGIT ALUPOK

21(1) ARAI kelomo amamus apuponor kotoma association spedori District Register of Titles ayaan nake awomisiisit, arai kotupite alipak kotoma alwadikaer na itotomanitos imedian luka association lo edeparitos idiopet kotomoni:

(a) (alwaakin angicio naka aswamisina) nauka Association ka akiro nu eyaanitas amamus apuponoro.

(b) aijukar muka amamus ka apuponoro na ejai mama ke Board arai nejai ilitongananicie yen ewoinit ngesi ebe spedori ningarakin aidyek kotoma ongunget kiding naka imedian.

(c) ayaan awomisiisit nu itotenaarete atutubeta acie ko Constitution ara kokiataluka association kanu ainaic amamus apuponoro naka eipone kangol atakanun bobo koingaten.

(d)aiswamaun nuoworei ngesi ebe edolitos kanu aaitemokin ejautene ido kimorikikin nu ebeit aswam kwa ebalar atutubet na.

(2) Arai kedyak yen erai District Register of Titles kotoma ongunget lo ejai tema association kotoma atutubet na, epote imedian kere luka Association ngin aitup nu ebala Register kotoma nu

ikamunitosaitanang engunget ido epote apuponor ka itunganan idio kere yen eonono eigang kotomo sicul engunget lo ejai.

23(1) Egedori Management Committee ailipi District Register of titles atomar association.

(2)itosomai ngesi afuoma na ebeitor ailipia kwa abalar itutubet (1) (a)

(a)Kilwaikiton ikeswaruk lo eyaitos Association akanis.

(b)Keupas ka nu apotu imedian luka Association kinerat kotoma apok na ajaar ainetun kto na ewaroritai kanu atutant ngun terda aponi kitutubere naka alamar association koc kocamaniton lo etelekartto kaipues kotoma omedan.

(c) Kijukanete nejai District registrar of Titles kotoma aparasia atomon kaingwon agrun aparas na etutubere naka alemar Association.

(3)epedori diistratregistrarat titles acamun naka atomar association arai ewoinit ngesi ebe edolit kony e mam acamun ke ikamuni ajenenin adio nu ejautar Association karaida alemar isolonineika apezan da nu abeit adac kitoni apak ngin acamanere alemar association, nepepe ka adis kere nu abeit aiswanakin ikyaitok association kotoma nu ikamunito apesenis arai apesan nu kiyatakina arai nu

egiranin.

(4)Arai kecamun naka alemar association, ebuni District registrar of Titles:

(a) Aitisarikin akiro nuka alimarok' association, kaacie da nu ebanunote kotoma.

(b)alemar abalawa na etotamikitere Association, ka (e)aicorakin nuki tawama kanu aitodan k' Association ka aijaaro naka abalawa ke.

23(1) Arai kitingit association alupok kojan ka abalawa na ebeitor napok ngustuquone lo eisonie arai luka aitosomaanotei kelator luka itunga, ebuni association, arai kocamaki ekisil luka einomo katutubet kangin, acamun koodi aitipngong ebe alupok ngun tingetegniskere, araboot epowai eraan nu ejaan itunga lu iboyeete kotoma ido kitosomaata alupok ngensana kwape ikabis kanu adumun nakesi, kalupok.

(2)Tetere kana atitingit alupok koipone loka einono, eponioyangagant ekale kwape itunganan kokiula yen erai ikengarrok into ekale ebwokit.

(3) Arai kekutoki itunganan idiopet kotoma ekale, arai ekale idiopet kotunga loka atutubet kwa inerar itutubet (1) karaintere kwangin, aibe alupok nu tingutai kwape na emoritai atitosoma, konye kokiula loka einono, ranakino itunganan ngin arai okale aibio kotomaka

Bart Katurebe, Eminista lo ikisila

(4)Kotoma, epedoro do

(a)arai karai sek alupok nu etingit association kokiror loka itunga lukatutubet, epedori de itunganan arai ekale ailip abalawa nabert koinome kotupite atutubet 5, arai etitle loka aitinganoro kotupite atutubet 11 kana ejautatar ka ewai ke kotoma alupok ngun kotupite nuka atutubeta 6 ka 7 arai, 12 kiton 15 kwape iowamaunotor ka alipan ngin.

(b) arai kebet association alupok nuka itungala atutubet kojan ka abalawa naka einono, itipi don itunganan aai ekale association kijuluk nges ewai lo ebeit nges kalupok ngon, ewomosomoi do association nuka alipan ngin kosodi aitutub nu ebeit aswam; arai kecamu association alipangin egerekino do ikelipan ewai ke kotoma alupok ngun kosodete aitijamkin Recorder aitolom oregesta.

(4)arai ebeit association alupok nuka atutubet koipone loka aitinganoro ber, epedori itunganan arai ekale ailip Association kijuluk inanges ewai kkec lo alupok, ewomosmoi do association nuka alipan ngin kosodi aitutub nuki tawama; ido arai kecamun association alipangin egerekino do ikelipan aigitakie ewai ke kotoma alupok ngun daulo kodao luka Surveyor aipima kosodi registrar aitolom oregesta.

(4)(1) Itunganan yen mam elelikitino itutubit Association aswam epedori ayangar angurian ke ne ejai Land Tribunal ido Land Tribunal nges itigogongi nuki tawama, aitipngong, aitegelikin, aijulakin arai aiyat acie toma nu itutubit association ido kainakin aicorakinetta acie kotupite apedorosionu einakit nges ekisil lo.

24(1) Epedori association, ido ebuni, arai kilipata itunga lukatutubet lu itingit ngesi alupok kokiror kec, agitar atutuben acie nuka alupok ngun kanu imedian atitosom kwape ipudakinotor.

(2) Eponio iikorun luka alupok

12) Hunganan kere yem enam ku itutubi Association kialamikinete koroma olswamap loka sitemonokinetu epedori ejangaar angurian ko nejai Land Tribunal ido Land Tribunal itutubi nukitwama, uitigogong, aitegelikin, aijul ma aiy atukin acie kotsusa nu itutubi association kosodi aijukin aciorakinetu kotoma nu ebeit sewam kengela apederosio nu einakit nges likisilo.

28. Nu itutubio kere kotoma nu ikamunito elapek nu itingitui kotouno, mai korai itunganani elpepet kinegtarai eryonget epete arauf nu etapitos eisono arai ipirenyo arai nu iswamanusonutunga loka atutubet kangan, kilema hoo ebe nu itutubitai ido kisunikiton anger, arai idwe, arai ingwalasik adhe abapok, siiboi kotoma arai sitimana, araiboot kibwaikiton acie eulagitomono ebolito. Attukte 13.34 ka 35 kotoma ju Constitution kotoma nuka eibe, siiboi kotoma arai sitimana abapok adioker mam mete aowan.

29(1) Yen arai citizen yen ko Ugando yen apon koinakinai alapok sitimana adasin apuk na icorakitai koranailapek nu emamei yen abeitoo do kegel toma kotoma apuk na agriyaara likisilo aswannugesipulikito do aitingarensi alapok nguii arai kimonikina e Board eo etudulikitai nuta.

(a) ebe arai aitingarensi ngin na edolit ido korai na abeito.

(b) ebe amameete lu eboyeete kalapok ngan apuk na einakinere kitmomai adasin apuk na icorakino;

(c) ebe arai ajaas lu eboyeete kotoma apuk na akorarere ido kojensuo sut ebe ajaas koti nies, arai apoui kotacai itungannai kotoma akpuk na etomyounere;

(d) ebe atopi acie kere nu ecorakiton ikisila aiswamap kapakio kere; ido

(f) lokan (hectares) aliwatar hon ijulakino ido ne idnan epedoreaijulakini arai kosamu riboarches aijulakinai aijulakini akauinaka aitigogongobe ejoi ni ideana idoodid 6 kijulakin 2. Litingarorote ber.

(2) Arai kijulakin alapok nu edaparete "hectares" akwatar araut nu itingaronsi beti itunganan ebani ilopet aitur, apesan nuka eyae lo itubieti Chief Government Valiant ide erannon, apesan ngun etaciu nukoryuga loka Land Fund.

(3) Etinge lo erai atutubet nuka etinge elopet kanu adarip apuk na icorakitai, lo ijalakitai kotapitete itutubet (1) kotoma

atutubet naa eponiodo aikeikin korann otinge elopet kanu adasin apuk na icorakitai entepitete nu ebakai aitup.

(4) Arai kijulakin ebani de Registrar aibwaikin akue ko toma aballuwa na einakinere, alapok adasin apuk na icorakitai, kibwaikin pu elimorito, aijulakinet ngin ebe "CONVERTED TO PREFERRED"

(5) Araiman ibwaikitai abaluwa ngin akun ka akiro da ngaa, nuka itutubet (4) mam nga, ibirret aijulakinet.

(6) Fiberi Registrar ajakut ka apedor akotukin kinabuna, aryaket nuka abaluwa nuka eTebikamungesaihwikinakabkwape ebalar itutubet (2) kanatubet naa.

(7) Ebani Registrar aibwaikui akantuma abaluwanaka eibinni loka atutubet kwa ejantar itutubet (3) mapep ka akiro da

"CONVERTED TO PREFERRED"

(8) Ebani itutubet (1) aikamun otinge loka atutubet kwap ikamunitor eitinge elopet kere.

(9) Kain alomur abuutuk in aci eboni Registrar aijukin abaluwa nuka e Tida kanu eitinge loka atutubet, lokeikino adoketa iernon eitige elopet kere.

(10) Mam aijulakinet adio ke eukanuni karaida ma ibwaikino akanomaaijulakin karaida aikeikino nakadoketai.

(11) Hunganan yem enam efeik etube loka eboard epede, asangar angurianke nejai Land Tribunal ido Land Tribunal itigogong, ijalakini, istimana, arai iyatukini acie toma ni itutubit eBoard kosodi aicorakind owamain Boardo edoliton.

## Mam eong acamunit ebe igurete Ilukor, Omaria, Mukula Soroti

### Charles Opolei

MONY kitunga kaluko kheremaido nesi erai nabe i nabe ekimo cut ikilikilari ka akot na atiakar eke, kala ibisnol)

Eko komisiot na noi ido ng kanuka egangi akubet na akwarat kere, mye do ibura emunaan i na itunga lako Kaberemaido nisi ejaat kede aomisu nupe po nge.

Ingaertnok lu icaketu, akiro kesi enguriante atitai ne kisi iya nuga lamam cut imoritos akiro nu aimo kario lo ikial kalu.

Ibu kere kupu kijani ebe amu Kaberemaidoe iburikt apudon ke ebe atakamuto kamninei kede budo ka kain bebo eimigatri ece, Kampala (granto)

Kijeni cut ebe oro kere akokes (aiman kitolovete korotin. Dobo folo ingat itunganan egriton Kaberemaido ebe ekot kunmaikina boro kere)

Eong elopat kanuka man acamuni nu emonyiati engertnok loko Kaberemaido ebe Omaria, Mukula kede Bishop Ilukor kesi igureti akwap, ebe kesi da bobi engerites Kaberemaido adamun n ibitrikike.

Erai na aomoom na engwalit ido mam ekoto kotapukinai. Euebalasiehe Omaria kede ka Mukula kesi igureta ejenai nukun. Dobo folo kesi ajanga airingaan epokopi da akiro kisi ebe tetere mye?

Ikoutungaalamonikini eong yesi ebe mam oni ipedori ailepulmin akwap wok kowaitin lu atiakatuka.

Ibure cut emunaanti

Iwokotunga naku Kaberemaido nesi duc kesi areikite ainingoknia kis ne ejado face.

Nasodsi macan wok luangina mam icie ekotoukoti akara ebe erai kesi Humama Ekotosi kesi kotukata, ebe eraasik idepak Hungar.

Akironi ho ber aronis araut Ekanamat? kitingaibokacmi

kolo kelimokini Lokasutan ebe akotg eong araun nanganan mutat.

Epone lo nesi einakit iwokotunga ejaasi kede aomisionu ebalastar kesi ebe icikakitai kesi apolouke ebe emamei idis ibore kere epoderete kesi aswam (infemony complex).

Ekoi Ihumama acamun ejautene kesi kmodete alimor ebe eraasi kesi da ajeker na ejaasi ka agogong eibwa kanikke.

Emamei idis ibore nepecepe da erono kanen. Erai hon aomoom kue nesi Lingalangalai yesi ebe kikwiman yesi. Karui ber angin ebo ingat ho kikwiman yesi. Ebe kanubo inyo, ido da dobo adamun inyo!

Ibu singueta nu ekotos abongonakineta yesi do ikalapok jamato. Konya ibore epol neu Ihumama ariengan kmodete antenua annuny kesi akonye.

Araibot Sembabule ikway yen konia tai kede ibukui ke iyarsi hon edumuni edistrikt dobo konye folo K'maido epol tu epona ngol kede amongin kere inyo mam etiakakinere ekiala ke.

Akinot babo acie na itotulikit iwokotunga (Ihumama), ekartuka abeitok. Ekotosi duc ikesakwi konubite bala icie kesi igarete isbucanaretakesi (scape goats). Apoloukeing ko Soroti nami eong epona kikabunga kalu.

Akinosu e ibire ki mam ienete entekn iless. Kelomutu kinga kosodete atereikin apugan annony kisi. Lupekee ka Mukula, Omariaka icie da kesi

ingarakinete yesi.

Kmyekisi asubita bala ibolo lo mgopiton kasinge. Mam ibore erono nepecepe da jus angitanaeibiterkit. Mam esub-bala aibiror apugan. Boti eberai ayaikin hostik (self determination). Kilomukis yesi annuny la akiro kesi (fathers) ne ejaasi itunga aja apolouke kipikori yesi adutsu ibore yesi meketosi yesi.

Ejulakin akwap. Ibore kwan e pol nesi engertnok, juk K'maido aigat eitupan (lobbying) Ekis MPe luangin nangarakin itunga. Ide eke yesi ajemun nu abeit (research). Kijijenetualosik inetukusi ke kosodete apesikin kesi neje apugan kainpara, ked kamunonut, konye meni ye amony la icie itunga la emane aronis. Nepe ononyiata ye cede napenen da mam ye (dumunata aganiyduk) kipinere kalimokis.

# Alomakisi

# Eirumane
ia Richard Akellem

POLOKINITON Bukedea (S), Sobe William Ouelingesi Avisiyaei 1 aisiak eke 'aisi adwe kec lu sap ovumitos ngor kane ipagisator itogei moodi apetier acis ebe mentisi, ibert da yen ayau demgoranai osomero. Emera naffe kaarianet na ekara, na jaikina osomero ke araasi 7,8.98.

Abala ngesi ebe ajatar aisiak pesema 3 m/² kede esomero impolete etace lo isirigin lo zomon anyoun ekara 1997. Abu Ouellekilipauriak agoun ekac isirigin kana agwella tabon la isoman kiteritere angadio kana aitapapan ininianakmis.

Abala apolokiten ekomiiti lo kamamitos akiro nu aduko osomero kain, Mohamed buongin ebei etosematoskesi 592,200/-kana adakokokaru eatuber.

Abala Omongin ebe apota esi kopedosi adukun dakerain na atukono aongon, colonin auni ka eyapesi.
