# EKOTE BO AI?

# Aisupakin ka amanyakin esapat aberu

# Kite Luribbo

Abukawan lirus esudete
akonkit, iru ber auriak
enepat appperikin kede
ia Capree kopone lo
arantoin, sinor ainyam,
ot ka itinkisie na
reedeire kesi nepepe.
ipore kesi appperikin
er aja trore ngul tunga
isian jusero, italia lu
isian ankeru agan, ajenun
renie laka idwe kalu
net abokito auriak da
isianon tonik.
Aiarat na konye ejaar
enon kepapake apene
u lere ejaar isubunit
in napakinere apese
unis (acaat) akan
akalany konko apese
ul na liwanan ngun
man lere ka eselepat
nore pisin.
Ontoro do ebe alokto
ahes) apese arai
anapone ingok koreet
aika makdun, iporotol
aljula aisi torto, alinite
ka laka atwaran, angabet
ke, nani na ilikiotor
akonkit, lirap ainula
nora apese, astigiranut
na na etamiat
akokit nana
taka auriak kesi.

Apak na ejaar apese orekec
itelepat, ajotoenente kede
karataake (toto esapat) ediepe
togo adaun apak nape mja,
kijakanakini tataake ageri
abukonokin okooke ka
papaake akipi nukilonget da
ngin bung.

Ajiakto ma ejaar apese ngin
orekec etelepat eningin agesi

kede ainingeta nuipu noi
eroko ber dutubu etiai loka
emanyit. Acie ainingeta
emotariton acie imomwa
ileleba ibukito, aipo ka
aijaanak in itanga lu ateker.

Apedori papa etelepat
aidadaar aibesut naemutono
atenen epone lorkoru apese
ngin komisiri. Kore da toto
etelepat agesi aereeni
aswamisinet kapese kangin,
ka idarit einer lo elomunenei
kakitukke.

Arai kedaunos akiro
mupudare apese ngin kanen
apedori toto etelepat abong
acie aijakar apese ngin togo
okoke alout apeukin je
apori kaudote bode akinet
bala sicoconikin luiarei
tauriamikineriga'.

Kedaut ngun aikonakin nen
ijukarete do auriak etelepat
apese ayangar akiro mama
ajaasi auriak etelepat, ajenun
apak na elosiotor kes
amerakinorkta auriak kapese,
kodaariton auriak etelepat
aitutub ka itanga lu ateker
abe adolit apelangin aimany.

Apakto ngun ejukanario
apesar ka itelepai aanyanario
anemwan, tetere loketem ka
imeebanke itogogongetearai
edolit kes adukokin.

Semei Kakungulu

Kakungulu ka imusuhm 500.
Abu ngesi kepede apakor
ireria icie lu apore ke katutubena
kwanat Kangai, Ekwera,
Dokole, Akabo, Chakwaara
keda Apati.

Kedapileitomoret, okaru 1899
abu Kakungulu konyou ko
Kagau aikwangar Serere.
Kedol ngina abu kodak ere lo
apore lo apol noi ne ebakai
Sambwe ariri na angolel.
Maraki Magongo ngesi
apolokinit apore ngin na ajansi
keda imusuhm 90. Aporei
konyarainen da e.Sazio loitetet
ka adokokin aipagan kwa kala
Buganda.
Mam koreka abilano na Serere

apatana. Ajai ejie ka abukor
aokot noi. Olap lo atupakin
aporei kijakak inai Kakungulu
kire imusuhm 150 ka itinkalei,
kopedorido ekena ja aimwang
Beso ke Serere.

Kolagio ikanyaani lu
atupakinete apotu ejie ka
adokasineikoarasi ajak 73 laka
Kakungulu. Agrarettenaekara
1900 abu Kakungulu ijula ere
ke ko Kagau toni Bululu.
Aitmanisete do Bululu e.Sazio
lo Ikamama loapolokit Eji
Reuben Ilittiga.

Abu koreka eruomi
Kakungulukotumarte Teso
keretetere ne abu Eji Omiat lo
Komolo, Usak, kolosio toni

Bululu ailip Kakungulu
aingarakinngesi atiji liamotep
ke. Konye adauritto do ainakin
Kakungulu awam na alal.

Adauni Sir Harry Johnston
adulun alwadika aitutuket na
'Buganda Agrisement' ekara
1900. Abu da babe Sir Harry
Johnston koinak Kakungulu
apolou na ariakasi kede na
atupiton Dilis Joneshallimakin
ngesi ayangar apugan ke toni
trsa kore ne esiarakina
imokroran icie loko Buganda
keda Iyanabun agwelanam
itanga.

Kanakangan abu Kakungulu
kijalaeko ere lo apolookit apore
na isirikalei 300 anyoun ke
Sororetoni Pallinaokaru 1900.
Ngina do abu Kakungulu
iyatakina atpegonokin Teso
toni abilun kore. Ike ireria icie
aporei kodakoi Bukedi kede
Bugina.

Eiswanuar ke lopotuk ngesi
atupitai. Abu ngesi kotiaka
isirikalei ke icie lu aupokitai
Serere keda ngesi Bugwere ne
abu kijaka asisraret ne ajansi
ijakaluku Teso. Abalaasiraret
ngin ebe akoto Kakungulu
keramakinamgnisinkk ireria
icie lu apore ke Bukedna ka
atutubena acie nako Teso.
Apotu Iteso kongereto.

Atpet kijakari koyaraku
isirikalei 350 atuboreo. itrikalei
Lwere adol ajiak lu Iteso lu
atukokin Kidingule. Ebabai
kesi ebe ajiak Iteso apoto
kodeemati itunga kekerata ka
Bukedeakere.

Iyetakinte atutuket nularait
ne akiro kanu osabitti lu
ebunit.

16 ETOP Naiwongonet, Otibar (September) 24-30, 1998

# Esumu Ireland Kumi agangat ac

Na Emmanuel Akelem
Ka Chris Osekeey

AB WUIKINITON apugan nako Ireland ko Uganda, Ambassador Brendan Rogers nges esumu ebe ebuni apugan ke siyatakin aigang iprojoksin lu apulo lu itolonio ko Kumi District Development Programme urai ekukuraka itunga kilotonete da aswam ejok.

Acin kotoma agangat kangin nevi ipikipikin 20 lu alimunit Brendan ebe abeit Kumi District adumun kapak kana evapaana kanu aitolosio aswamisionako KDDP.

Enera ambasador araasi 16.09.98 kotoma Teachers Resource Centre turismuna ngesi kode ayaitok adonrict, apulok icolongo luka LC 3, jiaka lu itemwan, apulok iconpogo luka ikoniitin luayaitok isomeroi lu eduki KDDP ka apulokica.

Eswaman nu akaulo na esicmorere Brendan osomeroi, ataparin nu ilonget ibaren ka ataxin nu itemonokitai kode agangaty nakakwap kec.

Abala Bruden ebe ajok nui aswam na etodikitai ngesi ide kisunyite angetakin, kacut kowai lo aiduk isomeroi.

"Esismokin eong esipisili lo aswam kana, isomeroi 10 aillapilepun karipet," abala ngesi.

"Araikinu?ikok innuemamei cut imodio ibore imiki isio siyatakit angangan yesi ko projektskalokeda apya iijami yesi osrut do elini ingame najokan. Ebuni Irish Aid aigangakite yesi," abala Ambasador kipapete itunga akaoin.

Erai Irish Aid irionget lokojokotaa lokakwap nako Ireland. Igangit nevi marie kwapin da kopolosiu nevi da igangitor kwana KDDP.

Igangit Irish Aid Kumi kakinsonet nu aisnia nak osomeroi, akoru, aipit ibaren kaailanakak ipikotensaturoo, abala CAO Rose Ochom.

Ambasador Brendan Rogers obwai kesiep na amurui na litunitere apcjo naka Ambasador Curran ko Abilorp PS.

# Adelosi abwaak lu Amuria

## Any. App.1

Enyunyarikit Etonu Radio Uganda da ebe egangit! Kaenoloot.

"Aponi kopenyakinai cut alimor ko Radio Uganda katapurucna aseo ebe" Isirerengitai lolo asabaato na noi yesi lu Amuria kolototo kosestu Onapito nges eos," abala Etonu egatuni kotupite espone lo ebe ajaar alimoret "Ebi kowany ber ijo da akiru ngun," aumokit ngesi.

Kingil, Esip Etonu arai abuni abongokin abolobol koingaren, abu kotema ebe mam albirot kotoma aseo erai aumokinet nepe copo da ide kebu aseo adio mam nges eyongikini.

"Eborq ilolo eong kaseo kangin naarai epu iboro lu nyodik kotoma kosodi itosomaatai inyadu kamaani kere," aruo Etonu.

Kosodi ebalorayoi ebe irwan nasodit ngesi albirer aseo na Kokaru 1980 abu kotob k'Amuria kwape enoriba loka Parliament tape eroun eminisita Apugan k'Obote II. Abu bobo kotab apaarasia nuka Constituent Assembly (CA) ido ebe kaseo naka LC 3 Kaiakwi district ajai ngesi "aiir akipi".

"Abu eong katub ko Amuria ko Kapelebyong jokan Usak bon abu kebiro eong.

Emunyu da ebala ebe mam nges eyongi aibwo ketakantu areerog.

Konye keja ngun da, ebala Etonu mam ngun enomoritos nges mam elusi awosan.

Emunyu nges ebala ebe agwelo Onapito aseak kode amuanyu, asabouni, ikepon, akiring, isepulan ka asazeur ido ebe ajai aitukuriano da noi.

"Eong kwape emulokolet mam abukacan aswam ngan naarai engerit ekuil. Kaspusu ngupangot nes ingalaarunere egangitok ka da luipu abala ngesi. Abala Emunyu ebe itukurianitos GISOs egangito ke.

Abu ngusi kongurlan nejai apulokienton aseo ko Kaiakwi, Ejkt. Nicholas Muron Ocakara, DPC ka DISO ketamata ngun ebe aitikokin akiro ngun da mam bolto apatana aijulakin.

Konye keja ngun da ebala ngesi ebe mam imuit nges atwova dimikito icoraki epulida ke nges.

Konye Onapito abala ebe inaiton itunga lo Amuria kailajaara kode acobeu. "Arai lolo ajokis abwaan ebe merre aseak. Mam Etop abu kopodo adumun Onapito naarai alosit aimala iketunga.

Etonu

Emunyu

# Atubokin e Union apaar

## Na William Otaala

EMINISTAlokaapiyi Ejkt. Gerald Sendackarapu, Bukedi Cotton Company Limout apaarasia 41.000.000 apugan nu ebakare eionete kesi atukakuk, kesi Resources ka North Bukedi Co-operative Etom 10 owake.

Ejaasui nu aisirar naka 26/8 mama ejai apoloi, 16.09.98 NBCC Ejkt William Machali lo da abu kosoda, 16.09.98 lo ejai Mbale araasi 13.09.98.

Abala Machali ebe ebuni nges aiticalo, 10.00 atukatiakasn kec kwape da adiumata aswamian kere apiyaa, Waterhouse nad Coppers epelu kesi.

Abu da Machali kitup kwape arajat epelu ke Resources atacar apesenin nu tak adumun, 16.09.98 ajar aitatuket ke: Ajaatar cuma loka ikchi kesi kesi 438,500,000/-kama ajai International Development (IDA). Eyataktingesi ebe abla aitatuketke 12.000.000 atac apiyai ngun kapak kana idokoto NBCU, 16.09.98 kode imusugun lu. Kodoloki etop apolon eko. Ejkt Iboo Robertsona eyapesike, kotemama epe kesi naarai egelara eiswamae ke NBCC kama epas keo.

"Erai loka ekodet lo ipuda adumun amode eku, 16.09.98 iswamai isio erai kana amoda. Konye luku NBCU, 16.09.98 aigangit akoriok," abala Bruce.

Abala da ebe wape do ejauner atiak ebe ebusi ebolor. African resources airumiar Ikilki kosodete, 10.000.000 abolobol kode kakes (African Resources) kana apiyai.

# Eteleka Ekomolok

## Any. App.1

abu kodum abootiin akanyaongun kosodete Emunyu ka Opio adumun enooti ka seetait kana.

Abu Ekomolot kingares kaseeta akanyauti kere nukotem Wera ne elomonitor ngesi kosodi aideun asertain adonjet bon kotem Abarilela, na abu Etonu kidep.

Kotem Asamuk ne elomonitor Etonu abu Ekomolot kourupu ailissisiu auni kosodi Etonu agiriar akanyamgos: Mam Emunyu ka Opio apotu kingaresuto kasertait adus kotem kalo.

Abu bolto Etonu kicat kotem Kaju ne etelekaritor kotoma adnosie akanyarei kideikini Emunyu aangon. Kosodi Onapito ka Opio enooti.

Abu Emunyu da kicat kotem ka lo Orungu ne abukotabaisin 13, kideikini 10.000.000 adopoe, Etonu da koyak kosodi Opio aani, 16.09.98 Mursimera bon te eloni ngesi.

Akaulo ne alimunt kotowan kamiani kase e 40 lu akware, abu apu kaseo ka Kaiakwi, Ejkt Nicholas Muron Oka, kolotok, Enor ebe mam adumunit adio anjae ekanunit aseo na.

Eganjitok lu adepan kea apotu kitutana Ekomolot lo eon Aaguro. Wera ne ainumunamaiteikutuk.

Apotui da kesi ka Nabalasasinyama! kasi toni uyapesi k'Apul o aseo ko Kaiakwi, 16.09.98 apapula na etoduni atkoyu nu adumunit egol abu.

# Uganda Cooperative Alliance Ltd

## Aurianet na 31 naka ngol ekaru

KITUJENARIT kane ebe aurianet napolon na 31 naka ngol ekaru ko Uganda Co-operative Alliance Ltd nes ebuni ajaun Naikanyet, eraasi 25.09.98 kaduketa nuka Uganda International Conference Centre (Kampala), ageun isawan iuni lu atupuruc.

Ejaun da ber aurianet aduketa nupenu. Naiwongonet lolo eraasi 24.09.98 kosawan iuni lu atupuruc, na edingakiniata iyakia aicalciak ber akiripadis nu eponio aitemitem kaurianet na msk. Akirot na eponio aisingarenit kaurianet kana nes "Ainyakakin ajokis toma asosaitin nuko Uganda."

Iliptai iyakia aidar apak.

Charles Kabuga
General secretary
Uganda Cooperative Alliance.

# Amariata ikaasulon apaaran na esokon

## Any. App.1

apukor esokoni lo Narmukaaga 19. Konye kedilo itunga ngina, apota kodumutu ipolisin lu adakitos imsudan lu apotu kireebosi kesi kosokoni.

Apolon ekolong LC III lo Kumi Town Council, Ejkt Francis Okia kode ekansila Julius Kololo kesi angurianete ebe arai Narmukaaga apaaran na ejaar esokoni biapolon istain kanu kangin adolit li etem Kumi da adumun apaaran acie.

Konye iketakisa ekatubi lokotem da ebe kojaitokin ekisusikin da Narmukaaga. Kedol angolopa ngin nejaas engarenok loko Distrikt abu RDC Jack Maumba Muktwana kijuka ipolisin aidar ayawam. Delo ne abetior apukor ekisoni.

Abu Apolon ekolong LC III kasm Ejkt. Bosco Eminyu da kode ikansilan ke kokerata nejai Apolon Eicolong LC 5 Haji Umar Okodel lobu kolot aicorakin ipolisin ariyoan ko sokouni.

"Mam eong alakara aanyun nu apotu kotakanatu eraas 19.09.98 neda adakakitotor ipolisin itunga loka raya imudun. Etaan lobu iswaman ngun nges engopikit Kami Distrikt," ebala Okodel.

"Ejaas ikasilan loka Town Council ka itawon lu ningarenitos apesan itta aijaanakin. Ajai kwana eong angici ingal ejutatar kaitau lo," abala Okodel.

"Mam ekasulo ka igangit nepecep da epono abanganui kanat ubu Town Council itoda," engetakin Okodel.

Konye Apolon Eicolong LC III Kumi Town Council Ejkt Francis Okia nges abu kopegak nu abakare ebe kesi ejukarere ipolisin asurokin itunga kosokoni.

Abala Okia, loda anpani ka lo idararo kwape Town Clerk, Ejkt Ikotot Francis, ebe apotu kerekiriamunos kode luk otem eraas 9.09.98 amorun nu iswana.

"Ilipti isio ekasulo lo etem adwaskin asokoni kec apaaran na Iyareit, na Iuniet arai na Ikanyet enre na Emukaga naarai epedori aitulitul ne idumununia isioipesan konye apotu ipaup kosi kongeroto," ebala Okia.

Abala da bolto nges ebe, apotu kes itodolikisi aimong kec nejai RDC.

"Aputu do isio ekatilo, eraas 21.09.98 kadumana awadikam naka RDC nada apaarasis 18.09.98 neda elipitor nges District Police Commander ayaar ejautene lo itunga arai iyatakin angeronar ajakin," ebala Okia.

Botot ngesi abala ebe mam kesi seamunete adio paarun kiloma na Emukaaga naarai ebe ebuni amunar aswanisio kere nu eTown Council kacut aisnia na idwe.

"Mam ber esokoni ipolisi arai mam yes isamanet ebol nu, ejaskit eong a Commander apodement itunga," ebala aiwalko RDC na aparasia 18.09.98 Apolon Eicolong loka lotem Kumi Ejkt. Enor Bosco ngin angurianet engopikit eyabni lo Kumi kami.

Anguriani ekasulo e kano RDC Ejkt Mumbe Mukwani kigirusibaluwa le itikok apukor esokoni konye abukijiak kesi.

"Iwadikatai ebala 18.09.98 ebong, kise akakakin akok eyabni kise bala kwam. Apotu kodum narikalet keni ben. Emunyat.

Eyatakti Emunyat lo eon ka egingeam lo apotui Vavendino Opure ka Akiro Martin ebe ebouni arawa esokoni kai kwape nba aitemonokiteta.

## Aibwaikite Soroti da amaapu

Atupiton epresident, Dr Specioza Kazibwe, ecedunete adis napepe ka MP loko Soroti Municipality, Mike Mukula (kediany) kairabet nakapolon (parliamnet araasi 29.9.98. Aputo na Charles Opolot.

## Ebuyaar itunga 200 Poliis ko Soroti

Na Jonathan Maruka

ITUNGA lu adeparitos 200 lu amamete kede aiwadikaela nu ejesotere kes apeni igogunarai Poliis nako Soroti kopotolo lo akware lo amoenore itunga lu arokok kotuonle Soroti, ammi 29.09.98.

Alibunet naka iyemuto nges abu kolimok Etop ebe etolonete spelissinka isitikaalei epotolo lo naarai ebe apurunit bobo akokona ademere itunga iboro korotin ka koreria kware kitosomaet imusdun ka iboro icse lu ekwaka. Etetissin epotolo lo Nachalasa kware kiwalari Naiarot kaiboniimako Kide na etaan ide kotunga 200 lu apore kigugunarai ikanyasmi bon aponi koyangarai adeperen aileket kans mam alacitotor exolo. Aponi kolacakinai luce akuelo na angai kes kodoco.

Eyatakit alibunet ebe kopotolo kalo amoetai da isitikaalei lo asismiten kajoco idu apeni kodumunai icte. Konye abu apulokiton poliis ko Soroti District, Charles Birungikolimok Etop ebe mam kes adamunitus esitikaalet edio lo asismit kaswan

2 ETOP Naiwongonat, Otakosokoma (October) 1-7, 1998

IVEMUTO

# ‘Kiswamanaros ber’

## Arai ekoto K’maido edistrikt

NaIva W’Esguru

LO idaransi kwape Assistant Resident District Commissioner lo Kaberamaido Sub-District Soroti, Ejki Elijah Kafiri, nges ocor itunga kere loko Kaberamaido aiswamanar nepepe arai ekotosi kesi edistrikt.

Enera Kafiri ngun ko Kaberamaido Township P/S ariani 11.09.98, egolokini aurianet na iushsinn ivarei na assisiana lem etolosete esisiak luko Makerere University Students Association Kampala ko Kaberamaido, agoun 01-11-98. Enera ngesi mama ajansi esisiak lo adoli enaba 300 luko Kaberamaido S.S. Midland H/S.

Kalaki S.S. Dr. Obates College, L.Ci, ijaakak’ipuluk lu elemete aornisin.

Abu kicor itunga aiditsiar emaet kosudete aiting amusenu kana amanakinia idwe kac ikapun lu esomero, konye mere ebe amonyarak in apugan nako kiding kangol ekaru ebe ebe li.

Abu Kafiri kimua adoketait na aisisin ko Kaberamaido kobala ebe korai ti ngesi ejatatur kapedor na aikor idistriktan, mam ngesi keinaki Kaberamaido e distrikt naarai ebe kesi diac langulok kotoma aingito naka UNEB ibore da yen erai ileic lu eposik noi, atiala Kafiri.

“Ikotosi yesi edistrikt kogolommetekedela aingito”, abalungesu fimokiniesisiak lu etsok iton ikli bala ipuoi.

Apolon eicotong “RIBERE” Makerere University Students Association, Jobe Patrick Esomu, nges abu kitigugong ebe igang tingesi kowamiekere aomissinit na ipuluk luko Kaberamaidona kesi da agitar edistrikt kati.

“Apapula na iyemote da iwadikao kede Atsuo ibore da yen etionikit isio aisuman”, abala Esomu kibapakisiete esisiak ngesi akan kobakasi ebe “aposie.” “Ekot RDC kingarak itunga luko Kaberamaido aitodolikineipul koc mama ejai epresidere” abala ngesi. Konye abu ARDC kobongok ebe ekoto ber ekonitti lo eyait akinngun, aigiran aornisin koc kosudete aikopak in eyaqesuk RDC Soroti ietere epedorete kesi adijamikinepresident kanu aitemokin apak na eriamunotoor kesi.

Abu kopog nu isiarakitai ebe icanasi itunga luko Kaberamaido kobala ebe akalanyanut nges epol kotonga luko Kaberamaido.

Abu kimua esisiak lo eomitos ebe ajore nes kwana itolonio esisiak loebiruron, “Ejockwana apugan na kiding aitetiran ajore kitoritere adoketa nu aisisia,” abala ngesi kite ebe yen ibiruru Amusugun mam ebuni alomar ajore.

## Aponitos aswamisinei ocaaloi

Eminista lo akiro nukotoma, Major tom Butime, tietemikini ekomiti loka ayuara lokopaliament ebe ebeit erionget ke aise ipolisin laitegelikina kanu aidar ayuara nakocaaloi. Aputo na inomti Charles Opolot.

# Arocutu ipolisin lo eitela Morukatipe

Na William Otaala

APOLON eitela Morukatipe, etem Ouakura ko Tororo, Ejkt Vakotino Emojong, nges arocasi ipolisinkanu emunore ebe abukongata 1 m/= kapak kana etolosio epotolo lo esolo kware.

Anaralo Etnong korekelo ejai oitela Nyalankot araasi 15.09.98 akaulo na Otakei okokuka Anderea Opakailoka Aputir, Morukatipe ayungaar aomony ke polis kwape ebe abunio epotolo lo esolo korodia ngesi.

Abala Otakei ebe kakware kana 13.09.98 bala osawan iwongon, apota itunga lu engarenikit Emojong kobilulta nges kotogoke kosudete ayungaar apesan ke 0 1 m/=, oradio kaset kede aibunga nges.

Abala ngesi ebe epudasi kwi

atikit naka esolo kalo ekaru 1998 na amamiatar ngesi.

Eyatakit Otakei ebe mam adolit aingisit esolo kware naharai ebe epedorete lu arokok da ainga itunga kobalasi ebe eraasi lo esolo.

Abu do ngesi ebe kijuka aimony ke polii ne da arocarenapolon eitela. Abala Otakei ebe mum nges cut abu kongaik etolotok epotolo ekek ke idimarai ebe abilaron kwtogo ke abilar.

Koundi Ejkt Augustus Omosong lo da erai egorigiran loka atamunak LC 1 ko Morukatipe West Zone ngesi abala ebe kakaare kanapa etolosio Emojong epotolo ke loka esolo ebe aponi aberu ke kobuoroi aisiot.

Abala Omosong lo enera kocolicolete akio ebe aponi kikungunoi nges kosudete arocar nges kanumam alonsho

# Edaunos idowon Nov.

Na Jack Okero

A JONU (Ministry) lo eyait nuka akor, itiang ka iboro lu ocor nges clip akor iok kere ko Uganda aiwa asam arereng na kwana idowon kala ageasi aitep.

“Ageutu idowon aitep ido elosete anangakin olap lo itomoset kadiop. Ibusakinit do kwana yes aira emwogoo acok ka abatoi tetera idumonete inyamat lu esipegete akamu na edauni ilapio bobo iwongon.” ebala eministry.

Icorit da bobo eminista siboisio nu ikidiokotor akito nu mam ikamunete adok naka cansava mossais aira iraan lu ikiriaikito kwape nat imomwa, akima, emawele ka icie da.

Ecatakit da (eministry) atenu na akoru, akoriok akoru ekirididi lo itojokitai kwape nat lungir 1 naarai epol aibir ke jokan.

esolo. Abu do ete kokodet ke apelor kosuluk kau aibudemia arai aberu alope ete nges isan ke.

Abala da Omosong lo ngesi iboyete kalesi miriotere ikoko uloy da ete kwape mne abunio koperia le o nges, mam do akirobo apugan.

Kakware kangipila abala apolon eicotong Morukatipe East, Lawrence Ijalu, ebe abu lo kodolok nges da le. Abala one abushenle Ijalu kodedengar no mam akote lu atole (Ijalu) kware. Kanskep abu kobel LDU edoye John Ecic kade asa epomeredering.

# Arocutu ipolisin lo eitela Morukatipe

Na William Otzala

APOLON eitela Morukatipe, etem Ouakara ko Tororo, Ejki Valettine Emajung, nges arocau ipolisin kanu emumere ebe abu kongatait 1m/-kapak kana etolonio epotolo lo esolo kware.

Aracario Emong koreke lo ejai oitela Nyalaokot araasi 15.09.98 akaulo na Otukei okokuke AndereaOpakuiliska Aputir, Morukatipe ayangaar aimony ke polio kwape ebe abunio epotolo lo esolo korodia ngesi.

Abala Otukei ebe kakware kana 13.09.98 bala osawan iwongun, apota iranga lu engannikitEmojungkoblalbu nges kotogoke kosodete ayangaar apesan ke 0.1m/-, eradio kaset kode aibunga nges.

Abala ngesi ebe epudasi kwi

atikit naka esolo kalo ekaru 1998 na amamiatar ngesi.

Eyatakit Otukei ebe mam adult singnit esolo kware naharai ebe apedorete lu arakok da singa iranga kobalasi ebe erassi lu esolo.

Abo do ngesi ebe kijoka aimony ke polio ne da arocarexapolon eitela. Abala Otukei ebe mam nges cut abu kongaik etolotok epotolo eke ke idimarsi ebe abilaros kwi togo ke abilar.

Kosodi Ejki Augustus Omonong lo daresi agarigiran loka atamunak LC 1 ko Morukatipe West Zone nges abala ebe kakuare kanapa etolonio Emojong epotolo ke toka esolo ebe aposti aberu ke kobuomo aisiol.

Abala Omonong lo enera kocolicolete akio ebe aposti kikangamot nges kosodete arocar nges kanu mam alemitor

# Edaunos idowon Nov.

Na Jack Okero

ATENU (Ministry) lo eyait nuka akor, itiang ka iburo lu ecor nges clip akoriok kere ko Uganda aitwasam arereng na kwana idowon kalu agessi aitep.

"Agoutu idowon aitep ido elonete anangakin otap lo itomonet kadep. Ibutakinit do kwana yes aira emwogoo acok ka abatoi tetere idumunete inyamat lu esipegete akamu na edausi ilapio bobo iwongon." ebala eministry.

Icorit da bobo eminista adnosin nu ikidinkotor akito nu mamikamunete adek naka cassava monsac aira iraan lu ikiriaikito kwape nat imomwa, akima, emawele ka ice da.

Ecorakit da (eministry) atenu na akoru, akoriok akoru ekirididi lo itoyokitai kwape nat longo 1 naaras epol aibir ke jokan.

esolo. Abu do ebe edep kokodet ke apolon esep kosalak kau aibu aberuke (la arsi aberu alepe etetenaka) nges ican ke.

Abala da Omonong ebe amla ngesi iboyente kabere le as euritotor ikoku idiepe nana da ebe kwape mam ders abunio kojenia le ce ata nges, mam do akiro ebe edele apugan.

Kakware kangipekange, abala apolon eicolong LC 1 Morukatipe East, Eji Lawrence Ijola, ebe abudodi lo kodolok nges da konte. Abala ebe abu aberuke Otite Ijalu kodedengar noi nadi mam akoto lu aitolot nge (Ijalicikware, Kanukanga) do abu kobel LDU ediepe lede lobo Ecio kode anusi kan epomere akiring.

# Ekwenyar Pallisa

Na Michael Ongwara

APOLOKITON akirwan apisi (CFO) ko Pallisa distrikt Justine Akoto Olupots agesi ekwore itanga loko distrikt le alemun esolo eringi apaarasia 36.09.98 kadim.

Kaiwadikaet ke aa abu Etopkodumeraani 7.09.98 nesi etijenarit ebe lu nugon eponio aitacat 50% surcharge.

# Apere nen kanuka Kohl ko Germany

# Abongutu atumunak kapejo nako Rwanda

Na Mwabato Akaleway

ENGABINOK lo atumunak kobunitwa kodistrikta lu epibigida lui Uganda kesi abongutu ko Rwanda araasi 18.09.98 akaulo na apejo na apaerasia aerei.

Angenatan lobo Mark Eswole lo erai agarigiran lo akiro nukokingabo National Youth Secretariat kera da abwokiton atumunak loko Komi Youth Secretariat erai da bobo abwokit idowotumunak Movement National assembly ngesi engarankot atumunak abisit Rwanda.

Akira na akiro da otoma apeje kesi ngesi erai "Consolidation of Cooperation and Friendship among the youth of East Africa" apelanko, atiupagong atorumatar ka nipaperone kana ejassi atumunak lok okidempapeka akalingat na Africa.

Alisukintakeo emoriarion, atiupagong etilisane kiding Rwanda ka Uganda kado adekukite aslan ngat lu apota katiwakiasi lumiman kesi kinamaupe loejai 1994.

Kosodi aimor ka atiuputu aswamisine ikiding atumunak ra maadani kotoma akwapse nu aerei.

Ko Rwanda apote kesi kipejokisi Malambi en amadiaritere itanga oet ko Gikongo district neda apoware kesi kewanyoratai akejo itanga kodoloki 160,000 kaloapoti koyarailotomaape lo 1994, ido erassi latpe isottiker na Tuna.

Aperu da kesi kipejokisi ates ka, Major Rwigyema Fred, nepege ka Ibutan University neda abunio Emola kotoreke ilipia revisok alemur akiro na sitopal akwap, konye mani acamunit aitwaantam kami atolitol nipugae.

Akaole na aipejokin aibutian ngan abu lo abwokit apugae nako Rwanda, Ejki Jamet Musani kida erai Director Youth affairs kidalamik atumunak loko Uganda kano amann koc ne ejassi loko Rwada.

Emoriariton lo alestime Okolenge Albert Chariman Youth Kami, Oluka LC V Secretary for Youth Kami, Okello Joseph apolon eicolong Seniti, Okilimong apolon eicolong lo Katakwi, Niuna George lo Pallisa, lola kesi emoriariton Wiljem Kajwage apolon eicolong Mitalara, ko lokodontkton loko Kibale, Masindi, Kigure, Bugiri, Busia, Lawere.

# Kiriamunos Ilemukorit nepepe ka Haji Okodel

KARAIDA epegakit Apolon eicolong loka LCs ko Katakwi Distrikt, Ejkt Stephen Okure Ilemukorit nu abakare ebe ekoto ngesi ainyang auriat nako Katakwi na aarakinio Kumi, edolit ber atiror adis kotoma akiro kanu. (Koany Etop Otiibar 24-30 1998 App 2).

Arai erai abeit ebe edalacunit Ilemukorit akiro ngun, erai adiakaret na epol. Mam adolit alimun nu enyangit koipone kangol naarai mam isio kiwomit ebe e distrikt lo Kumi ewwamauni epulaan aiar atica Christine Abulo.

Abulo arai aesisianakinan na esisianakini idwe luko Kumi karaida eurikitai ngesi Katakwi distrit. Kanukangun, mam ti epatana apugan nako Kumi aiar ngesi. Naarai ayangaunit aica obukec.

Karaida mam erai Ilemukorit iwadikat ebaluwa ngol lo abakasi Okodel ka Nambafu ebe edumunitos, konye itodunit na epone lo comoomata icie kotunga wok.

Ejaasi icie itunga lu elalakitos atiakatiaka na utemar ebe lusuko ngul, Ikidia kwi, Ikumetok lu, Isolota da kwi, Iseera da eja. Ekot itunga kere lu eminasi apolo nako Teso aitoronar itunga kwa kangul.

Atwanare ke Abulo, itei isio kwape atwanare na elomunit kotoma akapilanut icie itunga.

Mam eut ejok alimun ebe elosi do Katakwi da aiar itunga lu elomunitos ko Kumi kiswamaete Katakwi. Epedorina ayangaun edinget kiding itunga kalu kodistriktan kalu iarei.

Edolit Ilemukorit airiamun kede opaupake Okodel kosodete kesi aiteten akiro nu ebalauwa kalo. Arai mam erai Ilemukorit iwadikat, ingai bodo iwadikat? Biai epedorio angicun yeni iwadikat?

Siri kiyangautu ekisil kolo ka Hamurabi ebe akongu ka akongu. Dobo do ber arai kingitar oni, nabo kangai akongu koponi kodopai nako Katakwi arai bo Kumi? Itei do bala nako Kumi naarai arai Kumi esisianakini Abulo; arai Kumi epecitor aisianakinan na adumakin idwe aica.

# OPALAKIRO

# Aomisio

# Kojalakisi aduku atukot na abenya lu kolo ajaasi UP

Na Nelson Ockeger

ATUBOR apak na esupanna, ageun ne etijemaara apolon eicolong LC5 Kumi, Haji Umar Okodel ebe ebeit kesi lu kolo ajaasi ajore naka Uganda People army (UPA) kosodete aikur akanin adukun atukot (Etop, Otibar 5-9, 1998).

Arai kiketakinos Okodel kede ipaup ke aitodolikinsu inerasi, apoloake ebe lu elomarete atukot nginkesi imorirete Col. William Omaria, Maru Onoda, Aeko Abaadi, Okeejaka icie lu ipu. Mam eong abani apodokai ebe ingai ho eraan emorha arai bo mam. Konye aomit eong ebe emamei ajokin atukot kangin.

Itunga lu ipu kesi kopotu kotwakiasi abar, ajae kede iboro icie lu ipu kotoma ojie kangol. Kanukangun, emorikina eong ebe aibois na itunga ngun asmurokin ican ngul, atukot Okodel nesi ebuni anistinikin itunga atiokisio ngun.

Epekuna alimunet na Okodel na abalar ngesi ebe apotu kesi kiningesi ejautene lo ejie ido ibangiok bon kesi lu aamormote no eje kotoma apairaia kana. Apolou ke ebe araasi ajok kere kotoma apak kangin ibangiok. Konye edeleirik apak isiongun da ebe ajaasi itunga lu ipu lu mam ajiysi. Aso ajai atiakak. Adukuno na atukot kangin ngesi ebuni aiyatakin atiakaitak itunga. Kanukangun, emamei bodo atiaket kede abanganut na ajai kotoma okaru lo ajaar ejie.

Adukuno na atukot kangin nesi da ebuni apukor ajimis nu kohu ejae ngol kodumak Itesu. Karaida enangakit ejie ngol, eroko ikolosinei arai bo nat idingeta ejaasi ne ejaasi itunga

AUKUN ATUKOT ARAIBO MAM? Icie kotoma abenyak kolo luko L

Peoples Army (UPA) lu apotu kikiasi akanin lu ekot Okodel aimorik

lu ipu. Aiboisit na aitidisiar ikolosinei ngun, ebuni atukot ngin aiyatakin kes.

Ebala Okodel ebe kedautu kesi adukun atukot ngu, ilipete kesi agangat kane ejai Preesident Museveni kano aingarakina ekiarak akanin aitegaanar aswamisinei nu itolornete apisi. Mam erono aimari agangat kowaitin lu ipu, konyeekot Okodel ajamun ebe itunga kopaana lu ejaasi opelek lu epol adumun ko Teso kesi araasi ajok kotoma ojie lo ajai okaru 1987-1991. Iiyuibo eroko ekadit kesi? Aomisiot Okodel nesi ecepak ebuni ainakin itunga icie da egeunetee ejie koomitos ebe ekaulo, epedorete adukun

atukot kosodete alomakin
angisit apugan na kokiding
(central government) agangat.
Kwape alomnaria Okodel
akiro nuka politiks, ejaasi
itunga lu etapit aitepeg ngesi.
Icie kotoma kotunga kangun
kesi iteete Okodel kwape lo
asurup. Adukuno na atukot
kangin ngesi einakini itunga
ngul eteromete akirot ngin
kwape alosikinet Okodel
kanuka adiji kesi

Karaida ejaasi itunga lu mam kopotu kosentu Okodel, konye naarai erai ngesi epolokust Kumi, erai do Okodel engarenen lo itunga kalo ko Kumi kere. Ibusakinit do Okodel aimo iwaitin lu edumanata itunga lu ko Kumi

kere ayanga kanyu ngikuru khaitekohasin. Awang edeila da ngesi adakun na imoriarit itunga kala kere arai bo nat Itesu. Esimuarit eong na Okodel kiyatuk kog kotomma obuku Ibu UImunit ngesi ebe kwanaoni aomomnate awok akwap bon, nam apodo urai erai itunga. Demorcastic Party, Uganda People's Army (UPC) arai inye, kewababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababababab

# Ejijim ajar na idumakini osokooni lo Onyam-iguro

Na Olita Joshua

AKOTO eong aisialamikin Local Government Works kanuka aitemonokin erot lo Kumi (Yerit/Katine) kitoni Orungo Otem lo itenaari Onyam-Ingurok, esokooni lo ibaren lo ibecekina otem Orungo, koteda lo Ococia, loda idumakini ijo obuku Amuria, Katakwi Distrikt.

Adaunna apuarasia nukolo aimony ibaren ka ejae kotem Orungo. Icamuni ijo nu enera eong kidol ijo osokooni lo. Nasodit tapuruc iwanyuni arestokan erikoni, akou adiopet arikokitai okeri adiopet bala

kotoma odiopet korotin luko Kampala. Acamunit eong ebe edolete amotokan nu elonete ngina atomon ka acie kangin Ikanyet.

Arai ikoto emuceeri imare, eceroko, idumakini Onyam-Ingurok. Kotoma itiasinel lu 120/- eikopo etampeko. Eceroko 170/- eikopo etampeko. Kosodi emuceeri eikopo etampeko 100/-. Arai kotomakilo erai 300/-. Iburen lu ejaasi kes akituk, akinei, ipegei, amerikekin ka akokorei. Ellar lo akituk ageari kotoma 80,000/- alnsitkujo kotupitete alangir koc. Akinei, ipegei ka

emerekekin ejami eko 10,000/- kitoni 30,000-. Ejaasi araito nu emoree ka emanuda kotoma eku araito 3 isingin 50/- etengei isingin 500-/ itanyameteijokiton ajok ekwam komigara. Kote alung na akiring erai 130/- bon. Einar kokok apestai erai 600/- bon. Ajeni eong ebe Pallota itani Kampalakoko. Konye kotoma amotokan eremomoroy Onyan agi atundet araasi nako Nkp-Ido ebongoreete iibin emuceri pas.

Aomisio

# Jajakisi adukun akot na abenyak kolo ajaasi UPA

## AUKUN ATUKOT ARAIBO MAM? Icie kotoma abenyak kolo luka Egoa

Peoples Army (UPA) lu apotu kikiasi akanin lu ekot Okodel aimorikiko,

lu ipu. About na aitidiniar ikolosinei ngun, ebuni atukot ngin alyatakin kes.

Ehala Okodel ebe kedaota kesi adukun atukotingin, ilipeta kesi agangat kane ejai Preresident Musaveni kana singarakina ekianak ukaron alteganan awamisinei nu itolomete apiai. Mam enmu aimar agangat kowatiin lu ipu, konyeskot Okodelajemun ebe itunga kopaana lu ejaasi opeleik lu epol adumun ko Teso kesi araasi ajtok kotoma ojie lo ajai okara 1987-1991. Ibyobo eroko ekadit kesi? Aomisist Okodel aensi acepak ebuni ainakin itunga icie da egnuseter ejie koomitos ebe ekaulu, epedorete adukan

atukot kosodette alomakin aingisit apugan na kokiding iutretnaipavemment lagangat.

Kwape alommaria Okodel akiro nuka politika, ejaasi itunga lu etapit aitepeg ngesi. Icie kotoma kotunga kangun kesi iteete Okodel kwape lo asurup. Adukuno na atukot kangin ngesi einakini itunga kopaane konsentte akirut ngin kwape alosikinet Okodel kanukasitiji kesi.

Karaida ejaasi itunga lu mam kopotakounatuOkodel, konye saarai erai ngesi epulokinit Kumi, erai do Okodel engarenon lo itunga kala ko Kumi kere. Ibusakinit do Okodel aimo iwaitin lu edumanata itunga lu ko Kumi

kere agangat konye manak ikuru kobaale. Aas amsoko edolit do ngesi adukun atukot na imori arititunga lu kokak kere arai bu nat Itese kesi.

Esimaarit eong nu kasi Okodel kiyatak koiner k kotomma obuku Bakala. Elimunit ngesi ebe "Eko kwanaoni aomoom naadima awok akwap hon, man ang apodo arai erai itunganat k Democratic Party (DP) Uganda Peoples Congress (UPC) arai inyo, konye aku ebunit aitopol Kumi man eong ngesi kede akann iken." Ageari aitup kede awan ngun nesi acakar aomisista aiduk atukono na epos atiakaniak itunga.

# ajar na idumakini ni lo Onyam-igurok

Na Olila Joshua

AKOTO eong aisialamikin kocal Government Works kanaka aitemonokin end lu ageari Torri(Katine) kitoni irruga Otem lo itenaari onyam-lugurok, enokouni lo paren lo ibecukina otem itungu kotefaloOcocia, loda idumakini ijo obuku Amuria, atakwiDiunkt.

Kidanno apaarasia nukolo mony ibaren ka ican kotem nango. Icamuni ijo nu enera ng kidol ijo enokouni lu asudit tapuruc iwanyasi kookan erikoni, skou adopet kokitai okeri adiopet bala

kotoma odiopet korotin luko Kampala. Acamunit eong ebe edoiete amonokan nu elouete ngina atomon ka acie kangin Ikanyet.

Arai ikoto emuceeri imare, momiko, idumakini Onyam-Ingurok. Kotoma itiasinei lu 120/- eikopo etampeko. Ecoroko 170/- eikopo etampeko. Kosodi emuceeri eikopo etampeko 100/-. Arai kotoma ikilo erai 300/-. Buren lu ejaasi kes akituk, akinei, pegei, ameretekin kaakokorei. Eliar lo akituk ageari kotoma 80,000/- aloustkuya kotapiiete alangir kes. Akinei, ipegei ka

emerekekin ejaasi otar k 10,000/- kituni 20,000/-.

Ejaasi araito nu emucigasi ka ematuda kotoma otar k araito 5 isirigin 50/-. Kiar etengei isirigin 500/- bet itanyamete ijo kitoni ayenga ekwan lo ailaiaara Atapkadi alung na akiring erai isirigin 350/- bon. Einer lo akokor at epoitai erai 600/- bon.

Ajeni eong ebe Pallisa ani itani Kampala kede emuceeri, konye kotoma amotokankane eremonoros Onyam-ingurok atutubet araasi nuko Pallisa. Ido ebongorete iteleke emuceri pas.

inyo ationus na atakanuni arai mam itunga elemete esolo arai atacanar apesenin nu itaomin? Adis ber kotoma atiokisio nuipu muraritos:

Apoto na etem ebuni ajaasi cut

Agangat na okinga kwape nat naka uajaistau mam epatana atunun

-irotin, adekisia, isomeroi emameun epone toitemonokinere

-ebubulatol akerit aingop

ebura

ecanit kocasolol, konye
elipit eong lkapello
adumun itawon lu
egogong kosodete
aimorikikin aanyun ebe
alemata kesi isolosinei
kede atacanar ibaajai
tetere etem Kapir mam
etwanlari ajokuslo

nuejaas ingaren.

# ANGALEU

## Ekapakina Red Cross aiduk adekis

Na Martin Aiku

ATUPITON apulon eicolong lo ebood loka Uganda Red Cross loo aty. Aiki Betty Epilu sgratiitipmaebe agmserionget ke aomoon nu amganda to siduk adekis nako Soroti arai keyanakinos itunga loipo aiwadikaon kwape shumban loka Red Cross kopatatarkede itan lu eketesi aitojekar angalru kodisirik talo.

Alimani agesi nu kaurianet na ebood loka Red Cross kayaapeti lo Soroti araasi 12.08.98.

Abalu Epilu ebe ikilikila erionget lo Canada ebooert aiduk adekis nako Soroti, konye eutai bet aimanaamide kanejassi buna ipitsatin kaajenun urai ekotosi itunga siomar Red Cross.

## Apalata imurwok lu atagoro aimuke akonye

Na William Otzalo

IMURWOK lu atagoro ko Tororo kos acamana atiyekin amukian akonye katagoro koc kanu atiyekina lusdekis bon. Konye eSpata kesi lusdekis da atiyekin ailumorit adekak lu ebeiton atagoro atiingaleun.

Abu acamanar na kojann Tororo District Farm Institute ne etolonimo iwaitte lu iparei ekonsi loka aparasia nuni lo angatakis araasi 6.09.98. Arai erionget Christopher Blinden Mission loko Germany alemonit apetan na etolosere nes.

Apolokiton aimuke akonye ko Tororo (Ophthalmic Optic centre), Ejkt Wolfgang Gindorferngesi abala ebe iken lu atagoo ejassi kede anorit na epodori amunamuna akonye adekan cut.

Etojoit Gindorfer imurok lukadekiebon amukain akonye naarai epataka amunaar kolomuni do amudokanut.

Abu Gindorfer kitodik imurok luatagoro ilabora (lore) yon ihwainakinio akonye nu ejai etotule tetere ekwenyete do ejok. Abalangesi ebermam cut kes imurok lukadekis ihwainikinet akonye ameretek mama ejaasi nu itungaliwape ebe ejase akorian kama ejaasi icie itunga.

Apolokiton imurwok 15 luka atagoro egosi arai Ejkt Sira Bosco Dongo loda erai apolokito Notological Research and Humanity Development ko Wandegaya, Kampala.

Abala Sira ebe 75 kangul 100 naka ikee kale adekis kere ebonunete katagoroka ketting. Mam inges etojokit itunga aimaarit atagoro kosodete ayangarit nu iuwamaete kesi bala ihoro kaSatana.

## Esisiata Iweratok angale

Na Martha Akello

LCr 30 lukonenwan loko Wera ka Abarilela, Amurakwa 23.9.98 apoto kongetakisi eisisia na apaaraasa ami iwati angalesko St. Peters Community Centre, Soroti. Eeisisia lu okomutin lu ikamunitos nu apolo kostelaikis.

Erai na asioman na itolosio ka agangai na ebood ke Kwaido kitorite orionget loka angalite.

Erionget loka distrikt health service programme (DHP) itolosi atoisia na.

Ebeit asioman na singarakin LCs aidar akiro na angalit na mikamunitos eipone lo epodoriata etunga arungta asa malaris, aornaejok kolaanakina kokatia, angor ka ikiluk jasa aiduk aceilonin ka aitala alibasin na awakote akap.

## AITIJENARET

AINGADIS na Bank of Uganda nes itijenikit itunga kere ebe engalei cut eingade loapiyai kobanks ido esipo aswam ke kowai lo apiyai.

Keja ngun da, apaarasia adis nu atuboros abu Bank of Uganda kiswamau akiro nu alosikitor ayuar isirlgin luka engadak apiyai o banks. Elomunit na akaulo na aingic kodoco aingadis naka International Credit Bank (ICB) kosodete adumun ebe apol ejala koipone lo ayaitere nes ido mam eiswamae ke etodolikit nu ipudai aingadisia atupit.

Euta kwana Bank of Uganda aiteten apiyai/iboro ka apesenin nu ejaatatar ICB. Ebuni Bank of Uganda nepepe ka ngul lu ejaatatar ka inerio ICB airere irotin kere lu ejaasi kanu ikamunitos nu ebeit aiswamaikin ebank ngol akaulo na angetakin aingic apiyai ke. Koineresinei lu itolosio kede ikulepek inerio ebuni Bank of Uganda aitopolorit eipud loka itunga kalu ingadakitos apiyai koc toma ke.

Ecamunit Bank of Uganda ebe atwaru aikamario naka ICB aingiseta nu ipu nu mam ebongonokitai kanu ikamunitos eitosomae loka akaadi naka Smart Money Card. Itejenikitai do ateker kane ebe arai Smart Money Card erionget ko ICB toni aparan na ekamarere ebank ngol.

Aponi kopukorai ekampuni ecie lo enyaritai Smart Money Card (Centre) Ltd araasi 25.08.98 konye mam agearit aswami. Kwape eraar Smart Money Card (Centre) Ltd ekampuni eko ranari iloonin ido kingadai apiyai kitunga, ipudakin angalasi kanu aitolosio aswam ke. Mam ber Bank of Uganda ejaikit kes alasisi. Ejaasi erionget loka Smart Money Card apesen na ebeit kes atacakin ICB isirigin. Etikokin do bu aitosomaa na akaadi kana aitodol ne edaunere apesen ngin la adumun ayaitok icie lu epote aitolot aswam ke.

Kanu ikamunitos aingadisia nuka Trust Bank Ltd kede Trust Africa Bank Ltd, abu Bank of Uganda kocam alipan kere aisibwoun ber aswam koc adaun apak adis. Egearete bol aingadisia nu aswam kwape duc akaulo na itutubere irotin kere lu eutasi kwana ikulepek inerio aitemitem.

Isiirikit do Bank of Uganda engadak apiyai o banks kere ebe ebuni aingadis (BOU) aiyatakit aswam kanu aanyun ebe esalakini eiswamae egogong kobanks ido kitopolorite ayuarit eipud loka engadak ipiyai toma o banks.

BANK OF UGANDA
SEPTEMBER 24, 1998.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Osakusokuma 1-7, 1998

# KIRONUNG

# Oguli-Oumo toto ikisila

AJKT Margaret Oguli Oumo, ngesi pac aponi konsunni araut Director naka Legal affairs ko NBM Movement Secretariat. Erai ngesi apuroit naka ikisila kacut lu ikamunitos angor. Abu Francis Ogeatum pac kiriamunos kanges keyapesi ke ko Kampala kosodete ainerakin:

Etop: Imeüket yugxaisyam apedon. Ipapi ijo biai konsulung hotetet?

Oguli: Mam eong aomit ebe epemoi asaran eong apulukuo, eypami lokonye aswam alope asani itet kamaka. Aponi kineun eong abwokio kids naka Uganda kere kwape Director naka akiremu ikisila, ebe luce Directors da elibunitos karimo acie.

Ibaduni asaunio ka ebe apugan naka e Movement team eteki ikar kobaule ido isata agongong ke naharai iberenokim spelata nejaasi eunga barberi.

Etop: Aayioka alosikinetakere kispela kalo?

Oguli: Ahuni awanyon ebe asnan a Movement ibore yen apal apolou nejaas duau Uganda kuponsin langalengela. Alosi eong aayioka nunga ebe erai e Movement eipugae lo eyokuna ido ibasokime. Elosi aswam ejok naharai iwamanara no kwape Directors asosiamakin itonga aiyen apedonoso/kec eronga e echetenikon kebuno. Ebeit altolist asisismakino na tiritir mere eyapuori asaro bon.

Ebeit altolist asisismakino koerianeta ka oredio kanga(epirime). kere kaimoniarite Anesi ido ebeit atadokialilo alupok (Land Act 1998) kopono loapatanar nunga apetoni alosikinetakere. Etop: Aayoni ber cut abonowam kane?

Oguli: Kwape director naka akire nu ikisila, akaswam nes asire nepepe aingarakite e Movement kakiro nokamakino ikisila. Ejai eong aeren eipame losiwasamaere kisiiakii Uganda asedi korye awadili iriputim. Ejai epelu aisismakin itonga fako Uganda ikisila haikamunitos aetepel atakar ka apedoronio bit.

Etop: Ebula beekisili alupok hoi kawa ikamunitos Teso?

Oguli: Ebeit eyafesi ka aisismakin itonga ekisil ngol nansa ayangasi nuga isisi na kwape arereng aigur luce. Kwape kwana oita aijol loma angapapuluso kere. Land Act 1998 kangasip naepatana.

Amaki ekisil lo aingadisia mikapita acamun aiwadikanta nika alupok kotoma siniono in atakar (cautionary tenure) ahamuna itinono, ibore yen amano isis. Sati bayaani kalupok komono lo atakar napa apedonia adamur alupok adio ezawa kere naarai teranidugola ngon naka apugan. Kwana alupok nu kere nyesakin akanin kitunga ikulapak.

Ebeit adakun ikomitito lu akire nu alupok kotemwan ka citela da kamu asetan akiro naka alupok. Mam ekisil lo ecamakit ekiliokit ugsedar alupok komam ecamanara kinakowaike nepepe k' idwe da.

Ibecokit ekisil loka alupok ebe epedori ateker aiwadik alupokhui kokirutloka ateker. Kokale ibutakit alupok kolimitere idwe kere lo nantai kokale kangol.

Arai kewana ekiliokit iburai atiakakin idwe kere ka apuierat da alupok. Kanu asia akiro kwakangari nges ibusakinitor ikomititi isidukanto koitela.

Etop: Kwape anoreba naka FIDA inyohonnon atukotna apapor ka Teso?

Oguli: Mam ngin erai abot, naarai itofeniter FIDA aitu nuotor itunga ko Kami. Kaitanumoro kwa kangol akorio aiwadikanta nuka aisismakininaka ikisila. Ejai eika FIDA epeogemmo Radio Uganda kotona Atesis lokamuntiasisismakininaka ikisila.

Etop: Mam cabo ikousin kwakangal ipa ko Teso iulitian nepepe ka kwapeana Mukono, Masakaka Mpigi?

Oguli: Ationis kwape irrongat loerorga epelini ikidioko FIDA ikiswanat. kenedi babo eziago ke da egongakina nejaas lukajoketna. Korye adan ben FIDA apukonor iyapesin lu atonarik ko Mbarara, Arun, Mbale ka Kampala. Eyafesi loko Mbale nges ebeit aijaanak in toro Teso da.

Etop: Iuyobo mam yeu da iduksanito atukot na Ateso nuisisietos ikisila?

Oguli: Ejai na ndukimitso angor nuteus nepepe kangun nunduksoro Teusna enyarirai ALJAT. Angor nu kes ejaani kode apirianut nanpol naarai resisato idre ejemasi. ALJAT. Ejaani atukot na kode ikomitito kwapensi na apedornis o naka angor, angor nu isisianakinetak, angor nuéjani akoru ka aijar naka angor.

Euta atukot na aikeun ejaatene loka akiriamat ko Teso, ido iswamaikopekwana projects ko Amagagara Ph ko Kamel, Ngore kinomanara nepepe kitunga lukoradisi. Adaun kwapekwana aijifilian eipad loka itunga, adumun Project Coordinator nepepe ka Local Coordinator da.

Etop: Kwapeerunior ejantene, itamitos yeu ainyakan abat k' Iteso?

Oguli: Kitontoto atukot naka ALJAT, kiuta anyanguin e project banyarirai. Send a Cow. Ebuni erionget lo aitedelikin akituk Teso kogarupun isen; Catholic diocese nges ebuu aswam ko Katakwi district. Church of Uganda Soroti Districts kenedi ALJAT aijar Kami district.

Eponi eongata la uitar akituk namusugun nupas akilo nisi, ido keari akiteng ngin kokorakinete icetunganan atasik.

Etop: Adis aieureta nejaas Iteso kwape ateker?

Oguli: Epul kwana Iteso amunu awatekee, ka ikulu keo bon. Itunga kere kateker. Ikauriak, makijaka lukamama kesi ti ebeit araut aanyanet mama ejaani idwe haepoloete, naarai nuewanyunete idwe kes etupete kesi da.

Aso ekoto Iteso lu ejaani opaleik lukasiwam asiwananara nepepe katukoso kwape nat ka ALJAT, ietere idwewok ejenete ebe ingat bo ingat kosodete aigang Teso. Ekoto ikauriak luteoo amina ka airwosom idwe kere kacut lupeeur naharai etiono epoloane keo: Aferu nausisat ipa ajokanto kokale ulo ericit adumakin ikedwe da asionnan ka ajokanto ace nullamara; epedori aibwo bon ido ingarikino ikauriak keo nepepe kalowai ke aitopol ekale.

Etop: Biodinepedoria eyapesi iura aigang Teso?

Oguli: Kwape nalwoiikit itunga lakii kids nako Uganda kiraicettariat inangakere loka Teso eteete eong. Kowai loka Akituk, abuni asiwananara kode ekomiti lopac asounio iererer aissumuneta ka President Yoweri Museveni apauranin naka ekamprin kokara 1996. Engisi okornitin lo aisumanita nuskamunitos Uganda kere, kinye ibore yen ikamunit Teso iponi awanyon ebe itudilikano.

Ebeit eyapesi ka airimor

AJKT Margaret Oguli Oumo

Aratitis kere apetun eipud loka itinga aso abuni apupok in aimony kec arai kadola Teso.

Etop: Aayooka ipedori aitedelikin idwe Iteso lupesur?

Oguli: Ekot ikoku ipese aisisisan ebe erai ngesi itunganan yen epol adumunet ido ekoto anaikin abwa kanake bon. Mere apesur aitiloro ebe edukone nges inangi lokaijar, naharai iyatan ipektsio arai iyata apese adoketat naka asissia.

Ekoto apesur, kacut nateno, ayenon ehe keting ngesi aisisiske kaburaco etalak ajokasio nuedumani ngesi. Epedori apese kwa kangin adumun aswam ido kwape itunganan yen ejerei apedornisoke epedori adukun ekide ka kopone luepik.

Nu keere mam epodorus arai mam ikauriak loko Teso esacete aite idwe lupesur kwape la eyounete emaali ore. Ekoto ikauriak aitiosom idwe kere, kacut lupesur ka ingawaisik da terere epedorote ningarakot kesi bonik.

Etop: Angor nuisisietos asii kwajo, ekariska icetunga simany. Biatitesijoemanyit loka Iteso?

Oguli: Mam eong agirit einono kinye mere bodo aitusub apese kwape itunganan yeni egwetietis arai bonat yen engatunere abur. Ekot emanyit kosubite bala asuban naka aisialumikin ka aisimovikikin ikauriak loka apese ka lu esapat da.

Etop: Kaomit kon akituk arawasai ti edolit itunga ketelopat atitar?

Oguli: Ationis bon nesi etuor arai kegirokines akiliokit k'aburu, arai adaan akituk aiwasiamar. Aomit eong ebe akituk auni ari awongon nesi tibi itatemun, kwape ainukunot naka amunsonat kowai loka esapat ideri mam edolit aibura arai kibiroe edukone. Ekoto ti enaba loka ibaren koraasi

loapatana atacakin. Keraun abtilid apedoryisianuka idope itunganan mam etomam.

Etop: Kwape naisisiat noii kwangis emaaliteetinaikobu ijo kogirain korekas?

Oguli: Ito, akituk akanyarei bon. Naabui imam berjupaka akoto kolorsunai ideibore da, eong abu kalimek ebe keting nepenen kwape kikotore.

Etop: Aba, Einumampapabon noii. Adis naikanmunitos asissia ka apuloan kun?

Oguli: Aario eong 1.9.1952 ko berere ido arai eong yen-kiniset kodwe ikany angon luka Ejkt George Oguli kanairwan Christine Oguli.

Papukurum atiskatsikatiibwe apesur ka losap ido amina isio eponedope, bnori kaiso ainyam komusa ediopet da.

Etop: Emaesa ediopet toni apesurefa?

Oguli: Eeba, emaesa edioet (dimong tablo) isio kere, isapa apesur da.

Etop: Kolesi bodo aninia biai?

Oguli: Abu papuka koinakite iso kere, apesur k'isapa da arereng o naka aisisia. Kwape araar ngesi etunganan lo esomui mam eong abu kassimite esomere ediope araibonat adonit adope.

Asiornit eong PI ko Ngora Denomistraicae/kiboul, P2-P3 ko Serere P4-P5 koeti(CoU) P7 ko East Kololo Primary school, Kampala Kalubalosit Senioraibokulomekololo/8,5, 51-54 ido kokaru 1972 abu kalot Trinity College, NabbingokamakaHSC(1972-73).

Abu kaloma Makerere University University Okuru 1974, neda abu kangetakisun k'edigari lenedit loka ikisila (LLB), akindoko abukalo Law Development Centre Kokaru 1978.

Etop: Elwana erot ngul noi mani?

Oguli: Kokaru 1978 abukagea aswam Administeror Generals

Office, korionget loka ikisila kaadyeketa. Eong ayait akiro nakauiramumiboreikala atwak (estates cases), neda apetukatoreikinetot ka abiskisio nu ewanynitos angor nuetimame nyafesi lo.

Ipu isan luawanynitos angor nu etsuere agangat kuyabni kalo naharai erai ediopet bon ko Uganda kere, aso epol aicanican apak, chunga nnoi, osabitingol. Naiyarorkanuka (nomosis (customs) lukio Uganda furgelngela mam angor ejemen apedoreisio kse; Ekauloaponi kejular Ministry loka Gender asani 1988 neda abu kerawama toni asunio pac abunere ne.

Kokaru 1990 abu kadun arereng alosir asuna ekosui loka ilaprisiani loka Wumans' Law ko University loka Zimbwabwe. Ekaulo kokaru 1996 abu kalot University of George town, Washington USA, asionnan ediguri loka Masters (LLM).

Etop: Karevan kon ikaru kere anyoka atitekulo araibonat ajakkiste laopatu ijo kotersikinetor?

Oguli: ajokit bon ebe ejaamikini eong ateker

Mam ajen ebe arai ngin aronta araiman. Konyeeman eong ebe eewamai eong Ministry loka Justice, angor ikeswam lukilide adumuman aitopeloerio arai bonat arereng alosit aiyatakin asionnan kinga. Kanye kinginanari or emiceman yen kilimokini netiurunemete ichofarchipa ari naabeit aswam. Abu ngin kesisiak eong abu ekoto ijo da isi kanat apesur k'angor eberianga idu aswam kagogong toni adumun ibore yen ipuda. Ekoto apese aijen ibore ipad kayen (wawana), ngos epdoria adukun ejaatene kse.

Etop: Aperomor asionnan kwangin ekoto kajaasi ka ekiliokit lo ejat aijen?

Oguli: Eeba, adakokina eong kode ka Ejkt Oumo, ido isere idwe iwongoro nap isen i apesur da sarei. Atamiti eong naapedori awanyon ebe iyapie sio kere kane ejaasi ikenidwe.

Etop: Epona ali itusoma ijo apak naka titai (inmere)?

Oguli: Etusumui eong apak nakatitai aitala ere ka aiboi nepepe kode ikadwe. Aticepak ibotiai siu isaibonton nepepe araibonat abisit aijong.

Amina eong aenor aswan niketugu kode ikadwe kere kwapenut apesur abuarakin aipu kosedi isapa aipul etogo. Etop: Iuyoka inyansatinimajis kakere?

Oguli: Amina eong atap napedor nepepe ka edia emulakany. Konye ngul inyamat kere luekorunio emessa aman ikwi kwape nat eboga eewaniurete.

Etop: Erenok?

Oguli: Aminaeong ikonostrei ngul iyapete luka Jim Reeves.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Onokosokoma 1-7, 1998

# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

## KAURIANUT

### Arocon ekambak

Na Jusurban Anguru

ITUNGA Iyarei, ediope kakroiskambak lei i PDP kes apoto ipolisin ko Pallisa konsentekanu eingarakinkes angin na egunonet kato abu kodure korot kato enyouni ko Mbalraibe igangak ino te Tenyi.

Loetupit RDC lo Pallisa EJkt Michael Bwalatonges abala ebe aponi kiscokinai egurunet kiding o guado kotoma ocaalo lo enyarirai Jamii lo ejai amairon 9 anyhoun ko Mbale aibe Teinyi ne da abu kodureor.

### Isekel kanu Etop

Na Johnson Enyolu

ETUAN Ioshuni ko Ngora kolosi Agwamonoe, Ongodia James nges abu kosarok Onyokoi Peter lo Olio Serere arami 14.09.1998 kanu akmun Etop ke asuom. Komam aingitun karaida ayogan elope!

### Ekamar LCI

Na Felix Onajo

APOLON estolong LC 1 lo Amoroto Gweri William Ongaje agini pas abu loetem Gweri Oleja Charles kikam kanu ebe amengerikit ake awam.

Apolokiton akiro nu okoru ko Kumi diatrikit Ajki Imalkorit Oumo (kediany) ikopakini atupiton eraban nako LC 5 ko Kumi Jane Oligo ekitai kanu airaikin Ahilaop PS no geijokit

Na Charles Orengen

EKIYAKIA Ikuakwapnako Ireland ko Uganda EJkt Brendan Rogers nes elip itunga lako Teso ka Uganda kent aidar ainapakin ka aitonomer tetere ikecedwe edumunete aisisia na ejok.

Enera Bredan araasi 16.09.98 ko Ogossi Mukongoro apak na erimoritor aanyanar

## Kidarata aipuc - Ambassador

Projecte lu igangit akwap ke adukunun ko Kumi District.

Abala Bredan ebe akaulo na enyekisia akwap ke nako Ireland eje, abu apolo kotakanu ngina "Nesepedoritor Irelandaigang yes lako Kumi." Eyatakit Brendan ebe ainakina opaperose Kumi aitojokaar akerianut.

## Ekamar igaalin 15 kanu esolo ko Kapir

Na Gilbert Engimu

IGALIN 15 kes egolokitai uyapeukalo etem Kapir, Ngora kami esolo. Atukoro igaalin lu aparan na etolosere epololo lo esolo.

Apolon etem Kapir, Michael Opolot nges abu ikwenya apolok itela ka LCs ainitikin ikulepek igaalin ailak kesi katipiet, arai mam ebe eponio agwelar igaalin kanu isolosinei luman itunganan etacit. Enera ngesi nu araasi 11.09.98 kametunkec. Einakitai ilulepek igaalin aparasiu 14 kanu elakit itunga 500hun bere adaut alemun esolo kotoma 2109 lo etubokitai esolo kotem Kapir.

## Etutub Mukongoro ebajet

Na Charles Orengen

ETUTUBekasulo loko Mukongoro atukunisirigin 66.868.000 = kanu aitolosio aswamisio nuka ekaru 1998.99

Kpirai ngan emunoi atukun 42,951,000 = kotoma inakini kinodi luce 23,917,000 = emunoi aitolomun kotoma agwelara na iboro lu itwasama ka acioda.

Ebe ebanio kasuloa itwasam 17m = kanu ataciaire eponi peres lo eswamak ka alosite. Kosodi 1.7 million kesi etiakuni lako nganga isomeroi luka Primary ka eswomero loka sinia, linda ekanilo airikakin adukio na adekin na isidore ka surign 1.5 million. Ekasulo elope nes etiakakitai 3m = kanu aswamisio ke.

## Engicio apotikinio na ikoku, emootai emuluka lo Kobuin

Na Ciba Totek

Kobuin, Ngorangesi arami abukoyanga angurian
Eigira Kami kanu apotikinere akooke na mam edolisin ikaru
Pfizerbot. Emontos kwana ipolisin emuluka lokokantia lo
Kobuin ko Akarukei, kotem Kobwin, Emmanuel Apedel kanu
Kobuin ankeu angurun lo esioli ikokoyee mam elimoriookitor
Kobwin konye konsomi lem P5 ko Akarukei P.5.
Akooke apere lo adolokit eyapesi lo eyatere akiro na idwo
Kobuin ankeu 18.09.98 ngesi abala ebe alimorit akooke emuluka
Kobuin ko ankeu 18.09.98 kase da inorukoyapesi lo epuperakiro muidwe ko Kumi
Ebe apesue da inorukoyapesi lo epuperakiro muidwe ko Kumi
Ekooke apesumak lukoyapesi loidwe ijaka Moritz Magall,
Kobuin ko Aka Robert Okukwa ebe idilano ikwana aurianakin
Ekoo oon. Ebe apesue 32 kotoma ngun 100 kesi epotaununete
Ekoo oon.

## MINISTRY OF LOAL GOVERNMENT

## THE REPUBLIC OF UGANDA

## NU ITIJENIKINAITUNGA KERE KIKAMUNITOS AIJUKUNIO NAKA ISIRIGIN KANE EJAI APUGAN NAKO KIDING TONI ODISTRIKTAN KANU ELAP AGUSTO 1998

1. Kanu elap Agusto 1998, ejuku erionget loka apiyai (National Treasury) apiyai kanuka akirosinei kanuta, nu isomeroi luka sinia (capitation grants), adekisia nu apolok kodistriktan, adekisia nu apolok (Refferal Hospitals), isomeroi lu itutuonorere imurwok ka lu aila, nu angaleu (Primary Health), nu irotin, nu idistriktan, nu itaunin, iropito esisianakinak ka lu eswamak lu iyakuunitai (Delegated staff).

2. Ikayaitok nu eitosomae lo apiyai kodistriktan kesi iburai aijukar adio aingiset kakiro kanu nejai e Commissioner/Treasury Officer loka Accounts, koministre lo apiyai.

3. Akauntan nu idistriktan kotoma aingadisia nu apiyai kesi emunoi ebe adaun aitolom nu adumunio na apiyai kanu toma kec.

J.R. KISAKYE,

12 ETOP Nainvongsnet, Osokosokoma (October) 1-7, 1998

AISISIA

# Etoron Ilukor esisiak TCA

Na Emmanuel Akelem

Bishop Geresom Ilukor ngesi etoron esisiak luko Teso College Alnet (TCA) kanu amumu na apora kesi kitokonaanaraasi 1.08.98 neda apotu kubwangabwangatar adarnan na itogoi, aibunga eswamak ka aiyar akokorei nakofaamukec.

Inera Nakesabisti 6.09.98 ko St.Peter's Cathedral, Soroti, ahala Ilukor ebe abu amumu ngin kiisite atitwaniar TCA arereng nakadumun akompyutan kana ejaasi heso luko Bufaya(UK).

"Ekotoni aisinyikokit idowe wok aisisia ido ekot oni aisisium aisac ensingerai lo emunamunai iboro idis da lupo kijuar oni," ahula Ilukor.

Ahala ehishop ebe ko UK apotu Iteso lu ejausi ngina kodolokisingesi kebakasiebe emoete akompyutan kana aijukakin Teso, konye ebe abu kokadak kwi kepuputu ebe adaitosesisiak luko TCA iboro lu esomero.

Elipit Ilukor auriak akokakit aiteten iponesisi iduwe kec.

Koleje kemumuoros esisiak ko TCA aponi ber kogolokinai esomero adaun esabisti.

Kepukor do ekaulo aponi kioskai ber esisiak icie abongor osomero korekote ber ebe engicisaawamsiokec kotoma amumukangin.

Ebalowa lo koleje etwaritere esisiak luko TCA lo iwadikat apolon esomero, K. Oliba, nes ahala ebe aroko ber angicio akro nu amumu kana kanu aitemokin ationis cut jokan komam ebusi bobo.

Kwana ber ebe edeleleunit ebe esisiak luko S3 ka S4 kesi ecukunete ationis ngin ido "etakani bala ajai ebeele lo ecukunitaikokingana esomero da," ahala ebalowai Oliba

# Engaren BKC

Na Edison Oheka

ESOMERO: lo itutuonomore esisianakinak, BKC - Ngora nesi engaren kede Aistur ko Uganda kere.

Lo epolokit akitro nu aingito knomero kalo, Joshua Stephen Osekeny ngesi etijemikini Engr na koyapesi ke araasi 1/9/98.

Ahala Osekeny ebe esisiak 224 lu eboikina aingito kes kere apotu kotuboto Aimar ido erai kwana BKC ediopet kokolejie lu iswamatos ejok ko Uganda kere.

Esisiak ikanyape kesi apotu kotuboto kadoketait nasodit (merci) kesodi 152 kesi etubitos ked pass, 25 kesi mam akiro kec apotiy kobongutu, kesodete 41 aibuse.

Ahala Osekeny ebe kotoma esisiak 155 lu aperete osomero 28 kesi apotu ibiroros kesodete 10 kesi amamei egurod (ungraded)

Es w a m a k orionget lo akipi kotaun Soroti erucete apaipon kanu arikoria akipi osomero lo Kichinjaji PS, araasi 16.9.98. Eriongetloka Unicef nes elemunit apaipon kanu arikonokinia akipi osomerai kere lukotaun lo Soroti. Aputo nainomit Jonathan Maraka.

# Ejaiki GTZ

## Anyara 2.8m/= Na Ewadikan Etop

ERIONGET lo Germany, GTZ nes egang isomeron lukotem Anyara abokikis acolonin. Kwape kwana ejai e project ngel eboki acolonin osomeroi lu Anyara Mora, Anyara Central kede Kaberpda P/S. Na enacokit GTZ kede apogao, Ajkt. Kode-Ouman nes abu kijuk apolom Etem Anyara, Nico Akwang aceeki na 2.800.000/= kanu aitolosio aowamusinei ngun kere.

Isirigin icie, 500.000/= kes etiakaritai kanu agwolakinia idwe abaoi na iboyotor. Ejkt Joseph Ekalam lo Probation and Welfare Office nes ekopukini Akwang aceeki ngin.

# Ebeit Erimu College aiduk

Na Felix Otago

ERIMU College, Soroti nesi ebeit adukun agolaik nu isisiarere sayaus (labaratory) etijena aiyaiton esomero lo, Edison Atwau, inerasipae ka Engr koyapesi ke.

# Aisisia aidony kotem Kyere

Na Jack Okero

ATUKOT naka El Shadai Youth Development Association nges etijena ebe elouete kes kaipet apukor esomero lo aidony kotem Kyere katutubet naka Ocapa, Sapir ko Serere.

# Ebubuki St Theresa

## SS abaatin atukono

Na Richard Akellem

ESOMERO lo St. Theresa S.S. Okungaro, Bukedea ngesi eswapaki aduketan nasodit esomero ngon elopet adukun anyoun ne etegearere nes nepetai ikaru 22 kau.

Inerasi pac kede Etop ahala apolon esomero kalo, Richard Omiyat koyapesi ke ebe itosomaibere somero adukena nu ekanisa kilipunitos acie ko

Okungaro P/S. Eyatakit Omiyatebe ed etogo lo atukono aorgon isirigin lupo etucete idw komam adis agarpi elemunit kanen do keto.

"Arai ibere aitok akonyanar kede auriak idwe da toni apedor la," Omiyat. Amuno Omiyat apukot ataamu na kopedorete esisiak abatukono ngun.

# Atwakiasi 2 aingito k'Akeriau P/S

Na Okello W.

IDWE iyarei luko PT lu Akeriau P/S, Orungo, Nathan Omiya ka Toro Ooide kesi mam iswamatos aingito na ataamu na konye kotaciton isirigin lu aingito.

Kingita kesi apolon esomero, Edward Elada, kapuarin aingito ebe ahala mam ngesi abu koyanga ikiroria kesi Kanuka. Abalasi idwe lu ebe ageun kapak kangin mam Elada kotakanus osomero aitodol aingito ngin adaun.

# IYEMUTO

Epangitok ke Onapito Ekomoloit, MP lo Amuria idiayete, koramete icie akongoi, korotin lako Kampala ainyamar ekecetuan ailair kopalianet apauran Naiyareit. Aputo na inomit Charles Opolot

# Iboomun 10

EDEGE to eje loka Antunov lako Sudan nei kaugaret na esabiiti to atubor abu kocakak aboomu sidakai loko Pakete ko Adjamani Diatrik kmodi simunang itinga Ikanjape la araasi iyarei kakeri iduwa.

1.2. Cut Jet Mwebaze (kope) lo amontai kede ipaopa ke icie kibunan edege 'lo aperiteter kesi ko Kabarole diorekt nesi atwana. Eraruno ates ke Naemukaaga 3.10.98 kariri na ezer. Kizumoro ko Kabarole ido edaikin. ngesi elitbo lo ajore loko Kapeeka ko Luwero diorekt. Adouni edege lo 25.9.98.

Aapani Mwebaze kede itunga uisi ikanyikaongon kobakate ebe alootte Ibunia, Congo kanu agela opursa.

# Esinyikokin lu iyemuto airot nu apolo ka aijar

To Emmanuel Akelton
La Job Opolot ko Mukono
AYAITOK iriongeta lu iyemuto ka Uganda kesi esinyikokin airot ka aiwadika akiro nu apolo ka ejautene lo aijar na itunga katutubena, ajore llepun arimoi adio kere kautente.

Alomanete nu konseresmai lu ejaskinio arotak iyemuto lo atukokina Colline Hotel, Mukono agenturassi 30.09.98 toni 2.10.98 kanu aioisa nu aiwadika ka airot iyemuto lu akiro nu apolo ka ejautene lo aijar na itunga.

Arai erionget loka

Pepalation Secretariat koministre loka Finance Planning ka Economic Development nesi memoko anisia na kigangakite United Nations Fund for Population Activities (UNFPA)

Emasotalo iyemutokoyapese President, Ejkt Basoga

Nuadhu ngesi epakori aarianet abala ebe arai aboskinet naka apugan anopikaar ejautene lo aijar naka itunga ko Uganda.

Kocaaloi kangina, abala Nuadhu, ebe apagal aijar noi neda etwakuta iduwe eroko edisuk kopngal anokian. Eliyo ngesi lu iyemutosiwolunun ejautene kwa kangol.

Apolokiton: Pepalation Secretariat, Dr. Jethan Muningazi ngesi abala ebe vyata enaabu to itunga ko Ugandanui. Kwana etemitai enaabu lo itunga ko Uganda kwapo 21.1m ide ewentitai ebe edeleto 22.2m kokaru 2000.

# EWADIKAK ETOP

- Edita lo Etop nges enyarit ewadikak lu Etop kere abunore airiamun koyapesi kec loko Soroti Naemukaaga 10.10.98 komam atwaniar. Ilipitai yesi adolun sek kosawan iuni lu atupuruc tetere aurianet edaun eroko apak.
- Iyatakit aitijenikin asiomak kere ebe ageun kosabiiti kangol, ebuni Etop aitebeikin apapula adiope kanu iyemuto lu iwolununete akiro nu ileic, nu itwekenete konye kisisianakinete.

# KIDETOK PROJECT CHRISTIAN CHILDREN'S FUND JOB ADVERTISEMENT

Application are invited from suitably qualified persons to fill the vacant post of Social worker that exists in the above organisation.

# QUALIFICATION:

- Diploma in Social Work and Social Administration plus 2 years experience in Community Work.
- A UDBS holder with relevant experience may also apply.
- Fluency in Ateso is a MUST

All applications should be addressed to The Chairman Kidetok CCF Project, P.O. Box 651, Soroti Serere. To reach him not later than mid-day 15th October, 1998.

# Erai alosikinet kosi aimorikikin abenyak

IPA - Abu eong kasiom sormisio k'Ejit Nelson Ocheger. Abu eong acau eek cut ebe mam ngesi abu kigerunite alosikinet alopet na eipud adukun atukot na IPA.

Erai na atukot na edaunitai adukun aek items alosikinet aiai ibrit aittopogong. Konye kane ejai Ocheger, mam ngesi aboto tikopujo atukot na ibi naarai ebuni apukor sormis nu abu eje ngot kabumak Iteso. Karoida etangakit eje ngot eroko kotosmei arai bo nat idingeta eokso otunga lu ipu.

Karai ibikaki oni sormisiot k'Ocheger kwape na kotoma sormite ka, mam cut angarakini aitikokin ngun atipitana ngesi arai bo nat aiyatakin icle da aawam kwangan ka aisub bala aise kur kobaale. Arai kerai kwangan acamunit eong cut ebe ti do oni mam kwape kwana ijaanakini apugan na NRM, arai kito eponi lo abonio oicslong. Mam atukot na elosi adakit ijisio tetere ekunaka lu etepegete eong ko politika.

Ingai bo ebala etwanikini Otodet politika?

Alosikinet kosi naepol nesi aanyun ebe atukot na imorikikin'abenyak'lu kere tetere ebenen anebonit abekoi na emina abwangunun duc ko Teso ebe ageun bobo ebenyt. Ido da kwape ejaatar icle idiopodopen luda eraasi lu obilikiala, ebenenuni eponi lo iteere cut ejautene ka aawamamei kosi.

Kianyu boot ijo nu isiomenene kapapulai idumuni ijo ebe adiosio ace nu apedosi ajaun katukot kec ido korassi kolo abenyak apedo apugan aigangakin ejok kitoritere atukot na ejai eidare alosikinoto kec kwape ejaar aibunget na ikisita katukot kangin. Kapolbor arai kepedo atukot ngin aibwo ejok, ingarakini do Teso da atiakun emugaati kokiding ido keraun ailem emwosa koboro lu ebuni atukot ngin apukor apolouke Teso da ebuni apolo.

Aomiso kwanat kanu Ocheger ejokuka naarai erassi nu epedunete aileten eiswamae ka aiemar aiyalongong kane ejiasis ngul sormitos ebe edinget nes erot

SUBCOUNTY CHIEF
MUKONGORO

# Arai emamete lma ka Achom esubit edia lo ekadit amunyu

IPA - Akoto aitodolikin
amalan ka ne ejassi
ewadikak Etop.

Erai cut aawam kec iboro
yen esikwaru angajep na
Ateso.

Kacut emalat eong
Christine R. Ima acaslot

obe kanu aibec akiro nu
ikamunitos ecasto, kede
Eerina Achom Otuka kanu
aicoreta ke nuitetenete arai
kirimak. Kaneka, kasiom
aong Etop lomam adio
kamucalan kanu iwadikatos
idis ibore, esubit do apapu

la ngin bala edia lo ekadit
amunyu.

Arai ejiatana, ti aputosia
kec da kitodunai kapapulia
kwa kana Charles Opolot
ewadikan "Elimuno Bier."

John Aogon
Kokong Kapir

# Anguriani eong ne ejaasi luko Kapaang

IPA - Anguriani eong ne ejaasi itunga luko
Kapaang ebe ija on kau noi na eipugae lo
Uganda.

Epedor biai adukoi na esomero adaun
iker iuni komam idio ibore iswamauna?
Naiyareikini, esubit do bala mam bobo

itunga ailet na ejai kiding Soroti kede Kabalwi.
Ejai apuponoro na epol kiding itunga ka lu
elomunitos kaboiso kanu kere. Aso kopone
kangol idumuni ebe ipupi aiyatama na epol
noi.

DSA Egeyu Okiror, Kampala

arai -

kotupitete atutubeta 81

adam,

aawam.
