Tribunals lu eseuno
kotupitete atutubeta 81 ka 82
nuka Ekiul loe jeetaranai atub
angurian na emaraare alapok
nu erai etyai kas lu -

(a)kocaslo, mam edepari
turenny pointi iukamni
isenika akwarakany (curency
point = U dis 20,000)

(b)kotuan lo iwadikatai o
Gazette, mam edepari
turency pointi iukamni
ikany.

(c) Ko Division, mam edepari
"curency pointi" iukamni
itomenkaareikaakwat akary.

(2)Karaidakanakaitutubet(1)
yen katutubet naa, e Land
Tribunal lo e limitai kotoma
itutubet egis mam itotamani
aiaorakinet na elemanere nu
iwadikataitoma ahuluwanaka
e Title: suelamamte ahuluwa
naka title, ka seining title,
kanyu jukari akiro nukepone
kangol nejai district Land
Tribunal.

86. Ikiuliat/alesu(Procedure)
lu iswanatai kotoma atutubet
na 79 kotoma ekiul loe epene
aikamunit e Land Tribunal lo

esesunitai kotupitete atutubeta 81 ka 82 nuka ekiul loo.

87. Inneban luka Land Tribunal ko eseuno kotupitete atutubeta 81 ka 82 nuka Ekiul loo eponio iatac ingata ka 'allowances' kwa stemarere kebalawan la einakinere kei awamisinui ide apesan ngon etacere kes iropito ka 'allowances' imarakino eryago loka Consolidated Fund.

88(1)Aiyatak in awasan kingaree ejai anyoun kane ejaasna itutubire District Land Tribunal kiton nejai High Court.

(2) Aiyatak in awasan kingaren ejaan anyoun kane ejai Land Tribunal lo esesunitai kotupitete atutubeta 81 ka 82 nuka Ekiul lairekino o District Land Tribunal.

(3) Aiyatak in awasan kingaren aryman kana itutubere District Land Tribunal kotoma apedorosio ke nuka aiyat awosan ebni o High Court.

89(1) Emamei ibore ido yen katutubet naa yen eyangaaro kwape yen idokoni, inyakikai, arai ainakini ne esangin, kotoma apak na iwamaata ngol obotio nuka aitub kotoma isokitukana alupok nu itingdai koinomi, arai aawam kwape ikadyokan kiding kitunga ka esirke kana akiro acir nu elamaninokotoma alupok nu itingnai koinomi.

(2) Kotoma apak na ajeyuaror amusago, ari apak ado kere kokiding naka apap, epderi Land Tribunal acor lo ecetari kawesan ebe, e Tribunal kotoma awamisio ke aamani amusago kwape lo akototar la angungas icir yen adyeki nakiding koc kanu adumakin kesapgonnerityakes aiyatak in awasan kukanyen nuka Land Tribunal, aiyarakin naka ngongugus awamisinui ngin ebuni do e Land Tribunal atobwino emusago adaan apak na ewamitai ebe edolit kanu anopedour lu engungas adumini yen e wai kokiding koc kana aisinapikir na engungatar kesi, arai eraun, ikeswanuk la ikamuntusakiro ngan, mediator, araibo ringarian da icir.

The Mediator

90(1)Ganne Mediator koraie Land Tribunal eunani

(2)Ebuni e mediator araut itunganan yen ejena kwape yen kiponesio ka ejukak ka awamisio ke da, ide kanu ponesio la ejukak, aijen ka ajenakotunga, erai yen epedori ayaan apaponori nejaas ngol engungas kana alapok kana akiro nu elomunton kotoma ekiul loo, ainakin kes anerun kousdete acamanar ejok cut.

(3)Ebuni e Mediator abeit awamisinui ngan enakitai kotoma Ekiul loo kwape atiingere egis.

(4)Kotoma apak na itolmiso aawam ke abwio e Mediator kanuko ben ido mam etupi aacirio arai apolokit kama kitunganan icir.

(5) Kotoma apak na itolmiso

aawamisineike kotupintekiul loo ebuni eiwamae loka aidyok kabeit aiaganankit e Mediator, napape kaiaedanu ikamuntus aipur ka eipad ngangakin iwatiin lu engungas kopedosi do acamanar bobo kousdete adolokin apaponir, konye mam e Mediator tingaikini iwai ediopet kangol engungas acaman acir konote ngon adyakon kesi.

(6)Ebuni e Mediator araut itunganan yen ecamuntos iwatiin kere u engungas.

(7)Etaci e Mediata 'allowance' kwape stemarere.

# ATUTUBET VI

# ACIE NU EJAAS

91(1)Apexan kere nu etacio - esei, jiu, kacir dairo ijanat o Resurvkana alapok, ide kanu aawamisinui ke kotupitete Ekiul loo, etacuk imsiingadiu nako distrikt arai District Treasury ide emumus acir kotoma na etukonokite district Administration, kilema ben apesan ngon jauni e Board kana alupok nuko orasanin etacukino nejai Urban Authority koreunos acir kotoma na epukakini Urban Authority.

(2)Apexanfoes nuetaciokana Accurance of Title kes ibwakino oriago loka Consolidated Fund.

92(2) Kotupitete ekiul loka Registration of Titles (6), ebuni e Registrar, konum eyangari akiro o Court arai o District Land Tribunal, aiwamaun kotoma apedorosio ke na eyawanyuni ngesi epi eipad kana aimanna ekiul loo, arai koipone loka aitogogong, ka akanike, arai aijidakin, arai amik ahulauwan nuka 'title', akorakino naka ahulawan nuka 'title' nukiteret kacieda.

(2)Ebunio Registrar, arai kersi ahuluwa nuka 'title' arai 'instrument' nu -

(a)edyakaritaiekorakino,

(b)edyakaratui ejaasin ma in itemninsulupok anu ikonun;

(c) lingagongit yen mam ecamukdu,

(d)ejaas ka aitolomaarett arai aitogogonget na erai adyukaret,

(e)iedumuntui koipone loebilit ekiul

(f)idaritai koipone lo ebiit ekiul arai lo mam edolit,

aiwetror atyeket naka ahuluwa nuka 'title' arai instrument kanu adamamuan, arai aiteten, ari ainakin wai lo ebeit.

(3)Araikukurwak iitunganan yen itingit ahuluwa nuka 'title' arai instrument na inera itutubet (2) katutubet naa, karai kengar aitulikin e registrar kotoma apak na edolit, ejali doe Registrar nuka aitodeano ke kousdi aitetenaar atyeket nako Registry ido arai epi, eipad konsuli ainakin ahuluwa nuka 'title' aciera abeiterejai ilopet yen kabeite.

(4)Epedorie Registrar:

(a)aitr" maar adyukanareta nu ejaas o register Book arai nu indumitaitoma;

(b)aitrmanamar adyukanareta nu ejaas tuma atyuketa nuka ahuluwan arai instrumental

(c)ainakin nu mam itolomitai kotupitete ekiul loo.

(5)Epedori e Registrar aiwamaun aitetonaareta nu elomuntte kana ejaliquibere ikineria arai ikonun, konye kotoma aitetenaamar adyukanaretanukeponekangol mam ipuket arai ipucipaci nu ber ewadikatai sek.

(6)Ketma apedorosio nu ainakini e Registrar kotoma itutubet (5) katutubet naa, ibwakini e Registrar aparasia nu eowamama aitetenaareta kousdi da abwokkin inyukutan lu obwokkino ekinar ke.

(7)Aitetenaaret kere na iwamaanakotupitete atutubet naa eponio acamunit ide ebuni awam kousbite bala amamei ork adyakaret, karaida acir nu adepara.

(8)Kotoma aitosoma adio kotoma apedorosio nuka atutubet naa ebunir Registrar:

(a)ainakin aikwenyaret na aparasienu mam ejesunukwap nuka akaisaaret kanadiupe kotoma alinenu na einkai mama ejaa itungamanere yen karapak ikamanete nu eseuno aiiwamaun kotupitete atutubet naa;

(b)ainakin' aprenggi nejai itunganan kere yen einuknai aikwenyaret kana akiro ko apapio, aikwenyaret na ebalai ko paragraph (a);

(c)aipap nuka itunganan ngin kotupitete ikisilu loka etube lo ebeit, kanyekomun itingakikan awam nu einkan ikisilu loka ajenaanul lu itosomao kotoma adyeket na ikisila.

(d)ainakin nu iijenaaritus kanuok inyoaseunangesi aibub ewangin.

(9)Ajenaarie Registrar kotoma aiwadikat ngan etutub ngin ne ejaan lo ikamuntos akiro ngun ka Ekamiti da.

(1) Ewukkere krenam ecamunit nu esenini Registrar aawam jukari angurian ke o District Land Tribunal kotoma aparasin akaisakanyikape akasil na ejukakinere akiro na etutubio ne ajaas lo ekamuntin ngun,

(11)Arai ketema e Registrar ahuluwa naka 'title' arai nu etolomukao Registrar Book, yen iganginoma alemaree ahuluwa ngin mam do ber ijulari 'title' aitodol ne edaunr apak na ecamakitai kanu aiyatakin angurian kingaree kana alemaree ahulawa, mam eges julari 'title' aitodol ne epupere nu eyatakitere angurian.

(12)Erai lu iyatakini angurian kingareekotupitenaikatutubet naa ngas ekotokinsii aitogogongkebe itijenikitingnii tu epegarar ngesi nu eyatakiter angurian ke kingaren.

(13) Arai kukurwakin yen iyatakit aijukar angurian ke ingaren aiwosa, epedori e

Toni App.10

ETOP Naiwongonet, Osokonekoma (October) 8 - 14, 1998

# Aomisio

# Ayautu Imusugun arupian swi

konye bobo kejui icai yen mum ber epedori agwelun arai da aikopo isape akiriama isirigin akanakany da.

Itungafukers icasaikapone kec. Kesi kere emonyeta enyadu. Karu ber singit, ingai beri kingarak jjo.

Akirat na ngeisi sinakit song ayausi aimony na akulong. Kelumu akolong ko Kids isiarak inotungakere. Konye kemonyata obkolem kamagoroapolosikembe mam itungakere epedoreteapapun aimony kac, dimikto idunyasi ijo ka amagoro ne ejassi kesi.

# Elimunio ber

Ebalasi idokolou eha "How How How" . Anubo isyo. Ingai bo kayesi ejesii eho isyinyotete idokolou da.

I yausit song aomisinit na mere naarai erassi icai itunga idokolou. Konye ben eho ejassii iburu icia akwap na la iyangaarit oni kwape la atitisi la abolia (for granted).

Emonyete itunga etengei kode ibakor. Mani wok itunga ejetete ehe eipone bo ali elumunuta kesi kobakor kala.

Arai da ber kingit ijo kesi ikulepek eho arai ber kola ijo aklumun ikapun iiwama bo ijo isyo. Inyoni ber cut ijeni ijo. Idumuni do ijo iwok itunga ebongokitete ehe "apedori song aswami idio ibore kere."

Aheit cut ingai bolo ijo yeni ibata ehe ipedori aswami ingin ibore kere.

No nesi ejai oni atiomis (No speciality). Nesi da engisitor song ehe doho ber arai akolong singer alomun adiope apak abokikariari oni kwape aleker na Ikeo.

Ibore cut epol nesi engrenok kaka fieto aisisianak in itunga epone lo epetorere ibakor la. Ekot iwok itunga aseini ibore ejetete kesi ehe epedorete kesi aswam karu adumunia abolai kode abar.

Emiamei cut yen. epedori aipup aimony wok na ecanit do konye aikor oni abar na atitisi. Ibore la atitisi Ohsebuli in ejassi. Ekot oni ajenon ehe itunganan yen icana emamei agopong na engerio idio ibore arai da kebosit.

Siri ikatunga yesii kitenasi ehe ajai song ejok ngeisi enerar song epone lo.

Mani cut. Eung da ecana, hon eho ekot oni acamun aimer aomisio kasodete amoun epone lo itemomi ibakor la.

Aliinokini cut song yesii eho arai ikutouni araimam, emamei bobo icia itunganan obuni aitopol Teos ksdimi arai oni buruk.

Ngesi duc abular song yesii ehe engrenok la isei oni ekot korasoi songa la ecamunitos aipal engendok (sacrifice), kakukuraka, kousonete ingaren (with a vision) ido da kocamunitos aipup na kaluca da.

Aso kwapepekwana ejassii abolai. Kanyala swii tai. Ayautu Imusugun arupian nu topaket yesii itunga la oikas.

Do arai mam engrenok wok ebeberitosaikamun Imusugun la, eraan bobo yesii aiyed kode ekwango lo ibakor kus epone ngopengol.

Ejasii ikapun UNDP, ejassi bobo ikapun USAID, ejassi

bobo icia PRIDE AFRICA, ejassi bobo OED, ejassi icia da FINCA, eijasi icia VOCA, kacie aibuiso da. Inwasi ho ali kaymi lo ajetete ehe ejassi ikapun la idaritori yesii.

Nesi ne abular song ehe isyinyiti edokole da. La mam iboitotor kamagoro mam ejetete nu.

Kwapekwana adumu Teos arerong na itegelikina. Kacut Kumi, olomuniy erai acuumana isusakinyekumaido, akanyum, aturo ka imare.

Dobo do epone ali ipodorista yesii akoru iboro lu kamu adumunia ikapun.

Kiriamakisi akwesi kosodete aijasa isirigin Imusugun kikorono.

Ejasii ikus ikapun Kampala dodo yesii ikulepek ijetete eipone lo idumunista arai kiteranata yesii aomisio kode engrenok kusi. Adau song elope alimukin yesii do mun bobo yesii aimony aleketere.



## READ THE FOLLOWING PASSAGE AND THEN ANSWER THE QUESTIONS THAT FOLLOW IN FULL SENTENCES:

One day, four young girls were sent to the forest to look for some fire wood. Their mother knew that the four girls would not get lost in the forest when they were by themselves. The four girls got their pangas and left for the forest, while in the forest they saw some ripe mangoes.

"For two days, we have not eaten any mangoes"
"Why don't we eat those good fruits?" one of them said.
"I feel very hungry. Let us stop and eat some," the other one agreed.

"Fruits berry quickly. For the next two minutes the three older sister called to the younger one who was called Susan. They got worried when they could not hear her. They threw down their mangoes and moved round the tree to look for their sister. It was too unfortunate, the young sister had climbed and fallen off the tree without the knowledge of her sisters.

After some time, the girls, mother got worried at home. She followed them. When she reached the sight she saw the three girls round their sister, she was dead!

"You bad girls, 'I didn't send you to eat mangoes did I?" she shouted. Not nay of them replied but continued weeping. She had to reach them and was strongly sad, her lovely daughter had surely fallen off a mango tree and was dead.

NOW ANSWER THE FOLLOWING QUESTIONS CORRECTLY

(a) Who sent the girls to look for fire wood?
(b) why were the four girls sent by themselves?
(c) What did they decide to do on the way before they reached where they were going?
(d) Where had the girls been sent and to do what?
(e) Who climbed the mango tree of the four girls?
(f) How did the girls' mother feel, when she didn't see her daughter for a long time?
(g) What were the girls doing when their mother called them?
(h) What happened to one of the girls that was terrible?

## IN QUESTIONS I-J Give a word or group of words with the same meaning as those underlined in the passage.

(i) replied.
(ii) weeping.

Read the following conversation and answer the questions given in full sentence:

DENNIS: Sister Juliet, are you ready to leave for school?
JULIET: No, I haven't yet washed my feet and had my breakfast.
DENNIS: You are always slow and lazy, I have already done that.
JULIET: But brother, you have almost no work to do in the morning.
DENNIS: You are lazy, you wake up late! always sweep the compound.
DENNIS: That is true mother, but the problem with my sister is that she wakes up late and she is very slow.
FATHER: What is happening with you little ones? Haven't you left for school yet?
JULIET: Father, I generally have a lot of work to do before I got to school and now I haven't had my breakfast yet.
FATHER: You are very lazy and must change.
MOTHER: My daughter is not lazy. She is indeed hard working. So I don't see why you should blame her.

Now Answer the following questions:

(i) How many people are taking part in the conversation?
(ii) Why was Juliet not ready to go to school?
(iii) What work did Juliet's brother do before he went to school?
(iv) Where did the conversation take place?
(v) What is the best title for the conversation?

54. 5: Read the instructions below on the steps of making a cake and answer the questions in full sentences:

(a) measure the ingredients
(b) sieve the flour and baking powder
(c) prepare the eggs
(d) Beat or stir the eggs
(e) switch on the oven at favourable temperature
(f) after mixing the ingredients to the right consistency grease the baking tins.
(g) Put the mixture into the baking tins and put in the preheated oven.
(h) bake for a bout fifteen minutes for small and forty minutes for big ones.
(i) Test the cake with a knife, if it is ready no mixtures will stick on the knife.
(j) When ready pass a knife round the tin and turn the cake on a cooling rack.

Now answer the following questions:

(i) What is done to eggs after preparing them?
(ii) what is done after switching on the oven?
(iii) What is obtained when the sugar is ground?
(iv) Name all the ingredients mentioned
(v) Another word for favourable is?
(vi) What is used to greze the container?
(vii) Why should the containers be greezed?
(viii) What is used to test the cake?
(ix) How can one know the cake is ready?

16 ETOP Naiwongonet, Osokonokoma (October) 8-14, 1998

# Atukokin TECHE 6m/s

Na Jonathan Maruka

ISIKKIN lo mhpareto 6,625,000/- ka emong kes aponi kotukunai Naiwokaga na atuber, kanu adukio Teso College of Higher Education (TECHE) lo emunoi aitaraun niwaru iyumibasire lo Teso.

Ajaikina anuhan nu atukere apiyai nu onomoro lo Soroti S.S., MP's ikanyape lako Teso, fieso juni lu isisianakinote Makerere University ka itunga idis lu atomunitos ka iboisisena egelngelako Teso kes ajansi anuhan nu.

Ebakio apiyai nu kanu adukio aduketait na eheit araon esomero lo itutuenorere esisianakinak ko TECHE. Ipadai 70m/- kanu aduketait kana, konye angetakin aiduk TECHE kere nes amunoi ebe ipadakin 800m/-.

Apolon Arthur Philip Omunoki ngesi ayaunii 731,500/- la atukokitos itunga, kacut fieso lako Tororo. Eineya lo Tororo, Paul Sands Emolot ngesi alemaini 300,000/-. Dr. Epuwat lo Tororo ngesi alemaini 100,000/-.

Apolokiton ebood lo eyait TECHE, RI, Rav. Gerecom Duker, ngesi abu kitijena ebe aatasi fieso lo ibeyeits ko ibolaya ka dugai lu kolo ajansi Teso da aituk apiyai kanu aduko kana. Ebeit da ngesi airiamun kode fieso lako Kampala, Entebbe, Jinja ka siboisio acie ko Kampala aruasi 7.11.98 kanu aituk apiyai.

Emilnuna loka Suto kanu akiro nukutoma, Col. William Omaria, lo arai apejonon lo angosibib, ngesi anguriani naarai ebe etiono siram fieso asworkikin aiswamaun ibore nepepe ido ebe ekot Etesut (aswam) ngisi ituan bon.

Ebakan fieso ebe icanasi, konye kodokete itogoi etaunin lako Soroti, Kumi ido elenete kwana ailelete itogoi Katakwi da Edukete toni Kampala da," abala Omaria.

Prof. Kupuliano Oduzi lo Makerere University iteditsikini itunga, la ajaikina Soroti S.S aituk apiyai.

"plan" lo aduketait na TECHE na ekotoi ageun aiduk. Aputo na inomit Jonathan Maruka.

# Arocu Abaadi ikokolak ko Soroti

Aay. App. 1

Ekamunio Richard Odubo, kede Jishao Okefie Enyaka ka emuada AK 47 enaaba S-AX 4161, kede arasacin akanyape kere katutokto na ebe Joyce Anyange, lo ejai Teso fen. Eransi kesi iarian lukisilefa Owaini, eiduny kede etaun lo Soroti.

Apolo Uo Sogaru Odubo ka Enyaka aidar polionako Kumi. Terekes kode inacikac na ebe Stella Amoding kesi aponi koyangarai aidar polo nako Soroti kanu aingarako angage aingis emusago lo.

Eilimilimitai ebe Amoding ngesi fem erai angican na onokonrankala.

Icie imokonran lu idario ko polis nako Soroti kes Charles Juma' Wandera ka Moses

Opisio ebe ijukijolonkinetke. K'Ochapa, Serere ebe ejemangesi kwape Epiaka.

Ayaitok ayuarako Kumi kede Soroti kes apotu kolimokisi Enye ebe eyatak ittokorai angis emusago lo kanu arocun icie ipaup laka imokooran kala ka aitelemunkes iinuiduriaris la eroko ibwatai.

Loodaranoik wape apolokiton ipolisin ko Soroti, Lawrence Kabafianzaki (ASP) kede egirigiran lo ayuara ko LC5 Kumi, Abaadi Aeko, kes abalasi ebe alimosi lo ekamun ebe kesi angaaare Eiki Opio, agwelanaran ikee kotaan lo Soroti, kakaare Naikanyet na atuber.

Abalasi kesi ebe alimoritusi da imokooran lu ebe kes aperunete koleje RDC lo Soroti, Valirian Baguma, korotredany k'etaan lo Kumi ido ebe kesi anganete eiduka loka Eiki Sam Mafabi agwelanaran lokotaan lo Kumi, ka siboisio acie nako Katakwi, Soroti, Kumi toni ibotia.

"Tuta fem ikie atapit imokooran lu ageun arasui 23.98.98. Kes iem eperunenete amotokan. Eransi imokooran lu etioko mo ido ituranakitere ejera iruan ipu," abala Abaadi.

Abala Abaadi ebe Enyako lo ebur akuan nes iem emakiton imokoran lu ebe 'Emomen' apolouke 'papa ikokolak' konediemuudenes emakitonikesa lebe 'unare' "Mam bo kesi angasitos Kurnikalapin idis lu atuberon, konye aponi kucedakin isis aswamisio kes kanodete isis aitup kes met mot toni angasiata Katakwi da. Arai alosikinet kesi aikamun kes kode idis ibore.

Apotu do isis ekamutu kesi kede 'emuoda," abala apolokiton ipolisin ko Kumi distrikt, Francis Okefie (ASP).

Apolokiton LC 5 Kumi, Haji Omari Okodel ngesi abu kolimok Edita lo Eny, Kenneth Oluka, kosimu ebe etnoonat edistrikt ke apiyai nu ipu noi angicia imokooran lu.

Abala Okodel ebe acai apakio ejeununete imokooran lu imuudun kobarakis lo ajare kanu angasia.

# Apaaran na Ateso nuteme

Na Martha Abello

ELASGANO lo eseunere apme na temel na ebuni aiya ekitor: "Ajkt Teso" nesi esarkikintmi 28.11.98, etijena apolokiton Soroti Hotel Ajkt Rita Aguti na da eyait na etiagano kalo Abottelangano loka Ajkt Teso ajaan eransi 9.10.98, konye aponi bobo koomomounai ebe ebe kejakite asubanti na apatun na "butensis loka fesso 28.11.98. Ebuni etinema ka ajatkite Soroti Hotel ebe kapuaran kangas.

Ebala Aguti ebe apme ka akanyasni kesi eewitkanan aitemar etiagano lo idis kasi Hadija Abain, Jimaras Mala.

# Ekotoi aiyar eminista

Aay. App. 1

aikamilise lu LC 5, apolok aicitinga lu LC, ijaka lu betiwan lo eswanak lu apugan lo apolok ko Pallisa distrikt. Eransi kesi Aanyanaran lo Apolon lo apugan (IGG) nges etemokit aitemar ngisi.

Abala eminista ebe karaida itukurianin aije ke, ebuni nges anyatakin alemonokin 'eijiri' lo ezamunana lo ingonya ko Pallisa idis lo da kwana asub do 'EDOLA' ko Uganda da kere naam ebe ajas do kwana akirot ngisi itukuriani istudengere eminista ko. Abala nges ebe ajae ezamunana adekis nako Pallisa ido ebe dia pac nges ki wororistio apolokitos amukianko distrikt DMOID. Andrew Namonyo oyapesi ke aitatam akiro ngan.

# ETOP

# ALIMONORETA NU ATITA!

Ageun kosabiiti kangol, egeuni bobo Etop aitolomunun alimonoreta nu atitai. Siri kitwania arereng na, konye kiitunite auta: Aileleb afoomu kwa kangin App. 14; ekot alimoret komam erai na agwelanar; komam akiro kodeparete 25; komam eraasi nuka politike; nu mam emoromorete.

Any. App. 1

# Etur Emolot NEMA

Na William Otaala

EMEYA lako Tororo Eikit Paul Sands Emolot nges eturu National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) kanu asenn aitutuer esisianakinak kotoma akiro nuka ejauteme kalo akwap.

Enera Emolot na angaaria ekosi lo etemonokit NEMA ko Tororo District Farm Institute arasui 3.10.98.

Abala etneya ebe ebecokino epela kes aisiarakin ejie lo etamitor Tororo Distrikt aitikokin apeponaka ikibiran.

Eturumi Emolot ebe akade da da euta ailotar alupok nu ipusukakosi toni aro.

Atai esisianakinak 50 ajansi ekitosi lo ido koponito ko Mbalr, Tororo, Bagiri ka ibusia Distrikts ido korai NEMA asutanti apesan nu etolonere.

Apolokiton aisista ko Tororo Distrikt Eikit Dan Ogefilan ngesi abala ebe ehworte awate wok konyamat, akipi nuk imasi oni kode ekwam lo inguomori oni. Asa apepona ikito itidisiari iboro lu, abala ngesi.

airere ikitoria kec arai iwadikataiejak, lo abil alimar sine da aiwadiknan kaalemana ngul lu atwakata arii lu erassi ilong waukak wapwok. Abala CAD, nada enera kwape napolokiton nu aseo kodistrikt; ebe eponio apesikite ieyesitan lu toni 21.10.98.

kengarenok do konya bobo ekaidisebe aibelakin ebe ekoto engarenok aceite adalac enee lo eyauto arorwa. IYEMUTO

# Esialamiki Jeje Onapito

Na Job Opolot

EKOMANDA lokapolon lo ajore naka UPDF Maj. Gen Jeje Odongo, nare esialamiki itunga lakobuku Amuriakana ke spac asnon Onapito Ekomolori kana abwokin ngesi kwape MP

Alimuni ngesi akire naiyamit nabian kooteri loko Sub-Way Kampala ne espejitor Onapito egangilok ke akaolo na sisiltamu, kasuban na araar ngesi epejonon lok apolon. Erabun lo airabet, Francis Aysimo, ngesi esilairui Onapito.

Abu ngesi kisuman alismokin apak alope na ekotor ngesi altisilikin itungi kere lu Amuria ebe adau ngesi idkopakin Onapito eicolong.

Eyatakit Jeje anur itunga loko Amuria kana acobea kec na angicon emong elokpet fo teni alosi sibwok ajokat na Amuria ne eat imbeikiniasi ngesi apuansiu na araar nges (Jeje) MP ker.

"Eswamuntu teni itunga loko Amuria ifore yen esialamiki nong adepur; mam yeni idiakariton kanu asrun Onapito," abala ngesi kogatasi egangilok Onapito.

"Iswamaata teni yeni kwape abeitor; ainakin etobait lo (Onapito) ajokat, kosodi aijukar lucie imongin olufura kwape abeitor" abala Jeje kogatasi itunga ebe "Shaulin Jeje our Man."

Odongo lo ecipicipaara kede igoen ke lu ajore, ngesi konye abukodna sicakunakongo, kede aramak lu ayanganuit Onapito ko Amuria kitoni ansumokin itunga kere kede eipoter lo ebecokitor ngesi ekonio kede ailajaara.

Sek koinerke nes abunio MP Onapito kisumunia aingarenikin itunga lako Amuria kanu adumun apolo.

Abala Onapito ebe abuni ngesi nepepe kede iurian kere lu Amuria aiswamanar kanu aanyun ifore ikolepek lu epudasi itunga lu Amuria.

# Amariata ekanisa, Ngero Trading Centre alupok

Na James Odong

EKANISA lo Church of Uganda ko Ngem, Kami, nes muon Nguru Trading Centre kana ebe admaria e Trading Centre ekanisa alupo nu erai alalau kec hectares iarii.

Elijemari Rev. Ikara S. akiro ngun aransi 19998 kokanisa mama ejaan Ikristayon. Abu ngesi koram itunga abukot emular ajetanut kanu alup kangun, apak na egrarata ekanisa kede e trading centre aiwosakin koko oti loka LC3.

"Elipit nong yei ikristayon abukot otem aitodusin ajetanut kana alup angun," arami ikaanelipak.

Abala ngesi ebe karai da enyam ekanisa emusaago, mam nges abuni ayangaar etube erono. Kiyatakite

aikweyarikristayonebeegirit kere Ebaibali ngul lu itokokolitna ekanisa.

"Ebala Ebaibali daebe ikeno ngin yen isukanyikini eikor toma alup nu ekanisa," abala Ikara, kogatunete elipak ebe "Amen."

Alupiton apolon eicolong lo ekomidi lo eyait nu atropol Ngero Trading Centre, Eji t ObaE. nges abula ebe kariada kijaikitai kolo ekanisa alup ngun konye ebe mam abu kopedo airaikin amoru toma ker.

Abala Oba ebe ewanyutu kesi ebe mam ekanisa apodokit nu aira amor alup ngun, kwari epudar ekiol, abu do ebe ekomiti ka district land board committee kitojokasi airaikin aomor komam ekanisa ajoni.

# Ekot Orungo ebuku

Na Okello W.

AURIANE Tnaka ipolok kalu etom Orungo, ido ibnyete kotaan kalo Suonti kesi erassi 8.10.98 apotu kiriamunon Bata House lo Soroti kosodete alip ebe kogitakinai etem Orungo ebuku ke bon.

Lo apolokinit ariumun na eges apolon Eji t Martin Edeko lo koitela Abeko, atutubet Ajari.

Abala apolon Edeku ebe ibusakinit kotiakakinai Orungo ebuka naarsi elul Orungo ido da bobo ajassi kede etiai lo itunga lu ipu lu edolete 26,000. Emoriaritos

etiai ngol atumanak komam imarakinitai idwe.

Apolon Washington Area lo nitela Akuriau atutubet na Omicada Akuriau Bingesabu kigang aomisioit ngin naarai ebe ejai atomus kowai kalo apolo, ido nges einakinit Orungo mam ekoto epolnor atipet. Orungo nges etem lo ejassi kede itelai ikanykauni lu elalak noi. Kangol eitela ejassi kei lo atutubena 11.

Aitelekaarite Morungatury nges ejassi kede atutubena 14 ka Morunera atutubena 12. Einakinit ngin pipugae da mam itolosiin ejok.

Ilipitos ipolok lu ekanuilo

loka LC III lo kotem Orungo airereor adipun kec ka atiokiso nu ejansi otem kede epone luepedorere angalgala arsi alomar atiokiso ngun.

Ejaatar Orungo kede nomeron 24 ido ikidioko lo ileleba atukono kec. Kotoma onaaba kangol nomeron bala kautiy kausi bon kesi adautu atukono kec aiduk kede amatapaalinkonye luceeraasi lu anyaa bon.

Boni neponen isomeron iyarn bonkes edaunitaitogoi na einisanakinak aiduk kede abautin emorioriton Occcia P/S ka Orungo P/S bon.

Apotu bobo lu Youth the

MP Bote aleluya esialamikini MP lo Amuria akaolo na ngesi ainakin enter ke lososidi ko airabet. Abu Onapito kya (apugani) aingarakin Teso akiru iraini lu ebarista Kiding ngesi MP lo Kalaki Charles egou. Apata na Chatin Ngero

# Emiki eswamak apiai nu inyamat

Na James Ekweu

EKANSILAN lako Western Division koigo Soroti kesi aransi 5.10.98 apotu kitutuboto aikisarapiya inaka inyamat lukapaaran (Lunch Allowances) loka eswamak lu apugan (established staff) ko division kangol.

Etatubete ikansilan ngun kairimun ket nepepe ka apolon eicolong LC III koc, Ajkt Bose Okwi, kojaikina emeya lokoigo da, Eji t George Egonyu da toma.

Anyutiyarasi ikansilan lu kobalo ebe mam napulon ket

etodusinit eiswamae lo idelelei, mam ebe epodokinit amomun epulaan lo aswam kairiamunan (Time Table), ido ebe nges (Okwi), atupiton e Town Clerk ko Division kangol, Eji t Paul Omoko, ka edaran apiyai Sub-Accusentant, Atupu Emoriono kes bon ebe ipugatos edivision kipingaritos kes awai. Ibore da akututor kesi (ikanasilan) aidotor Okwi ka Omokokaswam.

Akaolo na kes ajpal aidotor kwi, apotu ikansilan kijuluta anyanyura kes apiyai nu

ainyam.

Kosodete aitutub aitanang kes adumuna apiyai ngun kituniekara lo apiyai (Fiscal year) 1997/98 adaun.

Eswamak 11 kes atubor apiyai kes nu etiai 3,000/- kangin idiope kakesi. Edumununete lion kesi apiyai ngun irwan aarei kanabiat.

Ikoni non da, apenyakisi ikansilan aiyatakin etiai lo isirigin (Allowance) na kes abounokin airiamunetaagnan ko 10,000/- kangin airiamun, kitoni 40,000/-. Kariulakwana emunnete ber ebe isirigin

konsmaakauntanakod isiom ket.

Abu Okwi ekaolo kilip ikansilan aswam jokan ka aminarara mere areite lucie. Kosodi ailip aitimoi arsi ibucara ngesi.

"Elipit nong aitimoi kanekun araisijaki nu ailiakaritnong," abala ngesi kilnapi akanin.

Apotu da ikansilan kuanyunasi elinsomac loka apiyai nu edumunanei edivision agenn kolap Mayi 1998 kitoni Agosto ido epassi aingic elinsomac loka 782,000/- lo ebe mam acai jokan.

# Ebeit Japan aigang adekisia ko Katakwi

Na Orinkot Aurike

ERIONGET kijokutana loka Japanese Internation Cooperation agency (JICA) nesi ebeit agar aigang adekisia nuko Katakwi distrikt agwelakin ibero lu itouma kelapio idis lueponitos koingaren.

Apolon eicolong LC 5 Katakwi Stephen Bernakorit ngesi abu itijena nu erassi 9.10.98 asuban na enumanumere aparan na epugaikin bon ko boma Katakwi. Abala Bernakorit ebe arai lo ediope kotoma Oriongeta lu ojokatau lu

eponitos aigang Katakwi district. Eyatakit ngesi ebe eriongetecie nesi Department for International Development loko Bulaya loda ebeit abunere abokinikin agilon ocaaloi loka Katakwi. abalangesi ebe apotu kesi itolutoto ineresinei ka

eriongetlo 15.09.98 ekasiloko ebe apotu imurugun lu itimoni ocaloi lu abuku Unak kana airereun kodoco ejautune lu ak ipi ocaaloi.

Lo idararsi kwape kwane vyapesi loka DMO Eji t Idholoi Okia, ngesi abu itingong nu.

# Mam ilomete odiinin tai ta alimoki Bp. Ilukorikristayon

Na Ewadikan Etop

EPISIKOPI loko Church of Uganda Bishop Gensem I ngesi eiswena ikrisitayon asac ailem odiinin taito.

Enera Ilukor ko Mukongoro 30.09.98 akaolo na asin ikarisitayon 59 akanin ko St. John's Church Mukongoro.

"Kosalakisi toma aiyoun kos kinyekisi aimo akire okut eis" ebu laukor.

Abala e Bishop ebe apukosi Lesbian okanisa kec ke loka Zandia, ekanisangol nes escamak it ikiliok sumany kere kide angor da amanyanak in bonik.

Eyatakit Ilukor ebe kotoma aurianet na ipisikopin na ipu Bulayapac apotu kesi kogirotoaomisioit nayauntindimok eicie ebe ti kecamakin ikiliok amanyanakin ka kere loka jokanisa.

Abu bobo Ilukor kicor atumunak aisac akukarya imu komamen ber epalisi da kokale.

"Luekotosiaisupekotber kojaasi ka iboru la ekakkinye ayasunar apenar itunga ecdeda oparia" ebala Ilukor.

Ebala Ilukor ebe eburitos lteso naarai egwelaaman asin ka emucieri konye epol amat nes eyaunit ecanit lo ebe nyakut uteker kaa ka etengei okalia.

Abu Ilukor kilip Imukongoro atukokin apiyai kanur asin (TECOD) tetete asisman elosi akusye, abala ngesi ebe lteso lu ejassi Bulaya kigangata TECHE ka apiyai kuyu abu kolitno etiai lo apiyai nu apom kotukutua ke konya.

ETOP Naiwongsnet, Osokosokoma (October) 15-21, 1998

# Ilapio kotoma

# EBALUWA LO ESABIITI: ETELEKA 10,000/=

# Wori bodo imorikikinotor Iteso kotoma angajep?

IPA - Akiro arai saartebeta etau edolit sitecaun, aciepak ipedori sdumun alainapikinis. Eebo, idlia oni apupun Odwe Oduk kangin paarit nanimunotor iarei arai iuni ingitanaros ebe "alboijo kau?" Kingiset da mam erono nabarai ajenanar mam erai apesen, kosodi mam egwelario.

Nu aumokin nuasirriebete ido korai

aanyunet; idumuni ijo iurist yen ko Kumi elimokini yen ko Soroti ebe yesi irsasi Ikumama naarai anpaki kus esubit bala inyalakina Akumama toma, icle ipupuni ebakasi ebe Iteso lu abeit kesi ngul egeete ikorola kec kede anyukuta 'O' mere 'E', idumuni bobo ebe kekuruoki Ituan alleleb sibukaaret na elomununasi kotoma Etop kogeuni aresiar ebe

Itegelikina Ateso, ebe Itosomatai Ateso Ausuko arai boot atemar ebe inyalakina Akumama.

Ejai do bobo etiakak acie kiding Iteso ido kitorunite aibolaisi no ilomunitor neda rearu aomitor ebe ngoll dietrik arai ngin bola ko Teso eponio atemar amuna angajep nakoidunyet. Kwape aanyunet ijo eilar ilomunit ko Tororo imuario konye nukon kobakatete ebe inera

Amudama Kilim boot ebe Irai lo Usuk Ikangalkino ebe Inera Akaremoja. Kitem nat ebe Irai lo Paillisa da Ikenyakino ebe Inyaka Amugwerlo kon ne ibunlo. Iyaleo ebe Irai lo Serere da bala mam ekotai kolim edlo naarai Inera Amakenyin. Kogwau konye nukon kosodi atemar ilomunit k'Otuboi arai kobuku Kaiaki. Bala eringa engetakina einer kopupunite abongokinet ebe lilling kede Akumama kon. Ikenyu boot ebe eong cut lo Kumi ebakal ebe iringa tricit angajep na Kakungulu ainyurinyoria Ateso.

Aingiaet na etupakini ngesi ne ebe lu kangai bodo Iteso? Naarai kitam einer angajep eidunyet bala ekotoi kowenikin imugug. Mam do konye ajen ni inacan wok lu apotu kogwelata atupok

kaibolalo nu ikoruotor Teso arai ejaasi nu epedorete alimun da. Aomit eraun ngul aitul angajep aitul.

Wori bodo imorikinotor Iteso kwape atekar? Ellpit kacakasi atiakak na itorunit atutubena naarai apolo Itorunit aimorikikina ido nepene kipedoria angicun ka aitiji lu asurup wok da

Na Elesu O. F

# Konyaraunai Iteso, Ikumama aurianet

IPA - Ellpit eong engarenok loko Soroti dietrik konyarautu aurianet napolon na atamama ka Iteso kanu eilaiet aomisio nu ayangaunete eidicane.

Kotoma aurianet kangin kitopolorai apucanor, mere epeget kalaidik atiakaku.

Ilunga lu amuno eong 6 ejaunos aurianet kesi luta- Ikaasilan luka LC III kere, Ikaasilan luko LC V kere, imeeban lu airabet napolon kere kede imeeban lu Emorimor lu okomiti kalo ediatrik.

Acie akiro, ibusanakit ti aurianet na asekun abwaan ediopet lo mam itepegio kanu aburokin loatwan Odetta John Henry kanu ajokis na aimorikikin.

Arai kitojokar abwaan lo Tesot alomun, kaseo na etupakini Ikumama ebeete eicolong. Idwe wok da etupakinete kwangin, kolomuni bodo eidicane lo egogong. Konye arai ebukokinos bobo Ikumama ka Iteso aibwo, isinyikokini atiakak.

Opian Jorem Obicho Gweri.

# Mukula, anibo
Voice of Teso?

IPA - Epuda ber eong ageun keda aisialamikol MP's kero luko Teso kanu aswamisio kec kacut ngul lu elaparos itopoicete ibukui kec bala toni ne ebwolkitotor Teso do kere, kwape William Omaria L'Arapai, Christine Hellen Amongin Aporu ka Mike Mukula.

Engisit dodo eong Mukula ebe aisiumunet kon na eredio lo da abalai ebe ebunlo anyaara ebe "Voice of Teso" ekwaki bodo ai?

Tolbert Patrick Edait
Kapir, Ngora

# Alakara

IPA - Alakara, eong kanu aitakrito kus na aitodolmiknataker iyemuto ka aomisio nu icorete, kacut aibukaareta nu amina eong noi.

James Ochom
Mbarara University

# Korurukata Orisai PS

IPA - Isio Idwe lukosomero lo Orisai P/S kes ipuda aimony kosi kodolok ne ejai DEO Kumi. Iraun do isio lu ikoriei amisirin nu esisianakinak. Ejai konyet ediopet kakesi lo itarasanari isio misiri ke aicap emuogo ke. Arai kigir ijo mam alomar atukot na isisianakini je.

# Kosac aipwak

IPA - Ellpit abongokin ewadikan William Okello kanu ewadikat ngesi Etop Oktoba 1-7, 1998.

Ebala ngesil ebe mam idwe iere lu Akeriau PS iswamatos aingito na atamu kana atubor.

Abet mam Okello ajen ebe, apotu idwe ngul kiyapata aitac isingin lu aingito okaru lo.

Epedon nges ajenun nuipu

kane ejai DIS Katakwi.

Acie, ebala Okello ebe amamei eong kosomero apaaran na aingito.

Ellpit eong ngesi kodolu oyapesi ka kosodi aingilun aanyun itabonlu: LogBook, Arrival Book ka Diary.

Ekot Okello kosac aipwak akiro nu aisab kwa nat kangun koingaren.

Apollon Esomero
Akeriau Primary School

# AISIYALAMIKINET

Ekale loka apolon M. David Otwao ngesi isiyalamikit ngul kere lu apotu igangakisi kesi kotoma owaitin lu egelegelapaaran na asuban nuka Steven Edoku kede Vicky Ayako Esilu. Isiyalamikitos kesi noi noi Rev. Fr. Tom Mayayu lo Orungo Mission, Fr. Mwede lo Amucu Mission, amurak ka ipapero luko Entebbe, Jinja kede Kampala. Kisiyengu Lokasuban imoyoi kec kotoma aipuo.

# Kijuk ijo da ebaluwa kon ne ejai Edita lo Etop.

ETOP Naleongonet, Osokunkoma (October) 15-21, 1998

# IYEMUTO LU ITEGELIKINA

## Eum ekile aberu kanu akiring I

Na Okello William ETUNGANAN lo ebe Stephen Ouije, lo atutubet kana Abuolot, Oiela Akeriau, nges abu kibunga aberu ke na ebe Kelemitina Akoto ebe kanu akorakin ngesi akiring adiope bon, kotoma akiring naka ekilo ediope katutubet na aguelit ngesi. Eswamaunos ngun araasi 18.09.98. Kingit Ouiye aberuke ne etor akiring kere, abu Akoto kobongok ebe, "Papa idusui, mam do ijo ijen ebe epu nan itunga koreok." Abu do ekesa je kilepun koicolong ke, korasakini albajanar Akoto. Abu do ya kotak eletu kobala ebe, "Ouiye, acce-acece nes kibunga ijo eong..?"

## Aboloca aberu okooke epale kanu ajon

Aberu nabe Margaret Adeke ko Dokolo Gweri, ngesi abu kolaca okooke Tom Ogaju epale koba "Kopau ber kiyengu.", kanu aimat ajon ke kepali koman aitac. Adeke nges abala ebe abu ngesi kolaca okooke epale naarai apas duc amosenen ajon ke kepali ido da ko koto aibunga ngesi. Abala Ogajuebe abu totoke koboloco ngesi epale, kong e ngesi kwape okooke anaikit lem amasenon ajon kwangin.

## Awenii ekingok kanu apakit kana esigala

Na Peter Opita
ITUNGA Iyaarei.
Kincent Eroku
"Jualani," ka ocenike
Meses Emaru, kes
araas 29.09.98
kengirikisi aiwen
eligok lo ejangakina
akou, kanu aitelekaar
apakiti na esigala
Supermatch
Eswamaunos nu
katutubet na Awiding
Kotela Oculol Katime
soroti.
Amuran K'Eroku, Ejkt

Justine Jeska Emaju nges amaikini Etop nu araas 3.10.98. Abala Emaju ebe kwape ariengunitor ekingok ngol, abu do kogeu aitoji ingokuo tuttai ka aikopakin kesi da adek. Abu do ebe ederepa loko Serere Agricultural and Animal Research Institute (SAARI), Ejkt Joseph Awenu kitojoka aitalakit apakiti na esigala supermatch kanu aario na ekingok kalo. Karai da apotu lu Eroku kongirikisi aikamun ekingok, apotu bobo, William Egeru, william Ejotu ka Simon Opiding kolacakisi ekingok kano ebe ayongit esirani ke. Kobu do ekingok koker kede auno. Iburai do kwana Ecenga Ayoku Awenu aitac auno ke.

## Akonya aberu ekiliokit angajep

Na Peter Okoel

ABERU nasbe Margaret Ikeito ngesi abu kokonya, ekilemke Oboche Charles angajep atubor akauto na ebe alimokina okilenike ngesi kimulumul angajepke. Eswamaunosi nu katutubet kana akuuroi eitele Aketa, etm Usok. Kefakul akuware na 26.09.98. Era: Oboche ejingiran lo LCI ko Aworo, Ikeito nada inerasi ka Etop kadekis. Usun nada epenkitai Oboche araasi 27.09.98, ngesi abala ebe hangin.

## Akonya aberu akulokit angajep

Na Janathan Emuskat
ESAPAT lo esioman Alliance High School ngesi etegeli isingin 200.000, kanu ebe esiola ngesi apese naka esomero.
Aponi ebe ikamunal esapat lo kede apese na esiomi 5.2 Erimu College, kosabiti kalo atubor eraasi 6.10.98 kore ijaake lo ejai Teso Inn.
Kopaoni Ikamunal esapat kosodete ayangar toma awenis naka Soroti jollis.
Kapak kana luongonet eraasi 8.10.98 apotu auriak ke esapat ka apese kiriamunos JVC Bar ietatam akiro ngun kosodete aitegel Otai isingin 200.000/+. Abu papake apolon Ekuwu Silver kocam ebe abuni ngesi alemun isirigin ngun keere eraasi 12.10.98.

## Amony esapat akinei natwan

Olupot John
ESAPAT lobe Selestine Ogasi lo atutubet na Abola, koitela Apapai Otuboi, nges abu kotola akio akauto na ekamarere akehinei ebe kanu mam ngesi etacitor esolo. Kedoi Ogasi ogapesi kalo etem Otuboi atamit abuapakin akinei ke abu kodum ebe atuana akinei.
Kedoi Etop ogapesi kalo etem abu do akuena kodakun noi ebe adolu bodo Etop da, "kouenata kere ingokuo."
Apolon ateker lo Osirima Ejkt Nelson Otm nges alimokini Etop ebe, nape anquit ngesi akinei kogasii ke, kedoi ngesi otem alacun akinei, adumun ebe atuana nan akinei sek.
Apolon eicolong LCI lo kabola, oitela Apapai nes abala ebe lupe eswamak ngapesi kalo etem kesi apotu kokorokorata akinei na tuan, konge mam ekotosi aitacau nu abot.
Akuenasi do itunga ebe ageasi eswamak lu Otuboi ainyam iboro lu atuok.

## Agir epolon ailong

Na Sam Ekadu
EPOLON lo ebe Dominiko Esamu, ngesi abu kituuto, iboda bodan kanu akototor ayangaar ngesi ailong odaraca, ebe naarai edigalatos akuan kede iguen ke elosi. Abu epolon kipiko iboda bodan.
Eswamaunos ngun kosokoni kalo Agip Soroti araasi 1.10.98. Erai da apolon Dominiko Esamu lo eguelanari emuogo kede acok amutur kosokoni lope Agip. Apolon eicolong lo iboda bodan luko Stage F Ejkt Stephen Angiro ngesi engarenikinit etiimu lo isap kalu.

## Kijukijoda iyemutolu itegelikinalu elibunitos kobukon ne ejai Edita lo Etop ko Soroti.

ETOP Naivangomi, Osokookona (October) 15 - 21, 1998

KASELO Yuteti Chelation Association nro par adama aganga kanerini-iyekutai Tete Development Trust alene apolon esenbang ke atukuri Petta Obilangole ziamama kTorp koyapori koi betjai Kamod Bagenda

TOMA KIWANE Embolita Marci Tumabwiste idokokini akan okada la ipajak akanin me- kianin ian arusama na ekiridul naka Soreti Millers, erai Soreti Millers erasama la ebet TAICO ekapani koi William Omaria (tetem), MP la Soreti aman Mike Makala agai iparrit kakediany.

## Eraikin ikito 3,300

### KATAKWI

Na PeterOkoti
ERONGET lo eyait na amagoren ka ejaatene lo akwapkoKatakwi dseriktansi eraklikiteikendepartne3,300 alena lo idatareni kwape apolon lo arunget kato ko Katakwi dserikrif, ir. Orokot aman 26.09.98 kane aane agesi atra ikito.

Ahala Orokot ebe eberd ageri iapopoori amagore na koto eradisi ikito (Forest

### KATAKWI

nererwi lnda ahala agesi ebe abe kodas ikara lo adepareto Ckomare epodokiteisittala. EyatakirOrokot ebe apa ber kolo amagore egir nen ienini 500 anyout kosenta luka Katakwi abeyaraten lo Urak korye Kigurokin akwap kokaru 1986, apoto mnga kitarama ne angopismanta ka angor da arara akito, kosodete korye isirikaleikokaru 1989, ajing kami keni adakin.

Ahala Orokot ebe elini arunget ke airaikite ikito la edelene 7,500 ammirinansi.

Ahala Orokot ebe edamit erionget ke aitemokite' iapepen ikito lnda ebeiter lingoli esemera lo ocarnani aitemokite amosiri adlaipa kijakineteikito2,300.

## Ecarakin LCs abium ikisila

### SOROTI

Soroti Ekorakin ma adakita kanu ente, Angra Katas kami pwinnamire DEC ir Korm, Eko Ounir Daya, hanga la Angra omirat jaciri maka na ansisi naka LPE kosentema.

Ahala Ekorite eburakire maas ikisila laipatete narga kere ianera yari serwangi amamekita ne zairil awmar net la zampeliste agesi.

Asir asramet na kolap in atuber.

Eyatakir Ekorite ebe irwan ipa iuapu LCs abiu mnga ama be tat langana amam nisiamamie masi awmat kangol da.

"Ekor ikisila koyani tema akwaikkama," ehala agesi. Ahala ebe net neri apatatar eibekor mnga ating enten, aduk isemera ka atante.

# KAURIANUT

## Agosi alup

Na Martin Aiko

AZIKEKT rakotem Makara, Ngora, na apolokik atulkan Ejić Okello Angora, nesi atulbema manga akotu alapok nu eja angorami tema kiding Itoso ka Imakary irikutony Koking Agulo, kontrik Koking, Kape Ngora.

## Aretokin ates

Na Jack Okere

EYUUNAK Masakebisimaka Itulikke kes pac apotu kontrakisio kiyosatak loka Pentecostal Assemblees of God kena alienosokink stoma atesta amakorontulok iCyota k'Obori - Ekori, Kamusala, Katete, Senora.

## Aperun itunga

Na Julius Odeng

ITUNGA isen odakitmiyami apopongo kes pac apotu kopertanututu itunga korot asilen abolai ka atbunga da kosawan barwalla akwap ko Oculura Apolinkorat loetubi Kasilic, abala Raman Emata loda arai ediso kala angasriai Abala Emaja ebe edispr kekapilak atingit ebela ka atenci, iyonu ebe adakito ne adise konapitos igoren baipim.

## Awenio kore?

Na William Otale

ETUAN lo ewoisatai kane akoko emong egen abu kilip adeket siwen egen kuroke asame ebe enilisoni egen etuan kagodne atwankin awena kane akoko. Ejić Omuset Wisen (72) loka Amagor kotisan Tutoro, egosi enppoisir adeket na etuloni atulner Gwaiva David ke Tutoro arassi 23/09/98 kane akoko emong eidanyet ke Okolong Vicent.

## Eperra ka LC3

Na Charles Drongen

ETUTUBOTO ikasilan loko LC III Makongore atacenen apoloniricolongko: 50,000/- ngoli lap. Konedi ikasilan adumun 8,000/- ka ikomitie 3,000/- ne ibontokisotie. Etutubi ekaoski ngon arassi 3.10.98 apok na eteretumisto kesi atemisiona ebspr kiokara rangon.

# Ebeit aitemokin idaracan

## KUMI

Na Emmanuel Akelen

APOLON otcolong LC 5 ko KamuHaji Umar Okodelngeni aliena ebe ebeit edistrikt ke aitemonokitidaracanki irotin kalo elapsorte ngmi apakin nu ekampsin.

"Sata kwana aswam apipai nu idaracan kami irotinkangul kere tu ilapasorte oni apakin nu ekampsin," abala Okodel inera kaertamet kede apolokicolongo loka LC 5 kere ko Kumi arassi 12.10.98.

Abala agesi ebe aibonio nuko Kolle, Matera, Kidongole ka Kachumbala kesi ajami epone irotin kangul. Ebe kapakio kangast timi kwana da, ketep edou mam bobo apetena adolone aibonio acie.

# PALLISA

Apora da esisiak la kitataswositunga 50 kotoma kakirosinel nu alla koreria (okalia). Kadumun akipi nu elante ainnom ka aimat.

Atapstongolomotcolong LC 5 Pallisa, AlbertOgwaringeni da abu kogolok ekoroi to apaaran ngin. Abala Odie ebe erakwana alosikienetapagan aissisimakin manga ikulipek iwaitin lu myoket ejastime lo aijarket.

Eyatakilda Odie ebe ejai kesi alosikinetaipopoun elzagano kiding inera (ikalai) kede icadoikowatini laala, aimon inyamat ka ajaut kede acolooninka ataroo nu elante.

# AIKWENYARET

KANU iyatar etiai loaidar akauntan nu
ikidioko apiyai kotoma kec, elosi Post
Bank Uganda agolokin akauntan kere
nu adautu ikaru iarei mam iswamaete
ido kideuna 2,000/= bon kotoma kec.
Engadak ngul lu ikamunitos akiro nu
ido kipudasi aiyatakit ajaut kede
akauntan kec, kes ilipitai aibwaikin
apeesan toma akauntan kec eroko 31
Okitoba 1998 ketuboro, kanu
aitodolikin apeesan nu esalitos
akauntan kec 10,000/=
Akauntan nu eroko esalete kede
2,000/= bon, akaulo na apaarasia
kangun, kesi do ebunio aomit ebet
agolokin.

# AISUSIKA KA ANGALEU

# Ibuyaunit Okiror MPs ke atukokin Pingire SS apiya

## Na Kokar Omeja

NAEMUKAGA namoi, orami 17.10.98, isotin kere epoto istenaar Pingire, obuka Kasilo kanu aingarakin auriak luka agina aidak esomero loka sinia, Pingire Secondary School.

MP lo Kasilo, Augustine Okiror nepepi ka itunga lukobuku ke kes itemokion apauran ngin kwape na itelusere asuban na etukanere apiyai kane ejassi itunga lu eminasi apolo. Entumoi MPs kere luko Teso ka lukokinga daajaikin asuban na.

Enyuriton da kesi itunga kere luko Teso aibuyaa ngina kanu akutun kes ibore kakongo.

Dudo arai ilusi ijo ngina, karaodoman ilusi, kojenu ber karar adiu na ikamunitos ageurim ka apoloan na esomero kalo.

Kokaru 1991, akasilo na ekengilung lu apol Teso adisur, apotu auriak lukotem Pingire kodukuta aomisioitna adukun esomeroiloka siniakotem kse, kanu idwe kse lu engetanakinetaasumaan nako

puraimare atomar toma asuman.

Abu aomisioit kse kotub naaraiviramara kode akesikinut na apugan suka NRM naka ngol etem ko Uganda ajaor ka esomero loka sinia kano aikeun asuman na idwe ido korai alosikinut aitidisur amamusaijenaisisor kodunga.

Apoticitunga laadoketaikano agelagela-ipolok, anumutak angor, ikiluk, itunga lu aomisio imaku ekanisa, isorikaalei lu ajore na NRA (kwane UPOF)-kiriamunyo esomero lo Kidetok P/S kanu aitemitemeipona lo edukantor esomeriingo loda emaikinio Pingire S.S.

Arai Sgt. Nelson Otto engarenikit quuspake lu ajore luda edareter anyuara apakio nguo.

Apotikitutuboingolekiliokit alemun 1000/-bon, kosodi ngin aberu da aitas 500/-ido kojai aomisioit na atulean 10.9m/-.

Apotu auriak kisunyutu arukun 253,000/-luda etegarete aibok apetetari na aduketait nasudit na esomero kango.

ELOPE ASUBAN: Augustine

## Okiror

Kapak kangin aponi kosrumai imeshan iuni lu engarenikinete adukio na esomero kalo. Kes da ijaka Lekes Edwonga, Justine Odongo ka John Omoding.

Abu adoko kognur ber kede etogo lo anya kano esisiak asuman kotoma.

Egearit Pingire S.S. aitolomar idwe asuman S1 kokaru 1994, korami esisiak-Uewadikama.

EPEJONON LOANGOSIBIB: Bidandi Sali

Aisukinet acie arai aisupun iurian luko Kasilo kanu alemun agangat na edukere esomero lo ka aisupun Iteso lu orassi esisianakinak kobongatu Teso, kacut aingarakin Pingire S.S.

Aisukinet bobo acie arai kanu aitidisur idwe ngun lu epaanarete kotoma asuman nako puraimare tetere kesi da elomarete asinia ido kengetakisi kodamunete aewamusinei nu etacate kes ikulepek bonik (self employment)

Kwapekwana ejassi Pingire kasiomeroi 10 luko puraimare lu ejassi kere kede idwe lu eyaparete 6,000 kede esosia ediopelo apesar, St. Elizabeth Girls S.S, Kidetok.

Kokaru 1997 apotu idue lu asuomete Pingire S.S. kobweata asuman toma osomeroiicakwape flekso ko Kyere, Kamod S.S., Serere S.S., Serere High kanu ebe apotu aduketa komunamunaunos kwape eswapitre atukono kode anya.

Kokaru kangon abu esomero ngon kojassi ka S4.

Abu do asuman kobwou kitani ne esikwarunere bobo kode S1 bon kokaru 1998.

Esomero lo nes ebeit aitolot asuban nuka aitok apsai (fund

## Akokoi adekis nako Katakwi

Na Oriokot Aurike

IKOKOLA Klu man ber ejenunakesi apotu kobilata aingadio na ikekadekis nako Katakwi kware arassi 12.09.98 kosodete akokour asadukun akany nu ikek kalu egelegala lu pac akorakino adekis na.

Apolokiniton adekis na, Pantaleao Epacu ngesi abu kolimok Elop ebe itionitos kesi ajenna ebe abilaritai ikek inawan bala ikany luatupuruc.

Abala ngesi ebe epolon ediope lo atutubet kana Aleles vidwny ka etgo Katakwi ngesi abuni aikwanyar ngesi ebe ajassi asadukun nu ikek eu arakakitai okutui orot lo ebei Toruma ido ebe ewadikatai toma asadukun ngun "Katakwi IUC".

Abala Epacu ebe abu ngesi korieng kosodi

alosi taiwany aingadia na ikorakino ebe apungokina ekek.

"Alomari eong toma adumon amamete asadukun akany ne pe apodakis, ka asaduku na ingadamaba abala Epacu.

Eyatakit ngesi ebe abu imomak Dutok kosodi alosi tainom eeie podo asulong ngesi kouparotor ka epolind ediopel arakakitai asadukun na.

Aponi kodamunai asadukun amameieki kotoma ka epaadakiankadekis ka ikek abu lu abukokun.

Abala Epacu ebe asadaku ni arakaitainen komamendiodumon ko epolokit nu aingie kopodi kede. Erie Opus ngesi abu kimpuguna nge ebe arokokesi engirete akoko na.

## Na Ciris Osekeny

KAIDNGET loigangit. Aikamain DANIDA kami esisianakin idwe lungwalisik, 4.485. nes etutun esisianakinak 45 luko Pantaleo Kami distrikt.

Abala atopiton emanimanan

isomeroi Charles Olinga lo epolokit erionget ngol loka EARS ebe adautos esisianakinak ngol esabiti ediope isisiaete ko Kumi Township P/S klon 8.10.98ne agolokinere.

Abu Olinga kitacau ebe arai aswam esisianakinak kangul

kalu alemuntia kangol somero- kotemwan 16 luko Kami arucokite itemwan ngul kode eyapesi ke.

Eyatakit lo epolokit EARS ebe acieswan na ekamunit itunga ngul nges aisup auriak lu ejan idwe lungwalisik oreriakec ay aun kesi osomeroi

# Ka Purnoalmatingan F.

kateribyong. Asumot uesta
tam ganti apesur sarei,
mahon Keur ka Ikitor Stella.
Opponun apesur nu nei
katerom. Isern ka akiro da
kateriyya. Karaida mam
kangat, expelurit abao
mame epon. A da, aminasi
mugat apesur ngesi noi nairai
mum kiteh akwan ka inupen.
Kawiti akakurana noi
patat ejanene loka etogo ka.
Klamagiri togo Amuge ajansi
ta boro lope alsete: iperito,
gawrat, ikopon kaicse. Etege
pumper eweri worte koku.
Kateruber kangin ajansi nap
tam. Opu Ab ko Odeke Tom.
Kawapete Sil. Kapelebyong
13 ekara lo aruboro. Apotu
bap la kimakinos ka apesur
na noi neda abu Tom
kadamanaeipud lo adukok in
Amuge. Kwapi, papero lu
pan, abu Tom kolimok. Opus
saminat ke kamaipenun nuipu
sarei apene lo itodolikinet.
Amuge akirot ngin.

Abu do Opus kolimok
paptaka siwadikakin ber
Amuge ebalua lo ilpatariamon
ng ngini acedue ado. Abu
Tom kiewamau kwangin,
korye mam kesi apetete ebe
mam Amuge ajeni asisom.

Keluber esabiti ediope
aladebra alinocebalua, apotu
giti kiriamaten ka Amuge
anikoni lo Oditel neda abu
Tom kingista ngesi arai
dumonit ebalua ediu. Abu

yakobongok ebe "Eebu mam
ipodo ebongokinio acpet."

Kebungu Amuge kinukoni
abu abong ngin kolot orekes.
E Stella alipngesi abnit orekes
kana ungarak inngesi siwadik
ebalua esis.

Abu Stella kocam, konye
mam Amuge ajeni ebe ajislami
Stella da amnisiot ne eja Tom.
Kedol do siwadik ebalua, abu
Stella kolem apapula kede
akwara kolimorekini do
Amuge nu ebei siwadik.
Abala ti ebalua neta.

Lokotau, Tom, Amalan
naepol iskom an eba job da.
Eyalama noi adumun lokon
loda abu ketacaik eong nuipu
nu ejaasi otaukon. Mam
nukon eroko. Ijo itemokini
apak adelekin auriak ka
kitemakinos ngun
kemorikikinoabodo oni. Eong
nukon Amuge Rosa.

Kwapo ajaar Stella alilo otau,
ebe ti ngesi na esiomit ngesi
ikamareskede Tom, abu aketai
ya kiyatanak akiro acis
naaroko obalua loda abu
kijulakitnaiomukwanata.

Lokotau, Tom, Amalan
naepol iskom an eong eyalama
kadum lokon karaida abu
kitacau nuipu nu ajaasi otau
kon.

Naeroko kesi nuta -
Nauodit, mam eong asismit
ido etiono eong aisikamit ijo
losismitikis.

Naiyareikini, inyek akwenar
eong alopat angwitit eurustut
kolo eong aburura akian,

adwaset bon ejai, debuda bua
imorikikinar oni? Koodit mam
eong arai na apedori aur cut
Ipedori ijo aibekamater ikoku?
Naiumet, arai cut ikoto ijo
apesar na manyat, apedori
eong aoupak in ijo apapenika,
Stella.

Kesi ber ngupengan, siri
kiyanga erono, konye kotam
Stella. Eong nakon Amuge
Rosa.

Kedaan siwadik ebalua abu
Amuge kolimok Stella
asismut ber na ywadikatin.
Abu Stella kiwamau ngun
korye mam abu kosiom nu

eyasit nesi toma. Aponi do
ebalua kinapakinai abakasa
kijukarere ipeye yen ebe Inait
ayangar nejai Tom.

Abong ngin kesiom Tom
ebalus abu kokadak noi neda
abu kolosio ne aja. Opus loda
kedau asism abu kicorak Tom
mam ber airangan ka ametakin
aowam adis, konye angerun
ber na abnit aticepak arai acoa
na agnet ejose kanu airang
ber etau ke.

Ketuborou teni ilapio sarei
apotu bubo lu Odeke
kodumutu arereng airiamun
ka Amuge nada abu katema

eha mam eong adiakarit. Abu
eong kabungok ebalua kon
ido idari tem isiyeratamum,
korye mam yesidakametecat.

Apaaran ngipengin, apotu
lu Odeke Tom kiriamuena ka
Stella da nada kingisi na
ekamunitna ebalua abu
kobongok ebe, "Nu inera
ebalua ngul kesi ngupengan.
"Mam Amuge esismit, nesi
bore erono kakere."

Apotudo lu Tom kewananasi
akira nu ajaasi obalua
kouidete uitirian nu emerit
Amuge kanu atula Stella, neda
abu kideleleuno cut ebe

abok ikot Stella apaka aipary.
Abu do Tom kolot orekes!
Amuge ido kodumu Amuge
boit kont abukiworongesi oti
kes naami ebe ajaasi maipolok
nu abeit ken aitemium. Korye
bu konot ta ibrot akoto Tom
ajenun nuka angwatu na
ewadikatin ebalua.

Abong ngin abu tani Amuge
da kolot oreker. Odeke ido
kedau Odeke ajenun ebe
angeliri aketaun cut ejok abu
koumok kosoid aieman ebalua
kosoid ainakin Amuge asism.
korye abu Amuge kogit
kobala, "Mam eong alopit
ajeni asism, kosiom ijo, apopi
eong."

Kedau Tom aisism ebalua
abu Amuge koumok noi
kosoid iciling apak edit,
kolumiri kwap ka akiyit da
adoon kobala: "Arai kolo
papaka da ketiosumiteeong ti
ejok."

Keanyu Tom maijaasi, abu
kiyaprapaenolantanimokanu
aisistapikin Amuge etau
kobala, "Rose, mam erai
asismit akoto eong, konye
aberu naemina eong,
kopapusurit ka eong,
kengarakite, kamorita
aomitsis, kokakarana ido
kopini icao lo okale."

Ketuborou ilapio idia apotu
Tom ka Amuge kodukok inos
ido agnon apaaran na agenonia.
Stella ebe aperorit Amuge ka
Tom, mam bubo inerasi kede
Amuge arai lu Odeke.

# EKOTE BO AI?

# Epone lo edarere atemonon

# Na Atia Loribbo

KOLO rek arai kemanyun
ateriat toma ateker kosoid
akir angelike (adumakinaur)
kosoid eejar ejok arai aowam
katataike nes aikwenyar
anger nuepolok kateker
kangin. Kedasin anger
nuepolok adolun isisiamete
'ewai' lnebeit ikoku ngin
otereemak inete ekekiror.

Egearete angor ngun
atemorokin ejaantne loka
aerian kangin kotapitos
eisenu loka etale, kwape nut
tutuma etalia tcie ko Uruk,
ewesicalilgetna ikoku kede
akipiton naka abuang
kouidete, kedaan atufum
ailiget aimorikikin kede
angaing. Bobo aiwen kede
awui (dagara) ido acakakin
nuorakaakitukiterere akituk
itakakinete ibotn ngul toma
orit, korai do aomissuit kec
ebe kerui kala akituk kes
biyatenta aberu ngin toma
atekerke.

Toma apaarasia ngun arai
kedau aberu aidoun arai
akina nu alos kes
imaatakaisu ngez aintat
edam apaarasia auni, mam
anyamage, ebe naarai arako
akok ke ejaasi, ainabil kita
apak na ipudunere ngesi
kinga. Toma apak na ejaar
abetu tego mam acamakitai

icir itunga alomanakin ngesi
kongo, karaida airimonot
agule na ilonganarere ngesi.
Atapit aigulatikin ikisimookok
lo idiumitor aberu nepepe
korotin da lu elomanarete ore
ngul, kanaka aceite ka
aituborit ikapilak, aceite
asisarakinin naka adekisiama
ikogasi kinyekis amudiar
imukeru ka totoke da.

Aswam naka tatake arai
ailonganar atemonon ka
imukeru, agrertaanarakisik na
atemonon ka naka imukeru,
atorokite emukule lo
imanyimanyitai akoik ke
ainyakakitor kinyekik
analakite epesiara kanu lem
italalaritor imukeru, asiranar
akile awai kotoma okisina
atemonon eroko imukeru
egeara ainak, atletanar
idapasca atemonon ka lu

edakitere imukeru, atwaanur
imukeru kede akinyet kana
enaidis arai na akungurit,
adunyakite aikwenyanar
atemonon kinyekis imukeru
akile asirrakinakit, adunyakit
aisiitinikin atemonon
imonisi luka ateker ka etale
da aicebukit aitukenyunun
atemonon tetere uitanak
imukeru arai kemony kwape,
aidarite at emkomam edungel,
acie aswam na tata nes
airengiurit isiru ka akotanar
ikoku imirisi. Iowamasi akiro
ngun kere koto go katataike
atemonon kane iyilaritai aidar
atemonon.

Toma apak na ejaar
atemonon togo
kitemonok metedotataake ka
acie angor nuepolok myamat
ka ajon nu ipudunere
atemonon kinga, ido toma
apak na ejaar atemonon togo
mam amudio aswam iowamasi
kilema anyeng, aimat, ka aipap,
aisirretakama ejoriataake ka
acie angor nuepolok kateker
kangin.

Koitika icir luko Uruk ensayo
akima nu emasi atemonon
kede amot koiigarerena ekok
kalo ajomonono ngesi tetere
aitudikitor itunga ebe togo
ngol nes ejaritor aberu.

Iyatakinioosabitingul.

## Ekot Saleh akerite kinga nako Uganda

Kwalikan Etop

DRAA isopresident kakiro
epouata Maj. Gen. Salim
eji ngesi alimu ebe ebani
epu agesi agwelarahar ke
kola apotin la enumia
eji ngetine kinodi aleluar
an korga nako Uganda.
Kota Saleh Naemakaaga
11.98 ko Capital Radio
pugam lo isaccata itunga
eamun loka Capital Gang.
Jyei eong na inwamas ko
pula. Na etubub do eong
aenemi agwelar ikaapunio
ngol kere kanedi agwakon
a mam yesi iadakinete
jg kicamakin eong araon
de laish.

Saleh: Aleluari do

Engisingisitai Saleh, loda
erai imaceke ka President
Yoweri Museveni, na ajore
naka UPDF ko Democrat
Republic of Congo, kede na
ebakare ebe alunuk into ikrarin
akoko ko Congo ka amilot
agwelanar adnus na aswam
na ayuara.

Engitaritiai da ngesi nu

arenokino na ebe epudona
kiding ajore nako Rwanda,
RPA ka nako Uganda ko
Congo.

Abula Saleh ebe umamei
atukukina na apelo nisi ejai
kidding RPA ka UPDF, konye
ebe ipagale alis yan ajai da
ekamokoi koponesin kala
ebeiter.

Abu apapula na iyemuto
naka ajore nako Rwanda The
New Times pac kitolomute
ikiro madudar ebe akeru ajore
naka UPDF araanna ikokelak
lu erisete esabu (gold) ko
Congo.

Apegri Saleh ngan kobula
ebemam ajore naka UPDF ajai
egina karu amubasa.

Kerokin Saleh kamgiseta ka
akiro acir nesi do alimuna
ngesi na aleluar kinga
kouibite do bala akadakit.

# IYEMUTO

# 'Edistrikt edauni edinget kokiding Iteso ka Ikumama'

Na Job Opolot

ARAI mam Kaberamaido edumani advketait na edistrikt, mam edinget ebuni adunge kokiding Iteso kode Ikumama, adau atukot na apolok na Ikumama alimun. Ediope kopolok kalo ajassi aurianut (na ejena kwana noi kwape Kacoke Multi-aurianetna apolon) na etolosi atukot na Kaberamaido Eden Foruw anasi 14.10.98 kol, wafangos alimokini Etop akiro nu.

Apoiu apolok, la kitutuboto atukar itunga idis kama kot ne ejai. President Maiarensi, kana aikean

aimony na ekotutar kesi edistrikt. Mani ber elimoristai yen ebuni aingaresikin kesi ne ejai Maiarensi.

Ebe adaunit epresident aisomon kolo kesi edistrikt, kano kangun adolit akiro ngun kitodolikanai, kwape adaunere ainskin Katakwi da edistrikt.

Eyatakinit alibunet na ebe abu lo abwokinit eyapesi ke RDC Sorotiko Kaberamaido, Ejki Elijah Kaffir, kitigogong aisamunet epresident na edistriktmama ajassi imerban lu aurianet kana.

Ikuriaka yesi tai konye edaunit epresident aisumun ebe ebuni Kaberamaido

adumun edistrikt," ebe abala Kaffir elimok ini aurianet na.

Akadakinit imerban kode ejone leabu Omaria kinerite kokasisa loko SrPeter's kapak na ylipakinere Odeha. Abu ebe Omaria kocuria Ikumama kano ebe emet ebe 'niat kode jogo'.

Eyatakinit alibunet na ebe apotu apolok lo kimuani ekitor lo eyambinote lo eutsi kwana apwakan ko Soroti lo enyaritai Teso College of Higher Education (TECHE) konodete atemar ebe adolit ti aimrun kakesi kano adareskin ekitor lo abeit, lo itodunit aimorikikina kiding Iteso kode Ikumama.

# Engaraki Otekat Elyau ko Serere

Any App. 1

Abu Elyau kode lo ebe abaiki do ngesi ido ebe etukurianete loko obukui kangun iarei egangotok ke. Erijemari Elyau ngun kapak na ecoria apolokiton asen. Agropina Amuge Akaiken uni itaekapakina abolobol koyapensi ke Apa DPC toko Soroti, Charles Beungida Eceri Amuge abwaak lo nu ebeit kes atupit urai ajaut kode eringa iwadikanna. ugear aiwadikan ngin ibian tusuniet 21.10.98 ido engetakiti totenaiwongunet 22.10.98.

Abala Elyau eumokini Otekat koyapessi

Amuge ebe ajakin ngesi toma politiki irwan pa konye amamei yen atepit (anganyakit nges akongo) konye lolo kana ebe etupitai nges ekitukau. Mani abu kotou urai ngui etupit nges.

"Onae Otekat koyanga do ber ijo alloimun ka da kitelebai kobukon naarai ationor do." Engaingatui Elyau kegatasi itunga akwena Eyatakit ebe "Do itunga kon ayangarit eong kwangin kodauni koleje ijo aileleb nukon ko obuku ka (Kalaki) kapatan. Apupi ebe ebulun kwi ebe yen edumunio kode a foomun ka aligun eong Kalaki."

Epikipik lo akeria emanimanan isomeroi ko Kumi Peter Auraka (old) do cut akaulo na ngesi anangakin kode emotoka lo etekei C40 Katakwi Nicholas Muron Ocakara araasi 16.10.98 kositerji loko kami Apuso na onomit Emmanuel Akelem

# Akokoikin engadan lo Kidetok

1.6m/=

Na Jonathan Emoskat

ENGADAN apiyai (Bursar) loko St Elizabeth Girls School, Kidetok, Ejki Sotson Oryokot, ngesi kopori kokokokinai 1.6 m=arassi 14.10.98.

Abu Ejki Oryokot konyow kusumero Kidetok toni Soroti neda abu ngesi kolosio alemun isirigin ebank loka UCB. Akasilo kangin kobu do ngesi kokapakin abongot Kidetok.

Konye kobu kopaa ber ne etubere ka atiolisianar itim (Kinyasi) aitei ka Farmeres Lodge kodakite da ngesi eikaapu lo ajassi isirigin. Kosawa kalo atubio ngesi itim ebe kopoto itunga icie kopotu nen kodak itusikesi da eikapu looda aputosi ka loke Oryokot.

Kedau Oryokot atiolisian tian kebu do ebe kodaku eikapu konye kobu kissiane ebe abonen kosiadi do apukor kuanyuri nguni ebe agelakina iboro tu ajassi toma konye apanori cut eikapo ngon koloké.

Kobu do ngesi korieng noi konsili aitan atupakin itunga la da apontios kesi da ebe ti aitub ikez itim. Koponi kudumana edinget konodete akwamak inaron wakensodete ayangair polilo kana aingarakin singis aolior naka isirigin.

# Etepeseni 6 ko Tororo kanu ajaut imuudun

Na William Otaala

ITUNGA ikanykape kesi aponi kitepesenai kanu ajaut ijisio (terrorism) akonye atubon lo apolon ko Tororo Distrikt, Ejki Henry Peter Adonyo, arassi 16.10.98.

Ijiska Johnson Emery Eganga Achakor (33) Mawero West North ne eraar akorion, Baraza William, Ginnery attendant (61) loko Bua wede, Duban; Kawo Mbula Groffrey (38) agwehanranko Mukanga 'A' Central Parish, Wambede James agwehanar loko Arubaine 'A' kere loko Basia distrikt.

Icie kes Abudu Karim Were

(31) akorion loko Mayombe, Duban ka Sebi Oketa (29) enoman aputosia kes da loko Basia Distrikt.

Apora kere kogirota emotagolo ido daemeraikere amusugun. Emunoi kes airyakunio adieket eraasi 30.10.98 konye ber aponi kitarakinaiorimandakawetni nako Morukatape.

Ngin diope kakesi abala adieket adumunitai ibore yen emunun arassi 8.09.98 ide ebe komantiutar kode abaluwa na apagan karaida amodio apolor kere.

Imoriaritui joso lo imudu yen didi No. 07 3066 yen ebe ajai neke Achako. Kosodi ebe

icik grenade lo ajai numake ka Baraza ka imudu icin (itar pistol) mam ke ka Mbule yen itake No C17354.

Kosodi Wimbede ebe nges ajastar kode arisaun kamosli Were ajout ebe kode icik grenade kat'ikota da bebo erer kesi.

Abu atubon Adonyo kikwenyakesi kere ebe ejassi ngesi apolon iapupu emuigjo kes konye mere alacak in kes ber (bai).

Alimuni nu na atamitor ediope kakesi arior akan alip awesik miober do abongutun adieket korek.

Mani ber ejenuna kwape akamununere lu.

# Aretokinos Okode apolon amagoron

Na Jack Okero

LO epolokit nuka amagoron Commissioner of Forestry, Ejki E.D. Olof, nges aretokinos nepepe ka ekusulo lo LC 5 lo epolokit Haji Umar Okodel esiolong kano ebwaikutere akisoni eidony ka amagoro ket.

Apapula nuka New Vision na 17.10.98 nges ebala ebe akasil na loepolokit amagoron kodistrikt loko Kumi, Ejki Otai sicer ekaasilo ka Okodel ka loetem Kumi, mam siceret ke aponi kocamunai. Abu do Otai kijukak lo apolon ke "Commissioner" ebalua lo angarian kana.

Commissioner loka amogoron, nges itukurianayangair edisteict toma adieket arsiman isukunyario

# Okodel

eksionii ngon kare apolon

Ekanulo lo LC 5 ngon 9.09.98 ebo kitigogokda lo etem Kumi apulon ko lo akotuk eidony kan amagoron ko Oteleka. Eringank suorikipukto bebo arutak in kidogoka kasa lo LC 3, LC 5 ka apulon Towa Council kanapuk kalo.

# Etaraun lo eitela ACAO lo Serere

Na Jonathan Emoskat

EJAKATI lokante lo Ouaguru, ko Serere, Ejki Yorame Apanyo, ngesi do ber kwana anyam epelu loka aidaransi kwape apolon etem Olio, ka ACAO Serere kere.

Ejki Apanyo, ngesi abala ebe apolon etem Olio, Ejki Odeka. Michael ngesi da ber kwana ejai odeka kano angan kobu do Odeko titingik ngoto epile loka aidar esiolong loka araat lo etem Olio. Kosodi ACAO Serere, Ejki Felis Etoko ngesi da anyou abisit aiyatakin asoiman ko Uganda Management Institute Kampala (UMI) adana apak nuka ilapio kangangoni 9 months, aso eke epelu da ebe erai kwana ngesi Apanyo edari naarai, ara len Odeko apolon etem edaranti kwape ACAO konye kwape edekar Odeko ebe koposii titingikinai ngesi esiolong ngon da. Edeka Odeko adeka nuka esokadi (diabetici).

# Alomutu akipi komoru Kateta

Na Edison Oluka

AKIPY kesi kwana ebulunos komurukalo Kateta akaulena edau lo epol noi eidiscenen atep. Apolon Matayo Ekumu ngni intejenkini Etop nu eraisi 14.10.98 kontey kalonjai Kateta Agurur. Kotoma oiter lo itejenaei apolon Ekumune aja Etop akip abu la amuoi ebe atomaku kwana akip mu ajud kotoma adokusiu nu emuru neda kwana agromatar allele kwapnu emurukalo. Itejenaart

ngesi ebe ejassi kwana acilena (tunnel) aarei nu iteleitanarte akipi nu kwap ebe adiopet akongu eleitanari aite ne edukokitai etem lo Kateta.

Iyatakit apolon Ekumu ebe, mam na erai irwan na sodit akipi nu abwongun komoru kalo ebe etapit duc akipi abwangunun ber anyamat emunaritonak ipimu ebe naarai ejasii icilena (adokusii ne ekmanarete akipi nu ido konye alomun arei na eilolona na angolok k yogakaibon sit kana

enyaritai Acomis, ko Etop adnusit na ate keten akipi ibulata alom emoru ido ekemir de. Acie ngesi eyatakinit Ekumu ebe kotoma oit nu apolonitatakesi in imusugak korgi oik kookin koti omurukalo naf (Zink and Liter). Konye awar eewak ki waukaim imusugak apotu itunga lu isirig amisir ebe emomunumata.

4 ETOP Naïwongonet, Ouskonikoma (October) 12-28, 1998

PLOT37ASCHOOLROAD

## Kijularai alaro na

Apaaran Naikanyet kosabiiti kalo atubor, apotu emotoka lo etekeri e CAO kalo Katakwi, Ejkt. Nicholas Ocakara konangakinotor kede epikipik lo etekeri Emanimanan isomeroi ko Kumi Distrikt, Ejkt. Peter Auruku.

Karaida idelelei ebe abu Auruku kitunyun orot lo apolon aitunuyu, ebakasi lu asesenete ebe akeri emotoka Ocakara kosipiidi kalo ekeara noi!

Isisianakini arai isitikini oni akangas na akiro adis.

Adiope akirot nes na ebe; edolit aijular alaro na amotokan aiboisit na igerokitai kotaun.

Mam aiboisit na kwape kwana ejai alaro na edolit cut; etapit aingonyakina naarai erai airiamet na irotin kalu apolok. Erot loko Soroti-Mbale, erot lo elosi oyapesin lu apolok ko distrikt ka erot lo elomari otaun keere erassi lu ipu etwasamak. Kanu kangun idilasi akangasia aiboisit kana. Nu ipu lu ecakak igaalin kede lu alotok akeje edumununete.

Ebakasi icie ebe elwana ne igerokitoi alaro amotokan. Konye iburai ipirioitin lu itaunin kongicunitos ebe aiboisit ngin ejok kakere kanu amotokan.

Kijularai alaro na ngina katipet. Kosodi arai ejauuos erengiak amotokan lu emengerikinete kosodete aitolom itunga amotokan kec aiboisit kana mam ebeit, ejaun aitoos ngul adieketa kanu ikisila. Koipone kangol, isilarete kesi, alotok da epote anaikin.

Ibore icie yen itolitoli eitwasamac lo erot kaiboisit kangin nes iswamin arai idukurun ngul enyamere arai epeere akokorei. Erapitos idukurun lo egundo lo apolon kama kalu epote akan kana oyapesin kalu apolok; iriunitos da itunga lu ipu aiboisit na. Edolit aidotor idukurun ngul kanen.

Acieaki rot na isitikini akangas na etekerak amotokan ka ipikipikin ka ecakak igaalin nes na aitidisiar esipiidi edoloto kesi aiboiso nu ipu itunga kwa kanu.

Ikoto da aisitikin eswamak apugan aitwasam iderepan elosete osapalin (arai ejai ediope ationis emounio ecie). Mam edolit ijo yen kapolon atiakit aomisio kon; aomomom nu aurianet kana ebeit ijo alosit kede aiteker amotoka.

## OPALAKIRO

# Aomisio

## Butebo Channel na etwanenei kojarung

KANU eisomae kalo Radio Uganda Butebo Channel lo mam isiyalamikitapupokluko Kide nako Uganda, kacet Teo, abu Richard Akellem kodolok apolokinton Radio Uganda (Commissioner for Broadcasting)Ejkt Jack Turyamwijuka koyapesi ke ko Kampala araasi 6.10.98.

Akaulo na kesi aimalakin kede ajenanor abu einer kec kalot kwanata:

Etup: Eh! eoj ekon ekiror lo iyaroit noi, isiyoho apolouke?

Jack: (Akwenei ber) Apololu ke ebe “Ibum isio aman ngesi.”

Etup: Konye kotoma orionget kon kane koredio Uganda, mam cabo ijo istunit ikon apapok luko Kide nako Uganda lo ejarikisisi Butebo Channel kano iyemato, alemononta kede aimalasama angaspukec nu egel egelakwa ti ebalar ekon ekitor, naarai atwanit du Butebo nepetai kangin paran. Biyai bu ber?

Jack: Mam cut isio imutukit itunga luko Kide nako Uganda, ide akadamakini duc eong apupus ebe mam Butebo Channel isomai ejok. Ikoni nen da, ukoto ber eong anijenikin itunga luko Kide nako Uganda ebe kesi bon ejatar atrakonet na esitenen lodidi (ebe Residential Sub Station)ko Ugandaken. Aparai ber ngin aanyunet ebe kesi ejaani ingaren isoi kotoma otunga kala ijaanakini Radio Ugandakakere.

Etup: Doboisaterai luko Kide bon ejatar esiteneni lodidi komam isomai ejok, esabi bodo ijo awenikit emidalit k esatu (Gold) ukume epege. Emaenei bodo adumuneti, naarai ne ikwaruna da, ewarwarete akiro nu ineria koisabite bala ijorin kede ijekelu ilaganante aruokotoma oredio. Isiyoho do ber cut eyangaani ngun?

Jack: (Kogwaragwaruukou) Iponi ijo akim na eipyoi nako UEB neni cut iyait isio erono

Lo kolo arai atupiton eminista loka iyemuto, Latigo Olul ilo epape e epupokit Nathan Esimu, lo arai arotan iyemuto luka Uganda News kamejeik nuko Dakabela External Broadcasting Service.

ko Butebo, naarai etapit adungionor, nesi do etapitor Butebo do atwanenen. Ibore bobo erono kangina, emori esiteneni akim kede acaumari nu eretemada iradakinianidany kede esiteneni. Aso emudarete acaumari ngun akim na epol noi, dodo akini acauma na eweari akiro ko Butebona duc ipuda agogong nako 240 V edumuni bala 180 V boo, itotolikin do eisoma ke.

Etup: Dado loko Radio Uganda kere etia nen mam do ber epodori adumun nepe idis icuma yen ecaki akim (Generator)araisdungionako UEB?

Jack: Apota isio adumunitos egenerator konye abu agwelenen akinyet duc ukurok isio kwape ementer akim nako UEB adungionor. Osodi mam Butebo itolonsi apiar, erai amipo aijanakin itunga, nesi do etionor eidare ke.

Etup: Apupunit bian eong iyemuto luko Radio Uganda ijorijente ejok ko FM kane ko Kampala, itep mam yeni itodolikinisisi itunga luko Kide da FM kos kwaswomamituko Capital?

Jack: Erai abeit epi isio atiakonet nako FM 96 nuda kojaina ber ijaanakini apapok luko Kampala kede atutubena nu egongatar konye imuno lokawaran airiamit Ugandakeni ido ejai isio apelukinet aitegear FM ngin kolap loka

Donorba?Rkomam ti atwaniar cut.

Etup: Alamilentua ebe abot MP in eego Soroti Captain Mike Mukula, kede lo kolo arai eminista lo iyemuto Paul Ettung adowak in iredion luka FM Voice of Teo Soroti iamub FM nako Tororo da oigo Tororo katupanakineta, arai ituritere akiro ngun eyapesi kon, kidar cabo isip ape, adolo bodo ai kwana?

Jack: Atisepak elenikitani kesi aitegeatar ikec iredion bonik (private) konye emamnete ber nu ipu nu ajen eong. Kwape nat kwana reamakitor apugan iborokwa kangun, kitojokaarite eisomae luka 240 v edumuni bala 180 V.

Etup: Kato Rake Butebo Channel adumunamomnita apapok luka Kato Uganda anyakeo, aitejenikinketimilan aipup Radio Uganda Channel?

Jack: (Okwenei ber) Aaab? Ejkt Kitemi Akellem) dawaki kede eong istotied le ek Kalot bonat nng u aisumuneta ta, isi eowace bobo itanip Jack, etoro he na bu.

Konye kotimak ipie ebe ejai isio apol oitegear FM nako Uganda kolap loka airiam Ugandaken.

Etup: Dobole kopolete do iut?

Jack: Otake! Iriamumebede kede emianik, iyemuto, kaka icie da keti angajepasinema epe Kide nako Uganda Etup: Ingetakin in Butebo kiaman biko Aleso, etapi eon, Kese on katubukuan, koy koredio, inyoho ngun?

Jack: Erai do kwanata acaumari kesi ejek kangun, konye bibi isio apono lo atemonokanta.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Osokosokoma (October) 22-28, 1998

# Idu isio aitikokin abenyanut na

IPA-Kotoma Etopio Otikok 20-26, ahu asiam ebalua lo angurianitor Etesot lo edelorit ko Kampala ebe adepar akoko na idwe kalu inaete korotin lukotaunin (street children). Iyatakinit Etesot ngol lo mam itijenant ekiror ke ebe etegata ipolisin, alomakis do asesen idwe lu edemete itunga iboro.

Akoto eong aitacn abe otapio idis lu atuboros, apotu teni idwe lu kobukunos otaan lo Kampala, kacut orot lo enyanitai Kampala Road ne

etapitor kesi airwet isawan, ikapun ka inkoi luomutsinga kare ejaasi alotok, ido eswamas ngun esawa lo etionuno akerit na amotokan (traffic jam) naarai apatanikit idwe lu airupanar akann kec omotokan lu engaara adirisan. Abu teni aimony kobwangun kotunga.

Icie itunga apotu kotemasi ebe adedeng abenyanut na idwe kalu adepar adio ationis kere. Konye ca kwape ejelu loka polis losodit aanyun bon ebe eyuara itunga kede kec

iboro, apotu kepirutu acoe na aitolot ipololoi kanu aanyun bon ebe erocunio idwe lu.

Anyoun kangin apotu aremosi idwe lu kamunenei oreria lu idarere kesi (remand homes). Icie kopotu koanyutu ebe aridakitos ipolisin kesi kosodete adwot otaunin icie. Idis lu ideuna ko Kampala etojokasi aiipilipitoi adepar akoko. Aso, itoduni na ebe idau isio ipolisin aitikokin abenyanut ka idwe ka lu. Aisu Charles

# Ekot Onapito ikeu akan na epaperone

IPA - Arai kitukok aseeta Emunyu, Etonu ka Opio, itunga lu edeparitos 10,000 mam eseunitos Onapito kwape MP lo Amuria

Kanu Amuria adumun apolo ekoto do Onapito aikeun akan na eipaperone ne jaasi Emunyu, Etonu ka Opio tetere kes eupunos

nepege ka itunga lu kotemwan kere nejarigesi.

Stanley Okerenyang
Box 102, Entebbe

# Erono eipise loka ibaren

IPA - Kwana ko Teso ekumdedetos itunga aileleb ibaren oreria kopodokitos aipues na ibaren kalu aibois na ajaut kede ibaren idis luitolomunte ameda naepol. Eipise lo itosomai oni ko Teso nes cut eroko erai lope kolongoo.

Katupitos aijulanakineta nu ajauinos, kwape nat eiyaas lo itunga, mam bobo eipise lo erai lo ibusakinit. Ebuni da eipis lo ayangaun aitokoko nuipu, amunaar na alupok, ikunyuni amodingot, eiyas ka akoranar na adekasinei nu ibaren, ka acie da.

Ibusakinit erionget lo akoru kede ibaren aanyun nu iswama.

John Aogon

# Kijulakisi aima kus

IPA - Ijeni noi ebe aima Edeke erai ibore yen ejok nos. Konye mam epona lo emayatar imukolen lu liipete kane ebakai Hands in Service (Focus) kotaun lo Soroti isi yatamikit idunyeta. Aporitsi baia Ikaramoa ido kilutuwete baia amerak arai amatak ejas

Ejakkisi itunga lu idunyeta kec can naaste epol do ataan arai acelenar. Elipit kes ijulakisi eipone lo ilipiatar. Ekomidet
