# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

## KAURIANUTI

### Eweliwell idukai

Na Mwalimu Akabway

EKWAM lo adedeng imyalakina etapipiroensi araasi 23.10.98 abukiweliwellitogoi koidukai loko Mukura, Ngora kosawan isabong. Angatunit edou noi kosawan kangan, konye mam abu kotep lo april noi.

Itogoi tu iwelara kesi imortanton lo epolisiti Otai lo abu ekwam kobilibil abawol ka mukusuk abuato nu ka uriar arwatut kokujis na etogo. Lo Agemus Okitaka lo Charles Opio da itogoi ni iettuk iwelara tomidukuran lu anya.

### Angasi enwalimu

Na Ekosa Ebdu

ITUNGA iyami tu anapiroi ignen lu ajore kodakitos imusabau yarei kesi pac kware apotat kongangin. Ixisodete akokuar igom, ijam, readio Nia lo amakaran akary, egaali Road master kade 57,000/- esisimakinan, Odeke lo Otatai P/S, otem Asuret Sonoti.

### Atwanare

Na Mwalimu Akabway

EMWARABUT lo ajena noi ka Mukura, Ngora Suleiman Abdallah o Adekari Mukura ngesi atwana araasi 17.10.98 kadekesi naiko Nsambya Kampala, aponi do idaskinai nges Ibagiri araasi 18.10.98, ne abu ngesi kokar anyoun ne egurokinor Teso. Arai Suleimanotekaranamotokan.

### Apukor esomero

Na Charles Orengen

EBEIT esite esomero apukorio kotau n loko Palli saok atungol 1999 kolap losodit kanu asirmak loko sinia, Eposio anyara esomertongol PAL and Lisa College-Pallisa.

Arucokiton ayatuk esomero lo, Charles Okiror nges alimokini Erop ebe ebuni esomero lo ajaikin orot lo enyosini kongo Pallisa ache Kumi. Eraun ebe esomero lo apenur ka isap lo eperete toma ka luman eperete toma da.

### Kijukutu iyemuto

## Ekotos luko Kapir aijul ekiror etem

Engimu: ijalai ekiror

### NGORA

Na Patrick Edait

AURIANET na ajaikinsonmu Kapir pac nesi abu kitolren samsisio ebe kijulaknai ekiror lo etem Kapir kobuku Ngora koraan Okapel naarsi ebe ekiror Kapir nesi erai amortasot.

LCs, ijaka ka egurupu lo ipolok, kimeriaritosioi kakesi

Gidnon Opanogti, Mas Asaru Evisu lokolo arai apolun esodong LC IV Ngora, Okello Eook, Omael Andrew, Otapot Agaroka Ajomu Ben, Eyabu Inodeka istedakesi etiamusa aurianet na ewiporto lo ber kwapekwain idanarsi kwape apolun etodong LC III Kapir, Suleiman Engimu kanu amodisan isotm lu inapoloet etapekapo.

Abu Engimu kilip aurianet

aingigongokisimajaus otem Kapir da tetere epedori aibahanisodite etem apesantu epolo. Abu bobo ngesi kilip ekasulo ka ipolok awortosen su kesi aijulakinekiror lo etem Kapir koraan Okapel kanu asaru ebe ekiror Kapir inasibit itunga lalbeyete kotere kwape ikapirin luda ebe mam esimotim.

Iridistarit ekiror lo etem nepepe ka itunga da. Konye

araishaijukankwai ebuni abuati ka kijuk kinyankwai iagak kijugaku, Nisika kiliogala burari ka kiganarito kobukiri ebe ekiror epolo ekiror epolo Abono kijugaku Abono kijugaku

## Arocun idwe kanu akoko

Na William Otaala

IDWE iyami karsomero kesi apotu ipolisini loko Tororo korocasi kanu adumunere etamins agwotarenelloe be akokounton kesi.

Ikoku yen apolou kanu ikar 13 kosiomi St. Kizito P.S. ka yen ikaru 15 kosiomi Egoi P.S. kesi araasi 28.10.98 aponi korocanai kobukec Agurur B one Zone, kotau lo Tororo kanu ebe akoko eredio ke Ejkt. John Masolo.

Apolon ipolisin kalu kodistrikt lo Tororo Henry Tumwesigye nges abu kitigogongo nu. Abala nges

## TORORO

ebe eturakitin idwe lu etuja ke kitim ne isisusunere kere nu cut eswamato.

Eyatakit Tumwesigye ebe ebuni do Polis andakin idwe lu kotupiste kisi la lu pac abu apugan kitutub aikamanara kede. eipugan loka idwe. Apolon etodong LC I Agurur B one Zone Joyce Nagaib nges abala ebe ewoliorto endio k Masolo kageunet na elap. Okitaba ne konye araasi 28.10.98 aponere kodumunere kakesi ekotos agweize k Agurur

## Ejular atubon Adonyo

Na William Otaala

ATUBON lo lem. arai Chief Magistrate ko Tororo distrikt, Ejkt Henry Peter Adonyo nges ejular Mengo, Kampala.

Alimani Adonyo na ko Tororo Golf Club kopacit kalo etemono kitto ko distrikt kano atwaria nges araasi 30.10.98.

Abala Adonyo ebe arurakan noi aijulio ka na da ebe ekamanit iguap ke da ict kwape etemokitor apugan.

Mam agesi abu kitijana lo eburukasi akajo ko, konye esialamikit ngesi einacane lo leto ejai nges keda

Adonyo: ejular eswamak ka itunga kerelulo Tororo distrikt EIepi Adonyo itanga loko Tororo aiyatakin akodakin einacane ngol mama ejai atubonda lo eburukisi akajo ko.

## Apejo Kumi

Na John Olapot ka Nico Akwang

APOLOK isomeron lokotem Otaboi ka Anyara kobuku Kalaki kes eberi apejukon isomeron ka atutubena nu egelegete ko Kumi distrikt eraasi 5-11-1998.

Apolon etodong loka apolok isomeron, Ejkt Stanley Ecibu nges enera ngon kotama asriaman naka apolok isomeron kosomero loka Otaboi Town shop P/S garaasi 14.10.98.

Arucon aswamisio nu aisisia (Centre Co-ordinator): Ejkt. Vizere Enyangu nges abala ebe alosikinet na apejo kes Kumi distrikt nes ebe aisisia.

## Aloto 8 Kyankwai kanuka Cakameaka

Na Mwalimu Akabway

ITUNGA ikanyaani kesi adau eyapesi loka RDC ko Kumi aijakar osemero Kyankwai, National School for Political Education aisisa akiro nu epugae lo ajokan arai chokano haka.

Anyonaste kesi araasi 1.11.98 ale komoriaritoskmi Fred Edopa Olick ekansila loko Kapir ko LC V, Godfrey Olaka egirigiran lo etemonokko LC V.

Ehaka Ngora nesi ijakarit ejkt. Hellen Epodoi Aporu aegirigiran na emuvament kodistrikt nepepe ka Opas Leonard.

Iriekani imortanton Edikoi M. Jorem, Odeke Stephen kere Bakedon. Ehaka Kumi ijakaritens kaguria Nikolas ka Dikan Samuel.

Edopa: piloti

Ebalas lo idokani to keni eraiatapisa RDC Kono roberr. Nambab 31.10.98 (Ojeka Buskenyi) nesi itunga liuaga la kere maku oayatuk esomen kisele, Mam ajena naga abuikad odoan kanjan.

## Epejoki Wandera Orungo

Na William Okello

EKAANY ARAN lokapolon loka Itulidin ko Soroi, Boro Erasimo Wandera nges pac abu kipejok ikamisari kitalika aizokis kana Ococia kotemu Orungo, Amaris do ingeka kokanisa lo Akeriau

Abu bobop kizor itunga aricite aswam naka Edoke kelipon tinte ka adunyakin aitepol akwap kowai lo aidak isomero.

Apolon etodong LC III Orungo Joseph Anka upan kiszoyokiki itunga alemon esolo kantebkanat ngil lo hef edaumins isolioso kes: ageun kokaru 1996 toni 1998.

Akaulo ailip obu Papa Bishop kolakar noi akaulo ni aira kopone lo Iteso kosodi ekosio ajosi.

# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

## Angasi adekis ko Pingire

### KASILO

Na kekar/imajo

KASILO nakosen Pingire
koleksi kasilo nes boho
metsu ikokolak kosodete
metsu apaloi adiope na
29,800/- ka ikse la
metsu stali ikanyikapo arassi
10.98.

Alibuneta ne elomuniten
metsu katooren Pingirekes
metsu ebe atas kwara ngin
akoko nakiarest neda
akogen ikan lonyapari otnai
ko Kaji/ kokaro kalo atubor
2000 17.10.97.

Aladari alibuneta ngun ebe
koleksi bela itwasamaete
koleksi ngunelap lo itomoeat
koleksi adekis ngin.

Man ber idto ituan yen
sisimman yen da cowarrat
ngin. Kakeko nakokaru lo
koleksi da mam aponi
kisimman idto itunganan
jake/ekangen.

Ekanado loka LC III Pingire
no rek kolap beptemba abu
kisnab ailipun ipolosin la
mert aider ayuwara kotem
kalo.

### Icorio Iloke

Na kekar/imajo

Mf la ilo ko Kotido, Adome
Lokrol opeyper abu kolimok
mengelo ajiokina asubao ma
utak apasi ko Pingire P.S
kasilo ebe eutas kes ko
karamoya sicor apolok kee
asar alimonokinattemanak
akeroon paikoko akitak.

Alimori Adome agan
akasikosa amutao ber ritango
kede Akaramuja kosodi
atentar ebe ejassi kes
ikapakina siswamanar kede
manga lako Teso ejok.

Idwe kanatwan Rose Agwang ibworesi totokee Naikanyet 30.10.98 ko
Olelai Abarilela, Amuria, Aputo na inomti Kenneth Oluka

## Ageutu Ituliikin akapanakin
kanuka ikaru 2000 luk' eijiri

### SOROTI

lo asismakini apolokiton
ikasisanakinak lu edimi
k'Ocaloi Zone, kaicokisnako
Katine, Soroti James Agora
Adango/kritiayonkekailipes
na Ocaloi arassi 18.10.98.

Abala Ajuret kobaluwa ke lo
apaarasia 6.10.98 kangest na
Okitoba 1998 aitemonokin
kana epocit na ejaskina
awanyanaret ikaru 2,000 kena
ainumunum ikaru 2,000 lu
atuboros ejai akirot ka Kosto

toma akwap (Daucasian
Jubilay Millenium).

Epocit ngol nes ebe eponio
ainumunum kakwapen kere
idcebe emisialoapolonebuni
sjaan ces lokalaanan Roma,
Italy ido kingarenikite Paspe
John Paul II a/ipasinet.

Erass 31.07.98 abu Bishop
Erasmus Wandera lokwenya
ikristayodu ekotokinesalisat
Roma ainumunum
epasantnginatakun apasi abu
idis kitoni adolere 1m/- ebe
katu apotor Roma.

## Etutub LC5 lu itela apero oitela lu aswam

Na NiroO, Akwang

EKANSLKO loka LC5 ko
Soroti nes arassi 15.10.98
karnaman kecna ajiakinatema
Lakdo Hall abu kitutub ebe
datagol ejakat lo eitelakere

lo iswamai Soroti dietriktapero
oitelake lo iswamai ngeis. Yen
mam ebuni asu yen mam
epodori apero oitelake, ekoto
ebe kiwadik abaluwa lo
ainyekinaswam apugan nako

Soroti dietrikta
Ykolomata/kanolanakinima
katupite sijenar noi na erare
lo esolo kotoma oditeri/ekere
ido angoubib da na ijaka
ejesar cot adoketait kitonan
kede ijaka lukolo. Icse
kokanolan engurianete ebe
ilikonorete ijaka lu itela
isolosiokitungula ineretekesi
koman da ebe irodokkineto
nyapesi kalo stem.

# Eyatakisi cabo do akituk ican Teso?

Na Fred Jackson Ocali
EBENYTTiokoleje hobo apotu
Iloike kiipupouhekolapio idin
luatehorros agron ko
Kapchorwa, Mbale ka Kumi
nes ubu koirieng itunga
erono nei.

Akituk no zdeparete 700 ko
Mbale ber hon kesi apont
kokokuarai, kosodete
aikangas itunga luadolete 20
(ikanyarei kakesi ijerikaale) ka
iboro da ice.

Konye akiro nuajaasi toma
Etop loka Apuli 17-23 kesi
apotu kolomasi nong orau
noi. Iloke luabeluna Kolirken
alimorriai ebe esialamikitos
Iteso kano airyakak in bobo
akitukaujoi. Epolonedisipelo
apont kodumunai emamorte
akituk ngesi apont kibungai
noi, toni ademur isiriginke da.

Alimoret na atemar ebe:
"Iyalama iso yesi ainyakak in
isio akituk," apolou ke ebe
esesenete do Iloke ebe ajok
koleje kesi angatar akituk ko
Teso ido ebe akituk kereenasi
nukoc. Keuriaros bobo akituk
ko Teso noi, kwape kolo sek,
bala egeunos do bobo iboro
agatun.

Agatun na agatunar aijamam
na ber kwanaejat Tesoi (1993).
neellingunataakerit, ekilung
ka emuudu koteoo, kijaa lem
kere kilolnoi amoun eipone
loinyakonet akerianut Teso.

Eswamaata atukono
sukojakotasi nuipu akiro nu
ejok noi agwelanukin itunga
imongin lukotis inyamat.

Kelomu etengei okaru loka
1992, ka 1993 abu kisisianak
itunga arokun akito ne
emawogo airaikin ke
akwamakin aibok acok ka
akoru imomwa. Lukesinyanut
lupo kwana ejarikitos itunga
ko Teso kano.

Karaida apotu imongin
kotamitos aipitipitun,
amamorte do bodo imelukes
laimongim, kwape kolo apotu
lukosapulia ka abenyak
kidepidepiarar aparasia
suelongilong. Arereng na

Kinapakin koleje Teso, apotu itunga bobo kegsasi agwela imongin kano akoru. Konye
egraritos bobo Iloke ailongilong Iteso. Aputo na inomi Jonathan Moraka

ajokan, abu eroniget loka
akoru, scrap (Small Holder
Cotton Rehabilitation
Project) ADP nepepe ka
SAIMMCO koyautu;
nepenen apotu itunga
kojarikisi. Apotuiuskosene da
kotakanuutu, ikisuron da lu
agolokino apotu kopukoros.
Kepoloor agwelanur, apotu
isirigin kotakanutu, kupukor
bodu amat ajon, toni
ekalondo da agatun alomun
Teso ko Busoga.

Konye icie itunga mam nu
elongilong apotu konyoutu
kakwes kec. Apotu do lupo
ipu kogeutu aipit akokoei,
akinei, ipegei ka akoru da icie
iraan lupo ipu lueyaunete
isirigin.

Kemamounos akituk ko
Teso, abu akwap kiswap noi
kosodete amugog da do
acamun, emuroge ka ekirididi
da, kwape apotu alupok
kousbiata bala ipusukakoros
do ber bobo noi.

Icie itunga, kesub ejautene
bala ekot ajokunat, apotu
kogeutu aiduk itogni lupo
egogong. Lolonedoka ijokare
estasi itunga aiduk itogni,
toni ocasio da. Ijo da ber ice
ainak ajo kobaati kon!

Kwangin kolomuni bodo
aitun akilu, kogwelunete ber
atak adis anupo akile.

Emanyit da lupo kolo akoto
araut lo isirigin hon, arai
idegei, abu do bobo kobong
akituk. Idumuni bodo ijo
apolimiketarakooke ebe "arai
mam ngol elemunit akituk
akany, mamakookaetubierot",
naarai ejeni ebe atakanutu
kwansatak.

Asokwape apolor agwelanur
inyamat erai bodo ber kere
Ocor-imongin, Busiu, arai
Amugei. Ijoda aidelokin
omotoka, kobungani keda
atak kon, igwelanupu 120,000:
~ hon, my obo ationu? Ekote
nen akituk ebongunete Teso.
Imurwok luka iburon, luabu
aswam komamesn luipu
kwana elosete awate da
ainotiraun ejok kano idoli ijo
kere naara atakanu aswam.

edekakos ibarasil, atipet
ipolaretegaali amoun imuron
asmukoun atipet tetere ma
etwani.

Arereng na aronon, Iloke
lukolosenterete akituk koteoo
ka idistrikitan luiduryasi
kakesi luipu eringa ejarete ka
kec tomei cat kere. Emamot
ewaya lodowaanut apogan
aimik ibokora atubun
Obalanga arai Kapelebyong
arai imaseniko alomun usok
araihoda pian alomari Kolo
Malera. Ilereres akwap epono
ngopengol.

Asubata iloke da bala
ajenutu alout abaasi Kiira
ozach ka Gateway nucleuete
Moroto. Ijo da ice aililing
abaasi odekite akongu itorit
Teso ajenumne ejausi akitenga
(Iyatakinoosabiitingol)

G. Washington Ekwaru lo
atem Kataewi isialamikind
ngol kere lu apotu kingarakou
koponesio kere kepak
naheania apese ke J.G.
Akiteng aradki 12.10.98
konukai 14-10.98

Okiring Stephen Ioko
Sambwa Pingire Itjanski
icemion ke Justin Emaru
Angata ke Omaria Nathan abu
ikoku Grace Aslo, yen Opolot
Richard ngas abu kotwana
eraasi 29.10.98

# JOB OPPORTUNITY

Soroti Family Helper Project, alocal NGO based in Madera village, is seeking to recruit a well motivated, committed Ugandan to fill the post of a Social Worker.

Qualifications: Diploma in Social work and Human Development. UDBS, must have strong skills in problem solving and good communication and interpersonal skills.

Experience: At least 2 years

Age: 28-38 years

Hand written applications including a current CV, copies of Certificates (originals to be presented at the interview) should be sent to:-

The chairperson,

Soroti Family Helper Project,

P.O Box 256, SOROTI.

Not later than November 20th 1998.

NB. Only short listed candidates will be contacted for interviews.

Alfred.

akany apont kosetunai Eruka
William lo atekre na

ko Amru Bruno.

Marmalok kesi Okiror Julius
Omidisi nepepe ka Eseta
Emarwi Atapur).

Acarangesabu kolonok Etop
ebe ijaandos itunga luko
Kapir akironu ICU maara ebe
ebuni atukot na aipopoun
inonosis lu Iteso kere luda
etimakiori.

Ekapakina atumunak da
aisistan inonosis lu leni

# ALIAR K'ALIAU

# Aliau: ikar 50 lu aisisianakin

KANU 1998, John Opati Aliau, agtual kosmer aisisianakin, agtunda na iwamat ngesi, alout ikara 50 agtun na alwazata ka Buwalasi Primary Teachers College, ar statusere agts arana aisisianakinastoka Grade II. Abu pat kinerakinos ka akutaten isemato koreke kasa iyengunitor kaswam, akutante koinerke netaka kaban Exonst:

Etop: Apolon John Aliau, abe kiterikitsi jo?

Aliau: Aru zong mutat loko kusk atyunisi Kasdokoniste kintorikskin araun eboku adoptet lo Serere, konye aponi ledwkinyakakinsi kolejat pas katoi ajoulanakineta nuka apoge, esem Pingere, oitela kidotok, mony Odapakol.

Papaka wai Stanley George Opati katotoda Tabras Alabu. Apotu kesi ketopolout zong kenoti zong da apedor asdar kiri atiodol na enyakara jokanobanken pasupac, okaru lo 1987.

Etop: Abu asisman kon kolot hai?

Aliau: Aponi kayangar zong asomato Kamod lo kapakio langan arsantisi Elementary Karmacalar School kokaru lo 1977 Okarungopongol danes apon kehatisarre zong eraas 24.4.37 kasiomi atukot asodit.

Kadol zong atukot nakiwongotet na angstakini kosomero Kamod EVS, abu katub ejok alotit Ngora High Schoolokaru lo 1941 asisman P3 ka P6, ido kwape ajandar Ngora HS ka atukono nukokaju, neponen do abu zong kasiomak atukonomaka Junior Secondary I kiton 3. Abu do zong kelot Buwalasi Primary Teachers College kokaru 1946 kitoni 1948 ne abu kalomunia araut eksisianakinastoka Primary, Gradell.

Etop: Alboda obu jo kogeara aisisianakinido korsieropit kon isirigin inwaisi?

Aliau: Aponi kejukar zong aisisianakinosomero lo Ngora P.S nepe asismit zong sek. Eropit ka, Haa! isirigin 72i elap.

Etop: Dobodohiai?

Aliau: Tobodo biai Esimu? Arai ngopongol nges eropit kana aisisianakinan yen ka Grade II, konye apotu isirigin ngapongol kopedoritoi aitolot aijar Amamei atyonis na apol kapakio kangan akorteisisianakinaninyamat ke, amasi nasi tapuru obong adedeng ikisila luka okanisa mani asmat ajon. Kidumun imasi ajon kodasni nakon aswam. Asa bout ekale da mam apol. Akotui eksisianakinanaimanyaburu adopt hon ido kaiwen da epeta. Kengicun ebo ajaas

eksisianakinankangor aasit arai kadepar araidongol naka aswam adaus.

Etop: Apolon Aliau, eba dojo kepada ikisila ngul ikota nen?

Aliau: Atoko bo kesi, mam apitana sidar, konye eipone lo abu zong kadama ikaru ngul kere esisianakini, kitodikineste ijo ebe abu kapedi cat komam ahoror.

Etop: Asu raui kalotote abonyen

Aliau: Kokaru lo 1951 apeni kejular zong Magoro P.S ne abu kadama ekaru adoptet bot kejularete Soroti P/S kokaru lo 1952. Okaru ngol nges do abu karwaria nuka araut emasdal kaaminaki zong apesi na abakai Faith Norah Atokot.

Abu keting nges akan kawenete do epeta olup Juni 02, 1952. Attodollolokibeyoi sieejok kokalekosi idokinakit. Edeka idwa ikanyikatingwon - apesar asingwon ka isap ikany. Aponi kangin atuko zong atupit ekiol ebe mam airot angot.

Etop: Kidokokin ijo anyoika apotokotupakini?

Aliau: Abu aimany abera kssub bala abu kasnak zong arerengesio kotoma aaswam ka. Okaru lo 1953 aponi kalomar zong kosomeronluka Primary kasiete aijukar araut eketustoronikesisianakinak lukosomeronluka Primary ko

Mzee John Aliau: Arokista idwe luakwana.

Bishop Kitching College Ngora ne da abu kadama ikar 10 etuutoonori. Konye kokaru lo 1958 kitoni 1959 abu kaponi Bslaya asisman ko King Alfred College Winchester, England, ne abu kasiomia kitoni adumun x Diploma kotoma Physical Education. Abu x diploma ngul kadamake ong adeketut naka Grade IV karoko

esisianakinil BKC Ngora

Etop: Arai rabu arereng na apolijo aporor okakwa apakio ngan.

Aliau: Apol tesi arereng naara mam ikonikwai ilatotoritunga kidegeikwana aroma akwapen. Dododokokaru lo 1964 aponi kainakin zong aswam kwape Assistant Education Officer kasnetaaijukarudotrikitloko Karamuja, Moroto, ne abu

ber kadamia ikar iarel kejularete Soroti ditinikt 1966 kitoni 1970 ne bollo kereakasere bhitoto kokaru lo 1971, aswam do kwape lo edari aswam ka Diterite Education Officer Karamuja. Kokaru lo 1972 apeni do ketigogongnor arau District Education Officer. Kokaru lo 1975 apeni kejular zong apolokin nuka aisisia ko Lou dietrikt, dodokolap Okitoba okaru ngopongol apeni kejular West Nile, Arua apolokin nuka aisisia kwape Provincial Commissioner for Education kekeikitete adeketut naka aswam araut Senior Education Officer. Arua bo nges abu zong kadamak ijo trai Provincial Commissioner for Information.

Etop: Alboda obu jo kolot kinyou ko Arua?

Aliau: Apisici abo ber kejular zong Mbele karui Provincial Commissioner lo Aisisia kokaru lo 1976 ayait Eastern Region. Dobodo bebo okaru ngopongol kejularete Karamuja, ngina da kwape Provincial Commissioner. Aroko ajai ngina korukere Amin kajakamot kodasniss nuka aswam naka Provincial Commissioner kejularete zong Soroti kotoma adeketut ka naka District Education Officer. Amamei ameda ado

Toni App. 14

# PRIVATISATION: KANU ONI KERE

Yen eteleka idokokini akan aitutuket

Eipone lo egwelanarere ikapunin ki apugan, emamei aiweiwea.

Imoriarit alimonori, itunga aiju kanari alipan kec, aitirian ailiposinei ngun kojaasi itunga, aliimori yen eteleka, aidok akan aitutuket ido ka augeset ainakin yen eteleka apeolor naka aibe ekapuni ngol.

Nginitunganan kere ejaasi ka ejaasi ka epedor abolobol agwel ikapunin k'opugan

AGWELANARIO K'KAPUNI K'APUNGA EBUNI AITOJOKARI EJAUTENE K'ITNGA LUKO UGANDA

12 ETOP Naiwangonai, Osabun(Novemba)5-11, 1998

AISISIA KA ANGALEU

# Etutuboto LCs aile isap lu esinerak apesur ibelai 25

## Na Bounirikara

LC'sile Acumet, Kapelebyong kesi etutuboto aile ibelai 25 adu etelepat kets loedumunio inera kode apese kosewan lu atibong.

Loveten Kapelebyong, Nicky Amadio Ojirot kodula kalo Nyada, Adipala, Kapelebyong ngesi etijenaari ngun kapaanas na etolosio erionget loka Healthneed Uganda (HNU) akutumoro kano ikamunitco eseny araasi 20.10.98.

Abu Amadio kimala HNU kano sinakina ke aitiji adeka nako eseny ko Teso kousdi aimuar itunga lu itopoliontus ematet, lo abala ngesi ebe eyanganiti away na eseny.

Emuarit da Amadio akirot na sinamane nada aroko idila ko Teso kousdi da aiyatakie aimuar ne edukonokinotor idwe eroko apak.

Apolon eicolong Le III Nyanga Kidned Odeng ngesi sjokini ngesi da aurianet ngin. Emanoja loko HNU, Richard Ocon ngesi abala ebe ebusakinci engarenok lu atutubena eingarenikit kotona akiro na aitiji eseny "naarai eesi kesi akonye nu itunga."

Ersi HNU erionget lo igangit lo edekas eseny ka ikalia koi nepepe ka aigangit da iriongeta luda iteerikina kesi da aitiji eseny.

Ejo kwana HNU itolosi aewamke kobukui ikary loko kapelebyong. Usak, Kaulo, Kolakika Kaberamaido.

# Ilipit TESDA agangal

Na Odongo (Ario Ka Joseph Kolao)

IMEEBA Nluka Teso Student Development Association (TESDA) na Besolaniomete Makerere University, Kampala kesi ilipitisi agngal naka Bunaries kodutrikilan loko Tesekimorianbo Kami, Soroti ka Katakwi.

Araas 23.10.98 kalaro naka are la limiaera nu awore, aboliasio ka asangad ko Makerere nes etijenaara apolokionon eicolong loka TESDA, George Owanyiriba mamedumane loka Bunaries ko Teso acaane.

Eyatakit Owanyiriba ageun ne pac etobwome Makere University akoranakinesisik epiyai elosi do aikwac.

Owanyirirakaena agnak ekalaamurpiagalarirat, naarai ekot ekisil asismak aissadikawiren kangol kara.

Eyatakit ngesi ebe atamit apolon eicolong loka LC 5 Kami, Hajji Umar Okodel aissimunkonyemam ber akiro acaanitos ejok.

Lo idanoromi eicolong loka

# Angatar 0.8m/= lu eropit imwalimun

## Na Peter Opita

APOLOV esemens Abalang P/S kotem Alwa, Kaberamaido ngesikopotsokokolaklamam ber ejemens, kotingitissapopongo, kongauta kotogo ke kousdete eyangar ienpito lu esi isanak inak la adolete 800,000 = ka iboro lu etogo ko.

Ejkt Valentine Ebisu euriat lo Lwala Kalulu nges kopotu dododakola engautuebongaroko esiburu buuike Ebisu Santasa Awiro Abonginges atijeriarisu araasi 11.10.98. Abala Awiro ebe kapak kangin kobu ebe enacoke kolosite Soroti kano soman inopitoskesisianakinakke ebe sorigimsu edolete imilli oniyarei. Kedoloebe edimasita esomenok wape ebe kobukitamor Soroti, kobu ebe kodum ikesisianakinak idei idaritos ngesi kosomero. Kobu ebe ngesi kitupoka attacar kesi inopito kec. Do lu asalitos angatar.

# Aise SMC

Na Nico Akwani, E DEONakwani, Kiseo Enya, agenerarakwani III ka apolokionon ecolong ikamitika isomeros Chiba Mangemna Cometexa kotoma aibosisikokola. Kobalawa ke koyakana apolokitamakakukila ebalai ebe, la ewasana konsumitas loka LC 5 Kami nat ekote kora ainsan apugan lu aibos aning. Enjenaradachale kola ber lem arao apisa icolongo SMC ekesimog kooker aowam.

# Epone lo itikokinet ekolera

Tetere aiku ekolera, adeka na ailep na ededeng kakere, iburai aidar aila ejok noi. Imoriarit na aidar icoloonin kolaete, ailosenen akanin akaulo na aitosom ecolooni ka airapit inyamat.

ABWANGUN adeka na ekolera kaiboiso nu ipu ko Uganda ka akwapin acie nuko East Africa kosaibiin idis lu atuboros ido aar itunga lu ipu. Konye erai ekolera adeka na kipedon oni aitikokin arai kitup oni ikisila lu aidar aila.

## Inyobo ekolera?

Ekolera nes adeka na idiono noi na eyangau ni alepor. Einakini ekolera itunganan ailep akipi ka ailek noi. Egear ngesi katipet tai.

Edauni do ekolera akipi kakuwan kitunganan katipet, kodisiar itunganan agogong, kotwani da, aciepak akaulo na isawan uni arai iwongon bon, arai mam yen adekan edumunit amukian na abeit katipet.

## Inyobo eyauni ekolera?

Ikur lu ejaasi akoik itunganan kayen edeka ekolera, kes eyaunete ekolera Ikamunededo icie itunga da adeka na arai kematala akipi da adeka na arai kematala akipi nu ejaasi ekurut lo (kotoma obar ka alekan).

Ekora da ekolera arai klingitngataitungaebar ka alekan nu ituan kayen adeka ekolera, do konye bobo aitingling inyamat, akipi arai asepulian ka asaarin komam ilositos akanin.

Ne elapit adumanakin ekolera nes agaria nu ajonok, arai nu mam ipoltai ejok, ka inyamat icie lu angololin, araitoka idisasio lu ejokitos, ka inyamat icie lu adisi ekolera toma nape ipoyo.

Aimat akipi nu adaun ekolera adisore toma, nee ece epono lo ekorar adeka na.

Anyouni abaketait kalepon na duc.

Ekora ekolera atipet ido esuneonokin itunga lu ipu kaimonarit. Kipedon oni aisibwoun aisiarakin na ekolera koponesio kaluta.

- Arai elepi ituan akipi duc-duc ido kolekida, korurukear nges adeka katipet.
- Kipurak ekla lo eyari ikur obar ka alekan kayen kadekan, ka idoero kere lu itosomaingesi. Kowany da ebe itungakere itosomaete acolooni ido idarete kes kolaete.
- Kinyalak ekla lo eari ikur toma akipi nu ilosere icoloonin.

- Iburai itunga ailot akanin kec kede esabuuni akaulo na aitosom ecolooni.
- Kidor akipikere nu matan katu iboat asaianin, nu ipoit inyamat.
- Kaukunya icu, kinyamat ka ocoloonin.

## Iwanyuneta

Ekwangakwangai ebar, bala akipi nu ipiitere emuceen, ibarai yen adekan swan ipu. Eleki da ngesi noi ido ekwangiuini ngesi, kobenerarakwani da atipet. Isuburkit ngesi eeyengaraida.

## Nu edolit awan

Kitidwa adaun na aku kopone kalo adama an adekan akipi ka malee cie lu ipu (mere apri). Adaun na akipi akuwat kitunganan nes itul eyareneneidungakater aciepak kotona apaarasia aun araa aongon bon, arai nam isunyaikitar amukon, korurukaana yen adekan adekis katipet.

Arai kawana itongani iburai ebworak ailot mata:

(1) Amuk obis katipet. Mere aidaritor lu ebalati.
(2) Mam atuko no kere ejas ailes.
(3) Mam aitiba adngibis aites.
(4) Kitidwa anyamanyamali kabwoni.
(5) Kinekata itunga la edarele etemurukinate yen abwaria, apusiearakul inyamat.
(6) Koany ebe koana itunga akanin nce kede kealitotini, kobi ketororo inyamat.

.

14 ETOP Naiwongonet, Osuban (November 8–11, 1998)

AIJAR

# Aliau lo abu kodau ikaru 50 isisianakin

Ato Apa.11
da arawam naka araat
Pewasinil Commissioner bani
bu jedu abu ngol korai ekhive
ben konsanasi kupasiyatakdan.
Akusi naka akusitongan kere
abu di wong keyong katwam
ukaru 1985 kodap bata hune,
kodoikita, do ikar ka luka
aiyengan.

Etop: Apodon Alyan, konye
etei nong bala troko ijo
igugong karaida katutisro
bobo ikar itumun kauni iris
agres na iyengana ja
karawan naka Apugan, bayo
irwamai ijo ikar ngul kere
aitodol kwana?

Aliau: Eruo bo ngin abeit
aroko nong igugong arawam
naarai arau kwana akorion.
Konye, kwape abu
katwamator nuka aitutoor ka
aidar da siswamae luka
ikesisianakinak, abu apugan
kalernik nong kokaru luka 1986
araut emuoha luka Teaching
Service Commission, loekado
abu koraun Education
Service Commission. Abu
nong kajai okomision ngol
adnar ikar 11 kitottokaru 1997
lo adasnor apak kosi.

Etop: Arui bodo iayo arawam
abeit yes ba ijaas okomision
ngol?

Aliau: Nasodit ber akoto
aitacaan ebe mam na erai
aswantina kanginipaaran, erai
nesi na ejaanakin apakio
kapakio (part time). Aswam
kosi kapakio kangunabuk orai
susunan ikesisiak fus komarote
aitutoorio ka Primary
Teachers' Colleges,
anotonokin ikesisiak ngul
aawam urant ikesisianakinak,
aikeanakin ikesisianakinak
adoketa nukokaju kotoma
aawam ka aisiongun lu adol
apak aiyengan, ainanakin lu
edolitari anak it arawam korai s
Contract, konsob aitican ngul
lu ediakanarote, arai kejaan
elpad. Ekomision nes
ekorakini ikesisianakinak
aswansisineianyounkadoketa
nuka Prairman kitoni ngul ejaas
idigurin kangul da lu
ekotokinos araut Lecturers,
Principals ka Directors ko
Primary Teachers' Colleges,
ka National Teachers' Colleges.

Etop: Anyoikaaciriswamat
ijo irai emeebu loka
ekomision kangol?

Aliau: Abu nong kegang
aiwadikauno naka Code of
Conduct, kode ka Manual for
Primary Education Managers
ko Uganda, kiswamai niongan
eong nepepe ka Ejkf S.B.
Omek Assistant
Commissioner loka aisisia,
ka Ejkf S. Opio, Personnel
Officer luko Ministry of
Education.

Etop: Anyoika atiokinin nu
obu ja kuany kotoma
ukesisianakinak?

Alyau: Kwape emeeba loka
ekomision anuemote nu epu
kitemaajaasi ikesisianakinak
icle liuetswamaetel, entificates
ka apepolas da acie nu mam
araas nukec kanu adumuna
aswam, aimoriarit inguemaka

'O' ka 'A Level Ekidoko
ikesiasianakinak lu abu
ekomision kitican naarai
afomuni ngin kotoma
oripontan ka ikapolokitok
isomaron.

Etop: Apodon Aliau, jinkwape
lu irwamat naka atisisk
kotoma adoketa nu ngobegela,
nos can kitipunkinai adin ne
ikamanitos aisisia na kokar
lukokau kitirian kana
akwana, noi noi Universal
Primary Education (UPE).

kadepar da kanu atukot
adlopet konye komamete
ikesisianakinak lu edoketa
kanu atiakatiak (ureman).

Kapakio nu araur nong
esisianakinan ko praimare
araas ikesisianakinak lu
ainakinitai angosibib,
lwanyam leni ijo itungunan
kusomero yen abakai
ikesisianakinan komam
ibumokin. Kanat kanuailaka
enape loebus. Kwana apakio
nu adisiar aila ido mam

iponeiso lu ejokak ido mam
uyangitos itunga lu epolok.
Eraas ngun nuka abeit ido
aakasi ebe egeuni ikokuapuar
ejai praimare kolosi do
luecondary kojaan ka iponeiso
luankok. Ngun da aumitning
elomuntos kanu naarai mam
usamakitai aida arai aitican
idwe kusomero koipone edio
kere. Mam do idwe epodokitos
itunganan edio kere yen epol,
arai kusomero arai kore da.
"Idwe bodo lukepone enyoin

Ejokuna UPE noi naarai einakit iduwe kere aimoriarit lu
icanas ikauriak kec da adumun aisisianakino kadoketait
nako puraimare, konye epuakata do iduwe kotoma atukono
ido mam etiai kec iriamara ka etiai loka ikesisianakinak.

Aliau: Eeboujokuna UPE noi
naarai einakit idwe kere
aimoriarit lu icanas ikauriak kec da
adumun aisisianakino kadoketait naka Puraimare,
konye epuakata do idwe
kotomaatukonoidomam etiai
kec iriamara ka etiai loka
ikesisianakinak. Ejanadaebe
nepe enangote idwe ikidoko
katukot nepenen enangi
aisisianakin kec da ejokuna.
Kapakionusek akotoiidwe 40
bon kotoma atukot adiopet.
Bobo da ajaas ikesisianakinak
icie lu eyatakitai konyartete
"extra" kanu adumakit yen
epolokit exomero apak,
aiswama "admosioration".
Kwanaidumaniidwe bala 100

eyongitai ikesisianakinak.
Ngun kare amanoelomuntos
ketomaakidokot nakasingin
luerogioikesisianakinak bala
ti kadoketa kere ko praimare.
Itiaisinei da luka iboro
lukitouoma keretii ikeara
kitirian ka iropito luka
ikesisianakinak. Kwangin
mam do ikesisianakinak lu ipu
epodontus aidar ikalia kec,
ewate kec, kaanyangauridwe
kec da euomero.

Etop: Biai esewata ijo
iponeiso luka idwe
lakesomero kaparasia kana?
Alyau: Hai? Arai mam ijo
icint kinagari ijo ikoku yen
kesomero kodo egali hi icaki.
Eniamete idwe lukakwana

kiuta ooni aitopoloun kana
kapakio naksingaren?
Ebuzakinit Uganda
atopoloun idwe lu ejokak
iponeiso agetan kusomero,
Ikokuyen kakwanakiyingai
yen kapolon "Biai ho" bala
yen izakatar ijo. Apakio kwa
abwot ikoke ejok koisodi
aumar "Yogatoto." Arai akere
kegadi adokani ber koisidi
konyetete ayogan. Kwana
iyogai ikoku ituan yen epol
kicegegnikogasli, Eh!!!

Etop: Apodon Alyan, nguniinei
ijo kere kotoma nu
ikamanitos idwe wok eraas
nuka beit. Ejaas acie nu ikoto
ijo adimokin eyaitso nuka
aisisianakinidwe?

Alyau: Aku kanun
emogene kotoma
awam kwana ti agen gama
eidilo lo ibokai lad kat
elwaka isiawen N du
epone ka araa
mua
daro ka
koikoma
koy
ajok aitatumur
ajin.

Etop: Iuyekuda
iswamai pyopinet?
Alyau: Akora.

# UGANDA CO-OPERATIVE
# ALLIANCE
# COOPERATIVE FOOD SECURITY PROJECT

POST: Zonal Project Supervisors (3)
Duty Station: Tororo for Tororo/Iganga and Mbale Zones.
Soroti for Soroti/Kumi and Lira Zones; Masindi/Hoima and Apac Zones.
Duties: - Supervise 2 Field Extension Officers in the two zones in crop production and marketing.
- Strictly responsible for development of business in societies: ie. provision and sale of inputs, marketing of farmers crops, mobilization of savings, access to credit facilities, and keeping track of business records.
Qualifications: A degree in rural Economy or Agricultural economics or the equivalent with work experience related to the duties above for at least 3 years. Able to speak one or more languages of the two zones. Ready to take office by December 1998 and willing to travel on a motorcycle. The applicant should be knowledgeable on cooperatives.
Terms: One year contract, renewable annually for 3 years. The package is attractive.
Applications should include a current CV, copies of certificates and addresses of two referees who should send us their references. These should reach us not later than 13th Nov. 1998, addressed to The General secretary, Uganda Co-operative alliance, P.O Box 2215, Kampala.

# SOKO MOTEL
# VACANCIES

A new and modern Motel soon opening in Soroti Municipality, seeking suitable candidates to fill the following vacancies:

1. Manager:
Qualifications: A dynamic and experienced person with a Diploma in Hotel Management and Catering from a recognised Institution.

2. Assistant Manager:
Qualifications: As above with a bias in house keeping. Please appear in person for the interviews with your applications, CVs and original certificates and testimonials.

Date: Monday, 16.11.98 as from 9 a.m.
other Posts:

1. Receptionists
2. Barmen
3. Cooks
4. Waiters
5. Room Attendants
6. Laundry Attendants
7. Accounts Assistant
8. Kitchen Assistant
9. Askaris

Qualifications: O'Level education minimum with experience in Hotel and Catering industry.

Please, appear in person for the interviews with your applications, CVs and original certificates and testimonials.

Date: Monday, 23.11.98 as from 9.00am

Place: Soko Motel, Camp Swahili, Moroto road, Soroti Municipality

# Mam iseunete itukurin - Elyat

## Na Ronnie Ikara

ABWAAN kana amaria apolokte eugdong loka LC 5 Soroti, Juvontore Ulyau ngini clip itunga luko Ocero, Kaberamaido aasun ngesi, konye mere itukurin lo alosete eilor oyapessi komantai abeit nu iswamiate.

Itunga tuni amariaete apolokin shodong ngon kes John Emilly Otekat, Robert Engula ka Juvontore Elyau.

Abala Elyau ehe ngesi cut Isecokina kana aiya apolou ngin naharie ehe arai ngesi lo ekokosanit ido da ehe etopolorit akirot na aipur

atiakak na kwana ediko kiding na Ikumansa keda feno "Koneutuber loloeong dodo akaulo na ikaru iyarei alakakini konye ejing eicelongngon koyaataa ekot nudidik" abala Elyau elimek nu aurianet kododiko Otekat. Amamei Engula kaurianeta nu ajakina Swagere ka oidokai lu Ocero.

Abu Elyau lo enera k'Akumansa ehe eboikinit ngesi abwoikinebuku Kabaki kotoma airaber napolon kotoma sseo na ebunit koingaren "Idelobote da ngancut," abalangesikodo ebima lo atakotairam akaron.

Abala ngesi ehe abuni ngesi aioinyikokin feno akoru epudiu loda abala ngesi ehe arai enosat lo abar ko Teo.

"Me konye lace aingalingal oni ehe akoru imamwakajenete oni nu ibinakinii aowam. Abai nong aisiitkin e president da kanu akiro kangan" abalangesi kodokinete itunga oikan.

Otekat ngesi abu kofonok itunga ehe abinkinit ngesi aanyun ehe edukun eyumbaniteko Teo okaangangi asisananitake LPE.

Abala ngesi ehe egangi ngesi da alipan naka minga luko Kaberamaido kanu adumun adistrikt kobala ehe koipene

kangol apure bodo ajokusio adolonokin itungatiuipukacot luko kwap cot.

Itopohorit da ngesi ayun aimorkinakiding na Ikumansa ka Iteso koipone kalo ainkwanan momoiu luben imerikikitoa Iteso ka Ikumansa.

Abala Otekat ehe abinkinit ngesi aitetrun adistrikt loko Soroti kosodi da aikenn adoketait na akoro.

Abala ngesi ehe epuda edistrikt engasnoun lo amina munga ke kocai da.

Kongolaui ber yeu de, eong ara apolon euzimog lu Iteso ka Ikumansa kere lu Ibuyete ko Kampala, Entebbe

ka Jinja, anyoika do amenu kang aimorkikit itungaka lu ibuyete repepe kore?" abala ngesi.

Eyatakit Otekat ehe abuni ngesi akokit aipuc ka eyuara na edistrikt kosodi asganga apugan kotoma alinirokonta iwkodorok.

Abala da ngesi ehe kwape etanganan lo ajena k'akwapesinet nu ipu abuni ngesi aisupunun luabarak airwayam abar key kodistrikt ido koipone kangon abuni aitabeben epeiu ke lo eyuan aetamunak, angor ka ingwalasik. "Apolouke apure bodo ngun adumunun

## Akuroki Pallisa
airop eswamak

## Na Jonathan Angora

EKANSULO lo LC 5 Pallisa diatrik nges do kwana ejai ocanit lo apiyai nu ebeitor atacanakina ikansilan iropito ka allowances kee acia.

Elomuriton nu akaulo na apiyarootor apiyai nu atiakakitai ekansulo kotoma ohajet lo okaru 1998/99 kana aiiwasamaii atacia ikansilan. Adunos apiyai ngon koroko do e esalit ilapio ikanyasini koingaren toni ne do hoho itutubere ehajet ecie kokaru kalo ebunit.

Kobaluwa lo abu lo lem erai RDC Pallisa Ejkt Alex Apecu kitodik Etop araasi 29.10.98, ewadikat lo eyait nu apiyai ko diatrik Ejkt Akuta Olupeit aingenkire apolokitok LCs ejautene lo 'apiyai nu atiakakitaaikansulo.

Abala Akuta kobaluwa kangol ehe eboidai nu ebeitor atacanakina ekansulo kes do edeuna 318,000/-bon.

Eepeunkini Akuta apolokitok LC 5 akiro ngun akaulo na akotone nges kodamak ber ekopiti lo engici e CAO Ejkt Nathan Kayongo, 1m/-kana aitolot aingo kee.

Abu ekansulo kijuka ber Kayongo aiyeng araas 16.10.98 adaun apaaraisa 30 kanu abakate ehe abu kitolitolit apiyai nu e diatrik kosodi ebe etawasamai

eyapesi ke erono aponi koneutui ekomiti lo ikansilan ikany aingic akiro ngun ido ngin diope kakesi ebeit adumun 500,000/-.

Abu Olupot kitetemite kobaluwa ehe kwape araar ekomiti ngol lo aistunit ekansulo abot 100 kesi atacor kaboolai nu atiakakitai ekansulo ide nu da adaunos. Abala ehe ajai do ges ebakinit arai orionget bodo abti elemunere apiyai atacia ekomotingol.

Abala aperu ehe abu ekansulo kodiakatite noi aremor Kayongo aiyeng ido ebearaas ikansilanicie lu:uik alimorit ekomision lo angici aitolitolio na apiyai ko diatrik? Etolosio angic kokaru kalo atabor.

Abala aperu ehe adnos na ekansulo kodikitsanyone ara ke ne ejai Kayongo adolit li kesaikokitkin na etolomurit eripootalo ekomisionkangol lo da apolokit fastice Masuke Kibaka lo da ehe edeparit aijen na ikomiti kayen asounol ekansulo.

Kotoma aingic na ekomision ka Justice Kibuka, aponi kongicanai ehe etolitolitaisirigin lu adolete 1.1bn/- kotoma Pallisa ka tororo diatrik. Abu da ekomision ngol kobala ehe adolit kitepesmai ngul lu ajaas akiro ngun

## Aari esapat ko Soroti

## Na Martha Akello

ABERU, adupet na ehe Mwamini B ka esapat Apollo Opiko kesi ajiaasi Palia Sorotikana aingarak inipolisin aingic atwanare ka esapat Wilfred Opolot lo adumunio etwanikit ingaren ne urute lo Pioneer Primary School atupurus kana 31.10.98:

Ngun lu agasante awanyun esapat lo tupuruc kesi abalesi ehe epu ekukut kane atwanikini esapat lo.

Apoliton polis kodistrikt, Charles Birung ngesi abu kingingningne ejai Etop ehe awenitai Mwamini ka Opikokanu aingarakin kesi aingic akiromu ikamunitisa twanare ka Opolot. ido ehe autasi imurok aingic doore yen ayari esapat lo.

## Etwataniar Kumi 236m/= Aey. App.1

Projesi: 53m/= hon etwasmai, enyakar 57m/= kore," abala Dr. Oonyu Ellipt

ngesi komounai epom lo femamanet isirign ngul kitwasamarete kore katipet nedokunisto.

## Itanyamete angor ikiliok icin - Ekimat

## Aay. App.1

kode iken, ido ijo ekiliokit aola kobala ehe e TB (elwera) arsi esilon, kwabo icin kaya lu inkes," abala arisa inlete munga akwena.

Ayanganni ngesi aanyunet na kanu aicorakin itunga aitemokit aewamisinui kesi kotoma akwap kana arai emunou adokar akuj mama eja lidoke.

Abu ekimat Arisakicon ikilok mam airotangor naurai "entak mam ekotoi yesi kotoma akuj."

Abu etuan Edeke kicam angor (euko Soroti) kobala ehe amunar elose, enape, einer ka

aowamsimeikec

"Idumuni ijo angor (nuko Soroti) aijulejul itim, awenimer hala emin, ehe ewig. Mam eong ajei diore ebakai ewig arai ajulo ekingok!" Kogatasiebwarak akwena kobakaui angor na dadijalitos itim kunyukuny. Eyatakit ngesi ehe itukurianete ngesi elose, enape, einer lu itunga kaluku Soroti adolere otaon.

"Apodeped toni aki da do konye elulu ehe Praise the Lord (kituretete ejakait) Alleluye! Amen!"

Nape elimuni ekimat ehe ikiliok dalu amotokan eminasi aridit ilitia koicolongo, konemori edope epolon lo ejaasikede amotokaaingitebe "How does he know? (Ikonakini ngesi ejemania)"

Etorunitekinat agwilatorak lu ehe eminasi alosit omurok da konye itunga arima ngina tipitipi

"Atwanare ikalaunan erai e promotion (aikokino adoketait) alosit toma akuj, konye atwanare ikadiakanaranerai e demotion (aijeaari adoketait). You never tem know? (emam lem ijei igen?), agata ekimat kode

Neto ka Amunngun. Mam Arisa abu kidouke da etonka Kristo. "Ee lo nei ijo ehe mai ka ekanisa ebesi: Ikadok ArzMishopa, Bohit otakoi, imaduku, kola kobuni do yepi."

Abalangesiche elapiti je ke lu mak in aitorimanet elimin nu ehe epoga. Abu Arisakicon ebowini "Ibory yen epol itungaran eyongil Loke. Asalakini aitemonokineta, amnengina ne ejai aipuc in kones."

## Etutub Kumi itiaisinei lu acok

## Na Mwalima Akalway

AGWELANARAK ka akortok acok luko Kumi kesi etutuboto aikeun etiat lo egwelere ngol epuko lo acok toni 4,000/- ido amotokan nu ibwokonorete acok Kampala mam adepur 15 kangin paaran.

Ecoraki da apolon eicolong LC 5 Kumi, Hajji Umar Okodel, Egirigin na lu eyait nu eyuara kede apiyai kokomiti lo apolon loka LC 5 Abaadi Aeko aida brokers, lu iyakitai agwela acok kocaaloi, naarai ehe kesi itomonyete akortok.

Eswamasi nu araasi 2.11.98 kairiamun naka agwelak acok ko Kumi kede Okodel ko Lukiko Hall lo Kumi. Arai Okodel

anyarauini aurianet na akaulo na ehe amonyukonite die eyapesi ke ehe ejesuna ettai lo egwelere acok kwap cot 3,000/-kangolepuko.

Ayaitok atokot kulu agwelak acok, Kumi United Printer Sellers and Brokers Association (KUPSBA), kadi abu kesi ajukina si raiman na nada aponi kitutubekokitokite apolok.

Abu Okodel kolimok agwelak acok ehe. "Apodot ka aiomak yeni agwela acok kode ajialar apodomole. Aoyapesi lo akoru kodistrikt arai iyatakinin yeni aitomakeekok."

2 ETOR Naïwongonet, Ouabun (Novozhka) 19-25, 1998

TYEMUTO

# Akutun atesin ko Mukura

## Aay. App. 1

Itanga lu. Ebei da awadik ikino iskahatwak kere otot lo.

Kapotolo lo etoloseite isinikaalei luka NRA (UPDF kwanabaraa) 9-07.89, apako na etoliete apugan ko Teso, aponi kotukuma itanga 206 koterewar luko Ngora, Kapir kede Mukura.

Editore kalo apotu kojarata kaboogi kana, Justine Omongola lokorony Adul, Mukura ngesi abu kolimok. Etor ebe, araasi 11.07.98, akatukenaimkanykeo etengsi aduan apaarasin auni apotu isinikaalei kereikisi kesi 206 kere tema aboogi na aponi kogolokinai koso-dete ainekokini wapke.

"Kanu arnwanin na aboogi ka amamuo na ekwam lo iyengarana apotu do itanga 69 kilowarou toni atwanare akasilo na etawa bala ediope hon," abala Omongola.

Este kalo apotu okuwata atwanare ages abala ebe aponi kidasi 1cie itunga mare ondakites.

Ekamanda lo apolokit isinikaalei ngul, Maj Christopher Bunyeryeri ngesi da abu kotwandi ajie lo Rwanda okara 1990.Este isinikaalei kesi aponi kiteperaresi kadieket kana aario na itunga kalo.

Inera kobwoikite apugan koibworo kalo, abala RDC Kami, Junzo Tamussime, ebe mamumitapuganaimorikikin kedeekamado loka LC 5 Kumi kana airikakin aidak otot lo.

Eyatakit Tamussime ebe abosi apugan airic noi esomero lo Mukura S.S. lo edukitas kanu aiitununio itunga lu aarakinio aboogi.

Abala RDC ebe etutub apugan ebe ebuni adac isirigin lu asioman na ikokok luka itanga kangul.

Kokara idlo lu atuboren abu apugan kijarik 720,000/- kangol okale loka itunga lu aarakinio aboogi na. Abala e Lianne Officer loka Presidential Commision for Teso, Alex Emojong, ebe 780,000/- kes bobo ebeit apugan atacakinkangol okale.

Abu Apolon eicolong LC 5 Kami, Haji Umar Okodel, kilip ehworok asisistant aitimonor ka aitoronikin kanu aronsisi ka aswantroio keo no eyasmunete ajuirangong.

Ekaanyanaran lo Soroti, Germon Bakor, ngesi apolokit aillipasinetina edaere skojono. Ajiekins CAO Kami, Rose Ocom ka imerban luka LC 5 aidayo na.

MP Ngora, Fiona Asemo Egunyu kede atupston RDC Kami, Michael Bwalatum, apolokites aitemonokinetu nuka aidinyo kana.

Akadakit Ilukor kanu alemarlere aboogi ngin ko Mukura.

"Ti aboogi ngin itauditai ne. Ituanyon alemari aboogingin erai yen epirididi. Ti aboogi ngin ejai ne kora aitunonet," abala Ilukor.

Abala lisihop ebe arai anyanyara na feno kanu angatare pharen kes, konye mere akote apugan, nerayaani ejie ka atwanare Teso.

Ebarit Ilukor atwanare na itunga kalo kwape na abu kolako feno kogaaren lu ebuyaikitai kes naarsi ebe kepuputu akwapin nuko kinga epono lo aarere kes apotu kebuikisi apugan alacakin itunga.

Abala Ilukor ebe mam adolit itunga ainyang hatwak kec idlo Ednke ngesi elopet enyangit. Abu ngesi kicorak LCs ajililan ikirota lo ikokok kere lo itunga kalo koso-dete aitodolikin ne ejai President.

YOGA DO: Apolon eicolong LC 5 lo Kumi, Haji Umar Okodel (ngol kokiding enapi ekama, apu akanin) kede 1cie itunga ilipakinete ipukoi luni lu akojo itunga 69 lu kolo aarakinen isinika luka NRA aboogi ko Mukura. Aputo na inomit Jonathan Maraka

# Alungar Bidandi kauriane

## Aay. App. 1

itcudonyamasu 17.11.98.

Abeit Bidandi Saali aitolot ineresines lu ikamunitos decererollisation, konye abu kolangar kisiiasu ebe ikanolan idiobon alyaitoongina. Luipu kakesi araasi lu ejaasi tema okomsitio lo apolok.

"Mameong abunitieiner kede enecativee, abunit eong einer kede ikaasilan keere," abala Bidandi konyunyura.

Abu do Bidandi kitutub ebe kojaikin aurianet ngin lolo 19.11.98 akaulo na airiamun kede ikaasilan luko Kumi 18.11.98.

Anyunyura Bidandi ebe apotu aitemonokinetu nu airimor ke kolon jokan ko distriktan kaluce, konye amunaun ko Soroti.

"Kongoliasi ber yesi da, Katakwi da nepe biyan adumani edistrikt, apotu kijukutu ikaasilan lu erebeikitai," abala Bidandi.

Eyatakinit Bidandi ebe ebusakinit ikaasilan kere luko distrikt apupun akire nu ayangaotol ngesi, "nabarai mam eong akoto lucie asalit

kas, aso bonat ikoni nen da ekmo yesi kere koapasi kede idistriktan lucie koipugae loka decererollisation."

Abu da ngesi kimuarite eyapesi ka CAO ka loka LC 5 kanu adnior ngesi koso di ataman ebe mam alosi atrop ikaasilan nepezape da.

"Ajalakina do eong ngun CAO ka LC 5, idio nu amunit eting yesi, idumnete Naiwongonet," kililinguni agnola is kolungar eminista kinga.

Apotu do itunga da koupanasingeni kinga, isipu kocehas ebe ecancianitai apak kes, icin kingilamaros nu aropio (sitting allowance).

Apotu do itunga konakemikinos kokinga na agnola aiueknek CAO ka apolon eicolong LC 5 kanu arowa kana. Luipu acelasi ebe mam akiro apotu kodolokisikesi.

Konye Eraban loka LC5 Soroti, Raymond Ekadunges abu kitijenikina ebe apotu kesi kijukata ibidawan lu anyaritere itunga aurianet ngin kotoma apak.

"Kitoni oredio da." Abu

CAO Soroti Akol Agiripina Amuga kigang nu abala Ekadu.

Emrasi do kesi nu kagola kana abu RDC kotakok kesi akaulo na eminista alungar. Apolon Eicolong LC 5, Soroti, Juvenine Ebamu, loda aleleannete agalibidis kakonye, ngesi abu kitodia anyanyara ke koso di ailip aratak (yematomam awadik.

Abu RDC Kalagala kodeton koso di asurwakin ikaasilan kanu aisurum ngesi ileic lu etianen kobala ebe "ikatunga, ikotosi bodo yesi aikwakini ai!"

Abala Kalagala ireta ebe akapanakin ngesi aanyun ebe edotonorio apolok icolongo luka LCs lumam itodolinkinete nu ipudai ido abuni ngesi aiwasam iyapeesin ka GISO kanu angicununenga eenok lu.

"Ingai bo ilimokini nesi aibwo arai kijenete ebe mam ikotosi aiwam ngun!" Isio

kijanikini yesi aswantroio ngan. Asa arai ber kesi itolouteyes naiwanin ingabu enwaiar" ngin

Kilagalaireta.

Abu Kalagala kitwikini apolok icolongolaka LC 5 lu inenwan kisi koso di enisila lu anyanyara me noi okros bala atukala apolon eicolong LC 5 na kanu ebe atanet asucina akio.

"Ejakad ku mamongongonet abulla na ido ibani kopakod ootii acekakin erum na eretuni Kalagala ide ko ecopot natai.

OCAO Raphael Okong ngesi abala ebe ekalanga fteno ajaonikin aurianet koso di atrijenat ebe apung ngesi 1cie kokamilan ekal ebe mam apotu asokul apak ajiaikin aurianet nuka. Emeya lo Soroti, iang Egunyu ngesiornala kopakod kopedosi abunon, kisa ailip aratak iyenuto awa atutubet kana apu kotakamanto.

Ajiaasi MPn. Grace tiaik nako Soroti ka Hebon ha. Ornedalo Serere aurianeg

# Eman RDC amerak

Na Bansie Ikara

AURIAK lu itopoloritos ematet komam epodokinitos nu asioman na idwa kec kesi eponio airigaunun ka arocunun kobaan kec ka aikokororetawen.

RDC lo Soroti, Peter Kalagala ngesi etijenan ngun araasi 14.11.98 ko Madera Boyo PS, Soroti ne araar ngesi epejonon lo angosibib kaurianet kana auriak lu esemero kangol.

Abu Kalagala kimua ematet lo itopoloritos itanga luko Soroti koso di ascorakin angor aimikenen ikilok kec inyamat arai kebongununutu oreria kec kopurini ewaragi kakwes kec.

Abala da Kalagala ebe alosi

Kalagala

ngesi aswam agogong ainyakunun esisianakinak lu Teso lu epoisianaros Kampala

"Koanyutu ber yesi, imwalimun lu Teso kesi itodokaritos adeketait na asioman ko Kampala," abala

Kalagala kimungineng akou.

Abu RDC kimua akire ka erumane ido ebe ara aise itunga aimorimor ange da konye auri idwe luipu kede mam ngesi elope apolon aidar.

"Ingai ber igirakit Ede ebuha ebe arai mam iariside laipa ebuni atwosore" inginit Kalagala kodet auriak akwera.

Mam RDC eyalama kami apotinkinio na idwe la kausa 14 kwap nade ebe idim kodistrik. Abala ngesi ebe mam ekisil abutu aninenikina lu epotinkinete idwe, aswami da lu igangitos ngun quon aigalalaar aiwen, abalo apot

# Osuban nges Emorimor

Ano. App.1
Ejustatar Osuban idigerin iyami kotoma akiro nu akoru fu adomuni ko onibasito loko Edinburg 1963, ka ediguri ka luyareit loko West Virginia U.S.A 1965.

Iywamat ngesi kwape angiclinke igirda Sereve 1954-57, onomero lo akoru Arapai kitoni 1970.

Ijaanakit Osuban kwape lo apolokinitnu akoru ko Nyakol nako Uganda kitoni 1972, ne aponit kitopolorere ngesi kwape egangitonakomisiona lo akorukitoni 1976.

Akaulo kangin apotis ber kijulara ngesi aswam ocuume lo esukali. Aponi bobe kinyakunai ngesi kwape Atupiton ekomisiona ido kisisianakini oyunibasite lok Makarere.

Abu ber Osuban korauna emininta lo akoru kapugan ka Yanafl, oletoke 1979.

Kokaru 1980 aponi do ngesi kitopolorai toni adoketait na Commissioner tapi konya itogongin okaru 1982. Abu ngesi kilwama aswam ngin kitoni ne eyengania, kapugan kolomari do aswami kede Sugai luka Maibuani konu ailotne ejaatene lo iraan lu akinyet.

Akaulo kangin abu ngesi koloma aswami kede erlonget loka Joint Development Consultants International (DCI) kwape apolokinitnu ekaapuni ngol.

Kokau iywamat da Osuban kede irlongetaicie langellegela kwape na Produce Marketing Board (PMB) kamu airere iponesto lu idaris inyamat kitoni 1990.

# Eboikin Saleh aingito na S4

Na Ewadikan Etop
ECORAN President Museveni kotoma akiro nu ayuwa, Maj. Gen Salim Saleh ngesi kwana euta aswam aingito na S4 (Uganda Certificate of Education-UCE) ko Nakasongola Secondary School. Agouni ngesi aibcikin aingito na araasi 6.11.98.

Saleh lo ikaru 39 ngesi abu kognu aingito keda apapua na Akora (Agriculture Practicals).

Iwadikanangesi keda ikirori alle lu abot, Caleh Akandwanabo.

Ejaasi Maj. Gen. Saleh keda okoke loda iywamai ngesi da aingitunapena okaru lapelis Alibunetana iyeenatokani ebakasi ebe adumunete Saleh ikokuyen keda aberuna Karamo jailokaru 1981 iywamai ngesi Morote kwape esirikaalet loka UNLA.

# Adumu bobo Kumi amotokan

Ebobet kalaoway
KEBGET kala nyekotao, 4.64. nesi adumaki bobo bobo aboroki amotokan aarei karet kokau nu inaabai 1.38. 13.11.98.2469.

Iywamat amotokan kanu kautum aitegelikina, abala kookoutumani ansusunoka 1.38. 13.11.98.2469. aal ka Kumi, Godfrey bobo Onoding, ebmokini

Etop kuyapesi ke pac. "Ebeitaipagisanaramotokan muna ajai idio itunganan kere yeni ekoto, konye lu isingarenio asukin kesi itunga lu abestoo kamu igangit Irish Aid kami aitapatan aswam ke," abala Onoding.

Aswamusinei ngun kesi ebe imoriaritos airit amapatalin, asinge ka amoru ouemeroi lu edukete kesi.

Luce itunga da kere epodorete aipagisa amotokan nu bon ebe emamei aswam nu epysjekt loka Irish Aid. Abala Onoding ebe epedori ituan aitwaam amotokanna alonio nendo keere, konye kojai aiisykun nesi kotoma apak na itubokitai.

Ipagisanaro amotokan ebe tetere adumun isirigin lu itemonokinere amotokan nu keda aigang itunga kuwai lo elose.

Iliasinai lu ipagisaere amotokan nu kesi adau eyapesi Ejid Onodingaijukar mama ejai ekamulo, lo LCV kami airere, ainyabuka ka aitutub.

Ejauni apukor akaunta kobanok tetere yeni ipagisai aitac isirigir ke ebaok, eyatakit Onoding.

Na Ewadikan Etop
ECORAN President Museveni kotoma akiro nu ayuwa, Maj. Gen Salim Saleh ngesi kwana euta aswam aingito na S4 (Uganda Certificate of Education-UCE) ko Nakasongola Secondary School. Agouni ngesi aibcikin aingito na araasi 6.11.98.

Saleh lo ikaru 39 ngesi abu kognu aingito keda apapua na Akora (Agriculture Practicals).

Iwadikanangesi keda ikirori alle lu abot, Caleh Akandwanabo.

Ejaasi Maj. Gen. Saleh keda okoke loda iywamai ngesi da aingitunapena okaru lapelis Alibunetana iyeenatokani ebakasi ebe adumunete Saleh ikokuyen keda aberuna Karamo jailokaru 1981 iywamai ngesi Morote kwape esirikaalet loka UNLA.

Cicero Onekeny Jamu
DLCN nicolong Wildlife &amp; Association, Charles
Aigeki Emaat ngesi
Aimari kanu pac aarere
Aigeki ikany ko Ongino,
Aimari ebe ecanicanete
