## Ediakaritos LCs

APAARAN Naiyareit apotu ikaasilan luko Soroti kisurumata edistrikt ileic kanu aigir alosit airiamun kede Eminista loka *Local Government*, Ejkt Jaberi Bidandi Ssali (Koany App 1-2).

Idelelei cut ebe arai akirot epali arai apalisonut naarai ejukakitai ikaasilan kere akiro kotoma apak. Alimonoritai da akiro nu aurianet kana ko Radio. Konye ca atongot na ikaasilan bon abu kodolu!

Ikoto isio airucakin aingit ikaasilan lu, kwape engisitor RDC lo Soroti, Ejkt Peter Kalagala, ebe: "Ingai bo ilimokini yesi aibwo arai kijenete ebe mam ikotoni (ipedorete) aswam?"

Edolit da na ebalar Kalagala ebe edolit aidotonor itunga kwa kalu. Konye aibosit na aitwasam iGISOI (bon), ekoto aitwasam aseak, lu aseunete kesi. Edolit aisisianakin aseak kodoco ebe ejai kesi apedor alemar ikaasilan lu mam itodolikitos ipeleik kec jokan.

Iwomitos yesi ebe akiro nu eyaunit Bidandi Ssali erai kanu akejokis arai bo kanukus? Eebo ejena ebe edumuni Bidandi epeera naarai iswamai akeswam kwape Eminista. Konye nu eyaunit ngesi, erai kanu ajokis na iwokotunga.

Kwana erai eipugae loka *decentralisation* (ne inyakunitere apugan adoketa nuko kwap) neo ejai. Bidandi Sali ngesi eminista lo ayauni eipugae lo. Inyo bodo mam LCs wok ekototor apupokin akiro nu eipugae kalo kane ejai 'papa ke'?

Emamei ti eipone lo ililingaria Etop akiro nu ileuc kwa kanu, kwape elipitotor engarenok icie. Edolit aidelelun ationis na ejai tetere aseak ejenete, motoko itwekenyutu ayaitok kec arai bo aidotonor da.

Atisepak arorwa kwa kanu nes einakit Eraban loka okasulo loka LC 5, Ejkt Raymond Ekadu imikit arotak iyemuto ajaut aurianeta kec (Koany App 13). Enyarit da Ekadu Etop ebe erai Stupid (ebangaana)! Ekuriana Ekadu ebe iwolunete lu iyemuto akiro kec keere - nu ajokak kanu arokok da.

Ikoto isio aingit Ekadu ebe "Ingai bodo erai stupid, ewadikak Etop lu iwolunenete atiokisio arai bo ikaasilan lu esalete aurianet na enyaraunit Eminista lo epolokit kesi?" Asismak itlakete oni.

## OPALAKIRO

# Odeke, papa idodo

● Epu pete Amusugun bon ● Enyamete ikoko

Na Martha Akello

AKAULO na adasin isawan iyarsi abala Genyetieny kobodaboda, anyoanko Katakwi, abukadol Magoro; awojau na amainin 24.

Kadol Magoro oidukai, abu kengit esapat ediope lo auta sinyakan ikeboro kosokonto ana ajeni ngesi apolon Bernard Okello.

Abu ber esapat lo ketok eong balo awomit ebe emonara eong akou aingiste ngesi apolon lo. Konye abu kengarak atiodikineong alotot ore lo ajaasi itogoi lu anya koyapiasi ka idukai kanepokanen.

Kadol eong otogoi lu etodikitai, abu kadum apene itanaki ikoko kokinga kasodi aitiskonyan eong ajok nso. Konye eringa eong kibokina abukawanyu aliliianganoips ekerete kokuju na etogo ediope. Abu kakurtanar noi bala akoto ageun akerite.

Abu do apese na kiworau elope ere lo ajai toma togo ediope lo asubit bala abila, konye abu kajama ekadu ebe arai nen oroke.

Kokomani do epolon anapit egue lo imerikikinaepale kede esaat (overall). Abu kiyalamikinaanyun apejonon ko.

Akaulo na eong aiyogaikin ka apolon Bernard Odeke, abu kamaik ngesi ebe alotot eong ajenun nu ipu nu ikamunitite eponel oidarangess alilianga.

Abu kiyalamikin noi kosodi alimokin eong alosit aibtoikintotatogolivekeregesi kosodi amaanakinakiroke.

"Ageunit eong aidar ailiiangaokara lopeisolap lo iwangonet akaulo naka Northern Uganda, Manufacturers Association Trade Show na ajaikina Lira.

"Akaulo na abongan ko Lira abu kalonite Mero Kabila ko Katakwi. Kodol eong Mero Kabila abu kawanyu ailiiang na abu eraagi ke kesialamik eong noi ido abu katema ebe ejai eong alosit kangesi ore.

"Abu do eong aten alisk ngesi kede amujajat ka ikok kitonineekamunaeong ngesi.

"Abu kayau ngesi ore kasodi amaikin ngesi ekirok Mary Amagoroit.

Apota do acir ailiianga ka edodisi kogautu aponenen

PAPA AILILIANGA: Benard Odeke iboe kokolero lokoreke lo ikonon ngesi ko Magoro. Aputu na inomit Martha Akello

kitonine adoloto ailiianga 12 kosodi idodo ikany ka aidodoka awongon.

Abu da amaanik kesi ikitoria edeejai kwape kwana Lillian, Janet, Margaret, Egegu, Askari, Iloya, Ogugut, Immaculate, Mary ka Amagoroit.

Esanyami eong kesi ikok ka ebon, konye elosaranete kesi eilanokutui aimo inyamat keo icie lu mam eong ajen.

Alimokit eong etunganan ediope ainuman kesi ikok ide enyamete abakali adasin apaarasia auni. Enyamete da irwan auni apaaran.

"Kedol esawa lo apero idumuni ijotice kakesi epenete temaanyanuiswagisterattogo kosodi icie toma abolina nu etosomaieong asolinaikaboro icie," abala apolon Odeke.

Konye isatakit iso aiboi khama, abu kawanya ebe apetu ailiianga kawolioni kosodi aingit ngesi ne ajaasi. Abu kogyu aiworo kesi kede Amusugan kobalu: "Amagoroit come here" (apolouke ebe Amagoroit kebia ne). Konye kireu Amagoroit akou kosodi awanyani eong, abu kobongo toma anya.

Abu apolon Odeke kotam aiworo nucie da konye aikunyukunya kotoma anya bon apotu isio kapaputu.

Iringa isio itamit eworo kosomuni eidodoi ediope lo enyarao ebe Askari, lo ebala Odeke ebe ekutukana noii kornam ekoto ainyam kede lucie idodoika ailiianga.

Kengit eong apolon Odeke

"Konye aringa eong na eipone lo epodora aiawi amagoroit, ailiianga noa abala eipolon Odeke.

Lyalama Odeke no i alisenes ngesi isao (Trade Fair) lido lag agoun ne agarani ng kolejet ko Lira abu koraun kosodi kosok ainakis President Y. Museven ediope konya ko kalu ejai ewaki yong.

Kosodi bobo eba jiguramak ka lu ejena ka Amagoroit Bandarae apaparan na eson Entorimerke Sorot.

Kengit eong Odeke niyak lo eyaitotor ngesi idanyo abu kotama ebe jigir ewomitos ebe em iya acudan arai bonai enor atagorn.

"Ayongana itunga eba abala ngesi. Konye abu ngesi ancor kesi molim mam erai abotio besatake.

Erai Odeke eutui kise kodowe ikanyan abu ngesi ekan. Esnori ngesi aike iboro ko Technical School Iro aiyatakin naisnere kosomoro lo etatai ke eja Logogo Kanpak ngesi onairake ka Dr. Mera-ori-rosianakinanbo Nakai University kosodi nade Francis Akello. Abun naoeditalina tabookini airabet naka Lagan Odeke kadu abete kote iboyete ko Torne eewamai ngatokadeh. Amunoreringi lekanek kanwiankenaa idarailin

ETOP Natwangsoet, Osuban (November) 19-25, 1998

# Ijapio kotoma Ateso

- Orara: July - Omodokokongo
- Omuk: August - Otikok
- Okwang: September - Otibar
- Odunge: October - Osokosokoma
- Opedeki: November - Osuban
- Omaruk: December - Opo

Apapulana nes citi epalikitai aslomab Etop attolomumuma aomisioka angudan keo. Kitosom nes.

# Kirucakinai bobo atukio naka apiyai nu edukere TECHE

IPA - Abekaira kede ileic ebe ekidoko itunga noi kotoma soobao nu stukere apiyai sookes Teso College of Applied education (TECHE) ne ja sponi konskunere isirigin lu adeparitos imilindu kanyape karaida ipuda sumamobifino?.

Na neoi elipitor ebe kobungokinai asuban nu abolot ke Sumti koipone lo agrukio itunga lu emarit kokwap abaluwan na eryaitem kes ajikio asuban ne.

- Imeeban lu airabet sukapolon luko Teso kere ka papero keo.
- Kamolao luka LC5 ko Teso kere.
- Apolok koilongo LCIII luko Teso kere.
- Emamuk lukapolok luka ipugan ke lu ma iswamsete apugan luko ubatrikitan luko Teso kere.
- Apolok koilong luko umu umatuluk memwankere.
- Apolok isomeron luka purasmam, umu ka isomeron kite luko Teso.
- Acamunit zong ebe arai asamon itunga lu awapryunet ipabet oni aiewamaun nu aamokin ko Teso.

Opisan Jurem Obicho

# EBA LUWA LO ESABIITI: ETELEKA 10,000/=

# Inyo ber itunga bok bok akiring?

IPA - Iayobo ber ainaki itunga iele akwamakite akiring ikiroria etia ne?

Ipupuni enyaritai Amelekeja, atiak oteker, arwetat, ijang epenek kede icio da.

Idumuni ijo etuan apupun edio kokiroria kalo kijulakin eijar tai.

bok-bok, silik aimula bere erongo aboye kedolano, egelakin eter da!

Iboro lu eminas atakamanan kapejo, opucito arai atwakisia, toni neoria da.

Na aumokin aitakasi idukonosinot iele kauupo akiring.

Ipupuni ebe ibungat loce akebera kaus akiring, umied apolon akiring kopucit, osekale loce totoka kaus akiring, amariata LC5 akiring koingaren na eminista.

Kanenieie idumuni ijo itunganan epokori ecelet ebe "akori lobo

akiring ajena, konye kolimoro nan kere".

Ateker engitala ber oni itewua wok, ijo etuan lo angor aarel, idwe swi, akituk boo bon nesi ijo kaus akiring?

Cuthbert Ochum

Mbarara University of Science and Technology

# Etaanyu lo Omiito ican

IPA - Elipitkitimnoi kocamak akeun aimony na itunga lo istela Omiito, etem Kape. Etai ileic lu esilok apupuan ebe esapat lo cut eurikitai istela lo Omiito nas ber bobe euta ainyak epolo na sitela kwap cut.

Epone lo eutar esapat ngot ajenar Omiito nes aowan aswansisnei kwapetrat, aikapa acok itunga komam etaci kedau agwelar.

Kosodi einer lo ededeng ebe erai ngesi lo epoloki nut ctaun emamei yen epodori ngesi nepe cepe da.

Ejai esapat lo kede egurupulo isap ocuaboi kana aingalanar acok itunga.

Aswamisinei nu kere akwamakisi ican otonga ne do kwana emonyere ekitor kesapat kalo.

Ikoni nen da ainaki do isap lo Omiito luipu epuorosi alosit taitai atamitamootoisopone lo alakun kocan aiboisin nuefwaka kwa nat Lugazi, Bunya, Kagwara toni Kampala.

Akwap na irimi, ne moi ibelokitor egagir, inye akiro opero.

Mam zong ejera arai eowam etunganan kalo epolokkittaun nesi alosit aitaanyun itunga lu ocaalo ke ican.

Ejoku Burinabas.

# Amoot eong apapero ka

IPA - Amootrong apaperoka naminat noi, Tavuga Annet.

Ageun ne itiakakitor isio ko suomero lo Kamuge High, Pallisa distrikt okara 1997 mam eong eriamuna ka Annet cut. Apapenemei kwana eong ebe emoot ngesi da eong kagegong kere.

Imsiteong airiamunka Annet noi. Arai ijai ne ijai arai bo nat kejai idio itunganan yen ejeni apese ngin kiwadikak eong ebaluwa keda asaduku naka eposta.

Akope Vicky Lilly, Hometek Academy P.O. Box 575, Soroti

# Mam adumakin Kaberamaido edistrikt erai ekia loka edinget

IPA - Engaingait koilingak apak kalimunia adis nu ikanumitos Etop lo Osokosokoma (October) 22-28 lo enerit akiro nu aurianet na ajaikina Lwala na Kaberamaido Elders Forum.

Epone lo aseumia eong mam cut adumakin Kaberamaido edistrict erai ekia lo edinget kiding Iteso ka Ikumama dimarai eraun do eussat lo ijanyitlo edinget, naaraispote de luko Soroti distrikt (Iteso) ka luko Kaberamaido district adodanar ebe "Itunga ngun" kede "Jogo".

Mam cut erai aomisioit na ecai agitar ekiala kanu naarai ebe inyamete ijo akiro etau.

Ehuni do aisub bala alungar ebe, "Kejalakosereiteso ngun

edistrict keo" Erai na aitubusnit edinget lo ber emamei da. Iboyete Iteso nepepeka Ikumamakaiboisin nuipu, konye mam cut ijo tanyani edinget.

Etei do eong bala nicolong lo edistrikt nesi eyasnit edinget nedo easseniata la ebe kejaansis icolongo iarel, Kaberamaido ka Solot, ebuni do edinget ainang.

Elosi edistrikt wok abongor tema politikit lukokue cut, apolo da epodori abongor kwapcut, kanumamaelooido kwana araun siri auno katekerin; Ikumamada aicasit ebe kotub ekumamait, Iteso da kwapekwangin, aso ebuni ibore yen aidupor itunga lu eberiang noi ido kojaaio kede

alosikinata nu ecaete nulopolonte inacio naarai aticepak ikidiokoto lu ateker ke adepar lucie.

Kotoma akiro nu aseo na LC 5 elipit eong atiakot na ka acie atakono na epone keo kojalakisi assak bon kanukue, kirereutu etuan lo easyunete kesi ikulepek ebe edolit aingarendcinkest.

Kinacata cut politikis lo atutubena. Ejaasi icie lu ivekaucita/tai ebe ekot normal ngasi eburokini eserait. Ikatunga mam cut ngin erai aitingaikinat (not compulsory). Arai kojaan etuanacie lo ideleleuniadepar lucie koinakinai nicolong karaidamamehunitko Sorere.

Dusisi Auta.

# Kodumakisi erony Otiisa agiilo, adekis

IPA - Isio lokorony Otiisa, Kanilekari etem Kanyore kas kija mimosoi kotoma adumun akipi nu elante. Kodumakinai isio agiilo kede adekis. Emaeste do itunga akipi nu ebokumane kokisin kosamai. Dodokwana kwa etepoaedou eleponorete itunga ou emanete akipi nu okisisi.

Etiang Martin

Amaso: Atemelel ka OAU nako Tese

Bari kitwania aisloom Etop ngol exabidt. Ejok no

ETOP Naiwongonet, Ouaban (November) 19-25, 1998

# Aicer nu aurio k'arerengesio

Kaine(Luokine)[Opo 21 - Orara 20]: Aikuko alitoimun aitufuketa kere kanu ikamunitos ajone kon lu ikopainkit ijo itunga naarai exubit bala akuttsii size kakesi aliokony airiyakakin ijo kilpitos da nerbe kinurok ijo. Esuburik ainkanikin nu ita mit ijo yawam kopokwani kere naarai eduro ailor kame eja iboro lu teuta ijo aswam atakanun koloma kapak kana esupiaana noi.

Angeloo[Luokip][Orara 21 - Omuk 20]: Kapite ijoda kowaikon bon. Siri ngul tulisete ijo kakonye kanu arokok kitolitototo irotin kon lu jionet asaaltu. Iryobo ican, mam bo erai ijo bon ibuni arik kes lucie da etupakitos ijo. Ejok ingareti.

Agaria[Luogaria][Omuk21-Okwang 20]: Ekoto ijo aibikakin awomosio nu ilapara noi toma ekiro nu ikamunitos ekon edukone nabarai karai paljalak ijo kes epote aitolitotoun. Ejaa kerek lu eponitos mama kon ailipit agangat na ikamunit iboro lui ipu. Karai ipedon, kingarak icle kakesi nabarai kes da eraasi lu epote aigaun ijo kotoma apak kana esubia bala etionikitor ijo do ejautene e noi.

Inerekek[Luomerekek][Okwang21-Odunge20]: Ekwakesi bo ekiro kon nu asloman aibn. Sek ijo kar edda ijo aidangidangit nu ikamunitos akon asloman. Konye ekoto ijo acakar etau to ilapara kanu ikamunitos asloman na atur kana adidi nabarai ngul kes epote araun akon aica koingaren kedjo ijo apoto kaap kikunyete nakas kilogram.

Ekosobwan[Luokosobwan][Odunge 21 - Opedelei 20]: Esabib lolo lo erai lo ijo aiyitunit ngul kere lu idunyatar ijo odum isirigin ida kotodi bere acakakin pusit yen edit orekon keda ikon tunga lu ore nepepe kangul da lu ingarakitos ijo katiokusio kon nukupokwani eneuna namakon bala ebutolo. Bwasam napana apak kanu aikeuna nu igurete ijo.

Imao[Luomuut][Opedelei 21 - Omaruk 20]: Luomuut lolo kere epol arengu na adumunit apak ka ailajara. Konye bodo mam ikwamakinete ailajara nabarai emina atukon yea ilupak. Olot barkilato iboro kon lu ijokokit ijo awupasia kon nabarai ebutokin ngas da nu ejaaksi ijo angopoi.

Onadang[Luomadang][Omaruk 21 - Onadokokingot 20]: Onadokingot 20: Imaokina do aitokuiso mama eja ipapero kon bala a imadang mntaikina toma ebanen luedakasi. Epupi ngasi ne ekda akon gangat kanu adam ailip ikakto ngul lu kopokwani edudungitos nges koipone kalo etono cur.

Engatuny[Luongatuny][Omdokokingot 21 - Otikok 20]: Yesi luongatuny netasi di bala engatunyo ikulepek. Ngupongun ijakit kupu kiyassi edodor akanin. Ingobelete luipu yeis kiyoknoi.

EbunonAbekot (Otikok 21 - Otibar 20): Akiucelat kon irikit ijo aitokuiso kama eja lu isuplarit ijo. Erai do itunga akonye ngocongoc namakon kobalai aimula racarac da. Itur kerek edeke kon nabarai ikidioks itunga lu ijakit edeke k ararengu kanat kangin kobu ijo kongesu.

Kangeng[Luokengeng][Otibar21 - Osokosokoma 20]: Ijo do bere lolo yeis kere lu erai na apak kus na aurio omisani nabarai ekotosi itunga ajenun kodazo naetie ijo ajokus eja namakus kwa kolo ijoaidatar ngul lu emorilotos kayes ikororia luaipule? Konye mam idumunete akunian ejokuka iboro kere kama kus naarai ikusiarito bobo eesoda bala edowan lobe ekosile.

Diritong[Luokiriton][Osokosokoma 21 - Osuban 20]: Elakan bala itlioro ijo aitemonokon epone lo ainya a ikon erot itaabuses koingaren. Eminasi bodo imulokolen aremun namakon lolo bala ikok kotamitos asatikon ipi aijoreta nu ebe enyekkit edeke kotam a ipakto lukotosek. Ekoto bodo ijo akunubdit alout ingaren kede idope ibore bon yen isaku ijo aswam. Kunsan ijo ipadori aswam kinyekk.

Akabwa[Luokabwa][Osuban21-Orara 20]: Epone lo ibamitor ijo ainga ejautene erai lo ijakit tunga kupu amuriamur akwera nabarai etakani bala itupit ijo erot lo ajokan. Epone lo itisakitor ijo e iyun nu abeit aswam ekotokin akon acowa kere. Ekoto da bodo ijo akiaun apak na abeit kanu eilalam nu ikamunitos akon aswam kede itungeren yen ejoatatar apedorosio. Kacai ngaren noi kanukon.

# Aluiki eifaro 'papake'

Na William Okello

ETUAN lo ebe Ejadu ka abanake Ahulo lu Ongaroi koitela Monsinera, kotem Orango, nges ebe eifaro kibunga, ebe kana arahakin apolon Levi Enchu ebe osudi. Kwagmiannon ngon 13.10.98.

Abu ber eifaro ke kitekora epolon Enchu ore Ejadu ka kundi aiulissikin alato. Abu do eifaro kinenges Ejadu ka abanake kinga, ne ajat Enchu. Ahula eifaro ebe, "Ejadu, ijo aynan isin ebe osudi epolon Enchu, konye kimo isin onke kere, mam isin kidamunit edin ekia."

Abu do eifaro kogna aibunga Ejadu ka abanake kobala ebe, "Ijo Ejadu nges osud, mere apolon lo".

Abu do eifaro kitelem egade 5,000/- kanu ainyakarin non.

# Koany Satana, ikoni neta

Etuan loko Peru eburit eree ke kede aputo na ikeunitai kwape Satana kotingite bobo aputo na Augusto Pinochet kakou ke kitepegite alacakino naka Pinochet lo ikamunitai ko Britain kanu ebe iyarito ka aitoolionorio na itunga ilukumin kapakio nu epagator ngesi Chile.

# Ebungai aberu kanu ebileng

Na John Olapot

ETUAN lobe Martin Aurien lo katutuberna Ojolai, kotela Apapai, Otuboi nges ebe kokwamak na owaike Ester Amalo aroma aisiloor cut kapak na eaharu (9.10.98).

Erai Aurien akikan ibilenga loda anaikit ainyam alungsa napo cut apolok. Konye kapak kangin abu akebera kokorak ngesi ibileng yen adite noi. Kinga aurion ocie edia, abu amara kobengok nges ebe adusna odia. Orwa kopotu akiro. Ahula aurion ebe, "Eong ekanyi ican ailok edia, kibamarana yei kore, do konyet akorakin oong idia yen emamai ikerat?"

Ajipet kiwonyakini aipongaanar aberu, toni ya aiitor cut.

# Abeli lo agitakini aberu ekai akou

Na Nam Ekadu

ETUNGANAN lo katutuber nako Telamot, kotem gweri, Hotery Ogwere, nges ebe kobubarikaberuke, Margaret Amunyo, atapakou, ebe kana aicebokit aikad nges ibo. Ewamaunongurkakoware na 25.10.98.

Abu do amunyu da kokadak kosodi aibel Ogwere akou emine noi.

Abala Amunyuebemamerai

abeli ebe icebokit ngesi erai abeitebe icebokit ngesi aikud okilenike, konye okilenikenes angara nges. Eyatakit da ebe agitakit da Ogwere nges ekai ke bosi?

Konye ahula Ogwere ebe arai Amunyu alopet nes agitar logo ko, ebe kobala ebbe amujong ngesi.

"Konye ereko kere isin kere aiketamwaka, nami mamisin kidolioikano60," ahula Ogwere.

# Kaurianut

## Ekimat eluk

ESKIPAN karenna loka PAO korony Kerekwa kotem Kidongole nges apote kitegelia 60,000/-, akauks na ekamunere ngo eluk kede aberu etuan lo utekerke.

Abu ber esilipan lo koker toni Soroti, akauhi na ekamunere nges. Konye keterau aijar ke Soroti, abu kobungo ocadio ke. Apota do ipajan ke kocamara aineran mot mat. Atakamunere npat kelap lo Otiktok, okam tepedu.

Na A.O.S

## Kanupo atap

ESAPAT Anu Charles loko Kame! Mukera nges ebe kibunga aberu ke toni aisiloor cutube marui mam ya ededia nges atap. Abu Anu kobel onaceke lo ebe Tadrosha mat, kokonengol aidiek kes. Aponi kitegelia Anu 7,500/-, akokon isaarei ka zimeke aberu ke ka onaceke.

Eswamaunong ngon araasi 8.10.98.

Na Tolbert Edait

## Akonyar akituk

ABERU nache Perepesta Alulo, ngesi abu kokonya okilenike lo ebe Ekodeu 1/kanebaku akituk nakokwap, kiteni afikor cut, Atakamunere ngon araasi 22.10.98.

Ketemakin simo akituk na akonyarit ya, kanu ti adonyokot kadokko konye mam aponi kodumunai. Asulaki do Ekodeu akituk iswommi.

Na Edait Tolbert

## Ejijim emuduk

ANGOR sarei kes apoto kodusata awate kanu amarie emuduk lo ebe Oonya lnda koitela Moraria. Eswamaunos ngan araasi 9.10.98. Erai Oonya araman akongo.

Abu Oonya kiwomunote aberu acie, limilda Akwi ainyam euru oreke. Kedel ya ngina, abu aberu k Oonya nache Maria Aisu kijangesejak, kwape abalar Oonya ebe arai ya apajanake.

Eewar akwap, apota iboro kijulakinno, kitoni angor nu aprim adisa awate amaria emuduk. Aponi do kirengiarai Akwi toto iye.

Na John Adams Apodel

# Eyetata ekamunak eluk aroma

Na Nato O. Akwang

ITUNGAiarsi, Samuel Peter Ewela ka David Otim, la kocaelolo Amankwar, koteda Ogwolo, kotem Anyara, kes apotukomatataaroma, akauhi na etuan lo alositos kesi aikamun eluk aibelokin aibunga kesi. Eswamaunos ngun araasi 4.10.98.

Esungananloebe Alex Ejomu nges ayangasiri Eweluka Otim oreka ka Jaafar Ocudu, ti

singarakin nges aikamun Ocudu eluk kede aberu ke (na Ejomu) na ebe Tereza Iluma. Apotu Iluma kugimikinus ka Ejomu Apotu do Iluma kaupanos ka Ocudu kitoni Ocudu ayangasir nges oreka. Ajanasi Itradakediraberisacie. Kukuwan na 4.10.98 apotu Ejomu ka itunga ko iwongon kotedams ore Ocudu kanati aikamun nges eluk kede Iluma. Apotu do kesi

kolomakiyi acakanar apongoru togo, tetere Ocudu elomunikinga.

Anireng na aronon, apotu apongor kodonto togo lo aperisto Ocudu kede aberu kesa apolon. Kelomu Ocudu, kinga, abu Ejomu kiposiar akerii, kinyakok ipaupko iyarei kaisen.

Abu do Ocudu kokwamak ngul agwerret, kwape da ameratotor.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Osabun (Novemba) 19-25, 1998

IYEMOTO LU OBUKUI

# KAURIANUT

## Ecwei ere

Na Patrick Edair

EKASILA lo ebuwikit ingwalasik kosen Kapir Ibonir Ochan ngasi pac abu akim konyama itogoi ke ikanyapoi siditenedi operbon, Abuakim konyama ibono lu ipu luda odeparroisiackoc 300,000/∞.

## Agangat

Na Michael Ongwaru

ATUKOT makiyakotau Compassion International (CI) korai na edini nada eblunni ko United States of Americanosi ebeitaijasmakin abwek30 lu omamexepime ko Pallisa distrikt agangat naka 90.7m/-kangelkaru.

## Edokukin 107

Na Mwalimu Akubway

INSHOP Gemuon Ilukorngosi pac abu kidokok itunga 107 asiokku nako Kapir Ngora. Altemunitos itunga lu kotoma okanisan (yare), Agirigimi itunga 67 krandi Kapir 40.

Abu Ilukor kicorak ikuristeyon atitinga kotoma aingarenikit itunga kadoketa nu egelege.

## Awolio ikoku

Na Ewadikan Etop

IKOKU yeni ikaru ikanyasmi, Alupo akooka Eiki Obutoi lo Aukot - Gweri, Soroti ngesi awolioagroniarasai 28.10.98 naiwumet.

Ayangaro Eiki (Omanyegou) Rakas lo iwamai Kumi Hisipital (Ongino) kwape Norung itul, ikoku aihoyo k Ongino, konye ebe abu ikoku koper Ongino apaarai adiope bon, koto.

Ewanyunitai ebe ikoku yeni ederit erot aibe eigo Kumi, asapit ngesi egoe ekapira lo eraagilokayiot kojai amopira angabet.

Eyoku: eyengu kopolitik

Na Gilbert Engimu

LOSEK arai eyakia lo ehuku Ngora kainabet na etemitemi ikolia luekentetusion (C A)ko Uganda pat, Sarnari Eoku ngo pac abu kolimok Etop ebeeyengudo berngesikakiro naka politiki. "Ipa eong nu ebeitaswam, kosodi ipu hobo itunga lu edari eong," abala ngesi.

"Atwakata eong inacari ka are yarei, edoipu enyekikiktor eong idwe ejai hobo amoping (totoke) nen," eyatakit Ejoku, Kosodi hobo ebe ekot ngesi airic ke na ituturo egesi, naka ansisanakintetere ebe kadilo ngesi atiyengan kodumuni aropio ke. "Esalitos kwana eong ikaru ikanyarei Kedol okaru2005, keyengueoeong," abala ngesi.

Ajalak do ber eong politiki kwangin." abala Ejoku kotakari akwenakuyapestke ne epejokitor Etop ngesi.

# Egiraki Omaaset Museveni ebalua

Na William Otaala

APOLONokolong LC Hotem Osukuru, Tororo, Gerald Omaisetngesegiraki President Yoweri Museveni aikwenyaret na epeleikitor etem ke aipajokin nges ko Rwakitura ka aisutanukin aseuno kwape apolon ekolong loka emuvument.

Ejsasi nu aisiraret naka apaarasia 22.09.98 na idokokitoitunga 19 akanin kec la da imoriariato ikasilan luko Osukuru, ayutok iriengeta apugan kede ipolok.

Abataaisiraret ebe ilipilokesi adolokin Museveni ko Rwakiturs katu aisialamikin nges aseuno apolokin ekolong loka emuvument.

# Enyarito veterans Saleh

Na William Otaala

ABONGUNOK kajere kojami luko Tororo distrikt kes etutuhoto aiworoun Maj. General Salim Saleh apolokin asahon nu etukanere apiya inu edukauotu kesi agwelaaaret ker na itemitai ebe ebuui akotokita 120m/∞.

Etububionu ko Tororo kolaplo atubor ne atukaru kamhoko hala 150 kana aitogogong ebujet loka atukio na apesan kanganeraasi 28.11.98. Abala apolon ekolong lo akunganak, Richard Okodoi ebe etutuhoto kesi aiworoun Saleh lo ebe ajeni atiukusio ker kwape da ebe epolokitor ngesi ajory na eyengunak (Reserve Force) na ejaasi kesi da.

# Esisia Ajesa apedorosio idwe

Na Patrick Edair

ESOMAk lukotionget loka Red Barnet lo itolosi auwamisio nu eyaaritere apedorosio naka idwe ka asduk isomeroi ko Kumi kesi apotekisisianakisi itunga luko

Ajesa Kapir, Ngora apedorosio nu idwe paa.

Atapiton Programme Manager, Anna Akwangu ka eswamak ke Irene Achom Okaka ka Simon Oksengkeu etolerete ansisanakin na.

# Ekamun etuan loko Congo

Na Michael Ongwaru

ETUNGANAN loko Democratic Republic of Congo lo ebe Mike Swale, 29, ngesi pac apotu eswamak lukoyapesi e DISO ko Pallisa kikamutu ka atturakin aiwen Polis nako Pallisa kemam ecarte nu ikamunitere nges.

Abu Swale kolimok Etop kadokis ne eperiktere nges oitada bokanyetkowetokitere ipligoi kwape ebe mam ngesi ajeri iboro ekamunitere nges.

# Atiakinos acolonin ko Kaucho PS

Na Michael Ongwaru

ACOLOONPnako Kaucho Boys P/S koigo Pallisa kesi apotu kaitukim pac neda kwana eruar esisiak 927 aitimonokin aitosom icoloni yen mojongyea agelaikakany.

Apolon esomeru kalo John Baptist Adupa ngesi etijenikini Etop na kalaro na osomeru ke.

Abala ngesi ebe acolounin nu apotu kibiroro

araasi nu agolaik 12 mu nduamitos ikaru ikanyape bon.

Abala da Adapa ebe esahit bula mam adakok erikitos esewa nu agogongok acolounin neda abunio edoa kiyogiyoga apaaraa ngin katiyaikinda.

Idwe kesi do kwana ijonyanarete acoolonin nako Pallisa S.S ka ukelesia ne idunyatar aiganganakin.

# Iboomun: Etepeseni Omaani kokooti

Na William Otaala

LO kolo arai abenyan lokutui Sam Omaani, 12, ka itunga icle ikanyikape kesi etepeseni kadieket nako Tororo kanu ebe adakikijisio komameatar kede apedori.

Etepesenio Omaani kakonye atubon Sanya Bashekana araasi 13.11.98 akuelo isirkalei luko UPDP Division 1, Mbale aikamun kosodete atturakin polis nako Tororo araasi

1.11.98

Abala Bashekana itijenikini Omaani kadieket ebe mam nges olope aberi aipupu emusaago lo itepesenitere Omani idymarai aberi do nges asdarean adieket na adoketari na ikeikina adepar nake.

Aponi ber koyangarai Omaani awenit orimanda kawemii nako Morukatipe.

Abala aitiepesenetke Omani ebe araasi 8.09.98 ko solo B

Zone, Busia Town Council nesi aponi kodumunere ngesi edakit egununet.

Lucie ikanykape kesi sek arucunio ko Busia distrikt kosodete aitipesenko Tororo kana ebe adumunere edakito iisiso lo ek waka komamutar kapedor Imoriarito ngul Joseph Emery Engangui, Baraza William, Kano Mbulu Geoffrey, Wanshede James Karim Were ka Sehi Oketa.

Apolon ekolong LC5 Kumi, Hajj Umar Okodoi (lo akupira) kotapakite nges atubon Sanya. Opeven edukarete ates atubon Opolot loko Kumi uilit pac. Aputo nu inumsi Chro Ochma.

# Emua lo etem nu aijul ekiror Kapir

Na Gilbert Engimu

APOLONaten Kapir kebuku Ngora, Michael Opolot, nges mam igangit aomissot na abalutar LC o kaijakakotem ke ebe mamaaijulakin ekitor arauni. Akapel apedori aijul aomisso ka aswaminteni nu itunga.

Ketoma apapula na Etop lo Osuban 3.11.98 etolomunitai eripoote ebe etutubitos ikasilan ka ijaka ebe kijulai ekitor lo etem naarai ebe

Pallisa abala ebe amamector Swale kede adio papulai kere arai da idemite card nu epedorere

aiyen aras antediar nges ibore da yen ebe ay aunit abuonokin ebe arai aizepak ngesi etunganan lo arimon.

Eperikitai ezairan lo adekis naaria ebe adeka ingalar.

Abala Swale elopet ebe erai ngesi lem abolian edisko ko California the Kampala, konye kiboyite ko Kiumyi (Kampala) adaan ikaru ikanayare.

# NgORA

esurumit lolem, Kapir, kesi deic.

Abala Opolot ebe ekoto itunga luko Kapir ajann kede aomisso nu eminasi aitopol bukei, kasiduk akway "mure alimit ajod ekiror, koritos itunga".

Apolon Solomon Engimu ngesi abala ebe edumunitai ekitor. Akapel kanu emoru lo

ejai bala amairo adroan anyono kosilukki leko Kapir.

Apolon Nelson Yeom, 41, engarenon ikuristeyon Nge eba la ebe etutumis kite elpolounongria ebe ipa apu la edila azuleacal akwaa kokapelouakamuktekebina edou nes adumuta emu ngol ekiror Okapir.

Mam nesi da apei ekitor apolon kangon konye ebe etutemiso ngen aiamen.

# Mbale ingarenikit kocamusana - IGC

Na Ipenideva Edyama

APOLONENETOMIGGko Uganda, Jotham Tumweugye nges alimu ebe Mbale nesi ipu iripootan lu elimitere ecamuna koyapesi ke.

Tumwesugye lo enera katukokina na ajaikina St. Andrew Catholic Church Mbale kanu ansisanakin LCs ipinesa ludidisaaret ecamusana ko Mbale ngesi abu kelime na kodistriktan keere luko Uganda, Mbale nesi apu iripoota kukamumitosi ecamusana eyapesi ke lu ebeit aangis.

Kauranet kana na apaarasia aares, apuwan 12-13 Novemba nesi apotu LC s kolimunata rebe iriengetaluang walakowaikite ecamusanako Mbale distrikt kesi emoriaritoa Polis, angatida amukian, ikootin apugan ka apugan nako atutubena.

Abakasi ijaka lu ebe edila itunga awenio ko Mbale abu komam engicso akiro na ikamenemere kesi. Akadukit kesi kana ediar atwanare adekisia nuka apugan naarai ebe akoko ikes.

# Etur Osire Okapia

Na Jonathan Maraka

MP lo Bukedra, Jackson Osire ngesi abu kintem atwanare naka lokolo arai ekalaani korionget lo aisssia (Created Towers), James Charles Okapiuk wage airwaisir etuan lo egangit anker, kacot Iteso. Enera Osire kapak na edaere Okapia koreka lo Kidongole, Bukedra, araasi 7.11.98.

Abala Osire ebe arai Okapia

kaipajamaka John Charles Outeka kesesis agangion apolokita isomeroi luko Teso kapak ioma eje, atukonok inka nkiipusuk aowadikarta ka akiro na ejaasi iyapesin kagodok korionget lo aisssia. Abu da ebe kingarunak eswamak lu po adonarakit apiyai kec nuka aiyengun korionget lo aisssia.

Lokoloarai For muncen Sir rotary korionget lo angatru, Nethery Obore, ngesi eitunit Okapia kwape Etesot lo apna asi ke Kampala ido kimorikikitenoi itunga lu ateker.

Loatwan Okapia

ETOP Naiwaagonet, Ouaban (November) 19 - 25, 1998

# Etitingikin apugan nakokiding awenis

## KATAKWI

Abu Ekiapakusamaebredoni ber edistrikt aryatakit singaranakin awenis na koipone kalo agwalanakin zweman inyamat, sitac iropitu eswamak kede sitenomokin atiokonio nu edoinkinete awenis.

Abala ACP Edanyo ebe aloni ngesi aitam aineranar ka ariongetakala ajokexautetere metomo adoketa nu awenis. Alomokit Ocakara ipejok ke ebe adoketemu abeitewamak awepis apero, oponi komakimainwamak haspolok tu edistrikt, ido ebe kwapekwana loepolokit awenis nako Katakwi, Ejkt Onyait ngesi hon sjai etogo.

## Kipitata ibaren - CAO

Na Peter Okiot!

CAO loko Katakwi, Nicholas Maron Ocakara ngesi elip anapoloko Katakwi napi ibaren kana alemaru ibakor kokaba

Endomenic! AO Filipina kaparanara apakusongoni konni ka ariongetokinere ikamilan loko LC 3 kotemwan loko Saretta, kapajama Magorolodo ajaklana Toroma pac.

Abala CAO Ibe arat eponi itunga apjel atokocot, ikafafalan apoloko agwalanakin inyamat ker, kolapio iyarei hon endomenim itunganan apiyai na igangukimor ka aitimom apiyai.

In the matter of the areas of the late Dhabangi Silvency of Kiniba, Aizimba, Bukanga, Luaka, Iganga District Uganda and

In the matter of an application for Produce/Intricts of administration by Irigala after Mary Widow of the Deceased NOTICE OF APPLICATION The Administration of Estates (Small Estates) Probate and administration Rates 1972 TO WHOM IT MAY CONCERN

TAKE NOTICE: that an application for probate of the well/brown of Administration in the estate of the late Dhabangi Silvency has been lodged in this court by Itigala Alice Mary widow of the said deceased. This court well proceed to grant the name if no caviar is lodged with this court within fourteen days from the date of publication of this Notice, unless cause be shown in the contrary. 2443ED at Iganga this 21st day of September, 1998.

# Alimonoreta nuatitai

# Bukedea SS

Apolon Esomero Bukedea SS, iworot eassan lukoto kosomero kalo ajarko auranet Namukage erassi 28.11.98 isawan iwongon lu atupuruc. Ejakin auranet esomero lispato.

# Iworotai luta

Egingiran CAO-Memorial Trust, Kachumbala, kokiror loka ekaile loka abuton Charles Aleko Okia iworot Aleko Henry, Dr. Ogwang S. Omoding S. Eyalita: Omoding M. Okello P. Aleko E. auranet erassi 20.12.98 kore Kongunga.

# Aseun Emorimor

Vance Omome lo ICU ilipil iyakia luka ICU lu pac aseunio abunere aseun Emorimor erassi 21.11.98 kosomero lo Soroti SS.

# Na Narikan Estona

IKWENYI loka amagoroka lu ore da, kore erassi lu asurup kane ejai akorion naarai enyamate ikorion.

Ehala ebaibuli ebe 'koseumala akweny nuka apak, mam eyeste karsida aidweny, karsidaabukonokin omono, konye itanyami kes papa lokonoma akuj." Ejaasi nguni Matayo 6.25.

Ejaasi iboro lu enyamete ikweny lu mam ebeites akorion, kwape nat araitonuka ikito luka amagoro ka inya lu okitwi. Ngun kes ejastata ikweny apak ionu mam akwap ekonitor.

Kedul aiporo konodete ikorion sobwang, etapit ikweny luka amagoro abwosikriramisirieno akontok sinyam ikorion kwape nat akima, imomwa, omawele, emosori, imare, ekmidali ka icieda.

Kwangin kedul apak nuka aisak ikorion ngul emina akorion aduman atwaniar na epol naarai ingongnorete ikwenyikorionk misori. Arai kitor itungana i misori na ekorikitaiaikima arai imomwa etapit akweny adusoi aporor kane anyamiata ales arai imomwa, aitelekaarimoi apak na icokiataakwes nuka akima ka imomwakaimare. Emulalu da lopo edwar ejaasi ikweny lu emonas sinyam.

Ketaku akorion myamat ke eloikini ber alaro kano aitoon eroko kingadakina odula. Apak ngin naka aile nes asurokinataakweny na ipisio kore kwape nat akikorei, arudoi, ikulukulun isakan kalaro Katsidascia lu amagoro eminas adtwapar iboro lu elotiaralaro.

Ejaasi ragan icia lu eminas ikweny asurokin kwape nat epapali, anyanyaka akwiikede aturo nu idiaso icia.

Etapit ikweny lu amagoro amassamun myamat arai idiasa kanoirira kona ikorion.

# Ejaasi kwana ikee lu imukeet ecooro lo akokore

# NJA MEmak

ERAI ecooro erai adeka na aokot na ikamuni akokorei atipet. Ijamuneta lu ecooro kane ejai akokor imoriariton eiyenga ka amwanas aikiar kupu, itajaki akure, isimok sinyam, isiboboni ne elibana.

kodesoikite. Ikeonyi akokorei, itwakangi naarai itidisaeriaokite.

Ekorut lo enyaritai salmonella galemuran nesiryauni ecooro. Ikopa ekurut lokonoma akipi ka myamat lu eroko arai luimodomoda. Kelemaneejai akokorebekani

Kotoma aparasia 4 asui 8 kotakasunakokorodeka. Eari akokorei 30 toni 80 kangan kwatat.

Arai kejengi akokor natwan edamunio emany ka etida ebuanitosnoi idokirajakakas, kolibaana emanyi' ido konyanganyangate.

Edamunio ekulian da ebuanit kamoteka, elalaar etau ido kobuanite emukule. Ingalans ka auries ke da ebuanite kosoidi aciepak elalaros aswororyo.

Kanu sitigogong ebe ecooro eldeka akokor koyanga nes nejar emuron lo iberen kanu

Eswamak luko Kitgum Distrikt ewanyanarete imomwa komisiri. Ekor akorrok kojeneet 1998

idares iraan kec, tetere mam ikweny icanicanete. Epaio nai inumis Justine Moro.

Engi ikonodakokorei, ikonodake naaraon, ikonodidebataare ebe koye etai ka kanu sinyam. Koyin lukepone kane iwikane akorion enatoni le the. Ehalaaiboko engi, akobane kelalak anusimmon, koyin mam etapit ikweny ebe kiding naasi. Aibekas akwes nu ejaasi imu ka amosiri. Kosoidi ebe anus kola ide kobayne iky kewaitin koraamirime, koyin lukasurup icorionna amana kwape nat amote, ikonodide ebaikha etang isa.

Egaasi irwanar na omakirete ikweny lu eporiton kokodeta akorion emuori kupakin nu eraya. Kwangin ejai akorion adukokin elukutun misori na emuori ke do ebwosi ngesi aibisikanu atwaranar akweny kede aporocet.

Kolema ber eyaurit ikorion koipone loka atwaranar ikweny apak na icokiata ikorion netas lukangisak (reissu-ther-jiapape)kinyom luka akima, imomwa, ka emucere lu egogongikin ikweny atodotod komisiri.

Engare ikweny akima ka imomwa lu monok icok kec. Ejaasi kwana epatoua nuka ikinyomluka imomwakwape nat. Soroti-ka. Selusite keda lu akimakwapena(224.11.15 ka PESK.

Acowa acie nes akoru ekinyamit lo emomwai lu sopae kuja net. Mam ikwenye iboikin sinyam akou kemomwai kangol naarai kadno ikwaany toma ke ehala maganiag, kokarianar. Ekinyomit ece nes lo isokodikiti akou ailur kwap.

# MADERA REHABILITATION CENTRE P.O. BOX 44 SOROTI

# VACANCY

Applications are invited for the post of Assistant Physiotherapist

Qualifications: Nursing Aid, S4 leavers willing to have a training may be considered.

Women are encouraged to apply.

Applications must be posted or delivered to the above address immediately. Interviews shall be held on Tuesday 24th Nov. 1998 and Tuesday 1st Dec. 1998 beginning from 9.00 am each day. For more information contact Mr. Engoru John Robert, Chairman Management Committee, Madera Rehabilitation Centre.

All applications should be addressed to:

The Secretary Management Committee, Madera rehabilitation Centre, P.O. Box 449, SOROTI.

# ALIMORET

AT (UGANDA) nesi enyarit lu ejaasi keda acuman nuka Ram Press kere Su eganilime ko At (Uganda) kede aiboiso acie da), nepepe keda eswamak kes iyarei lu essawante ekinyet ejaikin aitutuore na apaarasia aarei.

Egaari aitutuore isawan ikanyapa apaaran nasodit kosodi angetakin isawan ikanyapa apaaran na etupi. Idumakinio yes myamet konye ngin itunganan ansodit epane lo alosit kede lo apero.

No ebeit aitodelikin imoriaritos:

- Eipone lo itusamaet ka aitamanskin acuman
- Ekinyomit lo e sunflower luitetet
- Eipone legwalanaret ekinyet keda acuweta (seed cake)
- Eipone lo itsloset ebisines lo aica ekinyet
- Eipone ebutubena eu acuman (Rain Press) nu enyamuna. Koyauna atutubet asaibon ko na ekoto aijulakinio.

Eponio aitolot aitutuore na epone lota:

| Edistrikt | Albeisit |
| Katakasi | Community Centre |
| Soroti | Soroti County H/Quaters |

Apaarasia

4-5th November, 1998

7-8th Nov. 1998

AOMISIO

ETOP Naiwaegonzi, Osubao (Noventia) 19-25, 1998

# Akerutu isap ko Lugazi

AISISIA KA ANGALEU

# Esibwou Pallisa HMiiarei

Na MichaelOngwara

APOLOKSTOK isomerisi asni luka purnimare ko Pallisa diistriki keni etwolkoan kopelinkkei kano ebe asniyap adukto na isomeron kex ko projeki luka. Primary School Facilitator (PRISFAC).

Ikampussin lu ken edukete atukono nu isomaron kalu keni da aponi kilobwostasi kano ebe akalintyanut.

Etegeogongoro nu arsasi 29.10.98 kararanet na asipokit araciokristiton PRISFAC, EngineerOwins-kedutCAOka erionget lo aisisia kodistriki ko PallisaCommunityCentre aitattam epona lo eisisin epoijekti odistriki.

Apelon esomero Akwamor PS, Manjari Adude kede Stanley Onyage loko Akuero PS kere kebuku Pallisa keni ekuptasi ebe ejwalaamitos alosikinetanukse projektikalo kosentermoker.

DEO/Pallisa,PreduamKibule neni da aponi kicorakinai akorakin idimantan la abaluwan nu aitobwoun keni katipet.

Apugan nako Britain neni elemunit apiai 647m³+ kano adukorokron ngol esomero atukono aongon.

MP nangor ko Kumi, Christine Amongin Aporu ikopakini etuan ediope lo Malera ainakinet na elemunit erionget loka CARE-Kumi asiiyalamikinia ngesi kana engarakitor erionget lo aiduk adekisia aarei kotem kec. Aputo: Osekany

# Ekunyu IMSAT Soroti

Na Martha Akello

ESOMERO lo ejena kwape Institute of Management and Technology (IMSAT) lo ejai Mbale neni ebeit aikopun Soroti agnan 21.11.1998, etijena lo erai Director of Studies kosomero ka ngol, Ejit Kalinga Nisyago.

Eyatakit Kalinge ebe elosi asinmar ajaikikin ngin Mukaga agnan esawan iwani lu atupunui kitoni ikanyasni lu apsaran. Egeunio da kede Project Planning and Management kotapakinete do icin ikousin.

Ejaikinos atukono nu adukatait naka Soroti District Private Sector Promotion Centre. Euta da aiwadikaun alosit akotiye kadukmati kangipengin.

"Itosomainiose eyilabuoloko kintinister/Centre for Continuing Education loko Makerere University idu isisianakini isio no nuikamunitos aitopol icasloi," abala Kalinga.

# Emuun 3

Na Felix Onigo

ABERU na ebe Amuge Christine na ikaur 30 kokosmaite Obalanga Katakwi district neni abu kima iduwe isai fapener kadakin nako Soroti arsasi 3.10.98.

Abala Amuge ebe ti ngesi idousit ikedwe kere ejok, konye abu ikoku yea angetakina ngesi aidoun koranaewanarenuarui abu ngesi apogonguna idinyonet kodaan.

# Ejaiki Japan APDI 42m³+

Na Mwalima Akabway

APUGAN na Japan nena dae ejaiki erionget loka African Participatory Development Initiative (APDI) $ 14,962 (eriakaikeda 42,000,000) + 1, kano adukto atukono akanyasni esomero kaino PS, Malera, Bukedea.

Asubut na ejautere isirigin lu keni ajaikina Kampala oyapeni toebwoikiten Japan ko Uganda, arsasi 29.10.98.

Apolokiton APDI, Samuel Johol Emuron ngesi adokokini akan okitor lo APDI kusadi abwoikiten Japan ko Uganda, Yonero Otake, aidokokin okitor lo apugan ke.

Abala Otake ebe igangit Japan asinman metisai CPEJ na itolosi apugan wok.

"Ijai kwana isio iuta aisisisuneporedo ejok kano aiiwamunar keda apugan na Uganda kowai lo aisisia."

"Acamunit cut eong ebe eponio aitwasam isirigin lu koiponekalo ebeitor, kotoma aswam da na itebsikitsi," eyatakit Otake.

Abala Emuron, isialamik apugan na la ebe erai na agangat na etakanunit akado APDI sineranar ka ere lo abwoikitere Japan okaru 1996 koroko ber ejai

Emuron KBA

Kenya

Ajei da MP to be Kumi, Christine Aporu modam na

Abu Amongin Ajei ayaitok Apey anipedori kanyasni adolere Kami kami angang konya.

Abu Emuron atiijemiksa Empire City, Kami itunga luka kano isomeroi kere la APDI ekokutikin ebe amatatalin, nitrin ko amoru, tenen do kami ebenen.

"Erai ber na ajen kear eboisina apiyar na etai Eningeren," ken eba ni ewanan, "abul Dungar."

Ejai kwape kwana isi e bu eduki isomerisi 14 kano purnimare nepran ka kena luka einisko Kami.

# Epone lo itikokinet ekolera

Tetere aiku ekolera, adeka na ailep na ededeng kakere, iburai aidar aila ejok noi. Imorianti aidar icoloonin kolaete, ailosenen akanin akaulo na aitosom ecolooni ka airapit inyamat

ABHAWOUH AIDAR na ekolera kaiboiso nu ipu ko Uganda ka akwapor acie nuko East Africa kosaibitin idu lu atuboros ido aar itungaru ipu. Konye erai ekolera adeka na kipedori oni aitikokin arai kitup oni ikisila lu aidar aila.

# Inyobo ekolera?

Ekolera nes adeka na ebono noi na eyangauni aiepor. Einakini ekolera itunganan ailep akipi ka ailek noi. Egear ngesi katipet tai.

Edauri do ekolera akipi kaikuwan kitunganan katipet, kodisiat itunganan agogong, kotwani da, aciepak akaulo na isawan iuni arai woongonbon, arai mam yen adekan edumunitamukan na abeit katipet.

# Inyobo ayauni ekolera?

Ikur lu ejaasi akoit itunganan kayeri adeka ekolera, kes eyaunete ekolera ikamunetedo ice itunga da adeka ng arat kematata sa-po da adeka na arai kematata akipi lu ejaasi ekurut lo (kotoma obar ka alekan).

Kibit ekaete ka asabuni
Aakaule na atiyusun ocolani
Auraka kitinga inyamat
arai aleyan

Ekora da ekolera arai kitingitingataitunga ebar ka alekan nu ituan kayeri adeka ekolera, do konye bobo atingting inyamat, akipi arai akeputian ka asaanin komam ilositos akanin.

Ne etapit adumanakin ekolera nes agana nu aponok, arai nu mam ipotke ejok, ka inyamat ice lu angololin, araitska idisasio

lu ejokitos, ka inyamat ice lu adoo ekolera toma nape ipoyo.

Amat akipi nu adaun ekolera adore toma, nes ecee epono to ekorar adeka na.

Anyouni atiaketait kalepor na duc.

Ekora ekolera atipet ido esurwonokin itunga lu ipu kaimoriant. Kipedori oni aisibwoun aisiarakin na ekolera koponesio kaluta:

- Arai elepi ituan akipi duc. duc ido kolekida, korurukaar nges adekis katipet.

- Kipurak ekia lo eyari ikur obar ka alekan kayen kadekate, ka oboro kere lu itosomaingesi. Kowahy da ebe itungakere itosomaete acoloon ido idarete kas kolaete.

- Kinyatak ekia lo eari ikur toma akipi nu ilosere icoloonin.

- Iburai itunga ailot akanin kec keda issabuuni akaulo na aitosom ecolooni.

- Kidor akipi kerenu matan kanu ikiseti asaanin, nu ipoet inyamat.

- Kisukunya icu konyamat na ocoloonin.

# Iwanyuneta

Ekwangakwangat ebar, bala akipi nu ipoltere emuceeri ibane yen adekan iwani ipu. Eteki da ngesi noi ido ekwanguuni

ngesi, kobenearakuwa da atipet budurkit ng eyangane da.

# Nu edidit awan

Kiddisia adaur na ekope kopone kalo aitoma adekan akipi ka inan ice lu ipu (mere asin Adau na akipi akue kitunganan nes eyareneneitungakere aciepak kotona asaanaa aun na aongon ben, ara na isunyakitai amida korurukaara yen adeka adekis katipet.

# Arai ketwana itunga iburai ebworok abo nuta:

(1) Ainuk ates kala Mere aidartisi lu ewa.
(2) Mam atuko na te epi ates.
(3) Mam ailotka ating ates
(4) Kiddia anyamanyane kaibworo
(5) Kimikata itunga edarete etemonokinete abwara, adooneara inyamat.
(6) Kizany ebe ico itunga akanin eok kede asabunon etkektro no inyamat.

ETOP Naiwongoast, Otabau (Novemba) 19-25, 1998

# Enepaki Amuge Engulu kanu adalac einer

Amuge: abu inep

Engula Soroti ikokolak apolooko ebe abdu Engulu ebe arai ngesi (Amuge) da akokolap.

Kejenski Engulu ebe bala atonyunit ngesi akim abu

Engula: etironikis kitironiko.

Abuamuge kilipapolokaitim
ngesii kanu anyunyura kobala
eke "Bane v ber nen."

Ko Kalaki ne sek ber bobo
ajakina eisupane lo abwaak

Otekat: ayaani abarak kafu eni evadikaten Peterase
Ahlhe ebe abu CAO kilip
abwaak aiaic senoroniikin ka
esiontifucin. Konya ebe akoto
keni aterrikin aneik aloukineta
ken nu ekotoikeni aitodolikin

arai kenoun.

Alimani Amugengun akaolo
na Elyau esionti iyaapeke.
Abala Elyau ebe mam iyaapa
ke apediente ainerunar kede
president Yoweri Museveni.
Ebe ekot ngesi ben lo eputosi
akou ke kedir naka Museveni.

Eyatakil Elyau ebe mam
Engulu lo sek ber arai apedon
eicolong LC 5 kokaaudo
lomejongapederiawarn idio
bore kenun bobe.

Engulu ngesi abala ebe
ekapakina awarn nu niani
umanibato ka topo kolejo
kokani liko Bote.
Kami aitodolikin
bore kena, abu ten Ekadu
pudormatikak Etop kaolo
enguladakingana aurianet
nede atianulo loka LC5
warun liantalina kisaditi
kato.

abala Ekadu ebe koleje
eke aeyarauuitos kesi

# Akoraki Red Barnet Amalera akinei 26

Na Mwubina Akabway

ATUKOT nakaanger koitela Kazade-Malera, Bukesha, Popular
Kumi Women's Initiative (PKWI) nasi akora akinei 26 mama
ejassi aranehannu adokotkei erassi 5/11/98 kasubannu ajalkina
osomero Kazade P.S akasilo akinei aurari.

Erassi nu akinei nu sek ejakini Kumi Children's Project (Red
Barnet) anakotna PKWI kanu aitam ainei iwaitin lu itijiet-bakor
ka aitujokar ejautena lo idwe lukolcaaloi.

Ejai abukorokin akinei nu akasilo na akinei aur kijakinete
bobo aiai amsehan da osalakinete ijo da keda diopet.

Eswaman Red Barnet Ejkt (Kiseng simoongesi abukisinyikok
anger nu aitigogong atakot kee naarai ebe lukojokotau epote
emoete atukono kwanat PKWI kanu aingarakin.

# IN LOVING MEMORY

Irene Idel
Bwrc. 1913
Died: 15/11/98

We benjari yuwa tine Almighty look you away from us. The gap and pain your departure left in our heartstget deeper and deeper every day. You were such a wonderful gift to us. Sadly missed by your dear Mummy Frances, sisters, brothers, relatives and friends. We thank God for the years of happy life we lived together and we hope to meet you some time. The Last funeral (das will be held on 19.12.1998 at Kaitlekor - Kamaca, Kanyum. May your soul rest in eternal peace Amen. (John 11.25-27 whoever lived and believed in the Almighty will never die)

14 ETOF Naiwangsoot, Ourban (Novemba) 19-25, 1998

EYALA KA NU AKOLO

# Ican ka aibuses na Diisi loakwana aipejo ocaaloi

No Emmanuel Skolem

KOLO kokas kellman eha ehamodini, karsida loebuku, atutubet, mam akiro apataka. Apa jaka aipojaki aiboiso kac atitreg itunga amaran, aitamenokin azolonun tosi ikatokac da.

Kosonaroi lu atutubet kana ipojo si ai aitamenokin abeliesin nu agitigita ido kapakip. Amin aja, atindiar abelin na gymnastico da!

Apak pa aibisito epejonon kilalaba do itunga orot itterrikina aikareno ugesi kobain akat rwa-rwa neta, ekarerwa, kilohormaramak akongoi, kididimal akromat neta, jaka kidetasi testless, na iwanyana ijo da itunga kopen ebe eja'ami epejonon atutubet.

Lolo, emamei bohoran, Ekiro edini da eit apurior tasi. Ejishijulantes ikaru, apuganasia tosi ikiroria da lu amannakie jaka ka ajaks nu apetukirumumwanninimoka idiisir. Edini arsi elimune kotona. Amni saka ekiro lokaswam kaurianut DC (District Commissiorer). Ekadoabuskino ngafajidakin ebe District Executive Secretary (DES) koraunboho tosi kwana Chief Administrative Officer (CAO).

Pac abu kaapakina kade atupiton edini toma osapnali ke agolokin akomi kocaalo ecin. Arsi Naemukaaga komwana akwap epone lo adepara tai.

Abeli aspakot kede itunga

Alufairi Okoropot, atupiton CAO Soroti

ka idowe eijaan ipojok. Mam arsi adoketa nu emen arsi onemero edio enwamatar nu, kenye kwap saka ekinin emuebe lo epol noi.

Amanai atemar eha aramit lreten ka jaka ke icir kana aijaan Ediisikaa pejok ico. Arsi horan ehe aiwennanti idwe lu suomero sisikany etengei eha awuere, mam ral. Koponi kijaar kousdeni asubiokin oisoknga labilan. Karsida asubiton iciekakini akulomenin apedorota aigogolonor. Sijomonkak oken, abunginitaan kongrioupojo kopone kangope kangol komam aikumson.

Atatuk ikuleputi kcu apurkitin icir komam epapetraami da kede lores kaasubitoicir ejulo amerkekin. Kensi idiisir lu akolo, abalinongti acirpak isubun literen kans edini ber akurboikin

# EKOTE BO AP

# Esisianakinio esapat aidar aberu

Na Atia L'Orilobo

EMANYIT iokolo sek kasiunga arsi aattak luka etelepat kes agareto aipapetikin ka aattak luka apese, korai alosikinet aimorikkinatekenn nu aarei koruanon adiope asamorero einer, apuronokin, ka aimor aomion ka inyamat.

Ajaiber ikauriak lu etelepat aisimaar apese kanoka adokokin okookec, kodaunitiste ber aingic ipontrio ke, akukunmat, eijaanakine, asianut ido komamonhne.

Kedau kenye edukone airiamakin, kodautitete do ayangar itiaren lu emanyit da, aja etelepat adumun asirenta nuidaret aberu ke kamsojausiaatak ke kaitanga lunpolok kateker.

Acir koloma asioreta emoriariton

Akukuranut akoro ka aidar inyamat luegelegela kana aidariton etengei, kopedonorete aidaria ekale ka ateker, amarak ka ipapero luedolokineteekale.

Mere adunyukite aikud arsi aitecel arsi asuronokin aibunga aberu duc duc, adumanakin aberu ihoro lunpol eipud kana aitwanam kokale ngin paaran kwapc, amero nakimoi aloe, ka na emaido, eritel, ekiro, amoti, aderekai, itanyia lu

ekoranakino idasioika ameri nu idinyiraere akiria, insol lu ibukere akile (ikeretin) ka imalasia luidarere akile nuibukak, ajonikin aberu idular ka atuba nakilongri kosodi ngesi airigionor epura aberu ke apak na ilongia.

Acir nro asiamakin akoberu idwe apak na epolokitor aswan, akodanakin akoberu akgei nu ipolu, ainokonokin akim nakipiera ngin bong isiterrete aomiononadukite, kolimonokinete idwe awaragasia nukausa kede aitemonokin akim maikutna aibacar kateker kowai loka einono.

Esisianakinio aberu ainyekikin allekilek inyamat tai tai kopone lo aanyanar agogu nu edaona aberu aipor akima.

Acir nro aisisianakin aberu aidar itiaren ejok kapak na emamiar ekillokit kora.

Awaam acir naekamunit ekillokit nro nu amoinikin aberu icir idiasio lumam epatanikit aberu adumun kwapa amajaun ka alokunun itiang istere ijalanakinere ende, ajepunun ecomai, adotamur ihsalen kamoniek kane iookio ngesi.

Arsi da epelu lo ekilokit adumanakin angor atipa nu enapete kangaben, omoroninga kede akanin kana aitubusitorejasismeke.

Aja ekillokit adumanakin angor akapa nuimanyimanyo kana aperio ka aimukot kwant, amukian aberu ka idwe kama ejaani imurok lu adwarak.

Koponesin kangol oen amamutara akiro nakarimok nu adolenenete ejaka kanukaaitemokinio.

Akiro isuepu asafanakinetu okalia ido toma oponesio ngul da kes ekidokotor isoleta, ijoisineikulakito.

Aminanara kolo ikillok ka angor jokan komirete da aisisianakin idwe kec. Ebnyete koreria kec apak kere.

Toma apaarasia nu mam icir idwe luedisiak ejenete ikiroria luka auriak kec. Ejenete kesi "Papa" arai "Dadi" ebe ngesi ekitor t'papa.

ajastene lo itunga kalu epejokit ngesi. Kousbite aibis'helaarse ekikoilomolou aibisite ateker, aporukilokhanar idiopediope, No abolokinere papa apajo kanenyon aibit. Arsi na irwan nensdit Ediisi aipejokin ecaalo loko Kaakura, arsi eletle (Bupe kotem Kyere. Arsi apajo kere nakolumano kanuka ngan. Kousdi, abala y Director loka Northern Uganda Manufacturers Association, Milton Emaat, ebe ko Teso kere arai na aiboisit nansdit na ecweanata atatak lukocaalo gaalia. Kedokiki'her Diisi egazil lo atatamitai kousdi aipilaror kouskor (bala nat arai amaira) amanakin amoni koro ko kisibokino itunga, korumganu amakio acir kobakasi "imalalena ca." Arsi na ateta na itoloisir koigango tai kokwap na emirbe kalo nukokina. Kenye nu iwamaukanen kere, kwape abalar Diisi, apore aijolakite aijar na itunga.

"Eniamei babo ihore ebeitor yesi loko (Bupe aidir Soroti agwela igsalin. Do yeni aidarismun lukus kanepekane komiebe loko Kaakura," abala Alufairi Okoropot, atupiton CAO ko Solor.

Inyomat ajaikana ailikkwape ajastener ipejok? Mere ihore ihoro lu akan. Bala ecaalo ijaiere akokorei, akinet kede ekoramritage, emuogo, aloi, imuorerin ka ihoro, ico da. Kede atatak da keni, apoto enyutakinor okumonye kosi, yigiyig lamyutiany, atubitos kamiorin ape aikamun lu akan. Amamei atiakir ebe imukopin epuwai, ijaka epuwai. Arsi ainyam kereka kireenas ingoi wo

# Epunar Soroti komakood

Na kac (pada)

UPONU! A soraikisok loko Mpigi nisi ahi kodena loko Matindya n'kapokitoma anungui soraikisok lo idinokini na apakita koraikitindarani 14.11.98a loni 20.11.98.

Mpigi na ajantana nisiagak Matyangon nisi ahi kibasik n'kopu nisado na adaman apolman 17 kitapakita Matindya lodu O. Matindya nisi kokoro kapi ahi kibasik n'kopu agin kotoma soraikisok lo ajakitina kokoro. Daja.

Eshawki loko Soroti nisi ahi kibas agin lodu apolman akati apa kitapu Mepu ka ibaria lodu apolman nisiagak ka soroti katapolman.

Kitirana bitman loko Soroti 14" ka "B" kodi ititman la ahmundra ko Katipala, aca ciri ahi mam Soroti ajantana adoksaad nalimanotekna la in bitman.

Bitman, 10 km apani sinagorok kodi anungak 110. Altamanlaki kori ko Mpigi, Makindya, Khoto, Nakawa, UPDP, Makoto, Soroti 14" ka "B", Kabale, Kakira, Yacora, Mepu, Lira ka Katipala. Lodu apolman ko Daja, Liwena, Masaka ka Ibaria.

Kapi agin da, upinsiden loka Uganda, imamunr ibiring 14. Androstron, Darul Agong ka okontok ko agin bobo apotokotoma.

Kotoma bitman loko Soroti 14" ka "B" kodi ititman la ahmundra ko Katipala, aca ciri ahi mam Soroti ajantana adoksaad nalimanotekna la in bitman.

Bitman, 10 km apani sinagorok kodi anungak 110. Altamanlaki kori ko Mpigi, Makindya, Khoto, Nakawa, UPDP, Makoto, Soroti 14" ka "B", Kabale, Kakira, Yacora, Mepu, Lira ka Katipala. Lodu apolman ko Daja, Liwena, Masaka ka Ibaria.

Kapi agin da, upinsiden loka Uganda, imamunr ibiring 14. Androstron, Darul Agong ka okontok ko agin bobo apotokotoma.

Kotoma bitman loko Soroti 14" ka "B" kodi ititman la ahmundra ko Katipala, aca ciri ahi mam Soroti ajantana adoksaad nalimanotekna la in bitman.

Bitman, 10 km apani sinagorok kodi anungak 110. Altamanlaki kori ko Mpigi, Makindya, Khoto, Nakawa, UPDP, Makoto, Soroti 14" ka "B", Kabale, Kakira, Yacora, Mepu, Lira ka Katipala. Lodu apolman ko Daja, Liwena, Masaka ka Ibaria.

Kapi agin da, upinsiden loka Uganda, imamunr ibiring 14. Androstron, Darul Agong ka okontok ko agin bobo apotokotoma.

## Engaren Tarativu ko Obalanga

Na Robert Okollo

KOTOMA abolita na nitrom okongol ko nwaeru nkaji nila ibiragni kotrm Obalanga. Kapokitm agnasi niba nitima lica Tarativu Group ebsleken che to bitmna kodu apolma akany anugon kami nitroma.

Apakima abolisana akutukai na Aborilnik, senda Alimama 1.11.98. Ejiki formana. Odaan agni apodokit abolita agin kami apakanyon ekoni katada lo Alim.

Kosadi bitman (yarvi) Abadiwapaka NguBew, kosi apota kamuraria nisaaba koiyarvi. Kodu apolma ekaryasai kami nitroma.

Asibwapo Group nisi ahi kermas bitman kodu apolma anugon, koagotakini Lango Pulisana apotimama.

Abu Odaan Assalamak, masasila kodu sinanakibota. Udima la Tawalena nisi ahi kodium 3.000/- kosadi Abadiwapaka NguBew kesi apani kipakitani 2.500/- kangalotoma.

Arba Asibwapo kodum 2.200/- kosadi Lango Pulisana 2.000/-.

Akeren na ecodokitoi 100m, Rachael King, etudi akare kede akipi koata aiyengan kapak na eteemonoro agesi akerit kularo napolon na aboliasin nuko Kaala Lampat, Malaysia pac

## Epopou bobo etem Gweri abolia emopiira lo akeje

Na Robert Okollo

WAP ko apolok ko nuka epopou kesi apotio bobo abolita emopiira lo akeje kotomi, nana kuma bitman loko lo ikakulban. Jodo Taman, chou, khutamana kami atrikka.

Kotidokulu kakao ikromai nagraani nisi koma nisan nitima loutida.

Kotidokulu kakao ikromai nagraani nisi koma nisan nitima loutida.

## Ebironoros akutak

Na Peter Okosi

EXIGANAKIN AKka itunga ko ajano ikami kotoma nito otoma emopira loko ekpa kosi apotia kibironokitam gwarw kotoma apak na naskitmo ko akertani nisim brawa trwan akatayani.

Ko apolokit ekonoi lo Ejki Asibwapo Group nisi abaloite kisi akert na kami swanyan abu apodoti akutan akert kete etonia ageni emopiira likmo na ndaman abolia.

Apakina ekonoi lo Kaniwi PS, 9-14.11.98. Atakot na poati na aboliasin ko Uganda kere National Council of Sports 1 ko na apotik na emopira lo akutu Pedahuton of Uganda. Marshall Association (FCCA) kesi etemokitos altumana.

Abu Kabangi nisalamik Kataiwi diartikkanu ajiakan angor nasi kami atana akutu. Ekpi Kabangotini atakotak apani atisianakin idwe kesi aboliamopira apotio katakot kasa PS.

"Ipa nomoro lukuraloi la mamapodokitotou aboliasin, butey do ami edulis mawala abolia (PE) mam ibore kwapenai emopira isisianakina korye erai edukhi idwe ekrit," abala ageni.

Epolokini ekonoi lo atani 14.11.98 abu enanimatan namero koyake na aboliasin ko Katakeo diartikt hamasi. Okitor kilip misianakitak swanyan ebernam bobo idwe niskakino emopira aboliar lapekomami misianakitak lo dameri kesi.

Akgolim inomero Apuston PS kersi apolokiniton apolok namero loka Puramuro ko Kataiwi diartikt, Ejki Gering Epol kilip na ajani ekonoi swanyan eber nam bobo Kataiwi atangakintodistrikten kaboliasin korye adoli ageni da agaren.

## Aswalasi luko Amare PS lu Angatuny PS

Na Robert Okollo

AMARE PS netaibekisowala Angatuny P.S (goolon iyami kami otirai kotoma aipet amanyele).

Ekokorio amanyelei agin Nalamet 11.11.98 kalatukana abolkosisi 4 Obalanga 17. Esisianakinan John Ekadu agini ami akutan.

Kotoma atatuber kane sodit abu atrilepai Tiger Elado lo Amare kinanyak ati wokirila Angatuny egoolo ediopat.

Abu Abilak atatuber nasudit koagetakin komam lu Angatuny mamilou katsida aibas egoolo lo Amare.

Kisadokin amanyelei katatuber kasa iyamit apotu bobo aboliak lu Amare kobitakjultu Angatunyegoolo lo iyamit ido ami Opaling Badang agini abu kiturak agol.

## Apeo Pallisa Wiggins eigoolo 1 kanu enoot

Na Charles Orengos

EGOOLO ediopu bini lo etemu Onya Abubakar loko Pallisa S.S nisi abu kisiridik Wiggins A.S kotoma abolia naipeparena najakima Kami Bima Groundenasi 1.11.98.

Kajinmet na abolia andrit Wiggins bala ulesi atrikotu ipepok kisi kotoma isdakikan ikany bini, korye mam apotu kopedoni idiobore.

Kotoma isdakikan iyami kangal tani (2/3) na atatuber kasa sodit apu emopira swai loko Pallisa S.S. Korye na iyaama Pallisa Amorokin aliman skepa ka Khadi abolia obaska rakdessama akro swai ka Wiggins.

Ebongandi do Pallisa atatuber Naiyarrit okapakina asiamat Wiggins ilusi, Tani isdakika lo iyamit, kodumummarereng naepepe

## Iworot Ocast itunga kere obooma Soroti

## Ocast

Na Moses Okalobe

APOLOKINITOMAMI

Asisina, abolisina, jirendik uijer na itunga ko kere loko Soroti atorok kisi Maran Iburi Ocar kere nimit ibinga kere kelam apouramae pumam 25.11.98 ko Laddko la Soroti ketaa atfumana kere nangarul idwe la man apodoti aibas airigla la ocast kede atroren swaiha keraan idokotat nassal.

2 KTOP-Nalwongonet, Osuban (Novemba) 28 - Opo (Desemba) 2, 1998

IYEMUTO

# Ejang Otekat akirot Edeke, kirai emwebe

Na James Ekweu

ABWAAN ndrope kouni lu ebolobobson kanen naka LC 5 ko Soroti Otatrikt Ejki Jobe Emilly Otekat nges atomaki aijang akirot naka Edeke, misiau Etop.

Otekat 62 nges kana isenit araasi 24.11.98 aba kitijerek Etop ebe karaida ejai ngetii awa emwebe isongarenit ngesi, naka Edeke naarai nges (Edeke) nges ekabaka loka ikabakan.

Abwaak iuni, Jobe Emilly Otekat, Juvenine Elyau ka Robert Engolokesi emarisete escolanglo.

Abu ngesi kitijena ebe kotoma oteinwaa LC5 lu ejansi Soroti dietrikt aboranari ngesi ibaihalin 200 kangin eteen, konodi ebe ejaski ngesi ngas etem amatapalin 2000 adokio isomeron ka adekesis.

## Emuwa Euku etwasamak ekekiroo

"Erai eong akirot na Edeke, kerai emwebe da naarai ekot apugan kopai aroma na Edeke otasi kini kwape ehaler Edeke ebe komene eukanyet kon kwape kimiane efope beni," abala Otekat kijupapere.

"Kano eswamai eong kere mingarensi eong Edeke naarai nges: esokon ka ehaku ka. Ejeni da ngesi yaw ehuni aitab kasnokana naarai ohara aitosom iketunga aseum engarenan lo eyongit nges — nges bo eong," abala ngesi konakari akwena.

Kingit Etop arai arai Otekat Emulokolet, abu kotema ebe erai ngesi ekarislayo to agogong.

"Arai eong etufikit ideadukokina kokanisa," abala

Otekat: akirot edeke

nges.

Kakiro acie, emuwa lo koleje abwoit kaseo naka LC 5 natuber konodi asbiror. Simon Ross Eaka, JR, abwaak lu isini ebe itwasamaste ekekiro ebe igangit ngesi kes

"Apupi eong ebe itosomarte abwaak lu iuni kere ekiroo ka

amootor agangat naitelekarat kotoma asee," abala Eaku kobatuwa ke lo ejokakit Etop araasi 24.11.98.

Eyatakirot Euka ebe kwape kwanatijuka ngesi aiwotokin kotoma politika naku Soroti naarai ebe idopit eitekenste kotoma, ido ebe itofitolote

# Kotacata LCs ikapun - Bidandi

Na Ewadikok Etop

EMINISTA loka Local Government Bidandi Saalingeri esoraki Chief Administrative Officers (CAOs) loko Katakwi Mubulita Maran Ozakata ka nako Soroti, Agirpina Amugo Akol alburaus kniodi anyakun apyaima beni jaanaw apolok scolongo loka LC3 ko Katakwi ka Soroti kansu aurianita (sitting allowance).

Abala Emisusa ebe mam apugan ecumakit agirigirak apolok escolongo LC 5 apolok

scolongo LC 3 ka lu itemwan adumunun apya ingan naarai etacio kasi ampei kangoli lap. Abu emisusa scorak CAO ka apolok itemwan awanyun ebe mam bebo ijaatakinio LCs apya ngun.

Bidandi Suili loda emera nakaparan na ariamuna ngesi keda ikamilan lu LC 3 ka ikamilan lu LC 5 kere ko Katakwi dietriktarasi 16.11.98 kede loko Soroti ko Soroti Flying Academy araasi 19.11.98 ngus abala ebe kasa kolo isupete eesi aseeta

kijangrijangete emiebe ebe ipote adumunun apiyai kangolilap komanyi colilinga arai benat edolit ijo anyukikin araasi LC 5.

Abu Bidandi itip ikaasilan loka LC 3 luda erimaete nyapnasi kic ebe isomarte ageun aisac ngun.

Abala Emisusa ebe edolit ikaasilan apasokin emera angarakout angor koc aswam konye mere ansudit angor ebe isomarte kesi.

Eyatakit Emisusa ebe manekisil loka Local Government

Act 1997 ecumakit ikaasilan lu LC3 aroma eyepesin konye area apolon escolong ban.

Ipukwana impotan lo adolota nyapesi ka ebe alomakisi LCs aretonekin, ka apolok itok iriongeta ebe amaris aswam," abala Bidandi ko Katakwi.

Abu Bindandi kitiprok LCs ebe mere kesi ejai apedori na acamanakin ka alemunam apiyai ko district arabonati memwin. Konye ebe CAO ngesi erai kona epolokit apyaik kodiorri k konodi apolon stem ngesi idari nukotam.

apol naka e distrikt.

"Emurot eong kagogong kere, edio abwaan arai idio itaan keere kotoma kalu cokete atukataka yen, otamii airiar eong iswua atapar na aokot nu ajengere Soroti distrikt," abala Euka kiyatakini ebe, ideleleete komisio ke ide siri lu ican kotoma politiki lu emamei nebeara ipurijata.

"Etorakit eong nanga loko Soroti aseun engarenon mere ateker arai bonat mere edio lo itosomai angajep na etialatiska" abala ngesi engetakini.

Konye Otekat nges abu kopugak ngan kobata "bicie kwi Elyau ka Engulu kse ijangijangete ibatuwan lu ebe swadikakit. Euka kse ebe igangit kes iseni kana elosete kere." Viam Etop abu kodum Elyau arai Engulu

# Osuban Amorimor, Opolot Ekirigi, enguriani Imodo

Any. App. 1

distriktan loko Katakwi, Soroti, Kami, Pallisa, Tororo ka Busia kesi aseunete Osuban lo kolo arai ekomisona kosiunget loakoro komam yen depogit. Epolokit kwapekwana Osuban ekampuni lo ipirutin lo enyaritai Environment Management Consultants International Ltd. lo ejai Kamiwukya, Kampala.

"Abala Prof. Opolot ebe eriamuna ngesi pac kede Archbishop Livingstone Mpalanyi Nkoyayoi loda abu kolimok ngesi ebe" ikoto isio katiamanno Emorimor kede Ekabaka."

"Ekot Kyabizinga lo Busoga, Henry Muloki, konyarasunat ngesi da ajakin apaaran na isibokeneru Emorimor oisolong," abala Opolot.

Lohim arai apolon eicolong lo atukot naka Iisuo Calitral Union (ICU), Paulo Okim Agoda kede atupiton ke, Yokosafat Y. Ozuka kesi da apani kinyakakinat oisolongo kes komam itapagitai.

Kosodi Prof. Opolot ngesi apon konanatal kwape Ekirigi (Chief Secretary arai Prime

Minister) loka ekamalo lo apolon lo ehuni ayati ICU.

Akaulo na aseun ngesi aponi kibwalakinui Osuban egoe lo akwangge kigirakitete anyukutan nubulubu ebe "Papa Emorimor 1998," kikariete itunga.

Atukot na Imakenyin, Bakonyi Isanga Development Association (BIDA) kes ejukunito arealan ksc mama ajai ICU kami aseun Emorimor.

Abalasi kesi, ebe atelete kesi da noi arasit. Iu imorikikina kede Iisuo kapak kana ido kisamunitoi aigang ICU kotoma aitaritoi ke kere. Apotu kijukakisi atukot asnki na 20.000/-. Acie arealan nesi ejukuniton Iisuo ko Kampala.

Isterasi ka Etop kooteri lo Silent Night, Soroti akaulo na aseunere ngesi, abala Osuban lo erai lo ateker na Atokok Iisamedeksa, ebe airaaki asso na ngesi abilan kaiyapapera kano aijaanakin ateker naarai ebe imiyapesi loka Emorimor aanyunet kamendera na Iisuo.

"Ijo abwoikin ateker ekoto do ijo korai itsan yen ilookino ne ejaasi itunga ngul kere kotoma oponesio. Kanukangun erai do

Prof. Opolot: Ekirigi

anungout, mere alakara. Epolo do aomoom nu ipeikot aswam kansu ateker," abala Osuban.

Abala Osuban lo anyami atap ka ekiring na msubut komasi ebia Bell Lager, ebe akoto ngesi Iisuo bobo adumun epoget lu arasit. Eresot ka aigang kesi aikeon akerianut ksc.

"Ejai eong amuno ne ejaasi iisuo naarai akukuraka. emunoko ido erimarion. Emaaste bo kesi ajon, konye ningarentou aswam," abala Osuban. Akaulo na ngesi adongun ka acibun kede ayaitok ICU ko Silent Night apotu imesban ciu loka ICU kinyamakisi Osuban terdu lo Abilasp, Oburin, Olio Serere nape ikamusi akwap.

( KUJU ) APOLON EICOLONG: Okim Agoda, ka atupiton ke Yokosafati Ocuuka, agol ko kwap

13.01.98 ko Independence Square Soroti, konye apolon itanga kangariunata ebe ekidisko noi itanga lu mesas ngesi knoodi mam akirot Emorimor erianot otangi kere.

Abu da aretonokin kolom kiding ayaitok atakota bu Iisuo Calitral Union (ICU) nada eraki aitemonokinen nai aseun Emorimor aitudol na emourere asnunlo Imodafang Emorimor.

Naemukaga na bian aponi do kosrunai Apolon Aagun, Kadugala Osuban kwape Emorimor loitetet.

"Agrawa-iek kasonya mere ne len itwasamare agogong kinyakikitete politiko da toma ademor (abgeesai) do anako nkanan naka abera acia," abala aiwadikaet.

Amoromurat Imodafimeban icu lu etokoate aseo ap kitosomai angajep na esil aitosom kapapula kana. Acapul ngesi Paulo Okim Agoda, Y.Y Ozuka L'Ouran, M. Jeseroth' Opolot, Okware Omaori, Pade Omenton, T. Edoba, Ahub Akol William, Ogwela Emara, Opak Sum, Enokokin, J. Otoko, Ejobi, Francis Akefiu ka icu da.

"Asu, ekot apugan da ucoite noi no epon itanga ko kwape etakanin bula epana eitolana loka aswam sa ebe kopai politiko da toma bala ejaasi acia abukkanto tona bobo kesi lape eyasaite atiakarit Ikumama ebe mam eransi Iisuo," abala aiwadikaet.

Abala Imodaf ebe adaunit ngesi ainom iripoetan "ke ebitilditoa esao leka ateker Iisuo, politisiani ico lwagire ido kitaranaitos eisono ka eipitent wok politiko," so ebe President Musoveni, angicak la egelegela, ipatidata, njukutason, engarenok loka atekerin acia, itidapti idinina la gelegela, ayaitok aingadinis su apiyai ke egelegela ka icu itunga la apolok kapagan.

"Asu ekoto kesi. kokapakina aterrikin aepape ka etiokto na epooik nu epote adoikite kes akaulo kete edeana ekonti angicio naka abildidio naka esoi loka ateker," abala aiwadikaet.

ETOP Naiveagume, Orabina (Novosrda) 26 - Opu (Desembe) 2, 1998

# Emuwa Omeda Lt. Col. Okuja

Omeda atwana UPA
kolo keni kerete sikere ukasta,
idroebe asmukit ngesi eipene
loiketer Okuja ebe ejai aniket
ke, naka UPA egoigong noi
aliji apagan ko Teso.

"Okuja tuan yetarailo ijakit
sao, aibelokto araan (lo
adoketa) naka Lt. Colkoman,
ber eraana e Capnare da!"
abala Omeda.

Abala ngesi ebe amamenter

kolo keni yupeni ko London
(Babya) neda kwara sune
Okuja emuwanan akirse loko
Iteso, ka aitakarian itanga lu
aittepak ekstresi abumser
kam aitopol Teso.

da Omeda yendid labakodit
isadaku yes didi hon
singaligala itanga. Aitcepak
erai eswanan loketogo ke

kokadakte.

ebe apete airwase esimero
ngol.

aitakarian itanga loko Soroti.

# AOMISIO

## ETOP

PLOT37A SCHOOL ROAD

P.O. BOX 819, TEL: 045-61057, SOROTI

## Ainingosit na ejaatar Isolota

Adolu bubo apak aseak luko Soroti asekun engarenon lo epol kakere ko distrikt. Erai ainingosit ne ejaasi aseak arai ekotosi abongor ne koleje bobo ajaasi - koipone kalo aseun Engulo, arai boot ekotosi aijulakinet - aseun Otekat arai Elyau.

Arai itutubete aseak abongor ne koleje arai mam, ibore yen epol nes yen ebe, ejaunos itunan yen eseunio kede epelu lo elangir lo aitudeng arai sitililim akim na etlekerene na kwape kwana inepi ko Soroti jokan.

Na nes arorwa na kwapekwana epol kakere ko Soroti.

Icie itunga eminasi atemar ebe icuki Etop etlekerene, arai iwadikai Etop arai mam, ejai ido idik etlekerene ko Soroti kwape kwana.

Mam erai alosikinet Etop aigang ediope kotoma abwaak. Mam da erai alosikinet kasi aicaarit edis kabwaak. Konye ikoto isio aicorakin aseak airereor abwaak lo iuni kodoco kosedete aseun lo emunosi kesi ebe epedori aitiji ationis na.

Ettekerene lo ejai Soroti, itelitoli apelo na edistrikt. Itelitoli naarai engojianakina engarenok. Emamei amunonoro. Ejaasi do itunga ekokanyasi 'aidar iyapesin kec!'

Erai do eswamak icie lu apugan ajarungingit naarai edeng ikaasilan noi. Arai ediakarit eewaman apugan, ebokinio erono no iaboisit na aicorakin; kacut arai mam ngesi erai yen atekor ka ikaansila kangin epolokit ekomiti lo ejai erionget ke. Iweweasi eswamak apugan akiro nu.

Apota koleje aseak kosentu John Henry Odetta (Koirereng I, okasubun Ekomoyo, kaijor namam edaun) naarai epudasi aijulakinet kanu ajokis nako Soroti. Asesenote cut aseak ebe arai Odetta ngesi ti kepedo aikrun ka aimorikikin Soroti, nes aseuniata ngesi karaida adeka. Aso ekot yesi aseun etuan lo ibecokin akeje ke Odetta.

Kijeni isio ebe ecobe aseak ido epote asekun etunganan lo iteete kesi ebe epedor aibumakin itunga luko distrikt kalo kwape ipes.

Kirereoto kodoco alosikineta abwaak, ikeponesio, aswamisio, acobeo ka eboe kede itunga. Arai imodokok etean kan, siri kiseutu. Kopupokisi iinerasinei kec jokan konye, kocoitos bo igilin lu eraraete eirior taai komam nu epedorete aswam.

Ngin idiope kotoma abwaak kalu ejaasi itunga lu ejonete jokan, ajokisio ka arokisio ke. Eminasi do icte atemar ebe 'ejokit lo ijoni ijo, ejok adepar emalaika lo mam ijo ijeni.' Konye ejaas icie lu etemarete ebe, "Karaida mam eong ajen Emalaika (ngol), ajen eong ebe ejokuka imalaikan kanu kangun, aseuni isio ngesi!" Aseunet erai nakon.

## OPALAKIRO

## Kireeoto itunga lu iuni

Otekat Elyau

## Nigai bo kisemii

akekwan bela inigilikina

Naiyareikini ebeit etuan yen ekot araat engarenon ajen ebe engarenon nesi lo itadikini itunga erot kijaanakini, mere aijanakinin.

Engarenon nesi ngol lo itokoro ka asepedoor itunga sipkor lokasurup, esai, icekie ideemina itunga ke keremene atiakatrakat. Aipup ka nitimomut keu apetutat naka erunganane ke kwape engarenon ka eitunganane jaka ingarenikisio da.

-Aingarenikit erai aitodikini itunga erot lo ejok ka asepedoor itunga sipkor lokasurup koipone loka alopol pipor onayiputar itunga, akariamet, angaleu, emonesepepe ka ayongit naka epederesio naka itunga bongarenikit nesi.

Angarenikit kwakana emikini itunga apup aijaman. Kejuan aipup ka aliigiara kepedorete do itunga aswam nuipa kana atiji lok'asurup kwape nei, ebenye itukor adeka, ebeli, aiyalongong ka endakinin.

Engarenon kwa mi ekotoi?

Itunga lo kangin. Asketan kere aipun ko kale, atutubet, otem, obaku, okodeta, oriongeta ka njeresio da ekotosi engarenon lo;

Ekokurana, isio, eberiang, ejok teekod, elai, orert, papereno, esiana ido komamonon.

Ekotosi itunga engarenon lo ibwaikti iketunga isiau

## "Araimam ber Edeke da esiomit"

Na Sam Ekadu

LOINEKETE apolokin LC'd ko Soroti, Yuvettine Eliau, ngesi abu kolimok a seak ebe "Arai ber mam Edeke da esiomit, konye kepedorite ayait akwap." Enera Eliau 18.11.98 ne esupiata kesi abontin ko Goreri P/S. Abala Eliau ebe, epedorete itunga lumam isisiatos noi, eyait, aipuga, ka aijanakin itunga ejok noi; kitia lu epogais ebe isisiatos noi. Ejaasi abwaak Otekat Jobuka Robert Engulu da.

Aseak kesi eweweasi do ebe, "He. hee, ekwena r do Edeke!"

## Emuwa Elyau abwaan Engulu

Na Francis Imalingat

EDIOPE kalu ebokolodote kana asususo kwape apolon eicolong LC3 ko Soroti, Ejkl Mike Juvenine Elyau nesi atemaa ebe asabit Robert Engulu lo ebokolodote kangesi epejsaus lo oxyami abokor na mam ejani ajokiko.

Apegakini Elyau nu eipugaa boka decentralization lo abala Engulu ebe ekot etuan lo etiting kanu aidar apiyai nu ijakuni apugan edistrikt.

Enerasi kesi na erassi 21.11.98 ko Nakatineya noda atukokina itunga luka tem lo Too na ebooma Soroti (Western Division Surat)

Mainicipat Council) kenawan hasjotet.

Ayaiton naka asee ko Soroti (Returning Officer) Ajki Agiripina Amoge Akol ngesi apolokit eicolong kotoma aurianet kangin noda obakiata ijaku, Robert Engulu, Cays Jobe Otekat Emillyka M, Juvenine Elyau imug aszeta.

Abala Elyau ebengmikwape kalo e CM ka CAD kobwoikita ebaka Kalala ngesi ejeni naikanusuitos decentralization esaa'ni kesi aparasia ngun eteteente akiret ngn ka aurianet napalon mere Engulu lo esiomit a isiom kapapulai.

## Etorona abwaan Etop

Na Peter Opita

ABWAAN Mike Yuvettine Elyau nges etorona Etop kanu ainom aputo na adakitor lo ilangasete kede kanges, John Emily Otekat ngesi kopura Abala ngesi ebe erai ngin amorosit komamako.

"Eong lo amojongit adepar Otekat, biai bodo epedoria ngesi aisirito song Serere kede Kasilo aboisio nu ajen eong kodoco? Eong nges aboit ti aidak ngesi nahasin arai asing papake," abala Elyau kogatonate itunga akwena. Enera Elyau nu kotem Katine arassi 20.11.98 ne asupitar kesi aseak lo da akidioko noi.

## Koocitos idetakitos apiyai ako

Na Felis Onaje

LC3 ekote asekun apolon, eicolong LC3 Soroti, John Emily nesi aitu kolimok ko. Onem enasi 17.11.98 krasotu itunga lu imisukosimi hon.

"Ekote asekun epedori aisepan lukojokotau kanu Soroti na ajokan."

Abu ngesi ka etungasinot lo atuk "egitakin kesti yewokokiala, asi aduman engarenok epukoro akonya."

"Esikakin kdo apakip ko Soroti tekok karsi kiseutu yen aboni eong akute? Otekat ikariste do iti ebaka iswaa.

Abu ngesi kijak ebe, "karai kidok ngin yukong, ngopang," kobongokinai ebe "Aso konteh enis ngon eong."

Abudo ngesi ka oupaka Juvenine kwape atunyun na konedi Robert Engulu arwatat.

Etop Sotonoma Ateso

EtOP Naiwongonet, Osuban (Novembe) 26 - Opo (Desembe) 2, 1998

# EBALUWA LO ESABIITI: ETELEKA 10,000/=

# Acakasi luko Serere arereng na ti ebariata

IPA - Epoda nitiystukin atoker apipil na atis nong kadum ekaolo na lisora acaker arereng na aduikit. Ani kowadi aportor talikana erenga loisirigin ka amamayayan.

Apakin na ekositor emmobesakaputaimakaputa agwela emwebe Serere. Ipukuyenamanyarasiyen seokali agwela: 10,000/- kowadi epuko la apolon

agwella 20,000/-.

Konye masitarurkeninata. Kapota imu agwela emwebe, apotu itunga koproyakiti simod kesi erono, edwegal tinsilo eboenda. Arisiltunga aiga alsik loejok kwap kepuka abdulednati kaling ka boboloyok kuje kepuko, kiyalamani da misele "adolu emna, adeoda arereng akae" kayen ejai emwebe abepok ko.

Mami bebe mamukita itunga aidengemwebek itungamati.

Apotis imo kinyelaikisi akaberaatetersebonganeta aketaele. Aba kornon atise kwiabongun. Kitsaibderman obongaaitimdoabukurana abekomor emwebe.

Na asimit nong, aticepak apotisime ta kibirereoreman noi idiaileman amanukor ko Serere. Iagai tijrai arai obongyamitmweaka rebobe? Isirigan idi erwakiasi itunga belikuyauganemwebe boejat nepotai kongolere?

Natrapimon arni (koto oni adumna edur kotoma araito. Eraata ikito taitolamuneta araito kwapa emwebe, emnenga, apedur ka isteda. Kadarata ikito lapabar ejaani ejok kinyakikisi acamakit idwe nicaniran utwanan kwap taitai.

Arai kidumta arereng na adonant esokoni agwela si lisora yen ejok tetery idamani kinyetolawasini.

Maaniamanetsitanga tinko Kami agwela akarete atosi. Mam reokoni kesi edaana. Ejai agsikkeru aigeta agwela akarete erok mepokaka, mere mabomik arai boeringuyo.

Kodi Emina

# Iyapenenei Etop adolun

IPA - Iyalama iso no i kana aowan kua aitolamunun Etop. Konye idiyae iboreemonemni yenita.

Mam apopula na edolumetei na (ja isio kotoma apak cut. Ejaani abwolicit kagwelamam naka apopula kana iagwela) toma baba abeisickam. Konye kingit (jo be apopula adola? ipupuni ebe eroko.

Emina apopula adaan apaarasia aongon adolun mama ejaani asismak. Agolisuke kisiomi isio iyamuto lo armyongata.

Elipit kane kodumutu epone lo atipet lo edolio apopula ne ejaani asismak kere. Nu kere iswamas ko Mukongoro, Ngora, Serere. Makwaka acie atubabena makonadilo Kiponti aiyalamikinkijulakin enwamae lo.

Okarut Peter Michael

# Emamei atiakaku Iteso, Ikumama

IPA - Keseirebete nong akiro no isobokinites isie itunga enereebekoto beripulok luko Teso kere, aimorikikin kenedete amoun ne etoruni atiakaku na ejai kiding Iteso ka Ikumama tetere epatanuni aimorikikinutekerimua arei.

Kiwaika, emamei cut atiakaku katekerin kana. Aanyunet, kirimo (jo aboisio nu ejai ematet kotaan Soroti. Teso Ion, Kichinjaji, Nakatunya, Pansbaka acie da,

idumani (jo ebe arni Iteso ka Ikumamakesi emataoinepepe kiyalamasi idu kisiecete aomisio nu itopolcete edutrikti.

Kalajie kokatakwi distrikti da ejaani Ikumama epolokistito aboisio acie, kwape nat lo etem Kaja, lo etem Abarilela kere erassi Ikumama, konye mam Iteso esurakistotokesekangiinacut. Eong arai Etesot lo alomunit kotem Kaja, Amuria keboyei

ko Soroti, idu sjaatatar opsperokalo erai Ekumamait. Aibodo ejai atiakakuma iterai duo?

Kotoma Etop Omodakokingol 9-1, 98 App. 5, neoiewadikator Ejkt Opotot Joseph lo Kasese ebe, ejaani itunga ha apolok ko Soroti, idumani kesi da aisik ebele toma politikta luko Soroti. Eraasi ngun abeit.

Mwanika Peter

# Otukui Akoromit PS!

IPA - Ahumongkelattokesomerolo Akoromit PS ka aiboisio itokoidunyet ke.

Agena na apukorere esomero lo 1922 ediope etogo lo anya bori ilengo kanan. Iuwa ke kaya do imwaliman. Ustuka! ekai lo eperi apolon esomero, elai ne eperete ipegei da.

Elonete idwe osomero isawan iuni naarai isakomino iuriak imwaliman. Idarete iuriak idwe kse napesur ikisin aitocun bon, kobukinete adokokin.

Lo Etern, kotem aimorikikinka apolon esitdong LC III aiuwamant ikisila la isipudorete iuriak aiduk esomero kosrat. Kitisnik jo aowani ngun, ibuya LCs kere Chak mchaka adaan elap. Ebongunete kojaneta nu ebeit aowan.

Olaput George

# Okodel kosa itunga

IPA - Kangabako Kumi kolejosometei Okodel aangarenikit kesi kodistrikt. Inoosikinakwana ngesik'etauke kere aisoro Ikumetok aitopolika aikoun adoketaiti na distrik.

Ijamamantekwana itunga kodistrikt. Ejototete ejok kilajaata. Ekumdedeto akoro kama aitiji ebeli ka adakasinsi nu itunga ka nu ibaren da. Yesingul ibalasi ebe engopikit Okodel apugan kesi ingobelata ainyak edistrikti aumara edido ido esedeny politikta kus.

Kodolok Okodel tetere imorunete aomisio nuka aitopel edistrikt. Ecamunit ngesi aicorio koyapasi ke arai kocaalo, konye mere aisrom ngesi arai aiwadikatoi apapulai nuki yemuto.

Okodel, kosa maa (jo itunga kere kodistrikt ejok.

Sebastine Okadakina

# Emamei ewadikan Etop

IPA - Arai nong ediopet kotunga laeminasi aisrom Etop. Konyemaannekin, mam cutenng adumunitor iyemuto lo elomunitosi kotem Kolir. "Inyobo eyaani ngun?" Alomunit nong koitela

? Amorit ne ejaani iyemuto ngini paaran, konye emamei iteate yeti itipenikini Etop.

Odekat Thomas Elijah
Edita - Kiwadikiyemuto ngul
araiipedori, kenediiaijukan.
