# AKIKO NU EBAGA

## Igunos akiringo keere engamwili Soroti obaga

### Akerber Akello

O y do ibobo akiring
Kotori abaga lo.
Kumama Jengamwili
Kunga Iko Soroti
Aki no abing na iponesio

Jengamwili asaduku
Kumama ka eldar idiasio
Kumama emuranto. Ako
Kunang abumokin ebe
Kunang iri adumun eda lo
Kotori ibobo yesi
Kunang alala Jengamwili
Kunang rakeara. Ela
Kumama kigom lu

akwangak kia karaida ideeltos kesi awokot ifuc kodissio.

Konye ibore yen lus kakere kobaga kalo nesi ebe yen egweli iboro arai edia lo edoti 10,000/- kobagakalo ebuni adumun inyalinyaleta lu ekukuny lu atilai ko Jengamwili.

"Emamei bobo jo alosit na epol ebe alosit osokoni egwela! inyamat kwanat emucen, euga, abesi arai engaanonaaraiejaaskere Jengamwili," abala Dr. Emmanuel Enaku lo erai elopet aboisit na.

Kosodi yesi lu ilosete kware, araskbu Sorotimam iperi elenge ebe emamei edia. Kolot togo lo Alnapakin, Plot 76 Owen Road (Korot lo Mbale Soroti) kodum akiring na edio epone keere. Engara egeun esawa edope lo abipunuc kotori iiawan iuni lu akware.

"Ebeit iso aileleb akiring na iponesio kere kanu ebaga kalo ido iuta isio aissumun itunga iboro kwije ajokis bon kwape naf sausages," abala Dr. Enaku.

## Ilukor

Emuria kolia - kolia, Kadarata kesi epok akwapu na nakican.

Akiro nuka aisisi. Atamakisi ikanaki aotuk isomeron ka ayangar dwe esomero. Ekoto oni aingarakin kede ikesisianakinak arior iponesiolukaidwe, kinyskis idwe abwangabwang iboro lu itwaswamaete kosomero.

Kingarakisi ikesisianakinak aiting aswam. Elipit eong ekaru ngot isomeron kere araut neiswamaere - coaching - ikanaki luka. Teso akwenyunaawamnuageat ataamu nasodir. Oni aitac apesan. Iswamaete kere atekerin nuce nu nesi elanyitere oni.

Akiro nucolitono kanuka oingaren:

- Busukiniforni ainununumu epuci lo ebaga epok. Ipu skangasiaapaarasiangun. Mam irengei emotoka, egaali ka epikipiki komera. Mam ireni tai alositer remam

kinyantere ija. Mam ibongonokini akiro tai. Koloto ore sek. Ingaibo idam iborokoe lu aibu koyangak ip apak atukokin ngun? Kayangar iboru eronarmo.

- Luessasi idwe usomero, mam; idauni isingin kapaarasia nakapolok. Eponfosi nuka aitac idwe osomeron ido noroma osini ka Universy. Kitwasama atututet kopuoi ido atututet atacakinia idwe esomero. Kamakisi idwe aissia ido kesi ikulepek patjatikinosarai pelikinete.
- Kidundoa ete ebunit irtengo lo epoto noi.
Akutu ekkam lo epoto. Kiyatakisi etai lo ikonon mere yesi acakar agogong kus ido ice itunga ebanata. Kanerunete ber oni da.
- Iperi ip ebe iai aitaca esidiodanen? Oriikere kesi kiponansuni serikale aidara ayuara kobuok.

Esirikalet ekoto kocai akou apak kere. Koanyukanund yesi akiro nuka iiyalama - Edouni kanuok eketajaran Yesu-Luka 2:11.12. Kanuna ka Edeke ka akwapuwok.

Kelipit yea akisite aima. Edeke ka airar akind ke. Kilipata ainapakin aiputu akwag ka oreria wok. Kitimojo lu emame epone kotoma opuiono kus. Kilipat os lu edekas ka dungakere.

Kimunor yesi arerengesio nuka lokasubant. Kidar Lokasuban.

# AKIRO NU EBAGA

## Motel Born Free ne enakere aijar ainak

Na Ewadikan Etop

IPUPUNITOR ijo ekitor Motel Born Free? Arai mam ijo ipupunit kojenu do obaga toma, iiboro lultemokitos kesi kanukon. Esipo komitai 150 anyoun kalaro na ibaasin kotauin loko Kumi, kojai orot lo Ngora, Born Free nes teni aiboisit na aminaki itunga luipu.

Loto kanu ebaga, mam cut isai aiboisit na, ne itemokitere inyaman kede imaten akwap akwap. Kosodi kojai oabodoebore je, Nitomboip euta ainyamit ijo ne ikonyara einer ka aobar ekamule ka imaten lu elilim da.

Itemokita-imaten, anyoun ko ESB, wines, isodai ka whiskies tu egelegeta lu elomundos aiboiso kanu egelegeta.

Adongun nes mam ebuni araun ationis kanekon, naarai edaundos ayaitok aiboisit na aipenar ikilenga kanu ayotoyotonor imoi ka akiringo acie.

Kipena do ijo ikela kon kanu oabot akonyun.

Arai kipas ijo komam ikoto aiwalakih okamule, ejaasi agolak aiboisit na nu emwekimwekte, kede iperito luyumuk kanu ainakin ijo ainak aijar ka ajo nu imukeru.

"Itemokit isio iboro kanu itunga kosi kanu apaaran kangin," abala Ethena Emokon na eyat aiboisit na.

Keriamaros oabot Motel Born Free kanu ainumunum apaaran. Kimunor yesi kere ebaga ka ekaru lu ajokak.

## Kemorikikinos adukutu Soroti – Capt. Otekat

Any. App. 7

politisians nepepe ka Technocrata luko distrikt.

Elipit eong iurian luko Soroti keere lu ejaasi Kampala, Entebbe, Jinjska aiboiso ace ko Uganda nepepe kokinga nako Uganda aimonikkin kede isio aitopol Soroti district. Ekot kereke yesi kiitunitos ebe "ore nes ore." Mam irutorete amugit kokau. Kopotu kemorikikinos aitopol buwok. Mam idukete itogoi Kampala bon koputu aiduk Soroti da.

Eong nepepe kede ekaasuloka ikapakina aijaun ado agarigat keere kanu aitopol Soroti distrikt. Nepene da bobo epudar eong aimala idistrikitan tukoidunyet kwape nat Katakwi, Kumi, Palisa, Lira, Moroto, Kotido, Tororo.

Mbale, Busia, Kapchorwa ebe ekot kemorikikinos kanu aitopol aiboiso wok.

Ekot ooni aiswamaanar noi noi kotoma akiro nuk agwetanar, etose, ayuara, nepepe ka atikitik erurwo to baren. Elipit eong apugan nako kiding (Central Government) aingarakinnoi kotoma akiro nuka ayuara, irotin luapolok, atacio naka iropito toma apak nepepe ka aburokin baren lukoloje abu apugan kitwasamate apaarasia nu ajaar etongilong ne Teso.

Amunoreong itungakeere luko Soroti distrikt nepepe ka iurian keere luko Soroti distrikt lu ejaasi kinga ebaga tokajokan ka ekaru toiletet tokajokan. Kisirering yesi keere Edeke, Papa openkeere!!

Kanu Edeke kede aka'kwap.

PAPA LO EBAGA Santa Claus

## Kanu adongun ka acibun, Silent Night ejok kakere

Na Job Opolot

Hmm! Ebe epatana lolo ebaga ko Soroti.

Ngol nesi eipone lo iteere lolo asubant ngin. Aticepak abeit, naarai kotoma akiro nu inimete kotauin ebe adau Silent Night ngun kere.

Sin ice ibore kingala ijo amoun lu donguna kaneri ice. Kolot ber ijo 'Akware na iliting' idumuni lunyamanka lumatankede apataru.

"Etemokit lolo eong ipucito kanu ikalia lu ekotosi aliateunkinga na ireriskec,"

abala Ajid, Rose Okwi, atopet Silent Night.

Ne nes idurftakini ijo imaten lu egelegeta, kede inyamat luitekerete aimula kamakon kotiasinei lu isiumokinete etau Lukec ibiro (Wines), ESB ka Whiskies luiponesio kere idumakini ijo Silent Night. Kwape kwana etemokin agolak nu itegelikina, ido ekonoeca lo atupuructitai, sin cabo kitwana arereng na kanu ebaga kalo. Kvidolok ber ijo Silent Night idumuni nu aumokin.

Wrose Okwi

## Kegir cu kitalau de lupomoj konapak

Na Peter Gola

KWAPE apatina kulek kati Yetiungke, kengere karat da ekristayot kaskari aiam kanu kangin kesei amuk, igilthai akinyeta nu inwige imidalin lu ski, iteere ice. Karada kegere kesi iboro ngun da kaya ayalama ekadi ang mam ekilokit itanaji kere de.

Angor inspo, kuyalamas isacutketsa kece, kesi sina mam epeke kesi amuk, igilthai akinyeta nu inwige imidalin lu ski, iteere ice. Karada kegere kesi iboro ngun da kaya ayalama ekadi ang mam ekilokit itanaji kere de.

Angor, ejok bo einer, kewakot ber yesi da koye, ejautane loka ikila, eringa ber eterekoy iberit.

Imatan:

Itungakeeyiu emosete ka lumam emawite ekotos ebe kojakin, apak ngin koupe, kewakot kaskari aipak ngin koupe, emiusik. Ekukunya kwana itunga atieno akina, esukak, epe, ice abeit, iteere ice kesi boto apaaran ngin. Ente bobo ebe etungere abwobwe ebe abwanyan kapak kangin.

Ikapun:

Ejai do ngindus akapanakin kede singin, erisbo kat lu idares ngin apaarasia ngun kewa edasar alosit. Ekot dongum borere kerekoyape, Dont kere ekotos enyadu Dont kwape etionor kwe adumun enyadu ekwake bodo ai?

Kanu adumun iborolu ke eja do ngin etungere, aiketakin aimari kete kanu adumun enyadi itunga luipu emitid amyinyir amode enyadi konye ice kesi boto eminasi ademar kite ejaasi lucie kagogong.

Erono eipone ngol Akwameen ijo amanun enyak kiboikin kwap kosi aidareun ebaga kosi ainumunum koipone ke kwape ipedorla, konyeme ijo awoloboti kede isuite eredio, amuk ka ikap lukokoan. Iwomit ijo de ebuni Edeke ayalamikin aijaun okooke kede iboro lukokoan.

Arai ketionu adumungin. Litetiakhitalau nipomaj konap. Kejai imot kon ikopai nes konyamasibig idumuni ijo ailed a apet

ETOP Nalwongonet, Opo (Bowenha) 17-23, 1998

# AKIRO NU EBAGA

Nesabahad na ejaasi acuman nuka Voice of Teso, neda itolomununere ikwamin lu epeba ko 88.5FM Abakuli nakoteten kokoju nas da itosoman ajaununa ikwamin lu epeba ko itotunioce kanu iyemuto lu akwapin. Apeo na monit Jonathan Maraka.

# Voice of Teso FM Soroti ne

A. Jonathan Maraka

Opo, are itunga aingisit o tunga Voice of Teso eredio ko siumunit. Capt. Mike Muka Teso konye ikwania kwape kwana 50 kote ko toma 88.5FM. Korunt karere, Kwana korunt itunga otaun lo kote ajaisiaun ne korununoremusikko ecai ko kinere. Ateso, kuna neda Amusugun.

Opo jo agule na eyapesi ko. Private Sector Management Promotion Voice, eiduny kede ikwata na eja eyapesi ko. DIO Soroti, idumuni korunoka nakwangan nackistete "Voice of Teso" tian nes ber korunere ikwamin luka. Korunt Teso (VOT) eroko ko aja acuman acie ka. Korunon aduketait na ejaise ko acuman ngun. Apa ita arucori acuuman ko VOT, Charles Oolo ko. Apa itata ebe kwape kwape Voice of Teso. Apa, Serere, Kasilo, Eek, Amuria, Soroti ka. Kasi adis nuko Usuk. Apa-tas 11.12.98 eubai. Apa ayanan ne ikwante ikwamin luka. Apa-kiado arai kedolutu. Kisi eku idaritai epote. Kiseo kere nuko Teso. Kisei nukodistriktan. Kisei yelaipup 'Eporoto. Kisi yurumai emiusik. Kisei kigala 'Eporoto lo. Kisi wawah terii edolete. Kisei simaronakiding. Kisei simoun etaun lo. Kisi Epe keta eletebision ko. Apa ocasio lo Opuyo. Kisei etauriio Soroti.

NES AYAU: Mukula

nes ebeit VOT altosom aweeria ikwamin ke.
VOT nes ediope koredion luka FM lu edeparitos 17 lukwana ejaasi Uganda.
"Mukula (Capt Mike MP lo Soroti) nes eyaunit eredio lo kwape altodolokinet na aisumunet ke ne ejaasi Iteso kapakio nu esupia ngesi abootin (ka..u araun MP)," abala lo epolokit ber kwape kwana eredio ko. Ejei Arnold Ewadu.
Abala Ewadu ebe etosikitor Mukula eredio lo itunga aitolomununia aomisio kec, aingongaria ibakor, airam itunga kanu ayaun apolo, aissisanakinia, aisiala, aiduk imoyoi ka itauon kec kede bodo aitolomar Teso da toma apolo na kwana (modernisation)
Edaunit Ewadu ikaru ikany iswamai akiro nuka aitolomununiyemuto, kacut kotetebision. Iswamat ngesi otetebision loka Abundant Life Kampala ido ngesi nepepe ka oupake, Bert Kakooza, kes lem ijukenakinete CNN World Report aputosia nu etelebision nu ikamunitos

akiro nu etwakete ko Uganda.
Epote iyapesin luka Voice of Teso ajaikin ogoropa lokwapekwana egeantotor kesi auwam.
"Aswum alopet nes ebuni agear eroko elap lo iyareit kedolo. Kiponi isio aitolomunun epuroguram kotoma Ateso, Akumama kede Amusugun, agear isawan itomonaarei lu aiwalar toni kiding kware neda ijalakinia isio itunga epupete emiusik ka iyemuto bon luko BBC arai Voice of America," abala Ewadu.
Ipurograms lu kes epote aitolomunun iyemuto, aboliesio, oyala, ineresinei, emiusik, amalan ka acie da.
"Erailo eredio lo iswamaet isirigin naarai ebuni adumununapiyai nultoloset aswamisio ke liane ejaasi alimonoreta nu agwelanar ka acie da," abala Ewadu.
Elosi VOT adumakin itunga lu edeparete 30 eswamisio aiwadikak ka asiomak iyemuto, etolomununak programs, ka icie da.
Elipit Ewadu itunga kere aiswamanar kede VOT koipone lo kes aitolomunun alimonoreta koredio kalo, aicorkes arai kepaasi kede itunga da ikulepek ayaunun aomis istoma oprogramistu itolomunomio.
"Irai irio eredio lo itunga," abala Ewadu engetakini.
Lu ekotosi aijukakin VOT aomisio arai adio aisiraret kes da epedorete altosom asaduku na eposta P.O. Box 1 Soroti.

# Voice of Teso (VOT) Test Frequency 88.5FM

Lo epolokit Voice of Teso (VOT), Arnold Ewadu ebwoi koingaren na abakuli na igaununei ikwamin lu egelegela kwape nat luka Multichoice kanu arucokin toma VOT tetere itunga luko Teso edumunete iyemuto kakwapin kere.

# IYEMUTO

## KUMI URBAN COUNCIL TENDER BOARD INVITATION TO TENDER

Tenders are hereby invited from competent firms/individuals to collect revenue for Kumi Urban Council during the 1998/99 Financial year from the following source.

1. Market
2. Bus / Taxi Park
3. Boda boda
4. Abattoir

### Conditions of Tender:

a. 1998 income tax clearance
b. Valid trading licence
c. Registration certificate
d. Most recent certified Accounts
e. Latest certificate of Bank balances
f. Physical and postal addresses of the firm
g. Names and addresses of directors
h. Quotations should include VAT
i. Payment of 40,000/= (Fourty thousand shillings) non refundable fee to Town Council's Cashier

The Urban Council shall undertake the following:

i. Provide receipt books
ii. Set rates to be charged
iii. Do the necessary clearing except for the abattoir.

The successful Tenderer shall;

iv. Remit and pay his/her workers; and
v. Provide security
vi. Provide his/her tools (for cleaning abattoir)
vii. Work under instructions given by the Town Council Authorities

Note more information can be obtained from Secretary.

Tenders shall be opened, the same day at 10.00am in the presence of interested parties.

The Tender Board is not obliged to accept the highest or any tender any tender.

Secretary Kumi Urban Council Tender Board
P.O. Box 93
KUMI.

## Ecor Amongin apesur

Na Martha Akello

MP nako Kumi Christine Amongin Aporungesi eozinki apesur nako St. Marys' S.S. Madera aidar swate koc ejok terere mam epotamnente eringa edisiak ka amamos edumun eseny.

Enera Aporu nu kapaaram kana airiamun napolon kakee kokare na auriak ka etisimakinak kosomari kangot araasi 10.12.98.

"Apotaman do aurumun idwe lu midil ido bobo nuka toto kest etisiete adakit ikoko kidari bobo akooke da" abala Aporu.

Aba amogin kicor aesisiak nu aceite akiro nu ingalingalistakesi isap ka ijedk (Sugar Daddies) narai epote ezakokin kesi ationis.

Eyatakit ngesi alimokin auriak aicor ka alimonokin ekim idwe akiro nu ikamunites eseny tetere iduwe koc ejamunete eipone lo idaret swate.

"Ekor yesi ayanganar idwe ocaloi kedol aiyeng itia awoukit idwe ailapad otuun. Aciu ber mam ejamete aigurun utap arai bonat aipoun emagiro da," abala Aporu.

Resident District Commissioner loko Soroti Ejkt Peter Kalagala ngesi abu kicorak auriak akukuranut ayanganar iduwe osomero tetere kesi daedumunete einer lo apugan (National Cake)

"Mam Musaveni eyinanakini itunga lumam esiomizio emagati ngol tai," abala Kalagala.

Kossik yesi auriak ekot yesi aisacd araut amerak naarai nete iduwe lu yesi," abala Kalagala.

Abu da bobo Kalagala kosmok auriak amamus ecamanakin ipesur ludidik edukonokin "Ijo siotar Tins eko i jo alimokin Bishop Wandera eebe mam eong acamuni abonero aite imukerun edukonokinos arai siwen apeta," abala Kalagala.

Ajai apolon eicolong LC 5 Soroti Ejkt John Emilly Otekat da asubao nu.

## Ekapakin Ecango aburokin Okiseng

Na Sam Ekadu

EKUKULERU Erinayo Ecangoit Okwalo loekoto asesmo kwape ekansila kano ka etem Kumi, aburokin lo arai ekansila sek Ejkt Simon Okiseng ngesi etolomu aboikinota ko. Apal okiseng araut ekansila naarai iswamai kwana ngesi kede erionget lukojokotau, Kumi Childress' Project Red Barnet.

Eurikita! Ecangoit Orony lo agule oitela lo Agule otem lo Kumi. Erai ngesi lo apoloo na ikarufi5.

Edukokina ngesi, ejaasi ka ahero nepepe kidwe da.

Isisiat da ngesi anyoun katukot nasidit kitoni Soroti junior Technical School, aisisia nuka aiko abao.

Iswamat da ngesi iyapesin lauipu kwape nat Uganda Police Protectorate kwape Radio operator.

Iswamat Ecagoit bobo kwape ekansila k Teso District Council, abwoikin etem Kumi. Koodi da kwapekwana, erai ngesi apolon eicolong loka e movement kotem lo Kumi. Ejaatar da kode abaluwan (certificates) 2 nuka Farm Management kanuka Project Design Action Programme for Development Abookineta Ecangoit kesi imoriaritos samorikikinka apoponor, kode

ikanolan loko Dainola aswan.

Ipoda da bobo koi aiiwamanar ererje eiswamak loka apogani, servante) ejok nui "Ijo ejaai otem lo Kumi."

Kanuka akutiana, eisian ngesi epassianakin iswamai lu kotem Kumi, isuuk ekoriere ejok ka apat kami da tetere edumun apu idaris ikaliakko ejok liyatakit Ecangoitete," ekaeun eong, ebon amokin ikatunga nukin losjokojokot, lospukai agweliar iraaekes.

"Kano ayawara ara nui eong abuni eong asoong, itunga ka, ikisila, apolon nuka etungaman esenwai aipui: kamagukina."

Ebeit aoro ajakin Isama 20.12.98.

## Etakadikin aministe

Aay, App.3

Abu da ngesi kilip e distrikt ayaitakire nu idwalaik kwape ibore yen epooik noi koipone kalo abidolonikin kesi aitmuonorona edisipone" ejaa atalaaman nen ido adao eong aisisiam ebe ekapanakina ingwalaik loko Soroti ajaun apolo. Edaunitios ingwalaik loko Soroti apoleun esemero koc k'Aminit ne epooiatar kesi aitutuenor bonik kulelekaarit akiro nu akoru.

abu Mukwaya kimuarite

aatumunak kano atalakite ipolor adakit epookor kime akiro nu aitupol atutubago ebe kanukoc, kiceboki ailipit apugan ibore lukko noi Lolo nasiapak na aatumunak sikopar epoik ngun kane ejaasi ipeko Mere amotokan ipekipke nesi apolo" abala Mukwaya liyatakinit da Mukwaya apugan ka etungata dakon ekorete iloonin adum amuno kene ejaasi ang kowai lo atacama duap ngun" kingoila ijo UCR koca ngupengun nepepe entandikwa da.. lob ka kokranakinai anger ikon ngun naarai etacakak" abala Mukwaya kodnette akansila airam ikanon.

Abu da Mukwaya kiosiam altukono nukojokotas keto

## Emuasi MPs atiakitok ateker

Aay, App.4

itunga akwena. Erai Otekat epirisit lo ikamunitos akiro nu aidar itinga.

MP na angor Pallisa alleluyi Ikote ngesi abu kilip Otekat aridakin angor ka atumunak toam aitemonikiseta ke nu apolo kaitelekaarit samorikikin itunga loko Teso.

"Okwe apas cabo angor atingadaaro cut konye koraasi kesi isin lu apolo," abala Ikote kodnete angor eikare.

Omar Omeda MP lo Serere ngesi abu kitijana ebe mam cut atiakak kiding na Ikumama keda lono arai na ebuaikinit cut nabarai ebe edelelei cut kodoco ebe ne duo ejaunor ateo kenoili atiak kwa kangin

ajaun apote liteso aitelekaar naarai epu adepar Ikumama.

"Ibore epol nesi na ooni apoponor kaoubete sigir ngul tu igurete ooni," abala ngesi.

Abu da ngesi kiyatak aicor Otekat araut enyarenon lo atiting kenoili acoit ngun lu apote aicor ngesi eromo.

"Onaceka, etioko politika nuko Soroti, kicamaki ipopone itunga kwa ngun alukunit ijo, ikeri ijo abongor acok ikonitiang," iyatakinit ngesi.

Cap Mike Mukula MP lo Soroti Manicipality korai da apolon eicolong loka e movement ko Soroti distrikt ngesi abu kimuarite atiakatiakak na itung ako Soroti koabla ebe mam cut

Ekcma eswamaanara keda eipogo loka e movement.

"Eraan engarensh lo esawar edeke ido ijo ngan ingurianikini apolonke ikon ijo amyak nor kasi" abala Mukula.

ETOP Nainongpost, Opo (Desemba) 17 - 23, 1998

# AISISIA/ANGALEU

## Ekot RDC Katakwi ailok akipi

Na Oriokot Aarika

APALINONUT ne epol noi
nes sinakit itunga wuk la
ejassi ka itogui la abuulu ka
lu idnayasi ka adeketa na
abuulu emonyete akipi toal
aparasia na etepisedou da.

RDC Katakwi, Chephong
Chemaynet agesi etipnaset
na pas kadekis na Amaria
ipanti abwukiniton erisagot
loka United Nations Fund
for Population Activities
(UNFPA).

Alimuni RDC ne akuule
na apalon etoolong LC Jetom
Kaja, Stephen Edyas,
alimakin ippjek ebe akoto
adekin ke Amaria abekikinn
agile kana adekuk aittnom.

Abula Chemaynet ebe akoto
itunga ajenn eipone lo ignet
ka aidar akipi na edou naarai
itidiolaret antonia na akipi
aparasia na uiporo.

"Idmayasi ijo iwek itunga
nepe ikwiari edoa korimarin
bobo anger aimon ekokoro
amaria akipi agido, kanye
kejadakinn akipi elelete apak
tesi etepi edoa," abula
Chemaynet.

Aba agesi isuman
aisinimakin itunga aidak
ataagin na akipi.

## Autakinos auriak aiduk Akisim PS

Na Gilbert Eagima

ITUNGA lukotirda Akisim, Kapir ken-tutasi aituk ageyai atacia
enomak amatapalin. Kongol skalo olemani 10,000/- atoliokit
5,000/-, aberu da 5,000/-. Apolori etoolong loka School
Management Committee, Teresa Ocligo nes amalkini Etop na
pas konomero kalo.

Abula agesi ebe epudasi her kesi kinomunai amatapalin 60,000
kto wettete oit. Angor kesi ebekete asingol kosoil ikiliok ailtok
anoro.

Abula apoloni etoolong PTA, Oton Bonnie, ebe elmete kesi
aitac enomak amatapalin 900,000/- ka adepar.

## ALIMORET

## COTTON FIELD DAY

SERERE AGRICULTURAL AND
ANIMAL PRODUCTION RESEARCH
INSTITUTE (SAARI)

Asuban nu apaaran naka epaaba (Cotton Field Day)
kes epote ajaikin SAARI Naikanyet eraasi 18.12.98
ageun isawan iarei lukatupuruc (8.00am). Enyaritai
akoriok kere, eswamak apugan (Policy makers),
eswamak lu akoru kocaaloi (extension workers),
apolokinitok nu epaaba kodistriktan (District Cotton Officers),
aseak icok epaaba (Cotton Ginners), ka
agwelanarak epaaba okekwan (Cotton Exporters).

Icie lu enyaritai kes eswamak igoen lu epaaba ka icie
kere lu itolosete aswamisinei nuka epaaba.

Eponio aitodiar iponesio ka acuuman nu itetiak kwape
nat, iponesio epaaba lu egelegeela, eipone lo ingadis
epaaba ka iponesio lu imukeis epaaba alemar ikur
(pests) arai bo nat intergrated Pest Management
(IPM). Kosodi eponio aitodiar eipone loitosomaet
imongin arai apuudai akorio, acapia ka acie da.

Acuuman nu egelegeela nu itwasama kwape nat
kanui iraan kalu akinyet (Oil crops), lu imareikitos (Grain
legumes) ka imomwa, alos, ekirididi ka icie lu eputos
ka kes (Cereals) kes da eponio aitodiar.

Kopotu idiopediopen, kopotu kere.

# ATEMELEL/EYALA

# Alaro na eloikinitai atemelel nako Teso

Ngeea

Euritai Alaro araaui 28.4.1974. Ngesi bon apese kaknik keo. Erai ngesi na etnayo kwapa 'toto' ido kanuke ebala Alaro ebe apese ngesi eprape ka atyalama na epol noa maara eras ekalekeo. Iromonikikina kokanina eko kitopolontos, amina na Edeke.

Egourit ngesi minotate ko Kyambogo Nursery School, Kampala npo do etupode. Ngoro Girls Primary School kokaru 1978 neda abusio ngesi aakulit do acormais ka agese P3 kitoto P4.

Abu do Alaro kijular City Primary School, Kampala auromas P3 ka P6 'toto do bobo ehongens aibiokin aangito ke na PL E ko Ngoro Girls Boarding P1.

Abu kobena Ngora High School agrar ko S1 toni S1 neda asate ngesi na atimaant kotorna akiro noka aadak ikilaboo kwape nat dromoi, Literature, debate.

Arai oreg na akukurana no kokilabun kangun, aornii reisi atennere eong ataiin akaptoin na Crimes House ko City High School, "abala Alaro nada elajaara.

Kokaru 1990 eho digigesi kobona auromas na laya ko City High School neda abu agese kongotak kokaru 1993: "Eitunio oreg apol auroman katukono kangun, konye abu kangatak jokani," abala Alaro.

Kwape aminar eong aowam na itolosi ijo ijat otunga abu do eong aloma aitutuoro kwape atotan iyemuto kousmero kato. Uganda Institute of Business and Media studies okaru 1993 kakimuto kede edipolonte loka aiwadik iyemuto okaru 1994," abala atemel. Kousmero kalo epaiokini da bobo ngesi kwape agipigiran naka estotak ko eyatno momen.

Kokaru 1995 abu do Alaro da kopodo aduman iropit ka yemondit erosi iyemuto kana apapula kana ijana noi. The New Vision, neda abusio ngesi bobo kikamana ureereg atunaro kospore kalo airot iyemuto Sa engelsitai ka aiwadik da Abu da kodamabula atmeelomant koi, onenoronaitti Press Union kana ainem aputonia (Photo Journalism)

Angioi ngesi kobala ebe ajai ngesi ekapanakma aigirise aitemonokinetanda neda abusio ngesi airimor kigangite apogan nako Soroti arwe rejiri lo aireerkikina.

Apapi ngesi epogot noi kano asounio naka Emovimor nahana ebe adumatu do kwana litrio du akou. "Bore do, kwana yen epol neis oni ainesosour itemosie wok kanoikte aitememon asie kanoikte aikisanar na iwomiti oni ebe isuromit atakar wok litio," abala ngesi.

Etopolontit Alaro adeguaro bobo nu ilangano tiska idongai, aposi, akongoi, atenso. "Kingolita ijo apopii eong akiro, ngun aipop, konye mam cut aanyunitor eranio. Ksupone kangon akwetara eong Aporu Cup nesi do ber kwapekwana abolia diat epogatatar lieso," abala ngesi.

Kanu ebe asisisamakro, acinpo ko aiuor ateker ekwetarit Alaro adukumutio na igurupun kalo itodiamante aboliasin, neponen epodoria ateker da adumun kwan.

Kokaru 1997 kepupu Alaro bala mam adumonit aetutuoro nadoht, abu kobongo aitutuoro kotoma akiro nu airot iyemuto ko Uganda Management Institute neda angetakina ngesi kede e diploma esie kageunet na ekaru kalo.

K"apekwana iswarna Alaro keda Media Plus erionget lo arotak iyemuto kojaasi adeketa nako International Conference Centre, Kampala, kijukete iyemuto stalebision lo Light House.

Kanaikomada Alaro abongo auroman edigori ke lo ikamunitin ikisila, ekoto ber ngesi ayangar ureereg na araut Miss Teso abongan Teso alimonokin itunga ajokusio na ayangamar idwe momen. "Ejai ejautens lo auroman kaitelekaarit apesar kau cut ko Teso idu ekoto oni aikisar ejautens ngon, kitoni ipulok wok da iboukisot adumun adoi auroman tetere kesi da ejentets na etwakito kanukes," abala Alaro na eboomukim Atese.

Mam Alaro iyalama kana atiakak na kwana edika kodistriki lo Soroti. "Aibodu idoli oni arai iroko oni iswarnai iboro kwakolo,"

alakamar na isukunyet apak. Ibore yen ipuda Alaro attam ajisot. Kikikisanat kuleker na bono nesi na ikiliok atam angor ken. "Okwe ikiliok atyoite ho adumunet ijo atipipol yensize, ans be etioko yost aibiokin kwap kisereekki inapakinesi," engisit Alaro kobala ebe ajai nipud lo epol aisisiamakot angor ka ikiliok nu ikamunitot apedemuto ken.

Insuarit da ngesi abuyu aisiol idwe ka angor. "Eipone boda iasi epodoria ateker kwa kangin na iswarnai kwa kangun asinpol adusisio kesi arai jotima anemisis kati akiro kwanat kangin?" engisit Alaro kiyadakita ebe "ejai oni ayisot ateker."

Abala Alaro ebekaraida ajaanakina ngesi "ilanganso la atemelel toipu loepolok kwapenat. Model of the True 1998 ka Queen of the Nile ko kampala, aisi ailelekaar ka na Azemel nako Teso adumunet naepol noi keijar ke.

Erai da Alaro na ejaanakin aitodianar anapito nu edonyete luku Pascack Jashome, Kinga and Queen, Muda! Mama ka laze da. "Amina nong akiro nu aila noi," abala ngesi.

Mam ber Alaro istumunakada loibecik inakamudukun ekale keda ngesi. (Ikilai, aso cabo)

"Konye ayeni ering ebe eturiaso adoi apak, konye mam ber eong eburakit," abala ngesi konuronaut akwena.

Kwape na iboiti nisi ko Teso kista da bobo na edukit akitot na einimo otasi, emina Alaro ajepejep atap na teok k'aidukulinokin abakuli na eradoi. "Amina da eong idusime, kere lu eradokitai emaido toma," abala atemele.

# EKOTE BO AI? Iboro lu etosomao kolo kasonya

Na tala LOribbo

NONOSKO eraasi ainapite nakaikiro nutemonokit ngin ateker kiosok aitogogongor asipit komam ekoto abilar, abo imidio itunga budomanin ebilaritos eromo ajae ateker aitepesim kiosok atulomokin igelito turgogong toma.

Kolo tek eroko Imoo turgolgola kedolumo Teso, ajaasi limo da kede ibero nai iortwasamaete kes kotoma aijar keo naka ngin ipuran, koraas isje kotoma iibore kangal luka inomoiis turgolgola, luda ajaas kipelita toma. Isje koboto kangal ekisilikinitai idwe ka angor. Kanaiki itunga luman etopolonitai (lumam trapanitoi) mam cut atanakita atese.

Kedolut do Imoo apotu koraat iboro abukim oni ebekara toma abilaru luck. Isje koboto lurtwasamaete ebe koraas da luka einomo mi inumariini.

"Emakak" arai eootong kanaiwade iortwasamamenete itunga kwanamiton bon komam mamuktai imoibo ikoku, mera karaida yen mam

esapanit aibok in toma karaida atinse.

Etwasamaete itunga luscamakitai aibuyu emakuk toma apaaraisa merjastai asuban naka aponya lukatwak, arai apaaraisa na ajaar airiget, arai bo da aicolongite toma apak naiyengia ekasikout (itunganan yen epol).

"Entwada" ekitoi nes iswannasnitere, kodukolok kano ainginyinginyia emagira ka asudokinia emaido toma odia.

"Eipirel" eswananinitai kotoma ekioti (ekore) kano ainyalakinia akile na ibukitai nepepe ka aokot nurgumunitat kotoma akitong tetere ejokuna aingob. Acepak epirakisere akinyet

na ipistoi ido kisemeikinite toma akima nuimutai tetere ejiinainat.

"Akaelei" eswananini kotoma akitoi naka ejoroi, kanuka aodumeto akuruny aodumokinio toma atanyin arai aderekai nu enyamere.

"Akolobus" eswananinitai kotoma amumwarat naka akiteng arai bo da na tiung lukokitai. Nes etwasamam itunga lukapolok anyama.

"Ekaame" adumanakisoi osama ne ejai toto acelet. Etosomao ekaame acapia akima. Anyamiatar bobo angor nukapolok da.

"Anapet" Eswananumus kole emakule loka tiung amitan, ekale, amor ka loka anerokok kinunyimanyintai ejok noi, kojaro ka acileta aongonmu koyunio kotoma emakule loka akiteng kana erai "abekot" mere akitong na etwanit atwanit. Ngionon anapemenere idwe kopuran. "Adejo" (ataale) emakule lo imanyimanyitai koria lo amiren arai akale. Nes imakitere ikoku tetere acome akolong nepepe ka akira, adekesu mu ejorinir ekwani ka acinbo ikpolok tetere man emudiarere ajiin ikoku fiyatakaiso makulit ngol.

# ABOLASO

# Aburoki Omoding Obua

Na Ronnie Ikara

ETUTUOROK lo amanyelet ko Uganda (Uganda Football Coaches Association) kesi aseuto Big Ben Omoding araun apolosi eticidong kec kotoma aapo kena etolonio ko Policy Sports Club Lugogo, Kampala arassi 6.12.98.

Eburwokini do Omoding loda epona kwape etuturoror eumisokitwoi akruni ka Osmoa Obua lo pac abu konyam apolosi na araun e president loka Federation of Uganda

Football Association (FUFA). Eseumtisi ngesi komam itspegitai.

LO sek erai etuturoroi lo etolonio Uganda, Polly Ouma ngesi injemaarii ehe ibsokitso aseuno k'Omoding uinyam apolisu ngin istere apodori aikeun adoketait na amanyelet ko Uganda nada ehe ewooi kwap oot.

Ahala da Osma ehe aponio atiakatiak etuturorok kotoma adoketa kitoritos toma aituturor na odumunit kangin idiopet kakesi tetere face da

epederete adomun arereng na aitutuomore. Eponso da adomunakin kesi akaador na isipedorete kesi'alomunar emodio aisawe kere aito ilugamol ha amanyelet komam itatario nangin.

Abu Eddi Batindo da koburok akajen ka Osma kwape apolise eticidong UFCA.

Etuturoroi lo etolmi lo SC Villa, Paul Hausle ngesi apoto kosrawai kwpac shapituo k'Omoding kosodi etuturoroi lo KCC, Asuman Lubowa, uinyam apolise na egiriginan.

Ben Omoding

Obua

Osmoa

# Esanyasi

# isomero

# icaalo lu

# Alogook

Na D. Martin Elungat

AMUNT ELET na ationo nos ekusyonn nes aboliao kalaro na Alogooki P/S, Katakwi.

Atemokitos imwalimun elaagano ngol kamu agolok in aparan na auriak na atolonio kosomero kangol arassi 9.12.98.

Etiomo lo alomunit kocaalo kangol (Alogook) nes apoto isap lu Alogooki PS kobitasi 2:1.

Abu amanyelet na kognun kutakwari itomori ka atutubet lu atibong.

Kocoma adakikun akasy nusodit abu Omal Alfred komamei adiope kongu ketubutubu icaaloi kinsidete icaaloi adonnan bala adanyai tapo do ngesi eswalari egoolo losodit.

Nepe esalitos adakikan bala akasy honangetak in atutub nasodit abu icaaloi, Ocarner Andrew lo Otom, kitamat eigolo ediopet.

Abu atutubet nasodit kongetakin erai 1:1.

Nepe icukokinio emopora katutubet kanaiyarco abu esumeroti hapit James kitamat egoolo lo iyareit.

Keanyu ekaptein lo Alogooki PS, Abura Solomon, ehe ajokustu akiro kewas kec abu ksize ikapasip abungor abolia aidar kau tetere mam inomio kes inomio egoolo ecir.

Abu do emopora kongetakin isawan itomonaarei ka adakikan atomon.

Epejonon lo angosibib ngesi erai apolon eicolong LC III, nam Katakwi, Ejkt Imalingat Stever.

Abu kisinyikok atomunak aitodun atalantyan kes kotoma aboliasinet.

# Acakaki Serere Pingire iboomun

Na Michael Esumo

ETHMI, loka Serere Soccer Bombers, lokobaka Serere nes arussi 6.12.98 Naesabiti abu kiturunak Kidetok FC (Kasilo) igoboi 2:1 kotoma ailangilangua amanyelet na ejaskina alaro nakosomero la Serere Primary School.

Agner elaagano lo isawan itomou loka ejetet neda apat etungat anya anya.

Katutubet nasodit, apotu imasraiko loka Kidetok FC koridakino itoba lako Serere Soccer Bombers neda abunio ekaman egoolo, esapat Amolo aswan kopoluror noi.

Konye keja ngaa da, ekami gebdadoikapa. Idomumedio awai ebe kopedo adumun egoolo katutubet kangin.

Katutubet kana iyarot nes abu etutumoron loka Soccer Bombers, esapat Zagalo 'Keya' kitolomania itobait idiopo yea emakitat Suker

Ekime loda abu kisinap amanyelet jukan kosodi aitaitol ebaak loka Kidetok tuni adamakin etima ke egoolo losodit.

Akaalo naka adakikan bala atomon abu Kidetok da kinyanga.

Konye kicuraki ekaptein

loka Soccer Bombers, esapat Elungat Willy, isap ke asa no, orwa, Abu kosab bak, egwana ikerap neda abunio bubo Suker kijangia amanga naka Kidetok tuni adetakan egoololyaret kongetakin do amanyelet da kispong kangol.

# AILEL KANE EMOPIRA

AIITOR EMOPIRA LO AKWAP: Itunga luko Jamaica elakanaros eroko ber etimu kec keretokino kede lo Argentina Juni 21 kolaagano loka World Cup ko France. Abu Jamaica kiloleka 2-1 on igoolon 2-1.

# Abitanasi idwe luko Opucet PS auriak kedi

Na Sem Ekodu

KOLAAGANO lo aipet emopora nes apomata idwe lu esumeret ko Opucet PS, nam Gwari kobitaniarista auriak kesi igoolon 3:2, arassi 11.12.98 apak na agolokinere atuama naisanet.

Esapat Robert Eregu ngesi agaskin aswalar egoolo losodit, ainomakin auriak. Korengonete do auriek da kitimi Peter Opucet (aurian) aitabakin aretokin igoolo idiopet. Kisanyakim bobo aurian Stephen Emaku, anangakin bobo egoolo loiyaret.

Kinyek konyet idwe igogolomini auriak, kitum bobo ikoku Eregu aichilika egoolo lo aciaciat kinyareksa.

Kwape asshiton bala abu auriak agogong adaan ebo bobo ikoku Eregu koswale kinyo egoolo lotiariat tapo do abu lu esomere kere eketera sibwok, esapat ken kopakinete do auriak oiyirinyirites.

Arai da na abotia na etenoko apolosi esomero, Ajki Mary Florence Aralo, kami asian auriak kere lu ajuani nes.

Esisianakinat lobo Oony ngesi erai toitatumori abolia aipet emopora.

# Enumunum Kumi aseunio Obua, Otai

Na Chris Osekeay Jamu

EGANGITOK apolon eicolong loka Federation of Uganda Football Association (FUFA) ko Kumi distrikt, Michael Okitor Otai, kimsinas nos emopora kes pac apota kijangika etaan lo Kumi ne ewalakiniata shalu, abolia ka aurara taba kami situmunum aseunio k e.

Abu FUFA arassi 1.12.98 kesen Dennis Obua kwape president lo loitete lo atukot kana kosodete ainakin Otai ara engadan ke.

Abu Obua kidoto lolem ngai eicolong, Ejkt Twaha Kaka kotoma aseo.

Apotu Obua kede Okitor kojitros noi, kigangitos imedlat ipu, aanyun ebu alemario Kakaire kede ekomiiti ke koyape loka FUFA naarai ehe mam etimomue lo apiyat acai.

Akaalo na alemario kec aponi kisunyatai angisun ehe ma ajena eponse etwasamaterre 72m/=koringa ireres icte ibomi


IYEMUTO

# Epoikisi ingatunyo iwenan epilao obaga

Na Joh Opolot
AYUKOT na Ingatunyo (Liona) naku Soroti nas aresti 24.12.98 abu kipotli iwenan luku Soroti opaciti ke kropi.
Iwenan la adulete 150 lucyalamasikimaromustad olonana, kos apota kong rangla epilao kede stekersmani na imana kere na ajansi.
Abwoikinitou oprevident loka atukot kangta Eda Wala Bisanga, ages abu kolimok iwenan la ebe apodokit atukot koc ejantene koc (iwenana).
Abala agesi ebe ara i erionget koc lo imina iwenan, ide abulkonet na opacit kangdarui uimor kakeri ekene koc surto naku Kristo kolpore kalo adongon, amatos kola gauri akirotnaka Edeke.
Angatuny Agiripina Amoge Akol, na erai CAO naku Soroti, ages abala ebe arai aboukinet na atukot kangtyo singarnkin ka aijanakin itanga keere.
Abu da agesi kitar apolokinitok aweningin aapepekati iwenan kamu aiwamanara koc, kede cedare ka atika awaisingin kede iwenanda.
Apolon eirolong LC 5 Soroti, Ejkt. John Emily Otakar, agesi abu kitar atukot ngin kosodi aimala koti kena apodokinitejantene lo iwenanda.
Abu agesi kilipi iwenan adumun amono kama ajai Edeke, konodete aijaanakirot na aminanara kotawoukec. Kosodi alip yesi ayongit apodorosiona itonga ka aynara.
Rev. Michael Okwi Esakan lo engarenikit adipastasi agesi abu kilip iwenan ainakina toma Kristo kotoma upaarasiakere.
Ekaulo aposi kogwetainsi esinema kano iwenanan aite aurin ka Kristoc kinotasi t esi kane aanyun esinema.

AIJUL EWODE: Iwenan icikete epilao

# Ejulijuli lu ayuara ko Soroti

Na Joh Opolot
JTUNGAi iarsi, ekiliokitkede akebenu, kes aposi kuarai kakware kana ebaga ko ababango kotem Asuret, Soroti kosodi ko Kumi nes ikamunitotor ipolisin Idea Ibrahim ebe kana aibir kitten aiyar Akoba Mikairi kosodi aicweikin ates.
Yokosafati Ochan kanowaike Norah Akaye, kes apota itunga lu mam ber ejenuna kongaato korekec kosodete aisiebisieb kede ipaagai.
Ipolisin luko Soroti kes apotu kitigogongoto akiro ngun kosodete aiyatakin ebe aroko kesi nagiisate akiro.
Abakasi kesi kotupitos einer kethe ejakinetekno ideokulu atwak ebe apotu itunga isisi kee kotupitos iguen lu ajore kede emaudu adinpet ko surokisi etogo koc kosodete aipepajep auruk koc.
Eyatakitos kes ebe abakasi idwe ebe akaulo na angaun kesi ebe engisiton kwi isirigin kama ajansi Ochan, konye ebe keliman Ochan ebe amameste isirigin ebe korasakinete kwi aipejeeg ngon.
Abu Ochan kotwanik nepepen, konye Akaye ngon abu kotwanik orot etamitai ti ayangaan adekis napolon, soroti amakian.
Abakasi ipolisin ebe isiebisiebitai Ochan kede Akaptokidogakwes, na arono tatai.
Kosodi District CID Officer lo Kumi, Ejkt Joseph Ohwora ngos abu kofanoa Editalo stop Kennoib Oluka kosirimi apaaran Naabalsa ebe Totabok eibaga jokan kilima atonos adiope bon na eyatit ko caalo lo Kawo kotem Kidongole Abu Idasa Ibrahim koyar Aketa Mikairi.
Abala Ohwora ebe etakimunit eyatit lo enawa adiope lo atibong.
"Akaulo naiyar Aketa, abu lo ikamunitot ipolisisir (Idasa Ibrahim) kicweek itogoi ikany keda Akeba Mikairi. Abu do akim ngin konyam Mikairi amaro nakoteten kede akan danakoteten," abala Ohonya, "Tertai ngesi adorit kitten atwanikin nepepenen" abala Ohwora.
Eyatakit DCID Officer ebe akaulona aiyar kede aicweikin ereke, ebe abu Idasa kolonik erekoma coke Akebalodidilo ebe Ocom Dan kosodi aicweikin itogoi ikany kangina da.
"Erai ationis ebe elimilimitai Mikari kede Dan ebe kosi elogaste aberu ke (ibrabim Idasa) nakwapekwana ejai ejantene erono not," abala Ohwora.
Kosodi aiyatakin ebe "Apaaran Naemukaga na adolitor nong ngina abu nong kadum LCs ebworok kede ijaka. Ajaasi do ipajan kala atwan ekapanakinos alouit ainyangar ekecetuan. Abu eong kalimok kesi mere albwukirekisi akamokes."
Ejai do ber kwana Ibrahim akasiniipolisiniko Kumi.
Abu apolon eirolong LC 5 Kumi Hajji Umar Okodet kitigngowakiri na kosima.
Eyatakit Okodel ebe "emameiber ationis adio kama ejaani laka mansai (fiske) "
Kosodi asisalamikon Etop ebe kanu koleje aitoloman aimoio ke ebe ekot ituga ainyam ebaga kidarete da ayaarakederinara akwanakin amat. "Apotu iyemuto ngul ingaaksu itunga not ncs nes anyamamar ebaga ejok.
Eyatakinit Apolokitonpolisi ko Soroti Charles Bitungi ebe, anyamam ebaga ejok marai ebe aketakinitou kesi ayaara kede aiiwamanara na itungakere ainakini aipacejai apak ngin.
Ilearin luka Military Police, nepepe kede ipolisin kes enaesimanete etaan kede aiboisin mi idonyatar.

# Aari iuni obaga

# Ayangau Omaria

Coi. Omaria

# Na Job Opolot

JTUNGAi iarsi, ekiliokitkede akebenu, kes aposi kuarai kakware kana ebaga ko ababango kotem Asuret, Soroti kosodi ko Kumi nes ikamunitotor ipolisin Idea Ibrahim ebe kana aibir kitten aiyar Akoba Mikairi kosodi aicweikin ates.
Yokosafati Ochan kanowaike Norah Akaye, kes apota itunga lu mam ber ejenuna kongaato korekec kosodete aisiebisieb kede ipaagai.
Ipolisin luko Soroti kes apotu kitigogongoto akiro ngun kosodete aiyatakin ebe aroko kesi nagiisate akiro.
Abakasi kesi kotupitos einer kethe ejakinetekno ideokulu atwak ebe apotu itunga isisi kee kotupitos iguen lu ajore kede emaudu adinpet ko surokisi etogo koc kosodete aipepajep auruk koc.
Eyatakitos kes ebe abakasi idwe ebe akaulo na angaun kesi ebe engisiton kwi isirigin kama ajansi Ochan, konye ebe keliman Ochan ebe amameste isirigin ebe korasakinete kwi aipejeeg ngon.
Abu Ochan kotwanik nepepen, konye Akaye ngon abu kotwanik orot etamitai ti

# Aditanakisi amerak Ilugai esuula ko Soroti

Na Bonnie Ikara
JLUGAI iuni kesi apotu kokuata aiuutakino agweret na asisi not kesurwokisi kesi amerak. Ediopet kamerak kaluemi LC loapolonkotaanlo Soroti, ediopet agwelanaran esigala ko Soroti ediopet iboyei ko Entebbe. Amoromorote kesim Ilugai koba loka Jose Marti, Sobat Avenue Soroti 26.12.98.
Nape isakete Ilugai lu alaro nako Jose Marti kwana, abu ameran lo Entebbe koranak aikwenyakin kesi ebe: "I don't like these things here, why don't the silly things go back home, (mam cat nong amma ibero lu kano inyo ber mam ibero lu bangiokkebongonoriatabukoc.)
Apotu Ilugai kwi ikidepek kodapakinot okoona ecie aiyet mauda loagaete kwi komam ibore koc apodokitos.
Ebalalo esigala elimokini Ilugai okumes okumes ebe "Kesi, arai kulo ejai nong apodor, ti kwapekwana nong esima eesi kede abotet kitten moi eesi aidok abassi aibong bukos."
Apotu Ilugai lu kinatata ailiingit kilumunibobendiopet ebe "alastins boyesi ebe kijiakotapedomoio nong, akaulo na acupa kana akoto nong aikwan ediopet akit kakan," abu na kijaik ber Ilugai asubanakin kongoleraikinos. Ausate amerak lu esula kede Amusugun na upupete Ilugai.
Abu ediopet kikenyak Ilugai ebe esisimuniton kesi ebe amamnototor Ilugai ngul kede abaluwan num camakinitou kesi arawan ko Uganda (work permits).
Akaulo na aisekitek Ilugai ngun anjou komam kwi inyangariton da apotu Ilugai ikidepek kodapadapaaror kinyamiton amoromorote "Silly Stupid Mother fuckers" (ibanguska, nu atokus name) Akoto da ti ediope acedakin Eluga aipet kakan konye apotu kwi kooliosi kanipet.

ETOP Nainungmut, Opo (Desenhai) 31, 1998 - Januari (Ovara) 6, 1999

# IYEMUTO

## Ebunit bobo NURP toma odistriktan 14

IYEMUTO

Ebunit bobo NURP
toma odistrikitan 14

Na Peter Okori

EKONOMITO lo engunget aiteo National
Northern Uganda Reconstruction Programme
(NURP), nes bobo ebeit aupakin ngesi
idistrikitan Angaria, Katakwi, Soroti,
Kumi ka Kalaki.

Arai ng nu ejemari Ejkt Punani nu
oriena lo apolokit ngun lo ejukunit NURP
epipion lo ebeitor asisianemisio nu ka NURP
aitwanare to Kasakwi araasi 14/12/98.

Ikoromokabecam NURP II epolosi kede NURP
adokid eduan.

“Alim NURP na erai aupugan ibore yenei
edotos nuko karakarikere. Konye apesu
kiraunor nu konorete ngun ka cokosi kesi;
nesi ngun ka kwana kirimoritor iso
ngun ka kangata na ekotosi poma,”
abala Oriena.

Apolon cicolong LC 5

# Adumutu LCs inerio

Na Kokas Omeja

LC3 luko lom Bugenodot, Kasilo kesi pac
akorakin inerio kec luka opitunupolon
ecolong loka LCIII Bugondo, Joseph Emuda.

Apotut inerio ngun lu araas 1,594,643/=.
Apotut inerio luka LC1s kotiakina 1,328,919/=.

Ebeit asipokin ikearin
3,000 toma Karamoja

Na Orieko Aurike

APUGAN nes ebeit asipokin auriakai luka
UPDF lu edoli amina kec 3,000 kotoma
bugata ani nuka isirikalei ngin idope.

Eponio bukat luka Karamoja, kacu
abosio na egicunitait ebe araasi nu
engasit.

Legolokinit abungent maka UPDF na 61
(61st Battalion) ipedo boma Katakwi,
Maj Gen Gumusi ngesi etijarari nu
kotoma airimunun na ayarunut.

KOKIROR KALOASUBAN:
Emorimor loka Iteso, Augustine Kadugala
Osuban Ilairai ko Lukiko Hall luko Soroti
pac kanu agear aswam ke.

Ekopakin adekis etogo loejengere

Na Emmanuel Akelem

AITEMONOKINIO aitallaria naka etogo lo
ejengere adekak kadekis napolon ko Soroti
nesi do kongu angetakin akaulonaka ekaru
edupet.

Ekopakin ayaitok adekis ajengis na araasi
22.12.98 engarenok lu edistrikiti,
ka kimoriaritos icebanu luka LC5.

# Koraun 1999 ekaru lo aiswamanara ka aipuc

ADOLU ekaru loitetet!

Idiope ibore yen itegelikina kangetakin ekaru lo 1998 nes 'airimun' naka ebaga loka ikuristayon (Christman) kede elap loka alaunan lo aisiba naka isiriamun (Hob) Month of Ramathan) kede auraneta nu apolok naka eyuunak loka Bahai.

Ageun koleje 24 Desemba, ajaasi angor nuka Bahai aurianet ko Kampala. Kosodete atumunak kec airiamun Bahai Temple Kampala ageun 28. Ko Teso, ebeit atumunak luka Bahai ajaun aurianet 3-6 Januari 1999 ko Tilling, Kobwin, Ngora.

Aisisianakin naka ikristayon kotoma apakio nu nu aurio naka Kristo topolorit aminanara, aiyapepera kamunonut. Kokaru ecorete alimonokinak luipu eipud lo aijamam ka aipuc kakwapwok Uganda.

Isiriamun da kolap kalo ka Ramathan, itopoloritos ailip (irwan akany apaaran), aitironikin, aitimonorokede aikor.

Kotoma aiyuan naka Bahai, itopoloritai cut kakere aimorikikina kwape ipei na itungasinei kalu akwap keere. Itopoloritos kesi da amina kede esilizane kanu ajiski naka itunga keere. Kirereo ijo alosikinet aidinin kalu keere, eraasi nu ejokuka noi. Aso korai teni eyuunak aitup aisisianakinetangun, idefeide de netebeti akwap wok erai na ejok noi aiboyu. Ti Uganda erai na epolaijamam kimorikikinaitunga.

Oui ko Teso, ti eitrkerene emamei ko Soroti kiding Iteso kede Ikumama. Ekot itunga luko Sorotiarwam kagogonga ikisar itiakak ngin ejai kiding atekerin kanu aarei.

Idobo lu akoriok kede agwelabarakiraan, kacut acok nuko Kumi ka emwogo loko Serere, mam ekinisi apuponoro kaimorikikina? Imunosi yesi ebe inyobo adisiar etiai lo acok okaru ka Ipu ibore eyaunitos ngun konye idiope ibore nes aigir apuponor aitutubittasinei.

Lo einona, Iteso Cultural Union (ICU) da ekat kitimonoros. Isinyikokit egurupu Emorimor kalo sek Apolon Paphras Imodot kede lo Emorimor lokwana Apolon Agustino Kadugala Osaban ineranaros, kocamanaros. Komoikisi apolon Imodot adis ajakanut katukot siri kicakasi cut. Imodot da ekot kopupokini ber.

Akirot acie na ekot oni aimorikikin aitiji nes amat (ajon) na elapar noi ko Teso. Kitutuboi ikisila lu itidisiarete; kwape nat alemar adilonokin amat.

Katupitos aisisianakinetu nu aiyuuneta kanu, etopoloosi araut ipei, oni keere aimorikikin komam ipodo iraagin, atekerin, idiinin, adoketa, abar arai ican, kojai emoyo lo aijen kede akukurasut aitiji ibakor, adekasinei kamamus aijen kanu ajokisio wok keere. Kimonor yeni ekaru loitet 1999 lo ipu arerengesio.

# OPALAKIRO

# ATWANARE

# Edaikin Opolot ka aberu ke Orungo

Loatwan Opolot

Natwan Akol Opolot

Na Kenneth Oluka

ARAI aiturur kede apipil naepol noi asesen asadukun kalu atwak (yare), akiliokit kakeheta. Asadukun nu arai adiope na ajai akuwan ke John Michael Opolot kosodi adiopena aperio akuwan kami owaike Janet Akol Anyait Opolot. Kajaasi ikokiok kec iboyete osiep asadukunkaro.

Apoin kolaikina Opolot kakeheta ainsin nu adunyasi orekat loejai Orungo Kanakwe. Disitikt Naemakaaga 26/12/1998.

Akiru nu abu Permanent Secretary naka orionget loka Local Government, Ajki J.R. Kirakye kolim ehe; "Epipil noi aanyun ikawuruk (yare) keere imooriaros atwenare, kinyeliknitos iduwe lu didik kwana (eraasi ikokiok). Erai na ibore yen aiturur nakos jokan." kesi idefefunitos aiturur na ajai osbworo lo jokan.

Iduwe lu enyekini kesi; Linda Asio,6, yen ebeit agear asiore P 1, Titus Opolot, 8, yen esions P 3, Diana Ariong, 9 kosiomi P, 4 ka Sam Egoru 12 (P.5). Ajai ikoki Opolot yen adit kakere yen mam aponi kitaibara, Mary Grace Atim.

Abu Kirakye kiyatak ehe: "Ipakikini ikokiok ngul akario kalokasaban, aitigogong ka aidar kesi. Edeke ngesi bon papa lo ejani atdar ikokiok."

# Auriu

Na owaike, Janet akooke Ejkt. Obany Alfred Ieko Idwanat-Nigora, Kumi ngesi abu kotwarok adekis nako Kisubi apaaran ngipongin kware. Ahdia aiwatikuet na etemokit ekafe. ebe euritai Akol 18.06.1967.

Arai Opolot nurut lo iunist koduwe ikanyangor, ejuettu lucie kwi. Naowaike Akol ngesi erai auriat naiwongoon koduwe ikanyape.

# Ariebo

Ediope kala apolokit Opolot korionget kalo angor, ikiliok, eswamak ka aitopol ateker. Koraida bebeamurani ke, Ejkt. Agustino Okurut Omare, ngesi abu kitatam kapipil adit nu ikamuitins ariebo ka atwakisis itunga kalu (yare).

Ahila Omare ehe kesuroki Opolot ariebo kangeset naka elap November da okaru lope lo, abu ber kolot aiyengun ore kitoni agnunet naka Desemba kohongori aawan.

Konye do apaaran ngin na abongoro Opolot aswam, ebe abu kikarak aidok amudalai nu alosete oyapesi ke, etatami Okurut. Abu do aupakec adiope kotoma aswam koker kupu alimokin Okurut ehe eboiok lo apolon kec adeka amudalai.

"Abu per eong kapugak (ngue) naarai aanyunit eong, nesi elope itekerari emotoka ka aipakinga," eyatakit Okurut.

Kepotu itunga ainypoeko ahala Okurut ehe agogong eporoto ka Janet, mam asaka mam adeka da.

Abu ehe Janet kiyatak ehe karaida ore (Orungo) mam ngesi amuno ehe apedon alosit.

Akaulo apaarian ngipongin kitipenkinete Okurut ebe man, Janet ariebo. Apun konyokareer ngesi adekis nako (Kisubi) ne apuda ngesi alope. Abu Dr Elizabeth Madra iwadikaki, imurok lu adekis kangin ibalawa kansaimakiar ngesi.

Etipinarit Okurut ehe man eiyengana ka Janet ajok kosodi apotu akipikikabokup akuwannoi. Maadonsiawan idis kotwani aberu da.

# Iponesio

Atupitor ajenisident Dr. Speciosa Wandiru Kazibwe ngesi abu kibwar Opolot kwape "etuan lo aiybe, akukurana, kojaasi kede aomisio nu adoketa."

Iswamator Opolot kwape Principal Private Secretary lok Kazibwe November 1998 kitoni February, 1998.

Aminista na orionget kalo eswamai Opolo, Hajat Janet Mukwaya ngesi etunoni ehe "erai atwaniar na epol noi." Eminista loka stare kanu entundikwe korionget loka angor, ikiliok, eswamak ka aitopol atekor, Ejkt Soor Kiryapawo asismakini ebworok aiturur ka Kazibwe kede Mukwaya.

Kanakangan abu Kiryapawo khip ebworok aanyun ehe idurunete ikokiok ajok naarai aticapakejaan yen ecobe kwa papake aticopak adepur da.

Toni App.11

Etop kotoma ateso

ETOP Naiwangoset, Opo (Desembe) 31, 1998 - Jaangat (OJara) 4, 1999

# Atwakiasi lu Ajesai agilo kec

IPA - Itunga lokocaslo lo Ajesai, otela Agonga, otem cjwulanga, kec apota kotu-keru arerong na agilo, apotol espirukin ocaslo kec. (Jrongo) ajokojuo lo ejena ACAV nes stekunit abrijin skanyuge nu abiti cjwulakin agilon kotem cjwulanga korai da Ajesai silingradinert kotoma abrisio tanguo.

Korye noksumokin mam Ajesai shu kodum agilo, kodumonete suce aboisio ken.

Apotol do agilo na absit Ajesai koyangarai ocaslo lo kista, otela Opot toda adamitei jikonakin agilon sem kodulete do agilon sami k'Opot.

Apota itunga lu Ajesai suputa apolon eicolong LC IS, cjwulanga, Rev. Ebulu ekibarikaskanda lokotemko LCU, EJU Dom fulion, korye note apoto kopedosi abospokin itunga yen ajokajin aboisit na.

Nakamookiton ACAV mam egisi do abu itacisu nu abisi.

Korye iti eswamak kec kes apots kotonokini itunga ebe atonyoitoa nu aijulakinert kangio spaka kosi.

Set jaka fusi bodo itopolo ini atutubena wok ejok arai kitotoma:oni nu atiakatiaka. Ksimmot skiro nu aseo awal, apolomi Cjwulanga.

Epoatoion

# Enyamia loarisitin

IPA - Angor nu egwulanarete ovaragi kookukai lu Ongino kesi apolon simony noi kanu cakari ediope lo apugan asbeckit aimat ekec ewaragi tomam asiac kobala ebe recii agen apolon nu ajon kwabo manotilanakini kwa arisitin.

Kingat aberu tsirigin abospokin ja ebe "do bo arisiti itasit" korye kere koyanti atigan (toE Sore) do AM hon nesi atomar ebe anyama je amnda aberu na MO+ken.

Okeet iaya lakokujis, inyobo ayas nu? Enyamia do je arisitin nu anyamisa do do nesi apolonamne? Kitonokinai nu naara apolonr samsiny.

Apolot Peter - Ongino.

# More kwangin

IPA - Elipit nis kitoledikinet almony kosi mama ejai papa presidoet, naarai agnon okaru 1996 September kilon 1998 mam tiso kianyunit amodio agangat kwabo apota ikiliok ka ikonidwolu nasiciotikaaku komura akituko kawwaw.

Kilot ne ejai RDC kodintriktao luko Kumi arai Soroti ebalai eba arai mam ideunitos ekara ka atutubet mam kitacio. Adaun nabo apak mam keanyuna angangat adio.

Apanor nuko Sobet, Kumi

# Kotacata eswamak

IPA - Idila nong adonunkin kede eswamak apugan idis. Apas nong apupanon kesi ipunipunete akotot na impito kes lu ebe mam cut apugan ekot atacakin kes.

Icie kakesi ebakasi edaunino ikaru tami mam etacitai, icin ediope ka ilapio.

Ebalasi kosi ebe apas kesi kdolebenen eflomnet komam tut nu iswamsuna. Ebe ebalai elimonokino tabo kes ebe irispito icie elosenenete odintriktao icie.

Konodi ebalasi bobo ebe icie akompiuta nesi alema ikinotia.

Kanuka otei nong akotot na kwamata. Nasodit, idintriktao icie da lu ebakai erai lupo Uganda neda iburai lu ikamunitos no impito sibwapakin ka atacakin ikolepek. Inyobo ber etiono kane kogogong apugan sibwapit lake niringe kumagai?

Naiarrit, acuma na ebakai akompiuta erai itunga ilwassamaste ido etupit nu itolomikini etunganan mamake.

Inyobo ber arai ber erai adiakaret adio da mam itemokinere na katipert?

Okwe yes lu ikamunitos no impito kede la epolokitos itungalu, kibwakisinagogong kotacakis itunga lu impito ka apiyai kec acie nu atukunos kinyekin kesi somite bala egela Uganda kec ka nawok.

Oporora Makonguru

# Ti itasalanakinio icakan okanisan lu etukere

IPA - Kageunet abu ekanisa loko Katulik kogene ibido ekaslo kotiakan. Protectant neda kwana ejena kwape Church of Uganda kane ko Uganda. Apotu da idinini iyatakisi atiakatiaknar. toni ne ipuakatar kwana noi.

Acamunit nong ebe elemio icalan kokanisan kere. Aso elipitkolimokinai, inyobober apoloto ikanisan loka katolik hon adeparit ikanisan luce kere? Arabo mam luko Church of Uganda elemete icalan la edolitos?

Elipit nong engerenok luko okanisa kiboikinesi

# Kottacata eswamak

IPA - Idila nong adonunkin kede eswamak apugan idis. Apas nong apupanon kesi ipunipunete akotot na impito kes lu ebe mam cut apugan ekot atacakin kes.

Icie kakesi ebakasi edaunino ikaru tami mam etacitai, icin ediope ka ilapio.

Konodi ebalasi bobo ebe icie akompiuta nesi alema ikinotia.

Kanuka otei nong akotot na kwamata. Nasodit, idintriktao icie da lu ebakai erai lupo Uganda neda iburai lu ikamunitos no impito sibwapakin ka atacakin ikolepek. Inyobo ber etiono kane kogogong apugan sibwapit lake niringe kumagai?

Naiarrit, acuma na ebakai akompiuta erai itunga ilwassamaste ido etupit nu itolomikini etunganan mamake.

Inyobo ber arai ber erai adiakaret adio da mam itemokinere na katipert?

Okwe yes lu ikamunitos no impito kede la epolokitos itungalu, kibwakisinagogong kotacakis itunga lu impito ka apiyai kec acie nu atukunos kinyekin kesi somite bala egela Uganda kec ka nawok.

Oporora Makonguru

# Ti itasalanakinio icakan okanisan lu etukere

IPA - Kageunet abu ekanisa loko Katulik kogene ibido ekaslo kotiakan. Protectant neda kwana ejena kwape Church of Uganda kane ko Uganda. Apotu da idinini iyatakisi atiakatiaknar. toni ne ipuakatar kwana noi.

Acamunit nong ebe elemio icalan kokanisan kere. Aso elipitkolimokinai, inyobober apoloto ikanisan loka katolik hon adeparit ikanisan luce kere? Arabo mam luko Church of Uganda elemete icalan la edolitos?

Elipit nong engerenok luko okanisa kiboikinesi

# Klareutu aseo acie

IPA - Asialakit nong sumokit nu etolomanis Etop (Opo 3-9,98) ebe apotu itunga luko Kaberemaido kodedengata apak ka na aseumete apolon eicolong LC 5 Soroti.

Oakani luka ejai ibore epolokitos inacae wok luko Kaberemaido, kacot apuarasi asu nudak itamitor anoun aipuc kiding. Ikumama ka Iboro.

Mam nong apupunit eliminati itunga lu obakui icie. Ewadikatai Etop ebe ehungatai itunga Okikat ko Kaberemaido.

Akoto ailimikini itunga luko Kaberemaido ebe, kotoma aseo due esamakit ekisil ngin ituan asoun ituan yen ipuda eketisa, korye mere aboikin. Arai kobulokkinite itungla aise ti bodo emamei aseo naarai ti bodo aboikino idiopa ituan anyamar eicolong.

Konodi ijo da Engulo, ibungan itunga kililingite ijo tii! Angetakini, akoto aisiritikini inacae luko Kaberemaido ebe mam ebakai ebe adaan aseo. Kokara lu apontosi kotugaren, ejai bobo aseo, nesi bodo isnaniata yesi itunganan yen ikotoni yesi.

Joseph Opolet, Kaone.

6 ETOF Naiwongonet, Opo (Desemba) 24-30.1998

# IYEMUTO LU AKWAPIN

# Ekopaki Museveni Kutesa ebalua loka MPS

PRESIRENT Museveni ngesi swadikadi imaminta loka State kamu apiyai, Sam Kutesa, ebalua aitijanikin ngesi nuskotinta MPS ahense ngesi kawwan kamu amamumotor kesi kode amumumot kotonumus kukwapa aminista.

Abu Museveni kodaanin adumun ebalua lo icikakiton MPS - 116 akanin arsasi 23.12.98 kamu ajai orahan, Francis Ayuma kosodi abongokin ebaluwa lu apuarse na alupakin.

Ebala ebaluwa k'Museveni ebe "adao song adumun ebaluwa lo ilipit idemuro'kom kama ejai orahan kicikakiton

MPs 116 akanin ido kitonmartim awaminimi kon kwapa aminista ido kokapasakinaalomarijo".

Eyatakit ebaluwa lo ebe "Kwape ejaar okivil 118 atutubet naiwongonet, naka ekonstitution ebolt song ainakin ijo ebaluwa lo".

Ebala ekiril 118 atutubet naiwongonet ebe kedumu epresident ebaluwa kwanut kangolujai aijakakinaminista lo ikamunitos akiro nu.

Acie kiro nuefonitere Kutesa kesi abosem akapolnu kami aitolitof ikampuren apugan kitosomai eipona lo erono.

Eral Kutrea MP lo Mawogola

ido abu kolimok apapula na New Vision ebe akapamikin ngesi abongokin ebaluwa ko President. Abu kopeg nu ekotore aidotor ngesi.

"Mam orai ebolt ebe abu EMHAS kogirikite eswamak lukri Uganda Airlineregwelet merlo lu arsasi 2.5% kwape abalar aiwadikset nu agwelor ekampuni, konye oboit kesi uinu etisi ediope kode loko Civil Aviation Authority."

Abu Kutrea kopeg nu ebalunebe emanitngesi seyar Dick Turinawa loepolokiti Uganda Airlines.

Ikonu nen Maj. Gen. Salim Salah ngesi agoutu angicak

# SOROTI MUNICIPAL COUNCIL PUBLIC NOTICE

# RE: SALE OF HOUSES IN AKISIM HOUSING ESTATE

Soroti Municipal Council has taken a decision to sell its houses in Akisim Housing Estate with effect from 1st of January, 1999.

1. All intending buyers should obtain purchase application forms upon payment of the commitment fee of Shs. 20,000 - payable to cashier at the Municipal Council.
2. Sitting tenants will be given first priority on condition that they are up to date with their rent payments.
3. Buyer will be required to make a down payment of 30% of the value of the unit (house) payable within sixty days from the date of offer. The rest of balance is payable in 18 months that follow.
4. The values/prices of the housed are based on approved council valuation roll.
5. Successful buyers shall obtain land titles to their property after completion of payments and renovations.
6. Sitting tenants who fail to meet the requirements of purchase shall be asked to leave the houses to more serious buyers.
7. Each successful buyer will be required to sign an agreement containing terms and conditions for the sale and purchase of the house.
8. Other relevant details can be found with the Town Clerk on working hours.

Ebolu Lazarus For: TOWN CLERK

# Abongu Museveni ko Libya

Na Ewadikan Etop

PRESIRENT Yoweti Museveni ngesi Nabalina nabian abu kubonga ko Libya are aporeot len ngesi ainerakin kode e president ko Libya, Muammar Gaddafi, akiro nu ikamunitos apolo na akwapin nuka Great Lakes Region kacut Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC).

Aupata Museveni kode eminuta loka stain lo akisu rukokinga, Amama Mbahea.

Nu kes etijamikit ekalam na iyemutokoyuapenia president, Ajkt. Hope Kivenegara, apapulai nu iyemunu.

Eral apejo ko Museveni ko etapakini na president Laurent Desire Kabilali (DRC) lo ajai ngima eringa ebiga.

Eredus lo Libya lo apapjo ko Tunnisa ngesi ebalu ebe aputa Museveni ka Gaddafi kodautu bala isawan isni meras.

Eyatakit eradio lo ebe ajakim Eminimita, Nyafir Khamounu akiro nu akwapin nukokinga. Omar Mustafa Al Montasel, kode egatupo lo eryanaka Kabila airlamunna.

Kagounet Namabiti apota abenyak lako DRC kitamana kode Gaddafi ko Tripoli kingarenikite Ernest Wanba dia Wamba lo erainiliayekala epolokitos abenyak la.

Ageon 1992 abu United Nations kimikita idepsi apronor Libya akado na Libya agiruno itunga iarn la apotu kinomata edega lo Pan Am Airlines ko Leckerbie, Scotland konodete itunga 270 atwakere.

Abu Museveni kolissite bobu Libya kolay Okiloka kami ainerakin kode Gaddafi kosodi bobu abongot olap ngopengol airlamun na gakinamgarensk luakwapin nuko Chad, Eritrea ka Nigro kami adumun eipona lo ipeilorista akwapin nuka Africa airowamanar ka apolo nepepe.

Abu Gaddafi koinanak engarenok la imidality lo isosiamikin kesi kamu aitiji ngun lo icikakiton lucie.

ETOP Naiwongonet, Opo (Desembe) 24-30, 1998

# KOSIOM BER NEN

## Alcer nu aurio kede arerengesio

Etsam lo akeran koluawe lo emopiira lo akeje komam enapit igoen inyamunio kinga na eisawe kapak na elaaganiata ittimun luko Charlton Athletic kede luko Aston Villa ko London, Bulaya araasi 21.12.98.

## Enyakun adekan kagola na ejengere etwanit komamete ikela

Na Peter Okoel

APESE Betty Okowkolna abu solone koar kadekin ngodon ko baruti araasi 5.12.98 ngeri aponi kodumunai ehilara ikela isai. Okileaike ka Betty, esapat

Abuyang tolmeyi kotuan kanalwragen dimokiti Etop eha apusi koyangaraaburu ka logo lo ejengere komam ekelai edio kebilaru, konye ekaalo kemeasa akeberu abu agmi kodum eha abilaru ikela.

Lo ajengiaburu na, lo mam Abunyang abu kolimuk Etop ekekiror, eha ngeri abu kopog wa ikela kobala eha "koyanganiaten, mam eong ajeni nu ikela."

Ketami aibwap akiro ogan mam erota bu kocan.

## Arami itaok imusimun

Na Alex Edota

ABWOTUNAN k'Akisim otem Toromatsini oitela Olelai otem Aburilela Amuria, Ejkt Okeflengeni abu kijaki iketaok amukian nasirani ikwamieka atessio.

Atakamarenu akaido na itaok akomakin aolionor mam bobo acamun isinak toto ke da. Ketam Okeflon nu apodori kere mam itaok acamuni isinak. Nes do Okeflon aomere amuron na iye ki aitam aimake itaok teni aitam aitom ekia okurme, mamiba.

Amuron Adongo na Abwanget ngesi abu okadak kosodi aitelemuan Okeflon ekoroi looleikajaantatarku ajul nu aejak kanu aipu epacit lo ehongoria nesi Abwanget. Kariaikensan itaok engalment.

## Arida esapat papa kanu abuikinit ngesi asio man

Na Nieu-O. Akwang

ESAPAT Moses Oyupa lo ikaru 15 kosironi Kaberjola PS nes pac abu kopeleik adwaga papake lo ebe Ogaino kanu abuikin ngesi alouit osomero kami tii airikakin singito.

Abu Oyupa korai lo zealana osomero noi. Ketam papake alimonokinngesi ajokosismu tsomero, ehala je ebe ejaasi keni da idwe kede apudorosio (Children Rights) koc kwage idwe asenn nu ebeit aswam.

Abu ber sek Oyupa

kimorikikines kede totoke kopeleikisenu agwelar akinsi kapapakoc kanu agwelisena ediu lo ijulet ende.

Kengicu Ogaino ebe agwelar akinsi abu kolimuk aberuka kede okooke ebe "alo bodo kwana kibimakisi yesi agwelasar akinsi nu, ido bo tnoi katub esapat alouit oisiu inyo bodo icebore kigwelari oni kami nisi igin bansomero?" Mami Syupa ka totoke akotosi aipup ngan. Abalasi ebe, aijul code nes ber engaenoti.

Ki wala akwap, ahala Ogaino: elimokini Oyupa ebe kolut kede osomero kwape jastai luce idwe singito, ehala je ehongokou papa ebe. "kolo bo ijo amgitu adwoizi ka."

Ketam Ogaino aitukotimebe tii alecor Oyupa abu je kopeleik abwokin ngesi kognasi aipunupun.

Atamakisi LC's da tii alecor Oyupa osomero agiroki ngul da. Adepar do aijen k'Oyupa kanu ikamasitosu apudorosiu nu idwe.

## Alcer nu aurio kede arerengesio

- Aikseri [Luoquam] (Opo 21 - Orara 20):
- Kasun ebingu. Ekaru da etosi atubor. Ekaru toilet ngesi ebeit ijo altoikin edodor. Nu itegeari ijo nepe egeuni akaru epote araute nu enyaete irotin kon kongarevi. Mam isudokin iboro fai bil nape egear ekaru nabarai eraun esirani kongaren.

Angolot [Luoquat] (Orara 21 - Omuk 20):
- Ekaru toiletet ebunit kede ekide to arerengesio, aratdo ijo ilopet ebei aromor kede aileten akon aitemetemesio kere nu itemokina ijo aswam. Ade katitemetemesio kon nu ekaru kalo itetet edodor aitemokin atipet noi. Irotin da lu isingin lu itamit ijo amakun ewulasi apukonor.

Agarat [Luogaria] (Omuk21-Oraang 20):
- Owar atiokusio nu lem edoikitos ijo kere kokaru kalo atubor nabarai mam ekaru toiletet ebuni aswami kalem kalo atubor. Ekolo ijo aitidatar abenen na etai nabarai ainakit ijo amamus kede atiblung kede da ajaute kede apuponoro. (Oongok epura isiranin lu ekaru kalo atubor. Imerekek [Luomerekek] [Okwang21-Odunge20] Nape egear ekaru loitetet iroria ibore acodun ijo awomom ebe epone bodo ber ali ipedoria ijo aitub ekaru lo atubor. Etsikan bala epu atitemetemesio konye ngun kere ajokuka nabarai opotu isipedori ijo adumun etau lo etiling kokusiarteda noi. Ekoto bodo ijo aitwasam ekaru lo atubor kwape emisam kon karu aitojokaria ekaru lo.

Ekosoibwang [Luokosoibwan] (Odunge 21 - Opedelei 20):
- Ideseete awanyuneta noi ebe iboro o lem ibo asteite ijo kokaru kalo atubor edodor aletnun jokan noi nepe egeari ekaru loitetet. Nuepol ebei ijo aswam ngen kainun adar kede da aitomosom e akon apak koipone kalo odoco. Siri atiokusio nu yee isubuniasi ijo. Katot kotoma apak kon.

Imusi [Luomuiut] [Opedelei21-Omaruk 20):
- Ixalit ipak edit noi li bobo ijo alomat okaju loitetet kwape kolige obu ijo olomarifor torita okaru kalo ewula awolor. Kwape abamuna ijo arerengu adumun ajuiakinat koipone kalo itegearet ekaru atakari ijo bala ecaete irotin kon luabtole itunga lu ibosomi ijo edodor adolokin ijo koyangaunitus espul koc nu asio man kokaru kalo.

Omadang [Luomadang] (Omaruk 21 - Oesodokokingut 20):
- Nakara do ijeri ijo kodoco cut apolou na akrot naebe ibore yen irimori, ebuni bobo airimun. Ekaru lo mojong erimo, kosodi loitetet arimur maipeelwangin arerengesio konda nu erimoritos epote airim bobo kojokan noi.

Engatuny [Luongatuny] (Omodokokingut 21 - Otiktok 20):
- Naepe irimori, ebe koi kola kola eke kera eme okokukon apuponoro kede lucie tunga koiponaso kalo aswam nepepe ka nu ikamunitus isingin da. Kwakopokani ejaatar iboro, etakari bala ebei ekaru araut lo ejai amuno kama koi. Aisubisa kon ebuni akotokin ijo aitak apak kon ejak noi.

Akabwa [Luokabwa] [Oeuban21-Orara 20):
- Kwaiutar ijo apukonor apaputai nu ikamunitus ekaru lo ewuta altikony som, etakani cul naebe mam arai loelewinar cut. Ajaasi kede adumuneta ke kede atwaruneta da ke. Ibusakinit do ijo aisim aun ngun kere nu ejakitos ijo airinyor. Karat epatana iulak eiswamae kon. Konye ejangunda, mam iboro epote arokar cut. Ejai arerengu.

- Okawa abenu saan u akronot kismataibato abuwe 12 ko kanisa kalo Amoroto Oweri.

Konye abu ber ekimat kingit Okiror ebe "aroko eong isiwenikina ijo kede aberu konepeta imasi ijo ajon arabo mam?"

Abu Okiror kolim ebe mam emmi.

Konye abu Aysara kodetan arasali inalimanehe "Ekimat, mabi ngol noi, emasi ajon adepar."

Apona do itunga lu zealani kokanisa kogatasi akwena kebalasi icia ebe it ekimat mam isiwenikit kea apeta naarai erai ekitokit lo enabi.

## Asalaki akondom akuan aberu nako Tororo

Na William Otasla

ABERU na abu akondom kosalak akoik akaulo aelo ngesi abu kosi kadekin nako Tororo naarai akotoi ngesi aitac 9,000/- bula emamiatar ngesi kana ailot akoik.

Takisa nako Naiwerere kotaae lo Tororo ngesi apota iriamuton ka Etop akaulo ngesi eisan kadekin.

Aba. Takisa ebe aponi kogoronai ngesi akondom adiope akaulo ngesi aibakar kede epson. Jo Rock Hotel araasi 27.11.98.

Abala ngesi ebe ecuro soteri noi apak ngin kana naarai agwelansario esigala loka Embassy.

Takisa aberu naarian korono ngesi abala ebe atapunso na atupakini akaulo aelo kec ebe mam okulam bobo ejesak wape lem.

Aba le ebe apoti da ekulam kola nai kola ngan kina naara agwelansario esigala loka Embassy.

# Eumi aberu kanu agirit akukonokin

Na Robert Okeflo

STELEPAT la ebe Charles Okeflo ngesi abu kibanga aberu ke na ebe Margaret Igwapa kana ebe agirin ya akokokin kwap osawa la ainakinta ngesi tatake akije sumutan.

Eumi Okeflo Igwapa kornka lo ajai eidukai la Obalanga, Kapelebiong araasi 15.12.98: Kingit apoloneirodong LC1, Peter Paul Oaire ngesi iboro yen arida ngesi Igwapa abala Okeflo ebe mam aberu ke ajani aijaanakinitunga.

# Arami itaok imusimun

Na Alex Edota

ABWOTUNAN k'Akisim otem Toromatsini oitela Olelai otem Aburilela Amuria, Ejkt Okeflengeni abu kijaki iketaok amukian nasirani ikwamieka atessio.

Atakamarenu akaido na itaok akomakin aolionor mam bobo acamun isinak toto ke da. Ketam Okeflon nu apodori kere mam itaok acamuni isinak. Nes do Okeflon aomere amuron na iye ki aitam aimake itaok teni aitam aitom ekia okurme, mamiba.

Amuron Adongo na Abwanget ngesi abu okadak kosodi aitelemuan Okeflon ekoroi looleikajaantatarku ajul nu aejak kanu aipu epacit lo ehongoria nesi Abwanget. Kariaikensan itaok engalment.

ETOP Naikongonet, Opo (Desemba) 31, 1998 - Januari (Orore) 6, 1999

apotiok su etiono aidoun kec.

na.

## Alimokin LCs aisingaren aswam

Ewadikan Etop
IKANSIL ANIaka Pallisa distrikt kesi ecoraki
aminista luka Local Government, Jaberi
Bidandi Siali abudang eibel kas lu agra
(allowances) konye ebe kognasi aijaanakin
ikur itanga tetere mware hoko esekano.

Alimuni Bidandi nu amasi ko Pallisa S.S.
koigo Pallisa iriamumis kede LCs, eswamak
apogan aitacuan ipeletik, apedonosis kec
kede nuka eipugae loka decentralisation.

Tjongbon ejianak apugan na kwage onnina
adaan apak na soja. Asipo kotoma politka
adaan ikuro 35, erai eroi ainakina ka aitoder
aswam nu abeti nejasai itunga luka kwap ami
ekoto politika konye mere emuari! etatimi
Bidandi.

Abudaerinsistai kenyak apolokis okungoluka
LC 3 ebe mam ebeit kesi aipor ikapas
lukoterewan ebe eponta kec, konye ebe ebei
kesi atacio eropit bon.

## Eeor Hukor

Na Sam Opor
ARAI enam fasso itidisiarete
agwelanar inyamat nejasinim
kanu amaais ajanin ebanibebu
etengitlomni adepar lokoleje
angaikin Teso. Ekot ateker
aiketakin adumun ikisila
bunyamat ka lu ematet tetere
emi da icasiaamnomen apolo.

Ekaanyanan lo Soroti
Geresum Bukor ngm emiranu
kailipasinei nu eitunitere
akimat lo abuton Yonaf
Opolot koreketoejai Otokora,
Kogili ko Karyum pas.

Abala ilukor ebe auriak kes
etapaasi idwe agirit akoru
kolosete keere amat.
"Ejailjalakin eteker
aisisianakin idwe akoru do
kwanaejiotontepapaka esapat
toni isawan iuni do akwenyun
alouti airi owuwo. Iyanga uni
idwe aimarkacot aijaklandwe
ajon erai ailam kes," abala.

## Ebeit adukokin e Library Mukura

Na Jonathan Angora
ETOGO lo idarere itabon
kolosete itungakere luskotou
aisiom kes (Library), nes
kwana ejakasidukisuktoina
kolejradakinto akejo itunga
