# IYEMUTO LU OBUKUI

Ayongata itelepai aurianeta
kanu eirwom lo ailom ajore

Na Kokas Omeja

ATUMUNAK luko Pingire, Kasilo kes apotu koyangata
alosit aurianet na ajaikina otem Pingire kana kwana
tsiriakitere eyemut ebe eutai aikam kes ailom ajore.

Arai SDDP nes anyaraunit aurianet pac kamu amatun
aomisio nu atumunak kowai lo aitopol etem Pingire.

# KASILO

Kapak na adolio Etop otem abu kodum atumunak idis
itolosete aurianet kede angican (researcher) loka SDDP,
Charles Okure.

Abu Okure kingit atumunak lucie lu ayaas ibore asalatar
ipaup ke lu ipuajauna aurianet ngin kosodete abongokin ebe
eyemut lo esiriakitai ebe irimokitos ilorei aituk atumunak
nes abu kitukurian ipaup ke.

Kaurianet kangin apotu atumunak kosekutu aisisia kwape
ibore kec yen sodityen ipudas kesi SDDP aswam kopote do
akora, angaleu, isokomin lu ikorion, irotin ka akipi.

Engarenok luko Soroti distrikt, kimoriaritos RDC Peter
Kalagala ka ikaasilan luka LCs irerete elogo lo ejengere
adekak kadekis napolon nako Soroti pac.

Kesi ayaitok adekis etogo lo akaulo na angetakinor
aitemonokino ke.

# USUK

Kotoma obalua lo edokokit Wabwire akan kijukakite da
isaseredotin luko aicokisnako Usuk.

Rev. Fr. Paul Brames Omidii,
Fr. Peter ka Rev. Patrick Mumbilo da abungesi.

# K’MAIDO

ENONO ka aomisio ewarckok kane ejaasi auriak icie kesi
itoluolete asoman naka idwe lupesur ko Soroti distrikt.

# BECCAD

Basic Education, Adolescense and Development (BECCAD)

# SOROTI

Ecori ikristayon aidar aipuc
Na Peter Opite

Aiduk Ariet P/S


# NU ANGOR KA IKILIOK

## Ilamuna okaru loitetet da, komorete ca aswam

Na Christine R. Issa
Abtikili 10 her keren kanu
**Ekote nen**

situb ebaga. Imalai Ngol lo apodismio keere lo abu kiridoful mo'icte tosi apak ngin ka atuban da apaarit na. Epolok noi nu simai Edeke kangun keere na iswamak - nuda iputoi.

Abu ariebo kodoloikite lo ipu neda acirpak arnar autaara noi kamuismukoun. Ijenettebo yesi da neecanit lo ejai. Epagal ajar noi kokailis lo ipu. Etsi aiba uijar aiba. Mam auriak lu ipu apodismio aitodolinkin eipud lo iboro keere kokailis koi.

Ekoto idowe li anapito, anyamun ka umukian na edeliti, koteye mam epatuto aitodolikat agani keere. Na ejaao nesi iambmun iboro idisolisin lo mam edolitos; ejai do ajul ewode apakio acie bon, igium da egwello apakin acie.

Enebo, Iwanyunitos canat kolejo Nakanye(23-12-98)yalamui itunga lu ipu enapitos iguen lo itetiak. Kopalu ijo ber ngam na iote kogisnekangul araut lu enapitereark- ibangutan (kapitran) koteye arai napema apak na ber ijulet enape.

Mam koteye nat eting akoto alimun nu eode. Ineete yesi keere epune lo atwakidis ibaren, akulokulun ka akokorei.

Na nesi apak na ipinyiata itunga iboro kopul da aisianat noi ityo mam aimal Edeke kanu airyamanijo da yesi iortoni apaarit na na ijuliata lo ipu akiro nu ipu?

Adamun nu ebaga kangol da. Konye ca adol aiteluor awomouni nukiinajaren naarai adauo lo ekaru. Kanu airyami lo ipu, kobu acirpak koun yatibe eke ekot ijo da ice kowamatu kagugong aimau.

Kotomaa saarukede etiokisin keere kokaliark to koi wamunare kopai kiding angor ka ikiliok koi, tom obawr da kotum otide atiakser kesi kopone lo araut isapat arai ipete.

Kokaru kelo angetakin kalo biai indonismino ijo papa ere aowamoun?

Ijo ipaklo imata ajono isawan keere kopalakite aberu hon eutasi kedeawwamini? Ijo inai lo irumiarit iborokere kokalekornam aberu kedr iduwe edio eporeto da elimunete kanu eitwacamae ka ebeitene lo iboro kokale?

Idumaiiduc nu ateker aijulak isayao idwe koi; haapka hupesar ayian kotoma akironimi keere. Arai erai asismun kinitemate keere aisium najukan. Arai erai aimuke ka aitunap kesi kopulo akiro ngesi epat.

Ijenete yesi ikulepek abongonokinetu kus ido kiitunitos ebe epolok aingiseta nu noi. Kokailu lu ipu etwamakina angor aowam tosi iduwe lupesar kopul isap ka ikiliok adapad.

Naarai etsu nangor itoti iswamaete edite aowam iswamasman kobaba ido kanu apollo naka aowam mem angulou naka angor erai na esipo jokan.

Konyu kanuete aowamouni ijo lokatalu iswamaate kyaiakin adumun kotoma okale? Ngun nes abalar eong ebe edeliti kalia keere aitup ngan kokara kabiitetet ietere ejaan do aimansunun na epol noi kengatakin do ekaru epol ubur iwamanau.

Amunor yesi keere ekaru loitetet loka arerengesio nu ajokak mi ipu.

## Etutuo ATRADO angor akor

Na Chris Osekeny
ANGOR, nagliemunitos kaihoisio nu egeligela ko Uganda kesi aponi kitatuorai akora kede imongin tita eidat akimin ietete ipu inyamat ekorsanon ka amio

Ejkt Henry Smart Ojent lo epolokit erionget loka aitwasamibareneteraaiani, Animal Traction Development Organization (ATRADO) nges abala ebe entonitai aberu afope ka ikiliok iyami kangol diotrikt ehunere adumunaituturioniateteno epune lo akoru kotupitete nu ekot apugan.

Eyatakit Ojent ebe egangit nyokotau DANIDA aituturio na na abu kodao isabistin umi kede aprai. Abala ngesi ebe epuda noi DANIDA kimuoroi angoraaari kes araas ikirigin lu aimais inyamat kudariata ikalis koi ka atopolisano ikeradwe adepur ikiliok lo ebe isingarenitosaimat ajon iton kopalunitos akoru.

Angor nu pac etutuori erionget loka ATRADO emestos kesi da imongin Angor nu alomunitos kaihoisio nu egeligela ko Uganda ajarui amangin kujaamu loka Kumi Hospital aisisia eitosomae loimongin lo ipu Aputo no momit Chris Osekeny

## Ipudas angor ebaaja lo akituk

Na Martin Aiko
AMEEJIAN nuka Uganda Women Efforts to Save Orphans (UWESO) ko Kumi kesi etejokasi eyapasi koi lo apolon, UWESO Secretariat akorakin kesi ebaaja lo apot ibaren, konye mere lo aitolot agwalouse. Elomunitomu ebe naarai essiautu kesi ebe amametagwalanarua itolomi amedn na iyata ko Kumi Diatrik kwa ejear kotomu alboisio acie kwape Masaka, Mbaru naka Hoima. Etigogongenkesi nu kotoma auriant kec na ajaikina toma Triple Zero Kachumbala Bukodrapat na anyarauotere aengarenok mika atenunk nuka UWESO ketemea ni uko Kapo Kola, Bukodra, Maiara, Kedwe, Lachumbala, Mukura, Atatar, Ongino, Makongore ka eole da.

Atakamunete nu akuslo na epudnea apolon eccolong UWESO Kapo, Ajkt Okello Nobertia aomisio na eprojekt (Project proposal) Kuyamitlo (remonok) kitou luko Secretariat ainakina angor ebaaja lokiyareit lo ikaru neongon agrun 1999 tom 2002.

Ebaaja lo neis aboti akorakin afejtokitan ikanyane: Kumi, Soroti, Gulu, Mbarara, Masaka, Extubalauwadikat na eprojekt kalo.

Eyatakotni hebo ebe ebeit itemwan iyarai taitetiak akorakinto ebaaja kotupitete epune lo ekototor itonga alomar araat emedan luka UWESO. Arai ikilioko imedanluka UWESO ketem kus, mam ebaaja otem kus.

## Agiri ojokoto eprojekt egu

Na Martin Aiko
ERIONGET loka angor (Belgian Survive) kesi ebaaja kesi agi yiasanakin angor na ewaag? "Omaali" angagungut na ebaaja ede atrai emasi atoya etapu epos, eboni amerkia ka amatala kyon man, a etu citookayam. Koma mam bebo agni epon simar uongin kowa kitulitsiumbaajarat

## *Aolio* Ambassador na Amerika ko Soroti, ejojiaikisi lu ayuara amootoi

Any. App.1:

Municipality Capt Mike Mukula, kopaa kane kolo ajai round-and-about napolon aboit aibe Moroto. Mam DPC, Charles Birungi, ka abwokkinton DISO. Ejkt Sempa, apolokinton Special Branch ka ipolinin icin lu ajaasi amotoka nakoingaren ajenete cat. Mam da etyenikitai CAD, Agoripina Annap. Akol, Apolon etcolong LC 3 Jobe Emilly Otekat ka atupiton RDC, Peter Ken Lerap lu ajaasi amotoka kuyareit kongaren. Ajai Apolon etcolong LC III naka Western Division. Ajkt Rose Okwi da toma amotoka niin.

Kinsisinta engarenok lu ajaasi amotokan loebe apaisi kwi naatuek kojara kwana do imotokan lu keere oyapensin eidany ka e Police Station, apotu kobuinikinos noi.

Aid kogninete iderepan albabulatos kamotokamatamit aimo Ambassador kede enyamitok ko lu do aomotai ber ebe atizapak apotu kopaasi Soroti Flying Academy. Kedol emotoka na anapit luksu Amuge ngina da amamette kwi ido ebe mam agiparitaida, Apotububokesi kibeleutu amotokan airaa oyapensin luka UWESO lu sek epejokit Powell konye ca ak wapilo.

"Albo do ber," abala amuge ingitanakin komam engetanakini akiro.

Ipolinin da kepotu akwes kubautu kosodete albabulatoi airim kotaun kingitanaros.

Emotoka lo ajai Okwii da epopelatoi tasi: Kouwa do ngol kobwobwotos itunga korotin lu otuan ebuinkinos.

Kepas engarenok lu apono adae apotu kiriamaros Nakatanya Restaurant kageet na kerot lo elosi Moroto kogweunete lu apolok akipri ma acupai Rwenzori Mineral Water atudio akure.

Apotu do kitenasi Kamuda akualo naalinakinote koi ebe

Mike Mukula aupasi ka Powell

kepotu Ambassador k'etomu kekitenasi la ko Toso College. Konye ca mam itau kosiposi. Apotu kodokotu kwap keere kokouma lo elosi Kamuda kijawanaros luka Sempa noi kodolitos Mukula ebe nges kwana etapa Powell alosit airokinadekis naa inugari ngesi, Princes Diana Memorial Hospital.

"Amamot naat adekis ngin ko purogram inyo ho ber ayaani nges apaaria napolon ngina. Isio ibunit naat aidar ayaara ingai bodo kwana kolarisito," adedang ipolinin. Apolon etcolong LC 3,

Otekat nges do abu kocedak ewalikak iyematode: "Mam iwadikarte apapulai." Konye apotu angisak kretetu ebe "Tua write" (kiwadikata).

Akuulo na adakan 15 kaidep kotakamunete do amotokan lu aupasi ka Powell.

Akuulo abu adiope komunagan lu enyamitou Ambassador lo ebe Costar Christ kolimok Etop ko Kamudaebe: "Alouittapokoi singarakis". Abu Etop kismunebe apaarit Powell ten kidoiyita Balaam lako ACAV eidany ka emocare tomajong ko Lalle Rd.

## Eperikin awongon nu anyamito epoison adekis

Na Bisousi Ikarre
ANGOR, nana, adiopetkepotisika ipote yen ikaru kanyane apotikiporikinai adekis napolon ko Soroti kakwarena 20 kocedakin ebe epoison unyamat lu anyamete kesi.

Atakamunete nu kore ka apolon Modocha: Okalebu lo Doye, Kyere, Serere Soroti ido angor nu apotu konyamurito epolo komacorei lo apereent kesi emoriaritos Elizabeth Apulai, Chuka, Margaret Azipa ka ikoku Asege Adong. Epotaki ko ikoku yoni ilapu ikanyape.

Kedol Esaymeapirikitai angor ngun ko Ward I apotukolmo nges ebe akuulo na kesi anyamar inyamat lu ewananan kesi, abu ailek kisuburu kesi keere kolekete nedos ka ainad modisookit hon.

Kenyekonetekesi adeki mako Ocaapa abu ejautem kesi kretot poitapu do ekerunere Soroti. Mam Dr. Namunata nua wanyin kesi ajai oyapasi kapak na akotor Etop aingitan ngin abu.

## Ebatisai 11 k'Oculoi obag

Na Peter Opita
APOLOKITON airokin naka Italikite ko Kotine, Soroti, Rev. Fr. Patrick Oren ngos abu kibaitsa imakeruu ikanyikaarsi lapesar ka ewongon lusap kapak na enumonemere aurio naka Yesa kakelosia na Oculoi. Skristeyoan lu adaparitos 200 kro ajankinos adipon na.

Kobu epadre kitorak skristeyou lu alelete noi ebe sinyakur adiel ngin kitoui

oreria koc konye mere ahtarai okeloria kemu aibeluku atapak maakaalo na aimat, ide kitalisialemik ngul lu tem emurokinostos erba ekeloria kana ebe keli adingitir kede ngul lu ajaaste eret nek kit alomarrakeloria.

Eyatakit masarrabi aikwayar skristeyoe aimutkujasein esangok mere ebe alismar aismik ebe eraar apak na ebay

ETOP Naiveoegoset, Opu (Desmoba) 31, 1998 - Januari (Ocera) 4, 1999

ATWANARE

# Atwania Makerere
sisianakinan Tukei

Loatwan James Odeke Tukei

sinakina noi aowam, abala ngesi.

Prof. Kupuliano Odaet lo abu kisisianakite lokutwanko Tesis College Alnet nges abalaebearai euspat lo acobe. "Kegou sisisanakin da arai lo akukurana," abala Odaet. Abu Odaet kilip loka steker Anikok lumgoria simorikikin sidar apuserat ka ikoktok.

Kouodi Dr P Bafyejena lo epolokit School of Education ko Makerere nges kiskiror ke ikeswamak lukosomero kangol abala ehe sinaki atwanare ka Tukei estimaro anowama etyoussi aborokio. abukoinak ekale kalokatwan agangat naka sho. 240,000/- lo stemunit esomero.

Archdeacon lo sicokis naka Bukedes Church of Uganda Rev. Yebo Oouret, nges etolosi alipasinei nu edaere lokatwan.

Arai James Odeke Tukei okokukr Yakobo Odeke ka Magarita kirin.

Aurio nges 15.03.1957
asiomit Kolir P.S; Tesis

# Arataaros auriak

Ikokiok ka Janet ka Michael Opolot

Aniy App.4

Enarit apolon eicolong LC 5 Katakwi, Ejkt Stephen Okont Ilemakorit, Opolot kwape ediope kourian loko Katakwika Tesisin amuno apolo na stubabet ke.

"Ajai eketasi noi toma apolo nako Katakwi. Nape egousi editrikt, abu kingarak noi sicor ofisio kede arusonokit editrikt ne ejassi lu ejokotnu kwape nut esomero 1 o apesur lo ejai Katakwi lo abu ngesi kodumak ejokotau lo Germany lo abu koinak3 m/-", abalailemakorit.

Acia sisiranta nu situror kesi alomuntou kama ejassi D.K Obbo Ag, Principal Niamize Training Institute of Social Development, Mohammed S Sezaalal gingiranko Movement Secretariat, Kalundi R. Serranaga, Director lo Uganda National Cultural Centre - National Theatre; James Kuria UNFPA Representative ko Uganda, ka P. Kabingire Ag. Permanent Secretary orionget kaluskipi, alupokka ejasiene lo akwap. Kesi keere kokiror kesi etururiete atwaniar etuan lo acobe, engarenon lo agogong lo eswamanaraka iriongetake.

Asioman kec

Ekanolla loka LC 5 loko Orungo; Ejkt Odulai lo abwokkinkalekala atwak nges abukomalkebworok ncasirman keckeedokone kwanata:

# AOMISIO

## 1999: Kitutuboi ikisila lu amat

### EINER EITENA

Na Fidel Gnamyokai

AMUNO she kopotu kinamunumata anuban nu asuto naka Yenu Kristo sjok. Katipakisi ngat lu abu akuj kinyaka kokaru lo atubor. Kilipit kisyeng Lokanuban imoyoysi kes kaipuc namam ndaun.

Etapsi duc itunga la egelegela nisumunun bonik, akiro nu ekotoni kesi istiam aitodolokin kokaru lo itetat. Kwape nat she "Lolo ekaru lo, akoto song airtyekin aimut esigala, arai ejan, arai ajon." Arai bonat ehe: "Ageun lolo 1.1.1999, mam bobo song abuni aibunga aberuka." arai bonat ehe: "Ageun lolo, mam bobo song abuni akoko, arai aiciad, arai adoteu," kwangin kwangin.

Itunga lo ipu mam duc epodonto aitodolonokinakiro ngun esumutu kesi bonik aitodolikin. Idumuni ijo icia fapo esumunitos ehe mam bobo kesi epote ainatrisigala, ebongokinete bobo aitowa ehore akaulo na apaarasia aarei bon. Arai bonat lu esumunitos adatoor ajon, ebongokinete itunga amat akaulo na ilapio iunt bon. Dudo ngun itator ituan ehe, "Konye gwai ber song abu kadau ilapio iuni?"

### Kesumutu

Ipu aitokisio noi kakwap kana, kacut ko Teso. Konye kasesen ka, atiokisio nu nu ipu itorumlos toma umauti lo Iteso. Alawamakisi Itesoamat noi idu lu ipu etarauta ngin aswam kec na epol kakere.

Ipu Iteso lu kwana ejenasi tansuamat. Idumuni ijo Etesot edili koreke topuruc sek, alosit aipakao, arai akora museri kicir toen, arai airut ebiat, arai adio aswam kere.

Apessan nu etacere ages kaswamkangin kere itemokit ngesi amania?

Iyasi amat atiokisio nu ipu toma Oteso.

### Ebit

Nasodit, erai amat epone ediope lo ebit. Amatak lu ipu.

Na Jack Okoro

ABU enabi Nekemia komony kosodi aitarur akaufna aanyan ebe aponi eibuga lo adakete luapapaake koityatiyarai (Neb 2: 11-20). Konye kwana adaan apak na aitarur ka aimony. Adau loasubaa aitomonokinerot lo Nebemia ebongor buker Betelebem nako Judah kaitemonokinda eibugake Yerusalem. Na ages kwana apak na aowan ihoro ka akauna mere einer.

Abu enabi obdoor ejenun etiai lo akoto Yerusalem tetere epodori aitemokinio.

kacut ngul lu itamunitos amat epetu kec losodit, eruasi lu ibitioko toma okalia kec. Anyarit song kes lu ibitioko okalia kec, maesii mam kes emorete apessan kec kede ikalia kec.

Kiswamau etunganan isingin 2,000 = arai 3,000 = apaaran, mam emorete apessan ngun kekale ke. Edaikini jengun kereomatet, 'dodo abongor ore emera. Aberu ka idowe ke kore ewanynuitos ican la egelegela: ainyam, anapito apero, amukian ka acie da. Konye ekooke kaheru kaya, mam ngun ikamunitos da. Akeswam aidil amat toni na edaunotor apessan ngun, kolosi bobo amoun aipakao acie.

Ipu, ido egelegela ican lu eyaani amat toma ore, ateker ka akwap kere.

Nasodit, ere lo itopolooritor elope amat, nes duc edakit etengei ngol kara, naarai erai duc aberu bon etamiri apodonor musiri akoru, kodili je amat. Aberu duc napa irimentuantu acie, ailpilipido, konapite idapaisa, kolosete idowe nono, koleokakos ikokes.

Etapji da adekanisai nu egelegela aapun kore kalo, katwakisisida, naarai emamut papa kere apak na italant ereke, arai boda aireske itunga ke, kwa erasitotor apessan ke kere amat.

Idowe lu kore kalo ecicing alosenen osomero, (Arai canat kwana kere abunio asisia naatita). Ere koimamti imiot da, emamnete icolongo da, emamei asot naegaad da. Ere lo erai eburi lu ican.

Eomitos atekerin acie ebe erausi Iteso anyamak ales. Konye nu abeit, ikidioko noi oreta lu Iteso, lu anyamere ales. Imomwagwai-gwai.

Konye ales na epol na ekoriete Iteso, erai na emunacre ajon. Ebakasi Iteso lu ipu ebe erai ainyam ales. aicanican alos na ebeitor

amuna ajon.

Etunganan lo itopoloorit amat ecicing ailere esotis. Nges duc lo eperonori esolo ngol kara. Nges duc lo erukitotor ijaka kanu esolo ngol kara.

Arai erai eswaman apugan da mam aswam ke elosi sjok lyapenenei alosit aswam kododor da anyounan

### Kamunor yesi kere ekaru lo edit emeret.

kaswam. Mam aswam ke isiyalamikit lu apolok ke ido mam nges itopolooru kaswam ke. Nges ca lopo enojongi mam adoketait ke ikanyakit.

Enyakata ican lu amat Teso kao no! idisamit eongadolit oni kere lu kimasi ajon ketutuboto ebe: "Ageun kokaru kalo, mam eong cut airiibore ebakaiajaseroka isawan 11(lu atibong) kedolo."

Mam aimat ajon erono. Nu orokoket adilennkinamat, ka aitopoloorit amat adepara kere kere kalpe kon.

### Kekwaikisi ai?

Edolit ngin idiope kaoni ketutuboto, ido katamata aitodolikin nu aitidisiar amat. Kijere oni ebe amat itulitoli aswamaswei wok. Kanokangon, katamata atikokin amuru nu elangir otawonowok kasodete agramar annat ajon kosawan lu abong, kidau aswamaswei wok.

Ijo ilopat nes ebeit aipuga akuwan kon, aimik nes aimat kitoni isawan ngul. Nakican, itunga lu ipu, erai awate kec keiipugaton kesi kotoma akiro nu amat. Etausi lu ibidesin luka ajon.

### Ekiol

Kanu aangarakin ngul lu mam epedontos aipuga awate kec, aomit eong ebe edolit ikaasulon lu kotemwan kere lukelTeso, kalu apolok (DiaructCouse:ile) da, aitutub ikisila lu isawan lu ecarnakitere itunga amat.

Kwape kwana, egennarete itunga amat ko Teso Ino Soreti, kosawan 11 lu atupunic, ido esinganakinene osawat ikanyiauni lu akuwam?

Erai abeidokosiamakirakisii itunga ajant ka adajaara. Konye ekot ailajaara na kontam itulitoli apolo na akwap.

Ecamakit daekisil loka Local Government ikaasulon lukio ikistrikitan, aitutub ikisilakec lu ipudasi kes katupetete kodistriktan kec, kamu ajokis na itunga kec. Ebeit do kes ajukar ikisila kec ngul mama ejai upagan na apolon (Aktabri) kena acamakirakso amosem ikisila ngul.

Eongkanaka, aomitebedolit amat kogcanat kosawan 10 lu abong, kitoni isawan ikany lu akuware kamaseta kere ko Teso, arai erai ajon nu Imusugan(Aor) jokona Iteso. Acamunit eong ebe ebinin na aitidisiar emeret nepepe ka akirosinei acie nu aorong kwape nat akalanyaanut, akoko, amuno, adoteu

Amatak: Mam aimat ajon keipone kalo erono, kenyadilmokin amat ko aitopoloorit adepara akiro keere nuka aija kon nes erono.

akangasiana kostedonia ka iboro ngul lu ipu itorumoset toma emaait, kacut emaat ko eingamakinis.

Ajoni bobo song da ebe, iun LCs, ijaka kamgamok isangabaitatodolikonikisili, mage kesi dulu "Singamat". Itungangarenok kwa kangas katamata kagiigang kena abilun awate kec isi itabularantios kesi, kasudete aitup eksil lo enawa lo atubor.

Abuni song alakar na apapun ebe etutub isilamik mutan ekisil lu amat, apun kosawan imwasi ne kitoni imwasi ne. Ajoni ebe mam epatana a itodolikin akul ngul, konye katamata cal ber.

Kamunor yesi kere ekaru (1999) lo ipu areemgion, idu lo edit emeret.

## Edolit airereor nu ekaru kalo atubor

Mam da enabi lo akoto elimer/aitodunio kotanga ebe: nges apeduri aitemonokin eibuga lokolo adakete luapapaake cheepa. Abu kololoar kware.

Duc aige ekaru ibusakinit itunga kere airere nu eswamata kes kokaru ido simula Loasuban noi.

Ejakait, ajakait, ijeni lem ip ebe atiyatiyanar arwatutin kon kere epone ngul? Kann inyo mam ijo da iyakutar nepepe ka iduwe kon, ahere kon ka idunyeta kon. Irereu ber ijo aijar kon, ekale kon.

ekanisa kon ka akoni aijaanakin, biui etenit cut? Na nes apak ijo aitubwo arwatutien na diyanaros.

Irie kaoni idamu atimin na aijaanakin Lokasubanwok, isru da aijanakin akwapra. Aticepak da ibangirik irie kaoni aitironikin arjai yesirie wok aso ejai kwana atiakak. Atiakak laije kalafoda. Nakwananasapak aisistananjai atiakakingin kageun da aitemonikin.

Irereu ber ijo ebe obu ijo kogeu ekale kon kede amins. Ekwaikini bo amina esitori

ai? Inyo ayau ansawan amuno kade ebit otasuse kan? Konyou kosodi aitemonokin nejai atiosin. Siri a erasin na ikopar itonibobookara ngul da.

Mam aimunon iboro la eroko ekale kon ingarakinete cut, ageun na esenunatar idunyeta kon ebe ikokoteno ijo, idote ijo, ikokobana ijo.

Arwaminis kere nuepone kalo erai aanyanet ebe atiyatiyanar watutinkon. Abu enabi komoruta ationin ke nepepe ka itunga idio lu amunongesi. "Iyanyutuyes

ationis nakwana ijaar ooi, (aijarawok, ekanisawok, ekalewok, akwapawok). Kopotu adukata tetere alemur ibie lu."

Aisitetreario egear kotoma eijar kon ber ilopet eringa ebonara kinga. Mam ijo epatana atitek ka aitutumun idunyet kon arai mam ber ijo ilopet isitetunga.

Naarai esiteteara Nebemia, abu einer ke ijangak noi itunga lu apoto koramata aimor kanges na adukun bobo Yerusalem.

Ateker, inyo ejok iswama

ijo kokaru kalo atuber kanu ajokis kon lon, ekalekon ecaledan arai bonatakwapakon. Kogee arai mam iswamasant ngun. Itirat da na ebe kogeu tetere ilosi ingaren kotoma apoto na aiyamwok.

Kogeuta itugapugam aigang abuikinata nuka apugan kanu ajokis wok ka iduwe wok koingare.

Eingapuguto da aswam naka ekanisawok ka aiiyanantu wok. Eyalakin allem ipesan, ka ibore ide kanu adakite ikanisanawok.

ETOF Nainonnuu, Opu (Dusouku) 31, 1998 - Januari (Orava) 6, 1999

# AISIJA/ANGALEU

# Akorakin PTCs iboro luka 60m/=

## Nao Northa Akefio

KANOKEKOI Juitatonere
miannakinaka 36 Mary's PTC,
Kanoke Koro PTC keni
korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep korep

Ekepakinio ken iboro lo ko Sorei PTC araasi 14.12.98/da, eboikitere aikeun ejautene Isomeroi kalu itutsonorere misianakinak.

Imera kanohan kana aijaikin PTCs iboro lo aha Bishop Geresom Ilukor kolimok apolokitok PTCs lu ahuin aiyatakin asiuman ietere kesi ebbemmete aura na iluikina kosodete da asalakin aewamudnei ken adauin apak na epol.

Abu Ilukor kongurian noi eipone lo abongorra asiuman kan noi ko Teas kohala ebe eboni rwans Teasainyunican hepa koingaren naarai mam ekapanakitisimeroilukoronia lu epole idwe lu miomete kohoma aiuola natlisa (UPE) abimar.

Eyabakit Ilukor angurian kowai kalo kwana meroiben eyonginour misianakinak ken ebe kunu kepedironio ken (chilidrom rigber)

"Mam boho misnakinaki itwaikitos ikeo itau toma aisisianakinnaaraimam idwe eyongitos keni," shala Ilukor. Abu ngesi kisiaiamik angor kano akukoranui ken kotoma asiuman kosodi aisiniyikukor kesi ayatakit aowan bagogeng eyabakit asiuman.

Abala Ilukor eliinukiso apolokitokaisisiako Soreiika Katakwi akokit aseyanar isomeroi kanu aitigogeng konye mera aduen

Dr. Abeja

Dijamaanti boho Abeja ebe edodor e President loka Rotary Club, Ejkt Biraroho apolokito adekin ngin ajemut atiokinioke kede aiyatakin ken agangat.

# Alemar HM lo Bugiri PS kanuka 4m/=

## Na Ewadikas Etep

APOLON asomero Bugiri PS kohuku Kibuku, Pallisa distrikt John hamya nasi elemar aswan kanuka 4,295,172/= lokaenisiankinak itaasyasrei kosabankosomero ke.

Apolokitonaisisiako distrikt

(DEO) Fred Sam Kibule nesi maai 15.12.98 stijanikini.Etip koyapesi ke alemaro na Hamya kopele.

Abala Kibule ebe iiriakitos kwana kesi amoot Hamya.

Koripata loka angicak citosomue lo apiai kodistrikt (internal auditors) lo apuensis 30.10.98 lo ejakakitsa

ekansulo lo apolon lo Pallisa distriktsesisetacanuit ebe abu apolon asomero irapanak newalimunikanyamihandren (ghost teachers) toma oregesita lo etacere impito.

Apolon asomero neri ebe ajedijulitokinsiaik abud kede loka batistina onda ebe abu ijerunisiropitiolu 4,295,170/=

kolapisi luka/Orana, Omaik koele (3kwang 1998.

Akira acisnasi abunio lo erai muanimanas isomeroe.(DIS) ko Pallisa, Charles Okel ikonyana pas ko Pallisa ebe epote kesi aidot apolok isomeroe lu mam epote aiiutub misiak kisomeroe ken jukan okaru lo.

# Etutuk Red Barnet aiduk Ajesa PS

## Na Eduit Tolbert Patrick

ERIONGET loka Red Barnet kontasuiduk isuoemikoKana distrikt ide kelomunte kakwap nako Denmark nasi artaasi 17.12.98 abu kidok pkasin kede aariak lu AkaraKan-Ajesa PS, Kapir kanu lins (Red Barnet) aiduk

esomero lo.

Apolokitos Red Barnet ko Kami, Dickens Ojamugengni edoki akanin kokiror lo eriongetke Apolonsisolong PTA, Tolbert Patrick Edait, apolonsisolong SMC Isamat James, abwoikitos apolon staro Kapir, Kenneth Omoria ka ikoku Yokoyasi Wabwire

ym abwoikitlucs idwe kesi da icie kalu edokitos akaminaitutuket na.

Aupasi Ojamuge kede Ejkt Olonga Charles lo abwoikit DEO ke Ejkt Radho Enokokin lo epolokit na abuliasio kere koKamidistrikt.

Abu Ojamuge itijenik auriak ebe atukomo akanyaarei,

eyapesi lo apolon esomero, acolooin keda ere apolon esomero ken abwi Red Barnet adukokin Akandori-Ajesa PS.

Elipit do ngesi auriak amanokin aituk amoru keda aswam agogeng.

Abu da ngesi kijuku elore aguar aiiri amoro arasai 18.12.98.

# UGANDA NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF SPECIAL EDUCATION

# UNISE-KYAMBOGO

# OFFICE OF THE DEAN OF STUDIES

# ACADEMIC OPPORTUNITIES

The Dean of Studies UNISE invites applications from suitable candidates for the following courses:

1. Community Based Rehabilitation (CBR)

The course provides knowledge on the philosophy of Community Based Rehabilitation Education, training and management as the equalisation of opportunities and the total integration of persons with disabilities into society. The participants will acquire relevant skills in the area of Rehabilitation, Management, Technical, Social skills and Teaching.

(a) Post Graduate Diploma - CBR 1 year

Entry requirements:

(i) A degree in Education, Social Science or its equivalent

(ii) A minimum of two years' experience working with persons with disabilities

For Private sponsorship scheme

Ugandans Sht. 1,566,000

Non-Ugandans $ 3,600

(b) Undergraduate Diploma - CBR 2 years

Entry requirements:

(i) Holds a certificate in Education, Social Work/Community Service, Health or any other related field

(ii) Have ordinary certificate of Education O' Level with at least 5 passes or its equivalent

(iii) A minimum professional experience of 2 years in the fields mentioned in (i) above.

For Private Sponsorship Scheme

Ugandan Sht. 1,250,000

Non-Ugandan $ 3,600

2. Diploma in Education (Special Needs Education) 2 years

This programme prepares teachers to work with children with special learning needs (such as Visual Impairment, Hearing Impairment, Mental Retardation, Gifted Children, socially/emotionally disturbed children, Autistic and other learning difficulties)

It also helps teachers to meet the challenge of inclusive Education/Universal Primary Education (UPE).

Entry Requirements:

a) A Grade III Teachers Certificate

b) An O'Level Certificate with 5 passes including English or its equivalent

c) A minimum of 3 years professional teaching experience for private sponsorship schemes

Ugandans Sht. 1,200,000

Non-Ugandans $ 3,600

Options in Mobility and Rehabilitation (MBR) 2 year

Mobility and Rehabilitation Programme is to prepare instructors to train persons with visual impairment to develop self-reliance and self sufficiency through travelling independently to desired goals in their community.

The Programme includes basic skills to assess, plan, design, execute and evaluate functional Mobility and Rehabilitation plans for persons with visual impairment in their own community adjusted to individual interests, potentials and needs.

Entry Requirements:

(i) hold a certificate from the field of Education, Health, Social Community Services and any other related field.

(ii) possess an Ordinary Certificate of Education (O' level) or its equivalent

(iii) have a minimum experience of two years of professional experience working in the field mentioned in (i) above.

For Private sponsorship scheme

Ugandan Sht. 1,250,000

Non-Ugandans $ 3,600

4. Certificate in Special Needs Education (3 months)

This programme is geared towards preparing teachers to meet the challenges brought by inclusive education and Universal Primary Education. Applications received throughout the year.

Admission Requirement

(a) Be holders of Grade III, Diploma or Graduate Teachers' Certificate

(b) Have a two-year practical teaching experience or be a social or health worker with children/ persons with disabilities or a parent of a child with a disability or special needs.

Starting date for this certificate course is February 1999.

For private Sponsorship Scheme

Ugandans Sht. 356,000/=

Non-Ugandans $ 850

Limited Scholarships are available from the Ministry of Education and Sports, and for persons working with UNAB, UFB, UNAD, COMBRA EARS/SNE and Ministry of Gender, Labour and Social Development. Applicants from these organisation should apply through their organisations. Other applicants may sponsor themselves or solicit sponsorship from else where.

Application forms are obtainable at UNISE at a fee of 6,000/= Ug. Sht. payable to Accounts Department.

Closing date: February 15, 1999.

Further inquires and applications address to:

The Dean of Studies,

Ugandan National Institute of Special Education,

P.O. Box 6474,

Fax: 288-41-222961

E-Mail: unise@swiftuganda.com.

# Egeun elaagano loka CECAFA Namukaga

Na Job Ugadal

ELAGAANO lo aikokor amunyelet kiding ikitaahan luka kide ka akidinger na Afrika (CECAFA) nen ebeit apeton kalaaro nako Nakiruha, Kampala agenn eransi 2.1.99 kitoni 16.01.99.

Itilmun 12 Instamuntim ko Rwanda, Burundi, Kenya, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Tanzania kaka Kanyakan ebeit amuria aikopo egin.

Etirina ber lo akwap nako REnunda kojana kwaps Rayon Sports nen ber edakh aikopo egin akauin nakoinpe keni adwokor ukaru 1997 kelaagano lo ajaikina Zanzibar.

Egentin attinliamar aboliasie ngon ketedebistimin lako Sonya TP ulo endebistim loka ab. South Africa nen ebani attinliamar kana akwapin nako Bulaya, Asia ka aibotsin aste nako Afrika.

Etirina lo Uganda SC Villa nen ebani apukor amuria na aikopo kangin kede Vitalyko Burundi

Naemukangneriani 2.1.99.

Naeoabirti ebeiti kenye kobo etirino lokiyanti kothonikini Ugandakojanukwaps. Espreni FC arotokin kede Dakadaha loko Somalia.

Egentin kenye abolia paster finali eransi 11.01.99. keda 12.01.99 kere kalere nako Nambuile.

Atutubet natyariri ne evenim nen ebolian eransi 14.1.99.

Itilmun kera keni lata SC Villa (Uganda) Vital (Burundi), KEM KEM (Zanzibar), kera ejansi egurupo "A".

Ugurupo "B" nen ejansi. Kiyova (Rwanda) AFC Limpurdu (Kenya) ka Electricity (Ethiopia).

Ugurupo "C" ken ejansi. Espreni (Uganda), Dakababa (Somalia) ka El-Mikal (Sudan).

Ictekini Red Sna (Eritrea), Yunga (Tanzania) ka Rayon Sports (Rwanda).

# Aremokisi ikearin Katakwi aromwa

Na D. Martie Eleagai

ETTIMUlo Katakwi Military Police FC ken apotuk inanyani aturubanga nako Katakwi Town Starukede igolon 4:2 kotoma amunyelet na atomo eketprime na atolonio ka alaro naka Apueton PS arsasi 16.12.98.

Kijukokin emopira, iskaule na adakikam 20 abu esapat. Opatemo lo KTS kitamata egolo lozedit. Abu egolo lo itakadik ikearin naarai anomital ken bubei ko kan. Kenya tomi adakikan 35 abu Moliawita aktarit lo adit kakere konangak emopira

egolo loka KTS. Abu do atutubet nasudit kongatakin erai 1:1.

Kegere atutubet na iyaret abu do akutan lo arai 2Lt A.Q. Obedria lo mam ber abu kongolok iktufa lu emopira eriko kegesara aikut kowama nu namukin ainakin inap iarnik akandi nadwi ka bobe ayatakin ka nepanon ainakin akandi namegan ebe naarai apotuk todomikinai inap egul iyare kouawan lu siyeng kismamonginantningen. Arai adeget loka KTS, adeget arai ektarit.

Junior Epalat lo edari kwaps ekaputem lo KTS ngesi abu kouwala egolo lo iyareit kodakikan 5 bsm.

Abu ekearit lo ebe Okis kinyanga egcolo lotaraiet. Na atomo do aroma nei na adamunia ebaaka lo KTS akangas akqu anejirok in Ikabat lo apotuk todomikinai ngesi anomok kodumun ibobo Moliawita arereng na aitanut egcolo lo tuniet.

Eudito do adakikan iarnibebi aengetakin abu ikearit yan ebei Emoron Albert kitsom egcolo lo iwongenet. Abu do ekaputin lo ikearin, Otidi, kolimok Etop ebe abeit ken olosit elaagano Moroto.

Akeran imitui 100 lo abwoikit Saroti distriki kolaagano loka. Eas African Junior Championships lo ajaikina Nambole, Kampala kelap okaru lo, Richard Onyait itodiari emidalit lo abu ngesi kodam kolaagano lotaraeit. Abu ngesi koker 100m kotoma atikatikan 10.2 atupaki kola Magaga lo Kampala lo abu koker kotoma atikatikan 10.1. Aputo na to Jonathan Maroko.

# Epudapuda Usuk FC Acowa FC

## Igoolon 5 lu abu komen kes ainyangar

Na Peter Okoel

APETUN amunyelet na adepit adepar nupa nei abu kopan kiding etirina lo Acowa FC linda la Usuk FC kalaero nako Usuk Buya PS. Abu Usuk FC kidapudap Acowa FC igoolon 5-0.

Agrun abolia kouawan itomon ka atutubet konubiton itimun hala akotmi abwangar ebe kana adumun eigolo lozedit, kobala eisawa cwaa

ilulouteamaak

Ketuboros adakikan akanyaongon katutubet kanazedit abu esapat lo ebe Ekolo P lotiomukalo Usuk FC kotobutub lorwatok kitoni abitakin egolo lozedit.

Nepa eriko Acowa emurani ebe ti ainyang egolo abu bobo esapat kinyogok aswalakin Acowa egolo loiyareit kotuboro adakikan bala 15.

Abu do abolia kipurujaun

erono nei neda estrimiaritor apuapinkigokobalasi baniko lu amaete ebe "Ekolo Acowa abongor kakanin," kotamitmi lu Acowa luda abu aiterot kikamunitemurai amamete lu amaete.

Ketam Acowa aridakin abolian letiimukalo Katakwi TC FC, lo ebe Charles Ozen loejena nei kamu abolia enaaba kokanyet, mam nu apokiri Ozen aswam.

Eroko Acowa itumoro

kobitakinete kwi egolo lotuniet.

Abu atutubet nasudit kongetakin keda igolon 3:0. Katutubet kana iyareit nada agrun konubite bala akota Acowa ainyangar igoolon lu, nesi mam Usuk abu kocam. Kedasnosi adakikan 20 abu esapat Malinga lo Usuk FC kitarak egolo loiwongenet. Eroko Acowa FC ekwemdulit inyogokini bobu Ekolo aswalar egolo loikanyet.

## IYEMUTO LU ABOLIASIO

IsiitikitETOP ewadikak ke aicajukunun iyemuto lu ilaagano lu aboliasio nu iponesio ken katutubena kec.

Ilipit da ETOP apolokito aboliasio kodistriktan luki Soroti, Kumi, Katakwi, Pallisi ka Tororo ageun aiswamana ka ewadikak kec.
